Joshua19:5 Siklag, Bet-Markabot, Hazar-Soussa," 
1Chronicles4:31 an Bet-Markabot, Hazar-Zouzim, Bet-Biri oun an Shaarayim. Kolla his lengre forya, bis te vas o David lengro baro ray." 
Matthew1:1 Kava hi o liil, hoy sikrella, koon o Yezous Kristeskre phoure his. Mank lende his o David oun o Abraham." 
Matthew1:2 O Abrahameskro čavo his o Isaak. Leskro čavo his o Yakob. Koleskre čave his o Youda oun leskre phrala. 
Matthew1:3 O Youda las čaven. Kolla his o Perez oun o Zera. Lengri day his i Tamar. O Perez las i čaves. Kova his o Esrom. Koleskro čavo his o Aram. 
Matthew1:4 Koleskro čavo his o Amminadab. Koleskro čavo his o Nason. Koleskro čavo his o Salmon. 
Matthew1:5 Koleskro čavo his o Boas. Koleskri day his i Rahab. O Boas las i čaves. Kova his o Obed. Koleskri day his i Ruth. O Obed las i čaves. Kova his o Isay. 
Matthew1:6 Koleskro čavo his o David, ko baro ray. Koleskro čavo his o Salomo. Koleskri day his i romni foun o Uriya." 
Matthew1:7 O Salomo las i čaves. Kova his o Roboam. Koleskro čavo his o Abia. Koleskro čavo his o Asaf. 
Matthew1:8 Koleskro čavo his o Yosafat. Koleskro čavo his o Yoram. Koleskro čavo his o Usiya. 
Matthew1:9 Koleskro čavo his o Yotam. Koleskro čavo his o Ahas. Koleskro čavo his o Hiskiya. 
Matthew1:10 Koleskro čavo his o Manasse. Koleskro čavo his o Amos. Koleskro čavo his o Yosia. 
Matthew1:11 Koleskre čave his o Yoyakin oun leskre phrala. Ap ko tsiro van i Israelitarya pandlo, oun van an o them Babilonia anlo." 
Matthew1:12 Oun har yon an o them Babilonia djivan, vas o Shealtiel boldo. Leskro dad his o Yoyakin. Oun o Shealtiel las i čaves. Kova his o Zorobabel." 
Matthew1:13 Koleskro čavo his o Abihoud. Koleskro čavo his o Elyakim. Koleskro čavo his o Azor. 
Matthew1:14 Koleskro čavo his o Zadok. Koleskro čavo his o Akim. Koleskro čavo his o Elioud. 
Matthew1:15 Koleskro čavo his o Eleazar. Koleskro čavo his o Mattan. Koleskro čavo his o Yakobo. 
Matthew1:16 Koleskro čavo his o Yosef. Koleskri romni his i Maria. Lakro čavo hi o Yezous. Kova kharella Kristo. 
Matthew1:17 Kol tsele phoure, kay djivan yek pal o vavar pal o Abraham oun glan o David, his deesh-te-star phoure. Oun kol tsele phoure, kay djivan yek pal o vavar pal o David oun glan ko tsiro, kay van i Israelitarya an o them Babilonia anlo, his deesh-te-star phoure. Oun kol tsele phoure, kay djivan yek pal o vavar pal ko tsiro, oun glan o Yezous Kristo, his ninna deesh-te-star phoure." 
Matthew1:18 Oun yaake his kova, har o Yezous Kristo boldo vas. Leskri day his i Maria. Lakro pirno his o Yosef. Har yon gomme gar romedino his, vas i Maria vavarčandes dran o Debleskro Dourho." 
Matthew1:19 O Yosef his i lačo morsh. Oun yob kamas kek ladj ap late anell. Doleske kamas lo lat čorrhanes te moukell. 
Matthew1:20 Har leske kova an o shero trouyel djas, vas o Debleskro bolepaskro pash leste an i souni, oun penas: “Yosef, tou Davideskro čavo, ma traash, te less i Mariat pash toute, te romedineress lat! O ternepen vas dran o Debleskro Dourho an late." 
Matthew1:21 Oun yoy lella i čaves. Tou deh les o lab Yezous. Yob lella i doosh peskre menshendar ap peste. 
Matthew1:22 Kova lauter vas yaake, te vell ko lab čačo, hoy o Devel ap peskro rakepaskro penas:" 
Matthew1:23 I terni čay, kay gomme kek morshestar an tapedo vas, lella i ternepen. Oun yon denn les o lab Emmanuel. Kova kharella: O Devel hi mentsa.”" 
Matthew1:24 Oun o Yosef stas pre, oun kras yaake, har o Debleskro bolepaskro leske penas. Oun yob las i Mariat pash peste." 
Matthew1:25 Yaake rah, har ko ternepen gar boldo vas, čivas lo pes gar pash late. Oun har o čavo boldo vas, das yob les o lab Yezous." 
Matthew2:1 Ap ko tsiro, har vas o Yezous an o foro Betlehem an o them Youdea boldo, his o Herodes o baro ray pral o them. Koy van goseve morsha dran o them, kay o kham pre djala, oun djan an o foro Yerusalem. Yon poučan i menshendar an o foro Yerusalem:" 
Matthew2:2 “Kay hi o ternepen, kay vell o baro ray pral i biboldende? Mer dikam ko bolepaskri momeli ap o bolepen pre te djal, hoy mende sikras, kay yob boldo vas. Kanna vam kate, te mangas les an.”" 
Matthew2:3 Har o baro ray Herodes kova shounas, trashas lo. Oun ninna boud menshe an o foro Yerusalem trashan leha khetne." 
Matthew2:4 Oun o Herodes moukas i tsele bare rashayen oun i biboldengre čačepangren khetne te vell, oun poučas lendar, kay ko baro ray boldo vella, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob." 
Matthew2:5 Oun yon penan leske: “An o foro Betlehem an o them Youdea. Yaake činas kova o Debleskro rakepaskro: 
Matthew2:6 Tou, o foro Betlehem, hoy an o them Youdea čiddo hi, tout hi i baro lab mashkral i tsele forya an o them Youdea. Dran toute vella ko baro ray, kay ap mire menshende, o Israel, garda della, yaake har i bakrengro ray garda della ap peskre bakre.”" 
Matthew2:7 Palle moukas o Herodes kol goseve morshen čorrhanes pash peste te anell, te poučell lo lendar, kaana ko bolepaskri momeli diklo vas." 
Matthew2:8 Oun yob penas lenge: Djan an o foro Betlehem oun rodenn ko ternepen! Oun te hatsan les, penenn les mange, te nay vap me ninna, te mangap les an." 
Matthew2:9 Oun har yon kova lestar shounan, djan le doureder. Oun glan lende djas ko bolepaskri momeli, hoy yon an pengro them dikan. Oun kote, kay o ternepen hi, ačas koy bolepaskri momeli pral vergel tardo." 
Matthew2:10 Oun har yon koy bolepaskri momeli koy tardo dikan, van le o tselo djiyestar barhtelo." 
Matthew2:11 Oun yon djan an ko kheer, oun dikan kote o ternepas oun leskri dat, i Mariat. Oun yon vitsran pen glan leste tele, mangan les an, oun čivan ko kouč bravlepen glan leste, hoy dan le leste. Oun kova his sonakay, kouč kasht, hoy soungella mishto, ninna vavar kouč kasht, hoy vella djet lestar kerdo." 
Matthew2:12 Oun an i souni penas o Devel lenge, te djan le gar pash o Herodeste pale. Yaake djan le penge, te venn le ap i vavar drom an pengro them pale." 
Matthew2:13 Oun har yon penge djan, vas o Debleskro bolepaskro pash o Yosefeste an i souni, oun penas ap leste: “Ste pre! Le o ternepas oun leskri dat, oun naash an o them Egiptia! O Herodes moukell o ternepas te rodell, te marell lo les. Ač koy, bis te penau me les touke, te vess pale!”" 
Matthew2:14 Oun yob stas pre an koy rat, las o ternepas oun leskri dat, oun djas lentsa an o them Egiptia." 
Matthew2:15 Oun kote ačas lo, yaake rah har o Herodes djido his. Oun yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Devel ap peskro rakepaskro penas: Dran o them Egiptia dom miro čaves gole." 
Matthew2:16 I goseve morsha djan ap i vavar drom an pengro them, oun van gar pash o Herodeste pale. Har yob kova hayvas, vas i bari rholi ap leste. Oun yob bičras lourden an o foro Betlehem oun an i gaba trouyel, te marenn le kol tsele morsh čaven, kay douy bersha oun terneder hi. Kol douy bersha his ko tsiro, kay i goseve morsha leske penan, te vas o čavo boldo bis ko dives." 
Matthew2:17 Koy vas kova čačo, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yeremia, penas:" 
Matthew2:18 Bari gole oun boud ropen shounan le an o gab Rama. I Rachel rovella pral peskre čavende, oun kamell kekestar lače laba te shounell. Lakre čave hi bouder gar koy." 
Matthew2:19 An ko tsiro, har o Yosef an o them Egiptia his, meras o Herodes. Koy vas o Debleskro bolepaskro pash leste an i souni," 
Matthew2:20 oun penas ap leste: “Ste pre! Le o čaves oun leskri dat, oun dja pale an o them Israel! Kolla hi moulo, kay kaman o čaves te marell.”" 
Matthew2:21 Oun yob stas pre, las o čaves oun leskri dat, oun djas an o them Israel pale." 
Matthew2:22 Ap o drom shounas lo, te hi o Arkelao kanna o baro ray pral o them Youdea. Kova his o Herodeskro čavo. Doleske trashas o Yosef, te djal lo kote pale. Oun o Devel penas leske an i souni, kay te djal. Oun yob djas an o them Galilea." 
Matthew2:23 Oun kote djivas lo an i foro, hoy kharella Nazaret. Oun yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro penan: Yon denn les Nazaretari gole." 
Matthew3:1 An ko tsiro vas i morsh an o moulo them an o them Youdea. Leskro lab his Yohanni. Yob hi kova, kay taufras i menshen." 
Matthew3:2 Oun yob penas i menshenge: “Moukenn t'maro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom! O tsiro vell sik, kay lell o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin.”" 
Matthew3:3 O Yohanni hi ko morsh, kolestar o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, penas: Kote hi yek, kay an o moulo them gole della oun penella: Krenn o drom o Debleske, te nay vell lo pash i menshende! Lenn halauter krik, hoy o Debleske an o drom čiddo hi." 
Matthew3:4 I plaashka dran firhengre balla his ap leste. Oun i ledertikri dori his troul leste. Oun leskro rhapen his gvin oun tikne stepangre, kay stenn an o zenlepen trouyel." 
Matthew3:5 Oun boud menshe djan pash leste. Kolla van dran o foro Yerusalem oun dran o tselo them Youdea oun dran o them pash o pani Yordan. 
Matthew3:6 Oun yon penan glan i menshende havo čilačo koova yon kran, oun moukan pen lestar an o pani Yordan te taufrell." 
Matthew3:7 Ninna boud Farisarya oun Sadducarya van pash leste, te moukenn le pen lestar te taufrell. Har yob kolen dikas, penas lo ap lende: “T'mer čilače sapa! T'mer nay nashenn gar krik glan o Debleskri rholi, hoy vella pral i menshende." 
Matthew3:8 Sikrenn i menshende, te djan t'mer ap o Debleskro drom oun bouder gar ap o čilačo drom!" 
Matthew3:9 Ma penenn: O Abraham hi maro dad! Me penau t'menge: O Devel nay krell dran kal barra o Abrahameskre čaven. 
Matthew3:10 T'mer han har rouka, kay venna tele dino. I tover hi koy čiddo, te vell ko tselo rouk tele dino. Hako rouk, hoy hidjrella kek lačo koova, vell tele dino, oun an i yag vitsedo." 
Matthew3:11 Me čivau t'men an o pani. Kova sikrella, kay t'mer moukan t'maro čilačo drom, oun djan kanna ap o Debleskro drom. Pal mande vell yek, kova hi zorleder har me. Oun me hom gar moldo, te hidjrap leskre kirrha leske. Kova čivell o Debleskro Dourho ap t'mende. Kova hi har i yag." 
Matthew3:12 Yob hi har i harho, kay rikrell i vitsepaskri an peskro vast, te vitsrell lo o djob pral, yaake te perell o phouss tele ap i phoub. Peskro djob anell lo an peskro djobeskro kheer dren. Oun o phouss rhačrell lo an i yag, hoy hako tsiro rhačella.”" 
Matthew3:13 Ap ko tsiro vas o Yezous dran o them Galilea pash o pani Yordan, te moukell lo pes o Yohannestar te taufrell." 
Matthew3:14 Kova kamas les gar te taufrell. Yob penas ap leste: “Tou hounte taufrals man. Hoske val tou pash mande, te taufrap tout?”" 
Matthew3:15 Koy penas o Yezous ap leste: “Mouk kova kanna yaake te vell! Hi mishto menge, te kras kova lauter, hoy o Devel mendar kamella.” Oun o Yohanni kras, hoy o Yezous leske penas," 
Matthew3:16 oun taufras o Yezouses. Har o Yezous dran o pani pral djas, djas o bolepen pre. Oun yob dikas o Debleskro Dourho har i parno čirklo ap peste tele te vell." 
Matthew3:17 Oun i rakepen dran o bolepen penas: “Kava hi miro čavo, koles me kamau. Pral leste hom me barhtelo.”" 
Matthew4:1 Pal kova anas o Debleskro Dourho o Yezouses an o moulo them, kay kamas les o beng o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell." 
Matthew4:2 Oun star-deesh (40) divessa oun ratsya rhas o Yezous či. Oun palle vas les i bari bok. 
Matthew4:3 Koy vas o beng pash leste, oun penas: “Te hal tou o Debleskro čavo, rake ap kol barra, te vell lendar maro!”" 
Matthew4:4 Penas o Yezous: “An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O maro kokres rikrell i menshes gar djido. Yob djivell dran hako lab, hoy o Devel rakrella. ”" 
Matthew4:5 Pal kova anas les o beng an o Debleskro foro. Kova hi o foro Yerusalem. Oun o beng čivas les ap o Debleskro baro kheer pral pre," 
Matthew4:6 oun penas ap leste: “Te hal tou o Debleskro čavo, mouk tout tele te perell! An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O Devel penas ap peskre bolepangre, te hidjrenn le tout lengre vastentsa, te doukreh tou tire pire gar ap i barra. ”" 
Matthew4:7 Penas o Yezous: “Ninna hi an o Debleskro lab činlo: Rike o Debles gar dineleske, te sikrell lo tout har zorelo yob hi. ”" 
Matthew4:8 Pal kova anas les o beng ap i bari berga pre, oun sikras les i tsele themma ap i phoub oun lengro bravlepen," 
Matthew4:9 oun penas: “Kava lauter kamau tout te dell, te pereh tou glan mande tele, oun mangeh man an.”" 
Matthew4:10 Koy penas o Yezous ap leste: “Dja touke mandar, tou beng! An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: Tou mangess o Debles an, – yob hi tiro ray, – oun vess leske kokres koy! ”" 
Matthew4:11 Koy djas peske o beng. Oun bolepangre van pash o Yezouseste, oun his leske koy." 
Matthew4:12 Oun har o Yezous shounas, te vas o Yohanni stildo, djas lo dran o them Youdea vin, oun djas pale an o them Galilea." 
Matthew4:13 Kote ačas lo gar an o foro Nazaret. Yob djas doureder oun djivas an o foro Kapernaum, hoy pash o baro pani Genezaret čiddo hi. Kova hi an i themma Zabulon oun Naftali čiddo." 
Matthew4:14 Yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, glan i rah tsiro penas:" 
Matthew4:15 T'mer menshe an i themma Zabulon oun Naftali, t'mer, kay djivenna pash o baro pani, an o them vergel o pani Yordan, t'mer djivenn kote, kay kolla djivenna, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar." 
Matthew4:16 T'menge hi ko lab, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro penas: T'mer djivenna an i rati, oun dikenna i bari momeli. Yaake har o kham pre djala, vella i momeli pash kolende, kay hi len traash o merepastar." 
Matthew4:17 Ap ko tsiro penas o Yezous ap i menshende: “Moukenn t'maro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom! O tsiro vell sik, kay lell o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin.”" 
Matthew4:18 Oun har yob pash o baro pani an o them Galilea djas, dikas lo kote douy phralen: O Simon, kay kharella ninna Petro, oun leskro phrales, o Andreas. Kolla his mačepangre, oun vitsran pengre mačengre gone an o pani, te taprenn le mačen." 
Matthew4:19 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Avenn mantsa! Me krau t'mendar menshen, kay anenn vavaren pash mande.”" 
Matthew4:20 Har yon kova shounan, moukan le pengre mačengre gone, oun djan leha." 
Matthew4:21 Oun yob djas doureder, oun dikas douy vavar phralen: O Yakobo oun o Yohanni. Kolengro dad hi o Zebedeo. Yon his pash pengro dadeste an o bero beshdo, oun kran i mačengre gone tseles. Oun yob das len gole." 
Matthew4:22 Oun sik stan le pre, moukan o bero oun pengro dades, oun djan leha." 
Matthew4:23 Oun yob djas an o tselo them Galilea trouyel, oun rakras an i biboldengre kangria, oun penas i menshenge ko lačo lab, kay o Devel kamell len dran o čilačepen te lell, oun kamell lengro ray te vell. Oun yob kras lauteren sasto, kay mank lende nasselo hi." 
Matthew4:24 Oun ninna an o tselo them Syria shounan le lestar. Oun yon anan lauteren pash leste, kay nasselo hi. Mashkral lende his kolla, kay hi len bare douka, oun kolla, kay hi an lende benga, oun kolla, kay hi nasselo an pengro shero, oun kolla, kay hi bango. Oun yob kras len sasto." 
Matthew4:25 Oun boud menshe djan leske palla. Yon van dran o them Galilea, oun dran ko them, kay i deesh forya čiddo hi. Yon van ninna dran o them Youdea, oun dran o foro Yerusalem, oun dran o them, hoy ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan čiddo hi." 
Matthew5:1 Oun har yob kol tsele menshen dikas, djas lo ap i berga pre, oun beshas pes tele. Oun leskre mala van pash leste, te shounenn les le." 
Matthew5:2 Oun yob penas ap lende: 
Matthew5:3 Barhtele hi kolla, kay djinenna, kay hi le čorvelo glan o Debleste. Yon djivenna o Debleha khetne an o bolepen oun lenn leskro bravlepen." 
Matthew5:4 Barhtele hi kolla, kay kanna rovenna. O Devel lell lengri douk dran lengro dji." 
Matthew5:5 Barhtele hi kolla, kay kek čingepen krenna. O Devel dell len i tseli phoub." 
Matthew5:6 Barhtele hi kolla, kay kanna pal o čačepen bokenna oun troushenna. O Devel krell len čalo." 
Matthew5:7 Barhtele hi kolla, kay hi len i baro dji i vavar menshenge. O Debles hi i baro dji lenge." 
Matthew5:8 Barhtele hi kolla, kay hi len i djoudjo dji. Yon dikenn o Debles pengre yakentsa." 
Matthew5:9 Barhtele hi kolla, kay krenna, te vell kek čingepen mank i menshende. O Devel kharell len peskre čave." 
Matthew5:10 Kolla, kay krenn, hoy o Devel kamella, oun doleske lenn len i menshe palla, kolla hi barhtelo! Yon djivenna o Debleha khetne an o bolepen." 
Matthew5:11 T'mer patsenn ap mande. Doleske praasenn le t'men, lenn t'men palla, oun rakrenn rhorhene čilače laba pral t'mende. Te krenn le kova, avenn barhtele!" 
Matthew5:12 Givenn oun denn gole i barhtyatar ap ko dives! O Devel dell t'men i baro bravlepen an o bolepen. Yaake har yon t'men palla lenna, yaake lan le o Debleskre rakepangren an o phouro tsiro ninna palla." 
Matthew5:13 T'mer han o loon ap kay phoub. Te nashras o loon peskri zoor, hi lo bouder gar mishto. Oun tou nay kreh bouder či, te vell lo pale londo. Ko loon molell či bouder. Tou nay vitsreh les toutar. Oun i menshe stakrenn les khetne." 
Matthew5:14 T'mer han i momeli ap kay phoub. Oun i foro, hoy pral ap i berga hi, nay ačell gar khatedo." 
Matthew5:15 Kek rhačell i momeli an oun čivell lat tel i piri. Na-a, yob čivell lat ap i momelengri, te vell koy momeli diklo hakenestar, kay an o kheer hi." 
Matthew5:16 Yaake hounte venn t'mer har i momeli, hoy rhačell glan i menshende, te dikenn le, havo lačo koova t'mer lauter krenna, oun te sharenn le o Debles, kay hi t'maro dad an o bolepen." 
Matthew5:17 Hayvenn man mishto: Me vom gar, te čivap kol laba ap i rig, hoy o Mose oun o Debleskre rakepangre penan. Na-a! Ko krau me gar. Me vom, te krap kova, hoy yon penan." 
Matthew5:18 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Yaake rah har o bolepen oun i phoub ačenna, yaake rah vell či krik lino kol labendar, hoy o Mose oun kol Debleskre rakepangre penan. Vitar gar o tikneder lab vell krik lino yaake rah, bis te vell lauter čačo, hoy glan i rah tsiro penlo vas." 
Matthew5:19 Koon yek kol tikneder labendar ap i rig čivella, oun i menshenge kova yaake penella, kova hi o tikneder mashkral kolende, kay djivenn khetne o Debleha an o bolepen. Koon krella, hoy o Devel penas, oun sikrell kova i menshende, kova vella bares mashkral kolende, kay djivenn khetne o Debleha an o bolepen." 
Matthew5:20 Oun me penau t'menge: T'mer nay djivenn gar o Debleha khetne an o bolepen, te krenn t'mer gar, hoy o Devel kamella. Oun t'mer hounte krenn kova feteder, har i biboldengre čačepangre oun i Farisarya kova krenna." 
Matthew5:21 T'mer djinenna, te vas ap i phourende penlo: Ma mare kekes! Koon yekes marella, kova hounte vell glan o čačepaskro anlo, oun lell peskri phagi." 
Matthew5:22 Me penau t'menge: Koon ap peskro phraleste rhoyedo hi, kova hounte vell glan o čačepaskro anlo. Oun koon peskro phrales praasella, kova hounte vell glan i pralstoune čačepangre anlo. Oun koon penella: Dja touke pash o bengeste! kova vella an o bengeskri yag vitsedo." 
Matthew5:23 Te djah tou an o Debleskro baro kheer, te dess o Debles čomone, oun kote djal touke an o shero trouyel, te hi tiro phraal rhoyedo ap toute," 
Matthew5:24 palle mouk kova čiddo, hoy tou kamal o Debles te dell! Dja pash tiro phraleste, oun dik, te venn t'mer pale mishto khetne! Oun palle de kova, hoy tou anal, o Debleste!" 
Matthew5:25 Te hi tout siyaan pash yekeste, oun hal leha ap o drom pash o čačepaskro, palle playse tiri siyaan yaake rah, har hal tou leha ap o drom, te nay dell yob tout gar an o čačepaskro vast! Oun kova dell tout an o klisteskro vast. Oun kova vitsrell tout an o stilepen!" 
Matthew5:26 Čačepah, me penau touke: Tou veh gar dran o stilepen vin yaake rah, har tou playsral gar tiri tseli siyaan." 
Matthew5:27 “T'mer djinenna, kay vas glan i rah tsiro ap i phourende penlo: Romeha, ma rhorhe tiri romyat i vavar djouvyah! Romniya, ma rhorhe tiro romes i vavar morsheha!" 
Matthew5:28 Me penau t'menge: Koon ap i vavareskri romyate dikella, te sovell lo lah, kova rhorhras peskri romyat an peskro dji." 
Matthew5:29 Te kamell tiro yak čomone te dikell, hoy anell tout ap i čilačo drom, palle čin les vin, oun vitse les toutar! Hi touke feteder, te nashress yek yak, har te vess an o bengeskri yag vitsedo." 
Matthew5:30 Oun te kamell tiro čačo vast, te kress i čilačo koova, palle de les tele, oun vitse les toutar! Hi touke feteder, te nashress tou yek vast, har te djas an o bengeskri yag." 
Matthew5:31 Glan i rah tsiro vas ap i phourende penlo: Kova, kay peskri romyat moukella, kova dell lat i liil, te nay djal li peske." 
Matthew5:32 Me penau t'menge: Kones hi i romni, kay rhorhras les gar i vavar morsheha, oun yob moukell lat, kova krell, te lell li i vavares. Oun yaake anell li doosh ap peste. Oun kova, kay romedinerell i moukli djouvyat, kova anell doosh ap peste, te las lo i vavareskri romyat." 
Matthew5:33 T'mer djinenn ninna, kay vas glan i rah tsiro ap i phourende penlo: De kek rhorheni sovel tele! Oun kova, hoy tou o Debleske sovel dal, te kress ninna!" 
Matthew5:34 Me penau t'menge: Ma denn t'men sovel! Ma denn gole ap o bolepen, te shounell lo t'mari sovel! O Devel hi kote o ray." 
Matthew5:35 Ma denn gole ap i phoub, te shounell li t'mari sovel! O Devel hi ninna kote o ray. Ma denn gole ap o foro Yerusalem, te shounell lo t'mari sovel! Kova hi o Debleskro foro." 
Matthew5:36 Ma denn vitar kek sovel ap t'maro shero! T'mer nay krenn kek bal ap t'maro shero kalo oun kek bal parno. 
Matthew5:37 Te penenn t'mer: Ava! yaake hounte vell kova ninna: Ava! Oun te penenn t'mer: Na-a! yaake hounte vell kova ninna: Na-a! Hako lab, hoy pral vergel hi, vell o bengestar." 
Matthew5:38 T'mer djinenna, kay vas glan i rah tsiro ap i phourende penlo: Koon doukrell i vavares, koleske kress, har yob kras oun gar boudeder: Te doukras lo i vavareskro yak, palle douke leskro yek yak kokres. Te doukras lo i vavareskro dand, palle douke leskro yek dand kokres." 
Matthew5:39 Me penau t'menge: Ma hadenn t'maro vast ap koleste, kay kras t'men čilačo koova! Te das touke yek ap i čači čam, koleske rike ninna i servi koy, te dell lo tout!" 
Matthew5:40 Oun kova, kay anell tout glan i čačepangre, te lell lo tiro gad, koles de ninna tiri plaashka!" 
Matthew5:41 Oun te kamell yek toutar, te djas tou yek kotar drom leha, yaake dja leha douy kope yaake dour ap o drom!" 
Matthew5:42 Te mangell yek toutar čomone, palle de les kova! Ma biče koles toutar, kay kamell toutar love te patsell!" 
Matthew5:43 T'mer djinenna, kay glan i rah tsiro i phourenge penlo vas: Ab lačes ap tire menshende! Ma ab lačes ap koleste, kay kras čilačo koova ap toute." 
Matthew5:44 Me penau t'menge: Avenn lačes kolenge, kay hi čilačo ap t'mende! Mangenn o Debles kolenge, kay lenn t'men palla!" 
Matthew5:45 Yaake han t'mer čačepah čave o baro Deblestar, kay hi t'maro dad an o bolepen. Yob moukella o kham pre te djal kol čilačenge oun kol lačenge. Oun yob dell brishin ap kolende, kay pal o čačepen djivenna, ninna ap kolende, kay čilačo koova krenna." 
Matthew5:46 T'mer te venn lačes kolenge, kay kran lačo koova ap t'mende, patsenn t'mer, kay o Devel sharell t'men? Na-a! Ninna i rhorhene hi lačes kolenge, kay ap lende lačes hi." 
Matthew5:47 T'mer te han lačes ap t'mare phralende kokres, palle krenn t'mer, hoy lauter krenna. Ninna kolla, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar, krenn kova, hoy t'mer krenna." 
Matthew5:48 T'mer hounte venn yaake lačes ap i menshende, har t'maro dad an o bolepen hi lačes ap i menshende." 
Matthew6:1 Denn yak, har krenn t'mer lačo koova! Ma krenn les yaake, te dikenn i menshe kova oun sharenn t'men! Koon t'mendar kova krella, koles dell t'maro dad an o bolepen kek lačepen pale." 
Matthew6:2 Tou te deh i čorveles love, palle ma pen kova hakeneske! Ma kre har kolla, kay hi len douy djia, oun penenn an i biboldengre kangria oun ap o drom, havo lačepen yon kran, te venn le i menshendar sharedo. Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kolla lenna bouder či o Deblestar. Yon anan pengro lačepen kokres dren." 
Matthew6:3 Tou te deh i čorveles love, palle kre les čorrhanes, te djinell les kek! Mouk tiro servo vast gar te djinell, hoy tiro čačo vast kras! O Devel, kay hi tiro dad an o bolepen, dikell ninna kova, hoy tou čorrhanes kral. Oun yob dell tout ko lačepen pale, hoy tou kral." 
Matthew6:4  
Matthew6:5 Tou te rakreh o Debleha, palle ma kre kova har kolla, kay hi len douy djia. Yon kamenn, te dikenn len i menshe, har yon an i biboldengre kangria oun ap o drom tardo hi, oun o Debleha rakrenna. Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kolla lenna či o Deblestar. Yon anan pengro lačepen kokres dren." 
Matthew6:6 Tou te rakreh o Debleha, palle dja an tiri isema, klide o voudar pal toute, oun kote rake o Debleha! Oun o baro Devel, kay hi tiro dad an o bolepen, dikell tout kote. Oun yob dell o lačepen pale, hoy tou kral." 
Matthew6:7 T'mer te rakrenn o Debleha, palle penenn leske gar boud laba, yaake har kolla krenna, kay prindjrenn o čačo Debles gar. Yon patsenna, te rakrenn le boud, palle shounell len lengro devel." 
Matthew6:8 Ma krenn kova yaake har yon! Oun o baro Devel, kay hi t'maro dad an o bolepen, djinella, hoy hounte vell t'men djipaske. Yob djinella kova glan ko tsiro, kay t'mer les mangenna." 
Matthew6:9 T'mer te rakrenn o Debleha, penenn: Maro dad an o bolepen. Tiro lab vell sharedo!" 
Matthew6:10 Te vell ko tsiro sik, kay tou o ray hal pral i tseli phoub! Te krenn i menshe ap i phoub kova, hoy tou kameh, yaake har ninna kolla an o bolepen krenn, hoy tou kameh!" 
Matthew6:11 De men maro maro hako dives! 
Matthew6:12 Oun biste mari doosh, hoy mer ap mende anam! Oun ninna mer bistrah o čilačepen, hoy i vavar ap mende kran." 
Matthew6:13 Ma mouk men tiro dromestar tele te djal! Le men dran o bengeskro vast vin! 
Matthew6:14 T'mer te bistrenn o čilačo koova, hoy i vavar ap t'mende kran, palle bistrell t'maro dad an o bolepen ninna o čilačepen, hoy t'mer kran." 
Matthew6:15 T'mer te bistrenn gar o čilačo koova, hoy i vavar ap t'mende kran, palle bistrell t'maro dad an o bolepen vitar gar o čilačepen, hoy t'mer kran." 
Matthew6:16 Te rhan t'mer i tikno tsiro či, te mangenn o Debles an, palle krenn kova gar yaake, te dikenn i menshe kova! Ma krenn har kolla, kay hi len douy djia! Yon sikrenn ap pengro mouy, te bokenn le pengro Debleske. Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kolla lenna či o Deblestar. Yon anan pengro lačepen kokres dren." 
Matthew6:17 Tou te rhah či an ko tsiro, kay tou o Debleha rakreh, palle thob tiro mouy, mak tire balla har hako dives," 
Matthew6:18 te dikenn i menshe gar, kay tou bokeh o Debleske. Oun o baro Devel, kay hi tiro dad an o bolepen, djinella, hoy tou leske kreh. Yob dikell tout, oun dell tout o lačepen pale, hoy tou leske kral." 
Matthew6:19 Anenn t'menge kek bravlepen ap i phoub khetne! Kote hi i kirme, hoy i ripya rhana. Koy krell o pani o saster paash. Kote hi i čorepangre, kay čorenn t'maro bravlepen." 
Matthew6:20 Anenn t'menge bravlepen an o bolepen khetne, kay kek čorepaskro t'maro koova hatsella! Oun kek kirme, vitar kek pani krell les paash." 
Matthew6:21 Kote, kay tiro bravlepen hi, kote hi ninna tiro dji." 
Matthew6:22 O mensheskro yak hi har i momeli an i kheer. Te dikeh kokres ap o Debleste, hi kova yaake, har te rhačell koy momeli mishto." 
Matthew6:23 Te dikeh ap o vavar koova, oun gar ap o Debleste, hi kova yaake, har te rhačell kek momeli an kava kheer. Te rhačell tiri momeli bouder gar, djiveh tou har an i kali rat." 
Matthew6:24 Kek boudrell nay douy rayenge. Te vals kova yaake, boudrals lo ko yekeske mishto, oun ko vavareske gar mishto. Ko yekes kamals yob gar, kol vavares kamals yob o djiyestar. Tou nay boudreh gar o Debleske oun rodeh tiro bravlepen." 
Matthew6:25 Doleske penau me t'menge: Ma darenn t'maro djipaske! Ma darenn, te vell t'men či te rhal oun či te piyell, vitar gar, te vell t'men či an-ripaske! O djipen hi boudeder moldo har o rhapen. Oun o mensho hi boudeder moldo har o ripen." 
Matthew6:26 Dikenn ap i čirkle! Yon vitsrenn kek djob an i phoub, te vell lo baro. Vitar gar anenn le o baro djob dren, te čivenn le les an o djobeskro kheer. T'maro dad an o bolepen dell len te rhal. T'mer han boudeder moldo har yon." 
Matthew6:27 Kek t'mendar nay čivell yek dives boudeder pash peskro djipen pashel! 
Matthew6:28 Hoske trashenn t'men, te vell t'men či an-ripaske? Dikenn, har ap o zenlepen shoukar bloume baro venna! Yon boudrenna gar oun krenn penge kek ripya." 
Matthew6:29 O baro ray Salomo an peskro tselo raylepen his gar yaake shoukar an-rido har yek lendar. 
Matthew6:30 O Devel kras o zenlepen yaake shoukar, hoy kava dives vin tardo hi, oun o vavar dives an o bob vitsedo vella. Kitse kope boudeder nay dell lo t'men an-ripaske! Hoske hi t'maro patsepen yaake tikno?" 
Matthew6:31 Ma darenn oun ma penenn: Hoy rhas? Hoy piyas? Hoy rivas? 
Matthew6:32 Kova krenn kol menshe, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar. T'maro dad an o bolepen djinella, hoy t'men hounte vell djipaske." 
Matthew6:33 Moukenn o Debles o ray pral t'mende te vell, oun krenn lauter, hoy yob kamella! Oun o Devel dell t'men lauter, hoy t'men hounte vell djipaske." 
Matthew6:34 Doleske penau t'menge: Ma darenn glan kova, hoy taysar vella! Moukenn o vavar dives ap t'mende te vell, oun palle dikenna, hoy te krenn! Hako dives hi t'men doha, hoy krell t'maro djipen phares." 
Matthew7:1 Ma sikrenn ap i vavarengri doosh! Oun o Devel dikell gar ap t'mari doosh. 
Matthew7:2 Te hi t'men i baro dji i vavarenge, hi o Debles ninna i baro dji t'menge. Hi t'men kek baro dji lenge, hi o Debles vitar gar i baro dji t'menge." 
Matthew7:3 Hoske kameh tou i tikno kasht dran tiro phraleskro yak vin te tserdell, oun tou dikeh gar o baro kasht an tiro yak?" 
Matthew7:4 Har nay peneh tou ap leste: Miro phraal, am kay! Me kamau ko tikno kasht dran tiro yak vin tserdell. Oun tou dikeh gar o baro kasht an tiro yak." 
Matthew7:5 Tou rhorheno! Tou kreh, har te vals tou lačeder har yob. Le ko baro kasht dran tiro yak vin, palle nay leh tou o tikno kasht dran tiro phraleskro yak vin!" 
Matthew7:6 Ma vitsrenn gar o Debleskro bravlepen glan i djouklende, te djan yon gar ap t'mende pre! Ma vitsrenn gar i kouč barra glan i balende, te stakrenn le len gar i pirentsa khetne." 
Matthew7:7 Mangenn o Debles! Oun o Devel dell t'men! Rodenn les! Oun t'mer hatsenn les. Denn ap o voudar, oun kova vell t'menge pre kerdo!" 
Matthew7:8 Koon mangella, kova lella. Koon rodella, kova hatsella. Oun koon ap o voudar della, koleske vell pre kerdo." 
Matthew7:9 Mashkral t'mende hi kek morsh, kay dell peskro čaves i bar, te mangas yob lestar i kotar maro." 
Matthew7:10 Vitar gar dell kek dad peskro čaves i sap an o vast, te mangas yob lestar i mačo." 
Matthew7:11 Ninna te han t'mer čilače menshe, denn t'mer t'mare čaven lačo koova. Har boud boudeder dell t'maro dad an o bolepen lačo koova kolen, kay les mangenna." 
Matthew7:12 Lauter, hoy t'mer kamenna, te krenn i menshe t'menge, kova krenn t'mer lenge ninna! Te krenn t'mer kova, yaake krenn t'mer lauter kova, hoy o Mose oun i Debleskre rakepangre penan." 
Matthew7:13 Djan an o tikno voudar dren! Nashedo hi kolla, kay djan an o baro voudar ap o bourhlo drom. Oun boud djan koy." 
Matthew7:14 Tikno hi ko voudar oun gar bourhlo hi ko drom, kay i menshe hatsenn o djipen. Oun gar boud hi kolla, kay ap ko drom djana." 
Matthew7:15 Denn yak, te patsenn gar kol rhorhene rakepangren, kay penenn, te vans le o Deblestar bičedo! Yon krenn, har te vans le t'mare phrala. An lengro dji hi le divye djoukle, kay marenna." 
Matthew7:16 Ap kova, hoy yon krenna, dikenn t'mer, har yon hi. Ap i soubyengro rouk venna kek drake baro. Vitar gar venna fayge baro ap soubyengre bourra." 
Matthew7:17 Yaake vell lačo koova dran i lačo rouk, oun djoungelo koova dran i nasselo rouk." 
Matthew7:18 Dran i lačo rouk vell kek djoungelo koova. Oun dran i nasselo rouk vell kek lačo koova. 
Matthew7:19 Hako rouk, kay vell kek lačo koova dran leste, vell tele dino, oun an i yag vitsedo." 
Matthew7:20 Ap kova, hoy dran lende vella, dikenna, har yon hi." 
Matthew7:21 Kolen, kay penenn ap mande Ray, ray lell o Devel gar lauter pash peste an o bolepen. Na-a! Kolla kokres, kay krenna, hoy miro dad an o bolepen kamella, kolen lell lo an o bolepen." 
Matthew7:22 Vell ko dives, kay o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende vi-rakrella. Ap ko dives penenna boud ap mande: Ray, ray, an tiri zoor penam mer i menshenge, hoy o Devel menge penas. An tiri zoor tradam i bengen vin, oun kram boud baro zorelo koova." 
Matthew7:23 Palle penau lenge: Me prindjrau t'men gar. Djan mandar, t'mer čilače!" 
Matthew7:24 Hakeno, kay mire laba shounella oun kova krella, hoy me penau, kova hi yaake har i gosevo morsh, kay peskro kheer ap i zorelo baro bar kras." 
Matthew7:25 Har das zorelo brishin, oun boud pani vas, oun i zorelo dourho phourdas ap ko kheer, koy peras o kheer gar khetne. Kova his ap i zorelo baro bar tardo." 
Matthew7:26 Hakeno, kay mire laba shounella oun kova gar krella, hoy me penau, kova hi har i dinelo, kay peskro kheer ap i čik kras." 
Matthew7:27 Har das zorelo brishin, oun boud pani vas, oun i zorelo dourho phourdas ap ko kheer, koy peras ko tselo kheer khetne.”" 
Matthew7:28 Oun har o Yezous kova lauter penas, kran kol boud menshe, kay troul leste his, bare yaka." 
Matthew7:29 Yob rakras bari zoryah, oun gar yaake har lengre čačepangre rakran." 
Matthew8:1 Oun o Yezous djas i berga tele, oun boud menshe djan leske palla." 
Matthew8:2 Kote vas i morsh pash leste. Koles his i djoungelo nasslepen ap peskro mass. Oun yob vitsras pes glan o Yezouseste tele ap i phoub, oun mangas lestar: “Ray, te kameh tou, nay kreh man sasto.”" 
Matthew8:3 Oun o Yezous čivas peskro vast ap leste, oun penas: “Me kamau, te vess sasto.” Oun ap yek kopo djas ko nasslepen lestar." 
Matthew8:4 Oun o Yezous penas ap leste: “Shoun, pen kekeske, hoy me touke krom! Dja an o Debleskro baro kheer pash o rashayeste oun sike leste, kay tiro nasslepen toutar djas! Oun an kova glan o Debleste, hoy o Mose penas, te djinenn i menshe, kay tou sasto val.”" 
Matthew8:5 Oun o Yezous djas doureder, oun vas an o foro Kapernaum. Kote vas i pralstouno lourdo pash leste, oun mangas les:" 
Matthew8:6 “Ray, miro boudepaskro hi khere čiddo, oun hi bango, yaake te nay djal lo bouder gar. Oun les hi bare douka.”" 
Matthew8:7 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Me kamau touha te djal, oun kamau les sasto te krell.”" 
Matthew8:8 Koy penas o pralstouno lourdo: “Me hom gar moldo, te vess tou pash mande. Te peneh tou yek lab, yaake vell miro boudepaskro sasto." 
Matthew8:9 Yaake har me ninna hounte shounap ap mire pralstunende, yaake hi man ninna lourde, kay hounte krenn, hoy me penau. Me te penau ap yekeste: Dja koy! palle djal lo. Me te penau ap i vavareste: Am kay! palle vell lo. Me te penau ap miro boudepaskro: Kre kova! palle krell yob kova.”" 
Matthew8:10 Har o Yezous kova shounas, kras lo bare yaka, oun penas ap kolende, kay leha djan: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Savo patsepen hatsom pash kekeste an o tselo them Israel." 
Matthew8:11 Boud menshe venna dran boud vavar themma pash o Debleste an o bolepen, oun beshenn pen tele, te rhan le o Abrahameha oun o Isaakeha, oun o Yakobeha khetne." 
Matthew8:12 Oun i biboldendar venna boud an i kali rat vin vitsedo. Oun yon rovenna, oun dandrenn i danda i doukatar khetne.”" 
Matthew8:13 Oun palle penas o Yezous ap o pralstouno lourdo: “Dja khere! yaake har tou patsal, yaake vell kova.” Oun ap kava tsiro vas leskro boudepaskro sasto." 
Matthew8:14 Oun o Yezous djas an o Petreskro kheer. Kote dikas lo koleskri romyakri day. Yoy his ap o čiben čiddo oun lakro shero his tato. 
Matthew8:15 Oun yob tapras lakro vast, oun ko nasslepen djas latar. Oun yoy stas pre, oun anas lenge i rhapen." 
Matthew8:16 Oun har i rati vas, anan le boud menshen pash leste, kay hi benga an lende. Oun yob rakras zoreles ap i bengende, te djan le dran i menshende vin. Oun yon van vin. Ninna kras lo lauteren sasto, kay nasselo hi." 
Matthew8:17 Yaake vas kova čačes, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, glan i rah tsiro penas: Yob las mare douka, oun maro nasslepen mendar." 
Matthew8:18 Oun har o Yezous boud menshe troul peste dikas, penas lo peskre malenge: “Ouleras ap i vavar panyeskri rig!”" 
Matthew8:19 Koy vas i biboldengro čačepaskro pash leste oun penas: “Sikepaskro, me kamau touha te djal, kay tou ninna djah.”" 
Matthew8:20 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “I divye djouklen hi i čiben an i phoub, kay sovenn le. Oun i čirklen hi tikne khera ap i rouka. Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, man hi či, kay nay čivap man tele, te sovap.”" 
Matthew8:21 Oun i vavar, yek leskre malendar, penas ap leste: “Ray, mouk man khere te djal, te paskrap miro dades! Pal kova vau touha.”" 
Matthew8:22 Penas o Yezous: “Mouk i moule pengre moulen te paskrell! Dja tou mantsa!” 
Matthew8:23 Oun o Yezous djas an o bero. Oun leskre mala djan leha. 
Matthew8:24 Har yon ap o pani his, phourdas ap yek kopo i baro zorelo dourho pral o baro pani. Oun o pani vas divyo, oun djas pre te tele, oun djas pral o bero vergel. Oun o Yezous sovas." 
Matthew8:25 Palle djan yon pash leste, djangran les pre, oun penan ap leste: “Ray! Le men kate vin! Mer tassah.”" 
Matthew8:26 Koy penas lo: “Hoske trashenn t'mer? Kay hi t'maro patsepen?” Oun yob stas pre, oun penas ap ko zorelo dourho, hoy phourdas pral o pani: “Ač kanna!” Oun ap o baro pani penas lo: “Mouk tele!” Oun o zorelo dourho phourdas bouder gar, oun o pani his bouder gar divyo." 
Matthew8:27 Oun peskre mala kran bare yaka oun poučan pendar: “Havo morsh hi kova! Ninna o zorelo dourho oun o baro pani shounenn ap leste.” 
Matthew8:28 Oun yon van ap i vavar panyeskri rig, an o them Gadara. Oun douy morsha nashan dran i moulengre khera vin, oun van pash o Yezouseste. Kolen hi benga an lende. Oun yon hi yaake čilačo, te nay djas kek an lengro drom." 
Matthew8:29 Oun yon dan gole: “Hoy kameh tou mendar, Debleskro čavo? Val tou pash mende, te doukress men tou glan o tsiro, kay rakrell o Devel i phagi pral mende vin?”" 
Matthew8:30 Dour lendar his boud bale ap i berga. 
Matthew8:31 Oun kol benga mangan les: “Tou te tradeh men dran kol morshende vin, palle mouk men an kol balende dren te djal!”" 
Matthew8:32 Oun yob penas: “Djan t'menge!” Oun yon van dran i morshende vin, oun djan an kol balende dren. Oun kol tsele bale van divyo oun nashan i berga tele, oun stan an o pani, oun tassan." 
Matthew8:33 Oun kote his morsha, kay ap i balende yak denna. Kolla nashan an o foro, oun penan kote halauter, hoy yon dikan, ninna, kay van kol douy morsha sasto, kay benga an lende his." 
Matthew8:34 Oun i tsele menshe djan dran ko foro vin, oun van pash o Yezouseste. Oun har yon les dikan, mangan le les, te djal lo dran lengro them vin." 
Matthew9:1 Koy djas lo pale an i bero, ouleras ap i vavar panyeskri rig, oun vas an peskro foro." 
Matthew9:2 Oun yon anan i morshes pash leste. Kova nashte nashell gar oun his ap o čiben čiddo. Oun har o Yezous kolengro patsepen dikas, penas lo ap ko morsheste: “Ma traash, miro čavo! Me lau tiri doosh toutar.”" 
Matthew9:3 Har i biboldengre čačepangre kova shounan, penan le ap pende kokres: “Kova krell pes har o Devel!”" 
Matthew9:4 Oun o Yezous hayvas, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djas. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Hoske djal savo čilačepen an t'maro shero trouyel?" 
Matthew9:5 Hi kova phareder, te penap ap leste: Me lau tiri doosh toutar, har te penap: Ste pre oun dja khere?" 
Matthew9:6 Me kamau, te djinenn t'mer, o Menshengro Čaves hi koy zoor ap i phoub, te nay lell lo i doosh i menshendar.” Doleske penas yob ap ko morsheste, kay nay nashell gar: “Ste pre, le tiro čiben oun dja khere!”" 
Matthew9:7 Oun kova stas pre oun djas khere. 
Matthew9:8 Oun har kol boud menshe kova dikan, daran le o Deblestar oun sharan les, kay das i menshes yaake boud zoor." 
Matthew9:9 Pal kova djas o Yezous doureder. Oun yob dikas i morshes pash i kheer beshdo. Kova his i biboldo, kay las i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren. Leskro lab hi Mateo. Oun o Yezous penas ap leste: “Am, dja mantsa!” Oun yob stas pre oun djas leha." 
Matthew9:10 Pal kova djas o Yezous pash koleste an o kheer. Oun har yob pash i rhapaskri čiddo his, van kote ninna boud kolendar khetne, kay lenn i biboldendar kol love i Remaryenge dren, oun vavar, kay čilačo koova kran oun doleske ninna pale-čiddo hi. Oun yon rhan o Yezouseha oun leskre malentsa khetne." 
Matthew9:11 Oun har i Farisarya kova dikan, penan le ap i Yezouseskre malende: “Hoske rhal t'maro sikepaskro kolentsa, kay lenna i biboldendar kol love i Remaryenge dren, oun kol vavarentsa, kay ninna pale-čiddo hi?”" 
Matthew9:12 Oun o Yezous shounas kova, oun penas ap lende: “Kolla, kay sasto hi, djan gar pash o dramaskro. Kolla, kay nasselo hi, djan pash leste." 
Matthew9:13 Kova hounte djinenn t'mer: O Devel penas: Me kamau gar, te marenn mange firhen. Na-a! Me kamau, te hi t'men i baro dji i vavarenge. Me vom gar, te dap kolen pash mande gole, kay djan ap o čačo drom. Na-a! Me vom, te dap kolen pash mande gole, kay hi ap o čilačo drom.”" 
Matthew9:14 Palle van o Yohanneskre mala pash o Yezouseste, oun penan ap leste: “Mer oun i Farisarya rhah oun piyah i tsiro či, te mangas o Debles an. Hoske krenn tire mala kova gar?”" 
Matthew9:15 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Yaake rah har o biyabeskro ap i biyab hi, hi peskre mala barhtelo. Ko tsiro vella, kay vell o biyabeskro lendar lino. Ap ko tsiro rhan le oun piyenn le či, te mangenn le o Debles an." 
Matthew9:16 Kek sivell i nevo kotar than ap i phouro ripen. Pash o thopen vell o nevo kotar tikneder oun tserdell pes pale tele, oun o phouro ripen djal boudeder paash." 
Matthew9:17 Oun kek čorell i nevi mool an i phoure molyakre gone. I nevi mool krell i phoure molyakre gone paash. Oun i mool nashell vin. I nevi mool vell čoredo an i neve molyakre gone. Palle djal i nevi mool oun i neve molyakre gone gar paash.” 
Matthew9:18 Oun har yob kova rakras, vas i pralstouno pral i biboldengri kangri pash leste, vitsras pes glan leste tele ap i phoub, oun penas: “Miri čay meras glan i tikno tsiro. Am mantsa oun čip tiro vast ap late! Oun yoy vella djido.”" 
Matthew9:19 Oun o Yezous stas pre oun djas leha. Oun leskre mala djan ninna leha. 
Matthew9:20 Ap o drom his i djouvel. Kolat his deesh-te-douy bersha i ratlo nasslepen. 
Matthew9:21 Koya penas peske: “Me te taprau ap leskro ripen, vau sasto.” Oun yoy djas pal leste, oun tapras ap leskro ripen." 
Matthew9:22 Oun o Yezous rissras pes trouyel, dikas lat, oun penas ap late: “Romniya ma traash! Tiro patsepen kras tout sasto.” Oun ap kava tsiro vas koy djouvel sasto." 
Matthew9:23 Oun o Yezous djas doureder, oun vas pash ko pralstuneskro kheer. Kote his i bashepangre oun boud menshe. Har yob o merepaskro bashepen oun i bari gole shounas," 
Matthew9:24 penas lo: “Djan t'menge! Kay čay meras gar. Yoy sovella.” Oun yon san pral leste. 
Matthew9:25 Har kol tsele menshe vin glan o kheer his, djas lo dren, tapras koy čakro vast, oun koy čay djivas pale, oun stas pre." 
Matthew9:26 Oun i tsele menshe, kay kote an i forya oun gaba djivan, shounan kova." 
Matthew9:27 Oun o Yezous djas doureder. Oun douy korele morsha djan leske palla. Kolla dan gole: “Davideskro čavo, kre men sasto!”" 
Matthew9:28 Oun har yob an o kheer djas, van i douy korele pash leste. Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “Patsenn t'mer, te nay krau kova?” Koy penan le: “Ava, ray.”" 
Matthew9:29 Palle čivas lo peskro vast ap lengre yaka, oun penas: “Yaake har t'mer patsan, yaake han t'mer kanna sasto.”" 
Matthew9:30 Oun yon nay dikan. Oun o Yezous penas zoreles ap lende: “Te shounell kova kek!” 
Matthew9:31 Oun yon djan vin, oun rakran pral kova, hoy yob lenge kras, yaake te shounan le lestar an kol tsele forya oun gaba trouyel." 
Matthew9:32 Oun har yon vin his, van menshe pash lende, kay anan i morshes pash o Yezouseste, kay nashte rakras gar. Oun les his i beng an leste." 
Matthew9:33 Oun o Yezous tradas o benges vin. Har ko beng vin his, nay rakras ko morsh pale. Oun kol boud menshe, kay kote tardo his, kran bare yaka oun penan: “Kek tsireske vas savo koova an o them Israel diklo.”" 
Matthew9:34 I Farisarya penan: “O pralstouno beng das les koy zoor. Doleske nay tradell yob kol bengen vin.” 
Matthew9:35 Oun o Yezous djas an i forya oun gaba trouyel, oun rakras an i biboldengre kangria, oun penas i menshenge ko lačo lab, kay o Devel kamell len dran o čilačepen te lell, oun kamell lengro ray te vell. Oun yob kras lauteren sasto, kay nasselo hi." 
Matthew9:36 Oun har yob kol boud menshen dikas, khaytan le les. Yon his leske har bakre, kay hi len kek bakrengro, kay ap lende garda della. Yon his khino, oun len his bouder kek zoor an lende." 
Matthew9:37 Oun yob penas ap peskre malende: “Boud djob hi vin tardo, te vell lo an o kheer anlo. Yaake hi boud menshe koy, kay kamenn pash o Debleste te vell. Oun hi gar doha boudepangre koy, te anenn le len pash leste." 
Matthew9:38 Doleske mangenn o Deblestar, te bičrell lo boudepangren, kay leske boudrenna!”" 
Matthew10:1 Oun o Yezous das peskre deesh-te-douy malen pash peste gole, oun das len i zoor pral i benga, te nay tradenn le len dran i menshende vin, oun te nay krenn le lauteren sasto, kay nasselo hi." 
Matthew10:2 Kolla hi i laba kol deesh-te-douyendar, kolen o Yezous pash i menshende bičras: O glanstouno his o Simon, kay kharas ninna Petro, oun leskro phraal Andreas, oun o Yakobo oun leskro phraal Yohanni, – kolengro dad his o Zebedeo," 
Matthew10:3 o Filipo, oun o Bartolomeo, o Thomas oun o Mateo, kay i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren las, oun o Yakobo, – koleskro dad his o Alfeo, oun o Tadeo," 
Matthew10:4 oun o Simon, kay his kol menshendar, kay kharenna Zelotarya oun o Youdas Iskariot, ko phoukepaskro." 
Matthew10:5 Kolla deesh-te-douy morsha bičras o Yezous pash i menshende, oun penas zoreles ap lende: Ma djan pash kolende, kay kek bibolde hi! Ma djan an i forya, kay i Samaritarya djivenna!" 
Matthew10:6 Djan pash i Israelitarya! Yon hi har nashede bakre! 
Matthew10:7 T'mer te venn pash lende, palle penenn lenge: O tsiro vell sik, kay lell o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin." 
Matthew10:8 Krenn i nasselen sasto, oun krenn i moulen djido! Oun kolla, kay i djoungelo nasslepen ap o mass hi, kolen krenn ninna sasto! Tradenn i bengen dran i menshende vin! Kay zoor dom t'men čičeske. Doleske krenn kova ninna čičeske, oun lenn kek love lendar!" 
Matthew10:9 Ma lenn love t'mentsa ap o drom, vitar kek sonakay, kek roup, oun vitar kek tikne love!" 
Matthew10:10 Lenn kek possita t'mentsa, kek douyto gad, kek kirrha, vitar kek kasht! I boudepaskro lell peskro rhapen kolendar, kolenge yob boudrella." 
Matthew10:11 T'mer te venn an i foro oun an i gab, palle poučenn pal yekeste, kay moldo hi, te ačenn t'mer an leskro kheer. Pash leste ačenn yaake rah har t'mer ačenn an ko foro." 
Matthew10:12 Te venn t'mer an i kheer dren, palle rakrenn o Debleskri barht pral kol menshende vin!" 
Matthew10:13 Oun yon te lenn t'men an lengro kheer dren, palle vell o Debleskri barht ap lende. Yon te lenn t'men gar an lengro kheer dren, palle vell o Debleskri barht gar ap lende." 
Matthew10:14 Kote, kay lenn le t'men gar pre, oun kamenn t'men gar te shounell, kote djan t'menge dran ko kheer oun dran ko foro vin! Oun denn koy čik t'mare pirendar tele!" 
Matthew10:15 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ap ko dives, kay o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende ap i phoub vi-rakrella, lenna kol menshe, kay lan t'men gar pre, i bareder phagi har kolla, kay djivan an i forya Sodom oun Gomorra." 
Matthew10:16 Djinenn, me bičrau t'men har bakre mank i divye djouklende. Doleske venn gosevo har i sapa oun djoudjo har i parne čirkle, an kolende kek rhorhepen hi!" 
Matthew10:17 Denn yak, hoy i menshe t'mentsa krenna! Yon anenn t'men glan i čačepangre, oun moukenn t'men an lengre kangria i čoupniyah dava te dell." 
Matthew10:18 T'mer patsenn ap mande. Doleske anenn le t'men glan i pralstunende oun glan i bare rayende, te rakrenn yon i phagi vin pral t'mende. Kova vell ap t'mende, te rakrenn t'mer mandar glan lende oun glan kolende, kay o Debles gar prindjrenna." 
Matthew10:19 Kova te vell, palle ma darenn, hoy t'mer hounte penenna! O Devel sikrell t'mende, hoy t'mer hounte penenna ap ko dives." 
Matthew10:20 T'mer han gar kolla, kay rakrenna. Kova hi o Debleskro Dourho, kay dran t'mende rakrella." 
Matthew10:21 Ap ko tsiro dell i phraal peskro phrales an lengre vasta, te vell lo maredo. Oun o dad dell o čaves an lengre vasta, te vell yob maredo. Oun i čave hi midjak ap pengre dadende oun pengre dayende, oun denn len an i vasta kolendar, kay marenn len." 
Matthew10:22 T'mer patsenn ap mande. Doleske venn i menshe rhoyedo ap t'mende. Kova, kay ačell zoreles tardo an o patsepen, yaake rah, har yob djivella, kova lell o Debleskro djipen." 
Matthew10:23 Te lenn le t'men an yek foro palla, palle nashenn an i vavar foro! Čačepah, me penau t'menge, t'mer venna gar an hako foro an o them Israel yaake rah har o Mensheskro Čavo gar pale vas." 
Matthew10:24 Yek, kay djal an o sikepaskro kheer, djinell gar boudeder har o sikepaskro. Oun i boudepaskro hayvell gar boudeder har peskro ray." 
Matthew10:25 Yek, kay djal an o sikepaskro kheer, koleske hi doha, te djinell lo yaake boud har peskro sikepaskro. Oun i boudepaskro, koleske hi doha, te hayvell lo yaake boud har peskro ray. Oun te penenn le ap o rayeste pral o kheer: Beng! palle kharenn le ninna kolen yaake, kay an leskro kheer djivenna. Doleske ma darenn lendar!" 
Matthew10:26 Vell o dives, kay vell kova diklo, hoy kanna khatedo hi. Vell o dives, kay djinell hakeno kova, hoy kanna kek djinella." 
Matthew10:27 Kova, hoy me t'menge čorrhanes penau, kova penenn i menshenge yaake, te shounell les hakeno! Oun kova, hoy t'menge an o kand penlo vella, kova penenn i tsele menshenge!" 
Matthew10:28 Ma trashenn kol menshendar, kay nay marenn t'men! Yon nay marenn gar o djipen an t'mende, hoy ninna pal o merepen djivella. Trashenn o Deblestar, kay nay čivell t'men pal o merepen an o bengeskri yag, kay han hako tsiro nashedo!" 
Matthew10:29 Douy tikne čirkle hi glan i menshende gar boudeder moldo har yek bema. Oun kek lendar perella ap i phoub, te kamell o Devel kova gar. Yob hi t'maro dad an o bolepen." 
Matthew10:30 Oun yob djinella, kitse balla ap t'maro shero hi." 
Matthew10:31 Doleske ma darenn! T'mer molenn boudeder har boud čirkle. 
Matthew10:32 Me penau t'menge: Koon glan i menshende penella: O Yezous hi miro ray! kolestar penau me glan miro dadeste an o bolepen: Yob hi miro! 
Matthew10:33 Koon man bourhoste della glan i menshende, koles dau me ninna bourhoste glan miro dadeste an o bolepen." 
Matthew10:34 Ma patsenn, te lap o čingepen ap kay phoub krik. Na-a! Kova krau gar. Mantsa vell o kourepen." 
Matthew10:35 Mange čingrenn pen i menshe. O čavo čingrell pes peskro dadeha. Oun i čay čingrell pes peskri dah. Oun o čaveskri romni čingrell pes peskro romeskri day. 
Matthew10:36 Oun kova, kay ap o vavareste rhoyedo hi, djivell leha an leskro kheer khetne." 
Matthew10:37 Koon kamell peskro dades oun peskri day boudeder har man, hi gar moldo, te vell lo miro maal. Oun koon kamell peskro čaves oun peskri čat boudeder har man, hi gar moldo, te vell lo miro maal." 
Matthew10:38 Oun koon lell gar peskro troushel ap peste oun djal pal mande, hi gar moldo, te vell lo miro maal." 
Matthew10:39 Koon kamell peskro djipen te rikrell, kova nashrell les. Koon peskro djipen mange nashrella, kova lell les pale." 
Matthew10:40 Koon t'men an peskro kheer lella, lell man an peskro kheer. Oun kova, kay man an peskro kheer lella, kova lell koles an peskro kheer, kay man bičras." 
Matthew10:41 Koon i Debleskro rakepaskres an peskro kheer lella, oun krell kova doleske, kay kova o Debleskro lab penella, koles dell o Devel yaake boud bravlepen, har yob peskre rakepangren della. Koon i Debleskro morshes an peskro kheer lella, oun krell kova doleske, kay kova i Debleskro morsh hi, koles dell o Devel yaake boud bravlepen, har yob i Debleskro morshes della." 
Matthew10:42 Koon della yekes mire malendar i khoro shilo pani te piyell, koles dell o Devel čačepah ko lačepen pale, hoy yob kras." 
Matthew11:1 Oun har o Yezous peskre deesh-te-douy malenge penas, hoy hounte krenn le, djas lo doureder an i vavar biboldengre forya, te sikrell lo kote i menshende o Debleskro drom." 
Matthew11:2 Ap ko tsiro his o Yohanni an o stilepen. Kote shounas lo, hoy o Yezous Kristo lauter kras. Oun yob bičras peskre malen pash leste," 
Matthew11:3 oun moukas lestar te poučell: “Hal tou kova, kay hounte vell? Hounte dikas mer ap i vavareste, te vell lo?”" 
Matthew11:4 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Djan pash o Yohanneste, oun penenn leske, hoy t'mer shounan oun dikan:" 
Matthew11:5 I korele dikenna pale oun i bange nashenna pale. I nassele, kay lengro mass ap lende tele merell, kolla venna sasto. Kolla, kay nay shounan gar, shounenna kanna. I moule venna djido. I čorvele shounenn o Debleskro lačo lab." 
Matthew11:6 Oun barhtelo hi kova, kay rhoyrell pes gar pral mande!”" 
Matthew11:7 Oun har o Yohanneskre mala penge djana, rakras o Yezous ap kol boud menshende pral o Yohanneste, oun penas: Hoske djan t'mer an o moulo them? Kaman t'mer i morshes te dikell, kay hi har i patri, hoy i zorelo dourho pral i phoub phourdella? Na-a, savo morsh hi lo gar!" 
Matthew11:8 Koon kaman t'mer te dikell? Kaman t'mer i morshes te dikell, kay an kouč koola rido hi? Na-a, savo morsh hi lo vitar gar! Kolla, kay rivenna kouč koola, djivenn an i rayengre khera." 
Matthew11:9 Hoske djan t'mer an o moulo them? Kaman t'mer i Debleskro rakepaskro te dikell? Ava, kova hi o Yohanni. Oun me penau t'menge: Yob hi bareder har i Debleskro rakepaskro." 
Matthew11:10 Lestar hi činlo an o Debleskro lab: O Devel penas ap peskro čaveste: Me bičrau i morshes glan toute ap o drom, te krell lo touke i drom, te nay vess pash i menshende." 
Matthew11:11 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kek vas boldo ap kay phoub, kay hi bareder har o Yohanni. Me penau t'menge ninna: O tikneder kolendar, kay moukenn man pengro ray te vell, kova hi bareder har o Yohanni." 
Matthew11:12 Har o Yohanni vas oun i menshen taufras, vas o Debleskro nevo tsiro. An kava tsiro dell o Devel i menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom. Oun bis kava dives kamenn čilače menshe i zoryah o Debleskri boudi paash te krell. Yon kamenn te vell len penepaske koy pral." 
Matthew11:13 Oun i tsele Debleskre rakepangre oun o Mose rakran glan i rah tsiro pral kava nevo tsiro. Kanna hi o Yohanni koy, oun ko nevo tsiro vas." 
Matthew11:14 Patsenn mange, o Yohanni hi o Eliya, kolestar penlo vas, te vell lo." 
Matthew11:15 Moukenn kova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal! 
Matthew11:16 I menshe an kava tsiro hi har čave, kay khelenn an o foro. Oun yon denn gole yek ap o vavareste:" 
Matthew11:17 Mer bashram t'menge. T'mer khelan gar. Mer givam moulengre gilya. T'mer rovan gar. 
Matthew11:18 O Yohanni rhas oun piyas gar. Oun yon penenna: “I beng hi an leste.” 
Matthew11:19 Oun me, o Mensheskro Čavo, me vom, rhom oun piyom, oun mandar penenn le: “Kova hi i baro rhapaskro oun i pipaskro. Kova hi i maal kolendar, kay lenn i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren. Oun kova hi i maal kolendar, kay čilačo koova kran oun doleske pale-čiddo hi.” Ninna te rakrenn le yaake, dikenn le ap o Debleskre menshende, kay kova čačo hi, hoy o Devel krella." 
Matthew11:20 Palle čingras lo pral kol forya, kay yob boud baro koova kras an o Debleskri zoor. I menshe kote moukan gar pengro čilačo drom, te djan le ap o Debleskro drom." 
Matthew11:21 Oun yob penas: Bibarhtelo venna t'mer menshe an o foro Korazin! Bibarhtelo venna t'mer menshe an o foro Betsayda! Te krals yek an i forya Tirus oun Sidon savo baro koova an o Debleskri zoor, har me pash t'mende krom, rivans i menshe kote i gono troul pende, oun čivans yagakri čik ap pengre shere, te sikrenn le, kay lengro čilačepen khaytell len. Oun yon moukans pengro čilačo drom, oun djans ap o Debleskro drom." 
Matthew11:22 Ap ko dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende ap i phoub, djal kol menshenge an i forya Sidon oun Tirus feteder har t'menge kate." 
Matthew11:23 Oun t'mer menshe an o foro Kapernaum, patsenn t'mer, kay venn t'mer an o bolepen hadedo? Na-a! T'mer djan an o moulengro them tele. O baro koova, hoy krom an o Debleskri zoor pash t'mende, te kroms kova an o foro Sodom, palle vals ko foro gomme kava dives." 
Matthew11:24 Me penau t'menge: Ap ko dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende vin, lenn t'mer i bareder phagi, har kol menshe an o foro Sodom." 
Matthew11:25 Oun ap kava tsiro penas o Yezous: Tata, tou hal o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub. Me sharau tout. Kova, hoy tou kreh, sikral tou kolende, kay gar boud djinenna. Kolla, kay gosevo hi oun boud djinenna, kolla hayvenn kova gar." 
Matthew11:26 Ava tata, yaake kamal tou kova." 
Matthew11:27 Lauter das miro dad an mire vasta. Kek djinella, koon o čavo hi, har kokres o dad. Oun kokres o čavo djinella, koon o dad hi. Oun o čavo sikrell kolen, kay patsenn ap leste, koon o dad hi." 
Matthew11:28 T'mer marenna t'men tele, te krenn kova, hoy t'mare phoure ap t'mende penan. Avenn pash mande! Me lau ko pharo koova t'mendar, te lenn t'mer pale nevi zoor." 
Matthew11:29 Me hom t'menge i lačo ray, oun dikau ap kekeste tele. Shounenn ap mande oun krenn, hoy me t'menge penaua! Oun t'maro dji vell pale zorelo." 
Matthew11:30 Kova, hoy me t'menge penaua, hi t'menge lačo. Oun t'mer hounte marenn t'men gar tele." 
Matthew12:1 Ap yek Debleskro dives djas o Yezous peskre malentsa ap i tikno kotar them, kay o djob baro vas. Oun leskre malen his bok. Oun yon lan o djob an i vasta, te rhan le." 
Matthew12:2 Kova dikan i Farisarya oun penan ap o Yezouseste: “Dik, tire mala krenn ap o Debleskro dives, hoy hi gar pal o biboldengro čačepen.”" 
Matthew12:3 Penas lo ap lende: Hoy kras o baro ray David oun peskre mala, har yon bokan? Draveran t'mer kova gar an o Debleskro lab?" 
Matthew12:4 Yob djas an o Debleskro kheer, oun rhas o Debleskro maro, yob oun kolla, kay pash leste hi. Pal i biboldengro čačepen his i mare i rashayenge kokres koy." 
Matthew12:5 Oun t'mer djinenn ninna, hoy an o Moseskre lila tardo hi, te krenn i rashaya ap o Debleskro dives pengri boudi an o Debleskro baro kheer. Oun yaake krenn le o Debleskro dives praasedo. Ninna te krenn le kova, anenn le kek doosh ap pende." 
Matthew12:6 Kanna penau me t'menge: Kova, kay glan t'mende tardo hi, kova hi bareder har o Debleskro baro kheer." 
Matthew12:7 T'mer hayvan kol laba gar, hoy o Devel penas: Me kamau, te han t'mer lačo ap i vavarende. Me kamau gar, te marenn t'mer mange firhen. Te hayvans t'mer, hoy kova kharella, palle anans t'mer kek doosh ap mire malende. Yon anan kek doosh ap pende." 
Matthew12:8 Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, hom ninna o ray pral o Debleskro dives." 
Matthew12:9 Oun yob djas peske, oun djas an i biboldengri kangri." 
Matthew12:10 Koy his i morsh, koles his i bango vast. Yon kaman i doosh ap o Yezouseste pre te anell, te anenn le les nay glan i čačepangre. Doleske poučan le lestar: “Nay krah mer yekes ap o Debleskro dives sasto?”" 
Matthew12:11 Penas lo ap lende: “Te hi yekes t'mendar i bakro, oun kova perell ap o Debleskro dives an i rheb an i phoub, kek t'mendar moukals les kote. Na-a, yob djals kote, taprals les, oun lals les kote vin." 
Matthew12:12 I mensho hi boudeder moldo har i bakro. Yaake hi kova čačo, te krah mer i menshes ap o Debleskro dives sasto.”" 
Matthew12:13 Oun ap ko morsheste penas lo: “Hade tiro vast pre!” Oun yob hadas peskro vast pre. Oun leskro vast vas sasto, har ko vavar vast." 
Matthew12:14 Koy djan i Farisarya vin, oun rakran khetne, har yon les nay marenna." 
Matthew12:15 Oun o Yezous hayvas kova, oun djas peske. Oun boud menshe djan leske palla. Oun yob kras hakenes lendar sasto." 
Matthew12:16 Oun yob penas zoreles ap lende, te penenn le kova kekeske." 
Matthew12:17 Oun yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, glan i rah tsiro penas:" 
Matthew12:18 O Devel penella: Dik, kova hi miro boudepaskro, kay me mange vin rodom. Koles kamau o djiyestar. Pral leste hom barhtelo. Me čivau miro Dourho ap leste. Oun yob penell i tsele menshenge, hoy me lendar kamau." 
Matthew12:19 Yob čingrell pes gar, oun dell gar bari gole. Oun yob krell kek baro rakepen ap o drom." 
Matthew12:20 Yob hi lačo ap koleste, kay hi les bouder gar boud zoor. Yob phagell les gar har i kasht, kay hi an-phagedo. Ninna i momeli, hoy gomme i tikno kotar rhačella, krell lo gar vin. Yaake hi lo, bis te hi peskro čačepen pral halauter tardo." 
Matthew12:21 Oun i tsele menshe ap i phoub dikenn ap leste. 
Matthew12:22 Palle anan le i morshes pash o Yezouseste. Kova his korelo, oun nashte rakras gar. Oun i beng his an leste. Oun o Yezous kras o morshes sasto, yaake te nay rakras lo, oun dikas lo pale." 
Matthew12:23 Oun i tsele menshe, kay troul leste tardo his, kran bare yaka. Oun yon penan: “Hi kava nay o Davideskro čavo?”" 
Matthew12:24 Har i Farisarya kova shounan, penan le: “O pralstouno beng das les i zoor. Dran kova nay tradell yob i bengen vin.”" 
Matthew12:25 O Yezous hayvas, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djas. Oun yob penas ap lende: Hako them oun hako foro djal paash, kay douy bare raya kourenn pen. Oun an yek kheer nashte venn gar douyen penepaske. Kova djal gar." 
Matthew12:26 Te tradell o beng i vavar benges vin, hi kova yaake, har te kourell pes ko yek o vavareha. Palle nashrenn yon pengri zoor." 
Matthew12:27 Te dals o pralstouno beng mande peskri zoor, te nay tradoms i bengen vin, koon dals t'mare menshen i zoor, te tradenn le i bengen vin? Vell yek dives, kay yon penenn t'menge, kay kova gar čačo hi, hoy t'mer pral mande rakran." 
Matthew12:28 Na-a, gar o beng das man koy zoor. O Debleskro Dourho das man koy zoor, te nay tradap i bengen vin. Koy pre dikenn t'mer, kay ko tsiro vas, kay o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin lella, oun leskri zoor mank t'mende hi." 
Matthew12:29 Kova, kay kamell an o kheer i zorelo morshestar dren phagell, te lell lo leskro bravlepen, kova hounte pandell ko zorelo morshes. Oun palle randell lo leskro tselo bravlepen." 
Matthew12:30 Koon gar ap miri rig hi, kova hi ap ko vavareskri rig. Oun koon gar i menshe pash mande anella, kova tradell len mandar." 
Matthew12:31 Čačepah, me penau t'menge kanna: O Devel nay bistrell hako čilačo koova, hoy i menshe kran. Oun yon te rakrenn djoungele laba pral leste, yaake nay bistrell lo kova ninna. Yek penell djoungele laba pral o Debleskro Dourho, palle bistrell lo kova gar." 
Matthew12:32 Oun yek te penell djoungele laba pral o Menshengro Čaveste, yaake nay bistrell lo kova. Yek te rakrell djoungele laba pral o Debleskro Dourho, kova bistrell lo an kek tsiro, gar an kava tsiro, oun vitar gar an ko tsiro, kay vella." 
Matthew12:33 Te hi t'men i lačo phabyengro rouk, hi t'men ninna lače phabya. Te hi t'men i phabyengro rouk, kay gar lačo hi, hi t'men ninna phabya, kay gar lačo hi. Ap kova, hoy o roukestar vella, dikenn t'mer, har ko rouk hi." 
Matthew12:34 T'mer han sapa! T'mer han čilačo oun nay rakrenn gar lačo koova. I mensho penell kova, hoy an leskro dji dren hi." 
Matthew12:35 Dran i lačo mensheskro dji vella lačo koova. Dran i čilačo dji vella čilačo koova. 
Matthew12:36 Me penau t'menge: Vell ko dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende ap i phoub vin. Kote poučell lo lendar pal hako čilačo lab, hoy yon penan." 
Matthew12:37 Tou te penal i lačo oun čačo koova, leh tou kek phagi. Tou te penal kova, hoy gar lačo oun čačo hi, leh tou i phagi." 
Matthew12:38 Palle penan i biboldengre čačepangre oun i Farisarya ap leste: “Sikepaskro, kre menge i baro koova, hoy sikrell mende, te vell tiri zoor o Deblestar!”" 
Matthew12:39 Kote penas lo ap lende: Har čilačo hi kol menshe, kay djivenn an kava tsiro. Yon moukan o Debles, oun kamenn i baro Debleskro koova te dikell. Oun o Devel sikrell len či vavar har kova, hoy i menshe ninna ap o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yona, dikan." 
Matthew12:40 O Yona ačas triin divessa oun triin rati an o baro mačeskro per. Oun yaake hounte ačell o Mensheskro Čavo triin divessa oun triin rati an i phoub paskedo. 
Matthew12:41 Ap ko dives, kay o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende vi-rakrella, stenna ninna i menshe dran o foro Ninive pre. Oun yon penenna, te hi kol menshe čilačo, kay kanna djivenna. Glan i rah tsiro penas o Yona i menshenge an o foro Ninive o Debleskro lab. Oun yon moukan pengro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom. Kova, kay glan t'mende tardo hi, kova hi bareder har o Yona." 
Matthew12:42 Ap ko dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende, stella ninna i bari rani dran o foro Saba pre. Oun yoy penella, te hi kol menshe čilačo, kay kanna djivenna. Glan i rah tsiro, vas yoy dran i dour them, oun vas pash o baro ray Salomo, te shounell li leskre goseve laba. Kava, kay glan t'mende tardo hi, kava hi bareder har o baro ray Salomo." 
Matthew12:43 Te djas i beng dran i mensheste vin, nashell yob an i them trouyel, kay kek djipen hi, oun rodell peske, kay ačell yob nay, oun hatsell či." 
Matthew12:44 Palle penell lo ap peste: Me kamau pale an miro kheer te djal, dran hoy me vin djom. Oun te vell lo pale, hi ko kheer djoudjo oun shoukar, oun kek djivell kote." 
Matthew12:45 Koy rodell lo peske vavar efta benga, kay čilačeder hi har yob. Oun yon djan an ko mensheste dren, oun djivenn an leste. Yaake hi ko mensheha djoungleder har glan kava tsiro. Oun yaake djal ninna kal čilače menshenge, kay kanna djivenna." 
Matthew12:46 Oun har yob kova kol menshenge penas, kay troul leste tardo his, koy vas leskri day oun leskre phrala. Yon his vin tardo, oun kaman leha te rakrell." 
Matthew12:47 Oun yek penas ap leste: “Shoun, tiri day oun tire phrala hi vin tardo oun kamenn touha te rakrell.”" 
Matthew12:48 Penas lo ap koleste: “Me kamau touke te sikrell, koon miri day oun mire phrala hi.”" 
Matthew12:49 Oun palle sikras lo ap peskre malende oun penas: “Dik, kalla hi miri day oun mire phrala!" 
Matthew12:50 Kova, kay krella, hoy miro dad an o bolepen kamella, kova hi miro phraal, oun miri pheen, oun miri day.”" 
Matthew13:1 Pal i tsiro djas o Yezous dran o kheer, oun beshas pes pash o baro pani." 
Matthew13:2 Oun boud menshe van kote pash leste. Doleske djas lo an i bero, oun beshas pes kote. Oun i tsele menshe his pash o pani tardo." 
Matthew13:3 Oun o Yezous rakras ap lende boud save laba, kay hi i khatedo čačepen dren. Oun yob penas: I harho djas vin, te vitsrell lo o tikno djob ap peskro kotar them, te vell ko djob bares." 
Matthew13:4 Oun i tikne kotya peran ap o drom, oun i čirkle rhan len pre." 
Matthew13:5 Oun vavar djob peras ap i barra, kay gar boud phoub his. Dran kova vas ko djob sik dran i phoub vin." 
Matthew13:6 Oun har o kham djas pre, vas ko djob, kay gar dour an i phoub his, rhačedo oun meras tele." 
Matthew13:7 Vavar djob peras mank i soubyengre bourra, oun kol bourra van yaake baro, te las o djob kek dourho bouder, oun yob meras." 
Matthew13:8 Vavar djob peras ap i lači phoub, oun vas baro, oun hidjras sheel kope yaake boud. Vavar djob hidjras shob-deesh kope yaake boud, oun vavar djob triyanda kope yaake boud." 
Matthew13:9 Moukenn kova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal! 
Matthew13:10 Oun leskre mala van pash leste oun poučan lestar: “Hoske rakreh tou save laba ap lende, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi?”" 
Matthew13:11 Penas lo ap lende: O Devel moukell t'men te hayvell, har kote djal, kay dell lo menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom. I vavar menshe hayvenn kova gar." 
Matthew13:12 Koon o Debleskro lab an peskro dji rikrella, kova hayvell les boud oun boudeder. Koon o Debleskro lab gar an peskro dji rikrella, koleske vell ninna kova krik lino, hoy yob patsell, te hi les." 
Matthew13:13 Doleske rakrau save laba ap lende, kay hi i khatedo čačepen dren. Kal menshe dikenn, hoy krau. Oun yon krenna, har te dikans le les gar. Oun yon shounenn, hoy penau, oun hayvenn kova gar." 
Matthew13:14 Ap kolende vell kova čačo, hoy penas o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, glan i rah tsiro: T'mer shounenn oun hayvenn či. Oun t'mer dikenn oun hayvenn vitar či." 
Matthew13:15 O Devel penas: Kalla menshe kamenn gar te hayvell, hoy shounenn le. Yon kamenn gar te shounenn, hoy me penau. Vitar gar kamenn le te dikell, hoy čačo hi. Te kamans le kova te dikell, shounans le. Oun te shounans le, hayvans le, oun vans pash mande. Oun me nay kroms len sasto." 
Matthew13:16 Barhtele han t'mer, kay dikenna oun shounenna, hoy me t'menge penau oun sikrau." 
Matthew13:17 Čačepah me penau t'menge: An o phouro tsiro his boud Debleskre rakepangre oun vavar menshe, kay kran, hoy o Devel kamella. Kolla kaman te dikell, hoy t'mer dikenna, oun dikan les gar. Oun yon kaman te shounell, hoy t'mer shounenna, oun shounan les gar." 
Matthew13:18 Shounenn kanna, hoy kamenn kol laba pral o djob t'menge te penell:" 
Matthew13:19 Ko djob, hoy peras ap o drom, sikrell t'mende yekes, kay shounas ko lab, te dell les o Devel pash peste gole. Oun yob hayvas ko lab gar. Oun o beng vas, oun las ko lab dran leskro dji vin." 
Matthew13:20 Vavar menshe hi har ko kotar phoub, kay o djob ap i barra peras. Yon shounenn ko lab, len les sik barhteles pre," 
Matthew13:21 oun bistrenn les ninna pale sik. Yon moukenn les gar an pengro dji zoreles te vell. Te vell i pharo tsiro ap lende, oun yon venn mange palla lino, palle vitsrenn le pengro patsepen ap i rig." 
Matthew13:22 Vavar menshe hi har ko kotar phoub, kay o djob tel i soubyengre bourra peras. Yon shounan ko lab. Palle dikenn le ap i phoubyakro koova oun kamenn bravele te vell. Oun o bravlepen rhorhell i menshen. Oun ko lab, hoy shounan le, vell tassedo, oun nay rakrell bouder gar an lengro dji." 
Matthew13:23 Pale vavar menshe hi har koy lači phoub, kay o djob peras. Kolla shounan oun hayvan ko lab. An lende vell ko patsepen baro. Oun lengro djipen sikrella, te kamenn le o Debles, oun shounenn le ap leste. Pash kolende hi ko lab har o djob, kay baro vella, oun pash yekeste hidjrell lo sheel kope yaake boud. Oun pash i vavareste hidjrell lo shob-deesh kope yaake boud. Oun pale pash i vavareste hidjrell lo triyanda kope yaake boud." 
Matthew13:24 Oun yob penas lenge pale, har kote djal, kay dell o Devel i menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom. Oun yob penas: I harho vitsras o lačo djob ap peskro kotar them, te vell ko djob baro." 
Matthew13:25 An i rat, har i tsele menshe sovan, djas i čilačo ap ko kotar them, vitsras o djoungelo zenlepen mashkral o djob, oun djas peske." 
Matthew13:26 Oun o tsiro vas, te vell o lačo djob vin, oun vas bares. Oun koy vas ninna ko djoungelo zenlepen bares." 
Matthew13:27 Oun i boudepangre djan pash o harheste, oun poučan lestar: Ray, tou vitsral o lačo djob ap tiro kotar them. Kay vas o djoungelo zenlepen?" 
Matthew13:28 Oun yob penas ap lende: Kava kras i čilačo, kay man gar kamella. Koy poučan le lestar: Kameh tou, te djas kote, te tserdas ko djoungelo zenlepen vin?" 
Matthew13:29 Penas lo: Na-a! T'mer te tserdenn o djoungelo zenlepen vin, palle tserdenn t'mer o lačo djob ninna vin." 
Matthew13:30 Moukenn kova lauter khetne baro te vell, bis te anah mer o djob an o djobeskro kheer! Oun ap ko tsiro penau me ap kolende, kay ko djob činenna: Anenn o djoungelo zenlepen khetne, oun pandenn les khetne, te rhačrenn les! Oun palle anenn o djob khetne, oun anenn les an o djobeskro kheer!" 
Matthew13:31 Oun pale penas o Yezous lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi: Oun yob penas: Kote, kay o Devel i menshen pash peste gole della, te djan le ap leskro drom, hi kova yaake har pash o djob dran i senftikro rouk, hoy vitsras i morsh an i phoub ap peskro kotar them." 
Matthew13:32 O senftikro djob hi tikneder har ko tselo vavar djob. Yob te vell baro, vell lo bareder har i tsele vavar bourra. Dran leste vell i rouk. Oun i čirkle venna, oun djivenn ap leste." 
Matthew13:33 Oun pale penas o Yezous lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi: Oun yob penas: Kote, kay o Devel i menshen pash peste gole della, te djan le ap leskro drom, hi kova yaake har pash i kotar shoutlo yarro, hoy las i djouvel oun čivas les mashkral an i baro čaro parno yarro. Oun ko tikno kotar shoutlo yarro kras ko tselo yarro shoutlo." 
Matthew13:34 Kova lauter rakras o Yezous ap lende save labentsa, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Vavarčandes rakras lo gar ap lende." 
Matthew13:35 Oun yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro glan i rah tsiro penas: O Devel penas: Me rakrau ap lende save labentsa, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Me penau lenge kova, hoy kek mensho djinas, yaake rah har i phoub tardo hi." 
Matthew13:36 Oun o Yezous bičras kol tsele menshen khere, oun djas an o kheer. Kote van leskre mala pash leste, oun poučan lestar: “Hoy sikrell men ko lab pral o djoungelo zenlepen, hoy ap o kotar them baro vas?”" 
Matthew13:37 Penas lo ap lende: Kova, kay o lačo djob ap i kotar them vin vitsrella, kova hom me, o Mensheskro Čavo." 
Matthew13:38 Oun ko kotar them, kolla hi i tsele menshe ap i phoub. Oun o lačo djob, kolla hi kol menshe, kay moukenn o Debles pengro ray te vell. Oun ko djoungelo zenlepen, kolla hi i čilače, pral kolende o beng o ray hi." 
Matthew13:39 Oun kova, kay hi rhoyedo ap o Debleste oun vitsrell o djoungelo zenlepen ap i phoub, kova hi o beng. Oun ko tsiro, kay anenn le o djob an o djobeskro kheer, kova hi ko tsiro, kay o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende vi-rakrella. Oun kol činepangre, kay činenn o djob tele, kolla hi bolepangre." 
Matthew13:40 Oun yaake har ko djoungelo zenlepen khetne lino vella, oun an i yag vitsedo vella, yaake vell kova ap ko tsiro, kay o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende vi-rakrella." 
Matthew13:41 O Mensheskro Čavo bičrell peskre bolepangren ap i phoub. Oun yon lenn kolen glan leskre yaka krik, kay kran, hoy o Devel gar kamella, ninna kolen, kay anan i vavaren ap o čilačo drom." 
Matthew13:42 Oun i bolepangre vitsrenn len an i bobeskri yag. Kote rovenn le, oun dandrenn i danda i doukatar khetne." 
Matthew13:43 Palle hi kolla, kay kran, hoy lengro dad an o bolepen kamas, har i bari momeli an leskro raylo them. Moukenn kova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal!" 
Matthew13:44 Kova, kay hatsas o drom pash o Debleste, koleske hi kova har i kouč bravlepen, hoy an i kotar phoub khatedo hi. Oun i mensho hatsell les, oun khatrell les pale. Oun yob hi yaake barhtelo koy pral, te bikrell lo lauter, hoy les hi, oun ginell ko kotar phoub." 
Matthew13:45 Kova, kay hatsas o drom pash o Debleste, kova hi har i bikepaskro, kay rayle oun kouč barra rodas." 
Matthew13:46 Oun har yob i raylo oun kouč bar hatsas, bikras lo lauter, hoy les his, oun ginas les." 
Matthew13:47 Ap ko dives, kay o Debleskri harmenatsyona vella, vell kova yaake har pash i mačepangre, kay vitsran pengre mačengre gone an o baro pani, oun tapran bare oun tikne mače." 
Matthew13:48 Oun har kol gone pherdo mače his, tserdan le kolen ap o them, beshan pen tele, oun čivan i lače mačen an i čaro. Oun i djoungele mačen vitsran le ap i rig." 
Matthew13:49 Yaake djal kova ninna ap ko tsiro, kay o Debleskri harmenatsyona vella. I bolepangre venna, oun lenn kol čilačen mashkral i lačendar vin." 
Matthew13:50 Oun yon vitsrenn i čilačen an i bobeskri yag. Oun kote rovenn le, oun dandrenn i danda i doukatar khetne." 
Matthew13:51 Hayvan t'mer kava lauter? Oun yon penan ap leste: “Ava.” 
Matthew13:52 “T'mer dikenn,” penas lo, “hako čačepaskro, koon djinell o phouro biboldengro čačepen, oun ap mande patslo vas, kova hayvell kanna o nevo oun o phouro koova pral o Debleste, oun nay penell kova i menshenge.”" 
Matthew13:53 Oun har o Yezous i menshenge kol tsele laba penas, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, stas lo pre oun djas peske." 
Matthew13:54 Oun yob djas an peskro dadeskro foro, oun penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab an lengri kangri. Oun yon kran bare yaka oun penan: “Koon das les ko gosvepen oun koy zoor, te nay krell lo savo baro koova?" 
Matthew13:55 Hi kova gar o čavo kolestar, kay boudrell i kashtentsa. Hi leskri day gar i Maria? Oun hi o Yakobo, o Yosef, o Simon, oun o Youdas gar leskre phrala?" 
Matthew13:56 Oun djivenn leskre phenya gar pash mende? Koon das les ko gosvepen oun koy zoor?” 
Matthew13:57 Oun yon van rhoyedo ap leste, oun kaman gar te patsell, kay o Devel les bičras. Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Kek Debleskro rakepaskro vell kote sharedo, kay yob khere hi. An i vavar forya oun gaba vell lo sharedo.”" 
Matthew13:58 Oun yon patsan gar ap leste. Doleske kras yob gar boud baro koova an o Debleskri zoor. 
Matthew14:1 Ap ko tsiro his o Herodes o baro ray pral o them Galilea. Oun yob shounas, hoy pral o Yezouseste rakedo vas." 
Matthew14:2 Oun yob penas ap peskre pralstoune boudepangre: “Kava morsh hi o Yohanni, kova, kay taufras i menshen. Yob stas i moulendar pre. Doleske hi les savi zoor, te nay krell lo ko baro koova.” O Yohanni his moulo. Doleske penas o Herodes kova." 
Matthew14:3 Glan ko tsiro las o Herodes koy romyat peskro phralestar Filip. Lakro lab his Herodia. Oun o Yohanni penas leske: “Kova hi gar mishto, kay tou lal tiro phraleskri romyat.” Doleske penas o Herodes ap peskre lourdende, te taprenn le o Yohannes, te pandenn le les, oun te vitsrenn le les an o stilepen." 
Matthew14:4  
Matthew14:5 Yob marals les, te vans gar kol boud menshe koy, kay patsan, te hi o Yohanni i Debleskro rakepaskro. Kolendar daras o Herodes." 
Matthew14:6 Koy vas ko dives, kay vas o Herodes i bersh phoureder. Oun yob moukas i baro rhapen te krell. Oun i Herodiakri čay vas, oun khelas glan leste oun glan kolende, kay pash leste hi. Oun lakro khelepen his yaake shoukar an leskre yaka," 
Matthew14:7 te das lo pes sovel, te dell lo lat lauter, hoy yoy lestar mangella." 
Matthew14:8 Oun yoy djas pash peskri date oun poučas latar, hoy yoy nay lestar mangella. Oun koya penas ap late, hoy yoy hounte leske penella. Oun yaake penas li ap leste: “De man kate ap i čaro o shero o Yohannestar, kova kay taufras i menshen!”" 
Matthew14:9 Har o Herodes kova shounas, khaytas les, hoy yob lake penas. Palle dikas lo ap kol tsele menshende, hoy shounan, har yob pes sovel das. Doleske penas lo ap peskre lourdende, te denn le lat, hoy yoy kamas." 
Matthew14:10 Dran kova vas o Yohanneske leskro shero tele dino an o stilepen. 
Matthew14:11 Oun yon čivan leskro shero ap i čaro, oun dan les i čate. Oun koya anas les pash lakri date." 
Matthew14:12 Oun o Yohanneskre mala van, lan o moules, oun paskran les. Oun palle djan le pash o Yezouseste, oun penan les leske." 
Matthew14:13 Oun har o Yezous kova shounas, djas lo an i bero, oun ouleras kote, kay hi lo kokres. Boud menshe shounan, kay yob djas peske. Oun yon van dran i forya, te djan le ap o them pash leste." 
Matthew14:14 Oun har o Yezous dran o bero djas, dikas lo kal boud menshen, oun les khaytan le. Oun yob kras kolen sasto, kay mashkral lende nasselo hi." 
Matthew14:15 Har o kham tele djas, van leskre mala pash leste, oun penan ap leste: “Kate, kay mer ham, della či te rhal, oun i rati vella. Biče kal menshen toutar, te djan le an i gaba, te ginenn le penge čomone te rhal!”" 
Matthew14:16 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Yon nashte ačenna kate. Denn t'mer len te rhal!” 
Matthew14:17 “Men hi gar boudeder har panč mare oun douy mače,” penan le." 
Matthew14:18 Penas lo ap lende: “Anenn len pash mande!” 
Matthew14:19 Palle penas lo ap kol tsele menshende, te beshenn le pen. Oun yob las kol panč mare oun kol douy mače, dikas pre, parkras pes pash peskro dadeste an o bolepen, oun phagas kol mare an kotya, oun das len peskre malende. Oun kalla dan len i tsele menshende te rhal." 
Matthew14:20 Oun yon rhan lauter, oun van čalo. Oun pal o rhapen hadan le kol kotya mare pre, hoy pral ačan. Oun deesh-te-douy marengre gone van pherdo." 
Matthew14:21 Kolla, kay rhan, his nay yaake panč zerya (5.000) morsha. Ninna boud djouvya oun čave his kote pashel." 
Matthew14:22 Oun sik pal kova tradas o Yezous peskre malen, te djan le an o bero, oun te oulerenn le glan leste ap o vavar panyeskri rig. Yob ačas pash i menshende, te bičrell lo len khere." 
Matthew14:23 Palle djas yob peske kokres ap i berga, te rakrell lo peskro dadeha an o bolepen. Har i rat vas, his lo kote kokres." 
Matthew14:24 O Yezouseskre mala his an o bero dour vin ap o baro pani. Kote phourdas i zorelo dourho pral o pani. Oun o pani djas pral, oun vitsras o bero pral oun tele." 
Matthew14:25 Starenge taysarlake djas o Yezous ap o baro pani pash lende. 
Matthew14:26 Oun har peskre mala les dikan ap o pani te djal, trashan le oun penan: “Kava hi i moulo!” Oun yon dan gole i daryatar." 
Matthew14:27 Koy penas lo sik ap lende: “Ma darenn! Me hom. Lauter hi mishto!” 
Matthew14:28 Penas o Petro ap leste: “Ray, tou te hal kova, pen mange, te djap ap o pani pash toute!”" 
Matthew14:29 “Ab!” penas lo. Oun o Petro djas dran o bero, oun djas ap o pani pash o Yezouseste."
