Matthew14:30 Ap yek kopo hayvas lo, har zorelo o dourho pral o baro pani phourdas. Oun i daar tapras les. Koy djas lo lokes tele, oun das i daryatar gole: “Ray, ma mouk man te tassell!”" 
Matthew14:31 O Yezous rikras leske o vast koy, tapras les, oun penas ap leste: “Tiro patsepen hi tikno. Hoske patsal man gar?”" 
Matthew14:32 Oun yon djan an o bero, oun ko zorelo dourho phourdas bouder gar." 
Matthew14:33 Kolla, kay an o bero his, vitsran pen glan o Yezouseste tele, oun penan: “Čačepah, tou hal o Debleskro čavo.”" 
Matthew14:34 Oun yon ouleran vergel oun van an o them Genezaret. 
Matthew14:35 Oun har i menshe kote dikan, te vas o Yezous pash lende, moukan le kova an kol tsele gaba oun forya trouyel te penell. Oun kote anan le i tsele nasselen pash leste," 
Matthew14:36 oun mangan lestar, te moukell lo len i kotar leskro ripen an-taprell. Oun hakeno, kay les an-tapras, vas sasto." 
Matthew15:1 Ap ko tsiro van i Farisarya oun i biboldengre čačepangre dran o foro Yerusalem pash o Yezouseste, oun penan ap leste:" 
Matthew15:2 “Hoske thovenn tire mala pengre vasta gar glan o rhapen, yaake har mare phoure menge penan?”" 
Matthew15:3 Penas o Yezous ap lende: T'menge hi kol phourengre laba boudeder moldo, har o Debleskre laba. Hoske krenn t'mer gar, hoy o Devel kamella?" 
Matthew15:4 O Devel penas t'menge: Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto! Oun o Devel penas ninna: Koon ap peskro dadeste oun ap peskri date i bibarht anella, kova hounte merella!" 
Matthew15:5 T'mer penenn i menshenge: Koon penell ap peskro dadeste oun ap peskri date: Kol love hoy hounte doms t'mende, kol love dau o Debleste, ko mensho hounte dikell gar koy pre, te djal leskro dadeske mishto. Me penau t'menge: Yaake kran t'mer, te krenn i menshe bouder gar, hoy o Devel penas. Kova, hoy t'mare phoure penan, hi t'menge boudeder moldo har o Debleskro lab." 
Matthew15:6  
Matthew15:7 T'mer rakrenn douy čipyentsa. O Debleskro rakepaskro Yesaya penas o čačepen pral t'mende, har yob penas:" 
Matthew15:8 O Devel penas: Kal menshe sharenn man pengre mouya. Lengre djia hi dour mandar. 
Matthew15:9 Yon te mangenn man an, hi kova mange či moldo! Yon penenn i menshenge i menshengre laba oun gar mire laba." 
Matthew15:10 Oun o Yezous das kol tsele menshende pash peste gole, kay kote tardo his. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Shounenn oun hayvenn mishto, hoy me t'menge penau!" 
Matthew15:11 O rhapen oun o pipen, hoy i mensho an peskro mouy čivella, kova krell les gar pale-čiddo. Kol čilače laba, hoy i mensho rakrella, kolla krenn les pale-čiddo.”" 
Matthew15:12 Pal kova van peskre mala pash leste oun penan ap leste: “Djineh tou, kay i Farisarya rhoyran pen, har yon tire laba shounan?”" 
Matthew15:13 Penas lo: “Yon hi har rouka, kolen gar miro dad an o bolepen an i phoub čivas, oun yon venna dran i phoub vin tserdedo." 
Matthew15:14 Moukenn le te rakrell! Yon hi korele oun kamenn i korelen ap o vast te lenn. Oun te lell i korelo i koreles ap o vast, perenn hake douy.”" 
Matthew15:15 O Petro penas leske: “Pen menge, hoy kameh menge te penell kal labentsa pral o pale-čiddo koova?”" 
Matthew15:16 Penas lo: Hayvan t'mer kova vitar gar? 
Matthew15:17 Hayvenn t'mer gar, kay lauter, hoy i mensho rhala, djal an o per dren, oun palle dran o mensheste vin?" 
Matthew15:18 Te penell i mensho čilače laba, venn kolla dran leskro dji vin. Oun kol čilače laba krenn o menshes pale-čiddo." 
Matthew15:19 Dran o mensheskro dji vell o čilačo koova, hoy an leskro shero trouyel djal. Dran leskro dji vell, te dell lo i vavares moulo. Te rhorhell i morsh peskri romyat, vell kova dran leskro dji. Te rhorhell i djouvel peskro romes, vell kova dran lakro dji. Dran o dji vella o vi-ladjedo koova, o čorepen, o rhorhepen, oun o praasepen." 
Matthew15:20 Kova lauter krell i menshes pale-čiddo. Yob te thovell gar peskre vasta glan o rhapen, krell les kova gar pale-čiddo." 
Matthew15:21 Oun o Yezous djas peske, oun vas an o them, kay i forya Tirus oun Sidon čiddo hi." 
Matthew15:22 Kote djivas i djouvel, kay kek biboldetsa hi. Yoy hi i Kanaanitetsa. Kaya vas pash leste, oun das ap leste gole: “Mo ray, tou Davideskro čavo, kre tiro dji mange pre! I beng hi an miri čate. Oun kova marell lat khetne.”" 
Matthew15:23 O Yezous penas či ap late. Koy van peskre mala pash leste, oun penan ap leste: “Yoy dell savi bari gole pal mende. Biče lat toutar!”" 
Matthew15:24 Penas lo ap lende: “O Devel bičras man pash i Israeleskre menshende kokres. Kolla hi har bakre, kay nashedo hi.”" 
Matthew15:25 Koy vitsras li pes glan leste tele ap i phoub, oun penas: “Ray, kre miri čay sasto!”" 
Matthew15:26 Penas lo ap late: “Kova hi gar mishto, te lell yek o čavengro rhapen lendar, oun vitsrell les glan i djouklende.”" 
Matthew15:27 “Tiro hi čačo, miro ray” penas li, “ninna i djoukle rhan i tikne kotya, hoy moukenn lengre raya ap i phoub te perell.”" 
Matthew15:28 Penas lo: “Romniya, tiro patsepen ap mande hi bares. O Devel krell touke kova, hoy tou kameh.” Oun ap kava tsiro vas lakri čay sasto." 
Matthew15:29 Oun o Yezous djas peske, oun vas pash o baro pani an o them Galilea. Oun kote djas lo ap i berga, oun beshas pes kote tele." 
Matthew15:30 Oun boud menshe anan pengre nasselen pash leste: i bangen, i korelen, kolen, kay nashte rakrenn gar, kolen, kolengre vasta oun herya gar sasto hi, oun boud vavar nasselen. Oun yon čivan kolen glan leste. Oun yob kras len sasto." 
Matthew15:31 Oun i tsele menshe, kay troul leste tardo hi, kran bare yaka, har yon dikan, har i nassele sasto van. Kolla, kay nashte rakran gar, rakrenn nay. Oun kolla, kolengre vasta oun herya gar sasto his, len hi kanna saste vasta oun herya. Oun i bange nay djana. Oun i korele nay dikenna. Har i menshe kova dikan, sharan le o Israeleskro Debles." 
Matthew15:32 Oun o Yezous das peskre malen pash peste gole, oun penas ap lende: “Man khaytenn kal menshe. Yon hi kanna triin divessa pash mande, oun len hi či te rhal. Len hi bouder kek zoor. Dran kova kamau len gar khere te bičrell, te perenn le gar ap o drom khetne.”" 
Matthew15:33 Oun leskre mala poučan lestar: “Kay las mer doha maro an kava moulo them kal boud menshenge, te venn le čalo?”" 
Matthew15:34 Penas o Yezous: “Kitse mare hi t'men?” Penan le: “Efta mare, oun gar boud tikne mače.”" 
Matthew15:35 Koy penas lo ap kal tsele menshende, te beshenn le pen ap i phoub." 
Matthew15:36 Oun yob las kol efta mare oun kol mače, parkras pes pash o Debleste, oun phagas len an kotya. Oun yob das len peskre malende, oun kolla dan len halauterende, kay kote beshdo hi." 
Matthew15:37 Oun yon rhan lauter, oun van čalo. Oun pal o rhapen hadan le kol kotya maro pre, hoy pral ačan. Oun efta marengre gone van pherdo." 
Matthew15:38 Oun kolla, kay rhan, his star zerya (4.000) morsha, ninna boud djouvya oun čave." 
Matthew15:39 Oun yob bičras kol tsele menshen khere, oun djas an o bero. Oun yon ouleran pash o gab Magadan." 
Matthew16:1 Oun i Farisarya oun i Sadducarya van pash o Yezouseste. Yon kaman te taprenn le les leskre labentsa oun penan ap leste: “Kre menge i baro koova, hoy sikrell mende, te vell tiri zoor o Deblestar!”" 
Matthew16:2 Koy penas lo ap lende: Te djal o kham tele, oun o bolepen vell lolo, penenn t'mer: Taysar vell shoukar!" 
Matthew16:3 Oun te hi o bolepen taysarlake lolo, penenn t'mer: Vella brishin! Yaake dikenn t'mer ap o bolepen, oun djinenn, hoy vella. Kova, hoy kanna mashkral t'mende djala, kova hayvenn t'mer gar." 
Matthew16:4 Har čilačo hi kol menshe, kay djivenn an kava tsiro! Yon moukan o Debles, oun kamenn i baro Debleskro koova te dikell. Oun o Devel sikrell len či vavar har kova, hoy i menshe ninna ap o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yona, dikan. Oun o Yezous moukas len, oun djas peske." 
Matthew16:5 Oun o Yezouseskre mala van ap i vavar panyeskri rig, oun hayvan, te bistran le o maro lentsa te lell." 
Matthew16:6 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “Denn yak! O shoutlo yarro hi gar mishto, hoy vell i Farisarendar oun i Sadducarendar!”" 
Matthew16:7 Har yon kova shounan, rakran le pral leskre laba oun penan: “Mer lam kek maro mentsa. Doleske penas lo kova menge.”" 
Matthew16:8 O Yezous hayvas, hoy yon penan, oun yob penas ap lende: “Hoske rakrenn t'mer pral o maro, hoy t'mer bistran? Havo tikno patsepen hi t'men!" 
Matthew16:9 T'mer hayvan man gar. Bistran t'mer kol panč mare, hoy dom kol panč zerya menshende te rhal? Oun pal ko rhapen hadan t'mer deesh-te-douy marengre gone pherdo maro pre, hoy pral ačas." 
Matthew16:10 Oun bistran t'mer ninna kol efta mare, hoy dom kol star zerya menshende te rhal? Oun pal ko rhapen hadan t'mer efta marengre gone pherdo maro pre, hoy pral ačas." 
Matthew16:11 Hayvenn t'mer kanna, kay me rakrom gar pral o maro, har penom: Denn yak! O shoutlo yarro hi gar mishto, hoy vell i Farisarendar oun i Sadducarendar!”" 
Matthew16:12 Oun koy hayvan le, te rakras lo gar pral o shoutlo yarro, hoy lenn le, te pekenn le maro. Yob rakras pral kol laba, hoy i Farisarya oun i Sadducarya i menshenge penenna." 
Matthew16:13 O Yezous djas pash o foro Cesarea Filipi. Oun kote poučas lo peskre malendar: “Hoy penenn i menshe pral o Menshengro Čaveste?” 
Matthew16:14 Oun leskre mala penan ap leste: “Yon penenna, tou hal o Yohanni, kova, kay taufras i menshen. Vavar penenna, kay tou hal o Eliya. Oun vavar penenna, kay tou hal o Yeremia. Oun pale vavar penenna, kay tou hal i Debleskro rakepaskro, kay i moulendar pre stas.”" 
Matthew16:15 Penas lo: “Oun hoy penenn t'mer, koon me hom?”" 
Matthew16:16 Penas o Simon Petro: “Tou hal o baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas te vell yob. Tou hal o čavo o djido Deblestar.”" 
Matthew16:17 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Barhtelo hal tou, Simon Bar-Yona. Kol laba, hoy tou pral mande penal, kolla van gar toutar, vitar gar vavar menshendar. Miro dad an o bolepen sikras tout kova." 
Matthew16:18 Doleske penau touke: Tiro lab hi kanna Petro. Kova, hoy tou kate penal, hi har i zorelo bar, ap koleste čivau miro kheer. Oun miro kheer hi kolla, kay patsenn ap mande. Oun kek nashte lell len dran mire vasta vin, ninna kek merepen." 
Matthew16:19 Me dau tout i klidepaskro, hoy krell o voudar pre, te venn i menshe ap miro drom. Ap koleste, kay tou peneh: O Devel las tiri doosh toutar, kolestar hi li krik lino. Ap koleste, kay tou peneh: Tiri doosh ačell ap toute, ap koleste ačell leskri doosh čiddo.”" 
Matthew16:20 Pal kova penas lo peskre malenge, te penenn le kekeske, te hi lo ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob." 
Matthew16:21 Oun ap ko tsiro penas o Yezous peskre malenge, te hounte djal lo an o foro Yerusalem. Oun yob penas lenge: “Me hounte lap boud douka ap mande. I bare rashaya, oun i biboldengre phoureder oun čačepangre, kolla marenn man. Oun pal triin divessa krell man o Devel djido.”" 
Matthew16:22 Koy las o Petro les ap i rig, oun čingras ap leste oun penas: “Mo ray, ko nashte vell gar. Ma mouk kova pral toute te vell!”" 
Matthew16:23 O Yezous rissras pes trouyel, oun penas ap o Petreste: “Dja touke, tou beng! Tou kameh man o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell. Tou kameh gar, hoy o Devel kamella. Na-a, tou kameh, hoy i menshe kamenna.”" 
Matthew16:24 Palle penas o Yezous ap peskre malende: Koon ap miro drom mantsa djala, kova hounte bistrell, hoy leske kokres mishto hi, oun hounte lell peskro troushel ap peste, oun djal mantsa." 
Matthew16:25 Koon peskro djipen zoreles kamella, kova nashrell les. Koon peskro djipen mange nashrella, lell les mandar pale." 
Matthew16:26 I mensheske vals kova gar mishto, te lals lo o tselo bravlepen ap kay phoub, oun nashrals o djipen. I mensho nay dell či o Debleste, te lell lo ko djipen pale." 
Matthew16:27 Me hom o Mensheskro Čavo. Oun me vau pale ap i phoub an o raylepen, hoy das man miro dad an o bolepen. Oun mantsa venna mire bolepangre. Oun palle dikau ap hakeneste, hoy yob kras. Oun me dau lačo koova kolen, kay lačo koova kran. Oun me dau i phagi kolen, kay čilačo koova kran." 
Matthew16:28 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Mashkral t'mende hi save menshe, kay merenn gar, bis te dikenn le o Menshengro Čaves, har yob o baro ray hi." 
Matthew17:1 Oun pal shob divessa djas o Yezous ap i bari berga. Leha khetne djas o Petro oun kol douy phrala, o Yakobo oun o Yohanni. Kek vavar djas lentsa." 
Matthew17:2 Oun glan lengre yaka las lo i bolepaskro raylepen. Leskro mouy vas har o kham. Oun leskro ripen vas biyalo har i bari momeli. 
Matthew17:3 Oun ap yek kopo dikan le o Moses oun o Eliyas koy tardo, kay leha rakrenn." 
Matthew17:4 Koy penas o Petro ap o Yezouseste: “Ray, hi mishto, te ham mer kate. Tou te kameh, krau me triin tikne khera kate, yek touke, yek o Moseske, oun yek o Eliyeske.”" 
Matthew17:5 Oun har yob yaake rakras, vas i parni folka pral lende tele. Oun dran koy folka vas o rakepen, hoy penas: “Kava hi miro čavo! Koles kamau o djiyestar. Yob krell man barhtelo. Shounenn ap leste!”" 
Matthew17:6 Oun har yon kova shounan, vitsran le pen i bari daryatar ap i phoub." 
Matthew17:7 Oun o Yezous djas pash lende, čivas peskre vasta ap lende, oun penas: “Stenn pre! Ma darenn!”" 
Matthew17:8 Oun yon dikan pre, oun dikan kekes bouder, har o Yezouses kokres." 
Matthew17:9 Oun o Yezous djas lentsa koy berga tele, oun penas zoreles ap lende: “Penenn kekeske, hoy t'mer dikan, yaake rah har o Mensheskro Čavo gar i moulendar pre stas!”" 
Matthew17:10 Oun leskre mala poučan lestar: “Hoske penenn mare čačepangre, kay o Eliya hounte vell glan ko tsiro, kay kova lauter vella?”" 
Matthew17:11 Penas lo: “Kova hi čačo: O Eliya vella, oun anell o Debleskre menshen lauter pale khetne." 
Matthew17:12 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: O Eliya vas pale. Yon prindjran les gar, oun kran leha, hoy yon kaman. Oun yaake hounte lell ninna o Mensheskro Čavo boud douka ap peste.”" 
Matthew17:13 Kote hayvan leskre mala, te rakras lo o Yohannestar, kova, kay taufras i menshen." 
Matthew17:14 Oun har yon pash kol tsele menshende van, kay kote tardo hi, vas i morsh pash o Yezouseste. Kova vitsras pes glan leste ap i phoub," 
Matthew17:15 oun penas: “Ray, kre tiro dji miro čaveske pre! Yob hi yaake nasselo, har te vals lo dinelo, oun yob perell ap i phoub. Boud kope peras lo an i yag, oun boud kope peras lo an i pani." 
Matthew17:16 Me anom les pash tire malende, te krenn le les sasto. Oun yon nashte kran kova gar.”" 
Matthew17:17 Koy penas o Yezous: “T'mer čilače menshe, t'men hi kek patsepen! Har rah hounte ačap pash t'mende? Har rah marap man t'mentsa tele? Anenn les pash mande!”" 
Matthew17:18 Oun o Yezous das o benges trad, oun penas leske, te djal yob dran koleste vin. Oun o beng djas dran leste vin. Oun ko čavo vas sasto." 
Matthew17:19 Koy van o Yezouseskre mala pash o Yezouseste, har yob kokres his, oun poučan lestar: “Hoske tradam mer les nashte gar vin?”" 
Matthew17:20 Penas lo ap lende: “T'maro patsepen hi tikno. Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Te vals t'maro patsepen ninna tikno har i senftikro djob, nay penans t'mer ap kay berga: Čip tout ap koy vavar rig! Oun koy berga čivals pes ap i vavar rig. Oun či nashte vals, hoy t'mer nashte gar krans.”" 
Matthew17:21  
Matthew17:22 Oun o Yezous djas peskre malentsa an o them Galilea trouyel. Ap o drom penas lo ap lende: “O Mensheskro Čavo vell an i menshengre vasta dino. 
Matthew17:23 Oun yon marenn les. Pal triin divessa vell lo o Deblestar djides kerdo.” Oun ko lab doukas len an o dji. 
Matthew17:24 Oun yon djan an o foro Kapernaum. Kote his kolla, kay lenn o Debleskro khereskre love khetne. Kolla van pash o Petreste, oun poučan lestar: “Dell t'maro sikepaskro kol Debleskro khereskre love?” “Ava,” penas lo, “kova playsrell yob.”" 
Matthew17:25 Oun o Petro djas an o kheer dren, te penell lo kova o Yezouseske. Har o Yezous dikas, te vell o Petro pash leste, poučas lo lestar: “Petro, koon hounte dell kol love i bare rayende ap kay phoub? Hounte denn lengre menshe lende kol love? Hounte denn i vi-themarya lende kol love?”" 
Matthew17:26 Penas o Petro: “I vi-themarya hounte denn kol love ap i bare rayende.” “Mishto,” penas o Yezous, “yaake hounte playsrenna lengre menshe či ap lende." 
Matthew17:27 Ninna te hi kova yaake, kamah gar, te venn le rhoyedo ap mende. Doleske dja pash o baro pani, oun vitse i raan an o pani! Ko mačo, hoy tou tapreh, koleske kre o mouy pre! Oun tou hatseh an leskro mouy i roupeni bema. Le koy roupeni bema, oun de koy bema kolende, kay len kol love dren! Kova hi doha mange oun touke.”" 
Matthew18:1 Ap ko tsiro van leskre mala pash leste oun poučan lestar: “Koon hi o bareder mashkral kolende, kay djan ap o Debleskro drom?”" 
Matthew18:2 Koy das o Yezous i tikno čaves pash peste gole, oun čivas les glan lende," 
Matthew18:3 oun penas: Čačepah, me penau t'menge: T'mer te moukenn gar t'maro drom, oun venn gar har i čave, palle nashte venn gar ap o Debleskro drom." 
Matthew18:4 Koon krell pes gar bares oun vell har kava čavo, kova hi o bareder mank kolende, kay djan ap o Debleskro drom." 
Matthew18:5 Oun kova, kay lell savo čavo pash peste pre, kova lell man pash peste pre." 
Matthew18:6 Kova, kay anell yekes kal tiknendar, kay patsenn ap mande, miro dromestar tele, koleske vals feteder, te vell leske i pharo bar troul i meen pandlo, oun te vell lo tassedo an o baro pani." 
Matthew18:7 I bibarht hi kova, kay della ap kay phoub boud koova, hoy anell i menshen ap o čilačo drom. Havo bibarht vell ap koleste, kay anell i vavaren ap o čilačo drom!" 
Matthew18:8 Te kamell tiro vast, te kress i čilačo koova, de les tele oun vitse les toutar! Te kamell tout tiro piro ap o čilačo drom te anell, de les tele, oun vitse les toutar! Hi touke lačeder, te nashreh tou yek vast oun yek piro, oun leh ko djipen, hoy o Devel tout della, har te djas tou douy vastentsa oun douy pirentsa an i yag, hoy hako tsireske rhačella." 
Matthew18:9 Oun te kamell tiro yak čomone te dikell, hoy anell tout ap o čilačo drom, palle čin les vin, oun vitse les toutar! Hi touke feteder, te nashress yek yak, oun leh o djipen, hoy o Devel tout della, har te djas douy yakentsa an o bengeskri yag." 
Matthew18:10 Ma čivenn kol tiknen ap i rig, har te vans le či moldo. Me penau t'menge: I bolepangre, kay ap lende yak denna, kolla nay djana hako tsiro glan miro dadeste an o bolepen, te mangenn le les lenge." 
Matthew18:11 O Mensheskro Čavo vas ap i phoub, te anell lo kolen ap o Debleskro drom pale, kay nashedo hi." 
Matthew18:12 Kova hi yaake, har te hi i morshes sheel bakre, oun yek lendar djal nashedo. Palle moukell lo kol enya-deesh-te-enya (99) bakre ap i pralstouno them tardo, oun rodell ko yek bakres, hoy nashedo hi." 
Matthew18:13 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Oun te hatsell lo les, palle hi lo barhtleder pral ko yekeste, har pral kol tsele vavar, hoy khetne ačan." 
Matthew18:14 Oun yaake kamell miro dad an o bolepen gar, te djal yek kol tiknendar nashedo." 
Matthew18:15 Te krell tiro phraal čilačo koova ap toute, palle dja pash leste kokres, oun pen leske, kay kova gar mishto hi, hoy yob kras. Oun te dikell lo, kay kova čačo hi, hoy tou leske penal, palle anal tou tiro phrales pale ap miro drom." 
Matthew18:16 Yob te shounell gar ap toute, palle le douy vavar phralen touha, oun dja pash leste, te shounenn le, hoy tou leske peneh. Yaake djinenn douy, triin, hoy yob kras." 
Matthew18:17 Te shounell lo kava kopo vitar gar ap t'mende, palle pen les i patslenge an i kangri. Oun te shounell lo gar ap kolende, palle vell lo t'menge har i morsh, kay prindjrell o Debles gar oun har i pale-čiddo." 
Matthew18:18 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ap koleste, kay t'mer penenna: O Devel las tiri doosh toutar, kolestar hi li krik lino. Ap koleste, kay t'mer penenna: Tiri doosh ačell ap toute, ap koleste ačell leskri doosh čiddo." 
Matthew18:19 Me penau t'menge ninna: Te mangenn douy t'mendar khetne čomone o Deblestar, palle dell len miro dad an o bolepen kova, hoy yon lestar mangan." 
Matthew18:20 Oun kote, kay douy, triin menshe khetne venna an miro lab, kote hom me mashkral lende." 
Matthew18:21 Koy djas o Petro pash leste, oun poučas lestar: “Ray, te hi miro phraal boud kope čilačo ap mande, kitse kope hounte bistrap ko čilačo koova, hoy yob ap mande kras? Hi efta kope doha?”" 
Matthew18:22 Penas o Yezous ap leste: Na-a, me penau touke, efta kope hi gar doha. Tou hounte bistress kova efta-deesh kope oun pale efta-deesh kope, yaake rah har yob ap toute čilačo koova krella." 
Matthew18:23 Me kamau te sikrap t'mende har pash kolende hi, kay djan ap o Debleskro drom. O Devel an o bolepen hi har i baro ray. Kova moukell peskre boudepangren glan peste te anell, te lell lo lendar kol love, hoy yon leske khetne anan dran pengri boudi." 
Matthew18:24 Kote vas i morsh glan leste anlo. Koles his deesh zerya roupene beme siyaan pash leste. 
Matthew18:25 Kova nashte playsras kova gar pale. Koy penas o ray: Bikrenn les peskri romyah, oun peskre čaventsa, oun lauterentsa, hoy les hi! Oun denn man kol love, hoy t'mer lenge dren lenna!" 
Matthew18:26 Koy vitsras pes ko morsh glan leste ap i phoub, oun penas: Ray, me mangau tout: Ab lačes ap mande! De man i tsiro, te nay playsrap miri siyaan pash toute!" 
Matthew18:27 Oun o rayes khaytas kova, oun yob moukas leske leskri tseli siyaan te perell, oun moukas les te djal." 
Matthew18:28 Oun o morsh djas dran ko kheer vin, oun tapras i vavar boudepaskres ap o drom. Kales his sheel beme siyaan pash leste. Koy čivas lo peskre vasta troul koleskri meen, te tassrell lo les, oun penas ap leste: De man kanna mire love pale!" 
Matthew18:29 Koy vitsras pes kava morsh glan o vavareste ap i phoub oun penas: Me mangau tout: Ab lačes ap mande, oun de man i tsiro, te nay playsrap me touke len pale!" 
Matthew18:30 Ko vavar morsh kamas či te shounell, oun vitsras les an o stilepen, te ačell yob kote yaake rah, har yob gar koy siyaan pale playsras." 
Matthew18:31 Oun har shounan kova kol tsele vavar boudepangre, kay o rayeske boudrenna, doukas kova len an o dji. Oun yon djan pash o rayeste, oun penan leske lauter, hoy yon shounan." 
Matthew18:32 Koy das o ray ap o morsheste gole, oun penas ap leste: Tou hal i čilačo boudepaskro. Me moukom tiri siyaan touke te perell, har tou mandar mangal." 
Matthew18:33 Yaake har dikom lačes ap toute, yaake hounte dikals tou ninna lačes ap koleste, kay les hi i siyaan pash toute." 
Matthew18:34 Oun pherdo rholi das les o ray an i vasta kolendar, kay denn les dava an o stilepen. Kote hounte ačell yob yaake rah, har yob gar koy siyaan pale playsras." 
Matthew18:35 Oun o Yezous penas doureder: Te bistrenn t'mer gar o tselo djiyestar o čilačo koova, hoy i vavar phraal ap t'mende kras, yaake krell miro dad an o bolepen emligo t'mentsa." 
Matthew19:1 Oun har o Yezous kova lauter peskre malenge penas, djas lo lentsa dran o them Galilea vin, oun vas an o them Youdea vergel o pani Yordan." 
Matthew19:2 Oun boud menshe djan leske palla. Oun yob kras i nasselen kote sasto. 
Matthew19:3 Oun i Farisarya van pash leste, oun kaman les leskre labentsa te taprell. Oun yon poučan lestar: “Nay tradell i morsh peskri romyat pestar, ninna te kras li kek čilačepen?”" 
Matthew19:4 Penas lo: “T'mer djinenn, hoy hi an o Debleskro lab činlo: O Devel kras o morshes oun i djouvyat." 
Matthew19:5 Oun yob penas: Doleske moukell i morsh peskro dades oun peskri dat, te djivell lo peskri romyah khetne. Oun kol douy venna har yek." 
Matthew19:6 Yaake hi le har yek oun bouder gar douy. Oun kova, hoy o Devel khetne anas, kova hounte krell i mensho gar paash!”" 
Matthew19:7 Penan le ap leste: “Te hi kova yaake, hoske činas o Mose an peskro liil: Te kamell i morsh peskri romyat te moukell, palle hounte dell lo lat i liil, kay činlo hi, kay yob moukas lat?”" 
Matthew19:8 Penas lo ap lende: “T'maro dji hi dran bar, kay o Debleskro lab gar dren djal. Doleske činas o Mose, kay nay moukenn t'mer t'mari romyat. Ap ko tsiro, kay o Devel i morshes oun i djouvyat kras, his kova gar yaake." 
Matthew19:9 Me penau t'menge: Te hi yekes i romni, kay rhorhras les gar i vavar morsheha, oun yob moukell lat, oun romedinerell i vavar djouvyat, kova anell doosh ap peste, te las lo i vavar romyat.”" 
Matthew19:10 Penan leskre mala ap leste: “Te hi kova yaake, palle hi i morsheske feteder, te romedinerell lo gar.”" 
Matthew19:11 Penas lo: “Kava lab, hoy me penom, hayvell gar hakeno. Kolen, kay o Devel kava lab an o dji čivas, kolla hayvenn les." 
Matthew19:12 Della menshe, kay van yaake boldo, kay hi lenge kova gar mishto, te romedinerenn le. Oun vavar van yaake ap o mass činlo, te romedinerenn le nay gar. Vavar kamenn o tselo djiyestar o Debleske te boudrell. Doleske romedinerenn le gar. Koneske kava lab mishto hi, kova te krell yaake.”" 
Matthew19:13 Koy anan le čaven pash o Yezouseste, te čivell lo peskre vasta ap lende, te mangell lo o Debles, te dikell yob lačes ap lende. Har peskre mala kova dikan, čingran le ap kol menshende." 
Matthew19:14 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Moukenn kol čaven pash mande te vell! Ma rikrenn len pale! Save har yon, kolen das o Devel gole, te djivenn le khetne leha an o bolepen.”" 
Matthew19:15 Oun yob čivas peskre vasta ap lende, oun djas peske." 
Matthew19:16 Oun i morsh vas pash leste oun penas: “Sikepaskro, havo lačo koova hounte krap, te vell man o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella?”" 
Matthew19:17 Penas o Yezous: “Hoske poučeh tou mandar, hoy lačo hi? O Devel kokres hi lačo. Tou te kameh o Debleskro djipen, palle kre kova, hoy yob penas!”" 
Matthew19:18 Koy poučas lo lestar: “Hoy hounte krap?” Penas o Yezous: “Ma mare kekes! Ma rhorhe tiri romyat i vavar djouvyah! Ma čore! Ma pen rhorhepen pral yekeste! 
Matthew19:19 Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto! Oun ap koleste, kay pash toute hi hounte vess yaake lačes, har hal lačes ap toute kokres.”" 
Matthew19:20 Koy penas ko terno morsh ap leste: “Kova lauter krom. Hoy hounte krap boudeder?” 
Matthew19:21 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Te kameh tou o tselo Debleskro kamlepen te krell, palle bike lauter, hoy tout hi! Oun de kol love i čorvelende! Palle hi tout i bravlepen an o bolepen. Oun am oun dja mantsa!”" 
Matthew19:22 Ko terno morshes his boud bravlepen. Har yob kal laba shounas, doukas kova les. Oun yob djas peske." 
Matthew19:23 Oun o Yezous penas ap peskre malende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Pharo hi i braveleske, te vell lo ap o Debleskro drom." 
Matthew19:24 Me penau t'menge ninna: Hi gar yaake pharo, te djal i baro firho an i soubyakro kand dren har te vell i bravelo ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Matthew19:25 Har leskre mala kova shounan, tapras len i daar. Oun yon poučan lestar: “Te hi kova yaake, koon lell nay o Debleskro djipen?”" 
Matthew19:26 Oun o Yezous dikas ap lende, oun penas: “Hoy i menshe nay gar krenna, nay krell o Devel halauter.”" 
Matthew19:27 Koy penas o Petro ap leste: “Djineh, mer moukam lauter oun djam touha. Hoy lah mer?”" 
Matthew19:28 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ko tsiro vella, kay o Devel lauter neves krella. Ap ko tsiro hi o Mensheskro Čavo o ray pral lauterende, oun yob hi beshdo ap peskro rayeskro beshepaskro. Oun t'mer, kay mantsa djana, t'mer venn ninna raya, oun han beshdo ap deesh-te-douy rayeskre beshepangre, oun rakrenn o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende, kay venna i deesh-te-douy Israeleskre čavendar." 
Matthew19:29 Oun hakeno, kay moukas peskro kheer, peskre phralen, peskre phenyen, peskro dades, peskri dat, peskre čaven oun peskro kotar them, te djal lo mantsa, kova lell sheel kope pale, hoy yob moukas. Oun o Devel dell les o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
Matthew19:30 Oun boud, kay kanna glan tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko dives palla tardo. Oun boud, kay kanna palla tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko dives glan tardo.”" 
Matthew20:1 Oun o Yezous penas lenge, har kote hi, kay dell o Devel menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom. O Devel hi har i ray, koles his i kotar them, kay drakengre rouka tardo hi. Sik taysarlake djas lo an o foro dren, oun rodas peske i boudepangren, te boudrenn le ap leskro kotar them." 
Matthew20:2 Kolentsa kras yob vin, te dell lo len yek roupeni bema kava diveske. Palle bičras lo len ap peskro kotar them, te boudrenn le leske." 
Matthew20:3 Har enyenge his, djas yob pale an o foro, oun dikas vavaren, kay his len kek boudi." 
Matthew20:4 Ap kolende penas lo: Djan ap miro kotar them, oun boudrenn mange! Me dau t'men yaake boud love, har t'mari boudi moldo hi. Oun yon djan kote." 
Matthew20:5 Har o paash dives trouyel his, djas lo pale an o foro dren, hatsas vavaren, kay hi len kek boudi, oun bičras len ninna ap peskro kotar them. Ninna har trinenge his, kras yob kova yaake." 
Matthew20:6 Har pančenge his, djas lo pale an ko foro, dikas pale vavaren koy trouyel tardo, oun penas ap lende: Hoske han t'mer koy tardo, oun boudrenn gar?" 
Matthew20:7 Penan le: Kek das men i boudi. Koy penas yob: Djan ap miro kotar them, oun boudrenn mange kote!" 
Matthew20:8 Har i rati vas, penas ko ray ap peskro pralstouno boudepaskro: De i boudepangren khetne gole, oun de len lengre love! De kolen pengre love, kay an i rat van, oun palle kolen, kay o paash dives van, oun palle kolen kay taysarlake van!" 
Matthew20:9 Koy van kolla glan leste, kay an i rat van, oun lan yek roupeni bema lestar. Oun lauter, kay pal lende van, lan ninna yek roupeni bema lestar." 
Matthew20:10 Har kolla pash leste van, kay boudran o tselo dives, patsan le, te lenn le boudeder love. Ninna yon lan yek roupeni bema." 
Matthew20:11 Koy čingran le ap ko rayeste, oun penan:" 
Matthew20:12 Kolla, kay an i rat van, boudran i tikno tsiro. Tou dal len yaake boud love har men. Tou djineh, te boudram mer o tselo dives. Oun o kham rhačas zoreles ap mende." 
Matthew20:13 Koy penas ko ray ap yekeste lendar: Miro maal, me rhorhrom tout gar. Tou kral mantsa vin, te boudress mange, oun te leh yek roupeni bema mandar." 
Matthew20:14 Kanna le tire love, oun dja khere! Me kamau, te dap koleste, kay an i rat vas, yaake boud love har tout." 
Matthew20:15 Me krau nay mire loventsa, hoy me kamau. Hoske hal tou čilačo ap mande, te hom me lačo?" 
Matthew20:16 Oun o Yezous penas doureder: “Dikenn, yaake venn boud palla tardo, kay kanna glan tardo hi. Ninna venn boud glan tardo, kay kanna palla tardo hi.”" 
Matthew20:17 Oun yob djas doureder, te vell lo an o foro Yerusalem. Ap o drom las lo peskre deesh-te-douy malen ap i rig, oun penas lenge:" 
Matthew20:18 “Shounenn, mer djah kanna an o foro Yerusalem. Kote denn le o Menshengro Čaves an i vasta kol bare rashayendar oun kol čačepangre morshendar. Oun kolla krenn vin, te vell lo maredo." 
Matthew20:19 Yon denn les an i vasta kolendar, kay kek bibolde hi. Oun kolla praasenn les, denn les dava i čoupniyah, oun denn les ap o troushel, te merell lo. Pal triin divessa krell o Devel les pale djido.”" 
Matthew20:20 Pal kova vas o Zebedeskri romni lakre čaventsa, o Yakobeha oun o Yohanneha, pash o Yezouseste. Oun yoy vitsras pes glan leste ap i phoub, te mangas li lestar čomone." 
Matthew20:21 “Hoy kameh tou?” poučas lo latar. Penas li: “Ap ko dives, kay tou hal o baro ray pral i tsele menshende, mouk mire douy čaven ap tiri rig te beshell: Yek ap tiri čači rig oun ko vavar ap tiri servi rig.”" 
Matthew20:22 Penas o Yezous: “T'mer djinenn gar, hoy mangenna mandar. Nay lenn t'mer kol douka ap t'mende, hoy me hounte lap ap mande?” Penan le: “Ava, ko nay krah mer.”" 
Matthew20:23 “Hi čačo,” penas lo, “t'mer hounte lenna boud douka ap t'mende, yaake har me hounte lap len ap mande. Ninna te hi yaake, nay penau t'menge gar, koon beshell ap miri čači rig oun ap miri servi rig. Kova hi gar an miro vast. Miro dad an o bolepen rodas kolen vin, kay ap miri rig beshenna.”" 
Matthew20:24 Oun har kol vavar deesh kova shounan, van le rhoyemen ap kol douy phralende." 
Matthew20:25 Doleske das len o Yezous pash peste gole, oun penas ap lende: “T'mer djinenna, i bare raya oun i pralstoune ap kay phoub, len hi penepaske pral i menshende an pengre themma. Oun yon rikrenn i menshen zoryah tele. Oun yon hounte shounenn ap lende oun hounte boudrenn lenge." 
Matthew20:26 Mank t'mende hounte vell kova gar yaake! Koon t'mendar kamell, te vell lo baro, kova hounte vell t'menge koy." 
Matthew20:27 Oun koon t'mendar kamell o pralstouno te vell, kova hounte vell t'maro boudepaskro." 
Matthew20:28 Ninna o Mensheskro Čavo vas gar ap i phoub, te boudrenn i menshen leske. Na-a. Yob vas ap i phoub, te vell lo lenge koy, oun te merell lo boudenge. Oun yaake lell lo len dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin.”" 
Matthew20:29 Oun o Yezous djas peskre malentsa dran o foro Yericho vin. Oun boud menshe djan leske palla. 
Matthew20:30 Pash o drom his douy korele morsha beshdo. Kolla shounan, te vell o Yezous ap o drom. Oun yon dan gole: “Maro ray, tou Davideskro čavo, kre tiro dji menge pre!”" 
Matthew20:31 Kol menshe, kay djan o Yezouseha, čingran ap kol douyende, oun penan ap lende: “Moukenn tele! Ačenn!” Koy dan yon boudeder gole: “Maro ray, tou Davideskro čavo, kre tiro dji menge pre!”" 
Matthew20:32 Oun o Yezous ačas tardo, kharas len pash peste, oun penas: “Hoy kamenn t'mer, te krap t'menge?”" 
Matthew20:33 “Ray!” penan le, “mer mangah tout: Kre mare yaka sasto, te dikas nay pale!”" 
Matthew20:34 Oun o Yezouseske djas kova phares an o dji. Oun yob čivas peskre vasta ap lengre yaka. Oun ap yek kopo dikan le pale. Oun yon djan leha. 
Matthew21:1 Ap o drom an o foro Yerusalem van le an o gab Betfage, kay pash o djeteskri berga čiddo hi. Oun kote penas o Yezous ap douyende peskre malendar:" 
Matthew21:2 “Djan an o gab koy vergel! Kote hatsenn t'mer i esla pandlo oun lakro ternepen pash late. Pandenn len tele, oun anenn len pash mande!" 
Matthew21:3 Yon te poučenn t'mendar, hoy t'mer lentsa kamenn te krell, palle penenn lenge: Hi maro rayeske, te beshell yob koy pre. Oun yon denn len t'mende.”" 
Matthew21:4 Oun kova djas yaake, har o Devel kova glan i rah tsiro ap o Debleskro rakepaskro penas:" 
Matthew21:5 Penenn i menshenge an o foro Yerusalem: Dik, tiro baro ray vell pash toute. Yob hi lačo oun krell pes gar bares. Yob hi beshdo ap i esla, ap i terni esla." 
Matthew21:6 Oun o Yezouseskre mala djan an o gab, oun kran yaake, har o Yezous ap lende penas." 
Matthew21:7 Oun yon anan koy esla oun lakro ternepen pash leste, oun čivan pengre ripya koy pre. Oun o Yezous beshas pes pral pre." 
Matthew21:8 Oun boud boud menshe, kay leha djan, čivan pengre ripya ap o drom. Oun vavar dan i bare patria i roukendar tele, oun čivan len ap o drom." 
Matthew21:9 Oun kol boud menshe, kay djan glan leste oun pal leste, dan bari gole: “Sharas o Davideskro čaves! Sharedo vell kova, koles o Devel bičras. Sharas o Debles an o bolepen!”" 
Matthew21:10 Oun har o Yezous an o foro Yerusalem vas, van kote i tsele menshe divyo, oun yon poučan: “Koon hi kova?”" 
Matthew21:11 Oun kol boud menshe, kay leha djan, penan lenge: “Kava hi o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yezous, kay vas dran o foro Nazaret, hoy an o them Galilea čiddo hi.”" 
Matthew21:12 Oun o Yezous djas an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun tradas lauteren vin, kay kote bikran oun ginan. Oun yob vitsras i lovengre stamya kolendar trouyel, kay kol menshenge love paran. Ninna i stamya kolendar, kay čirkle bikran, vitsras lo trouyel." 
Matthew21:13 Oun yob penas ap kol tsele menshende: “O Devel penas: Miro kheer te vell i kheer, kay sharenn man i menshe oun mangenn man an. T'mer kran lestar i kheer, kay i menshe rhorhenna oun randenna.”" 
Matthew21:14 Koy van korele oun bange an o Debleskro baro kheer pash o Yezouseste, oun yob kras len sasto." 
Matthew21:15 Oun i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre čačepangre dikan ko baro koova, hoy o Yezous kote kras an o Debleskri zoor. Oun yon shounan, har i čave an o Debleskro baro kheer bari gole dan oun penan: “Sharas o Davideskro čaves!” Oun yon van rhoyedo ap o Yezouseste," 
Matthew21:16 oun penan ap leste: “Shouneh tou, hoy kol čave kote penenna?” “Ava,” penas o Yezous ap lende, “me shounau len. Djinenn t'mer gar, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: Tou, o Devel, kral, te sharenn tout i čave oun i terne. ”" 
Matthew21:17 Oun yob moukas len, djas dran o foro vin, oun vas an o gab Betani. Oun kote ačas lo pral i rat." 
Matthew21:18 Oun o vavar dives taysarlake, djas yob an o foro pale. Ap o drom las lo bok." 
Matthew21:19 Oun har yob i faygetikro rouk dikas, djas lo kote oun hatsas či har i patria kokres ap leste. Koy penas lo ap ko rouk: “Kek tsireske venna pale fayge ap toute!” Oun ap yek kopo meras kava rouk tele." 
Matthew21:20 Oun har leskre mala kova dikan, kran le bare yaka, oun poučan lestar: “Har nay meras kava rouk yaake sik tele?”" 
Matthew21:21 Penas o Yezous: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: T'mer te patsenn ap o Debleste, te krell lo nay hako koova, palle nay krenn t'mer ninna boudeder, har me krom kava roukeha. T'mer penenn nay ap koy berga: Hade tout oun vitse tout an o baro pani! Oun kay berga krell kova." 
Matthew21:22 Te patsenn t'mer, te lenn kova, hoy mangenna o Deblestar, palle lenn t'mer kova lauter ninna.”" 
Matthew21:23 Oun har o Yezous an o Debleskro baro kheer vas, ap i menshende rakras, oun len o Debleskro drom sikras, koy van i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder pash leste, oun poučan lestar: “Koon penas touke, te kress tou kova lauter? Koon bičras tout?”" 
Matthew21:24 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Ninna me kamau t'mendar čomone te poučell. T'mer te penenn les mange, palle penau me t'menge ninna, koon man bičras, te krap me kova lauter." 
Matthew21:25 Kanna poučau me t'mendar: Bičras o Devel o Yohannes, te taufrell lo i menshen? Bičran i menshe o Yohannes?” Oun yon rakran mashkral pende, oun penan: “Te penah mer leske: O Devel bičras o Yohannes, palle penell lo menge: Hoske patsan t'mer les gar?" 
Matthew21:26 Te penah mer leske: I menshe bičran o Yohannes, palle hounte trashas i menshendar. Yon patsenna, te hi o Yohanni i Debleskro rakepaskro.”" 
Matthew21:27 Oun yaake penan le ap o Yezouseste: “Mer djinah les gar.” Koy penas lo ap lende: “Yaake penau t'menge vitar gar, koon man bičras, te krap me kova.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Kanna kamau t'menge čomone te penell: His i dad. Koles his douy čave. Oun yob djas pash ko phoureder čaveste, oun penas ap leste: Mo čavo, dja ap ko kotar them, kay hi i drakengre rouka tardo, oun boude kote!" 
Matthew21:29 Penas kova: Na-a, me kamau gar. Pal i tikno tsiro, khaytas les kova, hoy yob penas. Oun yob djas, te boudrell lo kote." 
Matthew21:30 Oun o dad djas ninna pash o terneder, oun penas leske i emlige laba. Oun ko terneder penas: Ava, mo ray, me djau kote. Oun yob djas gar." 
Matthew21:31 Koon kol douyendar kras kova, hoy o dad kamas?” Penan le ap leste: “O phoureder.” Penas o Yezous: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kol bibolde, kay i love i Remaryenge dren lenna oun hi t'menge pale-čiddo, oun i loubya venna sikeder ap o Debleskro drom har t'mer." 
Matthew21:32 Har o Yohanni pash t'mende vas, te sikrell lo t'mende o čačo drom, patsan t'mer leske gar. I pale-čidde oun i loubya patsan ap leskre laba. Ninna har t'mer dikan, te patsan kolla ap leskre laba, moukan t'mer gar t'maro čilačo drom oun patsan leske vitar gar.”" 
Matthew21:33 Oun o Yezous penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi: “Shounenn, hoy me t'menge kanna penau. His i ray. Koles his i kotar them. Kote čivas lo drakengre rouka an i phoub. Troul ko kotar them čivas lo barra. Oun kote kras lo ninna i platsa an i phoub, kay nay stakrenn le ap i drake, te vell i mool vin. Mashkral kol rouka kras lo i kheer, kay kova beshdo hi, kay dell garda ap i drake. Palle patsas o ray ko kotar them ap i harhende, te boudrenn le kote leske. Oun yob djas peske an i vavar them." 
Matthew21:34 Har ko tsiro vas, te anenn le i drake dren, bičras lo peskre boudepangren pash i harhende, te lenn le lendar kol drake, hoy leske hi." 
Matthew21:35 I harhe tapran kol boudepangren. Ko yekes dan le dava, oun ko vavares maran le. Oun pale i vavares vitsran le i barrentsa moulo." 
Matthew21:36 Yob bičras vavar boudepangren pash lende, boudeder har yob o glanstouno kopo bičras. Oun i harhe kran lentsa yaake, har kol vavarentsa." 
Matthew21:37 Koy penas o ray peske: Miro čavestar darenn le. Oun yaake bičras lo peskro čaves pash lende. 
Matthew21:38 Har i harhe leskro čaves dikan, rakran le mashkral pende: Kova hi leskro čavo, kay lauter lella pal peskro dadeskro merepen. Avenn, maras les, te vell kava kotar them menge, hoy leske hounte vals." 
Matthew21:39 Oun yon tapran les, tradan les dran ko drakengro them vin, oun maran les.”" 
Matthew21:40 Kanna poučas o Yezous kolendar, kay kote tardo hi: “Hoy krell o ray pral ko drakengro them kol harhentsa, te vell lo pale?”" 
Matthew21:41 Penan le ap o Yezouseste: “Yob marell kol čilače morshen. Les khaytenn yon gar. Oun yob dell ko kotar them kol vavarende, kay leske i drake an o čačo tsiro dren anenna.”" 
Matthew21:42 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Djinenn t'mer gar, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi? Kote hi činlo: His i bar, kay i boudepangre lestar penan: Kova hi či moldo. Ko bar las o Devel oun čivas les yaake an o kheer, te rikrell lo ko tselo kheer khetne. O Devel kras kova, oun kova hi i baro koova menge." 
Matthew21:43 Ava, me penau t'menge: An ko tsiro, hoy vella, han t'mer bouder gar o Debleskre menshe. O Devel dell vavar menshen khetne gole, te djivenn le leha khetne. Oun yon krenna, hoy o Devel kamella." 
Matthew21:44 Koon ap kava bar perella, kova merella. Ap koneste kava bar perella, koles dell ko bar khetne.”" 
Matthew21:45 I bare rashaya oun i Farisarya shounan kol laba oun hayvan, te rakras lo lendar." 
Matthew21:46 Oun yon kaman les te taprell, oun kran kova gar. Yon daran i menshendar. Kolla patsan, kay hi o Yezous o Debleskro rakepaskro." 
Matthew22:1 Oun o Yezous rakras pale save laba ap lende, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Oun yob penas:" 
Matthew22:2 “Te dell o Devel i menshen gole, te venn le pash leste, hi kova yaake har pash i baro rayeste, kay kras peskro čaveske i bari biyab." 
Matthew22:3 Ap ko tsiro, kay i biyab his, bičras lo peskre boudepangren pash i menshende, te denn le len pash i biyab gole. Oun yon kaman gar te vell." 
Matthew22:4 Oun pale bičras lo vavar boudepangren pash kolende, te penenn le ap lende: Shounenn, me krom i rhapen t'menge, oun marom thoulle groumya. Oun vavar lačo rhapen oun pipen hi lauter koy. Avenn ap i biyab!" 
Matthew22:5 Oun kolla shounan gar ap lende oun djan penge. Ko yek djas ap peskro kotar phoub, ko vavar ap o mangepen." 
Matthew22:6 Oun pale vavar tapran kol boudepangren, praasan len, oun maran len." 
Matthew22:7 O baro rayes tapras i bari rholi, oun yob bičras peskre lourden, te marenn le kol marepangren, oun te rhačrenn le lengro foro." 
Matthew22:8 Palle penas lo ap peskre boudepangren: Kanna hi i biyab. Oun kol menshe, kay me ap o rhapen gole dom, hi gar moldo, te venn le ap i biyab." 
Matthew22:9 Djan kanna ap i dromma, kay boud menshe hi! Oun penenn lauterenge, kay t'mer kote hatsenna, te venn le ap i biyab!" 
Matthew22:10 Oun kol boudepangre djan ap kol tsele dromma, oun anan lauteren khetne, i čilačen oun i lačen. Oun yaake boud menshe van ap i biyab, te vas o kheer pherdo." 
Matthew22:11 Oun o baro ray vas an o kheer, te dikell lo kolen, kay kote hi. Koy dikas lo kote i morshes, kay kek biyabeskro ripen ap leste hi." 
Matthew22:12 Oun yob penas ap leste: Miro maal, tout hi kek biyabeskro ripen ap toute, te nay djah tou ap i biyab. Hoy kreh tou kate? Oun kova nashte penas leske či." 
Matthew22:13 Penas o baro ray ap peskre boudepangre: Pandenn les ap i pire oun ap i vasta, oun vitsrenn les vin an i kali rat! Oun kote rovenn le oun dandrenn i danda i doukatar khetne.”" 
Matthew22:14 Palle penas o Yezous ap kolende, kay troul leste tardo hi: “Boud menshen dell o Devel gole. Kolla kokres, kay pash leste venna, moukell lo dren te djal.”" 
Matthew22:15 Oun pal kova van i Farisarya khetne, oun rakran mank pende, har yon nay taprenn o Yezouses an leskre laba." 
Matthew22:16 Oun yon bičran pengre morshen pash leste. Lentsa djan ninna vavar morsha. Kolla his o Herodeskre mala. Oun yon penan ap leste: “Sikepaskro, mer djinah, tou peneh o čačepen, oun sikreh mishto i menshende o Debleskro drom. Tou rakreh kekeske pal o mouy, ninna te hi len boud penepaske." 
Matthew22:17 Pen menge kanna: Hi mishto pal maro čačepen, te das mer o themeskre love o baro rayeste an o foro Rom?”" 
Matthew22:18 O Yezous hayvas lengro čilačepen oun penas ap lende: “T'mer rakrenn douy čipyentsa. Hoske kamenn t'mer man an mire laba te taprell? 
Matthew22:19 Denn man i roupeni bema!” Oun yon dan les yek bema. 
Matthew22:20 Koy poučas lo lendar: “Koneskro shero oun lab hi ap kay bema?” 
Matthew22:21 Penan le: “O shero oun o lab o baro rayestar an o foro Rom!” Penas lo ap lende: “Yaake denn leste, hoy leskro hi! Oun denn o Debleste, hoy leskro hi!”" 
Matthew22:22 Oun har yon kol laba lestar shounan, kran le bare yaka. Oun yon moukan les, oun djan penge." 
Matthew22:23 Ap ko dives van i Sadducarya pash leste. Yon hi kolla, kay penenna: O Devel krell i moulen gar djido." 
Matthew22:24 Yon penan ap leste: “Sikepaskro, o Mose penas: Te merell i romedino morsh, oun les his kek čave, palle hounte romedinerell peskro phraal koy romyat, te vell peskro phraleske i ternepen boldo." 
Matthew22:25 Koy his pash mende efta phrala. Oun o phourester, kay romedino his, meras. Les his kek čave. Doleske las peskro phraal koy romyat." 
Matthew22:26 Oun ko douyto meras, oun les his kek čave. Oun ko triinto romedineras lat oun meras. Oun les his kek čave. Oun yaake djas kova bis ap o eftato. Yek pal o vavar romedineran lat oun meran. Oun lauteren his kek čave." 
Matthew22:27 Oun har i tsele phrala moulo his, meras koy romni ninna." 
Matthew22:28 Kanna poučah toutar: Ap ko tsiro, kay krell o Devel i moulen djido, koneskri romni hi li? Hake efta his lah romedino.”" 
Matthew22:29 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “T'mer prindjrenn gar o Debleskro lab oun o Debleskri zoor vitar gar. Doleske hayvan t'mer či. 
Matthew22:30 Kol moulen, kay o Devel djido krella, kolla romedinerenn bouder gar, oun venna gar romedino. Yon hi har i bolepangre an o bolepen." 
Matthew22:31 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo, te venn i moule djido. Kote penell o Devel:" 
Matthew22:32 Me hom o Abrahameskro Devel oun o Isaakeskro Devel oun o Yakobeskro Devel. Oun me penau t'menge: Yob hi gar o Devel kolenge, kay moulo hi. Na-a, yob hi o Devel i djidenge.”" 
Matthew22:33 Kolla boud menshe, kay troul o Yezouseste tardo his, kolenge ačas o rakepen krik, har yon kova lestar shounan." 
Matthew22:34 O Yezous rakras yaake, te nashte penan leske i Sadducarya či bouder. Har i Farisarya kova shounan, van le khetne." 
Matthew22:35 Oun yek lendar, i biboldengro čačepaskro, kamas te taprell lo les an leskre laba oun poučas lestar:" 
Matthew22:36 “Sikepaskro, kol tsele labendar, kay penenna, hoy o Devel mendar kamella, havo lab hi o bareder lendar?”" 
Matthew22:37 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Tou kamess tiro Debles o tselo djiyestar an tiro tselo djipen, an lauter, hoy tou djineh." 
Matthew22:38 Kova hi o bareder lauterestar, hoy o Devel toutar kamella." 
Matthew22:39 Ninna kamell lo toutar, te vess yaake lačes ap koleste, kay pash toute hi, har hal lačes ap toute kokres." 
Matthew22:40 Kova, hoy o Mose oun i tsele Debleskre rakepangre menge penan, hoy o Devel mendar kamella, kova hi an kolla douy bare Debleskre laba penlo.”" 
Matthew22:41 I Farisarya his gomme khetne pash o Yezouseste. Oun yob poučas lendar: 
Matthew22:42 “Hoy penenn t'mer pral ko baro rayeste, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob? Koneskro čavo hi lo?” Penan le: “O Davideskro čavo.”" 
Matthew22:43 Penas o Yezous: “Te hi kova čačo, har nay penas o David ap leste: Mo ray? Kava lab čivas o Debleskro Dourho an o Davideste," 
Matthew22:44 har yob penas: O Devel penas ap miro rayeste: Besh tout ap miri čači rig, te čivap kolen tel tire pire, kay hi rhoyedo ap toute." 
Matthew22:45 Kate penas o David ap leste: Mo ray. Har vell lo nay leskro čavo?” 
Matthew22:46 Oun kek lendar nashte penas o Yezouseske yek lab koy pre. Oun pal ko dives trashan le, te poučenn le lestar boudeder." 
Matthew23:1 Palle rakras o Yezous ap i tsele menshende, kay troul leste tardo his, oun ap peskre malende," 
Matthew23:2 oun penas: I biboldengre čačepangre oun i Farisarya, kolen hi o Moseskro vast, te penenn le i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Matthew23:3 Kova, hoy yon t'menge penenna, kova krenn lauter oun rikrenn t'men ap kova! Kova, hoy yon krenna, ma krenn! Yon kokres krenn kova gar, hoy yon i menshenge penenna." 
Matthew23:4 Oun yon krenn i menshenge o djipen pharo. Ko tselo koova, hoy kolla hounte rikrenn, hi har i pharo gono ap lengri phik. I čačepangre oun i Farisarya kokres rikrenn pen gar ap kova." 
Matthew23:5 Lauter, hoy kolla krenna, krenn le, te dikenn kova i vavar. Te pandenn le i diklo troul o shero oun troul i moussi, kay o Debleskre laba dren činlo hi, yaake hi lengro diklo bourhleder har ko diklo i vavar morshendar. Oun len hi lengste koola ap pende, te sikrenn le i menshende, te hi le o Debleskre morsha." 
Matthew23:6 Pash i baro rhapen kamenn le ap i feteder beshepangre te beshell. Oun an i biboldengre kangria kamenn le ap i pralstoune beshepangre te beshell. 
Matthew23:7 Te djan le an o foro, kamenn le, te penenn i menshe ap lende: Lačo dives, mo ray." 
Matthew23:8 T'menge penau me: Ma moukenn t'men te kharell: Mo ray! T'mer han halauter phrala. Yek kokres hi t'maro ray. 
Matthew23:9 Ma kharenn yekes ap kay phoub: Dad! Yek dad hi t'men. Kova hi o Devel an o bolepen. 
Matthew23:10 Ma moukenn t'men te kharell: Baro sikepaskro! Yek baro sikepaskro hi t'men. Kova hi o Kristo. 
Matthew23:11 O bareder t'mendar te vell t'maro boudepaskro. 
Matthew23:12 Kova, kay krell pes baro, koles krell o Devel tikneder har i vavar. Kova, kay krell pes tikno, koles krell o Devel baro." 
Matthew23:13 T'mer čačepangre oun Farisarya! Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'maro patsepen ap o Debleste hi rhorhepen! T'mer krenn o voudar pandlo, te vell kek ap o Debleskro drom. T'mer djan gar koy dren. Vitar gar moukenn i vavaren dren te djal." 
Matthew23:14 T'mer čačepangre oun Farisarya! Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'maro patsepen ap o Debleste hi rhorhepen. T'mer lenn i khera i djouvyendar krik, kolengre romma moulo hi. T'mer te rakrenn o Debleha, rakrenn t'mer i rah tsiro, te dikenn i menshe har patslo t'mer han. O Devel rakrell o čačepen pral t'mende vin, oun t'mer lenn i zorleder phagi har i vavar." 
Matthew23:15 T'mer čačepangre oun Farisarya! Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'maro patsepen ap o Debleste hi rhorhepen. T'mer djan pral i tseli phoub, te anenn i menshenge o biboldengro patsepen. Oun te djivell yek pal t'maro patsepen, palle krenn lestar i bengeskro čavo. Oun yob vell douy kope čilačeder har t'mer han." 
Matthew23:16 Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'mer kamenn i vavaren o čačo drom te sikrell, oun han kokres har i korele, kay či dikenna. T'mer penenn i menshenge: “Te dell yek pes ap o Debleskro baro kheer sovel, yaake hi kava sovel či moldo. Te dell yek pes ap o sonakay sovel, hoy an o Debleskro baro kheer hi, palle hounte krell lo kova, hoy yob penas.”" 
Matthew23:17 T'mer han dinelo oun korelo! Hi o Debleskro baro kheer gar boudeder moldo har o sonakay, hoy an koleste hi oun doleske i Debleskro koova hi?" 
Matthew23:18 T'mer penenn i menshenge ninna: Te dell yek pes ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri sovel, palle hi kava sovel či moldo. Te dell yek rhapen sovel, hoy ap late čiddo hi, palle hounte krell lo kova, hoy yob penas." 
Matthew23:19 T'mer han korelo! Hi o Debleskri rhačepaskri gar boudeder moldo har o rhapen, hoy ap late čiddo hi oun doleske i Debleskro koova hi?" 
Matthew23:20 Kova, kay dell pes ap o Debleskri rhačepaskri sovel, kova dell pes ninna ap lauter sovel, hoy kote pre čiddo hi." 
Matthew23:21 Kova, kay dell pes ap o Debleskro baro kheer sovel, kova dell pes ninna ap o Debleste sovel, kay kote djivella." 
Matthew23:22 Kova, kay dell pes ap o bolepen sovel, kova dell pes ninna ap o Debleskro beshepaskro sovel oun ap o Debleste, kay kote beshdo hi." 
Matthew23:23 T'mer čačepangre oun Farisarya! Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto! T'maro patsepen hi rhorhepen. T'mer denna o Debleste o deshto kotar dran hako zenlepen an t'mari baar. Oun t'mer bistrenn ko bareder koova, hoy o Devel t'mendar kamella: O čačepen, oun o kamlepen, oun o patsepen. Kava hounte krenn, oun ko vavar gar moukenn!" 
Matthew23:24 T'mer kamenn i vavaren o čačo drom te sikrell, oun han kokres har i korele, kay či dikenna. T'mer trashenn hako tikno koova, hoy t'men pale-čiddo krella, oun denn gar garda ap kova, hoy t'men glan o Debleste pale-čiddo krella." 
Matthew23:25 T'mer čačepangre oun Farisarya! Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto! T'maro patsepen hi rhorhepen! T'mer thovenn i khore oun čare kokres vriyal. T'mer han har i čaro, hoy vin djoudjo hi oun dren djoungelo. An t'mare djia han boklo oun čilačo." 
Matthew23:26 Tou Farisari, tou hal korelo. Kre tiro dji djoudjo! Palle vell touke o tselo vavar koova ninna djoudjo." 
Matthew23:27 T'mer čačepangre oun Farisarya! Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto! T'maro patsepen hi rhorhepen! T'mer han har i moulengre khera, hoy parno kerdo van. Kolla hi vin shoukar. Dren hi le pherdo čik oun kokale." 
Matthew23:28 Yaake han t'mer. Te dikenn t'men i menshe, patsenn le, te han lače oun čače menshe. An t'mende hi lauter rhorhepen oun čilačepen." 
Matthew23:29 T'mer čačepangre oun Farisarya! Kova, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto! T'maro patsepen hi rhorhepen! T'mer krenn shoukar moulengre khera kolenge, kay his o Debleskre rakepangre. Oun i moulengre khera, kay lače menshe paskedo hi, krenn t'mer shoukar oun raylo." 
Matthew23:30 Oun t'mer penenna: Te djivams mer an ko tsiro, kay mare phoure djivan, palle marams mer kol Debleskre rakepangren gar." 
Matthew23:31 Me penau t'menge: Te penenn t'mer kova yaake, palle sikrenn t'mer, kay han i čave kolendar, kay o Debleskre rakepangren maran." 
Matthew23:32 Ava, krenn kova doureder yaake, har t'mare phoure kran!" 
Matthew23:33 T'mer han sapa. Ava, čilače sapa han t'mer. O Devel vitsrell t'men an o bengeskri yag. Oun t'mer nashte nashenn gar glan koleste krik." 
Matthew23:34 Shounenn, bičrau pash t'mende mire rakepangren, mire goseve morshen, oun mire čačepangren. Kolen denn t'mer ap o troushel, marenn len, oun denn len dava an t'mare kangria. Oun t'mer lenn len palla an hako foro." 
Matthew23:35 T'mer han čilačo har t'mare phoure. Yon maran i lače menshen yaake rah har i phoub tardo hi: O lačo morsh Abel vas maredo glan i tsele vavar menshende. Pal leste maran le vavar lače menshen bis ap ko tsiro, kay o Zakari maredo vas, koleskro dad his o Baraki. O Zakares maran t'mer mashkral o Debleskro kheer oun i sasterni rhačepaskri, kay i firhe o Debleske rhačedo venna. Doleske vell i phagi ap t'mende, kay kanna djivenna." 
Matthew23:36 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kalla menshe, kay kanna djivenna, kolla lenna i tseli phagi." 
Matthew23:37 T'mer menshe an o foro Yerusalem! T'mer maran o Debleskre rakepangren, oun dan kolen i barrentsa moulo, kay o Devel pash t'mende bičras. Boud kope kamom t'men pash mande te lell, te dap garda ap t'mende, har i karhni ap peskre terne garda della, oun lell len tel peskre phora. Oun t'mer kaman gar." 
Matthew23:38 Doleske moukell o Devel peskro kheer pash t'mende oun djivell bouder gar koy. 
Matthew23:39 Oun me penau t'menge: T'mer dikenn man yaake rah bouder gar bis te vas ko tsiro, kay t'mer penenna: Sharedo vell kova, kay hi o Deblestar bičedo!" 
Matthew24:1 Oun o Yezous moukas o Debleskro baro kheer. Har yob peske djas, van peskre mala pash leste, te sikrenn le leste o tselo Debleskro baro kheer." 
Matthew24:2 Koy penas lo ap lende: “Kova, hoy t'mer kote lauter dikenna, kova lauter djal paash. Kate ačell kek bar ap i vavareste.”" 
Matthew24:3 Pale djas lo ap i djeteskri berga oun beshas pes. Leskre mala kokres his pash leste oun poučan lestar: “Ap havo tsiro vell o Debleskro baro kheer tele phagedo? Har nay dikas mer, te vas ko tsiro, kay tou pale veh, oun o Devel o ray hi pral halauter?”" 
Matthew24:4 Penas o Yezous: Denn yak, ma moukenn t'men kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell!" 
Matthew24:5 Boud morsha venna oun penenna: Me hom o Kristo, ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob! Oun boud menshe patsenn ap lengro rhorhepen." 
Matthew24:6 Baro kourepen vella an kol themma, kay hi dour t'mendar oun ninna an kolla themma, kay hi gar dour t'mendar. Te shounenn t'mer kova, ma trashenn! Ko hounte vell yaake. Ko tsiro, kay o Devel o ray hi pral halauterende, vell gar yaake sik." 
Matthew24:7 I pralstoune pral bare themma kourenn pen i vavar pralstunentsa. Oun i menshe dran yek them marenn kolen an i vavar them. An boud themma hi i menshen gar doha te rhal. Oun kate oun kote vell i phoub trisslemen. 
Matthew24:8 Kova lauter vella yaake pral i phoub, har i douka venn pral i djouvyate, kay lell i ternepen." 
Matthew24:9 Palle taprenn le t'men, denn t'men dava, oun marenn t'men. Oun i menshe an i tsele themma venna rhoyedo ap t'mende doleske, kay patsenn t'mer ap mande." 
Matthew24:10 Oun boud denn pengro patsepen ap mande pre, oun phoukrenn ninna ap i vavarende, kay ap mande patsenna, oun yek krell o vavareske čilačepen." 
Matthew24:11 Ninna venna boud rhorhene rakepangre oun penenna, te hi le bičedo o Deblestar. Kolla anenn boud menshen o čačo dromestar tele." 
Matthew24:12 O čilačepen vell yaake baro ap i phoub, te denn boud patsle pengro kamlepen i vavarenge pre." 
Matthew24:13 Kova, kay ačell zoreles tardo an o patsepen, yaake rah, har yob djivella, kova lell o Debleskro djipen." 
Matthew24:14 Ap i tseli phoub vell i menshenge ko lačo lab penlo, kay o Devel kamell len dran o čilačepen te lell oun kamell lengro ray te vell. I menshe an hake themma hounte shounenn ko lab. Oun palle vell ko tsiro, kay hi o Devel o ray pral lauterende." 
Matthew24:15 Glan i rah tsiro rakras o Debleskro rakepaskro Daniel pral koy djoungeli čilači figura. Koon kava draverella, kamaus, te hayvell lo les ninna. Ap ko dives, kay dikenn t'mer koy djoungeli čilači figura an o Debleskro baro kheer tardo," 
Matthew24:16 hounte nashenn kolla, kay an o them Youdea djivenna, sik ap i berga." 
Matthew24:17 Kova, kay pral ap o kheer hi, hounte djal bouder gar an peskro kheer dren, te lell lo peskro koova vin." 
Matthew24:18 Oun kova, kay ap i kotar phoub boudrella, kova hounte djal bouder gar khere, te lell lo peskri baya." 
Matthew24:19 Koy bibarht hi bari kol djouvyenge, kay hi an vavar koova, ninna kol djouvyenge, kay hi len i ternepen." 
Matthew24:20 Mangenn o Deblestar, te hounte nashenn gar krik an o vend, vitar gar ap o Debleskro dives!" 
Matthew24:21 Ko tsiro vella djoungleder har halauter, hoy ap i menshende vas, yaake rah, har i phoub tardo hi. Oun ko tsiro, hoy vell pal kova, vell vitar gar yaake čilačo." 
Matthew24:22 Te krals o Devel o čilačo tsiro gar tikneder, palle vals kek mensho dran o čilačo tsiro vin. Kolen, kay o Devel peske vin rodas, kolenge krell lo o čilačo tsiro tikneder." 
Matthew24:23 Te penell yek ap t'mende: Dikenn, kate hi o baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob! palle patsenn les gar! Oun te penell i vavar ap t'mende: Ake, kote hi lo! palle patsenn les vitar gar!" 
Matthew24:24 Boud rhorhene morsha penenn ap t'mende: Me hom ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. Oun rhorhene rakepangre penenna: Me hom o Debleskro bičedo. Oun yon krenna baro oun zorelo koova, hoy i mensho nashte krell gar dran peskri zoor. Kova krenn le, te anenn le i menshen o čačo dromestar tele. Te djals kova, anans le ninna kolen o Debleskro dromestar tele, kolen o Devel peske vin rodas." 
Matthew24:25 Ma bistrenn, hoy me t'menge penom!" 
Matthew24:26 Yon te penenn t'menge: O baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, kova hi an o moulo them! ma djan kote vin! Oun yon te penenn: Yob hi an ko kheer! ma patsenn len!" 
Matthew24:27 Ap ko dives, kay o Mensheskro Čavo pale vella, dikenn les i tsele menshe, yaake har i Debleskri yag ap o bolepen diklo vell, hoy djal yek rigyatar ap i vavar rig an o bolepen." 
Matthew24:28 Kote, kay i moulo mass čiddo hi, kote venn i bare divye čirkle khetne te rhan le." 
Matthew24:29 Oun sik pal kol čilače divessa, vell o kham kalo har i rat, oun o moonto dikell kek bouder. Oun i bare momlia ap o bolepen perenn tele. Oun i bolepaskri zoor perell khetne." 
Matthew24:30 Palle dikenn le o Menshengro Čaves, har yob dran o bolepen vella. An hake themma dikenn le les, har yob vella ap i volke bari zoryah oun raylepen. Oun yon rovenna oun penenna: Patsams mer ap leste!" 
Matthew24:31 Oun yob bičrell peskre bolepangren pral i tseli phoub. Oun kolla phourdenn an i bashepangre, te anenn le dran hako them kolen khetne, kay o Devel peske vin rodas." 
Matthew24:32 Me kamau te sikrap t'mende čomone. Dikenn ap o faygetikro rouk! Te venn leskre kashta zenelo, oun i patria venn dran lende vin, palle djinenn t'mer, te vell sik o niyal." 
Matthew24:33 Yaake hi kova ninna koleha, pral kova rakrom. Te dikenn t'mer, har kova lauter vella, palle djinenn t'mer, kay o Debleskro tsiro vas." 
Matthew24:34 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kol menshe, kay an ko tsiro djivenna, dikenna kova lauter pengre yakentsa." 
Matthew24:35 O bolepen oun i phoub ačenna gar. Mire laba ačenna hako tsiro. 
Matthew24:36 Kek djinell ko tsiro, kaana kova lauter vella. I bolepangre an o bolepen djinenn les gar, vitar gar o Debleskro čavo. Miro dad an o bolepen kokres djinell les." 
Matthew24:37 Yaake har i menshe djivan an ko tsiro, kay o Noah djivas, yaake djivenn le an ko tsiro, kay o Mensheskro Čavo pale vella." 
Matthew24:38 Glan ko tsiro, har o baro pani vas, rhan oun piyan le, romedineran le, oun van romedino. Har o Noah an o panyeskro kheer djas," 
Matthew24:39 hayvan le gar, hoy koy djas. O baro pani vas pral lende, oun yon lauter tassan. Yaake djal kova ninna ap ko dives, kay vell o Mensheskro Čavo pale." 
Matthew24:40 Douy boudrenn ap i kotar phoub. Ko yek vell krik lino, ko vavar ačell koy." 
Matthew24:41 Douy djouvya krenn yarro dran djob. Koy yek vell krik lino, koy vavar ačell koy." 
Matthew24:42 Rikrenn t'mare yaka pre! T'mer djinenn gar ko dives, kay t'maro ray pale vella." 
Matthew24:43 Hayvenn: Te djinals o ray pral i kheer ko tsiro an i rati, kaana o čorepaskro vella, palle sovals lo gar, oun moukals kekes an peskro kheer dren te phagell." 
Matthew24:44 Doleske penau t'menge: Denn garda! Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, vau pale an i tsiro, kay t'mer gar djinenna." 
Matthew24:45 I lačo boudepaskro della mishto garda ap peskro rayeskro kheer, oun sovella gar. Leskro ray das peskre tsele boudepangren an leskre vasta. Oun ko lačo boudepaskro dell len hako dives kova, hoy len hounte vell djipaske." 
Matthew24:46 Barhtelo hi lo, te vell leskro ray pale, oun dikell, kay yob peskri boudi mishto kras." 
Matthew24:47 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Leskro ray dell peskro tselo bravlepen an leskre vasta." 
Matthew24:48 Yob te hi i čilačo boudepaskro oun penell ap peste: Miro ray vell gar yaake sik pale," 
Matthew24:49 oun yob dell kol vavar boudepangren dava, oun rhal oun piyell pes mato kolla matentsa," 
Matthew24:50 palle vell leskro ray pale ap i dives, kay o boudepaskro gar patsell, te vell yob. Ap yek kopo hi lo koy," 
Matthew24:51 oun dell ko boudepaskres khetne, oun anell les kote, kay i rhorhene hi. Kote rovenn le, oun dandrenn i danda khetne i doukatar." 
Matthew25:1 Oun o Yezous penas: Ap ko tsiro, kay vella o Mensheskro Čavo pale, djal kova yaake har kol deesh terne čentsa, kay djan ap i biyab. Yon lan pengre momlia an o vast, oun djan ap o drom, kay o biyabeskro hounte vella." 
Matthew25:2 Panč lendar his dinelo, oun panč lendar his gosevo." 
Matthew25:3 Kolla panč dinele lan kek djet peha. 
Matthew25:4 I goseve čen his djet an pengre khore. 
Matthew25:5 Oun ko biyabeskro vas gar yaake sik. Doleske van lauter khino oun sovan dren. 
Matthew25:6 His deesh-te-douyenge an i rati, kote das yek bari gole: O biyabeskro vella! Djan vin pash leste!" 
Matthew25:7 Koy stan i tsele terne ča pre, oun kran i yag an pengre momlia bareder." 
Matthew25:8 Oun kol dinele ča penan ap kolla goseve čende: Denn men djet! Mare momlia djan vin. 
Matthew25:9 Penan i goseve: Na-a! Maro djet hi gar doha menge oun t'menge. Djan pash i bikepangre, oun ginenn t'menge djet!" 
Matthew25:10 Har yon kote djan, te ginenn le penge djet, koy vas o biyabeskro. Oun kolen, kay len djet his, djan leha an o kheer, kay i biyab hi. Oun o voudar vas pal lende pandlo." 
Matthew25:11 Oun pal i tikno tsiro van ninna kolla vavar terne ča glan o voudar, oun penan: Ray, ray, kre menge o voudar pre!" 
Matthew25:12 Penas lo ap lende: Čačepah, me prindjrau t'men gar." 
Matthew25:13 Doleske penau me t'menge: Rikrenn t'mare yaka pre! T'mer djinenn gar ko dives, kay o ray pale vella!" 
Matthew25:14 Kova hi yaake har pash o morsheste, kay kamas an i vavar them te djal. Dran kova das lo peskre boudepangren gole, oun das len peskro tselo bravlepen an i vast." 
Matthew25:15 Hakeneste das lo yaake boud love, har kova hayvas, te ginell oun te bikrell kolla loventsa. Ko yekeste das lo panč gone pherdo roup, oun ko vavareste das lo douy gone, oun pale i vavareste yek gono. Oun palle djas lo an o vavar them." 
Matthew25:16 Oun ko morsh, kay kol panč gone pherdo roup las, kova djas sik pash i bikepangre, ginas oun bikras boud koova, oun anas panč vavar gone pherdo roup khetne pashel." 
Matthew25:17 Oun ninna kova, kay kol douy gone peskro rayestar las, kova las douy vavar gone pashel." 
Matthew25:18 Ko morsh, kay yek gono peskro rayestar las, djas ap i kotar phoub oun khatras ko roup an i phoub." 
Matthew25:19 Oun pal i rah tsiro vas lengro ray pale oun moukas peskre boudepangren glan leste te anell, te lell lo lendar kol love, hoy yon leske khetne anan." 
Matthew25:20 Oun ko boudepaskro, kay las lestar panč gone pherdo roup, djas pash leste, oun penas: Mo ray, panč gone dal man. Oun dik, me lom panč vavar gone pashel." 
Matthew25:21 Penas o ray ap leste: Kova kral tou mishto. Tou hal i lačo boudepaskro. Me dom tout i tikni boudi, oun tou kral kay boudi mishto. Doleske dau me kanna boud koova an tire vasta. Ab an miro kheer dren, te vess tou mantsa barhteles!" 
Matthew25:22 Oun ko boudepaskro, kay las lestar douy gone pherdo roup, kova djas ninna pash leste, oun penas: Mo ray, douy gone dal man. Oun dik, me lom douy vavar gone pashel." 
Matthew25:23 Penas o ray ap leste: Kova kral tou mishto. Tou hal i lačo boudepaskro. Me dom tout i tikni boudi, oun tou kral lat mishto. Doleske dau me kanna boud koova an tire vasta. Ab an miro kheer dren, te vess tou mantsa barhteles!" 
Matthew25:24 Oun ko boudepaskro, kay yek gono pherdo roup las, kova djas pash leste, oun penas: Mo ray, me djinom, tout hi i dji dran bar. Tou leh touke o djob, hoy i vavar an i phoub čivas, te vas kova baro. Tou leh kote touke khetne, kay boudral gar." 
Matthew25:25 Doleske darom toutar, djom vin, oun khatrom tiro gono pherdo roup an i phoub. Oun dik, kate hi lo." 
Matthew25:26 Penas peskro ray ap leste: I čilačo boudepaskro hal tou. Tou kral tiri boudi gar mishto. Tou djinal, te lap mange o djob, hoy me gar an i phoub čivom, oun lap mange kote khetne, kay boudrom gar." 
Matthew25:27 Tou hounte dals mire love kolende, kay patsenn i loven vin. Oun te voms pale, palle loms boudeder love pale, har tou len dal." 
Matthew25:28 Oun palle penas o ray ap i vavarende, kay koy tardo hi: Lenn ko yek gono lestar, oun denn les koleste, kay hi les kolla vavar deesh gone!" 
Matthew25:29 Hakeno, kay hi les boud, kova lell boudeder. Yaake vell les boud bravlepen. Oun kova, kay hi les gar boud, kolestar vell ninna kova krik lino, hoy les hi." 
Matthew25:30 Ko boudepaskro, kay či moldo hi, vitsrenn les an i kali rat vin! Kote rovenn le, oun dandrenn i danda i doukatar khetne." 
Matthew25:31 Oun o Yezous penas: Ap ko dives, kay vell o Mensheskro Čavo an peskro tselo raylepen, oun leha venna i tsele bolepangre, palle hi lo o ray pral halauter, oun rakrell o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende ap i phoub." 
Matthew25:32 Oun glan leste venn i tsele menshe dran hake themma khetne. Oun yob čivell len ap douy rigya, yaake har i bakrengro ray čivell i bakre ap yek rig oun i bouzya ap i vavar rig." 
Matthew25:33 I lače menshen čivell lo ap peskri čači rig, oun i vavar ap peskri servi rig." 
Matthew25:34 Oun palle penell o baro ray ap kolende, kay ap leskri čači rig tardo hi: Ap t'mende vell i barht miro dadestar an o bolepen. Avenn oun djivenn mantsa khetne an miri harmenatsyona. Kova kamas o Devel yaake rah har o bolepen oun i phoub koy hi." 
Matthew25:35 Man his bok. Oun t'mer dan man te rhal. Man his troush. Oun t'mer dan man te piyell. Me homs kek t'mendar. Oun t'mer lan man an t'mare khera. 
Matthew25:36 Man his kek ripen ap mande. Oun t'mer dan man i ripen. Me homs nasselo. Oun t'mer van pash mande. Me homs an o stilepen. Oun t'mer van ninna pash mande. 
Matthew25:37 Palle poučenn lestar i lače menshe, kay ap peskri čači rig tardo hi: Ray, kaana his tout bok, oun mer dam tout te rhal? Oun kaana his tout troush, oun mer dam tout te piyell?" 
Matthew25:38 Oun kaana hals tou kek mendar, oun mer lam tout an mare khera? Oun kaana his tout kek ripen, oun mer dam tout yek?" 
Matthew25:39 Oun kaana hals tou nasselo oun stildo, oun mer vam pash toute?" 
Matthew25:40 Oun o baro ray penell lenge: Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ko lačepen, hoy t'mer yekeske mire čorvele phralendar kran, ko lačepen kran t'mer mange." 
Matthew25:41 Oun palle penell yob kolenge, kay ap leskri servi rig tardo hi: T'mer han tel o Debleskro praasepen tardo! Djan t'menge! Djan an koy yag, hoy rhačella hako tsiro, oun hoy hi o bengeske oun leskre kourepangre kerdo!" 
Matthew25:42 Man his bok. T'mer dan man či te rhal. Man his troush. T'mer dan man či te piyell. 
Matthew25:43 Me homs kek t'mendar. Oun t'mer lan man gar an t'mare khera dren. Man his kek ripen, oun t'mer dan man kek. Me homs nasselo oun stildo, oun t'mer van gar pash mande." 
Matthew25:44 Oun palle penenn yon ap leste: Ray, kaana his tout bok oun troush? Kaana hals tou kek mendar? Kaana his tout kek ripen? Kaana hals tou nasselo oun stildo, oun mer hams gar touke koy?" 
Matthew25:45 Palle penell lo ap lende: Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ko lačepen, hoy t'mer gar yekeske mire čorvele phralendar kran, ko lačepen kran t'mer mange ninna gar." 
Matthew25:46 Oun kol čilače len i phagi hako tsireske. I lače lenn o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
Matthew26:1 Oun har o Yezous kova lauter ap i tsele menshende penas, kay kote his, penas lo peskre malenge:" 
Matthew26:2 “T'mer djinenna, an douy divessa venn kol bare divessa, kay Passa kharenna. Oun o Menshengro Čaves vell an i vasta kolendar dino, kay les ap o troushel denna, te merell lo.”" 
Matthew26:3 Ap ko tsiro van i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder khetne an o kheer o baro rashayestar. Koleskro lab his Kayafas. 
Matthew26:4 Oun yon rodan i drom, har nay taprans le o Yezouses čorrhanes, te marenn le les." 
Matthew26:5 “Mer taprah les gar ap o Passa,” penan le, “te venn i menshe gar divyo oun rhoyedo ap mende.”" 
Matthew26:6 Oun o Yezous his an o gab Betani, an o Simoneskro kheer. Kova hi ko Simon, kay his les i djoungelo nasslepen ap peskro mass." 
Matthew26:7 Oun har o Yezous kote rhas, vas i djouvel pash leste. Kolat his i toushni an o vast. Kote his kouč djet dren. Ko djet čoras yoy ap leskro shero vin, te makell li les dren." 
Matthew26:8 Oun har leskre mala kova dikan, rhoyran le pen oun penan: “Hoske čoras li ko djet čičeske vin?" 
Matthew26:9 Te bikrams ko djet, lams boud love. Oun kol love nay dams mer i čorvelende.”" 
Matthew26:10 Oun har o Yezous hayvas, hoy rakran le, penas lo ap lende: “Moukenn koy djouvyat! Yoy kras i lačo koova." 
Matthew26:11 I čorvele hi hako tsiro pash t'mende. Me hom gar hako tsiro pash t'mende. 
Matthew26:12 Kova, hoy yoy kras, kras li, te makell li man dren ko diveske, kay vau paskedo." 
Matthew26:13 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ap i tseli phoub, kay mire laba i menshenge penlo venna, koy vell ninna penlo, hoy koya djouvel mange kras. Yoy vell gar bistedo.”" 
Matthew26:14 Pal kova djas yek kol deesh-te-douyendar, leskro lab hi Youdas Iskariot, pash i bare rashayende," 
Matthew26:15 oun poučas lendar: “Kitse love denn man t'mer, te dau les an t'mare vasta?” Oun yon dan les triyanda roupene beme." 
Matthew26:16 Oun palle rodas o Youdas i lačo tsiro, kay nay dals lo les an lengre vasta." 
Matthew26:17 O dives glan ko kourko, kay i bibolde o maro rhan, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi, van i Yezouseskre mala pash leste, oun poučan lestar: “Kay kameh tou, te kras o rhapen touke?”" 
Matthew26:18 Koy penas yob lenge, pash havo morsheste an o foro Yerusalem yon hounte djan. “Koleske penenn”, penas yob, “maro sikepaskro penell touke: Miro tsiro hi kanna kay. Pash toute kamau te rhal o rhapen mire malentsa.”" 
Matthew26:19 Oun o Yezouseskre mala djan kote, oun kran les yaake, har yob kova penas. Oun yon kran o rhapen." 
Matthew26:20 Ap i rati vas o Yezous peskre deesh-te-douy malentsa an ko kheer. Oun yon beshan pen, te rhan le ko rhapen." 
Matthew26:21 Pash o rhapen penas lo ap lende: “Čačepah me penau t'menge: Yek t'mendar phoukrella ap mande.” 
Matthew26:22 Kova doukas len an o dji. Oun yon poučan lestar, yek pal o vavar: “Mo ray, hom me kava?”" 
Matthew26:23 Penas lo ap lende: “Ko morsh, kay čivell o maro mantsa an yek čaro, kava phoukrell ap mande." 
Matthew26:24 O Mensheskro Čavo hounte merella, yaake har hi lestar činlo an o Debleskro lab. Havi bibarht vell ap koleste, kay ap leste phoukrella! Koleske vals feteder, te vals lo gar boldo.”" 
Matthew26:25 Oun o Youdas, kay ap leste phoukrell kamell, poučas lestar: “Sikepaskro, hom me kova?” Penas o Yezous: “Ava, tou hal kova.”" 
Matthew26:26 Har yon rhan, las o Yezous o maro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, phagas ko maro, das les peskre malende, oun penas: “Ake, lenn ko maro oun rhan les! Kava maro hi miro mass.”" 
Matthew26:27 Palle las lo i khoro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, das lende ko khoro, oun penas: “Piyenn halauter lestar!" 
Matthew26:28 Kay mool hi miro rat, hoy me ratau boudenge, te lap lengri doosh lendar. Yaake krau i drom, kay o Devel oun i menshe mala venna." 
Matthew26:29 Oun me penau t'menge: Me piyau bouder gar i mool, bis te vell ko dives, kay me piyau nevi mool t'mentsa khetne pash miro dadeste an o bolepen.”" 
Matthew26:30 Oun palle givan le o Debleske i gili, oun djan vin pash o djeteskri berga." 
Matthew26:31 Kote penas o Yezous lenge: “Kay rati nashenn t'mer halauter mandar. An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O Devel penella: Me dau o bakrengro rayes. Oun i bakre nashenn penge. 
Matthew26:32 Pal kova krell o Devel man i moulendar djido. Oun te djan t'mer an o them Galilea, djau glan t'mende.”" 
Matthew26:33 Koy penas o Petro ap leste: “Ninna te nashenn halauter toutar krik, me moukau tout gar.”" 
Matthew26:34 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Čačepah me penau touke: Kay rati dell o bashno gar gole yaake rah har tou man gar triin kope bourhoste dal.” 
Matthew26:35 Penas o Petro: “Ninna te hounte meroms touha, doms tout gar bourhoste.” Ninna kol tsele vavar penan kova." 
Matthew26:36 Oun palle djas o Yezous peskre malentsa an i baar, hoy kharella Getsemani. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Beshenn t'men kate! Me djau kote, te rakrap o Debleha.”" 
Matthew26:37 Oun yob las o Petres oun kol douy Zebedeskre čaven peha, oun djas kote. Oun leskro dji rovas, oun i daar tapras les." 
Matthew26:38 Koy penas lo ap lende: “Miro dji rovella, oun mange hi yaake har te merap. Ačenn kate oun sovenn gar dren!”" 
Matthew26:39 Oun yob djas i kotar drom doureder, vitsras pes ap i phoub, oun mangas o Debles: “Mo dad, te kameh tou, mouk kek douka oun merepen ap mande te vell! Mangau tout: Ma kre, har me kamau! Kre yaake, har tou kameh!”" 
Matthew26:40 Oun yob djas pale pash lende oun dikas, har sovan le, oun penas ap o Petreste: “Kate dik, kek tikno tsiro nay ačan t'mare yaka pre." 
Matthew26:41 Ma sovenn dren! Mangenn o Deblestar, te perenn gar miro dromestar tele! T'men kokres hi kek zoor te ačenn pash mande, ninna te kamell kova t'maro dji.”" 
Matthew26:42 Oun palle djas lo i douyto kopo kote, te mangell lo o Debles. Oun yob penas pale: “Mo dad, tou te kameh gar kol douka oun merepen mandar te lell, palle mouk kova te vell, hoy tou kameh!”" 
Matthew26:43 Oun yob djas pale pash lende oun dikas, te sovan le pale. Yon rikran nay pengre yaka gar pre." 
Matthew26:44 Oun yob moukas len, oun djas pale kote, te mangell lo o Debles, oun penas pale kolla laba o Debleske." 
Matthew26:45 Palle djas lo pash peskre malende pale, oun penas: “Kamenn t'mer doureder sovell oun kate čiddo ačell? O tsiro hi kay, kay denn le o Menshengro Čaves an i vasta kol čilače menshendar." 
Matthew26:46 Stenn pre! Djas menge kanna! Kanna vell kova, kay phoukrell ap mande.”" 
Matthew26:47 Oun har yob yaake rakras, vas o Youdas, ko yek kol deesh-te-douyendar. Pash leste his boud vavar morsha. Len his rhare oun kashta an i vasta. Kolen bičran i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder." 
Matthew26:48 O Youdas kras lentsa vin: “Koles, kay čoumrau, kova hi lo. Koles taprenn!”" 
Matthew26:49 Oun sik djas lo pash o Yezouseste oun penas ap leste: “Lačo dives, mo ray!” oun čoumras les." 
Matthew26:50 Penas o Yezous: “Mo maal, hoske val tou?” Oun palle van kol vavar morsha, tapran o Yezouses, oun pandan les." 
Matthew26:51 Oun yek kolendar, kay o Yezouseha djas, las peskro rharo oun das yek klisteske o kand tele. Oun kova his i klisto, kay boudrell o baro rashayeske." 
Matthew26:52 Koy penas o Yezous: “Čip tiro rharo tele! Hakeno, kay i rharo lella oun dell i vavares, ko vell i rhareha moulo dino." 
Matthew26:53 Me nay mangoms miro dadestar an o bolepen, te bičrell lo mange boudeder har efta-deesh-te-douy zerya (72.000) bolepangren, te venn le ap miri rig." 
Matthew26:54 Kova te kroms, palle nay vals kova gar čačo, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi.”" 
Matthew26:55 Oun koy pre penas lo ap kol tsele morshende, kay troul leste tardo hi: “T'mer van i rharentsa oun i kashtentsa pash mande, har te voms i marepaskro. Hako dives homs an o Debleskro baro kheer oun sikrom i menshende o Debleskro drom. Oun t'mer tapran man gar." 
Matthew26:56 Kava lauter hounte djas, te vell čačo, hoy o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro an pengre lila činan.” Har peskre mala kova shounan, nashan le penge lauter lestar." 
Matthew26:57 Kolla, kay o Yezouses pandan, anan les pash o baro rashayeste, o Kayafas. Oun kote van i biboldengre čačepangre oun phoureder khetne." 
Matthew26:58 Dour pal leste djas o Petro leske palla, oun vas glan o shoukar kheer o baro rashayestar. Oun yob djas an o baro voudar dren, oun beshas pes pash i lourdende, te nay dikell lo, hoy krenn le o Yezouseha." 
Matthew26:59 Oun i bare rashaya oun i tsele pralstoune bibolde rodan morshen, kay anenn rhorheno koova ap o Yezouseste, te nay marenn le les." 
Matthew26:60 Oun yon hatsan či, ninna te van boud morsha pash lende, kay anan rhorheno koova ap leste. Palle van douy morsha pash lende," 
Matthew26:61 oun penan: “Kava morsh penas, te nay phagell lo o Debleskro baro kheer tele, oun te nay čivell lo les an triin divessa pale pre.”" 
Matthew26:62 Oun o baro rashay stas pre oun poučas o Yezousestar: “Peneh tou či ap kova, hoy yon ap toute pre anan?”" 
Matthew26:63 O Yezous penas či. Pale penas o baro rashay ap leste: “Glan o djido Devel, pen menge: Hal tou ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob? Hal tou o Debleskro čavo?”" 
Matthew26:64 Penas o Yezous: “Ava, hi yaake, har tou penal. Oun kanna penau t'menge: Ko tsiro vell sik, kay dikenn t'mer o Menshengro Čaves, har hi lo beshdo ap i čači rig o zorelo Deblestar, oun har vell lo ap i volke dran o bolepen.”" 
Matthew26:65 Koy kras o baro rashay peskro ripen paash, te sikrell lo peskri rholi, oun penas ap i vavar pralstunende: “Yob krell pes har o Devel. T'mer shounan les. Kek hounte penell menge boudeder." 
Matthew26:66 Hoy kamenn t'mer leha te krell?” Penan le: “Yob hounte vell maredo.” 
Matthew26:67 Oun palle čoungran le leske an o mouy, oun dan les ap o shero. Vavar dan les an o mouy," 
Matthew26:68 oun penan ap leste: “Tou, baro ray, pen menge, koon das tout?”" 
Matthew26:69 O Petro his vin glan o kheer beshdo. Oun i boudepaskretsa vas pash leste, oun penas ap leste: “Tou hal ninna yek kolendar, kay o Yezouseha dran o them Galilea vas.”" 
Matthew26:70 Oun yob rhorhras glan kol tsele menshende, kay koy beshdo hi, oun penas: “Me hayvau gar, hoy tou peneh.”"
