Matthew26:71 Oun yob djas vin pash o baro voudar glan ko kheer. Kote dikas les i vavar boudepaskretsa. Oun koya penas ap kolende, kay kote tardo hi: “Kova hi ninna yek kolendar, kay his o Yezouseha dran Nazaret khetne.”" 
Matthew26:72 Oun pale rhorhras lo, das pes sovel, oun penas ap late: “Me prindjrau kava morshes gar.”" 
Matthew26:73 Oun pal i tikno tsiro van kolla pash o Petreste, kay kote tardo hi, oun penan ap leste: “Čačepah, tou hal ninna yek kolendar. Tiro rakepen phoukrell ap toute.”" 
Matthew26:74 Koy čingras lo, das pes sovel, oun penas ap lende: “Me prindjrau kava morshes gar!” Oun sik koy pre das o bashno gole." 
Matthew26:75 Oun o Petreske van o Yezouseskre laba an o shero, hoy yob leske penas: “O bashno dell gar gole yaake rah, har tou man gar triin kope bourhoste dal.” Oun o Petro djas dran o baro voudar vin, oun rovas zoreles." 
Matthew27:1 Sik taysarlake van i tsele bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder khetne. Oun khetne kran le vin, te marenn le o Yezouses." 
Matthew27:2 Oun yon pandan les, oun anan les pash o themeskro rayeste. Leskro lab his Pilato. Yob his i Remari. An leskre vasta dan le o Yezouses." 
Matthew27:3 O Youdas, ko phoukepaskro, har hayvas lo, te kran le vin, te vell o Yezous maredo, khaytas kova les. Doleske anas yob kol triyanda roupene beme pale pash i bare rashayende oun pash i biboldengre phoureder." 
Matthew27:4 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Me anom doosh ap mande. Me phoukrom ap koleste, kay kek doosh ap peste anas.” Penan le: “Kova hi gar maro koova. Kova hi tiro koova.”" 
Matthew27:5 Koy vitsras lo kol triyanda roupene beme an o Debleskro baro kheer, nashas lendar, čivas i dori troul peskri meen, oun tassras pes." 
Matthew27:6 Kol bare rashaya lan kol roupene beme, oun penan: “Ap kal love hi o rat pre. Mer nay čivah kal love gar pash o bravlepen an o Debleskro baro kheer. Kova djal gar pal o biboldengro čačepen.”" 
Matthew27:7 Oun yon rakran khetne, hoy nay krans le kol loventsa. Oun yon penan: “Mer ginah i kotar them, te nay paskrah kote kolen, kay kek bibolde hi.” Oun yon ginan ko kotar them ko romestar, kay krell pirya dran lolo čik." 
Matthew27:8 Doleske dan le ko kotar them o lab ratli phoub. Ninna kava dives kharell kova yaake. 
Matthew27:9 Oun yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro Yeremia glan i rah tsiro penas: Yon lan i triyanda roupene beme. Kova his kol love, kay i Israeleskre menshe vin kran, te playsrenn le leske. Kol loventsa ginan le i kotar them kolestar, kay krell pirya dran lolo čik, yaake har o Devel mange kova penas." 
Matthew27:10  
Matthew27:11 Oun o Yezous his glan o themeskro rayeste, o Pilato tardo. Oun kova poučas lestar: “Hal tou o baro ray pral i biboldende?” Koy penas o Yezous: “Ava, hi yaake, har tou penal.”" 
Matthew27:12 Oun i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder anan doosh ap leste pre. O Yezous penas či. 
Matthew27:13 Koy penas o Pilato ap leste: “Shouneh tou gar, hoy yon lauter ap toute pre anenna?”" 
Matthew27:14 O Yezous penas či, kek lab. Oun o Pilato kras čačepah bare yaka." 
Matthew27:15 Ap ko tsiro his yaake, te moukas o themeskro ray ap o Passa yekes dran o stilepen vin. Koles nay rodan i bibolde penge vin." 
Matthew27:16 An ko bersh his i morsh kote stildo, leskro lab his Barabas. Hakeno djinas, te hi yob i čilačo morsh." 
Matthew27:17 Oun har yon lauter khetne his, poučas o Pilato lendar: “Kones moukap dran o stilepen vin: O Barabes? O Yezouses, kay ninna o Kristo kharella?”" 
Matthew27:18 O Pilato djinas mishto, te zilverenn le ap o Yezouseste. Oun dran kova dan le les an leskre vasta." 
Matthew27:19 Har o Pilato ap o čačepaskro beshepaskro beshdo his, te rakrell lo o čačepen pral leste vin, moukas leskri romni leske te penell: “Ko morsh anas kek doosh ap peste. Mouk les te djal! Taysar rati his man i čilači souni, oun man his bare douka dran leste.”" 
Matthew27:20 I bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder rakran boud ap kol tsele menshende kote dren, te penenn yon, te vell o Barabas dran o stilepen vin, oun te vell o Yezous maredo." 
Matthew27:21 Oun o Pilato poučas lendar: “Kones kol douy morshendar moukap dran o stilepen vin?” “O Barabes!” penan le. 
Matthew27:22 Koy penas o Pilato ap lende: “Hoy krap o Yezouseha, kay kharella ninna o Kristo?” Penan le halauter: “De les ap o troushel!”" 
Matthew27:23 Poučas lo lendar: “Havo čilačo koova kras yob?” Kote dan le bari gole: “De les ap o troushel!” 
Matthew27:24 Har o Pilato dikas, te nay krell lo či, oun te venn le divyeder, las lo pani, thovas peskre vasta glan i tsele menshende, oun penas: “Me anau kek doosh ap mande, te vell lo maredo. Koy doosh vell ap t'mende.”" 
Matthew27:25 Oun kol tsele menshe penan: “Koy doosh vell ap mende oun ap mare čavende!” 
Matthew27:26 Palle moukas lo o Barabes dran o stilepen vin. Oun o Yezouses moukas lo i čoupniyah dava te dell, oun das les an i lourdengre vasta, te denn le les ap o troushel." 
Matthew27:27 Palle anan o Pilateskre lourde o Yezouses an o baro kheer o themeskro rayestar. Oun yon dan i tsele lourden gole, te venn le kote khetne." 
Matthew27:28 Oun yon rivan leske leskre koola vin, oun čivan leske i loli rayeskri plaashka trouyel." 
Matthew27:29 Oun yon pandan soubyengre kashta khetne, oun čivan len leske ap o shero, yaake har i baro ray hidjrell shereskro sonakay ap peskro shero. Ninna čivan le leske i kasht an leskro čačo vast. Oun yon moukan pen glan leste ap i čanga te perell, oun kran yaake, har te mangans le i baro rayes an. Yon san pral leste, oun penan: “Sharedo vess tou, tou baro ray pral i bibolde!”" 
Matthew27:30 Oun yon čoungran ap leste, lan leske o kasht dran o vast, oun dan les leske ap o shero." 
Matthew27:31 Har yon san pral leste, rivan le leske koy loli plaashka pale vin, oun rivan leske leskre koola pale an. Oun yon anan les vin, te denn le les ap o troushel." 
Matthew27:32 Har yon dran o foro vin djan, dikan le i morshes dran o foro Kirene. Leskro lab his Simon. Koles tapran le i zoryah, oun kran, te hidjrell lo o Yezouseskro troushel." 
Matthew27:33 Oun har yon ap ko kotar them van, hoy kharella Golgata, – kova kharella Mouleskro Shero," 
Matthew27:34 – dan le les mool te piyell, kay čomone dren hi, hoy kharella Galle. Har yob kova hayvas, kamas lo gar te piyell." 
Matthew27:35 Oun yon dan les ap o troushel. Oun palle khelan le pral leskre koola, te dikenn le, hoy hakeno lella." 
Matthew27:36 Oun yon beshan pen kote tele, oun dan ap leste yak." 
Matthew27:37 Ap o troushel pral leskro shero čivan le i kotar kasht, kay činlo hi, hoske yob hounte meras. Oun koy pre his činlo: Kava hi o Yezous, o baro ray pral i biboldende." 
Matthew27:38 Leha dan le douy marepangren ap o troushel. Ko yekeskro troushel his čačes lestar, ko vavareskro troushel his serves lestar." 
Matthew27:39 Oun kolla, kay kote pashel van, sikran i goushteha ap o Yezouseste, oun praasan les." 
Matthew27:40 Oun yon penan ap o Yezouseste: “Tou kamal o Debleskro baro kheer tele te phagell, oun an triin divessa pale pre te čivell. Tou te hal o Debleskro čavo, kre touke, hoy kral i vavarenge oun ab kava troushelestar tele!”" 
Matthew27:41 Oun ninna i bare rashaya, i biboldengre čačepangre oun phoureder san pral leste, oun penan:" 
Matthew27:42 “Vavaren las yob dran o merepen vin. Pes kokres nay lell lo gar dran o merepen vin. Te hi lo o baro ray pral o Israel, palle vell lo kanna o troushelestar tele. Palle patsah ap leste." 
Matthew27:43 Yob patsas o Debles, oun penas: Me hom o Debleskro čavo. Te kamell o Devel les o djiyestar, mou vell lo, oun lell les kanna kava troushelestar tele!”" 
Matthew27:44 Ninna kol douy marepangre praasan les, kolla kay langs leste ap pengro troushel dino van." 
Matthew27:45 His deesh-te-douyenge, koy vas o dives kalo har i rat an o tselo them. Oun kova ačas yaake bis trinenge." 
Matthew27:46 Oun har trinenge his, das o Yezous bari gole: Eli, Eli, lema sabaktani? Kova kharella: Miro Devel, miro Devel, hoske moukal man tou?" 
Matthew27:47 Oun kolendar, kay kote tardo his, oun kova shounan, penan: “Kava dell ap o Eliya gole.”" 
Matthew27:48 Oun yek kol lourdendar anas sik čomone har i kotar than, kras les pherdo shoutli mool, čivas les ap i kasht, oun das les o Yezouses te piyell." 
Matthew27:49 Vavar penan: “Mouk les, dikas, te vell o Eliya, oun lell les tele.”" 
Matthew27:50 O Yezous das pale bari gole, oun meras." 
Matthew27:51 Oun ko voudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, hoy his kerdo dran kouč pesso than, kova djas paash an douy kotya foun pral bis tele. Oun i phoub vas trisslemen. Oun i bare barra phagan an kotya." 
Matthew27:52 I moulengre khera phagan pre. Oun boud kolendar, kay ap o Debles patsan oun meran, van djido," 
Matthew27:53 oun djan dran pengre moulengre khera vin. Pal kova, har o Yezous ninna i moulendar djido vas, djan le an o Debleskro foro Yerusalem. Oun boud menshe dikan len kote." 
Matthew27:54 Ko pralstouno lourdo oun kol vavar, kay khetne leha ap o Yezouseste yak dan, kolla dikan, te vas i phoub trisslemen, oun hoy lauter koy djas. Koy tapras len i bari daar. Oun yon penan: “Kava morsh his čačepah o Debleskro čavo.”" 
Matthew27:55 Boud djouvya his i kotar krik tardo oun dikan kova lauter. Kolla van o Yezouseha dran o them Galilea, te denn le les rhapen oun pipen." 
Matthew27:56 Mashkral lende his i Maria Magdalena, oun koy Maria, kay hi o Yakobeskri oun o Yosefeskri day. Oun o Zebedeskri romni, lakre čave his o Yakobo oun o Yohanni, yoy his ninna kote pash lende." 
Matthew27:57 Har i rat vas, vas i bravelo morsh dran o foro Arimatia. Leskro lab his Yosef. Kova patsas ninna ap o Yezouseste." 
Matthew27:58 Yob djas pash o Pilateste oun mangas les, te dell lo les o moulo Yezouses. Oun o Pilato penas i lourdenge, te denn le les leste." 
Matthew27:59 Oun o Yosef las o moulo Yezouses, čivas les an i djoudji plarhta," 
Matthew27:60 oun čivas les an peskro nevo moulengro kheer, hoy yob das peske an i baro bar. Palle čivas yob i baro bar glan o voudar an ko moulengro kheer, oun djas peske." 
Matthew27:61 Kote his ninna i Maria Magdalena oun i vavar Maria. Kolla beshan vergel ko moulengro kheer. 
Matthew27:62 O vavar dives his o Debleskro dives. Oun i bare rashaya oun i Farisarya van pash o Pilateste khetne," 
Matthew27:63 oun penan ap leste: “Ray, menge djas an maro shero trouyel, te penas ko rhorheno, har yob djivas: Pal triin divessa krell o Devel man djido." 
Matthew27:64 Dran kova pen tire lourdenge, te denn le kol triin divessa ap ko moulengro kheer yak! Yaake te nay čorenn leskre mala les gar, oun te penenn le i menshenge gar: Yob stas i moulendar pre. Kova vals i bareder rhorhepen har lauter kova, hoy yob penas.”" 
Matthew27:65 Koy penas o Pilato ap lende: “Ake, lenn lourden t'mentsa oun denn yak ap ko moulengro kheer, yaake har t'mer patsenn, te hounte vell kova!”" 
Matthew27:66 Oun yon djan pash o moulengro kheer, oun kran i sikepen ap ko bar, te dikenn le, te las yek o bar krik. Oun kol lourde dan yak ap ko moulengro kheer." 
Matthew28:1 O Debleskro dives djas trouyel. O vavar dives, taysarlake, har o kham pre djala, djas i Maria Magdalena, oun koy vavar Maria pash o moulengro kheer." 
Matthew28:2 Ap yek kopo vas i phoub zoreles trisslemen. Oun o Debleskro bolepaskro vas dran o bolepen, čivas ko baro bar glan o moulengro kheer ap i rig, oun beshas pes koy pre." 
Matthew28:3 Leskro mouy rhačas har i zoreli momeli. Oun leskro ripen his parno har i gib. 
Matthew28:4 Kol lourde, kay kote yak dan, tapran savi daar, te peran le ap i phoub, oun ačan kote čiddo, har te vans le moulo." 
Matthew28:5 Oun o bolepaskro penas ap kol djouvyende: “Ma darenn! Me djinau, te rodenn t'mer o Yezouses, kay ap o troushel dino vas." 
Matthew28:6 Yob hi gar kate. O Devel kras les i moulendar djido, yaake har yob penas. Avenn oun dikenn, kay yob čiddo his!" 
Matthew28:7 Djan sik pash leskre malende oun penenn lenge: O Devel kras les djido! Shounenn, yob djal glan t'mende an o them Galilea. Oun kote dikenn t'mer les pale. Ma bistrenn, hoy me t'menge penom!”" 
Matthew28:8 Oun yon djan sik krik. Lengro dji his pherdo daar oun barht. Oun yon nashan, te penenn le o Yezouseskre malenge kova lauter." 
Matthew28:9 Ap o drom vas o Yezous pash lende oun penas: “Lačo dives!” Oun yon djan pash leste, peran glan leste tele, oun tapran leskre pire." 
Matthew28:10 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Ma darenn! Djan pash mire phralende oun penenn lenge, te djan le an o them Galilea! Oun kote dikenn le man pale.”" 
Matthew28:11 Har i djouvya ap o drom his, djan ninna kol lourdendar, kay ap o moulengro kheer yak dan, an o foro. Oun kolla penan i bare rashayenge lauter, hoy koy djas." 
Matthew28:12 Oun i bare rashaya dan i biboldengre phoureden khetne gole, oun kran lentsa vin, te denn le kol lourden boud love." 
Matthew28:13 Oun yon penan ap kol lourdende: “Penenn i menshenge: Leskre mala čoran les an i rat, har mer sovam." 
Matthew28:14 O themeskro ray, te shounell lo kova, palle penah mer leske, te anan t'mer an ko koova kek doosh ap t'mende. Yaake hounte trashenn t'mer gar lestar.”" 
Matthew28:15 Oun kol lourde lan kol love, oun kran kova yaake, har i pralstoune lenge penan. Oun ko rakepen djal gomme kava dives mashkral i biboldende trouyel." 
Matthew28:16 O Yezouseskre deesh-te-yek mala djan an o them Galilea, ap koy berga, kay o Yezous penas, te venn le kote." 
Matthew28:17 Oun har yon les dikan kote tardo, peran le glan leste tele, ninna te patsan gar lauter, te hi yob čačepah o Yezous." 
Matthew28:18 Oun o Yezous djas pash lende oun penas ap lende: “O baro Devel das man i zoor pral o bolepen oun pral i phoub. 
Matthew28:19 Doleske djan pash i menshende an hake themma, oun penenn lenge mire laba, te patsenn le ap mande! Taufrenn len ap o lab o dadestar, o čavestar oun o Debleskro Dourho!" 
Matthew28:20 Penenn lenge, te rikrenn le ap lauter, hoy me t'menge penom! Čačepah, me hom pash t'mende hako dives yaake rah, har i phoub koy hi.”" 
Mark1:1 Kova hi o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar. Yob hi o Debleskro čavo. 
Mark1:2 Kova vas yaake har o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, glan i rah tsiro an peskro liil činas. O Devel penas ap peskro čaveste: Shoun, me, o Devel, bičrau i morshes glan toute ap o drom, te krell lo touke i drom, te nay vess pash i menshende." 
Mark1:3 Koy hi yek an o moulo them, kay dell gole: Krenn maro Debleske o drom, te nay vell lo pash i menshende! Lenn halauter krik, hoy o Debleske an o drom čiddo hi!" 
Mark1:4 Kova his o Yohanni, kova, kay taufras i menshen. Yob his an o moulo them, oun penas i menshenge: “Moukenn t'maro čilačo drom! Djan ap o Debleskro drom! Oun moukenn t'men te taufrell! Oun o Devel lell t'mari doosh t'mendar krik!”" 
Mark1:5 Oun boud menshe djan pash leste. Yon van dran o tselo them Youdea oun dran o foro Yerusalem. Oun yon penan o čilačo koova, hoy yon kran. Oun o Yohanni taufras len an o pani Yordan." 
Mark1:6 O Yohanneskri plaashka his dran firhengre balla. Oun i ledertikri dori his troul leste. Oun leskro rhapen his gvin oun stepangre. 
Mark1:7 Oun yob penas i menshenge: “Koy vella i morsh pal mande, kova hi zorleder har me. Me hom gar moldo, te čivap man glan leste tele, te krap leskre kirrha pre." 
Mark1:8 Me čivom t'men an o pani, te vell diklo, kay moukan t'maro phouro djipen. Kova, kay vell pal mande, čivell o Debleskro Dourho ap t'mende.”" 
Mark1:9 His an kol divessa, kay vas o Yezous dran o foro Nazaret, hoy an o them Galilea čiddo hi, oun moukas pes o Yohannestar an o pani Yordan te taufrell." 
Mark1:10 Oun har o Yezous pes dran o pani hadas, dikas lo, kay djas o bolepen pre, oun o Debleskro Dourho vas har i parno čirklo ap leste tele." 
Mark1:11 Oun i rakepen dran o bolepen penas: “Tou hal miro čavo, koles me kamau. Pral toute hom barhtelo.”" 
Mark1:12 Oun sik pal kova anas les o Debleskro Dourho an o moulo them. 
Mark1:13 Oun kote ačas lo star-deesh divessa. Oun o beng kamas les o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell. Kote his ninna divye firhe. Oun i bolepangre van oun his leske koy. 
Mark1:14 Har o Yohanni stildo vas, djas o Yezous an o them Galilea, oun sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom." 
Mark1:15 Oun yob penas: “O tsiro vas, kay lell o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin. Moukenn t'maro phouro djipen! Oun djan ap o Debleskro drom! Oun patsenn ap kava lačo lab!”" 
Mark1:16 Har o Yezous pash o baro pani an o them Galilea djas, dikas lo o Simones oun leskro phrales, o Andreas. Kolla his mačepangre, oun vitsran pengre mačengre gone an o pani, te taprenn le mačen." 
Mark1:17 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “Avenn mantsa! Me krau t'mendar menshen, kay anenn vavaren pash mande.”" 
Mark1:18 Koy pre moukan le pengre mačengre gone oun djan leha. 
Mark1:19 Oun o Yezous djas doureder, oun dikas o Yakobes oun leskro phrales, o Yohanni. Lengro dad hi o Zebedeo. Yon his an o bero beshdo oun kran i mačengre gone tseles." 
Mark1:20 Har yob len dikas, das lo len gole. Oun yon moukan pengro dades, o Zebedeo, an o bero, khetne kolentsa, kay boudran leske, oun djan o Yezouseha." 
Mark1:21 Oun yon djan an o foro Kapernaum. Ap o Debleskro dives djas o Yezous an i biboldengri kangri oun sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. 
Mark1:22 Oun yon kran bare yaka pral kova, hoy yob lenge penas. Yob rakras bari zoryah oun gar yaake har i biboldengre čačepangre rakrenna." 
Mark1:23 An koy kangri his ninna i morsh, kay his an leste i beng. Oun kova das gole:" 
Mark1:24 “Hoy kameh tou mendar, Yezous dran Nazaret? Val tou, te maress men? Me djinau, koon tou hal: Tou veh o Deblestar.”" 
Mark1:25 Oun o Yezous das les trad oun penas ap leste: “Ma rake oun dja dran leste vin!” 
Mark1:26 Oun ko beng, kay an ko morsheste his, tserdas kava morshes kate oun kote, das zoreles gole, oun djas dran leste vin." 
Mark1:27 Oun lenge ačas o rakepen krik. Oun yon poučan mank pende: “Hoy hi kova? I nevo drom sikrell lo men i bari zoryah. Les hi ninna penepaske pral i benga. Oun yon shounenn ap leste, oun venn dran i menshende vin.”" 
Mark1:28 Oun an i tikno tsiro shounas hakeno lestar an kava tselo them Galilea. 
Mark1:29 Har yon dran i biboldengri kangri vin van, djan le an ko kheer, kay o Simon oun o Andreas djivenn. Ninna o Yakobo oun o Yohanni djan lentsa." 
Mark1:30 Oun i day o Simoneskri romyatar his čiddo ap o čiben, oun lakro shero his tato. Oun yon penan o Yezouseske latar." 
Mark1:31 Oun yob vas pash late, tapras lat pash o vast oun kras, te stell li pale pre. Oun o nasslepen djas latar. Oun yoy anas lenge i rhapen." 
Mark1:32 Ap i rati, har o kham tele djas, anan yon pash leste i tsele nasselen oun kolen, kay his benga an lende." 
Mark1:33 Oun i tsele menshe dran o foro van khetne glan o voudar. 
Mark1:34 Oun yob kras boud nasselen sasto, oun las boud nasslepen lendar. Ninna boud bengen tradas lo vin oun moukas len gar rakrell. Yon djinan, koon yob hi. Doleske moukas o Yezous len gar te rakrell." 
Mark1:35 Oun taysarlake, glan o dives, stas lo pre, oun djas kote, kay lo kokres hi. Oun kote rakras lo o Debleha." 
Mark1:36 Oun o Simon oun kolla, kay pash leste his, nashan leske sik palla." 
Mark1:37 Oun har hatsan le les, penan le leske: “Hakeno rodell tout.”" 
Mark1:38 Penas lo ap lende: “Mer djas ninna an i vavar forya, te penap kote i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Doleske vom kay, te penap kova lenge.”" 
Mark1:39 Oun yob djas an o tselo them Galilea trouyel, oun rakras an i biboldengre kangria, oun tradas i bengen dran i menshende vin." 
Mark1:40 I morsh vas pash o Yezouseste. Koles his i djoungelo nasslepen, kay leskro mass tele merella. Yob peras glan leste tele, oun mangas lestar: “Te kameh tou, nay kreh man sasto.”" 
Mark1:41 Oun o Yezouses khaytas kova, oun yob čivas peskro vast ap leste, oun penas ap leste: “Me kamau, te vess sasto.”" 
Mark1:42 Oun har yob kova penas, djas ko nasslepen lestar, oun yob vas sasto." 
Mark1:43 Oun o Yezous bičras les pestar oun penas zoreles ap leste: 
Mark1:44 “Shoun, pen kekeske, hoy me krom touke! Dja pash o rashayeste oun sike leste, kay tou sasto val! Oun an kova glan o Debleste, hoy o Mose penas, te vess erligo kerdo. Kre kova, te djinenn i menshe, kay tou sasto val.”" 
Mark1:45 Oun ko morsh djas peske, oun rakras boud pral kova, hoy o Yezous leske kras. Oun boud shounan kova, yaake, te nay djas o Yezous bouder gar an i forya dren, har yob kamas. Oun yob his vin, kote, kay kek menshe djivan. Oun kote van le pash leste dran i tsele gaba oun forya." 
Mark2:1 Pal i tikno tsiro djas o Yezous pale an o foro Kapernaum. Oun boud shounan, kay yob an o kheer his." 
Mark2:2 Koy van yaake boud menshe an o kheer oun glan o voudar khetne, te nay djas bouder kek an o kheer dren. Oun o Yezous penas lenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark2:3 Koy anan le yekes ap o čiben, kay nay nashell gar. Star morsha hidjran les." 
Mark2:4 Kolla anan les nashte gar pash o Yezouseste, yaake boud menshe his troul leste. Koy djan yon ap o kheer pral pre, lan barra vin, oun moukan ko čiben o nassleha glan o Yezouseste tele." 
Mark2:5 Har o Yezous lengro patsepen dikas, penas lo ap koleste, kay nay nashell gar: “Miro čavo, me lau tiri doosh toutar.”" 
Mark2:6 Koy his ninna biboldengre čačepangre beshdo. Kolla penan an pengre djia: 
Mark2:7 “Har nay penell yob kova? Yob krell pes har o Devel! O Devel kokres nay lell i doosh i menshendar!” 
Mark2:8 O Yezous hayvas, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djas oun penas ap lende: “Hoske djal kova an t'maro shero trouyel?" 
Mark2:9 Hi kova phareder, te penap ap leste: Me lau tiri doosh toutar, har te penap: Ste pre, le tiro čiben oun dja khere?" 
Mark2:10 Me kamau, te djinenn t'mer: O Menshengro Čaves hi i zoor ap kay phoub, te nay lell lo i doosh i menshendar krik.” Palle penas lo ap koleste, kay nasselo hi:" 
Mark2:11 “Ste pre, le tiro čiben oun dja khere!”" 
Mark2:12 Oun yob stas pre, las peskro čiben oun djas vin. Oun lauter dikan les, oun kran bare yaka. Yon sharan o Debles, oun penan: “An maro tselo djipen dikam savo koova gar.”" 
Mark2:13 O Yezous djas pale vin pash o baro pani. Oun boud menshe van pash leste. Oun yob sikras len o Debleskro drom. 
Mark2:14 Oun har yob yaake kote djas, dikas lo i morshes, kova kharas Levi. Leskro dad hi o Alfeo. O Levi his pash ko kheer beshdo, kay las yob love i Remaryenge dren. Penell o Yezous ap leste: “Am, dja mantsa!” Oun yob stas pre, oun djas leha." 
Mark2:15 Oun o Yezous djas an leskro kheer oun beshas pes tele. Oun boud menshe djan leha. Boud his kolendar, kay lenn i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren, oun kolendar, kay čilačo koova kran oun doleske pale-čiddo his. Oun yon beshan pen tele o Yezouseha oun leskre malentsa, te rhan le." 
Mark2:16 Mank i Farisarya his save, kay čačepangre hi. Har yon dikan, kay yob kolentsa rhal, penan le ap leskre malende: “Hoske rhal yob kolentsa, kay lenn i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren, oun kol vavarentsa, kay hi ninna pale-čiddo?”" 
Mark2:17 Har o Yezous kova shounas, penas yob ap lende: “Kolla, kay sasto hi, djan gar pash o dramaskro. Kolla, kay nasselo hi, djan pash leste. Me vom gar, te dap kolen pash mande gole, kay ap o čačo drom hi. Na-a! Me vom, te dap kolen pash mande gole, kay djan ap o čilačo drom.”" 
Mark2:18 His i dives, kay rhan o Yohanneskre mala oun i Farisarya či, te mangenn le o Debles an. Koy van morsha pash o Yezouseste, oun penan ap leste: “Kolla, kay shounenn ap o Yohanneste, ninna kolla, kay shounenn ap i Farisarya, rhan i tsiro či, te mangenn le o Debles an. Hoske krenn tire mala kova gar?”" 
Mark2:19 Penell o Yezous ap lende: “Yaake rah, har o biyabeskro ap i biyab hi, rhan oun piyenn leskre mala, kay leha ap i biyab hi." 
Mark2:20 Ko tsiro vella, kay o biyabeskro lendar krik lino vella. Ap ko tsiro rhan le oun piyenn le či, te mangenn le o Debles an." 
Mark2:21 Kek sivell i nevo kotar than ap i phouro ripen. Pash o thopen vell o nevo kotar tikneder oun tserdell pes pale tele, oun o phouro ripen djal boudeder paash." 
Mark2:22 Oun kek čorell nevi mool an i phoure molyakre gone. I nevi mool krell i phoure molyakre gone paash. Oun koy mool nashell vin, oun kol molyakre gone djan paash. I nevi mool vell čoredo an neve molyakre gone!”" 
Mark2:23 Ap yek Debleskro dives djas o Yezous ap i kotar them, kay djob baro vas. Oun leskre mala lan o djob an i vasta, te rhan le." 
Mark2:24 Oun kol Farisarya penan ap leste: “Hoske krenn tire mala ap o Debleskro dives savo koova, hoy hi gar pal maro čačepen?”" 
Mark2:25 Penas lo ap lende: “Hoy kras o baro ray David peskre malentsa, har yon bokan? Djinenn t'mer gar, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi?" 
Mark2:26 An ko tsiro, kay o Abyatar o baro rashay his, djas o David an o Debleskro kheer oun rhas o Debleskre mare, hoy kote čiddo his. Pal i biboldengro čačepen his kol mare i rashayenge kokres koy. O David rhas len, oun das ninna kolen, kay pash leste his.”" 
Mark2:27 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “O Debleskro dives hi i menshenge koy. O mensho vas gar kerdo, te hi lo o Debleskro diveske koy." 
Mark2:28 Yaake hom me, o Mensheskro Čavo, ninna o ray pral o Debleskro dives.”" 
Mark3:1 Oun o Yezous djas pale an i biboldengri kangri. Koy his i morsh, koles his i bango vast." 
Mark3:2 Oun yon dikan ap leste, oun poučan pendar: “Krell lo kanna kava morshes ap o Debleskro dives sasto?” Yon rodan čomone, te nay anenn le les glan i čačepangre." 
Mark3:3 Oun yob penas ap kol morsheste, koles i bango vast hi: “Ste pre oun am kay!”" 
Mark3:4 Palle penas lo ap lende: “Hoy kras mer pal maro čačepen ap o Debleskro dives? Hi gar feteder te kras mer lačo koova har čilačo koova? Hi gar feteder te kras mer i nasselen sasto, har te moukas mer len te merell?” Yon penan či." 
Mark3:5 Kova doukas les, kay lengro dji har i bar his. Oun yob dikas rhoyemen ap lende oun penas ap ko morsheste: “Sike tiro vast!” Oun yob sikras peskro vast. Oun ko vast vas sasto." 
Mark3:6 Oun kol Farisarya djan vin, oun djan pash kolende, kay shounenn ap o Herodeste, oun rakran lentsa, har yon nay marenn les." 
Mark3:7 O Yezous oun leskre mala djan penge pash o baro pani. Oun boud menshe dran o them Galilea djan leske palla. Ninna boud vavar djan pash leste, kay shounan, hoy yob lauter kras. Kolla van dran o them Youdea, oun dran o foro Yerusalem, oun dran o them Idumea oun dran o them ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan, oun dran ko them, kay i forya Tirus oun Sidon čiddo hi." 
Mark3:8  
Mark3:9 Oun o Yezous kras boud menshen sasto. Doleske van lauter, kay nasselo hi, pash leste. Oun hakeno kamas les an-taprell, te vell lo sasto. Koy penas o Yezous ap peskre malende, te anenn le leske i tikno bero, kay yob nay pre djala, te vell lo gar paash stakedo." 
Mark3:10  
Mark3:11 Oun har kol menshe, kay benga an lende his, les dikan, peran yon glan leste tele, oun dan gole: “Tou hal o Debleskro čavo!”" 
Mark3:12 Oun yob penas zoreles ap lende, te penenn le kova kekeske." 
Mark3:13 O Yezous djas ap i berga, oun das kolen pash peste gole, kay yob vin rodas. Oun kolla van pash leste." 
Mark3:14 Yob rodas deesh-te-douyen lendar vin, te venn le leskre bičepangre. “Me rodom t'men vin, te ačenn pash mande,” penas lo. “Me bičrau t'men pash i menshende, te penenn lenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark3:15 Oun t'men vell i zoor, te tradenn i bengen vin.”" 
Mark3:16 Oun kol deesh-te-douy his: o Simon, koles das yob ko lab Petro," 
Mark3:17 oun o Yakobo oun leskro phraal o Yohanni. Lengro dad hi o Zebedeo. Kolen das lo ko lab Boanerges. Kova kharella Morsha pherdo rholi. 
Mark3:18 Mank kol deesh-te-douyende his ninna o Andreas, oun o Filipo, oun o Bartolomeo, oun o Mateo, oun o Thomas, oun o Yakobo, koleskro dad hi o Alfeo, oun o Tadeo, oun o Simon, kay his kol menshendar, kay kharenna Zelotarya," 
Mark3:19 oun o Youdas Iskariot, ko phoukepaskro." 
Mark3:20 O Yezous djas an i kheer. Koy van pale boud menshe khetne, yaake, kay his len kek tsiro, te rhan le." 
Mark3:21 Oun har leskre menshe kova shounan, penan le: “Yob hi dinelo!” Oun yon kaman les te taprell." 
Mark3:22 Oun i biboldengre čačepangre, kay van dran o foro Yerusalem tele, penan: “O pralstouno beng hi an leste!” Oun yon penan ninna: “O pralstouno beng das les i zoor, te nay tradell yob i bengen vin.”" 
Mark3:23 Oun o Yezous kharas len khetne, oun rakras ap lende laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Oun yob penas: Har nay tradell o beng o benges vin?" 
Mark3:24 Te kourenn pen i bare raya an yek them, palle djal ko them paash." 
Mark3:25 Oun an yek kheer nay vell gar douyen penepaske. Kova djal gar. 
Mark3:26 Te čingrell yek beng i vavar bengeha, palle nashrell yob peskri zoor oun yob djal paash." 
Mark3:27 Kek nay djal an i kheer, kay i zorelo morsh djivella, oun čorell leskro koova. Yob hounte pandell ko zorelo morshes. Palle nay randell lo leskro tselo bravlepen." 
Mark3:28 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Hako čilačo koova, hoy i menshe kran, nay bistrell o Devel. Ninna te penenn le djoungele laba pral leste, nay bistrell lo kova." 
Mark3:29 Koon pral o Debleskro Dourho djoungele laba rakrella, kolestar vell koy doosh gar krik lino. Leskri doosh ačella hako tsiro." 
Mark3:30 Kova penas lo lenge, har yon penan: “An leste hi i beng!”" 
Mark3:31 Koy vas o Yezouseskri day oun leskre phrala. Yon his vin tardo oun bičran yekes pash leste, te kharell lo les." 
Mark3:32 Boud menshe his troul leste beshdo. Oun leske vas penlo: “Dik, tiri day, tire phrala oun tire phenya hi vin tardo, oun kamenn touha te rakrell.”" 
Mark3:33 Koy penas yob: “Me kamau t'men te sikrell, koon miri day hi oun mire phrala.”" 
Mark3:34 Oun yob dikas trouyel ap kolende, kay his troul leste beshdo, oun penas: “Dikenn, koya hi miri day, oun kolla hi mire phrala." 
Mark3:35 Kova, kay krell, hoy o Devel kamella, kova hi miro phraal, miri pheen, oun miri day.”" 
Mark4:1 Oun pale djas o Yezous pash o baro pani, oun penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Oun pash leste van yaake boud menshe khetne, te hounte djas yob an i bero, hoy an o pani čiddo his. Oun yob beshas pes kote, oun kol tsele menshe his pash o pani tardo." 
Mark4:2 Oun yob rakras ap lende boud save laba, kay hi i khatedo čačepen dren. Oun yob penas ap lende:" 
Mark4:3 Shounenn, i harho djas vin, te vitsrell lo o tikno djob ap peskro kotar phoub, te vell ko djob baro." 
Mark4:4 Oun har yob o tikno djob ap i phoub vitsras, peran tikne kotya ap o drom. Koy van i čirkle oun rhan len pre." 
Mark4:5 Vavar djob peras ap i barra. Koy his gar boud phoub. Dran kova vas ko djob sik dran i phoub vin. 
Mark4:6 Har kanna o kham pre djas, vas ko djob, kay gar dour an i phoub his, rhačedo oun meras tele." 
Mark4:7 Vavar tikno djob peras tel i soubyengre bourra, oun kol bourra van baro oun tassran les, yaake, kay vas ko djob gar baro." 
Mark4:8 Vavar tikno djob peras ap i lači phoub, djas pre oun vas baro. Kova vas triyanda kope yaake boud. Vavar tikno djob vas shob-deesh kope yaake boud. Oun vavar tikno djob vas sheel kope yaake boud." 
Mark4:9 Oun yob penas: Moukenn kova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal! 
Mark4:10 Har his o Yezous kokres peskre deesh-te-douyentsa oun vavarentsa peskre malendar, poučan le lestar, hoy yob kol labentsa kamell te sikrell." 
Mark4:11 Koy penas lo ap lende: O Devel moukell t'men te hayvell, har kote djal, kay dell lo menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom. Kol vavar, kay vin hi, ap kolende rakrau save labentsa, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi," 
Mark4:12 te nay dikenn le kova pengre yakentsa, oun hayvenn les gar, oun te nay shounenn le les, oun hayvenn les gar, te venn le gar pash o Debleste, te lell lo lengri doosh lendar." 
Mark4:13 Palle penas lo ap lende: Te hayvenn t'mer kal laba gar, har kamenn t'mer kol tsele vavar laba te hayvell?" 
Mark4:14 Ko harho hi har i mensho, kay penell i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark4:15 Ko drom hi har o dji kol menshendar, kay shounenn ko lab. Palle vell sik o beng, oun lell ko lab lendar krik, kay lenge penlo vas." 
Mark4:16 Ko kotar phoub, kay pherde barra hi, hi har o dji kol menshendar, kay shounenn ko lab, oun lenn les i barhtyatar sik pre," 
Mark4:17 oun bistrenn les ninna pale sik. Yon moukenn les gar an pengro dji zoreles te vell. Te vell i pharo tsiro ap lende, oun te venn le mange palla lino, palle vitsrenn le pengro patsepen ap i rig." 
Mark4:18 Vavar menshe hi har ko kotar phoub, kay o djob tel i soubyengre bourra peras. Kal menshe shounan ko lab." 
Mark4:19 Palle dikenn le ap i phoubyakro koova. Yon kamenn bravelo te vell, oun o bravlepen krell len gar barhtelo. Oun len hi bok pal boud vavar koova. Oun kova lauter tassrell ko lab, hoy shounan le. Oun ko lab nay rakrell bouder gar an lengro dji." 
Mark4:20 Koy lači phoub hi har o dji kol menshendar, kay shounenn ko lab oun krenn kova, hoy ko lab lenge penella. Pash kolende hi ko lab har o djob, hoy baro vas. Oun pash yekeste vas lo triyanda kope yaake boud, oun pash i vavareste vas lo shob-deesh kope yaake boud, oun pale pash i vavareste vas lo sheel kope yaake boud." 
Mark4:21 O Yezous penas ap peskre malende: Kek rhačell i momeli an, te čivell lo lat tel i piri, vitar gar tel o čiben. Na-a, yob čivell lat ap i momelengri, kay i momeli diklo vella." 
Mark4:22 Vell i tsiro, kay djinenn i menshe kova, hoy djinenn le kanna gomme gar. Vell i tsiro, kay hayvenn le kova, hoy hayvenn le kanna gomme gar." 
Mark4:23 Moukenn kova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal! 
Mark4:24 Oun yob penas ap lende: Denn garda ap kova, hoy t'mer shounenna! Te shounenn gar mishto, hoy penau, hayvenn kova gar. Te shounenn mishto, hayvenn kova ninna mishto. Oun o Devel krell t'maro dji pre, te hayvenn gomme feteder." 
Mark4:25 Koon kova, hoy yob hayvas, an peskro dji rikrella, kova hayvell boud oun boudeder. Koon kova gar an peskro dji rikrella, kolestar vell ninna kova lino, hoy les hi." 
Mark4:26 Oun o Yezous penas: Te kharell o Devel menshen pash peste, te djan le ap leskro drom, hi kova yaake, har te čivell i harho tikno djob ap i phoub." 
Mark4:27 Haki rati čivell lo pes tele, oun taysarlake stell lo pale pre. Oun ko tikno djob djal pre oun vell baro, oun ko morsh djinell gar, har kova lauter djala." 
Mark4:28 I phoub krell pestar, te vell lauter baro. O zenlepen vell vin, palle baro oun bareder, oun vell pherdo tikno djob." 
Mark4:29 Ap ko tsiro kay hi ko djob pesso, bičrell o harho peskre boudepangren, te činenn le o djob tele. O tsiro vas, te anenn le o djob dren." 
Mark4:30 Palle penas o Yezous ap lende: Me penau t'menge kanna, har kova hi, te dell o Devel i menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom." 
Mark4:31 Kova hi yaake har i djob dran i senftikro rouk. Te vell lo an i phoub vitsedo, hi lo tikneder har ko tselo vavar djob ap i phoub." 
Mark4:32 Hi lo an i phoub, djal lo pre oun vell bareder har o tselo vavar zenlepen. Dran ko tikno djob vell i rouk yaake baro, te nay djivenn i čirkle ap leste, kote, kay o kham gar yaake tato hi." 
Mark4:33 Oun o Yezous penas lenge boud save laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Yob penas lenge o Debleskro lab yaake, har yon nay hayvan kova." 
Mark4:34 Hako kopo, kay yob lenge o Debleskro lab penas, rakras lo save labentsa, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Yob te his pengre malentsa kokres, palle penas lo lenge, hoy kol laba kamenn te sikrell." 
Mark4:35 Oun ap ko dives ap i rati penas o Yezous ap peskre malende: “Ouleras vergel!” 
Mark4:36 Oun yon moukan kol menshen te djal, oun djan an ko bero, kay o Yezous hi, oun lan les lentsa. Vavar bere his ninna koy oun ouleran lentsa." 
Mark4:37 Koy phourdas i baro divyo dourho pral o baro pani. Oun o pani vas divyo oun djas pre te tele. Oun boud pani vas an o bero dren, yaake boud, te vas o bero pherdo pani." 
Mark4:38 Oun o Yezous his pal an o bero, oun sovas ap i pernitsa. Oun yon djangran les pre, oun penan ap leste: “Sikepaskro, poučeh tou gar koy pal, kay mer tassah?”" 
Mark4:39 Oun yob stas pre, oun das ko zorelo dourho trad, oun penas ap ko baro pani: “Ač! Mouk tele!” Oun ko zorelo dourho phourdas bouder gar, oun o baro pani das bouder kek gole." 
Mark4:40 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Hoske trashenn t'mer yaake? Hi t'men kek patsepen?” 
Mark4:41 Oun kolen vas i bari traash, oun yon penan mank pende: “Koon hi ko morsh? Ninna o zorelo dourho oun o baro pani shounenn ap leste.”" 
Mark5:1 Oun yon van ap o vavar panyeskri rig an o them Gerasa. 
Mark5:2 Oun har o Yezous dran o bero djas, nashas i morsh pash leste. Kova vas dran i moulengre khera. Les his i beng an peste," 
Mark5:3 oun djivas an kol moulengre khera. Oun kek nashte pandas les, vitar gar i sasterne shellentsa." 
Mark5:4 Boud kope pandan le leskre vasta oun pire i sasterne shellentsa, oun yob kras len paash oun phagas len pestar tele. Oun kek nashte vas ray pral leste." 
Mark5:5 Hako tsiro ap o dives oun an i rati, his yob an i moulengre khera oun ap i berge, oun das bari gole, oun das pes i barrentsa." 
Mark5:6 Har yob o Yezouses dour glan peste dikas, nashas lo pash leste oun vitsras pes glan leste ap i phoub." 
Mark5:7 Oun o Yezous penas ap o bengeste: “Tou beng, dja vin dran kava morsheste!” Koy das yob bari gole: “Yezous, tou čavo o baro Deblestar, hoy kameh tou mandar? Me mangau tout pash o Debleste: Ma douke man gar!”" 
Mark5:8  
Mark5:9 Oun o Yezous poučas lestar: “Har khareh tou?” Koy penas lo: “Mer ham boud. Doleske kharau Legioni.” 
Mark5:10 Oun yob mangas o Yezousestar, te tradell lo len gar dran ko them vin." 
Mark5:11 Koy his pash i berga boud bale, hoy kote rhan." 
Mark5:12 Oun kol benga mangan lestar: “Mouk men an kol balende dren te djal!” 
Mark5:13 Oun yob moukas len an lende dren te djal. Koy van kol benga dran o morsheste vin, oun djan an kol balende. Oun kol tsele bale van divyo oun nashan i berga tele, oun stan an o baro pani, oun tassan. Kolla his nay douy zerya bale." 
Mark5:14 Oun kolla, kay dan garda ap i balende, nashan penge, oun penan kova i menshenge an i forya oun an i gaba. Oun kol menshe kaman te dikell, hoy kote djas, oun van pash o Yezouseste," 
Mark5:15 oun dikan koles kote beshdo, kolestar kol boud benga vin van. Yob his an-rido oun bouder gar divyo. Har yon kova dikan, vas i traash ap lende." 
Mark5:16 Oun kolla, kay lauter dikan, penan lenge, hoy koleha djas, oun hoy kol balentsa djas." 
Mark5:17 Oun yon mangan o Yezousestar, te djal lo dran lengro them vin." 
Mark5:18 Oun har yob an o bero djas, mangas lestar ko morsh, kay his i benga an leste, te ačell lo nay pash leste." 
Mark5:19 O Yezous kamas gar, te djas yob leha, oun penas ap leste: “Dja khere pash tire menshende! Pen lenge lauter, hoy o Devel touke kras oun har lačo yob ap toute his!”" 
Mark5:20 Oun kava morsh djas peske, oun djas an ko them trouyel, kay i deesh forya čiddo hi, oun penas i menshenge, havo baro koova o Yezous ap leste kras. Oun hakeno kras bare yaka." 
Mark5:21 Har o Yezous an o bero pale vergel ouleras, van kote boud menshe pash leste khetne. Oun yob his gomme pash o baro pani," 
Mark5:22 koy vas i pralstouno pral i biboldengri kangri. Leskro lab his Yayro. Har dikas lo o Yezouses, peras lo glan leste tele," 
Mark5:23 oun mangas les o tselo djiyeha oun penas: “Miri čay hi ap o merepen čiddo. Am oun čip tire vasta ap late, te vell li sasto, oun te djivell li!”" 
Mark5:24 Oun yob djas leha. Oun boud menshe djan leske palla oun his troul leste. 
Mark5:25 Mank lende his i djouvel. Kolat his i ratlo nasslepen. Deesh-te-douy bersha his li nasseli," 
Mark5:26 oun das lauter, hoy lat his, i dramangrende. Oun kek nashte kras lat sasto. Yoy vas gomme nassleder." 
Mark5:27 Har yoy o Yezousestar shounas, vas li mashkral i menshende pal leste, oun tapras ap leskro ripen." 
Mark5:28 Yoy penas peske: “Te taprau kokres ap leskro ripen, vau sasto.”" 
Mark5:29 Oun ap yek kopo djas kava nasslepen latar. Oun yoy hayvas, kay hi li sasto." 
Mark5:30 Oun o Yezous hayvas pestar, kay djas i zoor lestar vin, oun rissras pes trouyel, oun penas ap i menshende: “Koon tapras ap miro ripen?”" 
Mark5:31 Oun leskre mala penan ap leste: “Tou dikeh, har boud menshe troul toute hi, oun koy poučeh tou: Koon tapras ap miro ripen?”" 
Mark5:32 Yob dikas pes trouyel pal kolate, kay kras kova." 
Mark5:33 Koy djouvel kay djinas, hoy lake djas, trashas oun trissas. Oun yoy vas pash leste, oun peras glan leste tele ap i phoub, oun penas leske o tselo čačepen." 
Mark5:34 Yob penas ap late: “Romniya, tiro patsepen kras tout sasto. Dja mo Debleha! Tiro nasslepen vell bouder gar pale.”" 
Mark5:35 Har yob yaake rakras, van morsha dran o kheer kolestar, kay o pralstouno pral i biboldengri kangri hi, oun penan leske: “Tiri čay meras. Tou hounte mangess o rayes bouder gar.”" 
Mark5:36 O Yezous shounas kal laba, oun penas ap kol pralstuneste: “Ma traash, pats!”" 
Mark5:37 Oun o Yezous moukas kokres o Petres, oun o Yakobes, oun koleskro phrales, o Yohanni, leha te djal." 
Mark5:38 Oun yon van an o kheer kol pralstunestar. Oun yob dikas kote boud menshen, kay nashan kate oun kote oun rovan oun dan bari gole." 
Mark5:39 Oun yob djas dren, oun penas ap lende: “Hoske denn t'mer gole oun rovenna? Koy čay meras gar, yoy sovella.”" 
Mark5:40 Oun yon san pral leste. O Yezous tradas len lauteren vin, oun las kol čakro dades oun lakri day peha, ninna kolen, kay pash leste his, oun djas dren, kay koy čay čiddo his." 
Mark5:41 Oun yob tapras kol čat pash o vast, oun penas ap late an peskro rakepen: “Talita kumi!” Kova kharella: Čay, me penau touke, ste pre!" 
Mark5:42 Oun sik stas koy čay pre, oun djas trouyel. Yoy his deesh-te-douy bersha phouro. Oun lenge ačas o rakepen pral kova krik." 
Mark5:43 Oun yob penas lenge zoreles: “Ma penenn kova kekeske!” Oun palle penas lo: “Denn lat te rhal!” 
Mark6:1 O Yezous djas dran ko foro vin oun vas an peskro dadeskro foro. Oun leskre mala djan leha. 
Mark6:2 Ap o Debleskro dives djas lo an i biboldengri kangri oun sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. Oun boud menshe, kay shounan les, kran bare yaka pral kova, hoy yob penas. Yon penan: “Koon penas leske kova lauter? Koon das les savo gosvepen? Kay vell leskri bari zoor, te nay krell lo savo baro koova?”" 
Mark6:3 “Hi kova gar ko morsh, kay boudrell i kashtentsa? Hi leskri day gar i Maria? Hi leskre phrala gar o Yakobo, o Yosef, o Simon, oun o Youdas? Oun ninna leskre phenya djivenn pash mende.” Oun yon rhoyran pen pral leste." 
Mark6:4 O Yezous penas ap lende: “Kek Debleskro rakepaskro vell kote sharedo, kay yob khere hi, vitar gar pash peskre menshende oun an peskro kheer. An i vavar forya oun gaba vell lo sharedo.”" 
Mark6:5 Oun kote nashte kras yob kek baro koova an o Debleskri zoor, kokres i nasslenge čivas yob i vasta pre oun kras len sasto, oun kolla his gar boud nassele." 
Mark6:6 Oun yob nay hayvas gar, hoske i menshen kote kek patsepen his. Palle djas lo an kol gaba trouyel, oun sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom." 
Mark6:7 O Yezous das kol deesh-te-douyen pash peste gole, te bičrell lo len vin, douy te douy. Yob das len i zoor pral i benga, te nay tradenn le len i menshendar vin." 
Mark6:8 Oun yob penas lenge zoreles: “Lenn či t'mentsa ap o drom, kokres i kasht oun kirrha. Lenn kek maro, kek possita, kek love, vitar gar i douyto gad!”" 
Mark6:9  
Mark6:10 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Kote, kay t'mer an i kheer dren djana, kote ačenn yaake rah har ačenn an ko foro." 
Mark6:11 Kote, kay lenn le t'men gar an pengro kheer dren, oun kamenn gar ap t'mende te shounell, kote djan doureder, oun denn koy čik t'mare pirendar tele! Kova sikrell kol menshende, kay yon čilačo hi.”" 
Mark6:12 Oun kol deesh-te-douy djan trouyel, oun penan i menshenge: “Moukenn t'maro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom!”" 
Mark6:13 Oun yon tradan boud bengen i menshendar vin, oun makan boud nasselen o djeteha dren, oun kran len sasto." 
Mark6:14 Ninna o baro ray, o Herodes, shounas o Yezousestar. An o tselo them rakran le lestar. I menshe penan: “O Yohanni, kova, kay i menshen taufras, stas i moulendar pre. Doleske hi les i zoor, te krell lo savo baro koova.”" 
Mark6:15 Vavar penan: “Kova hi o Eliya.” Oun pale vavar penan: “Kova hi i Debleskro rakepaskro har kol vavar Debleskre rakepangre.” 
Mark6:16 Har kova o Herodes shounas, penas lo: “Kova hi o Yohanni, kay moukom leske o shero tele te dell. Kova stas i moulendar pre.”" 
Mark6:17 Kova vas yaake: Glan ko tsiro las o Herodes koy romyat peskro phralestar Filip. Lakro lab his Herodia. Oun o Yohanni penas leske: “Kova hi gar mishto, kay tou lal tiro phraleskri romyat.” Har o Herodes kova shounas, penas lo ap peskre lourdende, te taprenn le o Yohanni, oun te vitsrenn le les an o stilepen." 
Mark6:18  
Mark6:19 Oun i Herodia his rhoyedo ap o Yohanneste oun kamas les te marell, oun yoy kras les nashte gar." 
Mark6:20 O Herodes trashas o Yohannestar. Yob djinas, kay o Yohanni i Debleskro morsh hi, kay djas o čačo drom. Doleske das lo garda ap leste oun rikras les an o stilepen. Yob kamas o Yohanneskro rakepen. Hako kopo, kay yob les shounas, djinas lo bouder gar, hoy te krell lo oun te penell lo." 
Mark6:21 Koy vas i dives, kay hi mishto i Herodiake. O Herodes vas i bersh phoureder oun moukas i baro rhapen te krell. Pash ko rhapen van i pralstoune pral peskro them, ninna i pralstoune lourde. Oun i bravele dran o them Galilea his ninna koy." 
Mark6:22 Koy vas i Herodiakri čay pash lende oun khelas glan lende. Lakro khelepen his shoukar an i yaka o rayestar Herodes oun an i yaka kolendar, kay pash leste beshdo hi oun rhan. Koy penas o Herodes ap koy čate: “Tou nay mangeh mandar, hoy tou kameh. Me dau kova toute!”" 
Mark6:23 Oun yob das pes sovel: “Hoy tou mandar ninna mangeh, kova dau tout, ninna te mangeh mandar o paash miro themestar oun bravlepen.”" 
Mark6:24 Oun koy čay djas vin pash peskri date, oun poučas latar: “Hoy mangap lestar?” Koya penas: “O shero o Yohannestar, kova kay taufras i menshen.”" 
Mark6:25 Koy djas li sik dren pash o Herodeste, oun mangas lestar: “Me kamau, te dess man kanna ap i čaro o shero o Yohannestar, kova, kay taufras i menshen.”" 
Mark6:26 Har o Herodes kova shounas, doukas leskro dji. Ninna te khaytas les kova, kamas lo peskro lab te rikrell, hoy yob glan kolende das, kay pash leste troul i rhapaskri beshdo his oun shounan, har yob pes sovel das." 
Mark6:27 Doleske bičras lo i lourdes pash o Yohanneste, te dell lo leskro shero tele. Kova djas an o stilepen, oun das leske o shero tele," 
Mark6:28 hidjras ko shero ap i čaro, oun das les kol čate. Oun koy čay das les peskri date." 
Mark6:29 Oun har shounan o Yohanneskre mala kova, van le, lan o moules lentsa, oun paskran les." 
Mark6:30 Oun kol deesh-te-douy, kay o Yezous pash i menshende bičras, kolla van pale, oun penan o Yezouseske lauter, hoy yon kran oun penan." 
Mark6:31 Kote his yaake boud menshe, kay van oun djan, te his len kek tsiro, te rhan le. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Avenn, djas kote, kay kokres ham, te lenn t'mer nevi zoor!”" 
Mark6:32 Oun yon ouleran an o bero kote, kay yon kokres hi." 
Mark6:33 Har kol menshe dikan, kay yon ouleran penge, nashan le dran i tsele forya kote khetne, kay o Yezous peskre malentsa djas. Oun yon his glan lende koy." 
Mark6:34 Oun o Yezous djas dran o bero vin, oun dikas kol boud menshen. Kolla khaytan les. Yon his har bakre, kay hi len kek bakrengro, kay dell garda ap lende. Oun yob rakras lentsa i rah tsiro." 
Mark6:35 Ap i rati van leskre mala pash leste, oun penan: “Kate, kay mer ham, della či te rhal, oun i rati vella." 
Mark6:36 Biče kal menshen toutar, te djan le pash i harhende oun an i gaba, te ginenn le penge maro!”" 
Mark6:37 Koy penas lo ap lende: “Denn t'mer len te rhal!” Penan le: “Kameh, te las douy-sheel roupene beme, te ginas maro oun das len te rhal?”" 
Mark6:38 Penas lo: “Kitse mare hi t'men? Djan koy oun dikenn!” Oun har yon kova djinan, penan le leske: “Panč mare oun douy mače.”" 
Mark6:39 Oun o Yezous penas lenge, te beshenn le pen lauter kate te kote an o zenlepen khetne." 
Mark6:40 Oun yon beshan pen kate te kote khetne, yaake te his kate sheel beshdo, oun kote his paash-sheel beshdo." 
Mark6:41 Oun yob las kol panč mare oun kol douy mače an i vasta, dikas pre ap o bolepen, parkras pes pash o Debleste, oun phagas kol mare an kotya. Palle das lo len peskre malende, te denn le kova i menshende. Oun kol douy mače das lo ninna i tsele menshende." 
Mark6:42 Oun yon rhan lauter oun van čalo. 
Mark6:43 Palle hadan le kol kotya pre, hoy ačan pral. Koy van deesh-te-douy marengre gone pherdo lendar. Oun yon hadan ninna kol mačendar pre, hoy pral ačan." 
Mark6:44 Oun kolla, kay rhan kol mare, kolla his panč zerya morsha." 
Mark6:45 Oun sik pral kova tradas o Yezous peskre malen, te djan le an o bero, te oulerenn le glan leste vergel ap i vavar rig pash o foro Betsayda. Yob ačas pash i menshende, te bičrell lo len khere." 
Mark6:46 Har yob bičras len pestar, djas lo ap i berga, te rakrell lo o Debleha." 
Mark6:47 Ap i rati his ko bero mashkral ap o baro pani. Oun yob his ap o them kokres. 
Mark6:48 Oun i zorelo dourho phourdas pral o baro pani, oun das ap lende. Oun yob dikas, har yon pen tele maran an o bero, te venn le pash o them. Sik taysarlake, his yaake starenge, vas lo pash lende, oun djas ap o baro pani, oun kamas langs lende te djal." 
Mark6:49 Yon lauter dikan les, oun i daar tapras len. Yon patsan, kay hi yob i moulo, oun dan gole i daryatar. Sik penas lo ap lende: “Ma darenn! Me hom. Lauter hi mishto!”" 
Mark6:50  
Mark6:51 Oun yob vas pash lende an o bero, oun o zorelo dourho moukas tele. Oun lenge ačas o rakepen krik." 
Mark6:52 Ninna te dikan le, hoy yob kol panč marentsa kras, hayvan le gar, havi zoor les hi. Lengro dji his har bar." 
Mark6:53 Oun yon ouleran vergel pral o pani oun djan ap o them pash o foro Genezaret. 
Mark6:54 Oun har yon dran o bero stan, prindjran les i menshe sik," 
Mark6:55 oun nashan an o tselo them trouyel, oun hidjran kol nasselen ap i čibya kote, kay yon shounan, te hi lo." 
Mark6:56 Oun kote, kay yob djas, an i gaba, an i forya, oun ap o them, čivan le i nasselen kote, kay i menshe khetne venna, oun mangan lestar, te moukell lo len i kotar leskro ripen an-taprell. Oun hakeno, kay ap leskro ripen tapras, vas sasto." 
Mark7:1 Yek dives van i Farisarya oun biboldengre čačepangre dran o foro Yerusalem khetne pash o Yezouseste. 
Mark7:2 Oun yon dikan, har mank leskre malende save hi, kay thovan gar pengre vasta glan o rhapen." 
Mark7:3 Kol Farisarya, ninna i tsele vavar bibolde, thovenn pengre vasta glan o rhapen. Oun yaake rikrenn le kova, hoy lengre phoure lenge penan." 
Mark7:4 Te venn yon dran o foro an lengro kheer pale, thovenn le pen, oun palle nay rhan le. Oun yon rikrenn pen ap boud vavar koova, oun thovenn i khore, i pirya oun i sasterne čare yaake, har lengre phoure lenge penan." 
Mark7:5 Koy poučan lestar kol Farisarya oun kol biboldengre čačepangre: “Hoske djivenn tire mala gar pal kova, hoy mare phoure menge penan? Hoske rhan le o maro i čikle vastentsa?”" 
Mark7:6 Penas lo ap lende: “T'mer rakrenn douy čipyentsa. O Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, penas o čačepen pral t'mende, har yob činas: Yaake penell o Devel: Kal menshe sharenn man pengre mouya. Lengre djia hi dour krik mandar." 
Mark7:7 Yon te mangenn man an, hi kova mange či moldo. Yon penenn i menshenge menshengre laba oun gar miro lab." 
Mark7:8 T'mer krenn, hoy i menshe t'menge penan oun gar, hoy o Devel t'menge penas.”" 
Mark7:9 Oun pale penas lo ap lende: “T'mer hayvenn mishto o Debleskre laba ap i rig te čivell, te nay krenn kova, hoy t'mare phoure t'menge penan." 
Mark7:10 O Mose penas: Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto! Oun ninna penas o Mose: Koon ap peskro dadeste oun ap peskri date i bibarht anella, kova hounte merella!" 
Mark7:11 T'mer penenna: Te penell yek ap peskro dadeste oun ap peskri date: Korban, kova kharella: Me dau kova o Debleste, hoy hounte doms toute," 
Mark7:12 palle hounte krell yob bouder či peskro dadeske oun peskri dake. 
Mark7:13 Oun yaake čivenn t'mer o Debleskro lab ap i rig, oun krenn kova, hoy t'mare phoure t'menge penan. Oun boud sau koova krenn t'mer.”" 
Mark7:14 Oun o Yezous das pale i menshen pash peste gole, oun penas ap lende: “Shounenn oun hayvenn mishto, hoy me t'menge penau!" 
Mark7:15 Či, hoy an o mensheskro mouy dren vella, krell les pale-čiddo. Kova, hoy dran leskro dji vin vella, kova krell les pale-čiddo." 
Mark7:16 Shounenn mishto, hoy me t'menge penau!”" 
Mark7:17 Pale moukas lo kol menshen, oun djas an o kheer. Kote poučan leskre mala lestar, hoy yob kol labentsa kamas te penell." 
Mark7:18 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Hayvan t'mer vitar gar? Hayvan t'mer gar, kay lauter, hoy an o mensheskro mouy dren vella, kova nashte krell les gar pale-čiddo." 
Mark7:19 Ko rhapen djal gar an leskro dji. Ko djal an leskro per, oun vell pale vin.” Oun kol labentsa penas o Yezous lenge, kay kek rhapen pale-čiddo hi." 
Mark7:20 Oun yob penas: “O čilačepen, hoy dran o mensheste vin vella, kova krell les pale-čiddo." 
Mark7:21 Dran o menshengro dji vell o čilačo koova, hoy an leskro shero trouyel djal. Dran o dji vell, te krell lo djoungelo bipandlo koova, te čorell lo, te dell lo i vavares moulo." 
Mark7:22 Te rhorhell i morsh peskri romyat i vavar djouvyah, oun te rhorhell i djouvel peskro romes i vavar morsheha, vell kova dran lengre djia. Dran o dji vell ninna i bok pal i love, o rhorhepen, vi-ladjedo koova oun dinlepen. Dran o dji vell ninna, te dikell yek čilače yakentsa ap kova, hoy o vavares hi, te hi lo midjak ap o vavareste, te rakrell lo djoungeles pral o vavareste, te hadell lo pes pral o vavareste." 
Mark7:23 Ko tselo čilačepen vell dran o mensheskro dji, oun krell o menshes pale-čiddo.”" 
Mark7:24 Oun o Yezous stas pre oun djas doureder, oun vas an ko them pash o foro Tirus. Kote djas lo an i kheer. Oun yob kamas, te djinell kek, kay yob hi. Oun ninna kote nay ačas lo gar khatedo." 
Mark7:25 I djouvel shounas lestar. Kaya his kek biboldetsa. Yoy his dran o them Siro-Fenicia. Kolakri čat his i beng an late. Oun koy djouvel vas pash leste, oun vitsras pes glan leste ap i phoub, oun mangas lestar, te tradell lo ko beng dran lakri čate vin." 
Mark7:26  
Mark7:27 O Yezous penas ap late: “Mouk o maro i čavenge! Yon te hi čalo, nay rhan i vavar. Kova hi gar mishto, te lell yek o maro i čavendar krik oun vitsrell les glan i djouklende.”" 
Mark7:28 Penas li ap leste: “Tiro hi čačo, miro ray. Ninna i djoukle tel i rhapaskri rhan i tikne kotya, hoy moukenn i čave ap i phoub te perell.”" 
Mark7:29 Penas lo ap late: “Havo baro lab! Doleske penau touke: Dja khere! Ko beng djas dran tiri čate vin.” 
Mark7:30 Oun yoy djas an peskro kheer oun hatsas lakri čat ap o čiben čiddo, oun ko beng his dran late vin." 
Mark7:31 Oun o Yezous djas vin dran o them pash o foro Tirus, oun djas an o them pash o foro Sidon, oun doureder pash o baro pani an o them Galilea. Oun yob vas mashkral an ko them, kay hi kol deesh forya čiddo." 
Mark7:32 Oun yon anan yekes pash leste, kova nay shounas gar oun rakras gar. Oun yon mangan o Yezousestar, te čivell lo peskro vast ap leste." 
Mark7:33 Oun yob las kol morshes ap i rig, krik kol boud menshendar, oun čivas peskre goushte an leskre kanda, oun čivas čounger ap leskro čip." 
Mark7:34 Palle dikas lo pre ap o bolepen, las i baro dourho, oun penas ap leste: Effata! Kova kharella: Kre tout pre!" 
Mark7:35 Oun ap yek kopo kran pen leskre kanda pre. Oun leskro čip his bouder gar pandlo, oun yob rakras nay mishto." 
Mark7:36 Oun o Yezous penas kolenge, kay kote his, te penenn le kekeske, hoy yob kras. Boudeder te penas yob, te penenn le či i menshenge, boudeder rakran yon koy pral." 
Mark7:37 Oun kolenge, kay kova shounan, ačas o rakepen krik, oun yon penan: “O Yezous kras lauter mishto. Kolen, kay nashte shounenn gar, krell lo, te shounenn le. Oun kolen, kay rakrenn nashte gar, krell lo, te rakrenn le.”" 
Mark8:1 An kol divessa his ninna pale boud menshe pash o Yezouseste. Har kolen bouder či te rhal his, das o Yezous peskre malen pash peste gole, oun penas ap lende:" 
Mark8:2 “Man khaytenn kal menshe. Triin divessa hi le kate pash mande, oun len hi či te rhal." 
Mark8:3 Me te bičrau len bokles khere, palle perenn le ap o drom khetne. Mank lende hi save, kolen hi i dour drom.”" 
Mark8:4 Leskre mala penan ap leste: “Kay hatsas mer maro kate an kava moulo them, te kras len čalo?”" 
Mark8:5 “Kitse mare hi t'men?” poučas lo. “Efta,” penan le." 
Mark8:6 Yob penas i menshenge, te beshenn pen le ap i phoub. Oun yob las kol efta mare, parkras pes pash o Debleste, oun phagas len an kotya. Oun yob das len peskre malende, te denn le len i menshende. Oun yon kran kova." 
Mark8:7 Oun len his ninna tikne mače. Oun o Yezous parkras pes pash o Debleste oun das len peskre malende, te denn le kolen ninna i menshende te rhal." 
Mark8:8 Oun yon rhan oun van čalo. Koy his nay star zerya menshe. Oun pal o rhapen hadan le kol kotya maro pre, hoy pral ačan. Kolla his efta marengre gone pherdo. Palle moukas lo len khere te djal," 
Mark8:9  
Mark8:10 djas peskre malentsa an o bero oun vas an ko them, kay Dalmanuta čiddo hi." 
Mark8:11 Oun i Farisarya van vin pash leste, te rakrenn le leha. Yon kaman te taprenn le les leskre labentsa oun penan ap leste: “Kre menge i baro koova, hoy sikrell men, te vell tiri zoor o Deblestar!”" 
Mark8:12 Yob las i baro dourho oun penas: “Hoske kamenn kol menshe, kay djivenna kava dives, i baro Debleskro koova te dikell? Me penau t'menge o čačepen: Yon dikenna kek savo koova.”" 
Mark8:13 Oun yob moukas len, djas pale an o bero, oun ouleras vergel." 
Mark8:14 Oun o Yezouseskre mala bistran, te lenn le maro lentsa. Len his yek maro kokres an o bero." 
Mark8:15 Oun o Yezous penas zoreles ap lende: “Denn yak! O shoutlo yarro hi gar mishto, hoy vell i Farisarendar oun o Herodestar!”" 
Mark8:16 Har yon kova shounan, penan le penge: “Mer lam kek maro. Doleske penas lo kova menge.”" 
Mark8:17 Oun o Yezous hayvas kova, oun penas ap lende: “Hoske rakrenn t'mer pral kova, kay hi t'men kek maro? Dikenn oun hayvenn t'mer gomme gar? Hi t'men i dji har i bar an t'mende?" 
Mark8:18 T'men hi yaka, oun dikenn či. Oun t'men hi kanna, oun shounenn či. Djinenn t'mer bouder gar," 
Mark8:19 har me kol panč mare phagom, oun kol panč zerya menshende dom? Kitse marengre gone pherdo kotya, hoy pral ačan, hadan t'mer pre?” Penan le: “Deesh-te-douy.”" 
Mark8:20 Penas lo: “Oun har me phagom kol efta mare kol star zerya menshenge? Kitse marengre gone pherdo kotya, hoy pral ačan, hadan t'mer kote pre?” Penan le: “Efta.”" 
Mark8:21 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Hayvenn t'mer gomme gar?” 
Mark8:22 O Yezous oun peskre mala van an o gab Betsayda. Koy anan le i morshes pash leste, kay dikas nay gar. Oun yon mangan o Yezousestar, te čivell lo peskro vast ap leste." 
Mark8:23 Oun yob las koles, kay dikas nay gar, pash o vast, oun anas les vin glan o gab. Palle čivas lo čounger ap leskre yaka, čivas peskre vasta ap leste, oun poučas lestar: “Dikeh tou čomone?”" 
Mark8:24 Oun yob dikas pre oun penas: “Me dikau i menshen, har te venn le rouka, kay nashenn trouyel.”" 
Mark8:25 Pale čivas o Yezous peskre vasta ap leskre yaka. Oun kava kopo dikas ko morsh pre oun his sasto. Yob dikas lauter mishto. 
Mark8:26 Oun o Yezous bičras les khere oun penas: “Ma dja dren an o gab!” 
Mark8:27 Oun o Yezous djas peskre malentsa doureder oun vas an kol gaba pash o foro Cesarea Filipi. Ap o drom poučas lo peskre malendar: “Hoy penenn i menshe, koon me hom?”" 
Mark8:28 Oun yon penan ap leste: “Hi menshe koy, kay penenn, tou hal o Yohanni, kova, kay taufras i menshen. Vavar penenna, tou hal o Eliya. Oun pale vavar penenna, tou hal i Debleskro rakepaskro, kay glan i rah tsiro djivas.”" 
Mark8:29 Koy poučas lo lendar: “Oun t'mer, hoy penenn t'mer, koon me hom?” Koy penas o Petro ap leste: “Tou hal o Kristo, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. ”" 
Mark8:30 Oun yob das len trad, te penenn le kova kekeske." 
Mark8:31 Oun o Yezous penas peskre malenge: “O Mensheskro Čavo hounte lell boud douka ap peste. Oun i biboldengre phoureder oun čačepangre oun i bare rashaya čivenn les ap i rig. Oun yob hounte vell maredo. Oun pal triin divessa stell lo pale i moulendar pre.” 
Mark8:32 Oun kova lauter penas lo lenge, oun rikras či pale. Koy las les o Petro ap i rig, oun čingras ap leste." 
Mark8:33 Oun o Yezous rissras pes trouyel, dikas ap peskre malende, oun das o Petres trad oun penas: “Dja touke, tou beng! Tou kameh gar, hoy o Devel kamella, na-a, tou kameh, hoy i menshe kamenna.”" 
Mark8:34 Palle das o Yezous kol boud menshen pash peste gole, ninna peskre malen, oun penas ap lende: Koon ap miro drom mantsa djala, kova hounte bistrell, hoy leske kokres mishto hi, oun lell peskro troushel ap peste, oun djal mantsa." 
Mark8:35 Koon kamell peskro djipen te rikrell, kova nashrell les. Koon ap miro drom mantsa djala oun i menshenge miro lab penella, oun vell doleske moulo dino, kova lell o djipen pale." 
Mark8:36 I mensheske vals kova gar mishto, te lals lo o tselo bravlepen ap kay phoub, oun nashrals peskro djipen." 
Mark8:37 I mensho nay dell či o Debleste, te lell lo ko djipen pale." 
Mark8:38 I menshe an kava tsiro hi čilačo oun moukan o Debles. Kova, kay ladjell pes mange oun mire labenge glan kolende, koleske ladjau me ninna, te vau me, o Mensheskro Čavo, pale ap i phoub. Ap ko dives hi man o raylepen, hoy das man miro dad an o bolepen. Oun mantsa venna o Debleskre bolepangre." 
Mark9:1 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Mashkral t'mende hi save menshe, kay merenna gar, bis te dikan le, kay vas kova bari zoryah, kones o Devel vin rodas, te vell lo baro ray.”" 
Mark9:2 Oun pal shob divessa las o Yezous o Petres peha, ninna o Yakobes oun o Yohannes, oun anas len ap i bari berga. Kek vavar djas lentsa. Oun glan lengre yaka las lo i bolepaskro raylepen." 
Mark9:3 Oun leskre koola van rayles biyalo, yaake biyalo, har kek ap i phoub nay thovell len biyalo." 
Mark9:4 Oun ap yek kopo dikan le o Eliyas oun o Moses, kay rakran o Yezouseha." 
Mark9:5 Oun o Petro penas ap o Yezouseste: “Ray, hi mishto, te ham kate. Mouk men triin tikne khera te krell, yek touke, yek o Moseske, oun yek o Eliyeske.”" 
Mark9:6 Yob djinas gar, hoy rakrell lo koy. I bari traash tapran len." 
Mark9:7 Koy vas i folka pral lende tele. Oun yon shounan i rakepen dran i folka: “Kava hi miro čavo, koles kamau o djiyestar. Shounenn ap leste!”" 
Mark9:8 Oun ap yek kopo, har yon troul pende dikan, dikan le bouder kekes har o Yezouses kokres." 
Mark9:9 Har yon pale i berga tele djan, penas o Yezous lenge zoreles, te penenn le kekeske, hoy yon dikan, yaake rah har o Mensheskro Čavo gar i moulendar pre stas." 
Mark9:10 Oun yon rikran ko lab pash pende oun poučan mank pende yek o vavarestar: “Hoy hi kova, te penell yob, kay stell lo i moulendar pre?”" 
Mark9:11 Oun yon poučan lestar: “Hoske penenn mare čačepangre, kay glan ko tsiro hounte vell o Eliya?”" 
Mark9:12 Koy penas lo ap lende: “Čačepah, o Eliya vell oun anell o Debleskre menshen pale khetne. Hoske hi činlo pral o Menshengro Čaveste, kay hounte venn boud douka ap leste oun kay i menshe rikrenn či lestar?" 
Mark9:13 Me penau t'menge: O Eliya vas, oun yon kran leha, hoy yon kaman, yaake har lestar činlo hi.”" 
Mark9:14 Oun yon van pash pengre vavar malende, oun dikan boud menshen troul lende, ninna biboldengre čačepangre, kay rakran lentsa." 
Mark9:15 Oun har kol boud menshe o Yezouses dikan, kran le bare yaka. Yon nashan pash leste oun penan: “Lačo dives!”" 
Mark9:16 Oun o Yezous poučas lendar: “Hoy rakrenn t'mer lentsa?” 
Mark9:17 Koy penas yek kolendar, kay kote tardo hi, ap leste: “Ray, me anom miro čaves kate pash toute. Koles hi i beng an leste. Kova krella, kay rakrell lo nashte gar." 
Mark9:18 Oun te taprell lo les, vitsrell lo les ap i phoub. Oun les hi čounger glan o mouy, oun dandrell i danda khetne, oun vell har moulo. Oun me rakrom tire malentsa, te tradenn le o benges lestar vin, oun yon hayvan les gar.”" 
Mark9:19 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Have menshe han t'mer, kay hi t'men kek patsepen! Har rah hounte ačap pash t'mende? Har rah rikrap me pash t'mende vin? Anenn les kate pash mande!”" 
Mark9:20 Oun yon anan o čaves pash leste. Har dikas o beng o Yezouses, tserdas lo o čaves kay te koy. Oun o čavo peras ap i phoub, rissras pes trouyel ap haki rig. Oun i čounger his glan leskro mouy." 
Mark9:21 Koy poučas o Yezous o čaveskro dadestar: “Har rah hi les kova?” Kova penas: “Yaake rah, har yob djivella." 
Mark9:22 Boud kope vitsras lo les an i yag oun an o pani, te marell lo les. Tou te hayveh čomone, palle ab menge lačes oun kre les sasto!”" 
Mark9:23 O Yezous penas ap leste: “Tou peneh: Te hayveh tou! Me penau touke: Lauter djal koleske, kay patsella.”" 
Mark9:24 Koy das o čaveskro dad gole: “Me patsau. Miro patsepen hi gar baro. Kre, te patsap boudeder!”" 
Mark9:25 Oun o Yezous dikas, kay nashan boud menshe pash leste khetne. Koy das lo ko benges trad, oun penas ap leste: “Tou beng, kay rakreh oun shouneh nashte gar, me penau touke: Dja vin lestar, oun dja bouder gar an leste dren!”" 
Mark9:26 Koy das yob gole, oun tserdas les zoreles kay te koy, oun djas lestar vin. Oun ko čavo his kote čiddo, har te vell lo moulo. Koy penan kol menshe, kay kote tardo hi: “Yob meras.”" 
Mark9:27 O Yezous tapras les pash o vast, oun moukas les pre te stell. Oun yob stas pre." 
Mark9:28 Har o Yezous khere vas, oun yon kokres his, poučan leskre mala lestar: “Hoske tradam mer ko benges nashte gar vin?”" 
Mark9:29 Oun yob penas: “T'mer hounte mangenn kova o Deblestar. Te mangenn lestar gar, nay tradenn t'mer save bengen gar vin dran i menshende.”" 
Mark9:30 Oun yon djan doureder, oun djan an o them Galilea. Oun o Yezous kamas gar, te djinell yek, kay yon hi." 
Mark9:31 Oun yob penas peskre malenge: “O Mensheskro Čavo vell an i menshengre vasta dino, oun yon marenn les. Oun ap o triinto dives pal leskro merepen, stell yob pale i moulendar pre.”" 
Mark9:32 Oun yon hayvan kol laba gar oun trashan, te poučenn le lestar." 
Mark9:33 Oun yon van an o foro Kapernaum. Har o Yezous khere his, poučas lo lendar: “Hoy čingran t'mer ap o drom?”" 
Mark9:34 Oun yon penan či. His yaake, ap o drom rakran le mank pende, koon lendar o pralstouno hi." 
Mark9:35 Koy beshas lo pes, oun das kol deesh-te-douyen gole, oun penas ap lende: “Yek te kamell o pralstouno te vell, hounte vell kova o tikneder lauterendar. Oun yob hounte boudrell i vavarenge.”" 
Mark9:36 Oun yob las i tikno čaves pash o vast, anas les glan lende, las les an i moussi, oun penas ap lende:" 
Mark9:37 “Kova, kay lell savo čaves pash peste pre an miro lab, kova lell man pash peste pre. Oun koon man pre lella, kova lell o koles pre, kay bičras man.”" 
Mark9:38 Koy penas o Yohanni ap leste: “Ray, mer dikam i morshes. Kova tradas bengen vin an tiro lab. Yob his kek mendar. Doleske penam leske: Ma kre kova bouder gar!”" 
Mark9:39 Penas o Yezous ap lende: Moukenn les! Kova, kay savo baro koova krella an miro lab, kova nay rakrell gar sik koy pal djoungeles pral mande." 
Mark9:40 Koon krell menge gar čilačo koova, kova hi ap mari rig." 
Mark9:41 Kova hi o čačepen, hoy me t'menge penau: Koon dell t'men i čaro pani te piyell, oun krell kova doleske, kay han mire mala, koles dell o Devel ko lačepen pale, hoy yob kras." 
Mark9:42 Kova, kay anell yekes kal tiknendar, kay patsenn ap mande, miro dromestar tele, koleske vals feteder, te vell leske i baro bar troul i meen pandlo, oun te vell lo vitsedo an o baro pani." 
Mark9:43 Te kamell tiro vast, te kress o čilačo koova, de les tele! Hi touke feteder, te nashress tou yek vast, oun djiveh hako tsiro pash o Debleste, har te djas tou douy vastentsa an o bengeskri yag, hoy hako tsireske rhačella." 
Mark9:44  
Mark9:45 Te kamell tout tiro piro ap i čilačo drom te anell, de les tele! Hi touke feteder, te nashress tou yek piro, oun djiveh hako tsiro pash o Debleste, har te vess douy pirentsa an o bengeskri yag vitsedo." 
Mark9:46  
Mark9:47 Oun te kamell tiro yak čomone te dikell, hoy anell tout ap i čilačo drom, palle čin les vin! Hi touke feteder, te nashress yek yak oun djah pash o Debleste an o bolepen, har te vess douy yakentsa an o bengeskri yag vitsedo," 
Mark9:48 kay i kirme gar merenna, oun i yag gar vin djala." 
Mark9:49 Hakeno, kay djal mantsa, hounte djivell peskro tselo djipen o Debleske. Kova hi yaake har pash i bakro, hoy o Debleske maredo oun rhačedo vella. Kova vell tseles rhačedo. Oun ap ko rhapen, hoy anenn le o Debleske, hounte čivan le loon pre. Kova sikrell: Ko rhapen hi o Debleske." 
Mark9:50 O loon hi mishto. Te nashras o loon peskri zoor, hi lo bouder gar mishto. Oun tou nay kreh bouder či, te vell lo pale londo. Djivenn t'maro tselo djipen o Debleske, oun čingrenn t'men gar!" 
Mark10:1 Oun o Yezous djas doureder oun vas an ko them Youdea oun an o them ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan. Oun pale nashan boud menshe pash leste khetne. Oun yaake har yob boud kope kras, kras lo kote ninna, oun penas lenge o Debleskro lab." 
Mark10:2 Oun i Farisarya van pash leste, oun kaman les leskre labentsa te taprell. Oun yon poučan lestar: “Nay moukell i morsh peskri romyat pal maro čačepen?”" 
Mark10:3 Penas lo lenge: “Hoy penas o Mose t'menge?” 
Mark10:4 Penan le: “O Mose penas, te činell o rom i liil, kay činlo hi, kay yob moukas lat. Oun palle nay moukell lo lat. ”" 
Mark10:5 O Yezous penas ap lende: “T'maro dji hi har bar. Doleske činas o Mose, kay nay moukenn t'mer t'mari romyat." 
Mark10:6 Kova his gar yaake, har o Devel lauter kras. Ap ko tsiro kras lo o morshes oun i djouvyat." 
Mark10:7 Doleske moukell o morsh peskro dades oun peskri dat, te djivell lo peskri romyah khetne. Oun kol douy venna har yek." 
Mark10:8 Yaake hi le har yek oun bouder gar douy. 
Mark10:9 Oun kova, hoy o Devel khetne anas, kova hounte krell i mensho gar paash!”" 
Mark10:10 Oun khere poučan leskre mala lestar pale pral kova. 
Mark10:11 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Koon peskri romyat moukella oun romedinerell i vavar djouvyat, kova rhorhell peskri ersti romyat oun anell doosh ap peste." 
Mark10:12 Oun te moukell i djouvel peskro romes, oun romedinerell i vavares, rhorhell li peskro ersto romes oun anell doosh ap peste.”" 
Mark10:13 Oun yon anan čaven pash leste, te čivell lo peskre vasta ap lende. Leskre mala čingran ap kolende, kay anan len pash leste." 
Mark10:14 Har o Yezous kova dikas, vas lo rhoyedo, oun penas ap lende: “Moukenn kol čaven pash mande te vell! Ma rikrenn len pale! Save har yon, kolen das o Devel gole, te djivenn le khetne leha an o bolepen." 
Mark10:15 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon gar ap mande patsella har kal čave, kova nay vell gar ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Mark10:16 Oun yob las len an i moussi, čivas i vasta ap lende, oun rakras o Debleskri barht pral lende vin." 
Mark10:17 Har djas o Yezous doureder ap o drom, nashas yek pash leste, peras glan leste tele ap i phoub, oun poučas lestar: “Lačo sikepaskro, hoy hounte krap, te dell man o Devel o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella?”" 
Mark10:18 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Hoske peneh tou Lačo sikepaskro ap mande? Kek mensho hi lačo. O Devel kokres hi lačo. 
Mark10:19 Tou djineh, kay o Devel penas: De kekes moulo! Romeha, ma rhorhe tiri romyat i vavar djouvyah! Romniya, ma rhorhe tiro romes i vavar morsheha! Ma čore! Ma pen rhorhepen pral i vavarende! Ma rande či i vavarestar! Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto!”" 
Mark10:20 Penas ko morsh ap o Yezouseste: “Me krom kova lauter foun tiknes pre.” 
Mark10:21 Oun o Yezous dikas kamles ap leste oun penas: “Yek hounte kress tou boudeder. Bike lauter, hoy tout hi, oun de kol love i čorvelende! Palle hi tout i bravlepen an o bolepen. Oun dja mantsa!”" 
Mark10:22 Kol morshes his boud bravlepen. Har yob kova shounas, doukras les kova. Oun yob djas bibarhteles peske." 
Mark10:23 Oun o Yezous dikas troul peste oun penas ap peskre malende: “Har pharo hi i bravelenge, te venn le ap o Debleskro drom!”" 
Mark10:24 Pral kal laba ačas o Yezouseskre malenge o rakepen krik. Koy penas o Yezous pale ap lende: “Mire čave, har pharo hi i menshenge, te venn le ap o Debleskro drom!" 
Mark10:25 Hi gar yaake pharo, te djal i baro firho an i soubyakro kand dren, har te vell i bravelo ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Mark10:26 Yon kran gomme bareder yaka oun penan mank pende: “Te hi kova yaake, koon nay lell o Debleskro djipen?”" 
Mark10:27 Koy dikas o Yezous ap lende oun penas: “Kova, hoy nashte krenn i menshe gar, kova nay krell o Devel. O Devel nay krell halauter.”" 
Mark10:28 Koy penas o Petro ap o Yezouseste: “Djineh, mer moukam lauter, oun djam touha.”" 
Mark10:29 Oun o Yezous penas: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Hakeno, kay moukell mange oun mire labenge peskro kheer, peskre phralen, peskre phenyen, peskri dat, peskro dades, peskre čaven, peskro kotar phoub," 
Mark10:30 kova lell sheel kope yaake boud pale. Kanna, an kava tsiro lell lo khera oun phralen oun phenyen oun daya oun čaven, oun i kotar phoub. Ninna vell lo palla lino. An ko tsiro, hoy vella, lell lo o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
Mark10:31 Oun boud, kay kanna glan tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko dives palla tardo. Oun boud, kay kanna palla tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko dives glan tardo.”" 
Mark10:32 Yon his ap o drom an o foro Yerusalem. Oun o Yezous djas glan peskre malende. Kolla his dareno. Oun kol vavar, kay djan lenge palla, trashan. Oun yob las pale kol deesh-te-douyen pash peste, oun penas lenge, hoy leha djala:" 
Mark10:33 “Shounenn, mer djah kanna an o foro Yerusalem. Kote denn le o Menshengro Čaves an i vasta kol bare rashayendar oun čačepangre morshendar. Kolla krenn vin, te vell lo maredo. Oun yon denn les an i vasta kolendar, kay kek bibolde hi." 
Mark10:34 Kolla praasenn les, čoungrenn ap leste, denn les i čoupniyah, oun marenn les. Pal triin divessa stell lo pale i moulendar pre.”" 
Mark10:35 Koy djan o Yakobo oun o Yohanni, – lengro dad hi o Zebedeo, – pash o Yezouseste oun penan ap leste: “Ray, mer kamah, te kress menge kova, hoy mer toutar mangah.”" 
Mark10:36 Penas lo ap lende: “Hoy kamenn t'mer, te krap t'menge?”" 
Mark10:37 Koy penan le ap leste: “Ap ko dives, kay tou hal o ray pral i tsele menshende, mouk men te beshas ap tiri rig: yek ap tiri čači rig oun ko vavar ap tiri servi rig.”" 
Mark10:38 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “T'mer djinenn gar, hoy t'mer mangenna mandar. Nay lenn t'mer kol douka ap t'mende, hoy me hounte lap ap mande? Nay djan t'mer yaake an o merepen, har me djau?”" 
Mark10:39 Penan le: “Ava, kova nay krah mer.” Penas o Yezous ap lende: “T'mer hounte lenna boud douka ap t'mende, yaake har me hounte lap len ap mande. Oun t'mer hounte djan an o merepen, yaake har me hounte djap." 
Mark10:40 Ninna te hi yaake, nay penap t'menge gar, koon beshell ap miri čači rig oun ap miri servi rig. Kova hi gar an miro vast. O Devel rodas kolen vin, kay ap miri rig beshenna.”" 
Mark10:41 Oun har kol deesh kova shounan, van le rhoyemen ap kol douyende, ap o Yakobeste oun o Yohanneste." 
Mark10:42 Koy das len o Yezous pash peste gole, oun penas ap lende: “T'mer djinenna, i bare rayen hi penepaske pral i menshende an lengre themma. Oun i pralstoune rikrenn pengre menshen zoryah tele." 
Mark10:43 Mank t'mende hounte vell kova gar yaake! Koon t'mendar kamell, te vell lo baro, kova hounte vell t'maro boudepaskro." 
Mark10:44 Oun koon t'mendar kamell o pralstouno te vell, kova hounte vell hakeneskro boudepaskro." 
Mark10:45 Ninna o Mensheskro Čavo vas gar ap i phoub, te boudrenn i menshe leske. Na-a, yob vas ap i phoub, te vell lo lenge koy, oun te merell lo lenge. Oun yaake playsrell lo peskro djipah, te lell lo boud menshen dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin.”" 
Mark10:46 Oun yon van an o foro Yericho. Oun har yob peskre malentsa oun boud vavar menshentsa dran o foro Yericho vin djas, his i mangepaskro pash o drom beshdo. Kova his korelo. Leskro lab his Bartimeo. Leskro dad his o Timeo." 
Mark10:47 Oun har yob shounas, kay kova o Yezous dran o foro Nazaret hi, kay vell kate, das lo gole: “Yezous, tou Davideskro čavo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Mark10:48 Oun boud čingran ap leste, oun penan: “Ač! Mouk!” Koy das yob boudeder gole: “Tou Davideskro čavo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Mark10:49 Oun o Yezous ačas tardo oun penas: “Denn les gole, te vell lo kay!” Oun yon dan les gole oun penan ap leste: “Ma traash! Ste pre! Yob dell tout gole!”" 
Mark10:50 Oun yob vitsras peskri plaashka pestar, stas sik pre, oun vas pash o Yezouseste." 
Mark10:51 Oun o Yezous penas ap leste: “Hoy kameh, te krap touke?” Ko korelo penas ap leste: “Mo ray, te dikap nay pale.”" 
Mark10:52 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Dja koy! Tiro patsepen kras tout sasto.” Oun ap yek kopo dikas yob nay pale, oun djas leha ap o drom." 
Mark11:1 Oun yon van pash i gaba Betfage oun Betani, kay hi gar dour glan o foro. Kol gaba hi čiddo pash koy djeteskri berga. Oun kote penas o Yezous ap douyende peskre malendar:" 
Mark11:2 “Djan an o gab koy vergel! Oun har t'mer dren venna, hatsenn i terni esla pandlo, ap kolate his gomme kek beshdo. Pandenn lat tele, oun anenn lat pash mande!" 
Mark11:3 Oun te penell yek ap t'mende: Hoske krenn t'mer kova? palle penenn ap leste: Hi maro rayeske, te beshell yob ap late. Oun yob bičrell lat sik pale pale.”" 
Mark11:4 Oun yon djan kote oun hatsan koy terni esla vin ap o drom pandlo ap i voudar. Oun yon pandan lat tele. 
Mark11:5 His menshe kote tardo, kolla penan ap lende: “Hoy krenn t'mer koy? Hoske pandenn t'mer koy esla tele?”" 
Mark11:6 Oun yon penan kol laba ap lende, hoy o Yezous lenge penas. Oun kol vavar moukan len koy esla te lell." 
Mark11:7 Koy anan le koy esla pash o Yezouseste, oun čivan pengre koola ap late. Oun o Yezous beshas pes pral pre." 
Mark11:8 Oun boud menshe čivan pengre koola ap o drom. Vavar činan zenele kashta i roukendar tele, oun čivan len ap o drom." 
Mark11:9 Oun kolla, kay djan glan leste oun kolla, kay djan pal leste, dan gole: “Sharas o Debles! Sharedo vell kova, koles o Devel bičras." 
Mark11:10 Sharas o baro rayes, ko čaves maro dadestar David, kay vella an peskri zoor! Sharas o Debles an o bolepen!”" 
Mark11:11 Oun o Yezous djas dren an o foro Yerusalem, an o Debleskro baro kheer. Oun kote dikas lo pes trouyel. An i rati djas lo vin an o gab Betani peskre deesh-te-douy malentsa." 
Mark11:12 Oun o vavar dives, har o Yezous dran o gab Betani djas, las lo bok." 
Mark11:13 Oun yob dikas dour glan peste i faygetikro rouk. Ap leste his patria. Oun yob djas kote, te hatsell lo fayge ap ko rouk. Oun har yob kote vas, hatsas lo či har i patria kokres. His gar ko tsiro, kay i fayge baro venna." 
Mark11:14 Oun yob penas ap ko rouk: “Kek rhal toutar bouder – an kek tsiro!” Oun leskre mala shounan kova. 
Mark11:15 Oun yon van an o foro Yerusalem. Oun o Yezous djas an o Debleskro baro kheer. Oun yob tradas kolen vin, kay kote bikran oun ginan, oun vitsras i lovengre stamya kolendar trouyel, kay i menshenge love paran. Ninna i stamya kolendar, kay parne čirkle bikran, vitsras lo trouyel." 
Mark11:16 Oun yob moukas gar, te hidjrell yek čomone an o Debleskro baro kheer trouyel." 
Mark11:17 Oun yob penas lenge, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi, oun penas: O Devel penella: Miro kheer te vell i kheer, kay i tsele menshe ap i phoub nay venna, te sharenn le man, oun te mangenn le man an. T'mer kran lestar i kheer, kay i menshe rhorhenna oun randenna." 
Mark11:18 Oun kova shounan i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre čačepangre. Oun yon dikan, har kran i tsele menshe bare yaka pral leskro rakepen. Doleske daran le lestar oun rodan, har te nay marenn le les." 
Mark11:19 Oun ap i rati djas lo peskre malentsa vin glan o foro. 
Mark11:20 Oun har yon taysarlake pash ko faygetikro rouk van, dikan le, kay ko tselo rouk tele meras." 
Mark11:21 Oun o Petreske van o Yezouseskre laba pale an shero, oun yob penas ap leste: “Sikepaskro, dik, ko rouk, hoy tou praasal, ko meras.”" 
Mark11:22 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “Patsenn ap o Debleste! 
Mark11:23 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Te penell yek ap kay berga hade tout, oun vitse tout an o baro pani, oun patsell zoreles an peskro dji, te djal kova, hoy yob penell, palle vell kova ninna." 
Mark11:24 Doleske penau t'menge: Lauter, hoy t'mer o Deblestar mangenna, patsenn, te lan les, palle lenn t'mer kova ninna." 
Mark11:25 Oun te han t'mer tardo oun mangenn čomone o Deblestar, bistrenn ko čilačo koova, hoy i vavar ap t'mende kras, te bistrell t'maro dad an o bolepen ninna ko čilačo koova, hoy t'mer kran." 
Mark11:26 T'mer te bistrenn gar ko čilačo koova, hoy i vavar ap t'mende kras, palle bistrell t'maro dad an o bolepen vitar gar ko čilačo koova, hoy t'mer kran.”" 
Mark11:27 Oun yon van pale an o foro Yerusalem. Oun har yob an o Debleskro baro kheer trouyel djas, van i bare rashaya, i biboldengre čačepangre oun phoureder pash leste," 
Mark11:28 oun poučan lestar: “Koon penas touke, te kress kova lauter? Koon bičras tout?”"
