Mark11:29 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Me kamau t'mendar ninna čomone te poučell. T'mer te penenn les mange, palle penau me t'menge ninna, koon man bičras, te krap me kova lauter." 
Mark11:30 Koon bičras o Yohannes, te taufras yob i menshen? Bičras o Devel les? Bičran i menshe les? Penenn les mange!”" 
Mark11:31 Oun yon rakran mank pende, oun penan: “Mer te penah leske: O Devel bičras les, palle penell lo menge: Hoske patsan t'mer les gar?" 
Mark11:32 Vitar gar nay penah mer: I menshe bičran les.” Yon trashan kol boud menshendar. Kolla patsan, te hi o Yohanni čačepah i Debleskro rakepaskro." 
Mark11:33 Oun yon penan ap o Yezouseste: “Mer djinah les gar.” Koy penas yob ap lende: “Yaake penau t'menge vitar gar, koon man bičras, te krap me kova.”" 
Mark12:1 Oun o Yezous penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Oun yob penas: His i morsh, koles his i kotar them. Kote čivas lo drakengre rouka an i phoub. Troul ko kotar them čivas lo barra. Oun kote kras lo ninna i platsa an i phoub, kay nay stakrenn le ap i drake, te vell i mool vin. Mashkral kol rouka kras lo i kheer, kay kova beshdo hi, kay dell garda ap i drake. Palle patsas lo ko kotar phoub ap i harhende, te boudrenn le kote leske. Oun yob djas peske an i vavar them." 
Mark12:2 Har ko tsiro vas, te anenn le i drake dren, bičras lo peskro boudepaskres pash i harhende, te lell lo lendar kol drake, hoy leske hi." 
Mark12:3 Oun i harhe dan les kek drake. Yon tapran les, dan les dava oun bičran les krik." 
Mark12:4 Oun ko morsh bičras pale i vavar boudepaskres pash lende. Oun koles dan yon ap o shero, oun praasan les." 
Mark12:5 Oun yob bičras i vavares, koles maran yon. Oun boud vavaren bičras lo pash lende. Boud lendar dan yon, kol vavaren maran le." 
Mark12:6 Les his yek vavar, leskro čavo, koles kamell yob o djiyestar. Koy penas ko morsh peske: Miro čavestar darenn le. Oun yaake bičras lo pal kol tsele vavarende peskro čaves pash lende." 
Mark12:7 Kol harhe rakran mashkral pende: Kova hi leskro čavo, kay lauter lella pal peskro dadeskro merepen. Avenn, maras les, te vell kava kotar them menge, hoy leske hounte vals!" 
Mark12:8 Oun yon tapran les, maran les, oun vitsran les vin glan ko drakengro them." 
Mark12:9 Hoy krell kanna ko ray pral ko drakengro them? Yob vella, oun marell kol harhen, oun dell ko drakengro them i vavaren." 
Mark12:10 Djinenn t'mer gar, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi? Kote hi tardo: His i bar, kay i boudepangre lestar penan: Kova hi či moldo. Ko bar las o Devel oun čivas les yaake an o kheer, te rikrell lo ko tselo kheer khetne." 
Mark12:11 O Devel kras kova, oun kova hi i baro koova menge." 
Mark12:12 Oun yon hayvan, te rakras o Yezous lendar, oun kaman les te taprell. Oun har trashan le i menshendar, tapran le les gar, oun djan krik." 
Mark12:13 I Farisarya kran pen khetne kolentsa, kay shounenn ap o Herodes, oun bičran morshen pash o Yezouseste, te taprenn le les an peskro rakepen." 
Mark12:14 Oun yon van pash leste, oun penan: “Sikepaskro, mer djinah, tou peneh o čačepen, oun rakreh kekeske pal o mouy, ninna te hi les boud penepaske. Ava, tou sikreh mishto i menshende o Debleskro drom. Pen menge, hi mishto pal maro čačepen, te das mer o themeskre love o baro rayeste an o foro Rom? Playssras len? Playssras len gar?”" 
Mark12:15 Yob hayvas, te rakran le douy čipyentsa, oun penas ap lende: “Hoske kamenn t'mer man mire labentsa te taprell? Anenn mange i roupeni bema, te dikap lat!”" 
Mark12:16 Oun yon anan yek. Koy penas yob: “Koneskro shero oun lab hi ap kay bema?” Penan le: “O shero oun o lab o baro rayestar an o foro Rom.” 
Mark12:17 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “Yaake denn leste, hoy leskro hi, oun denn o Debleste, hoy leskro hi!” Oun yon kran bare yaka pral leste." 
Mark12:18 Palle van i Sadducarya pash leste. Yon hi kolla, kay penenna: I moule venna bouder gar djido. Kolla poučan lestar:" 
Mark12:19 “Sikepaskro, o Mose činas an peskre lila: Te merell i rom, kay romedino hi, oun les hi kek čave, palle hounte romedinerell lat leskro phraal, te vell leskro phraleske čaven boldo." 
Mark12:20 Koy his efta phrala. Oun o phoureder las i romyat, oun meras. Les his kek čave." 
Mark12:21 Oun ko douyto las lat oun meras ninna. Oun les his vitar kek čave. Oun ko triinto phraleske djas kova ninna yaake. 
Mark12:22 Oun hake efta morshen his kek čave. Palle meras ninna koy romni. 
Mark12:23 Kanna poučah toutar: Ap ko tsiro, kay krell o Devel i moulen djido, koneskri romni hi li? Hake efta his lah romedino.”" 
Mark12:24 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “T'mer prindjrenn gar o Debleskro lab, oun o Debleskri zoor vitar gar. Doleske hayvan t'mer či." 
Mark12:25 Kol moulen, kay o Devel djido krella, romedinerenn bouder gar oun venna gar romedino. Yon hi har i bolepangre an o bolepen." 
Mark12:26 Djinenn t'mer gar, har an o Moseskro liil tardo hi, te venn i moule pale djido. O Devel penas ap o Moseste, har his yob tardo pash o bour, hoy rhačas: Me hom o Abrahameskro Devel oun o Isaakeskro Devel oun o Yakobeskro Devel." 
Mark12:27 Oun me penau t'menge: Yob hi gar o Devel kolenge, kay moulo hi. Na-a, yob hi o Devel kol djidenge. T'mer hayvan či!”" 
Mark12:28 Yek biboldengro čačepaskro his koy pashel oun shounas, har kol Sadducarya leha rakran. Har yob dikas, kay das o Yezous lenge i mishto lab pale, vas lo pash leste oun poučas lestar: “Kol tsele laba, kay penenna, hoy o Devel mendar kamella, havo lab hi o bareder lendar?”" 
Mark12:29 Penas o Yezous leske: “O bareder lab hi kova: Shoun tou, Israel! Maro Devel hi o ray, hi kek vavar." 
Mark12:30 Tou kamess tiro Debles o tselo djiyestar an tiro tselo djipen, an lauter, hoy tou kreh oun djineh." 
Mark12:31 O douyto Debleskro lab hi kova: Te vess yaake lačes ap koleste, kay pash toute hi, har hal lačes ap toute kokres. Kek vavar lab, hoy penell, hoy o Devel mendar kamella, hi bareder har kolla douy.”" 
Mark12:32 Oun ko biboldengro čačepaskro penas ap leste: “Sikepaskro, tou rakral čačepah mishto. Hi yek Devel kokres oun kek vavar." 
Mark12:33 Te kamah mer les o tselo djiyeha, an lauter hoy krah oun djinah, oun te ham yaake lačo ap koleste, kay pash mende hi, har ham lačo ap mende kokres, palle hi kova feteder, har i tsele bakre oun groumya, hoy mer marah oun rhačrah o Debleske.”" 
Mark12:34 Har o Yezous dikas, kay yob mishto rakras, penas lo ap leste: “Tou hal gar dour o Debleskro dromestar.” Oun yon trashan, te poučenn le lestar boudeder." 
Mark12:35 Oun har o Yezous an o Debleskro baro kheer i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas, poučas lo i menshendar: Hoske penenn kol biboldengre čačepangre, kay ko baro ray, koles o Devel bičrell, o Davideskro čavo hi?" 
Mark12:36 O David penas lestar, har o Debleskro Dourho ap leste vas: O Devel penas ap miro rayeste: Besh tout ap miri čači rig, bis te čivau kolen tel tire pire, kay hi rhoyedo ap toute." 
Mark12:37 Koy penell o David mo ray ap leste. Har vell lo nay leskro čavo? Oun i tsele menshe kaman, te shounenn le o Yezouseskro rakepen." 
Mark12:38 Oun yob rakras ap lende oun penas: Denn yak ap t'mende! Kova, hoy kol biboldengre čačepangre krenna, hi gar mishto. Len hi lengste koola ap lende, te sikrenn le, te hi le o Debleskre menshe. Te djan le an o foro, kamenn le, te penenn i menshe “Lačo dives, mo ray” ap lende." 
Mark12:39 An i biboldengre kangria kamenn le ap i pralstoune beshepangre te beshenn. Oun pash i baro rhapen kamenn le ap i feteder beshepangre te beshenn. 
Mark12:40 Yon lenn i khera kol djouvyendar krik, kolengre romma meran. Yon rakrenn o Debleha i rah tsiro, te dikenn i menshe, har patslo yon hi. Ap ko dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen pral lende vin, lenn le i zorleder phagi har kol vavar." 
Mark12:41 An o Debleskro baro kheer his i lovengri piri tardo, kay i menshe love o Debleske dren čivan. Oun o Yezous beshas pes pashel oun dikas, har kol menshe love dren čivan. Oun boud bravele čivan boud dren." 
Mark12:42 Koy vas i čorveli djouvel, kolakro rom meras. Yoy čivas douy tikne kotya dren. Kova his yaake boud har yek bema." 
Mark12:43 Koy das yob peskre malen pash peste gole, oun penas ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koy romni das boudeder o Debleske, har kol tsele vavar, kay čivan love dren." 
Mark12:44 Kol tsele vavar dan love dran pengro bravlepen. Kay čorveli romni das halauter, hoy lat his, halauter, hoy lat his djipaske.”" 
Mark13:1 Har o Yezous dran o Debleskro baro kheer vin djas, penas yek peskre malendar ap leste: “Sikepaskro, dik, save bare barra oun save shoukar khera!”" 
Mark13:2 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Kal bare khera, hoy tou dikeh, djan paash. Kek bar ačell ap o vavareste!”" 
Mark13:3 Oun yob djas ap o djeteskri berga, hoy hi vergel o Debleskro baro kherestar, oun beshas pes kote. Oun har yon kokres his, poučan lestar o Petro, oun o Yakobo, oun o Yohanni, oun o Andreas:" 
Mark13:4 “Pen menge, kaana vell kova? Har nay dikas mer, kay kova lauter glan o voudar tardo hi, hoy vella?”" 
Mark13:5 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: Denn yak! Ma moukenn t'men kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! 
Mark13:6 Koy venna boud morsha, kay penenna: Me hom o Kristo, ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. Oun boud menshe patsenn ap lengro rhorhepen." 
Mark13:7 An ko tsiro hi kourepen an kol themma, kay hi dour t'mendar oun ninna an kol themma, kay hi gar dour t'mendar. T'mer te shounenn kova, ma trashenn! Kova hounte vell yaake. Ko tsiro, kay i phoub paash djala, vell gar yaake sik." 
Mark13:8 I pralstoune pral bare themma kourenn pen i vavar pralstunentsa. Oun i menshe dran yek them marenn i menshen an i vavar them. Oun kate oun kote vell i phoub trisslemen. Boud menshen hi gar doha te rhal. Kova lauter vella yaake pral i phoub, har i douka venna pral i djouvyate, kay lell i ternepen." 
Mark13:9 Denn yak ap t'mende! T'mer venn glan i čačepangre anlo, oun rhan dava an i biboldengre kangria. T'mer patsenn ap mande. Doleske anenn le t'men glan i pralstoune oun glan i bare rayende, te rakrenn yon i phagi vin pral t'mende. Te han glan lende tardo, palle nay rakrenn t'mer mandar, te shounenn yon pral mande o čačepen." 
Mark13:10 Glan ko tsiro, kay i phoub paash djala, hounte vell o lačo lab mandar penlo an i tsele themma." 
Mark13:11 Te taprenn le t'men, te anenn le t'men glan i čačepangre, ma darenn, hoy hounte penenna! Ap ko dives, kay han glan lende tardo, sikrell o Devel t'men, hoy te penenn lenge. Kova rakrenna! Ma bistrenn, t'mer han gar kolla, kay rakrenna. Kova hi o Debleskro Dourho, kay dran t'mende rakrella." 
Mark13:12 An kol divessa phoukrell o phraal ap peskro phraleste, te vell yob maredo. Oun ninna o dad krell kova peskro čaveha. Oun i čave hadenn pen pral pengre dadende oun pral pengre dayende, oun denn len an i vasta kolendar, kay marenn len." 
Mark13:13 T'mer patsenn ap mande. Doleske venn i tsele menshe rhoyedo ap t'mende. Kova, kay ačell zoreles tardo an o patsepen, yaake rah, har yob djivella, kova lell o Debleskro djipen." 
Mark13:14 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo pral koy djoungeli čilači figura. Koon kava draverella, kamaus, te hayvell lo les ninna. Ap ko dives, kay dikenn t'mer koy djoungeli čilači figura kote tardo, kay hounte vell li gar tardo, palle hounte nashenn kolla, kay hi an o them Youdea, sik ap i berge!" 
Mark13:15 Kova, kay hi pral ap o kheer, hounte djal bouder gar an peskro kheer dren, te lell lo peske čomone." 
Mark13:16 Oun kova, kay boudrell ap i kotar phoub, kova hounte djal bouder gar khere, te lell lo peskri baya." 
Mark13:17 Koy bibarht hi bari kol djouvyenge, kay hi an vavar koova, ninna kol djouvyenge, kay hi len i ternepen." 
Mark13:18 Mangenn o Deblestar, te vell kova lauter gar an o vend." 
Mark13:19 Kova, hoy an kol divessa pral i menshende vella, hi djoungleder har ko tselo čilačo koova, hoy ap i menshende vas yaake rah, har o Devel i phoub kras. Oun ko tsiro, hoy vell pal kova, vell vitar gar yaake čilačo." 
Mark13:20 Te krals o Devel ko čilačo tsiro gar tikneder, vals kek mensho dran o čilačo tsiro vin. Kolen, kay o Devel peske vin rodas, kolenge kras lo o čilačo tsiro tikneder." 
Mark13:21 Te penell yek ap t'mende: Dikenn, kate hi o Kristo! – palle patsenn les gar! Oun te penell i vavar: Ake, kote hi lo! – palle patsenn les vitar gar!" 
Mark13:22 Rhorhene morsha venna oun penenna ap t'mende: Me hom o Kristo. Oun i rhorhene rakepangre penenna: Me vom o Deblestar bičedo. Oun yon krenna baro oun zorelo koova, hoy i mensho nashte krell gar dran peskri zoor. Te djals kova, anans le kolen o Debleskro dromestar tele, kolen o Devel peske vin rodas." 
Mark13:23 Denn yak ap t'mende! Me penom t'menge kova lauter, te djinenn les ap ko tsiro, kay kova vella." 
Mark13:24 An kol divessa pal ko čilačo tsiro, vell o kham kalo har i rat, oun o moonto dikell kek bouder." 
Mark13:25 Oun i bare momlia ap o bolepen perenn tele. Oun o bolepaskri zoor perell khetne. 
Mark13:26 Palle dikenn le o Menshengro Čaves, har vell lo an i volke bari zoryah oun raylepen." 
Mark13:27 Palle bičrell lo i bolepangren pral i tseli phoub, te anenn le dran hako them kolen khetne, kay len o Devel peske vin rodas." 
Mark13:28 Me kamau te sikrap t'mende čomone. Dikenn ap o faygetikro rouk! Te venn leskre kashta zenelo, oun i patria venn dran lende vin, palle djinenn t'mer, te vell sik o niyal." 
Mark13:29 Yaake hi kova ninna koleha, pral kova rakrom. Te dikenn t'mer, har kova lauter vella, palle djinenn t'mer, kay yob glan o voudar tardo hi." 
Mark13:30 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kol menshe, kay an ko tsiro djivenna, dikenna kova lauter pengre yakentsa." 
Mark13:31 O bolepen oun i phoub ačenna gar. Mire laba ačenna hako tsiro. 
Mark13:32 Kek djinell ko dives oun ko tsiro, kay kova lauter vella. I bolepangre an o bolepen djinenn les gar, vitar gar o Debleskro čavo. Miro dad an o bolepen kokres djinell les." 
Mark13:33 Denn yak! Rikrenn t'mare yaka pre! T'mer djinenn gar, kaana hi ko tsiro kay." 
Mark13:34 Kova hi yaake har pash i morsheste, kay djas ap o them. Yob moukas peskro kheer oun das peskre boudepangren lauter an o vast, hakeneste das lo leskri boudi. Oun penas ap koleste, kay pash o voudar beshdo hi: De garda ap miro kheer! Ma sob!" 
Mark13:35 Yaake penau t'menge: Rikrenn t'mare yaka pre! T'mer djinenn gar o tsiro, kay o ray pral o kheer pale vella. Yob nay vell ap i rati, nay vell mashkral an i rati, nay vell ap ko tsiro, kay dell o bashno gole, nay vell taysarlake." 
Mark13:36 Yaake denn garda, te hatsell lo t'men gar ap o sopen, te vell lo ap yek kopo." 
Mark13:37 Kova, hoy me t'menge penaua, ko penau lauterenge: Denn yak oun sovenn gar!" 
Mark14:1 His douy divessa glan kol bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa oun glan kol divessa, kay rhan i bibolde kek shoutlo maro. Oun kol bare rashaya oun kol biboldengre čačepangre rodan i lačo tsiro, te taprenn le o Yezouses čorrhanes, te marenn le les." 
Mark14:2 Yon penan mashkral pende: “Mer taprah les gar ap o Passa, te venn i menshe gar divyo oun rhoyedo ap mende.”" 
Mark14:3 Oun o Yezous his an o gab Betani, an o Simoneskro kheer. Kova hi ko Simon, kay his les i djoungelo nasslepen ap peskro mass. Har o Yezous kote rhas, vas i djouvel pash leste. Kolat his i toushni an o vast. Koy his djoudjo oun kouč djet dren, kerdo dran ko kasht, hoy kharella Narde. Oun yoy phagas koy toushni pre, oun čoras ko djet ap leskro shero, te makell li les dren." 
Mark14:4 Mank kolende, kay koy pashel his, his save, kay rhoyran pen oun penan mashkral pende: “Hoske čoras li ko djet čičeske vin?" 
Mark14:5 Te bikrams ko djet, lams boudeder har triin-sheel roupene beme. Oun kol love nay dams mer i čorvelende.” Oun yon čingran ap late." 
Mark14:6 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Moukenn lat! Hoske čingrenn t'mer ap late? Hoy yoy mange kras, his mishto." 
Mark14:7 I čorvele hi hako tsiro pash t'mende. Oun te kamenn t'mer, nay krenn t'mer lenge lačo koova. Me hom gar hako tsiro pash t'mende." 
Mark14:8 Koya kras, hoy nay kras li, oun makas man kanna dren ko diveske, kay vau paskedo." 
Mark14:9 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ap i tseli phoub, kay penenn le o lačo lab mandar i menshenge, koy vell ninna penlo, hoy koy djouvel mange kras. Yoy vella gar bistedo.”" 
Mark14:10 O Youdas Iskariot, yek kol deesh-te-douyendar, djas pash kol bare rashayende, te phoukrell lo ap o Yezouseste." 
Mark14:11 Har yon kova shounan, his le barhtelo, oun penan: “Mer dah tout love!” Oun yob rodas i lačo tsiro, te dell lo les an lengre vasta." 
Mark14:12 His yek dives glan kol divessa, kay rhan i bibolde o maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Ap ko dives marenn le i bakren, te rhan le len ap ko baro dives Passa. Koy penan o Yezouseskre mala ap leste: “Kay djas mer, te kras o rhapen touke?”" 
Mark14:13 Oun yob bičras douy peskre malendar oun penas ap lende: “Djan an o foro. Koy dikenn t'mer i morshes, ko hidjrell i khoro pani. Djan leske palla!" 
Mark14:14 An ko kheer, kay yob dren djal, penenn o rayeske an ko kheer: Maro sikepaskro poučell toutar: Kay hi koy isema, kay nay rhau me o bakro mire malentsa?" 
Mark14:15 Oun yob sikrell t'mende i bari isema pral an ko kheer. Kote hi beshepangre oun lauter hoy men hounte vell. Kote krenn menge o rhapen!” 
Mark14:16 Oun kol mala djan koy, oun van an ko foro oun hatsan kova yaake, har yob lenge penas. Oun yon kran o rhapen." 
Mark14:17 Oun ap i rati vas yob kol deesh-te-douyentsa. 
Mark14:18 Oun har yon pash i rhapaskri beshdo his oun rhan, penas o Yezous: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Yek t'mendar, kay rhal mantsa, kova phoukrella ap mande.”" 
Mark14:19 Ko doukas len. Oun yon poučan lestar, yek pal o vavar: “Hom me kova?”" 
Mark14:20 Koy penas yob ap lende: “Kova hi yek kol deesh-te-douyendar, kay čivell peskro kotar maro mantsa an yek čaro." 
Mark14:21 O Mensheskro Čavo hounte merella yaake, har hi lestar činlo an o Debleskro lab. Havi bibarht vell ap koleste, kay ap leste phoukrella! Koleske vals feteder, te vals lo gar boldo.”" 
Mark14:22 Har yon rhan, las o Yezous o maro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, phagas ko maro, das les peskre malende, oun penas: “Lenn ko maro oun rhan les! Kava maro hi miro mass!”" 
Mark14:23 Palle las lo o khoro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, das len o khoro, oun yon piyan halauter lestar." 
Mark14:24 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Kay mool hi miro rat, hoy me ratau boudenge. Yaake krau i drom, kay o Devel oun i menshe mala venna." 
Mark14:25 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Me piyau bouder gar i mool, bis te vell ko dives, kay hi o Devel o ray pral halauter. Palle piyau nevi mool pash leste an o bolepen.”" 
Mark14:26 Palle givan le o Debleske i gili, oun djan vin pash o djeteskri berga." 
Mark14:27 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “T'mer halauter moukenn man. Hi činlo an o Debleskro lab: O Devel penas: Me dau o bakrengro rayes. Oun i bakre nashenn penge. 
Mark14:28 Pal kova krell o Devel man i moulendar djido. Oun te djan t'mer an o them Galilea, palle djau glan t'mende.”" 
Mark14:29 O Petro penas ap leste: “Ninna te nashenn halauter toutar krik, me moukau tout gar.”" 
Mark14:30 Penell o Yezous ap leste: “Čačepah, me penau touke: Kay rati dell o bashno gar o douyto kopo gole yaake rah, har tou gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.”" 
Mark14:31 Penell o Petro zoreles: “Ninna te hounte meroms touha, doms tout gar bourhoste.” Ninna kol tsele vavar penan kova." 
Mark14:32 Oun yon van an i baar, koy kharas Getsemani. Oun o Yezous penas ap peskre malende: “Beshenn t'men kate yaake rah, har rakrau o Debleha.”" 
Mark14:33 Oun yob las o Petres peha, ninna o Yakobes oun o Yohannes. Oun i bari daar vas ap leste, oun yob trissas." 
Mark14:34 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Miro dji rovella oun doukell, har te merap. Ačenn kate oun sovenn gar!”" 
Mark14:35 Oun yob djas i kotar drom doureder, vitsras pes ap i phoub oun mangas o Debles, te vell ko pharo tsiro gar ap leste." 
Mark14:36 Oun o Yezous mangas o Debles: “Tata, halauter nay kreh tou. Mouk, te venn kol douka gar ap mande! Ninna te mangau tout kova, ma kre, hoy me kamau! Kre yaake, har tou kameh!”" 
Mark14:37 Oun yob djas pale pash peskre malende oun dikas, har sovan le, oun penas ap o Petreste: “Simon, soveh tou? Nay rikreh tou gar tire yaka i tikno tsiro pre?" 
Mark14:38 Ma sovenn dren! Mangenn o Deblestar, te perenn gar miro dromestar tele! T'men kokres hi kek zoor, te ačenn pash mande, ninna te kamell kova t'maro dji.”" 
Mark14:39 Oun yob djas pale koy, mangas o Debles oun penas kol emlige laba." 
Mark14:40 Palle djas lo pale pash lende oun dikas, te sovenn le. Yon rikran nay lengre yaka gar pre. Oun yon djinan gar, hoy te penenn le ap leste." 
Mark14:41 Oun yob vas o triinto kopo oun penas ap lende: “Kamenn t'mer doureder sovell oun kate čiddo ačell? Kanna hi doha! O tsiro hi kay, kay denn le o Menshengro Čaves an i vasta i čilače menshendar." 
Mark14:42 Stenn pre! Djas menge! Dikenn, ko phoukepaskro vella.”" 
Mark14:43 Oun har yob yaake rakras, vas o Youdas, ko yek kol deesh-te-douyendar. Pash leste his boud vavar morsha. Len his rhare oun kashta an i vasta. Kolen bičran i bare rashaya, oun i biboldengre čačepangre oun phoureder." 
Mark14:44 O Youdas, ko phoukepaskro, kras lentsa vin: “Koles, kay čoumrau, kova hi lo. Koles taprenn, anenn les krik oun denn garda ap leste!”" 
Mark14:45 Oun o Youdas vas pash leste, oun penas: “Mo ray!” oun čoumras les." 
Mark14:46 Oun kolla tapran les, oun rikran les." 
Mark14:47 Oun yek kolendar, kay koy pashel tardo hi, las peskro rharo, oun das yek klisteske o kand tele. Kova his i klisto, kay boudrell o baro rashayeske." 
Mark14:48 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “T'mer van i rharentsa oun i kashtentsa pash mande, har te voms i marepaskro." 
Mark14:49 Hako dives homs pash t'mende an o Debleskro baro kheer oun sikrom i menshende o Debleskro drom. Oun t'mer tapran man gar. Kava koova vell yaake, te vell čačo, hoy o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro an pengre lila činan.”" 
Mark14:50 Har peskre mala kova shounan, moukan le les lauter oun nashan penge." 
Mark14:51 I terno morsh djas o Yezouseske palla. Koles his kokres i layntikro kotar troul peste. Oun yon tapran pal leste. 
Mark14:52 Koy moukas lo ko layntikro kotar an lengre vasta, oun nashas nanges lendar." 
Mark14:53 Oun yon anan o Yezouses pash o baro rashayeste. Oun i tsele bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder oun čačepangre van khetne. 
Mark14:54 Dour pal leste djas o Petro leske palla, oun vas glan o shoukar kheer o baro rashayestar. Oun yob djas an o baro voudar dren oun beshas pes pash i lourdende pash i yag oun tatsras pes." 
Mark14:55 Oun i bare rashaya oun i tsele pralstoune bibolde rodan čomone, hoy anenn le nay ap o Yezouseste, te nay marenn le les. Oun yon hatsan či." 
Mark14:56 Boud anan ap leste rhorhepen pre. Oun har yek rakras yaake oun o vavar yaake, rakran le gar dran yek mouy." 
Mark14:57 Palle stan morsha pre oun anan rhorhepen ap leste pre oun penan: 
Mark14:58 “Mer shounam, har yob penas: Me phagau kava Debleskro baro kheer tele, hoy i menshe pengre vastentsa kran. Oun an triin divessa krau i vavar Debleskro baro kheer, hoy kek menshe pengre vastentsa kran.”" 
Mark14:59 Ninna kova, hoy kolla penan, rakran le gar dran yek mouy." 
Mark14:60 Oun o baro rashay stas pre, djas mashkral lende, oun poučas o Yezousestar: “Peneh tou či ap kova, hoy yon ap toute pre anan?”" 
Mark14:61 Oun o Yezous penas či. Pale poučas o baro rashay lestar: “Hal tou ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob? Hal tou o čavo o baro Deblestar?”" 
Mark14:62 “Me hom kova,” penas o Yezous, “oun ko dives vella, kay dikenn t'mer o Menshengro Čaves, har hi lo beshdo ap i čači rig o zorelo Deblestar, oun har vell lo an i volke dran o bolepen.”" 
Mark14:63 Koy kras o baro rashay peskre koola paash, te sikrell lo peskri rholi, oun penas ap i vavar pralstunende: “Kek hounte penell menge boudeder." 
Mark14:64 T'mer shounan: Yob krell pes har o Devel. Hoy kamenn t'mer leha te krell?” Oun yon penan halauter: “Yob hounte vell maredo!” 
Mark14:65 Koy van morsha oun čoungran leske an o mouy, pandan leske čomone troul leskre yaka, dan les oun penan ap leste: “Pen menge, koon das tout?” Oun i lourde dan les an o mouy." 
Mark14:66 O Petro his glan o kheer beshdo. Koy vas i boudepaskretsa o baro rashayestar. 
Mark14:67 Oun har dikas li o Petres, har tatsras pes lo pash i yag, dikas li ap leste, oun penas: “Tou hals ninna o Yezouseha dran Nazaret khetne!”" 
Mark14:68 Oun o Petro penas: “Na-a, kova hi gar čačo! Me djinau gar oun hayvau gar, hoy tou peneh!” Oun yob djas vin pash o baro voudar glan ko kheer. Oun o bashno das gole." 
Mark14:69 Oun koy boudepaskretsa dikas les, oun penas pale ap kolende, kay koy pashel tardo his: “Kava hi yek kolendar!”" 
Mark14:70 Oun yob penas pale: “Na-a, me hom kek lendar!” Pal i tikno tsiro penan kolla, kay kote tardo hi, pale ap o Petreste: “Čačepah, tou hal ninna yek kolendar. Tou hal dran o them Galilea.”" 
Mark14:71 Koy čingras lo, das pes sovel, oun penas ap lende: “Me prindjrau ko morshes gar, kolestar rakrenna!”" 
Mark14:72 Oun sik koy pre das o bashno o douyto kopo gole. Oun o Petreske van o Yezouseskre laba an o shero, hoy yob leske penas: “O bashno dell gar o douyto kopo gole yaake rah, har tou gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.” Kova djas an leskro dji, oun yob rovas." 
Mark15:1 Sik taysarlake van i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder oun čačepangre khetne i tsele pralstoune biboldentsa. Oun yon rakran khetne, hoy te krenn le o Yezouseha. Oun yon pandan les, anan les pash o Pilateste oun dan les an leskre vasta." 
Mark15:2 Oun o Pilato poučas lestar: “Hal tou o baro ray pral i biboldende?” Penas yob ap leste: “Ava, hi yaake, har tou penal.”" 
Mark15:3 Oun kol bare rashaya anan boud doosh ap leste pre. 
Mark15:4 Oun o Pilato poučas lestar pale: “Hoske peneh tou či? Shoun, har boud doosh anenn le ap toute pre!”" 
Mark15:5 O Yezous penas bouder či, yaake te kras o Pilato bare yaka." 
Mark15:6 Ap ko tsiro his yaake, te moukas o Pilato hako bersh ap kol divessa, kay kharenna Passa, yekes dran o stilepen vin. Koles nay rodan i bibolde vin." 
Mark15:7 Koy his yek, ko kharas Barabas. Kova his stildo kolentsa, kay kran i baro čingepen, kay van i menshe divyo. Koy pashel maran le yekes." 
Mark15:8 Oun i bibolde djan pash o Pilateste, oun mangan lestar, te krell lo yaake, har yob ap hako Passa krella." 
Mark15:9 Oun o Pilato poučas lendar: “Kamenn t'mer, te moukap o rayes pral i biboldende vin?”" 
Mark15:10 O Pilato djinas, te zilverenn i bare rashaya ap o Yezouseste. Oun doleske dan le les an leskre vasta." 
Mark15:11 Koy kran kol bare rashaya i menshen divyo, te penenn le o Pilateske: “Mer kamah feteder, te moukess o Barabes vin!”" 
Mark15:12 O Pilato poučas pale lendar: “Hoy kamenn t'mer, te krap me koleha, koles t'mer kharenna Baro ray pral i biboldende?”" 
Mark15:13 Oun yon dan pale gole: “De les ap o troushel!” 
Mark15:14 Koy poučas o Pilato lendar: “Havo čilačo koova kras yob?” Koy dan le zorleder gole: “De les ap o troushel!” 
Mark15:15 O Pilato kamas kova te krell, hoy kol boud menshe lestar kaman oun moukas o Barabes dran o stilepen vin. Oun o Yezouses moukas lo i čoupniyah dava te dell, oun das les an i lourdengre vasta, te denn le les ap o troushel." 
Mark15:16 Kol lourde anan les an o baro kheer o themeskro rayestar, oun dan i tsele lourden khetne gole." 
Mark15:17 Oun yon čivan leske i loli rayeskri plaashka trouyel, pandan soubyengre kashta khetne, oun čivan len ap leskro shero, yaake har i baro ray hidjrell shereskro sonakay ap leskro shero." 
Mark15:18 Oun yon penan ap leste: “Mer sharah tout, tou baro ray pral i biboldende!”" 
Mark15:19 Oun yon dan les i kashteha ap o shero, čoungran ap leste, oun moukan pen glan leste ap i phoub te perell, oun kran yaake, har te mangans le i baro rayes an." 
Mark15:20 Oun har yon san pral leste, rivan le leske koy loli plaashka pale vin, oun rivan leske leskre koola pale an. Oun yon anan les vin, te denn le les ap o troushel." 
Mark15:21 Ap o drom tapran le i morshes i zoryah, te hidjrell lo o Yezouseskro troushel. Leskro lab hi Simon, oun yob his dran ko foro Kirene. Leskre čave hi o Alexandro oun o Rufo. O Simon boudras vin ap i kotar phoub oun his ap o drom pale." 
Mark15:22 Oun yon anan o Yezouses ap ko kotar them, hoy kharell an o biboldengro rakepen Golgata, ko kharella Mouleskro Shero." 
Mark15:23 Oun yon dan les mool te piyell. An koy mool his i drab dren, ko kharell myrrhe. Oun yob piyas gar." 
Mark15:24 Oun yon dan les ap o troushel. Oun palle khelan le pral leskre koola, te dikenn le, hoy hakeno lella." 
Mark15:25 His taysarlake enyenge, kay dan le les ap o troushel." 
Mark15:26 Oun pral leste ap i kasht his činlo, hoske yob hounte meras. Koy pre his činlo: O baro ray pral i biboldende." 
Mark15:27 Khetne leha dan le douy marepangren ap o troushel. Ko yekeskro troushel his čačes lestar, ko vavareskro troushel his serves lestar." 
Mark15:28  
Mark15:29 Oun kolla, kay kote pashel van, sikran i goushteha ap leste, oun praasan les, oun penan: “Tou kamal o Debleskro baro kheer tele te phagell, oun an triin divessa pale pre te čivell." 
Mark15:30 Kanna, kre touke, hoy i vavarenge kral, oun ab o troushelestar tele!”" 
Mark15:31 Ninna kol bare rashaya oun kol biboldengre čačepangre san pral leste, oun yon penan yek ap o vavareste: “Vavaren las yob dran o merepen vin. Pes kokres nay lell lo gar dran o merepen vin." 
Mark15:32 Te hi lo ko baro ray, koles o Devel bičras, ko baro ray pral o Israel, palle nay djals yob o troushelestar tele, te dikas mer kova oun te nay patsas ap leste.” Oun kolla douy, kay van langs leste ap pengro troushel dino, praasan les ninna." 
Mark15:33 His deesh-te-douyenge, koy vas o dives kalo har i rati an o tselo them. Oun kova ačas yaake bis pash trinenge." 
Mark15:34 Oun har trinenge his, das o Yezous bari gole: Eloy, Eloy, lema sabaktani? Kova kharella: Miro Devel, miro Devel, hoske moukal man tou?" 
Mark15:35 Oun kolendar, kay kote tardo his oun kova shounan, penan: “Shounenn, kava dell ap o Eliya gole.”" 
Mark15:36 Oun yek nashas, las čomone har i kotar than, kras les pherdo shoutli mool, čivas les ap i kasht, oun das les o Yezouseste te piyell, oun penas: “Mouk les, dikas, te vell o Eliya, oun lell les tele!”" 
Mark15:37 Oun o Yezous das bari gole, oun meras." 
Mark15:38 Oun ko voudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, hoy his kerdo dran kouč pesso than, kova djas paash an douy kotya foun pral bis tele." 
Mark15:39 Ko pralstouno lourdo, kay glan o Yezouseste tardo his, dikas, har o Yezous meras. Oun yob penas: “Čačepah, kava morsh his o Debleskro čavo!”" 
Mark15:40 His ninna djouvya i kotar krik tardo, kay dikan kova lauter. Mashkral lende his i Maria dran o gab Magdala, i Salome oun i Maria, kolakre čave o tikno Yakobo oun o Yoses hi." 
Mark15:41 Kolla his leha, har yob an o them Galilea his, oun dan leske rhapen oun pipen. Oun boud vavar djouvya his koy, kolla, kay leha khetne an o foro Yerusalem djan." 
Mark15:42 Har i rati vas glan o Debleskro dives," 
Mark15:43 vas o Yosef. Kova his dran o foro Arimatia, oun his yek kol pralstoune biboldendar, kolen penepaske his. Oun yob dikas ninna ap o Debleste, te vell ko tsiro, kay hakeno dikell, kay o Devel o baro ray hi. O Yosef las pes khetne, djas pash o Pilateste, oun mangas lestar, te dell lo les o moulo Yezouses." 
Mark15:44 O Pilato kras bare yaka, har yob shounas, kay o Yezous yaake sik meras. Yob das ko pralstouno lourdes gole oun poučas lestar, har rah yob moulo hi." 
Mark15:45 Oun har yob kova o pralstouno lourdestar shounas, penas lo o Yosefeske, te nay lell lo o moulo Yezouses." 
Mark15:46 O Yosef ginas i plarhta, las o Yezouses o troushelestar tele, čivas les an koy plarhta, oun paskras les an i moulengro kheer, hoy his dren dino an i baro bar. Kote glan čivas lo i baro bar." 
Mark15:47 I Maria dran o gab Magdala oun i Maria, koy day o Yosestar, dikan, kay o Yezous čiddo vas." 
Mark16:1 Har o Debleskro dives trouyel his, djan i Maria dran Magdala oun i Maria, koy day o Yakobestar, oun i Salome oun ginan djet, hoy soungella mishto, te makenn le les dren." 
Mark16:2 Sik taysarlake pal o Debleskro dives djan yon pash o moulengro kheer, har o kham pre djas." 
Mark16:3 Oun yon rakran mashkral pende: “Koon lell menge ko bar krik, hoy glan o moulengro kheer tardo hi?”" 
Mark16:4 Kova his i baro bar. Oun har yon pash ko moulengro kheer van, dikan le, kay ko bar krik lino vas." 
Mark16:5 Oun yon djan an o moulengro kheer dren. Kote dikan le i terno morshes ap i čači rig beshdo, koles his troul peste i lengsto biyalo ripen. Oun yon trashan." 
Mark16:6 Yob penas ap lende: “Ma trashenn! T'mer rodenn o Yezouses dran Nazaret, kay vas ap o troushel dino. Yob stas i moulendar pre. Yob hi gar kate. Dikenn kote, kay yob čiddo his." 
Mark16:7 Kanna djan pash leskre malende! Penenn lenge oun o Petreske, kay djal yob glan t'mende an o them Galilea! Kote dikenn t'mer les, har yob les t'menge penas.”" 
Mark16:8 Oun yon djan dran ko moulengro kheer vin, oun nashan penge. Yon trissan i trashatar oun penan kekeske čomone, yaake baro his lengri daar." 
Mark16:9 Har o Yezous i moulendar pre stas, sik taysarlake pal o Debleskro dives, his i Maria dran Magdala koy ersti, kolatar moukas lo pes te dikell. Yoy hi koya, kolatar yob glan i tsiro efta bengen vin tradas." 
Mark16:10 Oun yoy djas pash kolende, kay djan o Yezouseha, oun kolengro dji kanna doukas, oun kay rovan pral leste. Oun yoy penas lenge, te dikas li les." 
Mark16:11 Oun har yon shounan, kay yob djivella, oun kay dikas li les, patsan le kova gar." 
Mark16:12 Pal kova moukas yob pes douy vavar peskre malendar te dikell, kay his ap o drom glan o foro. Pash lende dikas lo vavarčandes vin har yon les prindjran." 
Mark16:13 Oun kolla douy djan pale, oun penan les kol vavar malenge. Kolen patsan le vitar gar." 
Mark16:14 Koy pre, har kol deesh-te-yek pash o rhapen beshdo his, moukas lo pes lendar te dikell oun čingras ap lende, kay hi lengre djia har barra, oun te patsan le gar kolenge, kay les dikan, har yob i moulendar pre stas." 
Mark16:15 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Djan pash i tsele menshende ap i phoub oun sikrenn hakeneste miro drom!” 
Mark16:16 “Koon patsell ap mande oun vell taufedo, kova djal gar nashedo. Koon gar ap mande patsella, kova djal nashedo!" 
Mark16:17 Kolla, kay patsenn ap mande, krenn baro koova an o Debleskri zoor. An miro lab tradenn le bengen i menshendar vin, oun rakrenn an vavar rakepen." 
Mark16:18 Yon te lenn sapa an pengre vasta, oun te piyenn le i pipen, kay nay merenn le, palle venn le gar nasselo. Ap i nasslende čivenn le i vasta pre. Oun kolla venn sasto.”" 
Mark16:19 Har o ray Yezous yaake lentsa rakras, vas lo pral an o bolepen hadedo, oun beshas pes ap o Debleskri čači rig." 
Mark16:20 Oun yon djan, te penenn le i menshenge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar an hake gaba oun forya. Oun o ray Yezous his pash lende peskri zoryah, oun kras baro koova, kay nay krell kek mensho. Oun yaake dikan i menshe, kay leskro lab čačo hi." 
Luke1:1 Lačo Theofilo, boud menshe činan an i liil, hoy o Devel mashkral mende kras." 
Luke1:2 Yon činan pre, hoy kolla penan, kay kote pashel his oun kova lauter dikan." 
Luke1:3 Oun me ninna poučom i menshendar har kova lauter his, te djinap kova lauter mishto. Doleske kamau touke kova yaake pre te činell, har kova čačepah his." 
Luke1:4 Yaake hayveh tou, kay lauter čačo hi, hoy penan le touke." 
Luke1:5 Ap kava tsiro, kay o Herodes o baro ray pral o them Youdea his, djivas i rashay. Kova his yek kol rashayendar, kay kharan pen pal o rashay Abia. Leskro lab his Zakari. Oun leskri romni kharas Elisabet. Yoy hi o Aroneskre menshendar" 
Luke1:6 O Zakari oun i Elisabet his lačo an o Debleskre yaka. Oun yon shounan ap o Debleste, oun kran lauter, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo his." 
Luke1:7 Len his kek čave. Yoy nay las kek. Oun yon douy his phouro. 
Luke1:8 His i tsiro, kay boudran kol rashaya an o Debleskro baro kheer, kolendar o Zakari yek his. Oun har pash lende yaake hi, rodan le les vin, te djal yob an o Debleskro baro kheer, te rhačrell lo kasht o Debleske, hoy shoukar soungella." 
Luke1:9  
Luke1:10 Oun ap ko tsiro, har rhačras yob ko kasht, hoy shoukar soungella, his boud menshe vin tardo, oun mangan o Debles an." 
Luke1:11 Ap yek kopo his o Debleskro bolepaskro tardo ap i čači rig pash o Debleskro sonakaskro bob, kay o Zakari o kasht rhačrell." 
Luke1:12 Har o Zakari les dikas, las lo traash lestar." 
Luke1:13 Koy penas o bolepaskro ap leste: “Ma traash, Zakari! O Devel shounas tout, har tou mangal lestar, te vell t'men i ternepen. Tiri romni Elisabet lella i morsh čaves. Oun koles dess tou ko lab Yohanni." 
Luke1:14 Oun tiro dji stella i barhtyatar. Oun boud menshe venna barhteles pral ko ternepen. 
Luke1:15 Oun yob vella bares glan o Debleskre yaka. Mool oun vavar zorelo pipen piyell yob gar. Oun har yob gomme gar boldo hi, hi lo pherdo Debleskro Dourho." 
Luke1:16 Oun yob anell boud menshen an Israel pash o Debleste. 
Luke1:17 Oun yob hi pherdo Debleskri zoor yaake har o Eliya, oun yob krell i drom pre o Debleske. Oun yob krella, te lenn i dada pale i dji pengre čavenge. Oun kolla, kay shounan gar ap o Debleste, kolen anell yob pale ap o čačo drom. Oun yaake krell lo, te hi i menshen djia, kay pre hi lengro Debleske.”" 
Luke1:18 O Zakari penas ap o bolepaskro: “Har nay djinau me, kay tiro čačo hi? Me hom i phouro morsh. Oun miri romni hi ninna phouro.”" 
Luke1:19 O bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Me hom o Gabriel, oun me hom glan o Debleste tardo. O Devel bičras man pash toute, te penap touke kova." 
Luke1:20 Ap o čačo tsiro vell kova yaake, har touke penom. Tou patsal mire laba gar, oun doleske lell o Devel tiro rakepen yaake rah krik, bis te vell ko dives, kay kova lauter vella.”" 
Luke1:21 Oun i menshe dikan ap o voudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun djinan gar, hoske o Zakari yaake rah an o Debleskro baro kheer ačella." 
Luke1:22 Oun har yob kote vin vas, nay rakras lo bouder gar. Yob hadas peskro vast, te sikrell lo lende, te nay rakrell yob bouder gar. Koy pre dikan i menshe, kay o Devel rakras leha an o Debleskro baro kheer." 
Luke1:23 Oun har kol divessa trouyel djan, kay yob an o Debleskro baro kheer boudras, djas lo khere." 
Luke1:24 Oun palle vas leskri romni Elisabet an vavar koova, oun khatras pes panč čon glan i menshengre yaka. Oun yoy penas:" 
Luke1:25 “O Devel dikas lačes ap mande oun kras, te vell man i ternepen ap ko tsiro, har yob kamas, oun las miri ladj mandar krik.”" 
Luke1:26 Ap ko tsiro har i Elisabet o shobto čon an vavar koova his, bičras o Devel o bolepaskres, o Gabriyeles, pash i terni čate. Lakro lab his Maria. Yoy djivas an o foro Nazaret. Kova hi i foro an o them Galilea. Oun kolakro pirno kharas Yosef. O Yosef his o Davideskre menshendar." 
Luke1:27  
Luke1:28 Oun o Gabriel vas pash late an o kheer oun penas: “Lačo dives, Maria! O Devel hi touha! Yob dikas lačes ap toute.”" 
Luke1:29 Yoy tapras i daar, har yob yaake rakras, oun penas peske: “Hoy penell yob koy?”" 
Luke1:30 Oun o bolepaskro penas ap late: “Ma traash, Maria! O Devel hi touke lačo." 
Luke1:31 Shoun, tou veh an vavar koova, oun leh i čaves. Koles dess tou o lab Yezous." 
Luke1:32 Kova vell i baro ray. Yob vell kharedo Debleskro čavo. Oun o Devel krell lestar i baro ray pral Israel, yaake har yek leskre phourendar, o David, o baro ray his." 
Luke1:33 Oun yob ačell baro ray pral o Yakobeskre menshende hako tsiro. Oun les hi penepaske pral lauter oun hakeneste. Kova ačell yaake hako tsireske.” 
Luke1:34 Koy penas i Maria ap o bolepaskro: “Har djal kova? Man hi kek morsh.” 
Luke1:35 O bolepaskro penas ap late: “O Debleskro Dourho oun leskri zoor vell pral toute. Doleske vell o ternepen o Deblestar oun vell Debleskro čavo kharedo. 
Luke1:36 Shoun, i Elisabet, kay tire menshendar hi, hi an vavar koova an o shobto čon. Yoy hi phouri oun latar vell penlo, kay lell li nay kek čave." 
Luke1:37 O Devel nay krell halauter.” 
Luke1:38 Koy penas i Maria: “Me kamau o Debleske koy te vell. Lauter te vell yaake, har tou penal.” Koy djas yob peske." 
Luke1:39 Pal i tikno tsiro djas i Maria yaake sik har djala an i foro an o pralstouno them Youdea. 
Luke1:40 Oun yoy djas an o Zakareskro kheer, oun penas: “Lačo dives, Elisabet!”" 
Luke1:41 Har i Elisabet kova shounas, stas o ternepen an late. Oun i Elisabet vas pherdo Debleskro Dourho," 
Luke1:42 oun das bares gole: “Sharedi veh tou mashkral i tsele djouvyende, oun sharedo vell o ternepen an toute!" 
Luke1:43 Har djal kova, te vell koy day miro rayestar pash mande?" 
Luke1:44 Har me tout shounom, stas o ternepen i barhtyatar an mande." 
Luke1:45 Barhteli hal tou! Tou patsal, te vell kova yaake, hoy o Devel touke penas.”" 
Luke1:46 Oun i Maria penas: “Me sharau mo Debles. 
Luke1:47 Oun miro dji dell gole i barhtyatar pral mo Debleste. Yob hi ap miri rig. 
Luke1:48 Me hom gar moldo, te dikas o Devel yaake lačes ap mande. Oun kanna sharenn man i tsele menshe. Oun lengre čave penenna mandar, kay o Devel man barhteles kras." 
Luke1:49 Baro koova kras yob ap mande. Les hi i tseli zoor, oun leskro lab hi bareder har hako vavar lab." 
Luke1:50 Yob kras peskro dji pre kol phourenge oun kolengre čavenge, lauterenge, kay shounenn ap leste, oun darenn lestar." 
Luke1:51 Oun yob hadas peskri zoreli moussi, oun tradas kolen krik, kay kran pen kokres bares." 
Luke1:52 Yob las i zoor i bare rayendar krik, te vell len bouder či penepaske, oun hadas i tiknen, te venn le baro." 
Luke1:53 Kolen, kay bok his, das yob te rhal. Oun kol bravelen bičras lo krik. Oun yon nay lan či peha." 
Luke1:54 Oun yob bistras gar peskro boudepaskres, o Israel, oun kras peskro dji leske pre," 
Luke1:55 yaake har penas lo mare phourenge, o Abrahameske oun leskre čavenge, te vell lo lenge lačo hako tsireske.”" 
Luke1:56 I Maria ačas triin čon pash i Elisabet. Oun palle djas li khere. 
Luke1:57 Oun ko tsiro vas, kay las i Elisabet i ternepen. Oun kova his i čavo." 
Luke1:58 Lakre menshe oun kolla, kay djivan troul late, shounan kova, oun van barhteles lah pral ko baro lačepen, hoy o Devel kras ap late." 
Luke1:59 Pal orhta divessa van le, te činenn le o ternepen ap o mass. Oun yon kaman les ko lab Zakari te dell, yaake har leskro dad kharella." 
Luke1:60 Leskri day penas: “Na-a! Yob hounte lell ko lab Yohanni.” 
Luke1:61 Penan le ap late: “Kek tire menshendar kharell yaake.” 
Luke1:62 Oun yon sikran i vastentsa ap leskro dad, te penell kova, har ko ternepen hounte kharell." 
Luke1:63 Oun yob kamas, te anenn le leske čomone, kay nay činas yob pre. Oun yob činas: “Yob kharell Yohanni.” Koy kran lauter bare yaka." 
Luke1:64 Ap yek kopo nay rakras o Zakari pale, oun sharas o Debles." 
Luke1:65 Oun i traash vas ap lauterende, kay troul lende djivan. Oun i tsele menshe, hoy an o pralstouno them Youdea djivan, rakran pral kova." 
Luke1:66 Oun lauterenge djas kova an o dji, kay kova shounan. Oun yon penan: “Hoy vell dran kava ternepen?” Oun lauter patsan, kay o Debleskri zoor ap o čaveste čiddo hi." 
Luke1:67 Oun leskro dad Zakari vas pherdo Debleskro Dourho, oun penas kolla laba, hoy o Devel an leste čivas:" 
Luke1:68 “Sharas o baro Debles! Yob hi o Israeleskro Devel! Yob vas pash mende, oun las men dran mari bibarht vin." 
Luke1:69 Yob bičras menge yek zoreles, te lell yob men dran o čilačepen vin. Oun kava vella o Davideskre menshendar." 
Luke1:70 Glan i rah tsiro penan i Debleskre rakepangre," 
Luke1:71 te lell men o Devel dran i vasta kolendar vin, kay kamenn men te marell, ava, te lell lo men dran i vasta kolendar vin, kay men gar kamenna." 
Luke1:72 Les his i baro dji mare phourenge oun bistras gar kova, hoy yob lentsa an o phouro tsiro vin kras oun peskro vast pre das." 
Luke1:73 Glan maro dadeste, o Abrahameste, das yob pes sovel," 
Luke1:74 te lell lo men dran i čilače vasta vin, te boudrah nay leske, oun trashah bouder gar," 
Luke1:75 yaake te djivas mer leske i djoudjo oun lačo djiyeha yaake rah, har djivah." 
Luke1:76 Oun tou miro čavo, tou veh ninna i Debleskro rakepaskro. Oun tou djah glan o Debleste, oun kreh leske i drom pre, te vell lo nay pash i menshende." 
Luke1:77 Leskre menshende sikreh tou, har nay vell lengri doosh krik lino, yaake te djan le gar nashedo." 
Luke1:78 Maro Debles hi i baro dji menge. Leskro kamlepen vell pash mende. Kova hi har o kham, hoy djal pre ap o bolepen," 
Luke1:79 oun vell diklo kolendar, kay hi len traash o merepastar. Kay bari momeli anell men ap o drom, kay vella o Debleskri barht ap mende.”" 
Luke1:80 O Yohanni vas baro, oun hayvas hako dives feteder, hoy o Devel kamella. Oun yob djivas an o moulo them yaake rah, bis te vas ko dives, kay yob glan i menshende an Israel rakras." 
Luke2:1 Ap ko tsiro moukas o baro ray Augousto an o foro Rom te penell: “Činenn i laba i tsele menshendar an mire themma pre!” 
Luke2:2 Kova his o ersto kopo, kay činan le i laba i tsele menshendar an i liil dren. Oun kova his ap ko tsiro, kay o Kvirinio o pralstouno his pral o them Syria." 
Luke2:3 Oun halauter djan an pengre forya oun gaba, kay lengre phoure boldo van, te moukenn le pengre laba pre te činell." 
Luke2:4 Oun o Yosef djas peskri pirnyah, i Maria, dran o foro Nazaret, hoy an o them Galilea čiddo hi. Oun yon djan an o foro Betlehem an o them Youdea, te moukenn le kote pengre laba pre te činell. An ko foro his o baro ray David glan i rah tsiro boldo. Oun o Yosef his o Davideskre menshendar. I Maria his ap ko tsiro an vavar koova." 
Luke2:5  
Luke2:6 Har yon an kava foro van, vas i Mariake ko tsiro, te lell li o čaves." 
Luke2:7 Oun lat vas i čavo. Oun yoy čivas pherne troul leste, oun čivas les kote dren, kay o rhapen i firhenge dren čiddo vella. An i kerčima his lenge kek čiben." 
Luke2:8 Glan o foro Betlehem dan i bakrengre yak ap pengre bakre an koy rat. 
Luke2:9 Ap yek kopo his glan lende o Debleskro bolepaskro tardo. Oun o Debleskro raylepen his troul lende. Oun i bari daar vas ap lende. 
Luke2:10 Oun o bolepaskro penas ap lende: “Ma darenn! I bari barht vell ap t'mende, oun ap i tsele menshende." 
Luke2:11 Kava dives vas t'menge an o foro Betlehem kova boldo, kay lell t'men dran o čilačepen vin. Yob hi ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob." 
Luke2:12 Oun ap kova dikenn t'mer, koon o ternepen hi: Yob hi pandlo an i pherne, oun kote dren čiddo, kay o rhapen i firhenge dren čiddo vella.”" 
Luke2:13 Ap yek kopo his pash ko bolepaskro boud vavar bolepangre. Oun yon sharan o Debles, oun penan:" 
Luke2:14 “Baro hi o Debleskro raylepen an o bolepen! O Debleskri barht vell ap i phoub. Yob dikell lačes ap i menshende.” 
Luke2:15 Oun palle djan i tsele Debleskre bolepangre pale an o bolepen. Oun i bakrengre penan yek ap o vavareste: “Avenn, djas an o foro Betlehem, te dikas, hoy o Devel menge penas!”" 
Luke2:16 Oun i bakrengre nashan sik an o foro, oun hatsan i Mariat oun o Yosefes. Oun o ternepen his koy dren čiddo, kay o rhapen i firhenge dren čiddo vella." 
Luke2:17 Har yon kova dikan, penan le lauterenge ko lab, hoy lenge o bolepaskro pral kava ternepen penas." 
Luke2:18 Oun lauter kran bare yaka, har yon shounan, hoy i bakrengre lenge penan." 
Luke2:19 I Maria rikras kol tsele laba an peskro dji oun moukas len an lakro shero trouyel te djal. 
Luke2:20 Oun i bakrengre djan pale pash pengre bakre. Oun yon sharan o Debles o tselo djiyestar pral kova, hoy yon shounan oun dikan. Lauter kova his yaake, har o bolepaskro lenge penas." 
Luke2:21 Har orhta divessa trouyel his, oun o ternepen ap o mass činlo vas, dan le les o lab Yezous. Kava lab penas o bolepaskro i Mariake, har yoy gomme gar an vavar koova his." 
Luke2:22 Star-deesh divessa his i Maria pale-čiddo, yaake har o Mose kova an peskro liil činas. Pal kova anan o Yosef oun i Maria kol ternepas an o Debleskro baro kheer an o foro Yerusalem, te denn le les an o Debleskro vast." 
Luke2:23 An o Moseskre lila hi ninna činlo: O phoureder čavo, kay boldo vella, hi o Debleske." 
Luke2:24 Oun o Yosef oun i Maria anan douy parne čirkle glan o Debleste, yaake har kova an i Moseskre lila činlo hi, te vell i djouvel pale erligo." 
Luke2:25 Ap ko tsiro djivas an o foro Yerusalem i morsh. Leskro lab his Simeon. Kova patsas ap o Debleste, oun djivas yaake, har o Devel kova kamas. Oun yob dikas ap ko tsiro, kay lell o Devel i bibarht i Israeleskre menshendar krik. O Simeon his pherdo Debleskro Dourho." 
Luke2:26 Oun o Debleskro Dourho penas leske, te merell yob gar, bis te dikas lo ko baro rayes, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob." 
Luke2:27 Oun ap ko dives, kay anan o Yosef oun i Maria pengro čaves, o Yezouses, an o Debleskro baro kheer, te denn le les an o Debleskro vast, har kova pal o biboldengro čačepen yaake his, koy anas o Debleskro Dourho o Simeones ninna an o Debleskro baro kheer." 
Luke2:28 Oun o Simeon las o čaves ap i moussi, sharas o Debles, oun penas:" 
Luke2:29 “Miro Devel, miro ray, kanna nay merau me an o lačepen, yaake har tou penal." 
Luke2:30 Me dikom koles, kay tou bičral, te lell lo i menshen dran o čilačepen vin." 
Luke2:31 Oun tou bičral les i tsele menshenge ap i phoub. 
Luke2:32 Yob hi har i momeli, te sikrell lo kolen tiro drom, kay prindjrenn tout gar. Koleske sharenn yon i menshen an Israel.”" 
Luke2:33 Oun o Yezouseskro dad oun leskri day kran bare yaka pral kova, hoy o Simeon pral pengro čaveste Yezous penas." 
Luke2:34 Oun o Simeon rakras o Debleskri barht pral lende vin oun penas ap i Mariate: “Pral kava čaveste rhoyrenn pen boud menshe an o them Israel. Ap leste sikrell pes, koon djal ap o Debleskro drom, oun koon perell o Debleskro dromestar tele." 
Luke2:35 Yaake vell diklo, hoy boud menshenge an o shero trouyel djala. Oun tire douka, Maria, pral tiro čaveste venn yaake, har te dell yek i rharo an tiro dji.”" 
Luke2:36 An o foro Yerusalem djivas i phouri Debleskri rakepaskretsa. Yoy kharas Hanna. Lakro dad his o Penouel. Yob hi kol menshendar, kay venna pal o Asser. Efta bersha his i Hanna romedino." 
Luke2:37 Palle meras lakro rom. Oun kanna his li orhta-deesh-te-star bersha phouro. Oun yoy his o tselo dives oun i tseli rati an o Debleskro baro kheer, te mangell li o Debles an. Oun boud kope rhas oun piyas li či o Debleske." 
Luke2:38 Ap ko tsiro har i Maria oun o Yosef pengro čaveha an o Debleskro baro kheer his, vas li ninna kote pash lende. Oun yoy sharas o Debles o tselo djiyeha pral ko čaveste, oun rakras kolestar ap lauterende, kay dikan ap ko tsiro, kay lell o Devel i menshen an o foro Yerusalem dran o čilačepen vin." 
Luke2:39 Oun har i Maria oun o Yosef lauter yaake kran, har an o Debleskro lab činlo his, djan le pale an pengro foro Nazaret, hoy an o them Galilea hi." 
Luke2:40 Ko ternepen vas baro oun zorelo, oun pherdo gosvepen. Oun hakeno dikas, kay o Devel pash leste hi." 
Luke2:41 Hako bersh, har van kol bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa, djan i Maria oun o Yosef an o foro Yerusalem. Oun har o Yezous deesh-te-douy bersha phouro his, lan yon les peha." 
Luke2:42  
Luke2:43 Har kol bare divessa trouyel his, oun yon pale khere djan, ačas ko čavo Yezous an o foro Yerusalem. Oun leskro dad oun leskri day djinan kova gar." 
Luke2:44 Yon patsan, kay yob mashkral kol vavar menshende hi. Doleske rodan yon les yek dives mashkral pengre menshende, oun mashkral kol vavarende, kay his lentsa khetne ap o drom." 
Luke2:45 Oun yon hatsan les gar. Koy djan yon pale an o foro Yerusalem, oun rodan les kote." 
Luke2:46 Pal triin divessa hatsan le les an o Debleskro baro kheer. Oun yob his beshdo mashkral i sikepangre. Oun yob shounas, hoy yon rakran, oun yob poučas boud lendar." 
Luke2:47 Lauter, hoy shounan, hoy yob lenge penas, kran bare yaka, yaake gosevo his kava čavo." 
Luke2:48 Oun har leskro dad oun leskri day les kote dikan, ačas lenge o rakepen krik. Oun leskri day penas ap leste: “Čava, hoske kreh tou mentsa savo koova? Me oun tiro dad, har rodam tout, hams i daryatar moulo.”" 
Luke2:49 Koy penas lo ap lende: “Hoske rodan t'mer man? Djinenn t'mer gar, te krap me kova, hoy miro dad mandar kamella?”" 
Luke2:50 Yon hayvan gar, hoy yob lenge kamas te penell." 
Luke2:51 Palle djas lo lentsa pale an o foro Nazaret, oun kras lauter, hoy yon penan leske. Leskri day rikras kol tsele laba, hoy o Yezous penas, an peskro dji." 
Luke2:52 Yob vas gosveder oun phoureder. Oun o Devel oun i menshe dikan lačes ap leste. 
Luke3:1 His ap ko tsiro, kay o Tiberio an o foro Rom deesh-te-panč bersha baro ray his. Oun o Pontio Pilato his o ray pral o them Youdea. Oun o Herodes his o ray pral o them Galilea. Oun peskro phraal Filipo his o ray pral i themma Iturea oun Trakonitis. Oun o Lisanio his o ray pral o them Abilene." 
Luke3:2 Oun o Hannas oun o Kayafas his bare rashaya. Ap ko tsiro rakras o Devel an o moulo them ap o Yohanneste. Koleskro dad his o Zakari. 
Luke3:3 Oun o Yohanni djas an o them pash o pani Yordan trouyel, oun penas i menshenge: “Moukenn t'maro čilačo drom! Oun djan ap o Debleskro drom! Oun moukenn t'men te taufrell! Oun o Devel lell t'mari doosh t'mendar krik.”" 
Luke3:4 Yaake činas o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya: Yek dell gole an o moulo them: Krenn maro Debleske o drom, te nay vell lo pash i menshende! Lenn halauter krik, hoy o Debleske an o drom čiddo hi!" 
Luke3:5 Krenn, te vell haki berga tikneder! Oun hadenn ko them, hoy mank i berge čiddo hi! O bango drom te vell bouder gar bango! Oun o djoungelo drom te vell mishto kerdo." 
Luke3:6 Palle dikell hakeno, har o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin lella." 
Luke3:7 Boud menshe djan pash o Yohanneste, te moukan le pen lestar te taufrell. Yob penas lenge: “T'mer han sapa! T'mer nay nashenn gar glan o Debleskri rholi krik, hoy vella pral i menshende." 
Luke3:8 Sikrenn i menshende, te djan t'mer ap o Debleskro drom, oun bouder gar ap o čilačo drom! Ma penenn, kay o Abraham t'maro dad hi! Kova anell t'men gar doureder. Me penau t'menge: O Devel nay krell dran kal barra o Abrahameskre čaven." 
Luke3:9 T'mer han har rouka, kay o tover pashel čiddo hi, te venn le tele dino. Hako rouk, kay vell kek lačo koova baro pre, vell tele dino, oun an i yag vitsedo.”" 
Luke3:10 Oun i menshe poučan o Yohannestar: “Hoy te kras mer?” 
Luke3:11 “Te hi yekes douy gada,” penas lo, “mou dell lo yek gad koleste, kones kek hi. Oun kones rhapen hi, kova dell koleste i paash, kones či hi.”" 
Luke3:12 Koy van ninna bibolde pash leste, te moukenn le pen lestar te taufrell. Kolla his morsha, kay lenn kol themeskre love i Remaryenge dren. Yon poučan lestar: “Sikepaskro, hoy te kras mer?”" 
Luke3:13 Penas o Yohanni ap lende: “Ma lenn gar boudeder love dren, har vin kerdo hi!”" 
Luke3:14 Ninna i lourde poučan lestar: “Har hi mentsa? Hoy te kras mer?” Lenge penas lo: “Ma krenn kekeske čilačo koova, oun lenn kekestar love i zoryah! Kol love, hoy playsrenn i pralstoune t'menge, kol love moukenn t'menge doha te vell!”" 
Luke3:15 I menshe dikan, kay o Devel o Yohannes bičras, oun yon poučan pendar: “Hi yob ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel glan i rah tsiro penas, te vell yob?”" 
Luke3:16 Koy penas o Yohanni ap lauterende: “Me čivau t'men an o pani. Yek vella, kova hi zorleder har me. Me hom gar moldo, te krap leskre kirrha pre. Yob čivell o Debleskro Dourho ap t'mende, oun krell t'men djoudjo, har i yag o saster djoudjo krella." 
Luke3:17 Yob hi har i harho, kay rikrell i vitsepaskri an peskro vast, te vitsrell lo o djob pral, yaake te perell o phouss tele ap i phoub. Peskro djob anell lo an peskro djobeskro kheer dren. Oun o phouss rhačrell lo an i yag, hoy rhačella hako tsiro.”" 
Luke3:18 Kol labentsa, ninna boud vavar labentsa rakras o Yohanni i menshenge an o dji, oun sikras lende o Debleskro drom." 
Luke3:19 Oun o Herodes, ko baro ray pral o them Galilea, las peskro phraleskri romyat, i Herodia, oun kras vavar čilačo koova. Oun o Yohanni penas leske: “Kova hi čilačo, hoy tou kral.”" 
Luke3:20 Har o Herodes kova shounas, čivas lo o Yohannes an o stilepen, oun anas yaake vavar doosh ap peste." 
Luke3:21 Ap ko tsiro, kay taufras o Yohanni kol tsele menshen, vas ninna o Yezous pash leste, oun moukas pes lestar te taufrell. Oun har o Yezous o Debles an-mangas, djas o bolepen pre." 
Luke3:22 Oun o Debleskro Dourho vas har i parno čirklo ap leste tele. Oun i rakepen dran o bolepen penas: “Tou hal miro čavo, koles me kamau. Pral toute hom barhtelo.”" 
Luke3:23 O Yezous nay his yaake triyanda bersha phouro, har yob i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas. I menshe patsan, kay o Yosef leskro dad hi. O Yosefeskro dad his o Eli." 
Luke3:24 Koleskre phoure his yek pal o vavar: o Matat, o Levi, o Melki, o Yannay, o Yosef," 
Luke3:25 o Matatias, o Amos, o Nahoum, o Hesli, o Naggay," 
Luke3:26 o Mahat, o Matatias, o Shimi, o Yosek, o Yoda," 
Luke3:27 o Yohanan, o Resa, o Zorobabel, o Shealtiel, o Neri," 
Luke3:28 o Melki, o Addi, o Kosam, o Elmadam, o Er," 
Luke3:29 o Yosua, o Eliyeser, o Yorim, o Matat, o Levi," 
Luke3:30 o Simeon, o Youda, o Yosef, o Yonam, o Elyakim," 
Luke3:31 o Melea, o Menna, o Mattata, o Natan, o David," 
Luke3:32 o Isay, o Obed, o Boas, o Salmon, o Nason," 
Luke3:33 o Amminadab, o Admin, o Arni, o Esrom, o Perez, o Youda," 
Luke3:34 o Yakob, o Isaak, o Abraham, o Tera, o Nahor," 
Luke3:35 o Seroug, o Regou, o Peleg, o Eber, o Shela," 
Luke3:36 o Kaynan, o Arpaksad, o Sem, o Noah, o Lamek," 
Luke3:37 o Matusalem, o Henok, o Yered, o Mahalalel, o Kenan," 
Luke3:38 o Enosh, o Set, o Adam. Kova vas o Deblestar." 
Luke4:1 Oun o Yezous his pherdo Debleskro Dourho. Oun yob moukas o them pash o pani Yordan. Oun o Debleskro Dourho anas les an o moulo them. 
Luke4:2 Kote ačas lo star-deesh divessa. Oun o beng vas pash leste, te anell lo les o Debleskro dromestar tele. An kol divessa rhas o Yezous či. Oun har kol divessa trouyel his, his les bok." 
Luke4:3 Oun o beng penas ap leste: “Te hal tou o Debleskro čavo, pen ap ko bar, te vell lestar i kotar maro!”" 
Luke4:4 Koy penas o Yezous: “An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O maro kokres rikrell i menshes gar djido.” 
Luke4:5 Palle anas les o beng ap i berga, oun sikras leste ap yek kopo i tsele themma ap i phoub." 
Luke4:6 Oun o beng penas leske: “Kol tsele themma oun lengro bravlepen kamau me toute te dell. Kava lauter hi miro, oun me dau kova koneste me kamau." 
Luke4:7 Tou te mangeh man an, palle dau me lauter toute.”" 
Luke4:8 Koy penas o Yezous: “An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: Tou mangess o Debles an, – yob hi tiro ray, – oun vess leske kokres koy!”" 
Luke4:9 Pal kova anas les o beng an o foro Yerusalem, oun čivas les ap o Debleskro baro kheer pral pre, oun penas ap leste: “Te hal tou o Debleskro čavo, mouk tout tele te perell!" 
Luke4:10 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O Devel penas ap pengre bolepangre, te denn le yak ap toute." 
Luke4:11 Oun yon hidjrenn tout pengre vastentsa, te doukress tire pire gar ap i barra!”" 
Luke4:12 Koy penas o Yezous ap o bengeste: “O Debleskro lab penella: Rike o Debles gar dineleske, te sikrell lo tout, har zorelo yob hi!”" 
Luke4:13 Har o beng dikas, kay o Yezous gar kras, hoy yob kamas, moukas yob lestar i tsiro tele." 
Luke4:14 Oun o Yezous djas pale an o them Galilea. Oun o Debleskri zoor his an leste. Oun an i tsele gaba oun forya, kay kote his, shounan le lestar." 
Luke4:15 Oun yob djas an i biboldengre kangria oun sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. Oun hakeno sharas les. 
Luke4:16 Oun yob vas an o foro Nazaret, kay yob baro vas. Ap o Debleskro dives djas lo an i biboldengri kangri, har yob kova hako Debleskro dives kras. Oun yob stas pre, te draverell lo an o Debleskro lab." 
Luke4:17 Koy dan le les ko liil, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, činas. Oun yob kras kava liil pre, oun kote hatsas lo kol laba:" 
Luke4:18 O Debleskro Dourho hi ap mande. Yob rodas man vin, te penap i čorvelenge o Debleskro lačo lab. Oun yob bičras man, te penap kolenge, hoy stilde hi, te venn le dran lengro stilepen vin, oun kolenge, kay korelo hi, te dikenn le pale, oun kolenge, kay pale-čiddo hi, te venn le pale erligo," 
Luke4:19 oun te penap i menshenge: Kava hi ko bersh, kay o Devel i menshen barhteles krella." 
Luke4:20 Oun o Yezous kras kava liil pandlo, oun das les pale, oun beshas pes. Oun i tsele menshe an i biboldengri kangri dikan ap leste." 
Luke4:21 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Kava dives nay dikenn t'mer, te hi kava lab o čačepen.”" 
Luke4:22 Lauter rakran lestar mishto, oun leskro rakepen his lenge pherdo lačepen. Oun yon kran bare yaka. Oun yon penan: “Hi kava gar o Yosefeskro čavo?”" 
Luke4:23 O Yezous penas: “Čačepah, t'mer penenna: Dramaskro, kre tout kokres sasto! Tou kral sau baro koova an o foro Kapernaum. Kre kova kate ninna!" 
Luke4:24 Kava penau me t'menge: Kek Debleskro rakepaskro vell kote sharedo, kay yob khere hi." 
Luke4:25 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ap ko tsiro, kay o Debleskro rakepaskro Eliya djivas, djivan boud djouvya, kolengre morsha moulo hi, an o them Israel. Ap ko tsiro das triin-te-paash bersha kek brishin. Oun i bari bok vas an o tselo them." 
Luke4:26 Pash kol djouvyende vas o Eliya gar bičedo. Yob vas bičedo pash yek djouvyate an o foro Sarepta, an o them Sidon, kolakro rom moulo hi." 
Luke4:27 Dikenn ninna ap ko tsiro, kay o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Elisa, djivas. An ko tsiro his boud menshen an o them Israel i djoungelo nasslepen ap pengro mass. Kekes lendar kras o Elisa sasto. Kokres o Naaman dran o them Syria kras yob sasto.”" 
Luke4:28 Oun lauter kolla, kay an i biboldengri kangri his, van rhoyedo ap o Yezouseste, har yon kova lestar shounan." 
Luke4:29 Yon stan pre, oun tradan les dran o foro vin, anan les pral ap i berga, kay lengro foro pre tardo hi, te vitsrenn le les tele." 
Luke4:30 Yob rissras pes trouyel oun djas mashkral lende pale, oun djas peske." 
Luke4:31 Oun yob djas an o foro Kapernaum an o them Galilea. Oun hako Debleskro dives penas lo kote i menshenge o Debleskro lab. 
Luke4:32 Oun yob rakras yaake bari zoryah, te kran le bare yaka pral kova, hoy yob lenge penas." 
Luke4:33 Koy his i morsh an i biboldengri kangri, kay his i beng an leste. Oun kova das bari gole:" 
Luke4:34 “Ah! Hoy kameh tou mendar, Yezous dran Nazaret? Val tou, te maress men? Me djinau, koon tou hal: Tou hal o Debleskro morsh, koles o Devel bičras.”" 
Luke4:35 Oun o Yezous das les trad, oun penas zoreles ap leste: “Ma rake oun dja dran leste vin!” Oun ko beng, kay an ko morsheste hi, vitsras ko morshes mashkral i menshende ap i phoub, djas dran leste vin, oun doukras les gar." 
Luke4:36 Oun halauter kran bare yaka. Oun yon rakran yek o vavareha, oun penan: “Have zorele laba! Yob rakrell zorele labentsa ap i bengende, oun yon djan dran i menshende vin.”" 
Luke4:37 Oun an hake gaba oun forya, kay kote his, shounan le lestar." 
Luke4:38 Oun har yob dran i biboldengri kangri vas, djas lo an o Simoneskro kheer. Oun i day o Simoneskri romyatar his ap o čiben čiddo, oun lakro shero his tato. Oun yon mangan lestar, te krell lo lat sasto." 
Luke4:39 Oun yob djas pash late, oun penas ap ko nasslepen: “Dja touke!” Oun ko nasslepen djas latar. Oun yoy stas sik pre, oun anas lenge i rhapen." 
Luke4:40 Oun o kham djas tele. Oun boud menshe anan i nasselen pash leste. Kolen his boud nasslepen. Oun o Yezous čivas peskre vasta ap hakeneste lendar, oun kras len sasto." 
Luke4:41 Oun dran boud menshende, kay his benga an lende, djan i benga vin. Oun har yon vin van, dan le gole: “Tou hal o Debleskro čavo.” Oun o Yezous das len trad, oun moukas len gar te rakrell. I benga djinan, kay yob ko baro ray hi, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob." 
Luke4:42 Oun o vavar dives taysarlake, djas o Yezous dran o kheer vin, oun djas kote, kay yob kokres hi. Oun boud menshe rodan les, oun djan pash leste. Oun yon kaman les te rikrell, te djal lo gar peske lendar." 
Luke4:43 Oun har yon hatsan les, penas lo ap lende: “Me hounte djap ninna an i vavar forya, te penap i menshenge o Debleskro lab, te hi o tsiro kanna kay, kay o Devel kamell len dran o čilačepen te lell, oun kamell lengro ray te vell. Oun me vom bičedo, te penap kova.”" 
Luke4:44 Oun o Yezous djas an o them Youdea oun rakras kote an i biboldengre kangria. 
Luke5:1 His i dives, kay o Yezous pash o baro pani Genezaret tardo his. Oun boud menshe kaman te shounell o Debleskro lab." 
Luke5:2 Oun yob dikas douy bere pash o pani čiddo. I mačepangre djan dran lende vin, te thovenn le pengre mačengre gone." 
Luke5:3 Koy djas lo ap ko bero, hoy o Simoneske hi, oun mangas les, te oulerell lo i tikno kotar ap o pani vin. Oun yob beshas pes an ko bero, oun penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Luke5:4 Oun pal kova penas lo ap o Simoneste: “An ko bero doureder ap o pani, oun vitsrenn t'mare mačengre gone vin, te taprenn t'mer i mače!”" 
Luke5:5 Penas o Simon: “Sikepaskro, mer boudram i tseli rat, oun tapram či. Tou te peneh les mange, palle vitsrau i mačengre gone pale vin.”" 
Luke5:6 Oun har yon kova kran, tapran yon yaake boud mače, te kaman i mačengre gone paash te djal." 
Luke5:7 Oun yon dan i vavar mačepangren gole, te tserdenn yon lentsa khetne i mačengre gone dran o pani vin. Oun yon van, oun khetne kran le kol douy bere yaake pherdo mače, te djan i bere paash tele." 
Luke5:8 Har o Simon Petro kova dikas, peras lo glan o Yezouseste tele ap i phoub, oun penas: “Dja touke mandar, miro ray! Me hom i morsh, ap kaleste doosh hi.”" 
Luke5:9 Har yob dikas, te tapran le yaake boud mače, vas i bari traash pral leste, oun ap kolende, kay pash leste his," 
Luke5:10 ninna ap o Yakobo oun ap o Yohanni, kolengro dad hi o Zebedeo. Kol douy boudran o Simoneha khetne. Oun o Yezous penas ap o Simoneste: “Ma traash! Me krau toutar yekes, kay anell menshen pash mande.”" 
Luke5:11 Oun yon anan kol bere ap o them, oun moukan lauter čiddo, oun djan leha." 
Luke5:12 An yek foro his i morsh, koles his i djoungelo nasslepen, kay leskro mass ap leste tele merella. Yob dikas o Yezouses, oun vitsras pes glan leste tele ap i phoub, oun mangas lestar: “Ray, te kameh tou, nay kreh tou man sasto.”" 
Luke5:13 Oun o Yezous čivas peskro vast ap leste, oun penas: “Me kamau, te vess sasto.” Oun ap yek kopo djas o nasslepen lestar." 
Luke5:14 Oun o Yezous penas leske: “De yak, te peness kekeske, hoy me touke krom! Dja pash o rashayeste oun sike leste, kay tiro nasslepen toutar djas. Oun an kova glan o Debleste, hoy o Mose penas, te djinenn i menshe, kay tou sasto val!”" 
Luke5:15 Oun boud oun boudeder menshe shounan o Yezousestar. Oun boud van khetne, te shounenn le les, oun te venn le lestar sasto kerdo." 
Luke5:16 O Yezous tserdas pes lendar pale, oun djas an o moulo them, oun rakras kote o Debleha." 
Luke5:17 His i dives, kay yob i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas. Oun boud Farisarya oun biboldengre čačepangre his mashkral lende beshdo. Yon van dran i themma Galilea oun Youdea, oun dran o foro Yerusalem. Oun o Yezous kras i menshen sasto an o Debleskri zoor." 
Luke5:18 Koy van morsha oun anan i morshes ap o čiben. Kova nashte nashas gar. Yon kaman les an o kheer te anell, kay o Yezous hi, oun glan leste te čivell." 
Luke5:19 An kava kheer his yaake boud menshe, te nashte anan le kol nasseles gar dren. Koy djan yon ap o kheer pral pre, lan barra vin, oun moukan ko čiben mashkral i menshende glan o Yezouseste tele." 
Luke5:20 Oun o Yezous dikas lengro patsepen, oun penas ap ko morsheste, kay nasselo hi: “Čava, me lau tiri doosh toutar.”" 
Luke5:21 Oun i biboldengre čačepangre oun i Farisarya penan yek ap o vavareste: “Koon hi kava morsh, kay krell pes har o Devel? O Devel kokres nay lell i doosh i menshendar.”" 
Luke5:22 Oun o Yezous hayvas, hoy yon mashkral pende yaake penan. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Hoske djal kova an t'maro shero trouyel?" 
Luke5:23 Hi kova phareder, te penap: Me lau tiri doosh toutar krik, har te penap ap leste: Ste pre, le tiro čiben oun dja trouyel?" 
Luke5:24 Kanna sikrau t'men, te hi o Menshengro Čaves koy zoor ap i phoub, te nay lell lo i doosh i menshendar krik.” Palle penas o Yezous ap ko morsheste, kay nay nashell gar: “Ste pre, le tiro čiben oun dja khere!”" 
Luke5:25 Oun kova stas sik glan lauterende pre, las peskro čiben, oun djas khere oun sharas o Debles." 
Luke5:26 Oun kolla, kay dikan kova, kran bare yaka, oun sharan o Debles. Oun i bari traash vas ap lende, oun yon penan: “Mer dikam kava dives i baro koova.”" 
Luke5:27 Koy pal djas o Yezous dran ko foro vin. Oun yob dikas i morshes pash ko kheer beshdo, kay yob i biboldendar love i Remaryengre rayenge dren las. Leskro lab hi Levi. Oun o Yezous djas pash leste oun penas: “Am, dja mantsa!”" 
Luke5:28 Oun yob stas pre, oun moukas lauter čiddo, oun djas leha." 
Luke5:29 Oun o Levi kras o Yezouseske an peskro kheer i baro rhapen. Oun boud kolendar, kay lan i biboldendar love i Remaryengre rayenge dren, rhan lentsa khetne. Oun ninna vavar menshe his koy." 
Luke5:30 Oun i Farisarya oun i biboldengre čačepangre his rhoyemen ap o Yezouseste. Oun yon penan ap leskre malende: “Hoske rhan t'mer kolentsa, kay lenna love i Remaryenge dren, oun kol vavarentsa, kay ninna čilačo koova kran oun doleske pale-čiddo hi?”" 
Luke5:31 Koy penas o Yezous: “Kolla, kay sasto hi, djan gar pash o dramaskro. Kolla, kay nasselo hi, djan pash leste." 
Luke5:32 Me vom gar, te dap ap kolende gole, kay ap o čačo drom hi. Na-a! Me vom, te dap kolen gole, kay djan ap o čilačo drom, te moukenn le pengro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Luke5:33 Yon penan ap o Yezouseste: “O Yohanneskre mala rhan oun piyenn boud kope či, te mangenn le o Debles. Oun ninna kolla, kay shounenn ap i Farisarya, krenn kova yaake. Hoske rhan oun piyenn tire mala?”" 
Luke5:34 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Yaake rah har o biyabeskro ap i biyab hi, denn t'mer rhapen kolende, kay ap i biyab hi. T'mer moukenn len gar te bokell." 
Luke5:35 I tsiro vella, kay o biyabeskro lendar krik lino vella. Ap ko tsiro rhan oun piyenn le či.”" 
Luke5:36 Oun yob penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, oun penas: “Kek činell i kotar dran i nevo ripen vin, oun sivell les ap i phouro ripen. Kova krell o nevo oun o phouro ripen paash." 
Luke5:37 Oun kek čorell i nevi mool an phoure molyakre gone. I nevi mool krell i phoure molyakre gone paash. Oun i mool nashella vin. Oun i gone hi ninna paash. 
Luke5:38 I nevi mool vell čoredo an i neve molyakre gone. 
Luke5:39 Oun kek, kay phouri mool piyas, kamell i nevi mool te piyell. Yob penella: Koy phouri mool hi lačeder.”" 
Luke6:1 Ap o Debleskro dives djas o Yezous ap i kotar them, kay o djob bares vas. Oun leskre mala lan ko djob an i vasta, oun kran ko djob pre, te rhan le." 
Luke6:2 Kote his ninna Farisarya, kay penan ap lende: “Hoske krenn t'mer ap o Debleskro dives kova, hoy hi gar pal o biboldengro čačepen?”" 
Luke6:3 Penas o Yezous: “Draveran t'mer gar an o Debleskro lab, hoy kras o David oun leskre mala, har yon bokan?" 
Luke6:4 Yob djas an o Debleskro kheer oun las kol mare, kay kote čiddo hi, oun rhas len peskre malentsa? Pal i biboldengro čačepen his i mare i rashayenge kokres koy.”" 
Luke6:5 Oun o Yezous penas: “Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, hom ninna o ray pral o Debleskro dives.”" 
Luke6:6 Oun ap i vavar Debleskro dives djas o Yezous an i biboldengri kangri, te penell lo kote i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Oun yob dikas kote i morshes, koleskro čačo vast his bango." 
Luke6:7 I biboldengre čačepangre oun i Farisarya dikan ap o Yezouseste, oun poučan pendar: “Krell lo kava morshes ap o Debleskro dives sasto?” Yon kaman čomone ap leste pre te anell, te anenn le les nay glan i čačepangre." 
Luke6:8 O Yezous hayvas, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djas. Oun yob penas ap ko morsheste, koles i bango vast hi: “Ste pre oun am kay!” Oun yob stas pre, oun djas pash leste." 
Luke6:9 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Me poučau t'mendar: Nay krah mer lačo koova ap o Debleskro dives pal maro čačepen? Nay krah mer i menshen sasto ap o Debleskro dives? Nay moukah mer len te merell?” 
Luke6:10 Oun yob dikas ap kolende, kay troul leste tardo his, oun penas ap kava morsheste: “Sike tiro vast!” Oun yob sikras peskro vast, oun ko vast vas sasto." 
Luke6:11 Koy van yon rhoyedo ap o Yezouseste, oun rakran khetne, hoy yon o Yezouseha nay krans." 
Luke6:12 His i dives, kay djas o Yezous ap i berga, te rakrell lo o Debleha. Oun yob ačas i tseli rat oun rakras leha." 
Luke6:13 Har dives vas, das lo peskre malende gole, oun rodas deesh-te-douyen lendar vin, te venn le leskre bičepangre." 
Luke6:14 Oun kolla his: O Simon, – koleste das yob ninna o lab Petro, oun leskro phraal Andreas, o Yakobo, oun o Yohanni, o Filipo, o Bartolomeo," 
Luke6:15 o Mateo, o Thomas, o Yakobo, koleskro dad hi o Alfeo, oun o Simon, kay hi kol menshendar, kay kharenna Zelotarya" 
Luke6:16 oun o Youdas Iskariot, ko phoukepaskro." 
Luke6:17 Pal kova djas o Yezous lentsa i berga tele. Oun yon van ap i bourhlo kotar them. Koy his boud kolendar khetne, kay leske palla djan, oun ap leste shounan. Ninna boud vavar menshe his kote. Oun kolla van dran o tselo them Youdea oun dran o foro Yerusalem, ninna dran o them, kay i forya Tirus oun Sidon čiddo hi." 
Luke6:18 Kolla van lauter, te shounenn le o Yezouses te rakrell, oun kaman sasto te vell. Ninna lauter kolla van sasto, kay his i beng an lende." 
Luke6:19 I tsele menshe kaman les an te taprell. I bari zoor vas dran leste, oun kras lauteren sasto." 
Luke6:20 Oun o Yezous dikas ap peskre malende oun penas: Barhtele han t'mer čorvele! T'mer djivenna o Debleha khetne an o bolepen oun lenn leskro bravlepen. 
Luke6:21 Barhtele han t'mer, kay kanna bokenna. T'mer venna čalo. Barhtele han t'mer, kay kanna rovenna. T'mer san pale." 
Luke6:22 Barhtele han t'mer, te venn i menshe rhoyedo ap t'mende, oun čivenn t'men pale, oun praasenn t'men, oun rakrenn čilačes pral t'mende, oun kova lauter krenn le doleske, te patsenn t'mer ap o Menshengro Čaveste!" 
Luke6:23 Avenn barhteles ap ko dives, oun khelenn i barhtyatar! O Devel dell t'men i baro bravlepen an o bolepen. Kova, hoy i menshe kanna t'mentsa krenna, kova kran ninna lengre phoure ap o Debleskre rakepangre an o phouro tsiro." 
Luke6:24 Bibarht vell ap t'mende, kay kanna bravelo han. T'mer lenna či bouder." 
Luke6:25 Bibarht vell ap t'mende, kay kanna čalo han. T'mer bokenna. Bibarht vell ap t'mende, kay kanna sana. T'mer rovenna, oun denn gole." 
Luke6:26 Bibarht vell ap t'mende, te rakrenn i tsele menshe t'mendar lačes. Kolengre phoure rakran ninna lačes pral i rhorhene rakepangre, kay penan, te van le o Deblestar, oun van gar lestar." 
Luke6:27 T'mer, kay man shounenna, t'menge penaua: Avenn lačes kolenge, kay hi čilačo ap t'mende! Krenn kolenge lačepen, kay hi rhoyedo ap t'mende!" 
Luke6:28 Penenn kolenge lače laba, kay t'men koshenna! Mangenn o Debles kolenge, kay doukrenn t'men!" 
Luke6:29 Kova, kay das tout ap yek čam, koleske rike i vavar čam ninna koy, te dell lo tout! Te lell yek toutar tiri plaashka, de les ninna tiro gad!" 
Luke6:30 De hakenes, kay toutar mangella! Oun te lell yek toutar čomone, hoy tiro hi, ma mang les pale!" 
Luke6:31 Lauter, hoy t'mer kamenna, te krenn i menshe t'menge, kova krenn t'mer lenge ninna!" 
Luke6:32 Te venn t'mer lačes kolenge, kay hi lačes ap t'mende, patsenn t'mer, kay sharell t'men o Devel? Na-a! Ninna i čilače hi lačes ap pengre malende." 
Luke6:33 Te krenna t'mer kolenge lačepen, kay t'menge lačepen kran, patsenn t'mer, kay sharell t'men o Devel? Na-a! Ninna i čilače krenn kolenge lačepen, kay lenge lačepen kran." 
Luke6:34 T'mer te patsenn t'mare love vin ap kolende, kay denn t'men kol love pale, patsenn t'mer, kay sharell t'men o Devel? Na-a, ninna i čilače patsenn pengre love kolenge vin, kay denn len kol love pale." 
Luke6:35 Me penau t'menge: Avenn lačes kolenge, kay hi čilačo ap t'mende! Krenn kolenge lačepen! Patsenn t'mare love vin ap kolende, kay t'mer gar djinenna, te lenn t'mer lendar čomone pale! Te krenna t'mer kova lauter, palle dell o Devel t'men peskro bravlepen an o bolepen, oun t'mer venn o baro Debleskre čave. O Devel hi ninna lačes ap kol menshende, kay čilače hi, oun kay parkrenn pen gar pash leste." 
Luke6:36 T'men hounte vell hakeneske i baro dji, yaake har o Debles hakeneske i baro dji hi." 
Luke6:37 Ma sikrenn ap o vavareskri doosh! Oun o Devel dikell gar ap t'mari doosh. Ma penenn: Kova hounte lell i phagi! Oun o Devel dell t'men kek phagi. Bistrenn ko čilačepen, hoy i vavar menshe ap t'mende kran. Oun o Devel bistrell ko čilačepen, hoy t'mer kran." 
Luke6:38 Denn i menshen lačo koova! Oun o Devel dell t'men lačo koova! Ava, yob dell t'men yaake boud, te hi t'men boudeder har doha. Yob dell t'men yaake boud, te nay lenn kova gar lauter. Doleske penau t'menge: T'mer te denn boud, palle dell o Devel t'men boud. T'mer te denn gar boud, palle dell o Devel t'men gar boud." 
Luke6:39 Oun o Yezous penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, oun penas: Te lell yek korelo i vavar koreles ap o vast, palle perenn yon hake douy." 
Luke6:40 Yek, kay djal an o sikepaskro kheer, djinell gar boudeder har o sikepaskro. Yob te djinell boud, palle hi lo yaake gosevo har peskro sikepaskro." 
Luke6:41 Hoske kameh tou i tikno kasht dran tiro phraleskro yak vin tserdell, oun dikeh gar o baro kasht an tiro yak?" 
Luke6:42 Tou peneh ap leste: Miro phraal, am kay! Me kamau ko tikno kasht dran tiro yak vin tserdell. Oun tou dikeh gar o baro kasht an tiro yak. Tou rhorheno! Tou kreh, har te vals tou lačeder har yob. Le ko baro kasht dran tiro yak vin, palle nay leh tou ko tikno kasht dran tiro phraleskro yak vin!" 
Luke6:43 Kek lačo phabyengro rouk hidjrella djoungele phabya. Oun kek nasselo rouk hidjrella lačo koova. 
Luke6:44 Tou prindjreh nay o rouk ap kova, hoy ap leste baro vella. Ap i soubyengro rouk venna kek fayge baro. Vitar gar venna drake baro ap soubyengre bourra." 
Luke6:45 Dran i lačo mensheskro dji vell lačo koova. Dran i čilačo dji vell čilačo koova. I mensho penell kova, hoy an leskro dji dren hi." 
Luke6:46 Hoske penenn t'mer: Ray, ray! ap mande oun krenn gar, hoy me t'menge penaua?" 
Luke6:47 Koon vell pash mande, oun shounell mire laba, oun krell, hoy me penaua," 
Luke6:48 kova hi har i mensho, kay kras peske i kheer. Yob hadas i phoub vin, bis te vas lo ap i zorelo baro bar. Kote čivas yob peskro kheer pre. Oun o baro pani vas, oun kamas ko kheer paash te krell. Oun kova djas gar. Ko kheer his ap o zorelo bar tardo." 
Luke6:49 Koon shounell mire laba, oun krell kova gar, hoy me penaua, hi har i mensho, kay kras peskro kheer ap i čik, oun gar ap i zorelo baro bar. Oun o baro pani vas, oun o tselo kheer peras khetne. Oun i bibarht his baro." 
Luke7:1 Oun pal ko rakepen djas lo an o foro Kapernaum. 
Luke7:2 An ko foro djivas i pralstouno lourdo. Les his i boudepaskro, kay ap o merepen čiddo hi. Kova his leske boud moldo." 
Luke7:3 Oun ko lourdo shounas, kay o Yezous an o foro hi. Oun yob bičras i biboldengre phoureden pash o Yezouseste, te mangenn le les, te vell lo pash leste, oun te krell lo o boudepaskres sasto." 
Luke7:4 Oun yon van pash o Yezouseste, oun mangan les, oun penan ap leste: “Kava pralstouno lourdo hi moldo, te kress leskro boudepaskres sasto." 
Luke7:5 Yob hi menge lačes oun kras menge i kheer, kay mangah o Debles an.”" 
Luke7:6 Koy djas o Yezous lentsa. Har yob ap o drom his, bičras ko pralstouno lourdo peskre malen pash leste, te penenn le leske: “Ma kre touke o drom, te vess pash mande!" 
Luke7:7 Vitar gar hom moldo, te vap me pash toute. Te peneh tou yek lab, yaake vell miro boudepaskro sasto." 
Luke7:8 Yaake har me ninna hounte shounap ap mire pralstunende, yaake hi man ninna lourde, kay hounte krenn, hoy me penau. Me te penau ap yekeste: Dja koy! palle djal lo. Me te penau ap i vavareste: Am kay! palle vell lo. Me te penau ap miro boudepaskro: Kre kova! palle krell yob kova.”" 
Luke7:9 Har o Yezous kova shounas, kras yob bare yaka. Oun yob rissras pes trouyel, oun penas ap kolende, kay leha djan: “Me penau t'menge: Savo patsepen hatsom me gar an o tselo them Israel.”" 
Luke7:10 Har kol bičepangre o pralstouno lourdestar khere van, his ko boudepaskro sasto." 
Luke7:11 Ap o vavar dives djas o Yezous an o foro Nayn. Peskre mala oun boud vavar djan leha. 
Luke7:12 Oun yon van pash o baro voudar kava forestar. Oun i menshe hidjran i moules dran o foro vin. Kova his o čavo i djouvyatar, kolakro rom meras. Oun lat his ninna kek vavar čave. Oun boud menshe djan lah." 
Luke7:13 Oun o Yezous dikas lat, oun leskro dji doukas. Oun yob penas ap late: “Ma rob!”" 
Luke7:14 Oun yob djas pash o morhton, oun čivas peskro vast ap leste. Oun kolla, kay o morhton hidjran, ačan tardo. Oun yob penas: “Terno morsh, me penau touke: Ste pre!”" 
Luke7:15 Oun o djipen vas pale an leste. Oun yob hadas pes pre, oun rakras. Oun o Yezous das les leskri date pale." 
Luke7:16 Koy vas i traash pral lauterende. Oun yon sharan o Debles oun penan: “I baro Debleskro rakepaskro hi mashkral mende. O Devel vas pash peskre menshende.”
