Luke7:17 Oun an o tselo them Youdea shounan le, hoy o Yezous kras. Oun an i vavar themma, kote shounan le kova ninna." 
Luke7:18 Oun har o Yohanni lauter kova peskre malendar shounas, das lo douyen lendar pash peste gole," 
Luke7:19 oun bičras len pash o Yezouseste, te poučenn le les: “Hal tou kova, kay hounte vell? Hounte dikas mer ap i vavareste, te vell lo?”" 
Luke7:20 Oun yon van pash o Yezouseste, oun penan: “O Yohanni, kova, kay taufras i menshen, kamell toutar te djinell: Hal tou kova, kay hounte vella? Hounte dikas mer ap i vavareste, te vell lo?”" 
Luke7:21 Ap kava tsiro kras o Yezous boud menshen sasto, kay nasselo oun korelo hi, ninna kolen, kay benga an lende hi." 
Luke7:22 Oun yob penas o Yohanneskre malenge: “Penenn o Yohanneske, hoy t'mer dikan oun shounan: I korele nay dikenn pale. Oun i bange nay djan pale. I nassele, kay lengro mass ap lende tele merell, venna sasto. Kolla, kay nay shounan gar, nay shounenna pale. I moule venna djido. Oun i čorvele shounenn o Debleskro lačo lab." 
Luke7:23 Barhtelo hi kova, kay rhoyrell pes gar pral mande.”" 
Luke7:24 Har kol morsha, kolen o Yohanni bičras, penge djan, rakras o Yezous pral o Yohanneste ap i menshende, oun penas: “Hoske djan t'mer an o moulo them? Kaman t'mer i morshes te dikell, kay hi har i patri, hoy i zorelo dourho pral i phoub phourdella? Na-a, savo morsh hi lo gar." 
Luke7:25 Koon kaman t'mer te dikell? Kaman t'mer i morshes te dikell, kay an kouč koola rido hi? Na-a, savo morsh hi lo vitar gar. Me penau t'menge: Kolla, kay rivenn rayle koola, oun djivenn i shoukar djipen, kolla djivenna an i rayengre bare khera." 
Luke7:26 Koon kaman t'mer te dikell? Kaman t'mer i Debleskro rakepaskro te dikell? Ava, kova hi o Yohanni. Oun me penau t'menge: Yob hi bareder har i Debleskro rakepaskro." 
Luke7:27 Kolestar hi činlo an o Debleskro lab: O Devel penas ap peskro čaveste: Me bičrau i morshes glan toute ap o drom, te krell lo touke i drom, te nay vess pash i menshende." 
Luke7:28 Me penau t'menge: Kek vas boldo ap kay phoub, kay hi bareder har o Yohanni. Me penau t'menge ninna: O tikneder kolendar, kay patsenn ap mande oun moukenn man pengro ray te vell, kova hi bareder har o Yohanni." 
Luke7:29 Kolla, kay shounan les, oun ninna kol bibolde, kay lenn love i Remaryenge dren, dan o Debles čačes, oun moukan pen o Yohannestar te taufrell." 
Luke7:30 Kol Farisarya oun kol biboldengre čačepangre, kran o Debleskro lab penge čičeske. Yon moukan pen gar o Yohannestar te taufrell.”" 
Luke7:31 Oun o Yezous penas: “Me penau t'menge, har i menshe ap kava tsiro hi." 
Luke7:32 Yon hi har kol čave, kay khelenn an o foro, oun denn gole yek ap o vavareste: Mer bashram t'menge. T'mer khelan gar. Mer givam moulengre gilya. T'mer rovan gar." 
Luke7:33 O Yohanni, kova, kay taufras i menshen, rhas kek maro, oun piyas kek mool. Lestar penan t'mer: An koleste hi i beng." 
Luke7:34 Oun me, o Mensheskro Čavo, me vom, rhom oun piyom, oun mandar penenn t'mer: Kava hi i rhapaskro oun i pipaskro. Kava hi i maal kolendar, kay lenn i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren, oun i maal kol vavarendar, kay čilačo koova kran oun doleske ninna pale-čiddo hi." 
Luke7:35 Me penau t'menge: O Debleskro gosvepen dikenn t'mer ap kolende, kay djivenn koy pal.”" 
Luke7:36 Oun i Farisari, – leskro lab hi Simon, – mangas o Yezouses: “Ab pash mande te rhal!” Oun o Yezous djas an leskro kheer, oun beshas pes tele, te rhal lo leha khetne." 
Luke7:37 Kote his i djouvel an kava foro, koya kras djoungelo koova oun hi pale-čiddo. Oun yoy shounas, te hi o Yezous an ko kheer. Oun yoy las i toushni, kay kouč djet dren hi, oun vas an kava kheer." 
Luke7:38 Oun yoy his tardo pal o Yezouseste oun rovas. Oun lakre sva kran leskre pire sapenes. Oun yoy khossas len peskre ballentsa. Oun yoy čoumras leskre pire, oun makas len o kouč djeteha dren." 
Luke7:39 Har o Farisari kova lauter dikas, penas lo ap peste kokres: “Te vals kava rom čačepah i Debleskro rakepaskro, hounte djinals lo, havi djouvel les an-tapras. Yob hounte djinals, te hi li pale-čiddo.”" 
Luke7:40 Koy penas o Yezous ap leste: “Simon, me hounte penap touke čomone.” “Sikepaskro, pen les mange!” penas lo." 
Luke7:41 Koy penas o Yezous: “Douy kran siyaan pash i rayeste kay love vin patsella. Ko yekes his panč-sheel (500) roupene beme siyaan, ko vavares panč-deesh (50)." 
Luke7:42 Har yon pengro siyaan gar nay playsran, kamas ko ray kol love lendar bouder gar pale te lell. Koon kol douyendar kamas o rayes boudeder?”" 
Luke7:43 Penas o Simon leske: “Me patsau, kova, kay les boudeder siyaan his.” Penas o Yezous: “Tiro hi čačo.”" 
Luke7:44 Oun o Yezous rissras pes trouyel, dikas ap koy djouvyate, oun penas ap o Simoneste: “Dik ap koy djouvyate, oun ap kova, hoy yoy mange kras! Me vom an tiro kheer. Oun tou dal man kek pani, te nay thovom mire pire. Lakre sva kran mire pire sapenes, oun yoy khossas len peskre ballentsa." 
Luke7:45 Tou dal man kek čoum. Yoy čoumras mire pire yaake rah har yoy koy hi. 
Luke7:46 Tou makal gar miro shero kouč djeteha dren. Yoy makas mire pire kouč djeteha dren. 
Luke7:47 Oun me penau touke kanna: Lakri bari doosh hi latar krik lino. Doleske kamell li man o tselo djiyeha. Koneske gar boud doosh krik lino vella, kova kamell man gar i tselo djiyeha.”" 
Luke7:48 Oun o Yezous penas ap late: “Tiri doosh hi toutar krik lino.” 
Luke7:49 Kolla, kay koy pashel beshdo hi, penan ap pende: “Koon hi kava morsh, kay nay lell i doosh i menshendar krik?”" 
Luke7:50 O Yezous penas ap late: “Tou patseh ap mande. Doleske hi tiri doosh toutar krik lino. Dja mo Debleha!” 
Luke8:1 Oun o Yezous djas an i forya oun gaba trouyel, te penell lo i menshenge o lačo lab, kay o Devel kamell len dran o čilačepen vin te lell, oun kamell lengro ray te vell. Leskre deesh-te-douy mala djan leha." 
Luke8:2 Oun boud djouvya, kolen yob sasto kras, djan ninna leha. Mashkral kol djouvyende his ninna kolla, kay bengen an pende his. Efta benga tradas lo dran i Mariate vin, kay kharas ninna Magdalena." 
Luke8:3 Ninna i Susanna djas leha, oun i Yoanna. Lakro rom his o Kouza. Kova his o pralstouno boudepaskro an o Herodeskro kheer. Oun boud vavar djouvya djan leha, te denn le len rhapen oun pipen dran kova, hoy len hi." 
Luke8:4 Dran boud forya van boud menshe pash leste khetne. Oun yob rakras ap lende save laba, kay hi i khatedo čačepen dren." 
Luke8:5 Oun yob penas: “I harho djas vin, te vitsrell lo o djob ap peskro kotar them, te vell ko djob bares. Oun tikne kotya peran ap o drom, oun i menshe stakran len khetne. Oun i čirkle rhan len pre." 
Luke8:6 Oun vavar djob peras ap i barra. Kote his gar doha pani. Oun har ko djob dran i phoub vin vas, rhačras o kham les." 
Luke8:7 Oun vavar djob peras mashkral i soubyengre bourra, oun kol bourra van yaake baro, te las o djob kek dourho bouder, oun yob meras." 
Luke8:8 Vavar djob peras ap i lači phoub, oun vas baro, oun hidjras sheel kope yaake boud.” Pal kova das o Yezous gole: “Moukenn kova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal!”" 
Luke8:9 Oun o Yezouseskre mala poučan lestar: “Hoy kameh tou menge kal labentsa te penell?” 
Luke8:10 Penas lo ap lende: “O Devel moukell t'men te hayvell, har kote djal, kay dell lo menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom. Kova djinenn i vavar menshe gar. Lenge penau laba, kay o čačepen dren khatedo hi. Me rakrau yaake, te dikenn le kova nay, oun hayvenn les gar, oun yaake, te shounenn le les nay, oun hayvenn les gar." 
Luke8:11 Kanna penau t'menge kova yaake, te hayvenn t'mer kova: O djob hi o Debleskro lab." 
Luke8:12 Ko drom hi har o dji kol menshendar, kay shounenn o Debleskro lab. Oun o beng vella, oun lell kova lenge pale dran o dji vin, te patsenn le gar ap o Debleste oun venn gar ap leskro drom." 
Luke8:13 Ko kotar phoub, hoy hi pherde barra, hi har o dji kol menshendar, kay shounenn o Debleskro lab, oun lenn les barhteles pre. O lab vell gar zorelo an lengre djia. I tikno tsiro patsenn le. Oun te vell pharo tsiro ap lende, vitsrenn le pengro patsepen ap i rig." 
Luke8:14 Ko kotar phoub, kay o djob mashkral i soubyengre bourra peras, hi har o dji kol menshendar, kay shounenn o Debleskro lab oun rikrenn les i tsiro an pengre djia. Te vell i daar an lengro djipen, oun te vell o bravlepen glan lengre yaka, oun ko shoukar djipen, palle vell ko lab lendar tassedo oun rakrell bouder gar an lengre djia." 
Luke8:15 Koy lači phoub hi har o dji kol menshendar, kay o Debleskro lab shounenna, oun djivenn koy pal. An lengre djia vell ko lab zorelo. Oun yon ačenn zoreles an o patsepen tardo.”" 
Luke8:16 “Kek rhačell i momeli an, oun čivell i piri pral. Oun kek rhačell i momeli an, oun čivell lat tel o čiben. Na-a, yob čivell lat ap i momelengri, te vell koy momeli diklo hakenestar, kay vella an o kheer." 
Luke8:17 Yaake hi kova ninna o Debleskro labeha. Yek dives dikenn le kova, hoy yon kanna gar dikenna. Yek dives shounenn le oun hayvenn le, hoy yon kanna gar djinenna." 
Luke8:18 Denn yak, te shounenn t'mer ap o Debleskro lab! Koon o Debleskro lab an o dji rikrella, kova hayvell les boud oun boudeder. Koon o Debleskro lab gar an o dji rikrella, koleske vell ninna kova krik lino, hoy yob patsell, te hi les.”" 
Luke8:19 O Yezous his an o kheer oun boud menshe his troul leste. Oun leskri day oun leskre phrala kaman pash leste te djal, oun nay van gar pash leste." 
Luke8:20 Koy penas yek ap leste: “Tiri day oun tire phrala hi vin tardo, oun kamenn tout te dikell.”" 
Luke8:21 Penas lo: “Miri day oun mire phrala hi kolla, kay o Debleskro lab shounenna, oun kova ninna krenna.”" 
Luke8:22 Vas i dives, kay o Yezous peskre malentsa an i bero djas. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Djas ap i vavar panyeskri rig!” Oun yon ouleran ap o baro pani." 
Luke8:23 Har yon ap o baro pani his, sovas lo dren. Oun i baro divyo dourho phourdas pral o baro pani. Oun o pani vas divyo, oun djas pre te tele. Oun boud pani vas an o bero dren, yaake boud, te kamas ko bero tele te djal." 
Luke8:24 Oun yon djan pash leste, djangran les pre, oun penan: “Sikepaskro, sikepaskro, ste pre, mer tassah!” Oun yob stas pre, oun penas ap ko zorelo dourho, hoy phourdas pral o pani: “Ač kanna!” Oun ap o divyo pani penas lo: “Mouk tele!” Oun o zorelo dourho phourdas bouder gar. Oun o pani his bouder gar divyo, oun das bouder kek gole." 
Luke8:25 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Kay hi t'maro patsepen?” Oun yon trashan, oun penan yek ap o vavareste: “Koon hi kava morsh? Yob penell ap o zorelo dourho, te phourdell lo bouder gar, oun ap o pani, te čivell lo pes. Oun yon shounenn ap leste.”" 
Luke8:26 Oun yon ouleran doureder, oun van ap i vavar panyeskri rig an ko them Gerasa. Kava his vergel o them Galilea čiddo." 
Luke8:27 Oun o Yezous djas dran o bero. Kote vas i morsh dran o foro. An koleste his benga. I rah tsiro his yob nango, oun djivas gar an i kheer. Yob djivas an i moulengre khera." 
Luke8:28 Boud kope tapras les o beng. Oun i menshe pandan les sasterne shellentsa ap i vasta oun ap i pire. Yob phagas kol sasterne shelle pestar tele. Oun o beng tradas les an o moulo them. Har ko morsh kanna o Yezouses dikas, vitsras pes lo glan leste ap i phoub. Oun o Yezous penas zoreles ap o bengeste: “Dja lestar vin!” Koy das yob bari gole: “Yezous, čavo o baro Deblestar, hoy kameh tou mandar? Me mangau tout: Ma douke man!”" 
Luke8:29  
Luke8:30 Oun o Yezous poučas lestar: “Har khareh tou?” Penas lo: “Legioni.” Ko lab sikrella, te his boud benga an leste." 
Luke8:31 Oun yon mangan les, te bičrell lo len gar an i telstouni phoub." 
Luke8:32 Oun kote ap koy berga his boud bale, hoy kote rhan. Oun kol benga mangan lestar: “Mouk men an kol balende te djal!” Oun yob moukas len an lende dren te djal." 
Luke8:33 Koy van kol benga dran o morsheste vin, oun djan an kol balende. Oun kol tsele bale van divyo, oun nashan i berga tele, oun stan an o baro pani, oun tassan." 
Luke8:34 Kol morsha, kay dan ap i balende yak, dikan kova, oun nashan an o foro oun an i gaba, oun penan kova i menshenge." 
Luke8:35 Oun kol menshe kaman te dikell, hoy kote djas, oun van pash o Yezouseste. Oun yon dikan ko morshes, dran koleste i benga vin djan. Yob his pash o Yezouseste beshdo, his an-rido, oun bouder gar divyo. Koy van yon dareno." 
Luke8:36 Oun kolla, kay dikan, har kava morsh sasto vas, penan kova kolenge, kay dran i forya oun dran i gaba van." 
Luke8:37 Oun i bari daar vas ap lende. Oun kol boud menshe dran o them Gerasa penan ap o Yezouseste: “Mer mangah tout: Dja touke mendar!” Oun yob djas an o bero, oun ouleras pale." 
Luke8:38 Ko morsh, kay sasto vas, mangas lestar, te ačell lo nay pash leste. O Yezous penas ap leste:" 
Luke8:39 “Dja khere oun pen i menshenge, hoy o Devel touke kras!” Oun kava morsh djas peske, oun penas i tsele menshenge an peskro foro, havo baro koova o Yezous ap leste kras." 
Luke8:40 Oun o Yezous vas pale ap i vavar panyeskri rig. Oun boud menshe his kote tardo, oun lan les kamles pre." 
Luke8:41 Koy vas i morsh pash o Yezouseste. Leskro lab his Yayro. Yob his i pralstouno an i biboldengri kangri. Kova vitsras pes glan o Yezouseste tele, oun mangas les, te vell lo an leskro kheer." 
Luke8:42 Leskri čay, kay his deesh-te-douy bersha phouro, his ap o merepen čiddo. Oun les his kek vavar čave har koya. Oun o Yezous kamas leha te djal. Oun boud menshe his troul leste oun djan lentsa." 
Luke8:43 Koy pashel his i djouvel. Kolat hi deesh-te-douy bersha i ratlo nasslepen. Koya das lauter, hoy lat his djipaske, i dramangren, oun kek nay kras lat sasto." 
Luke8:44 Oun yoy djas pal o Yezouseste, oun tapras ap leskro ripen. Ap yek kopo vas li sasto." 
Luke8:45 “Koon tapras ap miro ripen?” poučas o Yezous. Oun hakeno das bourhoste. Penas o Petro leske: “Ray, boud menshe hi troul toute, oun taprenn tout an.”" 
Luke8:46 Koy penas o Yezous: “Yek tapras man an. Me hayvom, har zoor mandar krik djas.”" 
Luke8:47 Har koy djouvel dikas, kay o Yezous lauter djinas, vas li glan. Oun yoy trissas oun vitsras pes glan leste tele, oun penas glan i tsele menshende, hoske yoy ap leskro ripen tapras, oun kay yoy ap yek kopo sasto vas." 
Luke8:48 Oun o Yezous penas ap late: “Romniya, tiro patsepen kras tout sasto. Dja mo Debleha!”" 
Luke8:49 Oun har o Yezous yaake rakras, vas yek dran o kheer ko pralstunestar pral i biboldengri kangri, oun penas ap leste: “Tiri čay meras. Tou hounte mangess o rayes bouder gar.”" 
Luke8:50 Har o Yezous kova shounas, penas lo ap ko pralstuneste: “Ma traash! Tiri čay djivella. Pats man!”" 
Luke8:51 Oun o Yezous djas an ko kheer. Oun o Yohanni oun o Petro oun o Yakobo djan leha. Oun o čakro dad oun lakri day djan ninna lentsa. Oun o Yezous moukas kek vavares an kava kheer dren te djal. 
Luke8:52 Oun halauter rovan, oun dan pengre vasta pral o shero khetne. Oun yob penas ap lende: “Ma rovenn! Yoy hi gar mouli. Yoy sovella.”" 
Luke8:53 Yon djinan, te meras li, oun san pral leste." 
Luke8:54 Oun o Yezous tapras lakro vast, oun penas ap late: “Čay, ste pre!”" 
Luke8:55 Koy vas pale djipen an late, oun yoy stas pre. Oun yob penas, te anenn le lake čomone te rhal." 
Luke8:56 Lakro dad oun lakri day kran bare yaka pral kova, hoy koy djas. Oun o Yezous penas lenge, te penenn le kekeske, hoy yob kras." 
Luke9:1 Pal kova das lo peskre deesh-te-douy malen pash peste gole, oun das len i zoor pral i tsele benga, te nay tradenn le len dran i menshende vin, oun te nay krenn le i nasselen sasto." 
Luke9:2 Oun yob bičras len pash i menshende, te penenn le lenge, te hi o tsiro kanna kay, kay o Devel i menshen pash peste gole della, te djan le ap leskro drom. Oun yob bičras len ninna, te krenn le i nasselen sasto." 
Luke9:3 Oun yob penas lenge: “Te djan t'mer ap o drom, ma lenn či peha: kek kasht, kek possita, kek maro, kek love, vitar gar i douyto gad!" 
Luke9:4 Te lell yek t'men an peskro kheer dren, ačenn pash leste yaake rah, bis te djan doureder!" 
Luke9:5 Oun te lenn le t'men gar an pengro kheer dren, djan t'menge dran kava foro, oun denn koy čik t'mare pirendar tele! Oun kova sikrell i menshende, kay yon čilačo hi.”" 
Luke9:6 Oun o Yezouseskre deesh-te-douy mala kran pen ap o drom, oun djan an yek gab pal o vavar, penan i menshenge o Debleskro lab, oun kran i nasselen sasto kote, kay yon ninna djan." 
Luke9:7 O Herodes, ko baro ray pral o them Galilea, shounas lauter, hoy o Yezous krella. Oun yob djinas gar, hoy te patsell lo. His menshe koy, kay penan: “O Yohanni stas i moulendar pre.”" 
Luke9:8 Vavar penan: “O Eliya vas pale.” Oun ninna vavar penan: “Yek kol phoure Debleskre rakepangrendar stas i moulendar pre.” 
Luke9:9 O Herodes penas: “Me moukom o Yohanneskro shero tele te dell. Koon hi kova, kay shounau savo koova pral leste?” Oun yob kamas o Yezouses te dikell." 
Luke9:10 Oun kol deesh-te-douy bičepangre van pale, oun penan o Yezouseske, hoy yon lauter kran. Oun o Yezous las len peha, te vell lo lentsa kokres, oun djas lentsa pash ko foro Betsayda." 
Luke9:11 Har i menshe dikan, te djas o Yezous pash o foro Betsayda, djan boud leske palla. Oun yob moukas len pash peste te vell, oun penas lenge, te dell o Devel len pash peste gole, te djivell lo lentsa khetne. Oun kolen, kay nasselo hi, kras lo sasto." 
Luke9:12 Oun o kham djas tele, oun o Yezouseskre deesh-te-douy mala van pash leste, oun penan leske: “Biče kal menshen toutar, te djan le an i gaba, oun pash i harhende, te lenn le penge čomone te rhal, oun te dikenn le kote, kay yon pral i rati nay ačenna! Kate, kay mer ham, della či te rhal.”" 
Luke9:13 O Yezous penas ap lende: “Denn t'mer len čomone te rhal!” Penan le leske: “Men hi gar boudeder har panč mare oun douy mače. Kameh tou, te ginas kolenge lauterenge te rhal?”" 
Luke9:14 Kote his nay yaake panč zerya morsha, ninna boud djouvya oun čave. O Yezous penas ap peskre malende: “Krenn, te beshenn pen le yaake khetne, te hi kate panč-deesh beshdo oun kote panč-deesh beshdo!”" 
Luke9:15 Oun leskre mala kran yaake. Oun lauter beshan pen. 
Luke9:16 Oun yob las kol panč mare oun kol douy mače, oun dikas pre ap o bolepen, oun parkras pes pash o Debleste. Oun palle phagas yob kol mare oun mače an kotya, oun das len peskre malende, te denn le len i menshende." 
Luke9:17 Oun yon rhan, oun van lauter čalo. Oun yon hadan kol kotya pre, hoy pral ačan. Koy van deesh-te-douy marengre gone pherdo." 
Luke9:18 His i dives, kote his o Yezous kokres peskre malentsa, oun mangas o Debles an. Oun pal kova poučas lo lendar: “Hoy penenn kol menshe, koon me hom?”" 
Luke9:19 Penan le leske: “Yon penenna, kay tou hal o Yohanni, kova, kay taufras i menshen. Vavar penenn: Kova hi o Eliya. Oun pale vavar penenn: Yek kol phoure Debleskre rakepangrendar stas i moulendar pre.”" 
Luke9:20 Poučas lo lendar: “T'mer, hoy penenn t'mer, koon me hom?” Penas o Petro: “Tou hal o Kristo, ko baro ray, kay menge o Deblestar bičedo vas.”" 
Luke9:21 Koy penas lo lenge, te penenn le kova kekeske." 
Luke9:22 Oun yob penas: “Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, hounte lap boud douka ap mande. I bare rashaya oun i biboldengre phoureder oun čačepangre čivenn man ap i rig. Oun me hounte vap moulo dino, oun pal triin divessa krell man o Devel djido.”" 
Luke9:23 Oun o Yezous penas ap lauterende: “Koon ap miro drom mantsa djala, kova hounte bistrell, hoy leske kokres mishto hi, oun lell peskro troushel hako dives ap peste oun djal mantsa." 
Luke9:24 Koon kamell peskro djipen te rikrell, kova nashrell les. Koon peskro djipen mange nashrella, lell les mandar pale." 
Luke9:25 I mensheske vals kova gar mishto, te lals lo o tselo bravlepen ap kay phoub, oun te vals lo o Debleske nashedo." 
Luke9:26 Kova, kay ladjell pes mange oun mire labenge, koleske ladjau me ninna, te vau me, o Mensheskro Čavo, pale. Ap ko dives hi man ko raylepen, kay hi ninna miro dades oun o Debleskre bolepangren." 
Luke9:27 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kate hi menshe tardo, kolla merenna gar, bis te dikenn le o Debleskro raylepen oun zoor, hoy an mande diklo vella.”" 
Luke9:28 Pal orhta divessa las o Yezous o Petres, o Yohannes, oun o Yakobes, oun djas lentsa ap i berga, te rakrell lo o Debleha." 
Luke9:29 Oun har yob rakras o Debleha, dikas peskro mouy vavarčandes vin, oun leskre koola van rayles biyalo." 
Luke9:30 Ap yek kopo rakran douy morsha leha. Kolla his o Mose oun o Eliya. 
Luke9:31 Kol douyen his i bolepaskro raylepen, oun rakran leha pral leskro merepen an o foro Yerusalem." 
Luke9:32 O Petro oun kol douy vavar his yaake khino, te sovan le. Har yon pre djangran, dikan le o Yezouses, har yob an peskro bolepaskro raylepen koy tardo his, oun kol douy morshen, o Moses oun o Eliyas, pash leste." 
Luke9:33 Oun har kol douy morsha kaman penge te djal, penas o Petro ap o Yezouseste: “Ray, hi mishto, te ham kay. Mouk men triin tikne khera te krell, yek touke, yek o Moseske, oun yek o Eliyeske.” Oun yob djinas gar, hoy rakrell lo kote." 
Luke9:34 Oun har yob yaake rakras, vas i folka pral lende tele. Oun len his traash, har yon an koy folka dren van." 
Luke9:35 Koy shounan le i rakepen dran i folka, hoy penas: “Kava hi mo čavo, yob hi o vi-rodedo! Shounenn ap leste!”" 
Luke9:36 Oun har ko rakepen pre-heras, dikan le, kay o Yezous kokres koy tardo hi. Kol triin rikran kova lauter penge, oun penan an ko tsiro kekeske, hoy yon dikan." 
Luke9:37 Oun o vavar dives djan le koy berga tele, oun boud menshe van pash leste." 
Luke9:38 Mashkral lende his i morsh, kay das bari gole: “Sikepaskro, me mangau tout: Dik ap miro čaveste! Man hi kokres kava čavo, kek vavar." 
Luke9:39 I beng taprell les yaake, kay dell lo ap yek kopo bari gole, oun perell ap i phoub. Oun palle vell čounger dran leskro mouy. Ko beng kamell les bouder gar te djal moukell, oun kamell les te marell." 
Luke9:40 Me mangom tire malendar, te tradenn le o benges lestar vin. Oun yon hayvan kova gar te krell.”" 
Luke9:41 Koy penas o Yezous: “T'mer čilače menshe. T'men hi kek patsepen. Har rah tsiro hounte ačap pash t'mende, te marap man tele t'mentsa? An tiro čaves pash mande!”" 
Luke9:42 Har o čavo vas, vitsras ko beng o čaves ap i phoub, oun tserdas les yek rigyatar ap i vavar. Koy das o Yezous ko benges trad, oun kras o čaves sasto, oun das les peskro dadeste pale." 
Luke9:43 Oun lauterenge, kay kote tardo his, ačas o rakepen krik pral koy bari Debleskri zoor. Har yon yaake bare yaka kran pral kova, hoy o Yezous kras, penas lo ap peskre malende:" 
Luke9:44 “Ma bistrenn, hoy me t'menge penau: Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, vau an i menshengre vasta dino!”" 
Luke9:45 Kal laba hayvan le gar. Kova, hoy yob lenge kate penas, djas gar an lengro shero dren. Yaake djinan le gar, pral hoy yob rakras oun trashan, te poučenn le lestar pral kol laba." 
Luke9:46 Yek dives čingran pen leskre mala koy pral, koon lendar o pralstouno hi." 
Luke9:47 Har o Yezous hayvas, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djala, las yob i čaves pash peste," 
Luke9:48 oun penas ap lende: “Kova, kay lell kava čaves pash peste pre an miro lab, kova lell man pash peste pre. Koon man pre lella, kova lell koles pre, kay bičras man. Koon mashkral t'mende o tikneder hi, kova hi baro.”" 
Luke9:49 Koy penas o Yohanni ap o Yezouseste: “Ray, mer dikam i morshes. Kova tradas i bengen vin an tiro lab. Oun kova his kek mendar. Doleske penam leske: Ma kre kova bouder!”" 
Luke9:50 O Yezous penas ap lende: “Moukenn les! Koon hi gar čilačo ap t'mende, kova hi ap t'mari rig tardo.”" 
Luke9:51 Har ko tsiro kay his, te vell o Yezous maredo, kras pes lo ap o drom, te djal lo an o foro Yerusalem. Oun kek nay rikras les pale." 
Luke9:52 Oun yob bičras morshen glan peste ap kava drom. Kolla djan, oun van an i gab an o them Samaria. Kote rodan yon leske i kheer, kay nay ačell lo pral i rati." 
Luke9:53 I menshe an ko gab shounan, kay kamell lo an o foro Yerusalem te djal. Doleske lan yon les gar pash pende pre." 
Luke9:54 Har leskre mala, o Yakobo oun o Yohanni, kova dikan, penan yon ap leste: “Ray, te kameh tou, moukah mer yag dran o bolepen tele te perell, hoy rhačrell len.”" 
Luke9:55 O Yezous rissras pes trouyel, oun čingras ap lende." 
Luke9:56 Oun yon djan an i vavar gab. 
Luke9:57 Oun har yon ap o drom his, penas i morsh ap o Yezouseste: “Me kamau touha te djal, kay tou ninna djah.”" 
Luke9:58 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “I divye djouklen hi i čiben an i phoub, kay sovenn le. Oun i čirklen hi i tikne khera ap i rouka. Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, man hi či, kay nay čivap man tele, te sovap.”" 
Luke9:59 Ap i vavar morsheste penas yob: “Am mantsa!” Kova penas: “Mouk man khere te djal, te paskrap miro dades! Pal kova djau touha.”" 
Luke9:60 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Mouk kol moule pengre moulen te paskrell! Dja oun pen i menshenge, kay o tsiro kanna kay hi, kay o Devel kamell len dran o čilačepen te lell, oun kamell lengro ray te vell!”" 
Luke9:61 Oun i vavar morsh penas ap o Yezouseste: “Me kamaus te djap khere, te penap mire menshenge: Ačenn mo Debleha! Oun palle kamoms touha te djal.”" 
Luke9:62 Ap leste penas o Yezous: “Koon kamell o Debleske te boudrell, oun dikell ap vavar koova, kova boudrella gar mishto o Debleske. Yob hi har i harho, kay boudrell ap peskri kotar phoub, oun dikell pal peste. Leskri boudi hi či moldo.”" 
Luke10:1 Pal kova rodas o Yezous vavar efta-deesh morshen vin. Oun yob bičras len ap o drom glan peste, te djan le an i forya oun gaba, kay yob ninna vella. Hako kopo djan douy morsha khetne." 
Luke10:2 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Boud djob hi vin tardo, te vell lo an o kheer dren anlo. Yaake hi boud menshe koy, kay kamenn pash o Debleste te vell. Oun hi gar doha boudepangre koy, te anenn le len pash leste. Doleske mangenn o Deblestar, te bičrell lo boudepangren, kay leske boudrenna!" 
Luke10:3 Djan kanna! Me bičrau t'men har bakre mashkral kol divye djouklende. 
Luke10:4 Lenn kek love peha, kek possita, oun kek vavar kirrha, har kolla, hoy ap t'mare pire hi! Oun ačenn gar ap o drom tardo, te rakrenn t'mer yekeha!" 
Luke10:5 Te venn t'mer an i kheer, rakrenn o Debleskri barht pral kol menshende vin!" 
Luke10:6 Te hi i mensho kote, kay kamell koy barht, hoy o Devel an leskro dji della, ap koleste vell o Debleskri barht. Te kamell yek gar koy barht, hoy o Devel an leskro dji della, kova lell o Debleskri barht gar." 
Luke10:7 Ačenn an ko kheer, kay yon t'men pre lan! Rhan oun piyenn kova, hoy yon t'men denna! Hako boudepaskro lell peskro rhapen kolendar, kolenge yob boudrella. T'mer hounte djan gar an yek kheer pal o vavar." 
Luke10:8 Te venn t'mer an i foro, oun yon lenn t'men pre, rhan, hoy yon t'men denna!" 
Luke10:9 Krenn sasto kol nasselen, kay kote hi! Oun penenn i menshenge: O tsiro vell sik, kay lell o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin.”" 
Luke10:10 Oun yob penas doureder: “Te venn t'mer an i foro, oun yon lenn t'men gar an i kheer dren, palle djan vin ap i dromma oun penenn:" 
Luke10:11 Ninna koy čik dran t'maro foro, hoy ap mare pire hi, čivah mer tele. Kova sikrell t'men, kay t'mer kaman gar, te vell o Devel t'maro ray." 
Luke10:12 Me penau t'menge: Ap ko dives, kay o Devel o čačepen pral i tsele menshende ap i phoub vi-rakrella, lenna kol menshe, kay lan t'men gar pre, i bareder phagi har kol menshe an o foro Sodom.”" 
Luke10:13 “Bibarhtelo venna t'mer menshe an o foro Betsayda! Bibarhtelo venna t'mer menshe an o foro Korazin! Te krals yek an i forya Tirus oun Sidon savo baro koova an o Debleskri zoor, har me pash t'mende krom, rivans i menshe kote i gono troul pende, oun beshans pen an i yagakri čik, te sikrenn le, kay lengro čilačepen khaytell len. Oun yon moukans pengro čilačo drom, oun djans ap o Debleskro drom." 
Luke10:14 Ap ko dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen pral i menshende vin, djal kol menshenge an i forya Tirus oun Sidon feteder har t'menge kate." 
Luke10:15 Oun t'mer menshe an o foro Kapernaum, patsenn t'mer, kay venn t'mer an o bolepen hadedo? Na-a! T'mer venna tele an o moulengro them vitsedo.”" 
Luke10:16 Pale penas o Yezous ap peskre malende: “Koon ap t'mende shounella, kova shounella ap mande. Oun koon shounell gar ap t'mende, kova shounell vitar gar ap mande. Kova, kay shounell gar ap mande, kova shounell ninna gar ap koleste, kay bičras man.”" 
Luke10:17 Oun kol efta-deesh van pale pash o Yezouseste. Oun yon his barhtelo, oun penan leske: “Ninna i benga shounenn ap mende, te penah mer lenge an tiro lab: Djan dran i menshende vin!”" 
Luke10:18 Koy penas o Yezous ap peskre malende: “Me dikom o benges, har peras lo dran o bolepen har i yag." 
Luke10:19 Shounenn: Me dom t'men i zoor pral o bengeskri tseli zoor. T'mer stakrenna ap i sapa oun ap i skorpione. Oun kek nay doukrell t'men. 
Luke10:20 Avenn gar barhtelo, te shounenn i benga ap t'mende! Avenn barhtelo, kay t'maro lab an o bolepen dren činlo hi!”" 
Luke10:21 An ko tsiro das o Debleskro Dourho o Yezouses i bari barht an o dji. Oun yob penas: “Tata, tou hal o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub, oun me sharau tout. Kova, hoy tou kreh, sikral tou kolende, kay gar boud djinenna. Oun kolla, kay gosevo hi oun boud djinenna, kolla hayvenn kova gar. Ava, yaake kamal tou kova." 
Luke10:22 Lauter das miro dad an mire vasta. Oun kek djinella, koon o čavo hi, har kokres o dad. Oun kokres o čavo djinella, koon o dad hi. Oun o čavo sikrell o dades kolende, kay yob vin rodas.”" 
Luke10:23 Pal kova penas o Yezous ap peskre malende kokres: “Barhtelo nay han t'mer, kay t'mer kova lauter dikenna, hoy o Devel krella." 
Luke10:24 Me penau t'menge: Boud Debleskre rakepangre oun bare raya kaman te dikell, hoy t'mer dikenna, oun dikan les gar. Oun yon kaman te shounell, hoy t'mer shounenna, oun shounan les gar.”" 
Luke10:25 His i dives, koy vas i biboldengro čačepaskro pash o Yezouseste. Oun kova poučas lestar čomone, te djinell lo, har gosevo o Yezous hi. Oun yob poučas lestar: “Sikepaskro, hoy hounte krap me, te lap o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella? ”" 
Luke10:26 Penas o Yezous leske: “Hoy penell touke o Debleskro lab? Hoy hi kote činlo?” 
Luke10:27 Penas ko morsh: “Tou hounte kamess tiro Debles o tselo djiyestar, an tiro tselo djipen, tiri tseli zoryah, oun an lauter, hoy tou djineh. Oun ap i vavar mensheste hounte vess yaake lačes, har hal lačes ap toute kokres.”" 
Luke10:28 Penas o Yezous leske: “Tiro hi čačo. Kre lauter yaake, oun tou djiveh!”" 
Luke10:29 Oun ko morsheske his kova, hoy o Yezous leske penas, gar doha, oun yob poučas pale: “Koon hi kol vavar, te vap lačes ap lende?”" 
Luke10:30 Oun o Yezous penas ap leste: “I morsh vas dran o foro Yerusalem, oun kamas te djal an o foro Yericho. Oun i čorepangre peran pral leste, oun dan les, oun lan leske lauter krik, oun moukan les paash-mulo čiddo." 
Luke10:31 Ap ko tsiro djas i rashay ap ko drom. Har yob kava morshes dikas, djas lo doureder." 
Luke10:32 Ninna i morsh, kay boudrell an o Debleskro baro kheer, djas ap ko drom, oun dikas kava morshes, oun djas doureder." 
Luke10:33 Palle djas i morsh, kay vas dran o them Samaria ap ko drom, kay ko morsh čiddo hi. Oun har dikas lo les, djas kova leske phares an o dji." 
Luke10:34 Yob djas pash leste, čoras djet oun mool kote, kay yob dino oun činlo vas, oun pandas layntikre kotya trouyel. Palle hadas les lo ap peskro gray, oun anas les an i kerčima, oun dikas, kay vell les sopaske oun rhapaske." 
Luke10:35 O vavar dives taysarlake das lo douy roupene beme o rayeste an koy kerčima, oun penas: De les rhapen oun pipen! Te hi kol love gar doha leske, dau toute boudeder, te vau pale.”" 
Luke10:36 Oun o Yezous penas: “Triin morsha dikan koles, kay dino oun vi-čoredo vas. Koon lendar kras yaake ap koleste, har te kras mer ap i vavarende?”" 
Luke10:37 Penas o biboldengro čačepaskro ap leste: “Kova, kay kras peskro dji leske pre.” Pale penas o Yezous leske: “Dja, oun kre kova ninna yaake!”" 
Luke10:38 Oun o Yezous djas peskre malentsa doureder ap o drom. Oun yon van an i gab. Kote his i djouvel. Kolakro lab his Marta. Koya las les pash peste an o kheer dren. 
Luke10:39 Oun kolat his i pheen. Koya kharas Maria. Yoy beshas pes glan leskre pire, oun shounas, hoy yob penas." 
Luke10:40 I Marta kras peske boud boudi, te dell li len te rhal oun te piyell. Yoy djas pash o Yezouseste, oun penas: “Ray, hi touke kova yek, kay miri pheen moukell man lauter kokres te krell? Pen lake, te boudrell li mantsa!”" 
Luke10:41 Koy penas o ray: “Marta, Marta, tou mareh tout tele, oun kreh touke boud boudi." 
Luke10:42 Dell yek koova, hoy boud moldo hi, oun i Maria hatsas les. Kova vell latar gar krik lino.”" 
Luke11:1 Yek dives, har o Yezous o Debleha rakras, penas yek peskre malendar ap leste: “Sike men, har te rakras o Debleha! Ninna o Yohanni sikras peskre malende, har yon hounte rakrenn o Debleha.”" 
Luke11:2 Penas o Yezous ap peskre malende: “Te rakrenn o Debleha, penenn: Maro dad, tiro lab vell sharedo. Te vell ko tsiro sik, kay tou o ray hal pral i tseli phoub!" 
Luke11:3 De men maro hako dives! 
Luke11:4 Oun biste maro čilačepen, hoy mer kram! Oun ninna mer bistrah o čilačepen, hoy i vavar ap mende kran. Ma mouk men tiro dromestar tele te djal!”" 
Luke11:5 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Te hi yekes t'mendar i maal, oun kova djal mashkral an i rati pash leste oun penell: Kamlo maal, pats man triin mare!" 
Luke11:6 I maal mandar vas pash mande. Oun man hi či an o kheer, hoy nay dau les te rhal." 
Luke11:7 Penals lo ap leste: Čava, ma de kek sau gole! O voudar hi klidedo. Oun mire čave oun me hom an o čiben. Me nay stau gar pre, te dap tout čomone te rhal." 
Luke11:8 Me penau t'menge: Yob stell pre oun dell les yaake boud, har ko vavares hounte vell. Kova krell lo gar doleske, kay hi o vavar leskro maal. Kova krell lo doleske, kay mangas les o vavar yaake boud oun moukas gar tele." 
Luke11:9 Doleske penau t'menge: Mangenn o Debles! Oun o Devel dell t'men! Rodenn les! Oun t'mer hatsenn les. Denn ap o voudar! Oun o voudar vell t'menge pre kerdo. 
Luke11:10 Koon mangella, kova lella. Koon rodella, kova hatsella. Oun koon ap o voudar della, koleske vell pre kerdo." 
Luke11:11 Mashkral t'mende hi kek morsh, kay dell peskro čaves i sap, te mangas yob lestar i mačo." 
Luke11:12 Vitar gar dell kek dad peskro čaves i skorpiono, te mangas yob lestar i yaro." 
Luke11:13 Ninna te han t'mer čilače menshe, denn t'mer t'mare čaven lačo koova. Har boud boudeder dell t'maro dad an o bolepen peskro Dourho kolende, kay les mangenna.”" 
Luke11:14 His i dives, koy tradas o Yezous i benges vin dran i morsheste, kay nay rakras gar. Har ko beng dran leste vin djas, nay rakras ko morsh pale. Oun kol boud menshe, kay troul lende tardo his, kran bare yaka." 
Luke11:15 Mashkral lende his save, kay penan: “O pralstouno beng das les koy zoor. Doleske nay tradell yob kol bengen vin.”" 
Luke11:16 Vavar kaman lestar i baro Debleskro koova te dikell, te sikrell lo, kay o Devel les bičras." 
Luke11:17 O Yezous djinas, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djala, oun penas ap lende: “Te kourenn pen i bare raya an yek them, palle djal ko them paash, oun i tsele khera perenn khetne." 
Luke11:18 Te tradell o beng i vavar benges vin, djal leskri zoor paash. T'mer penan mange, kay me tradau i bengen dran o bengeskri zoor vin." 
Luke11:19 Poučau t'mendar: Me te tradau i bengen dran o bengeskri zoor vin, har nay tradenn t'mare menshe len vin? Vell i dives, kay yon penenn t'menge, kay kova gar čačo hi, hoy t'mer pral mande rakran." 
Luke11:20 Na-a, me tradau i bengen dran o Debleskri zoor vin. Ap kova dikenn t'mer, kay ko tsiro vas, kay o Devel i menshen dran o čilačepen vin lella, oun leskri zoor mank t'mende hi." 
Luke11:21 Te dell i zorelo morsh garda ap peskro baro kheer, oun les hi i rharo an o vast, nay čorell leske i vavar či." 
Luke11:22 Yek te vell, kay hi zorleder har yob, oun dell les khetne, palle lell lo leskro rharo krik, hoy leskri zoor his oun lell kova, hoy ko vavar čoras oun dell les ninna i vavarende." 
Luke11:23 Koon hi gar ap miri rig, kova hi ap ko vavareskri rig. Oun koon anell gar mantsa i menshen pash o Debleste, kova tradell len o Deblestar.”" 
Luke11:24 “Te djas i beng dran i mensheste vin, nashell yob an i them trouyel, kay kek djipen hi, oun rodell peske, kay ačell yob nay. Yob te hatsell či, penell lo ap peste: Me kamau pale an miro kheer te djal, dran hoy me vin djom." 
Luke11:25 Oun te vell lo pale, hi ko kheer djoudjo oun shoukar." 
Luke11:26 Koy rodell lo peske vavar efta bengen, kay hi čilačeder har yob. Oun kol benga djan an ko mensheste dren, oun djivenn an leste. Yaake hi ko mensheha djoungleder har glan ko tsiro.”" 
Luke11:27 Boud menshe his troul o Yezouseste tardo. Oun har yob kova penas, das i djouvel gole: “Barhteli hi koy day, kolatar tou boldo val!”" 
Luke11:28 Koy penas lo: “Barhtele hi kolla, kay ap o Debleskro lab shounenna, oun kova ninna krenna, hoy o Devel penella.”" 
Luke11:29 Oun boudeder menshe van pash leste, oun his troul leste tardo. Oun yob penas: “Har čilačo hi kol menshe, kay djivenn an kava tsiro! Yon kamenn i baro Debleskro koova te dikell. Oun o Devel sikrell len či vavar har kova, hoy i menshe ninna ap o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yona, dikan." 
Luke11:30 Yaake har i menshe an o foro Ninive dikan, te vas o Yona bičedo o Deblestar, yaake dikenna i menshe an kava tsiro, te vas o Mensheskro Čavo o Deblestar bičedo." 
Luke11:31 Ap ko dives, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende, stella ninna i bari rani dran o foro Saba pre. Oun yoy penella, te hi kol menshe čilačo, kay kanna djivenna. Glan i rah tsiro vas yoy dran i dour them, oun vas pash o baro ray Salomo, te shounell li leskre goseve laba. Kava, kay glan t'mende tardo hi, kava hi bareder har o baro ray Salomo." 
Luke11:32 Ap ko tsiro, kay rakrell o Devel o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende ap i phoub, stenna ninna i menshe dran o foro Ninive pre. Oun yon penenna, te hi kal menshe, kay kanna djivenna, čilačo. Glan rah tsiro penas o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yona, i menshenge an o foro Ninive o Debleskro lab. Oun yon moukan pengro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom. Kava, kay glan t'mende tardo hi, kava hi bareder har o Yona.”" 
Luke11:33 “Kek krell i momeli an, oun khatrell lat, vitar gar čivell lo lat tel i piri. Yob čivell lat pral, te dikell nay hakeno, kay dren vella." 
Luke11:34 O mensheskro yak hi har i momeli an i kheer. Te dikeh kokres ap o Debleste, hi kova yaake, har te rhačell koy momeli mishto. Te dikeh ap vavar koova oun gar ap o Debleste, hi kova yaake, har te rhačell kek momeli an kava kheer." 
Luke11:35 Doleske penau touke: De garda, te rhačell tiri momeli oun djal gar vin!" 
Luke11:36 Te rhačell i momeli an o tselo kheer, oun či ačella an o tamlepen, palle hi kova yaake, har te dikenn le i momeli dran hake valya.”" 
Luke11:37 Har o Yezous yaake rakras, vas i Farisari pash leste oun mangas lestar, te vell yob pash leste, te rhal lo leha khetne. Oun o Yezous djas leha an leskro kheer, oun beshas pes tele, te rhal lo." 
Luke11:38 Har ko Farisari dikas, te thovas o Yezous gar peskre vasta glan o rhapen, har biboldengro koova hi, kras yob bare yaka." 
Luke11:39 Koy penas o Yezous ap leste: “T'mer Farisarya, t'mer thovenn t'mare khore oun čare vriyal. Oun t'maro dji hi pherdo čorepen oun čilačepen." 
Luke11:40 T'mer hayvan či! O Devel, kay kras o tselo menshes, kras ninna leskro dji." 
Luke11:41 Denn i čorvelende kova, hoy t'men an t'mare khore oun čare dren hi! Oun či hi t'menge pale-čiddo." 
Luke11:42 T'mer Farisarya, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'mer denna o Debleske o deshto kotar t'maro tselo zenlepastar, hoy an t'mari baar hi, oun t'mer bistrenn o čačepen oun o Debleskro kamlepen. Kava hounte krenn, oun ko vavar moukenn gar!" 
Luke11:43 T'mer Farisarya, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'mer kamenn ap i pralstoune beshepangre an i biboldengri kangri te beshell. Oun t'mer kamenn, te penenn i menshe ap o drom: Lačo dives, mo ray, ap t'mende." 
Luke11:44 T'mer Farisarya, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'mer han har i handako, hoy tele an i phoub hi. Oun i menshe djan pral vergel, oun djinenn gar, kay i moule koy paskedo hi.”" 
Luke11:45 Koy penas i biboldengro čačepaskro: “Sikepaskro, te peneh tou kal laba, praaseh tou men ninna.”" 
Luke11:46 Koy penas o Yezous: “T'mer čačepangre, t'mer krenna, hoy gar mishto hi. T'mer krenn i menshenge o djipen pharo. Ko tselo koova, hoy yon hounte rikrenn, hi har i pharo gono ap lengri phik. Oun t'mer rikrenn t'men gar ap kova." 
Luke11:47 T'mer Farisarya, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'mer krenn shoukar moulengre khera kolenge, kay his o Debleskre rakepangre. Kolen maran t'mare phoure." 
Luke11:48 Yaake penenn t'mer: Ava, mer djinah, hoy mare phoure kran. Kova his mishto. Me penau t'menge: Yon maran o Debleskre rakepangren. Oun t'mer krenn kolenge i moulengre khera." 
Luke11:49 O Devel djinas kova. Doleske penas lo glan i rah tsiro: Me bičrau mire rakepangren oun mire bičepangren pash lende. Oun mashkral lende hi save morsha, kay venn lendar maredo, oun vavar venn palla lino." 
Luke11:50 Doleske vell i tseli bibarht ap kal menshende, kay kanna djivenna. Yon oun lengre phoure maran i Debleskre rakepangren, yaake rah har i phoub tardo hi." 
Luke11:51 O Abel vas maredo glan i tsele vavar menshende. Pal leste maran le vavar menshen pale te pale. Pal lauterende vavarende vas o Zakari maredo. Kova vas maredo pash i sasterni rhačepaskri an o Debleskro baro kheer. Čačepah, me penau t'menge: I tseli bibarht vell ap kal menshende, kay kanna djivenna." 
Luke11:52 T'mer čačepangre, hoy t'mer krenna, ko hi gar mishto. T'mer lan o klidepaskro krik, hoy krell o voudar ap o Debleskro drom pre. T'mer djan gar ap ko drom. Oun kolla, kay kamenn ap o Debleskro drom te djal, moukenn t'mer gar koy pre.”" 
Luke11:53 Oun har o Yezous djas peske, lan les i čačepangre oun i Farisarya rhoyedo palla, oun poučan zoreles lestar boud koova." 
Luke11:54 Oun yon dan yak ap hako lab lestar, te nay taprenn le les leskre labentsa." 
Luke12:1 Ap ko tsiro van boud zerya menshe khetne, yaake te stakras yek o vavareske ap i pire. Koy penas o Yezous ap peskre malende, gar ap kol vavarende: Denn garda, te rakrenn gar douy čipyentsa har i Farisarya! Kova hi har shoutlo yarro, hoy krell o tselo yarro shoutlo." 
Luke12:2 Vell o dives, kay vell kova diklo, hoy kanna khatedo hi. Vell o dives, kay djinell hakeno kova, hoy kanna kek djinella." 
Luke12:3 Djinenn! Vell o dives, kay shounell hakeno, hoy t'mer čorrhanes rakran. Oun kova, hoy t'mer pal o pandlo voudar i vavareske an o kand penan, kova penenn le bari golyah ap o drom." 
Luke12:4 T'mer han mire mala, oun me penau t'menge: Ma trashenn i menshendar. Yon nay marenn t'men. Boudeder har kova nay krenn le gar." 
Luke12:5 Me kamau t'men te sikrell, konestar hounte čačepah trashenn: Trashenn o Deblestar, kay les i zoor hi, te vitsrell lo yekes pal o merepen an o bengeskri yag! Ava, kova penau t'menge: Kolestar trashenn!" 
Luke12:6 Panč tikne čirkle hi glan i menshende gar boudeder moldo har douy beme. Glan o Debleste hi kek lendar bistedo. 
Luke12:7 Ninna djinell o Devel kitse balla ap t'maro shero hi. Doleske ma darenn! T'mer molenna boudeder har boud čirkle. 
Luke12:8 Me penau t'menge: Koon glan i menshende penella: O Yezous hi miro ray! kolestar penau me glan o Debleskre bolepangre: Yob hi miro. 
Luke12:9 Koon man bourhoste della glan i menshende, koles dau me ninna bourhoste glan o Debleskre bolepangre." 
Luke12:10 Koon djoungele laba pral o Menshengro Čaveste penella, koleske nay bistrell o Devel kol laba, hoy yob penas. Koon praasell o Debleskro Dourhes, koleske nay bistrell o Devel kol laba gar, hoy yob penas." 
Luke12:11 Te anenn i menshe t'men glan i čačepangre oun glan i rayende oun pralstunende, ma darenn, hoy t'mer hounte rakrenna." 
Luke12:12 O Debleskro Dourho sikrell t'men ap ko tsiro, hoy t'mer hounte penenna." 
Luke12:13 Yek kol boud menshendar, kay kote khetne hi, penas ap o Yezouseste: “Sikepaskro, pen miro phraleske, te dell yob mande miro kotar dran ko bravlepen, hoy maro dad menge moukas, har yob meras!”" 
Luke12:14 Penas o Yezous ap koleste: “Romeha, kova hi gar miri boudi.”" 
Luke12:15 Palle penas o Yezous ap kolende, kay troul leste tardo hi: “Denn garda! Ma nashenn boud bravlepen palla! O tselo bravlepen, hoy i mensho khetne anas, krell o mensheskro djipen gar braveles.”" 
Luke12:16 Oun o Yezous penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Oun yob penas: “His i bravelo harho. Ap leskro kotar phoub vas boud djob baro." 
Luke12:17 Oun ko bravelo penas ap peste: Hoy krap kanna? Djinau gar, kay anau nay o tselo djob dren." 
Luke12:18 Oun yob penas: Kanna djinau, hoy krap. Me phagau mire khera tele, kay miro djob dren hi, oun krau len bareder. Kote dren čivau miro tselo djob oun o vavar lačo koova, hoy anom khetne." 
Luke12:19 Oun me nay penau ap mande: Kova krom mishto. Kanna hi man boud bersha lačo koova o djipaske oun boudrap bouder gar. Me rhau oun piyau oun krau miro djipen mange mishto. 
Luke12:20 O Devel penell ap leste: Tou dinelo! Kay rat hounte meress tou. Koon lell tiro tselo bravlepen, hoy tou touke khetne anal?”" 
Luke12:21 O Yezous penas doureder: “Yaake djal koleske, kay anas peske boud bravlepen khetne, oun hi čorvelo glan o Debleste.”" 
Luke12:22 Oun o Yezous penas peskre malenge: “Doleske penau t'menge: Ma darenn t'maro djipaske! Ma darenn, te vell t'men či te rhal, vitar gar, te vell t'men či an-ripaske!" 
Luke12:23 O djipen hi boudeder moldo har o rhapen. Oun o mensho hi boudeder moldo har o ripen. 
Luke12:24 Dikenn ap i korakende! Yon čivenna kek djob an i phoub, te vell lo baro. Vitar gar anenn le o baro djob dren. Len hi kek khera, kay nay anenn le o djob khetne. O Devel dell len te rhal. Oun t'mer han boudeder moldo har i čirkle!" 
Luke12:25 Kek t'mendar nay čivell yek dives boudeder pash peskro djipen pashel! 
Luke12:26 Na-a, savo tikno koova nay krenn t'mer gar. Hoske trashenn t'mer, te vell t'men gar doha djipaske?" 
Luke12:27 Dikenn, har ap o zenlepen shoukar bloume baro venna! Yon boudrenna gar, oun krenn penge kek ripya. O baro ray Salomo an peskro tselo raylepen his gar yaake shoukar an-rido, har yek lendar." 
Luke12:28 O Devel kras o zenlepen yaake shoukar, hoy kava dives vin tardo hi, oun o vavar dives an o bob vitsedo vella. Kitse kope boudeder dell yob t'men an-ripaske. Har tikno hi t'maro patsepen!" 
Luke12:29 Ma darenn, hoy t'mer taysar rhana oun piyenna!" 
Luke12:30 Kova krenn kol menshe, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar. T'maro dad an o bolepen djinella, hoy t'men hounte vell djipaske." 
Luke12:31 Dikenn koy pre, te krenn o Debleskri boudi! Oun yob dell t'men lauter, hoy t'men hounte vell djipaske." 
Luke12:32 Ma darenn! Kate han t'mer gar boud oun gar an-diklo. O Devel, kay hi t'maro dad an o bolepen, kova kamella, te lenn t'mer leskro bravlepen oun raylepen." 
Luke12:33 Bikrenn, hoy t'men hi! Denn kol love i čorvelende! Palle hi kova yaake, har te krenn t'men i lovengro gono, hoy gar paash djala! Yaake krenn t'menge i baro bravlepen, hoy nashrenn nay gar. Kova hi an o bolepen, kay kek čorepaskro t'maro koova hatsella, oun kek kirme les nay pre rhan!" 
Luke12:34 Kote, kay t'maro bravlepen hi, kote hi ninna t'maro dji.”" 
Luke12:35 “Avenn hako tsiro mange koy! Oun moukenn gar t'mari momeli vin te djal! 
Luke12:36 Avenn har menshe, kay gar sovenna, te vell lengro ray i biyabestar pale! Te dell yob ap o voudar, nay krenn le leske sik pre." 
Luke12:37 Barhtele hi kol boudepangre, kay sovenn gar, te vell lengro ray pale. Me penau t'menge: O ray penell lenge, te beshenn le pen tele, te rhan le. Oun yob pandell peske i damdira trouyel, oun hi lenge koy." 
Luke12:38 Te vell yob mashkral an i rat, oun yon sovenna gar, hi lengri barht baro." 
Luke12:39 Kova hounte hayvenn t'mer: Te djinals kova, kay ap o kheer yak della, ko tsiro, kay ko dre-phagepaskro vella, nay phagals kova gar pash leste dren." 
Luke12:40 Doleske penau t'menge: Ma sovenn! Denn yak! Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, vau pale an i tsiro, kay t'mer gar djinenna.”" 
Luke12:41 O Petro penas: “Ray, hi kova, hoy tou kate peneh, menge kokres? Peneh tou kova i tsele menshenge?”" 
Luke12:42 Penas o Yezous: “I lačo boudepaskro dell mishto garda ap peskro rayeskro kheer, oun sovella gar. Leskro ray das peskre tsele boudepangren an leskre vasta. Oun ko lačo boudepaskro dell lende hako dives kova, hoy len hounte vell djipaske." 
Luke12:43 Barhtelo hi yob, te vell peskro ray pale oun dikell, kay yob peskri boudi mishto kras." 
Luke12:44 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Leskro ray dell peskro tselo bravlepen an leskre vasta.”" 
Luke12:45 “Ko boudepaskro, te penell lo ap peste: Miro ray vell gar yaake sik pale, oun yob dell kol vavar boudepangren dava, oun rhal oun piyell pes mato," 
Luke12:46 palle vell leskro ray pale ap i tsiro, kay o boudepaskro gar patsell, te vell yob. Ap yek kopo hi lo koy, oun dell ko boudepaskres khetne, oun anell les kote, kay kolla hi, kay gar ap leste patsenna." 
Luke12:47 Ko boudepaskro, kay djinella, hoy peskro ray lestar kamella, oun krell kova gar, kova lell boud dava." 
Luke12:48 Koon kova krella, hoy gar mishto hi, oun djinell kova gar, lell gar boud dava. Koon boud o Deblestar las, kolestar kamell yob, te krell lo peskri boudi mishto. Oun kones boud zoor oun gosvepen dino vas, kolestar kamell o Devel, te boudrell lo gomme feteder.”" 
Luke12:49 “Me vom, te vitsrap i yag ap i phoub. Kamoms te rhačals koy yag." 
Luke12:50 Glan mande hi i pharo tsiro. Ap mande venna bare douka. Kamoms, te vals ko tsiro pal mande.”" 
Luke12:51 “Me vom gar ap kay phoub, te lap o čingepen krik. Na-a! Me penau t'menge: Mantsa vell o čingepen." 
Luke12:52 Kanna vell o čingepen an i kheer, kay djivenn panč menshe khetne. Triin hi rhoyedo ap douyende. Oun douy hi rhoyedo ap trinende." 
Luke12:53 O dad vell rhoyedo ap peskro čaveste. Oun o čavo vell rhoyedo ap peskro dadeste. I day vell rhoyedo ap peskri čate. Oun i čay vell rhoyedo ap peskri date. O romeskri day vell rhoyedo ap o čaveskri romyate. Oun o čaveskri romni vell rhoyedo ap o romeskri date.” 
Luke12:54 Pale penas o Yezous ap kol boud menshende, kay pash leste his: “Te vell o bolepen tamlo ap koy rig, kay o baro pani hi, penenn t'mer: Kanna dell brishin. Oun kova vell yaake." 
Luke12:55 Oun te phourdell i zorelo dourho dran ko tato moulo them, palle penenn t'mer: Kanna vell tato. Oun t'maro hi čačo." 
Luke12:56 T'men hi douy djia! T'mer dikenn ap i phoub oun ap o bolepen oun djinenn, hoy vella. Hoske nay hayvenn gar, hoy an kava tsiro glan t'mare yaka lauter djala?" 
Luke12:57 Hoske nay dikenn t'mer gar, hoy o čačepen hi?" 
Luke12:58 Te hal tou an o čingepen yekeha, oun hal leha ap o drom pash o čačepaskro, palle dik, te venn t'mer pale mishto khetne yaake rah, har hal tou leha ap o drom, te nay dell yob tout gar an o čačepaskro vast! Oun kova dell tout an o klistengro vast. Oun kova vitsrell tout an o stilepen." 
Luke12:59 Me penau touke: Tou veh gar dran o stilepen vin yaake rah, har tou playsral gar tiri tseli siyaan.”" 
Luke13:1 An ko tsiro van menshe pash o Yezouseste, oun penan leske kol morshendar dran o them Galilea, kay an o Debleskro baro kheer firhen o Debleske maran. Oun o Pilato maras kol menshen. Oun o menshengro rat oun o firhengro rat vas lauter khetne." 
Luke13:2 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Oun kanna poučenn t'mer mandar: His kol menshe čilačeder har kol vavar an o them Galilea, kay van yon yaake maredo?" 
Luke13:3 Na-a, penau me t'menge. T'mer te moukenn gar t'maro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom, palle venna t'mer lauter ninna yaake maredo." 
Luke13:4 Hoy hi kol menshentsa, kay ko baro kheer an o gab Siloah ap lende peras oun yon meran? Hi kol menshe čilačeder har kol vavar an o foro Yerusalem, kay koy djivan?" 
Luke13:5 Na-a, penau me t'menge. Te moukenn t'mer gar t'maro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom, palle venna t'mer lauter ninna yaake maredo.”" 
Luke13:6 Oun o Yezous penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi. Oun penas: “I morshes his i faygetikro rouk an peskro baar tardo. Oun yob vas boud kope, oun rodas fayge ap ko rouk oun hatsas kek." 
Luke13:7 Koy penas yob ap koleste, kay dell garda ap ko baar: Triin bersha vom me kanna kay, oun rodom fayge ap kava rouk, oun hatsom kek. De les tele! Ko rouk hi čičeske kate tardo." 
Luke13:8 Penas o vavar: Ray, mouk les kava bersh tardo! Me hadau i phoub troul koleste pre, oun čivau grayengro foul troul leste, te vell lo feteder." 
Luke13:9 Oun te hidjrell ko rouk an o vavar bersh fayge, kova hi mishto. Te hidjrell lo či, de les tele!”" 
Luke13:10 His i Debleskro dives, koy his o Yezous an i biboldengri kangri oun penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Luke13:11 Mank kol menshende his i djouvel, koya his deesh-te-orhta bersha nasselo. I beng, kay an late vas, kras lat bango. Oun yoy nay hadas pes gar pre." 
Luke13:12 Har o Yezous lat dikas, das yob lat pash peste gole, oun penas ap late: “Romniya, tou hal kanna sasto.”" 
Luke13:13 Oun yob čivas peskre vasta ap late. Koy hadas pes li pre, oun sharas o Debles." 
Luke13:14 Koy rhoyras pes ko pralstouno an i biboldengri kangri, kay o Yezous koy djouvyat ap o Debleskro dives sasto kras. Oun kova penas ap i menshende: “Mer hounte boudras shob divessa. Avenn an kolla divessa, te moukenn t'men sasto te krell, oun gar ap o Debleskro dives!”" 
Luke13:15 Penas o Yezous ap koleste: “T'men hi douy djia! T'mer krenn har te krans kek boudi ap o Debleskro dives. Hakeno t'mendar pandell peskri groumni oun peskri esla tele, oun anell len pash o pani ap o Debleskro dives." 
Luke13:16 Kate hi kay djouvel, kay patsell ap o Debleste yaake, har o Abraham kova kras: Oun yoy his deesh-te-orhta bersha o bengestar pandlo. Hoske te vell li gar ap o Debleskro dives sasto kerdo?”" 
Luke13:17 Har yob kova penas, ladjan lauter, kay rhoyedo ap leste his. Oun kol boud vavar, kay kote tardo hi, his barhtelo pral ko tselo raylo koova, hoy o Yezous kras." 
Luke13:18 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Me penau t'menge kanna, har kova hi, te dell o Devel i menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom." 
Luke13:19 Kova hi yaake: I morsh čivas i tikno senftikro djob an i phoub. Oun dran ko tikno djob vas i baro rouk. Oun i čirkle djivan ap leste.” 
Luke13:20 Oun o Yezous penas pale: “Me penau t'menge kanna, har kova hi, te dell o Devel i menshen pash peste gole, te djan le ap leskro drom." 
Luke13:21 Kova hi yaake: I djouvel las i tikno kotar shoutlo yarro, oun čivas les mashkral an i baro čaro parno yarro. Oun ko tikno kotar shoutlo yarro kras ko tselo yarro shoutlo.”" 
Luke13:22 Oun o Yezous djas doureder ap ko drom, hoy djas an o foro Yerusalem. Oun yob vas an i gaba oun i forya, oun sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom." 
Luke13:23 Oun i morsh poučas lestar: “Ray, pen menge: Lell o Devel boud menshen an o bolepen, te djivenn le pash leste?”" 
Luke13:24 Oun o Yezous penas pale: “Krenn lauter, te djan an ko tikno voudar dren! Me penau t'menge: Boud kamenn an ko voudar dren te djal. Oun hayvenn kova gar." 
Luke13:25 Te stell o ray pral o kheer pre oun krell o voudar pandlo, palle han t'mer vin tardo, oun t'mer denn gole: Ray, kre menge o voudar pre! Oun ko ray penella: Me prindjrau t'men gar." 
Luke13:26 Koy penenn t'mer: Mer rham oun piyam touha. Oun tou penal menge o Debleskro lab ap i dromma an mare forya. 
Luke13:27 Koy penell yob ap t'mende: Me prindjrau t'men gar. Djan mandar, t'mer čilače!" 
Luke13:28 Te han t'mer vin tardo oun dikenn, kay o Abraham, oun o Isaak, oun o Yakob, oun kol tsele Debleskre rakepangre pash o Debleste an o bolepen hi, rovenn t'mer. Oun t'mer dandrenn i danda i doukatar khetne." 
Luke13:29 Dran hako them venna i menshe pash o Debleste an o bolepen khetne, oun beshenn pen tele, te rhan le." 
Luke13:30 Oun boud, kay kanna palla tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko dives glan tardo. Oun boud, kay kanna glan tardo hi, kolla hi ap ko dives palla tardo.”" 
Luke13:31 Ap kava tsiro har o Yezous kova penas, van Farisarya pash leste oun penan: “Dja touke! Khate tout! O Herodes kamell tout te marell.”" 
Luke13:32 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Djan oun penenn ko čilačo morsheske: Kava dives oun taysar tradau i bengen vin, oun krau i menshen sasto. Oun pal triin divessa hi miro tselo koova kerdo." 
Luke13:33 Kava dives, taysar, oun o dives koy pre hounte djap miro drom, te vap an o foro Yerusalem. Kova djal gar, te vell i Debleskro rakepaskro vin glan o foro Yerusalem maredo.”" 
Luke13:34 “T'mer menshe an o foro Yerusalem! T'mer maran o Debleskre rakepangren, oun dan kolen i barrentsa moulo, kay o Devel pash t'mende bičras. Boud kope kamom t'men pash mande te lell, te dap garda ap t'mende, har i karhni ap peskre ternende garda della, oun lell len tel peskre phora. Oun t'mer kaman gar." 
Luke13:35 Doleske moukell o Devel t'maro foro oun dell bouder gar garda ap leste. Oun me penau t'menge: T'mer dikenn man yaake rah bouder gar, bis te vas ko tsiro, kay t'mer penenna: Sharedo vell kova, kay hi o Deblestar bičedo!”" 
Luke14:1 His i Debleskro dives, koy djas o Yezous pash i pralstouno Farisari an o kheer te rhal. Oun kol menshe kote lan les an o yak." 
Luke14:2 Kote his i morsh, koles his pani an i herya oun an i moussya." 
Luke14:3 Oun o Yezous penas ap i čačepangre oun ap i Farisarya: “Nay krau menshen sasto ap o Debleskro dives pal o biboldengro čačepen?” 
Luke14:4 Yon penan či koy pre. Koy čivas o Yezous peskro vast ap ko morsheste, kras les sasto, oun moukas les te djal." 
Luke14:5 Palle penas lo ap kolende, kay kote beshdo hi: “Te hi yekes t'mendar i čavo oun kova perell an o pani dren, tserdenn les t'mer gar vin, ninna ap o Debleskro dives? Te hi yekes t'mendar i groumni oun koya perell an o pani dren, tserdenn lat t'mer gar vin, ninna ap o Debleskro dives?”" 
Luke14:6 Oun yon nay penan či koy pre. 
Luke14:7 Oun o Yezous dikas, har kolla, kay an o kheer dren van, penge i feteder beshepangre vin rodan. Doleske penas lo lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, oun penas:" 
Luke14:8 “Te penell yek ap toute: Am ap i biyab! palle besh tout gar ap o feteder beshepaskro kote! Nay vell yek morsh, kay hi bareder har tou." 
Luke14:9 Oun palle vell kova pash toute, kay penas, te vess ap i biyab, oun penell ap toute: Mouk koles kate te beshell, oun besh tout kote tele! Oun tou hounte leh ko telstouno beshepaskro, oun tout hi i bari ladj." 
Luke14:10 Tou te djah ap i biyab, palle besh tout ap o telstouno beshepaskro! Oun kova, kay kamas, te djah tou ap peskri biyab, vella pash toute oun penella: Miro maal, besh tout ap i feteder beshepaskro! Oun lauter, kay kote ap i biyab hi, dikenn, kay tou i an-diklo morsh hal." 
Luke14:11 Koon pes baro krella, koles sharell o Devel gar. Koon pes gar baro krella, oun penella: Me molau či, koles krell o Devel baro.”" 
Luke14:12 Oun o Yezous penas ap koleste, kay kamas, te rhal lo leha: “Te kreh tou i baro rhapen, palle ma khare tire malen oun phralen pash toute, vitar gar bravele menshen, kay an tiro drom djivenna! Kolla len tout ninna pash pende pre, oun yaake denn le tout pale, hoy tou lenge kral." 
Luke14:13 Te kameh tou i baro rhapen te krell, palle le kol čorvelen pash toute pre, ninna kolen, kay bango hi, kolen, kay nashenn nay gar, oun kolen, kay korelo hi, oun de len te rhal!" 
Luke14:14 Te kreh tou kova, hal tou barhtelo! Kol menshe nay denn tout či pale. Te krell o Devel kol moulen djido, kay kran, hoy yob kamas, palle dell lo tout kova lauter pale, hoy tou lenge kral.”" 
Luke14:15 Pash i rhapaskri his i morsh beshdo. Har kova shounas, hoy o Yezous rakras, penas lo ap o Yezouseste: “Barhtelo hi kova, kay rhal o maro pash o Debleste an o bolepen.”" 
Luke14:16 Koy penas o Yezous leske: “I morsh kras i baro rhapen, oun moukas boud menshen te penell, te venn le pash o rhapen." 
Luke14:17 Oun ap ko tsiro, kay yob kamas pes tele te beshell, bičras lo i boudepaskres pash lende, te penell lo: Avenn! Rhapen oun pipen hi lauter koy." 
Luke14:18 Yek pal o vavar penan, te nay van le gar. Ko yek penas: Me ginom i kotar phoub, oun me djap koy oun dikap, har kova vi-dikella. Me nay vau gar." 
Luke14:19 Ko douyto penas: Me ginom deesh groumya, oun djau kanna kote, te dikap, har yon vi-dikenna. Me nay vau gar." 
Luke14:20 Ko triinto penas: Me romedinerom. Doleske nay vau gar. 
Luke14:21 Ko boudepaskro vas pale, oun penas lauter peskro rayeske. Koy vas ko ray an i bari rholi, oun penas ap koleste: Dja ap i tsele dromma an o foro! An kol čorvelen, kol bangen, kol korelen oun kolen, kay nay nashenn gar, pash mande!" 
Luke14:22 Oun pal i tsiro vas o boudepaskro pale oun penas: Me krom, hoy tou penal. O kheer hi gar pherdo." 
Luke14:23 Oun ko ray penas ap koleste: Dja vin ap i dromma glan o foro oun pash i bourra ap o them, kay menshe beshdo hi, oun pen lenge, te venn le pash mande. Rake lenge an o dji, te venn yaake boud menshe har djala an miro kheer!" 
Luke14:24 Me penau t'menge: Kolenge, kay moukom glan i tsiro te penell, te venn le pash miro rhapen, oun kay kaman gar pash mande te vell, kolendar moukau kekes an miro kheer dren te vell, te rhal lo mantsa.”" 
Luke14:25 Har o Yezous ap o drom djas, his boud menshe troul leste. Oun yob dikas ap lende oun penas:" 
Luke14:26 “Koon pash mande vella, oun kamell peskro dades, peskri dat, peskri romyat, peskre čaven, peskre phralen, peskre phenyen, oun peskro djipen boudeder har man, kova nay vell gar miro maal." 
Luke14:27 Koon lell gar peskro troushel ap peste oun djal mantsa, nay vell gar miro maal." 
Luke14:28 Te kamell yek t'mendar i baro kheer te krell, hounte dikell lo, te hi les doha love." 
Luke14:29 Te čivell lo nay kokres i telstoune barra, palle san i tsele menshe pral leste." 
Luke14:30 Oun yon penenn: Ko morsh kamas i kheer te krell. Oun kanna nay krell lo les gar doureder. 
Luke14:31 Te kamell i baro ray an o kourepen te djal i vavar baro rayeha, hounte poučell lo pestar: Hom me zorelo doha mire deesh zerya lourdentsa, te kourap man ko vavar baro rayeha, kay biish zerya lourde pash leste hi?" 
Luke14:32 Te hi lo gar zorelo doha, bičrell lo morshen pash o vavar baro rayeste yaake rah, har kova gomme dour lestar hi, oun mangell les, te djal kek kourepen." 
Luke14:33 Doleske penau t'menge: Kek t'mendar nay vell miro maal, te dell yob gar lauter pre, hoy les hi.”" 
Luke14:34 “O loon hi mishto. Te nashras o loon peskri zoor, hi lo bouder gar mishto. Oun tou nay kreh bouder či, te vell lo pale londo." 
Luke14:35 Ko loon molell či bouder. Tou nay vitsreh les krik. Lenn kova ap t'maro dji, hoy me t'menge penaua!”" 
Luke15:1 His i dives, kay van boud bibolde pash o Yezouseste, kay lenn i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren, oun boud vavar, kay čilačo koova kran oun doleske pale-čidde hi. Yon lauter kaman te shounenn le les." 
Luke15:2 Kol Farisarya oun i biboldengre čačepangre his rhoyemen pral o Yezouseste oun penan: “Kava morsh lell i pale-čidde pash peste pre, oun rhal lentsa.”" 
Luke15:3 Koy penas o Yezous lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, oun penas:" 
Luke15:4 “Te hi yekes t'mendar sheel bakre, oun yek lendar djal nashedo, palle moukell lo kol vavaren tardo, oun rodell ko yekes yaake rah, te hatsell lo les." 
Luke15:5 Oun te hatsell lo koles, lell lo les ap i phik, oun hi barhtelo." 
Luke15:6 Oun te vell lo khere, penell lo peskre malenge oun kol vavarenge, kay troul leste djivenna: Avenn barhteles mantsa! Me hatsom ko bakres pale, kay his nashedo.”" 
Luke15:7 Palle penas o Yezous lenge: “Me penau t'menge: Pral ko yek čilačo, kay moukas peskro čilačo drom oun djal ap o Debleskro drom, pral koleste hi bareder barht an o bolepen, har pral kol vavarende, kay patsenna, te nay ačenn le ap pengro drom.”" 
Luke15:8 Te hi i djouvyat deesh roupene beme, oun nashrell yek, krell li i momeli an, oun rodell koy bema an o tselo kheer yaake rah, bis te hatsell li lat." 
Luke15:9 Oun te hatsell li koy roupeni bema, dell li peskre malen gole oun kol vavaren, kay pash late djivenna, oun penella: Avenn barhtelo mantsa! Me hatsom miri roupeni bema, kay nashrom." 
Luke15:10 Me penau t'menge ninna: O Debleskre bolepangre hi barhtelo pral yekeste, kay moukell peskro čilačo drom oun djal ap o Debleskro drom." 
Luke15:11 Oun o Yezous penas: I morshes his douy čave. 
Luke15:12 Ko terneder penas ap peskro dadeste: De man kanna kova, hoy me lau pal tiro merepen! Oun o dad das hakenes peskro kotar." 
Luke15:13 Pal i tikno tsiro las o terneder čavo peskro tselo bravlepen, oun djas an i vavar them, djivas i shoukar djipen, oun das peskro tselo bravlepen vin." 
Luke15:14 Har les his bouder či, vas i bari bok pral o them oun les his bouder či te rhal." 
Luke15:15 Koy djas lo pash i harho oun rodas i boudi. Kova bičras les pash i balende, te dell yob garda ap lende." 
Luke15:16 Les his bari bok oun kamas ninna kova te rhal, hoy i bale rhana. Kokres kova kamas les kek te dell." 
Luke15:17 Oun yob penas ap peste: Miro dades hi boud boudepangre. Kolen hi boud te rhal, oun me merau kate i bokatar." 
Luke15:18 Me kamau pash miro dadeste te djal, te penap: Tata, me krom i čilačo koova, kay me djom toutar oun o Deblestar krik." 
Luke15:19 Me hom gar moldo, te ačap tiro čavo. Le man pash toute pre, te vap tiro boudepaskro!" 
Luke15:20 Oun yob stas pre, oun djas pash peskro dadeste pale. Har leskro dad les doural dikas, khaytas o čavo les. Oun o dad nashas pash leste, tapras les trouyel, oun čoumras les." 
Luke15:21 Koy penas o čavo ap leste: Tata, me krom i čilačo koova, kay me djom toutar oun o Deblestar krik. Oun me hom gar moldo, te ačap tiro čavo." 
Luke15:22 Koy penas o dad ap peskre boudepangre: Anenn sik o feteder ripen, oun rivenn kova leske an! Denn les i goustri oun denn les kirrha!" 
Luke15:23 Anenn i terni thoulli groumni! Marenn lat, te rhas oun vas barhtelo!" 
Luke15:24 Čačepah, miro čavo his moulo, oun vas djido. Yob his nashedo oun vas pale. Oun yon van lauter barhtelo." 
Luke15:25 Ko phoureder čavo boudras vin ap i kotar phoub. Har yob khere djas oun pash o kheer vas, shounas lo bashepen oun khelepen." 
Luke15:26 Oun yob das i boudepaskres gole, oun poučas lestar, hoy kote djas." 
Luke15:27 Kova penas: Tiro phraal vas sasto pale. Doleske maras tiro dad i terni thoulli groumyat leske. 
Luke15:28 Kote vas yob rhoyedo, oun kamas gar an o kheer te djal. Oun leskro dad djas vin, oun mangas les, te vell lo an o kheer dren." 
Luke15:29 Oun ko čavo penas ap peskro dadeste: Tou djineh, kay me boud bersha touke boudrom, oun krom lauter, hoy tou mange penal. Mange maral tou kek bakro, te rhap les mire malentsa, oun te vap barhtelo." 
Luke15:30 Tiro čavo, kay vas kanna pale khere, kova, kay das tire love vin i loubyentsa, koleske maral i terni thoulli groumni." 
Luke15:31 Koy penas o dad ap leste: Miro čavo, tou hal hako tsiro pash mande, oun hoy miro hi, kova hi ninna tiro." 
Luke15:32 Mer hounte vas barhtelo. Tiro phraal his moulo oun vas djido. Yob his nashedo oun hatsas pale khere. 
Luke16:1 O Yezous penas ninna ap peskre malende: “His i bravelo morsh. Koles his i boudepaskro, kay rhorhras les oun das leskro bravlepen vin. Har ko bravelo kova shounas," 
Luke16:2 moukas lo les gole te dell, oun penas ap leste: Hoy shounom me pral toute? Sike mande kol lila, hoy dren činlo hi, har boud love tou dren lal! Tou nay deh bouder gar ap miro bravlepen garda!" 
Luke16:3 Oun ko boudepaskro penas ap peste: Te nay boudrau me bouder gar miro rayeske, hoy te krap me kanna? Me nay boudrau gar vin ap i kotar phoub. Oun te hounte mangap, ladjau man." 
Luke16:4 Me djinau kanna, hoy te krap, te lenn yon man pash pende pre ap ko dives, kay hi man bouder kek boudi." 
Luke16:5 Oun yob das kolen pash peste gole, kay hi siyaan pash peskro rayeste. Oun yek pal o vavareste vas pash leste. Oun yob poučas hakenestar: Har boud siyaan hi tout pash miro rayeste?" 
Luke16:6 Oun te penas yek: Sheel khoro djet, palle penas lo ap leste: Le ko liil, kay tiro siyaan dren tardo hi. Čin kanna: paash-sheel!" 
Luke16:7 Oun te poučas lo i vavarestar: Har boud siyaan hi tout? Oun kova penas: Sheel gone djob. Palle penas lo ap koleste: Le ko liil, kay tiro siyaan dren tardo hi, oun čin kanna: orhta-deesh!" 
Luke16:8 Oun ko ray sharas ko rhorheno boudepaskres doleske, kay his lo gosevo.” “Oun kova hi čačo”, penas o Yezous, “kol menshe, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar, djan gosveder trouyel i vavar menshentsa har kolla, kay djan ap o Debleskro drom." 
Luke16:9 Me penau t'menge: T'mare love ačenna gar. Denn len i čorvelende, te venn le t'mare mala! Te hi kol love boudeder či moldo, palle lenn le t'men kote an i khera dren, kay t'mer hako tsiro nay ačenna.”" 
Luke16:10 “Koon an i tikno koova lauter mishto krella, kova krell ninna an i baro koova lauter mishto. Koon i tikno koova gar mishto krella, kova krell ninna i baro koova gar mishto." 
Luke16:11 Te djan t'mer gar mishto trouyel kol loventsa, hoy gar ačenna, koon dell t'men nay ko bravlepen an o vast, hoy ačella?" 
Luke16:12 Te djan t'mer vavar menshengro bravlepen gar mishto trouyel, har nay dell t'men o Devel kova an t'mare vasta, hoy kamell lo t'men te dell?" 
Luke16:13 Kek boudepaskro boudrell nay douy rayenge. Te vals kova yaake, boudrals lo ko yekeske mishto, oun ko vavareske gar mishto. Ko yekes kamals yob gar, ko vavares kamals yob o djiyestar. Tou nay boudreh gar o Debleske oun leh tiro bravlepen khetne!”" 
Luke16:14 Kol Farisarya shounan kova lauter. Yon his pal i love, oun yon san pral o Yezouseste." 
Luke16:15 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Glan i menshengre yaka kamenn t'mer lačo te vell. O Devel prindjrell t'maro dji. Hoy pash i menshende boud molella, hi či moldo an o Debleskre yaka." 
Luke16:16 An o phouro tsiro rikran pen i menshe ap kova, hoy o Mose oun i Debleskre rakepangre penan. Har vas o Yohanni, vas o Debleskro nevo tsiro. Kanna vell i menshenge o lačo lab penlo, te dell o Devel i menshen pash peste gole, te djivenn le leha khetne an yek harmenatsyona. Oun hakeno kamell zoryah yaake dren te vell, har yob kamella." 
Luke16:17 O bolepen oun i phoub ačenna gar. Kova, hoy o Mose oun kol Debleskre rakepangre penan, ačella. Ninna o tikneder lab vell gar krik lino." 
Luke16:18 Koon peskri romyat moukella, oun romedinerell i vavar djouvyat, kova rhorhell peskri ersti romyat oun anell doosh ap peste. Oun kova, kay romedinerell i moukli djouvyat, kova anell doosh ap peste, te las lo i vavareskri romyat.”" 
Luke16:19 Oun o Yezous penas pale: Koy his i bravelo morsh. Kova his hako tsiro shoukar oun rayles rido, oun djivas i shoukar djipen." 
Luke16:20 Glan leskro voudar his i čorvelo čiddo, kay his nasselo ap peskro mass. Leskro lab hi Lazaro." 
Luke16:21 Kova mangas o bravelestar ko rhapen, hoy peras tele ap i phoub, te rhal lo kova. Oun i djoukle van pash leste, oun čaran leskro nasselo mass tele." 
Luke16:22 O dives vas, kay ko čorvelo meras. Oun i bolepangre anan les an o bolepen, te beshas lo pes pash o Abraham. I tsiro koy pre meras ninna ko bravelo, oun las i shoukar paskepen." 
Luke16:23 Har yob kanna an o moulengro them his, van bare douka ap leste. Oun yob dikas pre, oun dikas o Abrahames doural, oun o Lazaro his pash leste beshdo." 
Luke16:24 Koy das ko bravelo gole: Tata Abraham, kre tiro dji mange pre, oun biče o Lazares pash mande! Yob hounte čivell peskro goushto an o pani, oun čivell kova ap miri čip, te doukrell man kay yag gar!" 
Luke16:25 Koy penas o Abraham: Čava, touke djas hako tsiro an tiro djipen mishto. O Lazares his kek shoukar djipen. Kanna hi yob barhtelo oun leske djal mishto. Oun tout hi kanna bare douka." 
Luke16:26 Ninna hi mashkral mende i baro telstunepen, te nay vell kek mendar pash t'mende, oun kek t'mendar nay vell pash mende." 
Luke16:27 Koy penas o bravelo: Me mangau tout, tata Abraham, biče les an miro dadeskro kheer!" 
Luke16:28 Man hi panč phrala. Kolenge hounte penell yob, har mange djala, te venn yon gar koy, kay me hom, oun bare douka lom." 
Luke16:29 Koy penas o Abraham: Len hi o Moseskre laba oun kolla lila, hoy o Debleskre rakepangre činan. Ap kolende hounte shounenn yon!" 
Luke16:30 Penas o bravelo: Na-a! Te vals yek i moulendar pash lende, palle moukans le pengro čilačo drom." 
Luke16:31 Penas o Abraham: Te shounenn le gar ap o Mose oun ap kol Debleskre rakepangre, shounenn le vitar gar ap yekeste, kay stas i moulendar pre." 
Luke17:1 Oun o Yezous penas ap peskre malende: “Čačepah, menshe venna, kay kamenn t'men o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell. Bibarht ap koleste, kay kova krella!" 
Luke17:2 Koleske vals feteder, te vell leske i pharo bar troul i meen pandlo, oun te vell lo an o baro pani vitsedo, te nay anell lo bouder gar yekes kal tiknendar ap o čilačo drom." 
Luke17:3 Denn yak ap t'mende! Te krell tiro phraal čilačo koova ap toute, pen leske, kay kova gar mishto hi, hoy yob kras! Te khaytell les ko čilačo koova, hoy yob ap toute kras, yaake ab bouder gar rhoyedo ap leste!" 
Luke17:4 Te krell lo efta kope ap o dives čilačo koova ap toute, oun te vell lo efta kope pash toute oun penella, kay les kova khaytella, yaake ab bouder gar rhoyedo ap leste!”" 
Luke17:5 Oun kol deesh-te-douy bičepangre penan ap o Yezouseste: “Kre maro patsepen zoreles!” 
Luke17:6 Koy penas o ray Yezous ap lende: “Te vals t'maro patsepen ninna tikno har i senftikro djob, nay penans t'mer ap ko baro rouk: Vitse tout an o pani! Oun ko rouk shounals ap t'mende.”" 
Luke17:7 “Shounenn, hoy me t'menge penaua: Kek t'mendar penella ap peskro boudepaskro, kay pal peskri boudi ap o kotar them khere vella: Am, besh tout kate tele, rha oun pi!" 
Luke17:8 Ko krenn t'mer gar. T'mer penenn leske: Rib tout trouyel oun kre mange rhapaske! An ko rhapen pash mande! Palle nay rhah oun piyeh tou ninna. 
Luke17:9 Parkrenn t'men pash leste koleske, hoy yob kras? Na-a, ko krenn t'mer gar." 
Luke17:10 Yaake hi kova ninna t'mentsa. Te kran t'mer lauter, hoy o Devel t'menge penas, palle penenn: Mer ham tire boudepangre. Mer kram, hoy hounte kram.”" 
Luke17:11 Har o Yezous ap o drom an o foro Yerusalem his, djas lo mank i themma Samaria oun Galilea." 
Luke17:12 Oun yob djas an i gab. Oun kote van deesh nassele morsha pash leste. Kolen his i djoungelo nasslepen, kay lengro mass tele merella. Yon his lestar doha dour krik tardo," 
Luke17:13 oun dan gole: “Yezous, lačo ray, kre tiro dji menge pre!”" 
Luke17:14 Oun o Yezous dikas len, oun penas ap lende: “Djan pash o rashayeste, oun sikrenn t'men glan leste!” Oun har yon djan, van yon ap o drom sasto." 
Luke17:15 Yek lendar, har yob dikas, te hi lo sasto, djas lo pash o Yezouseste pale pale, oun sharas o Debles o tselo djiyeha." 
Luke17:16 Yob vitsras pes glan o Yezouseskre pire tele, oun parkras pes. Kova his i Samaritari." 
Luke17:17 Koy penas o Yezous: “Deesh van sasto. Kay hi kol vavar enya? 
Luke17:18 Hi kek vavar koy, kay vas pale pale, te sharell lo o Debles har kava Samaritari?”" 
Luke17:19 Oun yob penas ap kol morsheste: “Ste pre, oun dja khere! Tiro patsepen kras tout sasto.”" 
Luke17:20 Oun i Farisarya poučan o Yezousestar: “Kaana vell ko tsiro, kay dikah, kay o Devel o ray hi pral i tseli phoub?” Koy penas lo: “Ko tsiro vell gar yaake, te nay dikenn kova." 
Luke17:21 Ninna nay penell yek gar: Kanna hi ko tsiro kay.” Oun o Yezous penas doureder: “Kote, kay i mensho kamell, te vell o Devel leskro ray, kote vas ko tsiro.”" 
Luke17:22 Oun yob penas ap peskre malende: “I tsiro vella, kay t'maro dji kamell o Menshengro Čaves yek dives te dikell. Oun t'mer dikenn les gar." 
Luke17:23 Oun yon penenn ap t'mende: Dikenn, kote hi lo! Dikenn, kate hi lo! Me penau t'menge: Djan gar kote! Patsenn gar, hoy kol menshe penenna!" 
Luke17:24 Yaake har i Debleskri yag an o bolepen diklo hi, hoy djal yek rigyatar ap i vavar rig an o bolepen, yaake vell o Mensheskro Čavo ap peskro dives diklo." 
Luke17:25 Glan ko tsiro hounte lell lo boud douka ap peste. Oun i menshe, kay kava dives djivenna, čivenn les ap i rig." 
Luke17:26 Ap ko tsiro, kay o Mensheskro Čavo pale vella, djivenn i menshe yaake har an ko tsiro, kay o Noah djivas." 
Luke17:27 Kol menshe rhan, piyan, oun romedineran, bis ap ko dives, kay o Noah an o panyeskro kheer djas, oun o baro pani vas, oun lauter tassan le." 
Luke17:28 O tsiro, kay o Mensheskro Čavo pale vella, hi ninna har o tsiro, kay o Lot djivas. Yon rhan, piyan, yon ginan, bikran, yon boudran ap pengro kotar phoub, oun kran penge khera." 
Luke17:29 Ap ko dives, kay o Lot dran o foro Sodom djas, vas yag dran o bolepen, oun lauter van rhačedo." 
Luke17:30 Yaake djal kova ninna ap ko dives, kay o Mensheskro Čavo diklo vella." 
Luke17:31 Koon ap ko dives ap o kheer hi, oun kones peskro koova an o kheer hi, kova hounte djal gar tele, te lell lo kova. Oun koon ap peskro kotar phoub boudrella, hounte djal gar bouder khere." 
Luke17:32 Ma bistrenn o Loteskri romyat! 
Luke17:33 Koon kamell peskro djipen te rikrell, kova nashrell les. Koon peskro djipen nashrella, kova lell les pale." 
Luke17:34 Me penau t'menge: Te hi an koy rati douy menshe an o čiben čiddo, vell ko yek krik lino, ko vavar ačell koy." 
Luke17:35 Douy djouvya krenn dran djob yarro. Koy yek vell krik lino, koy vavar ačell koy." 
Luke17:36 Douy boudrenn ap i kotar phoub. Ko yek vell krik lino, ko vavar ačell koy.”" 
Luke17:37 Leskre mala poučan lestar: “Ray, kay vell kova?” Penas lo: “Kote, kay i moulo mass čiddo hi, kote venn i bare divye čirkle khetne te rhan le.”" 
Luke18:1 Oun o Yezous penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, te sikrell lo len, te hounte mangenn le o Debles hako tsiro, oun te hounte moukenn le gar tele, te denn le les gole. Oun yob penas:" 
Luke18:2 “An i foro djivas i čačepaskro ray. Kova poučas gar pal o Debleste, oun daras kek menshestar." 
Luke18:3 An ko foro djivas ninna i djouvel, kolakro rom meras. Koya vas boud kope pash leste, oun penas: Ab ap miri rig, te lap miro čačepen!" 
Luke18:4 I rah tsiro kras ko čačepaskro ray lake či. Pal i tsiro penas lo ap peste: Čačepah, pal o Debleste poučau gar, oun vitar gar darau i menshendar." 
Luke18:5 Koy djouvel moukell gar tele. Doleske kamau te krell, te lell li lakro čačepen, te nay čingrell li gar ap mande.”" 
Luke18:6 Koy penas o Yezous: “Shounenn t'mer, hoy ko čilačo čačepaskro ray penas?" 
Luke18:7 Har boud feteder hi o Devel! Patsenn t'mer gar, te vell lo ap i rig peskre vi-rodede menshendar, kay dives oun rati ap leste gole denna? Ava, yob vell ap lengri rig oun dell len lengro čačepen. Lell lo pes boud tsiro, te vell lo ap lengri rig?" 
Luke18:8 Na-a, penau me t'menge: Yon lenn sik pengro čačepen. Hoy penenn t'mer mange, te poučau t'mendar: Te vell o Mensheskro Čavo pale, hatsell yob menshen ap i phoub, kay patsenn ap leste?”" 
Luke18:9 His menshe troul o Yezouseste tardo, kay patsan pendar, te hi le lačo oun feteder har kol vavar. Oun o Yezous penas lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, oun penas:" 
Luke18:10 “Douy morsha djan an o Debleskro baro kheer, te mangenn le o Debles an. Ko yek hi i Farisari, ko vavar hi yek kolendar, kay lenn love i biboldendar i Remaryenge dren." 
Luke18:11 Ko Farisari čivas pes tardo oun penas: Mo Devel, me parkrau man pash toute, te hom gar yaake har kal vavar menshe: čorepangre, rhorhene, oun har kolla, kay rhorhenn pengri romyat i vavar djouvyah, oun gar yaake har kova, kay koy vergel tardo hi: Ko pale-čiddo." 
Luke18:12 Douy divessa an o kourko rhau me či, te mangap tout an. Oun me dau tout o deshto kotar halauterestar, hoy dren lau." 
Luke18:13 Ko pale-čiddo ačas palla tardo, oun hadas gar peskro shero pre. Oun yob das ap peskro beč, te sikrell lo, kay leskro čilačo koova khaytas les, oun penas: Miro Devel, me hom i čilačo morsh. Dik ap mande oun ab mange lačo!”" 
Luke18:14 Oun o Yezous penas: “Me penau t'menge: O Devel dikas ap kaleste, oun his leske lačo oun gar ko vavareske. Kova, kay pes bares krella, koles sharell o Devel gar. Oun kova, kay pes gar bares krella, koles krell o Devel bares.”" 
Luke18:15 Oun i menshe anan čaven pash leste, te čivell lo peskre vasta ap lende. Har peskre mala kova dikan, čingran le ap kol menshende." 
Luke18:16 Koy das o Yezous peskre malen gole, oun penas ap lende: “Moukenn kol čaven pash mande te vell! Ma rikrenn len pale! Save har yon, kolen das o Devel gole, te djivenn le khetne leha an o bolepen." 
Luke18:17 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon gar ap mande patsella har kol čave, kova nay vell gar ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Luke18:18 Koy poučas lestar i pralstuno: “Lačo sikepaskro, hoy hounte krap, te dell man o Devel o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella?”" 
Luke18:19 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Hoske peneh tou: Lačo sikepaskro! ap mande? Kek mensho hi lačo. O Devel kokres hi lačo. 
Luke18:20 Tou prindjreh kol deesh Debleskre laba: Romeha, ma rhorhe tiri romyat i vavar djouvyah! Romniya, ma rhorhe tiro romes i vavar morsheha! Ma mare kekes! Ma čore! Ma pen rhorhepen pral yekeste! Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto!”" 
Luke18:21 Koy penas yob: “Me krom kova lauter yaake rah, har me djivau.”"
