Luke18:22 Har o Yezous kova shounas, penas lo ap leste: “Yek hounte kress tou boudeder. Bike lauter, hoy tout hi, oun de kol love i čorvelende! Palle hi tout i bravlepen an o bolepen. Oun am oun dja mantsa!”" 
Luke18:23 Har o pralstouno kova shounas, doukas les kova an o dji. Les hi boud bravlepen." 
Luke18:24 Oun o Yezous dikas, kay kol laba les doukan. Oun yob penas: “Har pharo hi i bravelenge, te venn le ap o Debleskro drom." 
Luke18:25 Hi gar yaake pharo, te djal i baro firho an i soubyakro kand dren, har te vell i bravelo ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Luke18:26 Penan kolla, kay pash leste tardo hi, ap leste: “Te hi kova yaake, koon nay lell o Debleskro djipen?”" 
Luke18:27 Penas lo: “Kova hoy i menshe nay krenn gar, kova nay krell o Devel.”" 
Luke18:28 Koy penas o Petro: “Mer moukam lauter čiddo oun djam touha.” 
Luke18:29 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Hakeno, kay moukell peskro kheer, peskri romyat, phralen, čaven, dades oun dat, te nay boudrell lo feteder o Debleske," 
Luke18:30 kova lell an kava tsiro lauter boud kope pale. Oun an ko tsiro, kay vella, dell o Devel les o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella.”" 
Luke18:31 Oun o Yezous las i deesh-te-douy ap i rig oun penas lenge: “Shounenn! Mer djah kanna an o foro Yerusalem. Kote vell lauter čačo, hoy o Debleskre rakepangre pral o Menshengro Čaveste činan:" 
Luke18:32 Yon denn les an i vasta kolendar, kay kek bibolde hi. Oun kolla praasenn les, denn les dava oun čoungrenn ap leste." 
Luke18:33 Yon denn les i čoupniyah, oun marenn les. Oun pal triin divessa krell o Devel les djido.”" 
Luke18:34 Leskre mala hayvan kek lab. Kova, hoy yob lenge kal labentsa kamas te penell, djas gar an lengro shero dren. Oun yon djinan gar, pral hoy yob rakras." 
Luke18:35 Oun o Yezous djas pash o foro Yericho. Oun i korelo, his pash o drom beshdo, oun mangas love i menshendar." 
Luke18:36 Oun yob shounas boud menshen, kay djan ap ko drom. Koy poučas lo lendar: “Hoy djal kote?”" 
Luke18:37 Koy penan le: “O Yezous dran Nazaret djal kote.” 
Luke18:38 Koy das lo gole: “Yezous, tou Davideskro čavo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Luke18:39 Oun kolla, kay djan glan o Yezouseste ap o drom, čingran ap ko morsheste oun penan: “Mouk tele oun ač!” Yob das boudeder gole: “Yezous, Davideskro čavo, kre tiro dji mange pre!”" 
Luke18:40 Oun o Yezous ačas tardo, oun penas: “Anenn les pash mande!” Oun har ko morsh pash leste vas, poučas o Yezous lestar:" 
Luke18:41 “Hoy kameh tou, te krap touke?” Penas kova: “Ray, me kamau te dikell.”" 
Luke18:42 Penas o Yezous: “Palle dik! Tiro patsepen kras tout sasto.” 
Luke18:43 Oun yob dikas nay pale, djas o Yezouseha, oun sharas o Debles. Oun halauter, kay kova dikan, sharan o Debles ninna." 
Luke19:1 Oun o Yezous djas an o foro Yericho. 
Luke19:2 Kote his i biboldo, ko his i pralstouno pral kolende, kay lenna i biboldendar love i Remaryenge dren. Leskro lab his Zakeo." 
Luke19:3 Yob kamas o Yezouses te dikell, oun nay dikas les gar. Yob his tikno, oun boud menshe his troul o Yezouseste." 
Luke19:4 Doleske nashas lo glan i menshende, oun djas ap i rouk, te dikell lo feteder." 
Luke19:5 Oun o Yezous vas koy oun dikas pre, oun penas ap leste: “Zakeo, am sik koy tele! Kava dives hounte vap me an tiro kheer.”" 
Luke19:6 Oun o Zakeo vas sik o roukestar tele, oun las o Yezouses an peskro kheer dren, oun his barhtelo." 
Luke19:7 Har yon kova dikan, his yon rhoyemen oun penan: “Pash i pale-čiddo djal yob an o kheer.”" 
Luke19:8 O Zakeo his koy tardo oun penas ap o Yezouseste: “Mo ray, me dau i čorvelende i paash lauterestar, hoy man hi. Oun te rhorhrom yekes, dau les kanna star kope yaake boud pale.”" 
Luke19:9 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Kava dives las o Devel i menshen an kava kheer dran o čilačepen vin. Ninna kava rom hi o Abrahameskro čavo. 
Luke19:10 O Mensheskro Čavo vas, te rodell lo kolen, kay nashedo hi, oun te anell lo kolen ap o Debleskro drom, kay ap o čilačo drom hi.”" 
Luke19:11 O Yezous his gar dour o forestar Yerusalem, oun i menshe patsan, kay ko tsiro kanna kay hi, kay o Devel sikrella, te hi lo o ray pral i tseli phoub. Koy penas o Yezous lenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi," 
Luke19:12 oun penas: “I pralstouno kamas te vell lo baro ray pral peskro them. Doleske djas lo pash koleste, kay hi o vast pral boud themma, te krell kova les baro ray. Oun pal kova kamas lo an peskro them pale te djal." 
Luke19:13 Oun yob das deesh peskre boudepangren gole, das hakeneste i sheel roupene beme, oun penas: Boudrenn kol loventsa yaake rah har me gar kay hom. Oun yob djas peske." 
Luke19:14 I menshe an peskro them his rhoyedo ap leste oun bičran morshen leske palla, te penenn le leske: Mer kamah gar, te vess tou baro ray pral mende!" 
Luke19:15 Ko morsh vas baro ray, oun vas an peskro them pale. Koy das lo kol boudepangren gole, kolen yob kol love das. Oun yob kamas dikell, hoy yon kol loventsa kran." 
Luke19:16 I boudepaskro vas pash leste oun penas: Mo ray, me boudrom kol loventsa, hoy tou man dal. Oun kanna hi man deesh kope yaake boud." 
Luke19:17 Penas lo ap koleste: Kova kral tou mishto. Tou hal o lačo boudepaskro. Me čivom i tikno koova an tire vasta, oun tou kral i bari boudi koleha. Doleske kamau, te vess tou o pralstouno pral deesh forya." 
Luke19:18 Ko douyto vas pash ko rayeste, oun penas: Mo ray, me boudrom kol loventsa, hoy tou man dal. Oun kanna hi man panč kope yaake boud." 
Luke19:19 Ap koleste penas lo ninna: Tou veh o pralstouno pral panč forya. 
Luke19:20 Ko triinto vas oun penas: Mo ray, ake, tire sheel roupene beme. Me khatrom len an i diklo." 
Luke19:21 Me darom toutar. Tout hi i dji dran bar. Tou leh, kay dal či. Oun hoy i vavar ap i kotar phoub čivas, leh tou lestar krik, te vas kova bares." 
Luke19:22 Ap koleste penas o ray: Tou moleh či. Tou hal i čilačo boudepaskro. Tou djinal, kay hi man i dji dran bar, oun kay lau, kay dom či, oun hoy me gar an i phoub čivom, te vell kova baro." 
Luke19:23 Hoske anal tou mire love gar pash kolende, kay i love vin patsenna? Oun te voms me pale, loms boudeder love pale, har tou len dal." 
Luke19:24 Oun yob penas ap kolende, kay koy pashel tardo hi: Lenn kol sheel roupene beme lestar krik, oun denn kol love koleste, kay hi les deesh kope boudeder!" 
Luke19:25 Oun yon penan ap o rayeste: Ray, koles hi deesh kope yaake boud!" 
Luke19:26 Koy penas o ray: Kones boud hi, kova lell boudeder. Oun kova, kay hi les gar boud, kolestar vell kova ninna krik lino." 
Luke19:27 Oun yob penas doureder: Anenn kolen glan mande, kay hi rhoyedo ap mande, oun kay kaman gar, te vap baro ray pral lende, oun denn len glan mire yaka temerl!”" 
Luke19:28 Har o Yezous kova penas, djas lo glan lende ap o drom, kay djal an o foro Yerusalem." 
Luke19:29 Oun yob vas pash kol gaba Betfage oun Betani. Kal gaba his ap koy berga čiddo, hoy kharella djeteskri berga. Oun yob bičras douy peskre malendar glan-vi oun penas lenge:" 
Luke19:30 “Djan an o gab koy vergel. Kote hatsenn t'mer i terni esla pandlo, ap koleste his gomme kek beshdo. Pandenn lat tele, oun anenn lat pash mande!" 
Luke19:31 Oun te poučell yek t'mendar: Hoske pandenn lat tele? penenn leske: Hi maro rayeske, te beshell yob ap late.”" 
Luke19:32 Oun kol douy djan an ko gab, oun lauter his yaake, har o Yezous lenge penas." 
Luke19:33 Har yon koya terni esla tele pandan, poučas lendar ko morsh, koleske koy esla his: “Hoske pandenn t'mer koy terni esla tele?”" 
Luke19:34 Oun yon penan leske: “Hi maro rayeske, te beshell yob ap late.”" 
Luke19:35 Koy anan yon koy esla pash o Yezouseste, oun čivan pengre koola ap late. Oun o Yezous beshas pes pral pre." 
Luke19:36 Ap o drom, har yob an o foro Yerusalem klissas, čivan i menshe pengre koola ap o drom, te nashte klissas yob pral vergel." 
Luke19:37 Har yon kote van, kay djal o drom o djeteskri berga tele, dan leskre mala bari gole i barhtyatar, oun sharan o Debles pral ko baro koova, hoy yob mashkral lende kras." 
Luke19:38 Oun yon penan: “Sharas ko baro rayes, koles o Devel bičras. O Debleskri barht vell pash mende! Baro hi o Debleskro raylepen an o bolepen!”" 
Luke19:39 Koy his ninna Farisarya mashkral i menshende ap o drom. Kolla penan: “Ray, pen ap tire malende, te moukenn le tele!”" 
Luke19:40 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Me penau t'menge: Yon te rikrenn pengre mouya, palle denn i barra gole.”" 
Luke19:41 Oun har o Yezous pash o foro Yerusalem vas, rovas lo pral i menshende an kava foro," 
Luke19:42 oun penas: “Barhtelo vans t'mer, te djinans t'mer kava dives, koon anell t'menge o Debleskri barht! T'mer han korelo. T'mer dikenn les gar." 
Luke19:43 Ko bibarhtelo dives vella, kay lourde venna dran i vavar themma. Yon čivenn bare barra troul t'maro foro, te venn t'mer bouder gar vin." 
Luke19:44 Oun yon marenn t'mare menshen, oun denn t'mare čaven an ko foro moulo. Mo Devel kamas t'men peskro lačepen te sikrell. Oun t'mer kaman gar te krenn t'maro dji leske pre. Doleske ačell kek bar ap ko vavar an kava foro.”" 
Luke19:45 Oun o Yezous djas an o Debleskro baro kheer oun tradas kol bikepangren vin," 
Luke19:46 oun penas lenge: “An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O Devel penella: Miro kheer te vell i kheer, kay sharenn man i menshe oun mangenn man an. T'mer kran lestar i kheer, kay i menshe rhorhenna oun randenna.”" 
Luke19:47 Hako dives djas o Yezous an o Debleskro baro kheer oun sikras i menshende o Debleskro drom. I bare rashaya, i biboldengre čačepangre oun i vavar pralstoune rodan i drom, te marenn le les." 
Luke19:48 Yon djinan gar, har nay tapran le les. Boud menshe his troul leste, oun kaman hako lab te shounell, hoy yob penas." 
Luke20:1 His i dives, kay penas o Yezous i menshenge o Debleskro lab an o Debleskro baro kheer. Oun i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre čačepangre oun phoureder van pash leste," 
Luke20:2 oun penan ap leste: “Pen menge, koon penas touke, te kress tou kova lauter? Koon bičras tout?”" 
Luke20:3 Penas lo: “Kanna kamau t'mendar ninna čomone te poučell pral o Yohanni, kova, kay i menshen taufras:" 
Luke20:4 Bičras o Devel o Yohannes, te taufrell lo i menshen? Bičran i menshe les? Penenn les mange!”" 
Luke20:5 Oun yon čingran mashkral pende oun penan: “Te penah mer leske: O Devel bičras o Yohannes, palle penell lo menge: Hoske patsan t'mer les gar?" 
Luke20:6 Te penah mer leske: I menshe bičran les, vitsrenn le barrentsa ap mende, te marenn le men. Yon patsenn zoreles, te hi lo i Debleskro rakepaskro.”" 
Luke20:7 Oun yon penan o Yezouseske: “Mer djinah les gar.” 
Luke20:8 Penas o Yezous lenge: “Yaake penau t'menge vitar gar, koon man bičras, te krap me kova.”" 
Luke20:9 Oun o Yezous penas i menshenge laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, oun penas: “His i morsh. Koles his i kotar them. Kote čivas lo drakengre rouka an i phoub, oun patsas kava them ap i harhende, te boudrenn le kote leske. Oun yob djas peske an i vavar them i rah tsireske." 
Luke20:10 Har ko tsiro vas, te anenn le i drake dren, bičras yob i boudepaskres pash i harhende, te lell lo lendar kol drake, hoy leske hi. I harhe dan les kek drake. Yon dan les dava oun bičran les krik." 
Luke20:11 Koy bičras ko morsh i vavar boudepaskres pash lende. I harhe dan les kek drake. Yon dan les ninna dava, praasan les, oun bičran les krik." 
Luke20:12 O morsh bičras i triinto boudepaskres. I harhe dan les ninna ratlo, oun vitsran les vin." 
Luke20:13 Kanna penas o ray pral o drakengro them ap peste: Hoy krap? Me bičrau miro čaves, koles, kay me kamau o tselo djiyeha. Koles vitsrenn yon gar vin." 
Luke20:14 Har i harhe les dikan, penan le mashkral pende: Kova hi leskro čavo, kay lauter lella pal peskro dadeskro merepen. Maras les, palle hi ko them maro!" 
Luke20:15 Oun yon vitsran les dran ko drakengro them vin, oun maran les. Hoy krell kanna ko ray pral ko drakengro them i harhentsa?" 
Luke20:16 Yob vella, oun marell kol harhen, oun dell ko drakengro them i vavaren.” Har kolla kova shounan, kay troul o Yezouseste tardo his, penan le: “Kova vella gar yaake!”" 
Luke20:17 Oun o Yezous dikas ap lende, oun penas: “Hi činlo an o Debleskro lab: His i bar, kay i boudepangre lestar penan: Kova hi či moldo. Ko bar las o Devel oun čivas les yaake an o kheer, te rikrell lo ko tselo kheer khetne." 
Luke20:18 Koon ap kava bar perella, kova merella. Ap koneste kava bar perella, koles dell ko bar khetne.”" 
Luke20:19 Oun i biboldengre čačepangre oun i bare rashaya hayvan, kay rakras o Yezous lendar. Oun yon kaman te taprenn le les sik pal leskro rakepen, te čivenn le les an o stilepen. Yon trashan i menshendar. Doleske tapran le les gar." 
Luke20:20 Yon lan o Yezouses an o yak. Oun yon bičran morshen, kay kran, har te vans le lačo. Oun kolla poučan boud koova lestar, te dikenn le, hoy yob penals, yaake te nay taprenn le les an leskro rakepen, oun te nay denn le les an i Remaryengre vasta." 
Luke20:21 Oun yaake penan le ap leste: “Sikepaskro, mer djinah, te dareh tou kekestar. Oun tou peneh o čačepen i menshenge an o mouy. Oun tou sikreh lende o Debleskro drom." 
Luke20:22 Pen menge: Hi mishto pal maro čačepen, te das mer o themeskre love o baro rayeste an o foro Rom?”" 
Luke20:23 O Yezous djinas, kay yon gosevo hi, oun yob penas ap lende:" 
Luke20:24 “Denn man i roupeni bema. Koneskro shero oun lab hi ap kay bema?” Penan le: “O shero o baro rayestar an o foro Rom!” 
Luke20:25 Penas lo lenge: “Yaake denn leste, hoy leskro hi, oun denn o Debleste, hoy leskro hi!”" 
Luke20:26 Oun kote glan i menshende nay tapran le les gar an leskro rakepen, oun kran bare yaka pral kova, hoy yob penas, oun djinan bouder gar, hoy te penenn le." 
Luke20:27 Koy van kol rashaya pash leste, kay ninna kharenna Sadducarya. Kolla patsenn gar, kay o Devel i moulen djido krella. Kolla poučan lestar:" 
Luke20:28 “Sikepaskro, o Mose činas: Te merell tiro phraal, kay romedino hi, oun les hi kek čave, palle romedineress tou leskri romyat, te vell tiro phraleske i ternepen boldo." 
Luke20:29 Koy his kanna efta phrala. Ko phoureder romedineras i djouvyat. Oun yob meras, oun les his kek čave." 
Luke20:30 Oun ko douyto romedineras lat oun yob meras. Oun les his kek čave. 
Luke20:31 Oun ko triinto romedineras lat oun meras. Oun les his kek čave. Oun kol vavar lauter, yek pal o vavar, romedineran lat ninna. Oun yon meran lauter. Oun lauteren his kek čave." 
Luke20:32 Pal lende meras ninna koy romni. 
Luke20:33 Kanna poučah mer toutar: Ap ko tsiro, kay krell o Devel i moulen djido, koneskri romni hi li? Hake efta his lah romedino.”" 
Luke20:34 Penas o Yezous lenge: “I menshe ap kay phoub romedinerenna oun moukenn pen te romedinerell. 
Luke20:35 Kol moulen, kay o Devel djido krella, te djivenn le pash leste, kolla romedinerenn bouder gar oun venna gar romedino." 
Luke20:36 Yon merenn bouder gar, oun hi har i bolepangre. Yon stan i moulendar pre. Doleske hi le o Debleskre čave." 
Luke20:37 Ninna o Mose činas, kay o Devel i moulen djido krella. Har o Mose glan o bour tardo his, hoy rhačas, penas lo ap o Debleste: Tou hal o Abrahameskro Devel, oun o Isaakeskro Devel, oun o Yakobeskro Devel." 
Luke20:38 Oun me penau t'menge: Yob hi gar o Devel kolenge, kay moulo hi. Yob hi o Devel kol djidenge. Kalla lauter djivenn leske.”" 
Luke20:39 Koy penan i biboldengre čačepangre: “Ray, kova hi čačo, hoy tou penal.”" 
Luke20:40 Oun yon trashan, te poučenn le lestar boudeder." 
Luke20:41 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Har nay penenn yon, kay o baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell lo, o Davideskro čavo hi?" 
Luke20:42 O David činas an peskre gilya: O Devel penas ap miro rayeste: Besh tout ap miri čači rig," 
Luke20:43 te čivap kolen tel tire pire, kay hi rhoyedo ap toute!" 
Luke20:44 Kate penell o David Ray ap leste. Har vell lo nay leskro čavo?” 
Luke20:45 Har i tsele menshe shounan, hoy o Yezous rakras, penas yob ap peskre malende:" 
Luke20:46 “Denn yak! Kova, hoy kol biboldengre čačepangre krenna, hi gar mishto. Len hi lengste koola ap lende, te sikrenn le, te hi le o Debleskre menshe. Te djan le an o foro, kamenn le, te penenn i menshe Lačo dives, mo ray! ap lende. Ninna kamenn le ap i pralstoune beshepangre te beshell an i biboldengri kangri oun ap i feteder beshepangre pash i baro rhapen." 
Luke20:47 Yon lenn i khera kol djouvyendar krik, kolengre romma moulo hi. Te mangenn le o Debles, palle rakrenn le leha i rah tsiro, te dikenn i menshe, har patslo yon hi. O Devel rakrell i phagi pral lende vin, oun yon lenna i bareder phagi har i vavar.”" 
Luke21:1 Oun o Yezous dikas pre oun dikas, har i bravele pengre love an i lovengri piri an o Debleskro baro kheer dren čivan." 
Luke21:2 Oun yob dikas kote ninna i čorveli romni, kay hi lat bouder kek romes. Yoy das douy tikne kotya love o Debleste." 
Luke21:3 Koy penas o Yezous: “Me penau t'menge: Koy romni das boudeder har kol tsele vavar, kay bravelo hi." 
Luke21:4 Kol vavar dan love dran pengro bravlepen. Kay čorveli romni das halauter, hoy lat hi djipaske.”" 
Luke21:5 Oun i menshe, kay troul leste tardo his, penan: “Dik, o Debleskro baro kheer! Have shoukar barra oun kouč koova yon o Debleske anan.” Koy penas o Yezous:" 
Luke21:6 “Ko tsiro vella, kay halauter, hoy t'mer kate dikenna, paash djala. Kek bar ačell ap i vavareste.”" 
Luke21:7 Koy poučan yon lestar: “Sikepaskro, kaana vella kova? Har nay dikas mer, kay hi ko tsiro kay?”" 
Luke21:8 Penas lo: “Denn yak! Moukenn t'men kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! Koy venna boud morsha, kay penenna: Me hom o Kristo, ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob! Oun yon penenn ninna: O tsiro hi kay! Me penau t'menge: Ma nashenn lenge palla!" 
Luke21:9 An ko tsiro della boud baro kourepen, oun i menshe hadenn pen pral pengre themeskre rayende. Ma trashenn! Ko hounte vell yaake. Ko tsiro, kay i phoub paash djala, vell gar yaake sik.”" 
Luke21:10 Palle penas lo ap lende: “Ko tsiro vella, kay kourenn pen i pralstoune pral bare themma vavar pralstunentsa. Oun i menshe dran yek them marenn kolen an i vavar them." 
Luke21:11 Oun kay te koy vell i phoub zoreles trisslemen. An boud themma hi i menshen gar doha te rhal, oun baro nasslepen vell ap lende. Oun yon dikenn i baro koova ap o bolepen, hoy krell lenge bari daar." 
Luke21:12 Glan ko tsiro, kay kova lauter vella, lenn yon t'men palla, oun taprenn t'men. Yon anenn t'men glan i čačepangre an i biboldengre kangria oun vitsrenn t'men an o stilepen. T'mer patsenn ap mande. Doleske anenn le t'men glan i bare rayende oun glan i pralstunende, te rakrenn yon i phagi vin pral t'mende." 
Luke21:13 Yon te krenn kova lauter t'mentsa, palle rakrenn nay mandar." 
Luke21:14 Ma moukenn kova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal, hoy t'mer hounte penenn kol rayenge!" 
Luke21:15 Me dau t'men ko gosvepen, oun penau t'menge, hoy t'mer hounte penenn. Oun palle djinenn le bouder gar, hoy te penenn le." 
Luke21:16 Oun t'maro dad oun t'mari day, t'mare phrala oun phenya, oun t'mare vavar menshe phoukrenn ap t'mende, ninna t'mare mala. Oun mank t'mende hi save, kay venn maredo." 
Luke21:17 Hakeno hi rhoyedo ap t'mende doleske, kay patsenn t'mer ap mande." 
Luke21:18 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kek bal ap t'maro shero djal nashedo." 
Luke21:19 Ačenn zoreles an o patsepen, oun t'mer lenn ko čačo djipen!”" 
Luke21:20 “Te dikenn t'mer, kay boud lourde troul o foro Yerusalem tardo hi, palle djinenn t'mer, kay yon ko foro paash krenna." 
Luke21:21 Palle hounte nashenn i tsele menshe dran o them Youdea pral an i berge. Oun koon an o foro hi, hounte djal yaake sik har djala dran vin. Oun koon vin ap o them hi, hounte djal gar an o foro dren." 
Luke21:22 An kol divessa vell o Debleskri rholi ap i menshende tele. Palle vell lauter čačo, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi." 
Luke21:23 Koy bibarht hi bari kol djouvyenge, kay hi an vavar koova, ninna kolenge, kay hi len i ternepen. O Debleskri rholi vell pral i tsele menshende an kava them. Oun len hi i pharo tsiro." 
Luke21:24 Boud venna maredo o rhareha. Vavar venna pandlo oun venna an i vavar themma anlo. Oun o foro Yerusalem vell kol menshendar khetne stakedo, kay venna dran vavar themma. Kova djal yaake rah, har o Devel moukell len kova te krell.”" 
Luke21:25 “Ap o kham oun ap o moonto oun ap i bolepangre momlia dikenn t'mer baro koova. Pral i menshende an boud themma vell i bari traash, te dikenn le, har vell o baro pani divyo oun hadell pes pral oun dell bari gole." 
Luke21:26 I tsele menshe ap i phoub hi paash-mulo i trashatar pral kova, hoy lauter ap lende vella. I bolepaskri zoor perell khetne." 
Luke21:27 Oun palle dikenn i tsele menshe o Menshengro Čaves, har vell lo ap i folka bari zoryah oun raylepen." 
Luke21:28 Te dikenn t'mer, har kova lauter vella, avenn zoreles oun trashenn gar! I tsiro hi palle koy, kay o Devel lell t'men dran o čilačepen oun dran o merepen vin.”" 
Luke21:29 Oun o Yezous penas lenge save laba, kay i khatedo čačepen dren hi, oun penas: “Dikenn ap o faygetikro rouk oun ap i vavar rouka!" 
Luke21:30 Te venn i rouka zenelo, palle djinenn t'mer, te vell sik o niyal." 
Luke21:31 Yaake hi kova ninna koleha, pral kova rakrom. Te dikenn t'mer, har kova lauter vella, palle djinenn, te vell ko tsiro sik, kay o Devel peskre menshen dran o čilačepen vin lella, oun yob o ray pral i tseli phoub hi." 
Luke21:32 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Kol menshe, kay an ko tsiro djivenna, dikenn kova lauter pengre yakentsa." 
Luke21:33 O bolepen oun i phoub ačenna gar. Mire laba ačenn hako tsiro.” 
Luke21:34 “Denn garda, te vell t'maro dji gar pherdo phoubyakro koova, yaake te bistrenn o Debles! Piyenn t'men gar mato! Ma darenn t'maro djipaske! Denn yak, te vell ko dives gar ap yek kopo ap t'mende yaake, te han t'mer tapedo!" 
Luke21:35 Djinenn! Ko dives vell pral lauterende, kay djivenna ap i phoub." 
Luke21:36 Denn yak hako tsiro! Mangenn o Deblestar, te venn t'mer zorelo an o patsepen tardo, oun venn mishto vin dran ko čilačo tsiro, hoy vella! Yaake hounte trashenn t'mer gar o Menshengro Čavestar, te vell lo pale.”" 
Luke21:37 Hako dives rakras o Yezous an o Debleskro baro kheer. I rati djas yob pash koy berga, hoy kharella djeteskri berga, oun ačas koy." 
Luke21:38 Taysarlake van boud menshe an o Debleskro baro kheer, te shounenn yon, hoy o Yezous penella." 
Luke22:1 His glan kol divessa, kay i bibolde kek maro rhan, kay shoutlo yarro dren hi. Kol divessa kharenna Passa." 
Luke22:2 Oun i bare rashaya oun i biboldengre čačepangre rodan i drom, har yon nay marenn o Yezouses. Yon kaman les gar glan kol boud menshende te taprell. Kolendar daran le." 
Luke22:3 Koy djas o beng an o Youdas Iskariot dren. Kova his yek kol deesh-te-douyendar. 
Luke22:4 O Youdas djas pash kol bare rashayende oun pash i pralstoune lourdende, oun rakras kolentsa, har yob nay phoukrell ap leste." 
Luke22:5 Oun yon his barhtelo pral kova, oun kaman les love te dell, te nay taprenn le o Yezouses." 
Luke22:6 “Mishto” penas o Youdas, oun rodas i lačo tsiro, te dell lo les an lengre vasta, yaake te djinenn i menshe kova gar." 
Luke22:7 His an kol divessa, kay i bibolde ko maro rhana, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi. Oun ko dives vas, kay hounte marenn le i bakro hako khereske." 
Luke22:8 Koy bičras o Yezous o Petres oun o Yohannes an o foro Yerusalem, oun penas: “Djan an ko foro oun krenn o rhapen menge!”" 
Luke22:9 Oun yon poučan lestar: “Kay kameh tou, te kras o rhapen?”" 
Luke22:10 Penas lo ap lende: “Shounenn, te venn t'mer an o foro, palle dikenn t'mer i morshes. Kova hidjrell i khoro pani. Djan koleste palla an ko kheer, kay yob dren djala!" 
Luke22:11 Kote penenn o rayeske an ko kheer: Maro sikepaskro poučell toutar: Kay hi koy isema, kay nay rhau me ko bakro mire malentsa?" 
Luke22:12 Oun yob sikrell t'mende i bari isema, pral an ko kheer. Kote hi beshepangre tardo. Kote krenn o rhapen!”" 
Luke22:13 Oun yon djan kote, oun hatsan lauter yaake, har o Yezous lenge penas. Oun yon kran o rhapen." 
Luke22:14 Har ko čačo tsiro vas, beshas yob pes tele. Oun kol deesh-te-douy bičepangre beshan pen leha." 
Luke22:15 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Kava rhapen kamom me o tselo djiyestar te rhap t'mentsa glan ko tsiro, kay me hounte lap boud douka ap mande." 
Luke22:16 Me penau t'menge: Me rhau kava rhapen bouder gar yaake rah, bis te vell ko tsiro, kay kova čačo vas, hoy kava rhapen sikrella. Palle rhau les t'mentsa pash o Debleste an o bolepen.”" 
Luke22:17 Oun o Yezous las o khoro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, oun penas ap lende: “Ake, lenn oun piyenn halauter kay mool!" 
Luke22:18 Me penau t'menge: Me piyau bouder gar i mool yaake rah, bis te vell ko dives, kay hi o Devel o ray pral halauter.”" 
Luke22:19 Oun yob las i kotar maro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, phagas ko maro, das kova lende, oun penas ap lende: “Ake, rhan! Kava maro hi miro mass. Me dau man t'menge. Te hom bouder gar koy, krenn kova pale oun pale, te vell t'menge an t'maro shero, hoy me krom t'menge!”" 
Luke22:20 Pal o rhapen las lo o khoro oun penas: “Kay mool an kava khoro hi miro rat, hoy t'menge ratau. Yaake krau i nevo drom, kay o Devel oun i menshe mala venna.”" 
Luke22:21 Palle penas o Yezous: “O phoukepaskro hi mantsa ap kaya rhapaskri beshdo. 
Luke22:22 Me, o Mensheskro Čavo, hounte merap. Ninna te hi mange glan diklo, te djap kava drom, havi bibarht vell ap koleste, kay ap mande phoukrella!”" 
Luke22:23 Oun yek poučas i vavarestar: “Koon hi kova mendar, kay krell kova?”" 
Luke22:24 Oun o Yezouseskre mala čingran pen, koon lendar o bareder hi." 
Luke22:25 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “I bare rayen ap kay phoub hi penepaske pral i menshende an pengre themma. Kolla hounte shounenn ap lende oun hounte boudrenn lenge. Oun kol pralstoune kamenn, te penenn i menshe lenge, har lače morsha yon hi." 
Luke22:26 Me penau t'menge: Ma krenn kova yaake har kolla! O bareder mashkral t'mende hounte vell yaake har o tikneder t'mendar. Oun kova, kay kamell o pralstouno te vell, hounte vell o telstouno, kay boudrell i vavarenge." 
Luke22:27 Koon kol douyendar hi bareder: Kova, kay pash i rhapaskri beshdo hi? Kova, kay čivell o rhapen ap i rhapaskri? Čačepah, kova, kay pash i rhapaskri beshdo hi! Oun me hom mashkral t'mende har yek, kay t'menge boudrella." 
Luke22:28 T'mer rikran pash mande vin an kol divessa, har i menshe miro djipen phares kran." 
Luke22:29 Oun me kamau, te venn t'mer mantsa khetne raya, yaake har miro dad an o bolepen kamella, te vap o baro ray pral i menshende." 
Luke22:30 Oun t'mer rhana oun piyenna mantsa kote, kay me o baro ray hom, oun han beshdo ap rayeskre beshepangre, oun penenn o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende, kay venna o deesh-te-douy Israeleskre čavendar.”" 
Luke22:31 “Simon, Simon, shoun, hoy me touke penau: O beng las t'men an o yak oun kamas te dikell, har zorelo t'maro patsepen hi." 
Luke22:32 Me mangom touke pash mo Debleste, te djas tou gar o Debleskro dromestar tele. Oun te djah tou pale ap o čačo drom, kre tire phralen zoreles an o patsepen!”" 
Luke22:33 Penas o Petro: “Ray, me djoms touha an o stilepen oun an o merepen.”" 
Luke22:34 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Petro, me penau touke, kay rati dell o bashno gar gole yaake rah, har tou gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.”" 
Luke22:35 Oun yob penas ap peskre malende: “Har me t'men ap o drom bičrom, his t'men kek love, vitar kek gono oun kek kirrha pash t'mende. His t'men bok? His t'men troush?” Penan le: “Na-a, gar yek kopo!”" 
Luke22:36 Penas lo: “Kanna lenn love t'mentsa! Lenn ninna i gono peha, kay čivenn t'mer t'mare koola dren! Oun bikrenn t'mari plaashka, te ginenn t'menge i rharo!" 
Luke22:37 Me penau t'menge: Hi činlo pral mande an o Debleskro lab: Yon penenn lestar, te hi lo yek lendar, kay čilačo hi. Čačepah, lauter, hoy pral mande činlo vas, vella čačo.”" 
Luke22:38 Penan leskre mala ap leste: “Ray, kate hi douy rhare.” Penas lo: “Kanna hi doha!”" 
Luke22:39 Oun o Yezous djas pash i djeteskri berga, yaake har yob kova boud kope kras. Oun peskre mala djan leha." 
Luke22:40 Oun har yon pash i djeteskri berga van, penas lo ap lende: “Mangenn o Deblestar, te nay anell t'men či o Debleskro dromestar tele!”" 
Luke22:41 Oun o Yezous kokres djas i tikno kotar doureder, oun vitsras pes ap i čanga," 
Luke22:42 oun mangas o Debles: “Tata, te kameh tou, mouk kek douka ap mande te vell! Kre gar, har me kamau. Kre yaake, har tou kameh!”" 
Luke22:43 Oun i Debleskro bolepaskro vas pash leste dran o bolepen oun das les zoor. 
Luke22:44 Oun o Yezous mangas o Debles zorleder, oun rat nashas leskro sherestar tele ap i phoub, yaake zoreles vas i daar ap leste." 
Luke22:45 Oun palle stas lo pre oun djas pash peskre malende. Yon van khino oun sovan, yaake bibarhtelo hi le. Har yob dikas, te sovan le," 
Luke22:46 penas lo ap lende: “Hoske sovenn t'mer? Stenn pre oun mangenn o Deblestar, te nay anell t'men či o Debleskro dromestar tele!”" 
Luke22:47 Har o Yezous yaake rakras, koy van boud menshe. Glan kol menshende djas o Youdas. Kova his yek o Yezouseskre deesh-te-douy malendar. Yob djas pash o Yezouseste, oun kamas les i čoum te dell." 
Luke22:48 O Yezous penas ap leste: “Youdas, kameh tou ap o Menshengro Čaveste phoukrell oun deh les i čoum?”" 
Luke22:49 Har o Yezouseskre mala, kay troul leste tardo his, dikan, hoy koy djas, poučan yon lestar: “Ray, das mer i rhareha ap lende pre?”" 
Luke22:50 Oun yek lendar las o rharo, oun das i klisteske o čačo kand tele. Kova his i klisto, kay boudrell o baro rashayeske." 
Luke22:51 Koy penas o Yezous: “Mouk tele! Kanna hi doha!” Oun yob čivas peskro vast ap o kand ko morshestar, oun kras les sasto." 
Luke22:52 Oun o Yezous penas ap i bare rashayende oun ap i pralstunende pral o Debleskro baro kheer oun ap i biboldengre phoureder, kay pash leste van: “T'mer van rharentsa oun kashtentsa pash mande, har te voms i marepaskro." 
Luke22:53 Hako dives homs pash t'mende an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun t'mer tapran man gar. Kanna hi t'maro tsiro. Kanna hi o benges penepaske.”" 
Luke22:54 Oun yon pandan les oun anan les an o baro rayeskro kheer. O Petro djas lenge palla, oun ačas i kotar pal lende." 
Luke22:55 Pash ko kheer kran i lourde i yag, oun beshan pen lauter khetne. Oun o Petro beshas pes pash lende." 
Luke22:56 Oun i boudepaskretsa his pash i yag beshdo, dikas les oun penas: “Kova his ninna pash o Yezouseste.”" 
Luke22:57 O Petro das bourhoste oun penas: “Romniya, me prindjrau les gar.”" 
Luke22:58 I tikno tsiro koy pre dikas i vavar ap leste, oun penas: “Tou hal ninna yek kolendar.” Oun o Petro penas: “Romeha, me hom gar yek lendar.”" 
Luke22:59 Oun i tsiro koy pre penas pale i vavar: “Čačepah, ko morsh his ninna pash leste. Yob hi dran o them Galilea.”" 
Luke22:60 Koy penas o Petro: “Romeha, me djinau gar, hoy tou peneh.” Oun har yob kova penas, das o bashno gole." 
Luke22:61 Oun o Yezous rissras pes trouyel, oun dikas o Petres an i yaka. Oun o Petreske van kolla laba an o shero, hoy o Yezous ap leste penas: “O bashno dell gar gole yaake rah, har tou gar triin kope penal, te prindjreh man gar.”" 
Luke22:62 Oun o Petro djas vin, oun rovas zoreles." 
Luke22:63 Kol morsha, kay dan garda ap o Yezouseste, san pral leste, oun dan les dava." 
Luke22:64 Oun yon pandan leskre yaka, oun penan: “Pen menge, koon das tout!”" 
Luke22:65 Oun yon praasan les. 
Luke22:66 Oun har o dives vas, moukan i biboldengre phoureder, i bare rashaya oun i čačepangre o Yezouses pash pende te anell." 
Luke22:67 Oun penan ap leste: “Hal tou o Kristo, ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob? Pen menge!” Penas lo: “Me te penau les t'menge, patsenn t'mer man gar." 
Luke22:68 Oun te poučau t'mendar čomone, penenn t'mer či." 
Luke22:69 Ko tsiro vell sik, kay me, o Mensheskro Čavo, hom beshdo ap i čači rig o zorelo Deblestar.”" 
Luke22:70 Penan yon: “Hal tou o Debleskro čavo?” Penas yob: “Ava, hi yaake har t'mer penan. Me hom kova.”" 
Luke22:71 Penan le mashkral pende: “Menge hi kanna doha. Mer shounam dran leskro mouy, hoy yob penas. Kek hounte penell menge boudeder.”" 
Luke23:1 Oun lauter stan pre, oun anan o Yezouses pash o Pilateste." 
Luke23:2 Oun yon anan boud koova ap leste pre, oun penan: “Kava morsh kras mare menshen divyo. Yob penas, te das mer o baro rayeste an o foro Rom bouder kek love. Oun yob penas ninna, kay hi lo o Kristo, ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob.”" 
Luke23:3 Koy poučas o Pilato lestar: “Hal tou o baro ray pral i biboldende?” Penas lo: “Ava, hi yaake har tou penal.”" 
Luke23:4 Koy penas o Pilato ap kol bare rashayende oun ap kol vavar menshende, kay kote tardo hi: “Me hatsom kek doosh ap leste.”" 
Luke23:5 Yon moukan gar tele, te anenn le čilačo koova ap o Yezouseste, oun penan: “Yob kras i menshen divyo an o them Galilea, oun an o tselo them Youdea, oun an o foro Yerusalem ninna.”" 
Luke23:6 Har o Pilato kova shounas, poučas yob: “Hi kava morsh dran o them Galilea?”" 
Luke23:7 Oun har yob shounas, kay o Yezous dran o them Galilea hi, kay o Herodes o baro ray hi, moukas lo o Yezouses pash koleste te anell. O Herodes his an ko tsiro ninna an o foro Yerusalem." 
Luke23:8 Oun o Herodes his barhtelo, har yob o Yezouses dikas. Yob shounas lestar oun kamas les i rah tsiro te dikell. Yob kamas, te krell o Yezous leske i baro koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella." 
Luke23:9 Kanna, har o Yezous glan leste tardo hi, poučas yob o Yezousestar boud koova. O Yezous penas či pale." 
Luke23:10 I bare rashaya oun i biboldengre čačepangre his koy pashel tardo, oun anan boud čilačo koova ap o Yezouseste." 
Luke23:11 Oun o Herodes oun leskre lourde san pral leste, rivan leske i rayeskri plaashka an, oun moukan les pale pash o Pilateste te anell." 
Luke23:12 Oun ap ko dives van o Herodes oun o Pilato mala. Glan ko dives his yon rhoyedo yek ap i vavareste. 
Luke23:13 O Pilato das i bare rashayen, i pralstoune bibolden, oun i tsele menshen khetne gole," 
Luke23:14 oun penas ap lende: “T'mer anan kava morshes pash mande, oun penan mange, te krell lo i menshen divyo. Me kamom lestar te shounell, hoy yob koy pre penella, oun hatsom kek doosh ap leste, hoy t'mer ap leste pre anan." 
Luke23:15 Oun o Herodes hatsas vitar kek doosh ap leste. Doleske bičras yob les pale pash mende. Oun kanna shounenn, hoy me t'menge penau: Kava morsh kras či, te hounte vell lo maredo." 
Luke23:16 Me moukau les dava te dell, oun moukau les te djal.”" 
Luke23:17  
Luke23:18 Koy dan i tsele menshe gole: “Mare les, oun de men o Barabes!”" 
Luke23:19 O Barabas his i stildo. Yob kras an o foro Yerusalem i baro čingepen, oun das i morshes temerl." 
Luke23:20 O Pilato kamas o Yezouses te djal moukell. Oun yob das gole, te kamell lo o Yezouses te djal moukell." 
Luke23:21 I menshe dan pale gole: “De les ap o troushel! Ap o troushel leha!” 
Luke23:22 Oun o Pilato poučas lendar o triinto kopo: “Havo čilačo koova kras yob? Yaake har me kova dikau, kras yob či, te hounte vell yob maredo. Me dau les dava, oun moukau les te djal.”" 
Luke23:23 Yon dan zorleder gole, te vell lo ap o troushel dino. Oun har yon gar tele moukan, shounas o Pilato ap lende oun penas:" 
Luke23:24 “Me krau, hoy t'mer kamenna.” Oun yob penas i lourdenge, te denn le les ap o troushel, te merell lo kote." 
Luke23:25 Oun o Pilato moukas koles dran o stilepen vin te djal, kay kras i baro čingepen an o foro oun maras yekes. O Yezouses das yob an lengre vasta." 
Luke23:26 Oun har yon o Yezouses krik anan, te vell yob ap o troushel dino, tapran le i morshes ap o drom. Kova boudras vin ap i kotar phoub oun his kanna ap o drom khere. Leskro lab hi Simon, oun yob his dran ko foro Kirene. Ap koleste čivan yon o troushel, te hidjrell lo kova o Yezouseske palla." 
Luke23:27 Oun boud morsha oun djouvya djan o Yezouseske palla ap o drom. Kolla dan bari gole oun rovan. 
Luke23:28 Oun o Yezous rissras pes trouyel oun penas ap lende: “Djuvyale dran o foro Yerusalem, rovenn gar pral mande! Rovenn pral t'mende oun pral t'mare čavende!" 
Luke23:29 Ko tsiro vella, kay i menshe penenna: Barhtele hi kol djouvya, kay lan kek ternepen." 
Luke23:30 Ap ko tsiro penenn le ap i berge: Perenn pral mende! 
Luke23:31 Te krenn yon kava i zenelo kashteha, hoy krenn yon palle i phouro kashteha?”" 
Luke23:32 Ninna douy čilače morsha van o Yezouseha glan o foro anlo, te venn le kote ap o troushel dino." 
Luke23:33 Har yon lauter ap ko kotar them van, hoy kharella Mouleskro Shero, dan yon o Yezouses ap o troushel, oun kol douy čilače morshen ninna. Ko yekeskro troushel his čačes lestar, ko vavareskro troushel his serves lestar." 
Luke23:34 Koy penas o Yezous: “Miro dad, le i doosh kolendar krik, kay man ap o troushel dan! Yon djinenn gar, hoy yon kran.” Oun i lourde khelan pral leskre koola, te dikenn le, hoy hakeno lella." 
Luke23:35 Oun i menshe, kay koy pashel tardo his, dikan kova lauter, hoy o Yezouseha djas. Kol pralstoune bibolde, kay kote tardo hi, san pral leste, oun penan: “Vavaren las yob dran o merepen vin. Te hi lo čačepah o Kristo, ko baro ray, kones o Devel vin rodas, te vell lo pash mende, palle nay djals yob o troushelestar tele.”" 
Luke23:36 Oun ninna kol lourde san pral leste, oun dan les shoutli mool te piyell." 
Luke23:37 Oun yon penan ap leste: “Tou te hal o baro ray pral i biboldende, ab o troushelestar tele!”" 
Luke23:38 Oun pral leste ap i kasht his činlo: Kova hi i o baro ray pral i biboldende. 
Luke23:39 Yek kol čilače morshendar, kay ap o troushel dino his, praasas o Yezouses, oun penas: “Te hal tou ko Kristo, ab o troushelestar tele, oun le men ninna tele!”" 
Luke23:40 Ko vavar čingras ap leste oun penas: “Mouk tele! Dareh tou gar o Deblestar, kanna kay hal ap o troushel?" 
Luke23:41 Kava hi mari phagi koleske, hoy kram. Mer anah čačepah doosh ap mende. Kava morsh kras kek čilačepen.”" 
Luke23:42 Oun yob penas ap o Yezouseste: “Yezous, ma biste man, te hal tou kote, kay tou o baro ray hal!”" 
Luke23:43 Oun o Yezous penas ap leste: “Čačepah, me penau touke: Kava dives hal tou mantsa an o Debleskri shoukar baar.”" 
Luke23:44 His nay deesh-te-douyenge, koy vas o dives kalo har i rati an o tselo them. Oun kova ačas yaake bis trinenge." 
Luke23:45 Oun o voudar an o Debleskro baro kheer, kay his kerdo dran kouč pesso than, koya djas an douy kotya mashkral paash." 
Luke23:46 Oun o Yezous das bari gole: “Miro dad, an tire vasta čivau me miro djipen!” Oun palle meras lo." 
Luke23:47 Har ko pralstouno lourdo dikas, hoy koy djas, sharas lo o Debles oun penas: “Čačepah, kava his i lačo morsh.”" 
Luke23:48 Kol menshenge, kay kote van oun lauter dikan, djas kova yaake phares an o dji, te dan pen yon ap o beč, oun djan penge le." 
Luke23:49 Oun o Yezouseskre mala oun kol djouvya, kay van leha dran o them Galilea, kolla his i kotar krik tardo oun dikan kova lauter." 
Luke23:50 Koy vas i morsh, ko kharella Yosef. Kova his čačo oun lačo. Yob his yek kol pralstoune biboldendar," 
Luke23:51 oun kamas gar, te vell o Yezous ap o troushel dino. Yob his dran i biboldengro foro Arimatia. Oun yob dikas ap o Debleste, te vell ko tsiro, kay hakeno dikell, kay o Devel o baro ray hi." 
Luke23:52 Yob djas pash o Pilateste oun mangas lestar, te denn le les o moulo Yezouses." 
Luke23:53 Oun o Yosef las o Yezouses o troushelestar tele, oun čivas les an i layntikro kotar, oun čivas les an i moulengro kheer, kova his an i baro bar dino. Kote his gomme kek mensho dren čiddo." 
Luke23:54 Kova his glan o Debleskro dives, har o kham tele djas." 
Luke23:55 Kol djouvya, kay van o Yezouseha dran o them Galilea, kolla djan o Yosefeske palla, oun dikan, har čivas lo o moulo Yezouses an i moulengro kheer." 
Luke23:56 Oun yon djan an o foro pale, oun kran kouč djet, hoy mishto soungella, te makenn le les dren. Ap o Debleskro dives kran le kek boudi, yaake har kova pash i biboldende hi." 
Luke24:1 Sik taysarlake, pal o Debleskro dives, lan le kouč djet, hoy yon kokres kran, oun djan pash ko moulengro kheer." 
Luke24:2 Kote dikan le, kay ko baro bar bouder gar glan o moulengro kheer čiddo hi." 
Luke24:3 Oun yon djan dren, oun hatsan gar o moulo troupo o rayestar Yezous." 
Luke24:4 Har yon koy tardo his, oun djinan gar, hoy te krenn le, his kote ap yek kopo douy morsha tardo. Oun lengre ripya his rayles biyalo." 
Luke24:5 Oun i traash vas ap i djouvyende. Oun daryatar dikan le ap i phoub. Kol douy morsha penan ap lende: “Hoske rodenn t'mer kol djides pash i moulende? 
Luke24:6 Yob hi gar kay. O Devel kras les i moulendar djido. Bistran t'mer kova, hoy yob t'menge penas, har yob an o them Galilea his?" 
Luke24:7 Yob penas t'menge: O Mensheskro Čavo hounte vell an i čilače vasta dino, oun ap o troushel dino. Oun pal triin divessa stell lo i moulendar pre.”" 
Luke24:8 Oun kol laba van pale an lengro shero. 
Luke24:9 Koy djan yon krik dran ko moulengro kheer, oun djan pale an o foro, oun penan kova lauter o Yezouseskre deesh-te-yek malenge, oun ninna kol tsele vavarenge, kay pash lende hi." 
Luke24:10 Kol djouvya his i Maria Magdalena, i Yoanna oun i Maria, ko Yakobeskri day oun vavar." 
Luke24:11 Oun kova, hoy i djouvya penan, his i morshenge dinelo rakepen. Oun yon patsan kol djouvyen gar." 
Luke24:12 O Petro stas pre, oun djas pash ko moulengro kheer, dikas dren, hatsas kol layntikre kotya ap i rig čiddo, oun djas peske. Yob djinas gar, hoy te penell lo." 
Luke24:13 Ap kava dives djan douy o Yezouseskre malendar an ko gab Emmaus. Kova his deesh-te-douy kilometarya glan o foro Yerusalem. 
Luke24:14 Ap o drom rakran le pral lauter, hoy an o foro Yerusalem djas." 
Luke24:15 Har yon yaake rakran, vas o Yezous pash lende, oun djas lentsa." 
Luke24:16 Yon prindjran les gar, har te vans lengre yaka pandlo." 
Luke24:17 Koy poučas lo lendar: “Pral havo koova rakrenn t'mer?” Koy vas lenge ropaske, oun yon ačan tardo." 
Luke24:18 Oun ko yek, kay kharella Kleopas, penas ap leste: “Djineh tou gar, hoy an kal divessa an o foro Yerusalem lauter djas? Halauter djinenn kova. Hal tou i vi-themari oun djineh kova gar?”" 
Luke24:19 Oun o Yezous penas: “Hoy djas?” Oun yon penan: “Kova, hoy kran le o Yezouseha dran Nazaret. Yob his o Debleskro rakepaskro, ap koleste o Debleskri zoor his. O Devel bičras les. Kova dikas hakeno ap kova, hoy yob penas oun kras." 
Luke24:20 Mare bare rashaya oun pralstoune rakran i phagi pral leste vin, te vell lo ap o troushel dino. Oun yon dan les ap o troushel." 
Luke24:21 Mer patsam, kay o Devel bičras les, te lell yob i Israeleskre menshen dran i Remaryengre vasta vin. Kova djas lauter glan triin divessa." 
Luke24:22 Oun kava dives penan menge i djouvya čomone, kay ačas menge o rakepen krik. Kol djouvya his taysarlake pash o moulengro kheer," 
Luke24:23 oun hatsan o moulo Yezouses gar. Yon van pale pash mende, oun penan: Mer dikam bolepangren, oun kolla penan: O Yezous djivella!" 
Luke24:24 Morsha mendar djan pash ko moulengro kheer, oun lauter his yaake, har kolla djouvya kova penan. Les dikan yon gar.”" 
Luke24:25 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “T'mer hayvan či. An t'maro dji djal či dren. Hoske patsenn t'mer kova gar, hoy o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro penan?" 
Luke24:26 Kolla penan: O Kristo, ko baro ray, kones o Devel bičras, hounte las douka ap peste, te djas lo an peskro raylepen.”" 
Luke24:27 Palle penas o Yezous lenge, hoy o Mose oun i tsele Debleskre rakepangre pral leste činan." 
Luke24:28 Oun yaake van le pash o gab Emmaus, oun o Yezous kras yaake, har te kamell lo doureder te djal." 
Luke24:29 Yon rikran les pale, oun penan ap leste: “Ač pash mende! I rati vella, oun vell tamlo.” Koy djas yob lentsa an o kheer," 
Luke24:30 oun beshas pes te rhal lo lentsa, las o maro, parkras pes pash o Debleste, phagas ko maro an kotya, oun das kova lende." 
Luke24:31 Koy hayvan le, kova hi o Yezous. Oun ap yek kopo dikan le les bouder gar." 
Luke24:32 Oun yon penan mashkral pende: “Djas kova gar an maro dji, har yob ap o drom mentsa rakras, oun menge penas, hoy an o Debleskro lab pral leste činlo hi?”" 
Luke24:33 Oun yon stan pre, oun yaake sik har djala, djan le pale an o foro Yerusalem. Kote his kol deesh-te-yek oun kol vavar o Yezouseskre malendar khetne." 
Luke24:34 Oun kolla, kay kote khetne hi, penan lenge: “O Devel kras čačepah o Yezouses djido, oun o Simon dikas les.”" 
Luke24:35 Koy ginan kol douy lenge dren, hoy lenge ap o drom djas, oun har yon les prindjran, har yob o maro phagas." 
Luke24:36 Har yon kova penan, his ap yek kopo o Yezous mashkral lende tardo, oun penas ap lende: “O Debleskri barht t'menge!”" 
Luke24:37 Yon patsan, kay dikenn le i moules. Oun i daar vas ap lende." 
Luke24:38 Koy penas lo ap lende: “Hoy dikenn t'mer yaake darenes? Hoske poučenn t'men an t'maro shero, koon me hom?" 
Luke24:39 Dikenn mire vasta oun mire herya! Me hom les. Taprenn man an, oun hayvenn: Kek moules hi mass oun kokale ap peste, har t'mer les pash mande dikenna!”" 
Luke24:40 Oun har yob kova penas, sikras yob lende peskre vasta oun pire." 
Luke24:41 Yon nashte patsan gar, kay hi o Yezous glan lende tardo, yaake barhtelo his le. Har djinan le gar, hoy te penenn le, poučas lo lendar: “Hi t'men čomone te rhal?”" 
Luke24:42 Koy dan le les i kotar peklo mačo. 
Luke24:43 Yob las kova oun rhas les glan lende. 
Luke24:44 Oun yob penas: “Har me pash t'mende homs, penom me ap t'mende: Halauter hounte vell čačo, hoy o Mose činas, oun hoy o Debleskre rakepangre pral mande penan, oun hoy an o Debleskre gilya činlo hi.”" 
Luke24:45 Oun palle das lo len gosvepen, te hayvenn le o Debleskro lab," 
Luke24:46 oun penas ap lende: “Yaake hi činlo an o Debleskro lab: O Kristo, ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, kova hounte lell douka ap peste, oun pal triin divessa stell lo i moulendar pre." 
Luke24:47 Oun an peskro lab hounte vell i menshenge an hake themma penlo, te moukenn le pengro čilačo drom, oun djan ap o Debleskro drom, yaake kay lell o Devel lengri doosh lendar krik. Penenn kova i menshenge an o foro Yerusalem, oun palle an i vavar themma!" 
Luke24:48 T'mer dikan kova lauter, oun hounte penenn kova i menshenge doureder!" 
Luke24:49 Oun me bičrau t'menge koles, kolestar miro dad penas, te vell yob pash t'mende. Ačenn an o foro Yerusalem yaake rah, bis te lan i zoor dran o bolepen!”" 
Luke24:50 Oun yob djas pash o gab Betani peskre malentsa. Koy hadas lo peskre vasta oun penas: “O Devel ačell t'mentsa!” 
Luke24:51 Oun har yob yaake rakras, djas lo lendar oun vas pral an o bolepen hadedo." 
Luke24:52 Oun yon sharan les, oun djan barhteles pale an o foro Yerusalem." 
Luke24:53 Oun hako tsiro djan le an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun sharan o Debles." 
John1:1 Har o bolepen oun i phoub gar koy his, his o Lab koy. Kova, kay hi o Lab, his pash o Debleste. Oun yob his o Devel." 
John1:2 Yob his pash o Debleste, har o bolepen oun i phoub gar koy his." 
John1:3 Khetne leha kras o Devel o bolepen oun i phoub. Či hi koy, hoy gar leha kerdo vas." 
John1:4 An leste his o djipen. Oun ko djipen his i bari momeli i menshenge. 
John1:5 Koy momeli rhačella an i rat. Oun i rat nay kras koy momeli gar vin. 
John1:6 Koy vas i morsh, ko vas o Deblestar bičedo. Leskro lab his Yohanni." 
John1:7 Yob vas, te penell lo hakeneske, koon koy bari momeli hi, te patsenn halauter ap koy momeli." 
John1:8 Yob his gar koy momeli. Yob vas, te penell lo, koon koy momeli hi." 
John1:9 Koy čači momeli vas ap i phoub, te rhačell li hakeneske." 
John1:10 Kova, kay hi o Lab, his ap i phoub, oun i phoub vas leha kerdo. Oun i menshe ap i phoub prindjran les gar." 
John1:11 Yob vas an peskro them, oun leskre menshe lan les gar pre." 
John1:12 Halauter kolla, kay lan les pre oun ap leste patsan, kolen das yob i zoor, te venn yon o Debleskre čave." 
John1:13 Kova van le gar, har yon boldo van. O nevo djipen vas gar dran o menshengro kamlepen. Na-a, o nevo djipen lan le kokres o Deblestar." 
John1:14 Ko lab vas i mensho, oun djivas pash mende. Oun mer dikam leskro raylepen oun leskri zoor, kay o Devel peskro čaves das. Kova his pherdo lačepen oun čačepen." 
John1:15 O Yohanni rakras lestar, oun das gole: “Yob hi kova, kolestar penom: Kova, kay pal mande vella, hi pral mande. Yob his glan mande koy.”" 
John1:16 Mer halauter lam pale oun pale boud lačepen lestar, kay les yaake boud hi." 
John1:17 O Mose das men kol laba, kay penenna, har mer djivas. O Yezous Kristo anas menge o Debleskro lačepen oun čačepen." 
John1:18 Kek mensho dikas o Debles. O Debleskro čavo kokres sikras men, koon o Devel hi. Yob hi yek o Debleha." 
John1:19 Har bičran i pralstoune bibolde dran o foro Yerusalem i rashayen oun i Levitaryen pash o Yohanneste, te poučenn le lestar: “Koon hal tou?” penas yob glan i tsele menshende, kay kote tardo hi: “Čačepah, me hom gar o Kristo.”" 
John1:20  
John1:21 “Koon hal tou?” kaman yon te djinell. “Hal tou o Eliya?” poučan le lestar. “Na-a,” penas lo, “kova hom me gar!” “Hal tou o Debleskro rakepaskro, kolestar penlo vas, te vell yob? poučan le lestar.” “Na-a,” penas yob." 
John1:22 Yon penan ap leste: “Pen menge, koon tou hal, te penas mer kova kolenge, kay bičran men. Hoy peneh tou čačepah, koon tou hal?”" 
John1:23 Yob penas: “Me hom kova, kay dell gole an o moulo them: Lenn halauter krik, hoy o Debleske an o drom čiddo hi. Yaake penas kova o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, glan i rah tsiro.”" 
John1:24 Kolla, kay van pash o Yohanneste, his i Farisarendar bičedo." 
John1:25 Yon poučan lestar: “Te hal tou gar o Kristo, vitar gar o Eliya, oun vitar gar ko Debleskro rakepaskro, kolestar penlo vas, te vell yob, hoske taufreh tou i menshen?”" 
John1:26 Penas o Yohanni lenge: “Me taufrau len an o pani. Mashkral t'mende hi yek, koles prindjrenn t'mer gar." 
John1:27 Kova vell pal mande. Me hom gar mishto doha, te krap leskre kirrha pre.”" 
John1:28 Har o Yohanni kova rakras, his yob an o foro Betani ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan, kote, kay taufras lo i menshen." 
John1:29 Ap o vavar dives dikas o Yohanni, kay o Yezous pash leste vella. Oun o Yohanni penas: “Dikenn, kava hi o Debleskro bakro, kay lell i menshengri doosh ap peste." 
John1:30 Kava hi ko morsh, kay penom lestar: Pal mande vella i morsh, ko his pral mande. Yob his koy, har me gar koy homs." 
John1:31 Me djinom gar, koon kova hi. Me vom, te taufrap i menshen an Israel an o pani, te sikrap nay len, koon yob hi.”" 
John1:32 Oun o Yohanni penas: “Čačepah, me dikom o Debleskro Dourho har i parno čirklo, kay vas dran o bolepen pral tele, oun ačas ap leste." 
John1:33 Oun me prindjrom les gar. Kova, kay bičras man, te taufrap i menshen an o pani, kova penas ap mande: Tou dikeh, har vell o Debleskro Dourho ap i morsheste oun ačell ap leste. Kova hi ko morsh, kay dell i menshen o Debleskro Dourho." 
John1:34 Me dikom kova halauter. Doleske nay penau me ninna: Kava morsh hi o Debleskro čavo.” 
John1:35 O vavar dives his o Yohanni pale koy tardo. Douy leskre malendar his pash leste. 
John1:36 Oun har yob dikas, kay o Yezous koy djal, penas lo: “Dikenn, kava hi o Debleskro bakro!”" 
John1:37 Har kol douy kova shounan, djan le o Yezouseske palla." 
John1:38 Oun o Yezous rissras pes trouyel, oun dikas len. Oun yob poučas lendar: “Hoy rodenn t'mer?” Penan yon: “Sikepaskro, kay rhah oun soveh tou?”" 
John1:39 “Avenn oun dikenn!” penas yob. Koy djan kol douy leha, oun dikan, kay yob rhala oun sovella. His deshenge. Oun yon ačan ko dives pash leste." 
John1:40 Yek kol douyendar, kay shounan, hoy o Yohanni penas, oun o Yezouseha djan, his o Andreas. Leskro phraal his o Simon Petro." 
John1:41 Kova hatsas peskro phrales Simon, oun penas ap leste: “Mer hatsam ko baro rayes, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob.” Kova kharella ap grichtikes Kristo." 
John1:42 Oun o Andreas anas peskro phrales pash o Yezouseste. Har o Yezous koles dikas, penas lo: “Tou hal o Simon, ko Yohanneskro čavo. Tou khareh kanna Kefas.” Ko kharella baro bar." 
John1:43 O vavar dives kamas o Yezous an o them Galilea te djal. Ap o drom tapras lo o Filipo, oun penas ap leste: “Dja mantsa!”" 
John1:44 O Filipo his dran o foro Betsayda. Ninna o Andreas oun o Petro his dran ko foro. 
John1:45 O Filipo hatsas o Natanael oun penas ap leste: “Mer hatsam koles, pral koleste o Mose an peskre lila činas. Ninna o Debleskre rakepangre činan pral leste. Yob kharella Yezous oun hi dran o foro Nazaret. Leskro dad hi o Yosef.”" 
John1:46 Oun o Natanael penas ap leste: “Dran Nazaret nay vell či, hoy mishto hi.” “Am oun dik!” penas o Filipo." 
John1:47 Har o Yezous dikas, kay o Natanael vas, penas yob: “Dikenn, koy vell i čačo Israelitari. Oun kek rhorhepen hi an leste.”" 
John1:48 “Har nay djineh tou, koon me hom?” poučas o Natanael lestar. Penas o Yezous: “Har tou tel o faygetikro rouk hals, dikom me tout, glan ko tsiro, kay o Filipo das tout gole.”" 
John1:49 “Sikepaskro,” penas o Natanael, “tou hal o Debleskro čavo. Tou hal o baro ray pral Israel.”" 
John1:50 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Me penom touke: Me dikom tout tel ko rouk. Doleske patseh tou. Tou dikeh bareder koova, har kava." 
John1:51 Kova hi čačo, hoy me t'menge penau: T'mer dikenn har o bolepen pre djala. Oun o Debleskre bolepangre djan pral oun venn pale tele ap o Menshengro Čaveste.”" 
John2:1 Pal douy divessa kran le i biyab an o gab Kana an o them Galilea. O Yezouseskri day his koy. 
John2:2 Kol biyabengre mangan o Yezouses ninna ap ko biyab te vell peskre malentsa, oun yaake his lo lentsa ninna ap ko biyab." 
John2:3 Har len kek mool bouder his, penas o Yezouseskri day ap peskro čaveste: “Len hi bouder kek mool.”" 
John2:4 “Romniya,” penas o Yezous, “hoy me hounte krap, hi miro koova oun gar tiro koova. O tsiro hi mange kanna gar koy.”" 
John2:5 Leskri day penas ap i boudepangre: “Krenn kova, hoy yob t'menge penella!”" 
John2:6 An ko kheer his shob panyeskre khore dran bar. I bibolde hounte thovan pengre vasta kote, yaake har kova pash i bibolde hi. An hako khoro djas sheel-te-biish litarya dren." 
John2:7 O Yezous penas ap lende: “Čorenn pani an kol khore!” Oun yon kran len yaake pherdo, kay djas bouder či dren." 
John2:8 Oun yob penas pale ap lende: “Lenn dran kol khore oun anenn kova o rayeske pral o pipen!” Oun yon anan les pash leste. 
John2:9 O ray pral o pipen djinas gar, kay koy mool vas. I boudepangre kokres, kay čoran o pani an kol khore, djinan kova. Har yob koy mool piyas, hoy pani his, das lo o pirnes pash peste gole," 
John2:10 oun penas ap leste: “Hakeno dell i lači mool glan i vavar mool. Oun te hi le mato, dell lo len koy mool, kay gar yaake lačo hi. Tou rikral koy lači mool pale.”" 
John2:11 Kova his o ersto kopo, kay kras o Yezous i baro koova an o Debleskri zoor. Kova kras lo an o gab Kana an o them Galilea. Kote sikras yob peskro raylepen oun peskri zoor. Oun leskre mala patsan ap leste." 
John2:12 Pal kova djas lo peskri dah, peskre phralentsa oun peskre malentsa an o foro Kapernaum. Koy ačan le gar rah." 
John2:13 Glan kol biboldengre bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa, djas o Yezous an o foro Yerusalem." 
John2:14 Koy dikas yob an o Debleskro baro kheer i bikepangren, kay groumyen, bakren oun parne čirklen bikrenna. Oun kolla, kay parenn i love trouyel, his ninna koy." 
John2:15 Koy kras yob dran shelle i čoupni, oun tradas len lengre bakrentsa oun groumyentsa dran o Debleskro baro kheer vin. Oun kolenge, kay parenn i love trouyel, vitsras lo lengre love ap i phoub. Oun lengre stamya čivras lo trouyel." 
John2:16 Ap kolende, kay bikrenn parne čirklen, penas yob: “Hidjenn len vin oun krenn dran miro dadeskro kheer kek bikepaskro kheer!”" 
John2:17 Koy vas o Yezouseskre malenge an o shero, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: Miro kamlepen tiro khereske rhal man pre har i yag." 
John2:18 Kol pralstoune bibolde poučan lestar: “Havo baro koova kreh tou menge an o Debleskri zoor, te djinas mer, kay tout o čačepen hi, te kress kova?”" 
John2:19 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Phagenn kava Debleskro kheer tele! Me krau an triin divessa i nevo kheer.” 
John2:20 Penan yon: “An star-deesh-te-shob (46) bersha kran le o Debleskro baro kheer. Oun tou kameh kova te krell an triin divessa?” 
John2:21 Har rakras o Yezous pral o Debleskro kheer, rakras lo pral peste kokres." 
John2:22 Pal i tsiro, har o Yezous i moulendar pre stas, van leskre malenge kol laba pale an o shero, hoy o Yezous penas. Oun yon patsan, kay kova lauter čačo hi, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi, oun hoy o Yezous penas." 
John2:23 An kol bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa, patsan boud menshe an o foro Yerusalem ap o Yezouseste, har dikan le ko baro koova, hoy kras lo an o Debleskri zoor." 
John2:24 O Yezous das kek patsepen ap lende. Yob prindjras lauteren. 
John2:25 Yob djinas, har i menshe hi. Leske hounte penell kek, hoy an o mensheskro dji hi." 
John3:1 Koy his i Farisari. Leskro lab his Nikodemus. Yob his i pralstouno biboldo. 
John3:2 Kova vas an i rat pash o Yezouseste, oun penas: “Ray, mer djinah, kay tou hal i sikepaskro. O Devel bičras tout pash mende. Kek nay krell kova, hoy tou kreh an o Debleskri zoor. Ap kova dikah mer, kay hi o Devel touha.”" 
John3:3 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Čačepah, me penau touke: Kova, kay vell gar o Deblestar neves boldo, nay djivell gar leha khetne.”" 
John3:4 Poučas o Nikodemus lestar: “Har nay vell yek pale neves boldo, te hi lo phouro? Nay djal lo pale an peskro dakro per, oun vell o douyto kopo boldo?”" 
John3:5 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Čačepah, me penau touke: Te vell yek gar neves boldo dran o pani oun dran o Debleskro Dourho, nay djivell lo gar khetne o Debleha." 
John3:6 Koon i menshestar boldo vella, hi i mensheskro čavo. Koon dran o Debleskro Dourho boldo vella, hi i Debleskro čavo." 
John3:7 Kre kek bare yaka, te penau touke: T'mer hounte venn o Deblestar neves boldo!" 
John3:8 O zorelo dourho, hoy phourdell pral i phoub, djal, kay kamell lo. Tou shouneh les. Kay yob vella, oun kay yob djala, djineh tou gar. Yaake hi pash koleste, kay vella dran Debleskro Dourho boldo.”" 
John3:9 “Har djal kova nay?” poučas o Nikodemus. 
John3:10 O Yezous poučas lestar: “Tou hal i sikepaskro an o them Israel oun djineh kova gar? 
John3:11 Čačepah, me penau touke: Mer rakrah pral kova, hoy prindjrah. Hoy mer dikam, kova penah mer nay ninna. T'mer patsenn gar, hoy mer t'menge penah." 
John3:12 Te rakrau pral i phoubyakro koova, oun t'mer patsenn man gar, har nay patsenn t'mer man, te rakrau pral o Debleskro koova?" 
John3:13 Me, o Mensheskro Čavo kokres, nay penau, hoy an o bolepen hi. Me vom dran o bolepen." 
John3:14 Tou djineh, kay o Mose an o moulo them i sap ap i kasht pre bladas. Hakeno, koon dikas ap ko sap, ačas djido. Yaake hounte vell o Mensheskro Čavo ap o kasht bladedo," 
John3:15 te lell hakeno, kay patsell ap leste, ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John3:16 O Devel kamas i menshen yaake boud, te das lo lenge peskro yek čaves. Les his kek vavar. Hakeno, koon patsell ap leste, djal gar nashedo. Yob lell ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John3:17 O Devel bičras peskro čaves gar ap i phoub, te anell yob o Debleskri rholi pral i menshende. Yob vas, te lell lo len dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin." 
John3:18 Koon ap leste patsella, pral koleste vell kek phagi vi-rakedo. Koon gar ap leste patsella, pral koleste hi i phagi vi-rakedo doleske, kay patsas lo gar ap o Debleskro čaveste." 
John3:19 O Debleskri bari momeli vas ap kay phoub. Oun kol menshe, kay krenn o čilačepen, kaman o tamlepen boudeder har koy momeli. Doleske hi i phagi pral lende vi-rakedo." 
John3:20 Kolla, kay o čilačo koova krenna, kamenna gar koy momeli. Yon ačenn penge an o tamlepen, yaake kay dikenn i vavar gar, havo čilačo koova yon krenna." 
John3:21 Koon o čačepen krella, kova vell pash i momeli. Ap koleste dikenn le, kay yob djivella, har o Devel kamella.”" 
John3:22 Pal kova djas o Yezous peskre malentsa an ko them Youdea, oun ačas i tsiro kote, oun taufras i menshen." 
John3:23 Ninna o Yohanni taufras i menshen pash o gab Ainon, hoy his pash o foro Salim čiddo. Koy his boud pani. I menshe van pash leste, oun moukan pen lestar te taufrell." 
John3:24 Ap ko tsiro his o Yohanni gar stildo. 
John3:25 Yek dives čingras i biboldo kolentsa, kay djan o Yohanneske palla, pral kova, har kolla, kay pal o biboldengro čačepen pale-čiddo hi, nay venn pale erligo." 
John3:26 Oun yon djan pash o Yohanneste, oun penan leske: “Sikepaskro, ko morsh, kay his pash toute ap o vavar panyeskri rig, pral koleste rakral, oun boud menshe shounan kova, kova hi kate, oun taufrell i menshen. Oun hakeno djal pash leste.”" 
John3:27 Koy penas o Yohanni ap lende: “Kek nay lell čomone, te das les o Devel kova gar." 
John3:28 T'mer halauter shounan, kay penom, kay hom me gar ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. O Devel bičras man glan koleste." 
John3:29 Koles, kay i pirni hi, ko hi ninna o pirno. Oun o maal ko pirnestar, kay pashel tardo hi, oun shounell o pirneskro gole, hi barhtelo pral kova. Kay barht hi man kanna." 
John3:30 Me hounte vap tikno oun tikneder. Oun yob hounte vell baro oun bareder. 
John3:31 Kova, kay vas o Deblestar, hi o ray pral lauter. Kova, kay vell i phoubyatar, rakrell pral kova, hoy ap i phoub djala. Kova, kay vas dran o bolepen, hi o ray pral halauter," 
John3:32 oun rakrell nay pral kova, hoy yob dikas oun shounas. Kek patsell leske." 
John3:33 Koon patsell ap leste, kova sikrell yaake, kay halauter čačo hi, hoy o Devel penella." 
John3:34 Koles, kay o Devel pash mende bičras, kova rakrell o Debleskre laba. O Devel dell an leste peskro tselo Debleskro Dourho, oun rikrell či pale." 
John3:35 O dad kamell o čaves, oun das halauter an leskro vast." 
John3:36 Koon ap o čaveste patsella, koles hi ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Koon ap o čaveste gar patsella, koles vell ko čačo djipen gar. O Debleskri rholi ačell pral leste.”" 
John4:1 I Farisarya shounan, kay boud menshe djan o Yezouseske palla. Yon shounan ninna, kay yob taufras boudeder menshe har o Yohanni." 
John4:2 His gar o Yezous, kay taufras len. Kova kran leskre mala." 
John4:3 Har o Yezous shounas, hoy pral leste rakedo vas, djas lo dran o them Youdea vin, oun kamas pale an o them Galilea te djal." 
John4:4 Yob hounte djas pral ko them Samaria, te vell lo an o them Galilea." 
John4:5 Yaake vas lo pash ko foro Sychar an o them Samaria. Ko foro his pash ko kotar phoub čiddo, hoy o Yakob peskro čaveste Yosef das." 
John4:6 Koy his o Yakobeskro pani. O Yezous vas khino ap ko dour drom oun beshas pes pash ko pani. His deesh-te-douyenge. 
John4:7 Koy vas i djouvel pash ko pani, te lell li pani. Koya his i Samaritetsa. O Yezous penas ap late: “De man te piyell!”" 
John4:8 Leskre mala his gar koy. Yon his an o foro, te ginenn le čomone te rhal." 
John4:9 Koy djouvel penas ap leste: “Tou hal i biboldo. Me hom i Samaritetsa. Har nay mangeh tou mandar pani, te dap tout te piyell? I bibolde rhan gar khetne i Samaritentsa.”" 
John4:10 Penas o Yezous ap late: “Te djinals tou, hoy o Devel kamell tout te dell, oun koon toutar ko pani mangella, mangals tou mandar, te dap tout o pani. Oun me doms tout o pani, hoy dell o djipen.”" 
John4:11 “Romeha,” penas koy djouvel, “tout hi či, kay leh ko pani nay vin. Oun ko pani hi tel an i phoub. Kay kameh tou ko pani, hoy dell o djipen, te lell?" 
John4:12 Hal tou bareder har o Yakob, maro kouč dad, kova, kay hadas i phoub kate vin, te vell kava pani vin. Yob oun peskre čave oun firhe piyan dran kava pani.”" 
John4:13 Penas o Yezous: “Hakeno, kay piyell kava pani, lell pale troush." 
John4:14 Koon ko pani piyella, hoy me les dau, kova lell an peskro tselo djipen bouder kek troush. Ko pani, hoy me les dau, vell an leste i djido pani, hoy dell les o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella.”" 
John4:15 “Romeha, de man ko pani!” penas koy djouvel, “te vell man bouder kek troush, te vap bouder gar kay, te lap kava pani.”" 
John4:16 “Dja khere!” penas o Yezous, “de tiro romes gole, oun am leha pale kay!”" 
John4:17 “Man hi kek rom,” penas koy djouvel. Penas o Yezous ap late: “Tiro hi čačo, te peneh tou: Man hi kek rom." 
John4:18 Panč romma his tout. Oun kova, kay tout kanna hi, kova hi gar tiro rom. Koy penal tou o čačepen.”" 
John4:19 Penas koy djouvel: “Romeha, me dikau, tou hal i Debleskro rakepaskro." 
John4:20 Mare phoure mangan o Debles ap kay berga an. T'mer bibolde penenn menge: Halauter hounte mangenn o Debles an o foro Yerusalem an!” 
John4:21 Penas o Yezous: “Romniya, pats man, ko tsiro vella, kay mangenn t'mer o Debles gar ap kay berga an, vitar gar an o foro Yerusalem." 
John4:22 T'mer djinenn gar, kones t'mer an-mangenna. Mer djinah, kones mer an-mangah. I biboldendar vella kova, kay lell i menshen dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin." 
John4:23 Ko tsiro vella, oun hi kanna kay, koy della menshe, kay mangenn o dades an o čačepen an. Kal menshen hounte vell o Debleskro Dourho. O dad rodell kolen, kay mangenn les yaake an." 
John4:24 O Devel hi kek mensho, – yob hi i dourho. Oun kolla, kay mangenn les an, kolen hounte vell o Debleskro Dourho. Kova sikrell len, har te mangenn le les čačepah an.”" 
John4:25 Penas i djouvel: “Me djinau, kay vell ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, kay kharell ninna o Kristo. Te vell yob pash mende, penell lo menge halauter.”" 
John4:26 Penas o Yezous: “Me hom kova. Tou rakreh leha.” 
John4:27 Koy van leskre mala pale dran o foro. Har yon dikan, kay yob i djouvyah rakras, kran le bare yaka. Kek poučas lestar: Hoy kameh tou latar? Oun kek poučas lestar vitar gar: Hoske rakreh tou lah?" 
John4:28 Kanna moukas koy djouvel ko panyeskro khoro tardo oun djas pale an ko foro oun penas i menshenge: 
John4:29 “Avenn oun dikenn! Me taprom i morshes, kova djinas halauter pral mande. Nay hi yob ko Kristo?”" 
John4:30 Koy djan kol menshe dran o foro pash o Yezouseste, te dikenn le les." 
John4:31 Har i djouvel an o foro his, penan leskre mala ap leste: “Sikepaskro, rha čomone!”" 
John4:32 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Man hi i rhapen, kova prindjrenn t'mer gar.”" 
John4:33 Koy poučan leskre mala mashkral pende: “Anas leske yek čomone rhapaske?” 
John4:34 Penas o Yezous lenge: “Me djivau kolestar, te krap, hoy o Devel mandar kamella. Oun leskri boudi krau yaake rah, har yob kamella. Doleske bičras man lo ap i phoub." 
John4:35 T'mer penenna: An star čon anenn le o djob dren. Krenn t'mare yaka pre, oun dikenn t'men trouyel: O tsiro hi kanna kay. Kanna vell o djob dren anlo." 
John4:36 Kanna anenn i boudepangre kolen khetne, kay lenn o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun lengri boudi vell playsedo. Yaake hi hake douy barhtelo: Kova, kay o tikno djob an i phoub vitsras, oun kova, kay anell o djob dren." 
John4:37 Ko lab hi čačo: Yek vitsrell o tikno djob an i phoub. Oun i vavar anell ko djob dren. 
John4:38 Me bičrom t'men, te anenn t'mer kote o djob dren, kay i vavar maran pen tele, te vitsran le ko tikno djob an i phoub. Oun t'mer nay anenn kanna o djob dren.”" 
John4:39 Boud kol menshendar dran o foro Sychar patsan ap o Yezouseste doleske, kay koy djouvel lenge penas: “Halauter, hoy me krom, penas yob mange.”" 
John4:40 Har i Samaritarya pash o Yezouseste van, mangan le les, te ačell lo i tsiro pash lende. Oun yob ačas douy divessa pash lende." 
John4:41 Yaake shounan boud menshe, hoy yob penas, oun patsan ap leste." 
John4:42 Yon penan koy djouvyake: “Kanna patsah mer ap leste, oun gar kokres, hoy tou menge lestar penal. Mer shounam les, oun djinah kanna, kay yob kova hi, kay lell i menshen dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin.”" 
John4:43 Pal kol douy divessa djas o Yezous doureder oun vas an o them Galilea. 
John4:44 Yob penas yek kopo: I Debleskro rakepaskro vell gar sharedo kote, kay yob khere hi." 
John4:45 Har yob an o them Galilea vas, lan kol menshe les kamles pre. Ap ko tsiro, har o Yezous an o foro Yerusalem his, his yon ninna kote oun dikan lauter, hoy yob kras an kol divessa, kay Passa kharenna. Doleske lan le les kanna kamles pash pende pre." 
John4:46 Oun o Yezous vas pale an ko gab Kana. Kova his o gab an o them Galilea, kay kras lo i mool dran o pani. An o foro Kapernaum djivas i pralstouno, kay boudras o baro rayeske pral ko them. Koleskro čavo his nasselo." 
John4:47 Har yob shounas, kay o Yezous pale dran o them Youdea an o them Galilea vas, djas yob pash leste, oun mangas lestar: “Am tele an o foro Kapernaum! Oun kre miro čaves sasto, kay ap o merepen čiddo hi!”" 
John4:48 O Yezous penas ap leste: “Te dikenn t'mer gar boud Debleskro koova, kay kek mensho nay krella, patsenn t'mer gar.”" 
John4:49 Ko pralstouno penas pale ap leste: “Miro ray, am tele! Miro čavo merella.”" 
John4:50 “Dja khere,” penas o Yezous, “tiro čavo djivella!” Ko morsh patsas kova, hoy o Yezous leske penas oun djas khere." 
John4:51 Yob his gomme gar khere, koy van leskre boudepangre pash leste, oun penan: “Tiro čavo djivella oun hi sasto.”" 
John4:52 Koy poučas yob lendar pal ko tsiro, kay o čaveha feteder vas. Koy penan le: “Taysar, har eftenge his, djas o nasslepen lestar.”" 
John4:53 Kanna djinas ko dad, kay kova ko tsiro his, kay o Yezous ap leste penas: “Tiro čavo djivella.” Oun yob patsas peskre tsele menshentsa ap o Yezouseste." 
John4:54 Kava douyto baro koova kras o Yezous an o Debleskri zoor, har yob dran o them Youdea an o them Galilea vas." 
John5:1 Pal kova his i baro Debleskro dives i biboldenge. Oun o Yezous djas an o foro Yerusalem. 
John5:2 An o foro Yerusalem his i pani pash ko foreskro voudar, kay kharella bakrengro voudar. Ko pani kharella ap hebretikes Betesda. Kote his i thopaskro kheer, kay panč bare iseme dren his, kay pre his." 
John5:3 Kote his boud nassele čiddo: Save, kay nay dikan gar, oun save, kay nay nashan gar, oun bange." 
John5:4  
John5:5 Mashkral kolende his i morsh, kay his triyanda-te-orhta (38) bersha nasselo." 
John5:6 O Yezous dikas les koy čiddo, oun djinas, kay his yob i rah tsiro nasselo. “Kameh tou sasto te vell?” poučas lo lestar." 
John5:7 “Ray,” penas ko nasselo, “man hi kek, kay anell man an kava pani, te vell djipen dren oun djal pre oun tele. Oun te kamau me an ko pani dren te djal, hi i vavar sikeder glan mande an o pani.”" 
John5:8 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Ste pre! Le tiro čiben oun dja!” 
John5:9 Har o Yezous kova penas, vas ko morsh sasto, las peskro čiben oun djas trouyel. Ko dives his i Debleskro dives." 
John5:10 Dran kova penan kol pralstoune bibolde ap koleste, kay sasto vas: “Kava dives hi o Debleskro dives. Kava dives hidjress tou tiro čiben gar!”" 
John5:11 Penas yob ap lende: “Kova, kay kras man sasto, penas ap mande: Le tiro čiben oun dja!”" 
John5:12 “Oun koon hi ko morsh,” poučan yon, “kay penas ap toute: Le tiro čiben oun dja?”" 
John5:13 Kova, kay sasto vas, djinas les gar. O Yezous moukas ko thopaskro kheer, har dikas lo kol boud menshen koy." 
John5:14 Pal i tsiro tapras o Yezous ko morshes pale an o Debleskro baro kheer. “Tou hal kanna sasto,” penas lo ap leste, “kre kek čilačo koova bouder, te vell gar boudeder ap toute har ko nasslepen!”" 
John5:15 Koy djas ko morsh pash kol pralstoune biboldende oun penas: “Kova his o Yezous, kay kras man sasto.”" 
John5:16 Pal kova lan i bibolde o Yezouses palla. Yon his rhoyedo, te kras yob i nasseles ap o Debleskro dives sasto." 
John5:17 O Yezous penas lenge: “Miro dad boudrell o tselo tsiro. Yaake krau me kova ninna.” 
John5:18 Doleske kaman kol bibolde gomme boudeder, te marenn le les. O Yezous kras gar kokres i nasseles ap o Debleskro dives sasto. Yob penas ninna, kay o Devel leskro dad hi, oun kras pes yaake har o Devel." 
John5:19 O Yezous penas ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: O čavo nay krell či pestar. Yob dikell, hoy o dad krella. Oun kova, hoy krell o dad, kova krell ninna o čavo." 
John5:20 O dad kamell o čaves oun sikrell leste halauter, hoy yob krella. Ninna vavar bareder koova sikrell lo leste, yaake kay krenn t'mer bare yaka." 
John5:21 Har o dad i moulen pre djangrella, oun dell len o nevo djipen, yaake nay dell ninna o čavo o nevo djipen, kones yob kamella." 
John5:22 O dad rakrell pral kekeste i phagi vin. Kova das lo an peskro čaveskro vast, te vell leskro čavo o čačepaskro ray pral lauterende," 
John5:23 te sharenn le halauter o čaves, yaake har sharenn le o dades. Koon o čaves gar sharella, kova sharella vitar gar o dades, kay bičras o čaves." 
John5:24 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon miro lab shounella, oun patsell ap koleste, kay man bičras, koles hi ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Pral leste vell kek phagi vi-rakedo. Yob moukas ko merepen pal peste, oun djas an o djipen." 
John5:25 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Ko tsiro vella oun hi kanna kay, kay i moule shounenn i gole o Debleskro čavestar. Oun kolla, kay shounenn, kay dell yob gole, kolla djivenna." 
John5:26 An o dadeste hi o djipen. Kova das lo ninna peskro čaveste, te vell an leste ko djipen." 
John5:27 Yob hi o Mensheskro Čavo. Oun o Devel das an leskro vast, te rakrell lo i phagi vin pral i menshende." 
John5:28 Ma krenn bare yaka, te penau t'menge: Ko tsiro vella, kay i tsele moule shounenna, te kharell lo len." 
John5:29 Oun yon venn dran i moulengre khera vin. Kolla, kay lačo koova kran, venn djides kerdo, te lenn le ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun kolla, kay čilačo koova kran, venn djido kerdo, te lenn le i phagi." 
John5:30 Mandar nay krau me či. Me rakrau o čačepen vin, yaake har o Devel mange penella. Kova, hoy rakrau pral i mensheste vin, hi čačo. Me krau gar, hoy me kamau. Me krau halauter, hoy kova kamella, kay bičras man.”" 
John5:31 “Me te penoms kokres pral mande vin, vals kova či moldo." 
John5:32 Man hi yek, kay penell t'menge, koon me hom. Kova, hoy yob penell pral mande, kova hi čačo." 
John5:33 T'mer bičran morshen pash o Yohanneste, te shounenn lestar pral mande. Oun yob penas pral mande o čačepen." 
John5:34 Man hounte vell kek mensho, kay penell pral mande vin. Hi t'menge, kay rakrom pral kova, hoy o Yohanni pral mande penas, te patsenn t'mer oun venn dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin lino." 
John5:35 O Yohanni his i momeli, kay rhačas. Oun i tikno tsiro hans t'mer barhtelo pral kova, hoy yob penas oun kras." 
John5:36 Man hi čomone, hoy penell t'menge feteder o čačepen pral mande vin har o Yohanni. Kova hi ko koova, hoy krau, kolestar o dad mange penas, te krap kova. Kova sikrella, kay o dad bičras man." 
John5:37 Ninna miro dad, kay bičras man, penas t'menge, koon me hom. T'mer shounan les gar, vitar gar dikan les t'mer." 
John5:38 T'mer patsenn gar an t'mare djia, hoy yob penas. Doleske patsenn t'mer gar, kay me kova hom, kones o Devel bičras." 
John5:39 T'mer rodenn o djipen an o Debleskro lab oun patsenn, kay hatsenn kote ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun čačepah, o Debleskro lab rakrell mandar." 
John5:40 Pash mande kamenn t'mer gar te vell, te lenn ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John5:41 Hi mange či moldo, te vap sharedo i menshendar." 
John5:42 Me prindjrau t'men oun djinau, kay hi gar o Debleskro kamlepen an t'mende." 
John5:43 Miro dad bičras man pash t'mende. T'mer lan man gar pre. Te vell i vavar, koles kek bičras, koles lenn t'mer pre." 
John5:44 Har nay patsenn t'mer mange? T'mer rodenna, te vell yek i vavarestar sharedo. Te venn t'mer o Deblestar sharedo, kova hi t'menge či moldo." 
John5:45 Ma patsenn, kay me phoukrau ap t'mende pash miro dadeste. Koy hi i vavar, kay phoukrell ap t'mende: O Mose, kolestar patsenn t'mer, kay hi lo ap t'mari rig." 
John5:46 T'mer te patsenn čačepah, hoy o Mose t'menge penas, patsans t'mer ninna ap mande. Yob činas pral mande." 
John5:47 T'mer te patsenn gar, hoy o Mose činas an peskre lila, har nay patsenn t'mer, hoy me t'menge penau?”" 
John6:1 Pal i tsiro djas o Yezous ap i vavar rig o baro panyestar Galilea. Ko pani kharella ninna Tiberias. 
John6:2 Boud boud menshe djan leske palla. Yon dikan, havo baro koova yob an o Debleskri zoor kras ap i nasslende." 
John6:3 Khetne peskre malentsa djas o Yezous ap i berga, oun beshas pes lentsa tele." 
John6:4 His i tikno tsiro glan i biboldengre bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa." 
John6:5 Har o Yezous dikas, kay boud boud menshe leske palla djan, poučas lo o Filipestar: “Kay nay ginah mer yaake boud mare, te vell i tsele menshen rhapaske?”" 
John6:6 Yob kamas te dikell, har leskro patsepen hi. Doleske poučas yob lestar kova. O Yezous djinas kokres, hoy yob kamas te krell." 
John6:7 O Filipo penas: “Ninna te vals men douy-sheel roupene beme, vals kova gar doha, te lell hakeno i tikno kotar maro.”" 
John6:8 Yek leskre malendar, o Andreas, ko phraal o Simon Petrestar, penas ap o Yezouseste:" 
John6:9 “Kate hi i čavo. Koles hi panč mare oun douy mače. Kova hi či yaake boud menshenge.” 
John6:10 O Yezous penas: “Penenn i menshenge, te beshenn pen le!” Koy his boud zenlepen. Oun yon beshan pen koy. Kolla his nay yaake panč zerya (5.000) morsha." 
John6:11 Oun o Yezous las kol mare, parkras pes pash o Debleste oun das len i menshende. Kova kras lo ninna kol mačentsa. Oun hakeno las yaake boud, har yob kamas." 
John6:12 Har yon halauter čalo his, penas yob ap peskre malende: “Čivenn i tsele kotya khetne, hoy pral ačan, te djal kova gar nashedo!”" 
John6:13 Koy čivan leskre mala halauter khetne, hoy pral ačas kol marendar. Koy van deesh-te-douy marengre gone pherdo kol panč marendar." 
John6:14 Har kol menshe dikan, hoy o Yezous kras an o Debleskri zoor, penan le: “Kova hi čačepah ko Debleskro rakepaskro, kolestar penlo vas, kay vell lo ap kay phoub.”" 
John6:15 O Yezous hayvas, kay kaman yon les te taprell, te krenn le les lengro baro ray. Doleske djas yob doureder pral ap koy berga, te vell lo peske kokres." 
John6:16 Har i rat vas, djan leskre mala tele pash o pani," 
John6:17 djan an i bero, oun ouleran vergel o pani, te venn le an o foro Kapernaum. His rati, oun o Yezous his gar pash lende." 
John6:18 Koy phourdas i baro zorelo dourho pral o pani. Oun o pani vas divyo. 
John6:19 Har leskre mala panč, shob kilometarya vin ap o baro pani his, dikan le o Yezouses: Yob djas ap o pani, oun vas pash o bero. Oun yon lan traash." 
John6:20 Yob penas: “Me hom! Ma darenn!” 
John6:21 Koy kaman yon les an o bero te lell. Ap yek kopo his le ap i vavar panyeskri rig, kote, kay yon kaman te djal." 
John6:22 O vavar dives poučan pendar kol menshe, kay ačan ap i vavar panyeskri rig, kay o Yezous hi. Yon dikan, kay taysar yek bero čiddo his pash o pani, oun kay leskre mala djan penge. Yon djinan, o Yezous his gar pash lende." 
John6:23 Koy van vavar bere dran o foro Tiberias, oun čivan pen kote, kay rhans le ko maro, koleske o Yezous parkras pes pash o Debleste." 
John6:24 Har kol menshe hayvan, kay o Yezous bouder gar koy hi, vitar gar leskre mala, beshan pen yon an kol bere, ouleran vergel o baro pani, oun van an o foro Kapernaum, te rodenn les le." 
John6:25 Kote hatsan le les, oun poučan lestar: “Sikepaskro, kaana val tou kate?”" 
John6:26 Penas o Yezous: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: T'mer rodan man gar doleske, kay dikan i baro koova, hoy krom an o Debleskri zoor. T'mer rhan ko maro, oun van čalo. Doleske rodenn t'mer man." 
John6:27 Ma djivenn o rhapaske, hoy paash djala! Djivenn yaake, te lenn ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella! O Mensheskro Čavo kokres nay dell t'men kova. Yaake sikras o Devel, kay kova leskro čavo hi.”" 
John6:28 Koy poučan yon lestar: “Hoy hounte kras mer? Hoy kamell o Devel mendar?” 
John6:29 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “O Devel kamella, te patsenn ap koleste, kay yob bičras.”" 
John6:30 Penan yon: “Kre menge i baro koova an o Debleskri zoor, te patsas mer ap toute! Sike men, hoy tou hayveh!" 
John6:31 De men hako dives maro te rhal, yaake har mare phoure menshe rhan o Debleskro maro an o moulo them! Kova hi činlo an o Debleskro lab: Yob das len maro dran o bolepen rhapaske.”" 
John6:32 Penas o Yezous: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Hi gar o Mose, kay das t'men o maro dran o bolepen. Kova hi miro dad, kay dell t'men ko čačo maro dran o bolepen." 
John6:33 O Debleskro maro hi kova, kay vas dran o bolepen, oun dell i menshen o djipen.”" 
John6:34 “Ray,” penan yon, “de men ko maro hako tsiro!”" 
John6:35 O Yezous penas lenge: “Me hom ko maro, kay della ko djipen. Koon pash mande vella, koles vell bouder kek bok. Oun koon ap mande patsella, koles vell bouder kek troush." 
John6:36 Hi yaake har me t'menge penom: T'mer dikan man, oun kamenn gar ap mande te patsell." 
John6:37 Halauter kolla, kay dell man o dad, venn pash mande. Oun halauter kolla, kay venn pash mande, kolen vitsrau me gar vin." 
John6:38 Me vom gar dran o bolepen te krap kova, hoy me kamau. Me vom te krap, hoy kova kamella, kay bičras man." 
John6:39 Oun o Devel kamella, te nashrap me kekes kolendar, kay yob man das. Yob kamella, te krap len i moulendar djido ap o palstouno dives." 
John6:40 Kova kamell miro dad: Hakeno, koon o čaves dikella, oun ap leste patsella, lell o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun me krau les i moulendar djido ap o palstouno dives.”" 
John6:41 I bibolde his rhoyemen pral kova, kay yob penas: Me hom ko maro, hoy dran o bolepen tele vas."
