John6:42 “Hi kova gar o Yezous, ko Yosefeskro čavo?” penan yon. “Mer prindjrah leskro dades oun leskri da. Har nay penell lo: Me vom dran o bolepen?”" 
John6:43 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Ma rhoyrenn t'men pral kova, hoy me t'menge penom!" 
John6:44 Kek nay vell pestar pash mande. O dad, kay bičras man, hounte anell les pash mande. Oun koon pash mande vella, koles krau me i moulendar djido ap o palstouno dives." 
John6:45 An o Debleskro lab činan kol Debleskre rakepangre: O Devel hi o sikepaskro halauterenge. Hakeno, koon ap o dadeste shounella oun krell, hoy yob kamella, vell pash mande." 
John6:46 Kek dikas o dades. Kova kokres, kay vas o Deblestar, dikas les." 
John6:47 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon ap mande patsella, koles hi o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John6:48 Me hom ko maro, hoy dell t'men ko djipen." 
John6:49 T'mare phoure rhan ko maro, hoy o Devel len das an o moulo them, oun yon meran." 
John6:50 Me hom ko čačo maro, hoy dran o bolepen vella. Koon kova rhala, kova merell gar." 
John6:51 Me hom ko maro, hoy dell o djipen, oun hoy vas dran o bolepen. Hakeno, koon rhala kava maro, lell o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun ko maro hi miro mass. Me dau les i menshenge, te lenn le ko djipen.”" 
John6:52 Kanna čingran pen kol bibolde, oun penan: “Har nay dell men ko morsh peskro mass te rhal?”" 
John6:53 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Te rhan t'mer gar o Menshengro Čaveskro mass, oun piyenn gar leskro rat, hi t'men gar o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John6:54 Koon rhala miro mass, oun piyell miro rat, lell o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun me krau les i moulendar djido ap o palstouno dives." 
John6:55 Miro mass hi o čačo rhapen, oun miro rat o čačo pipen." 
John6:56 Koon rhala miro mass, oun piyell miro rat, kova ačella an mande, oun me ačau an leste." 
John6:57 Yaake har o dad, kay bičras man, hi djido, oun das man o djipen, yaake dau me o djipen kolende, kay rhan miro mass." 
John6:58 Kava hi ko maro, hoy vas dran o bolepen. Koon kava maro rhala, lell o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Kava hi i vavar maro har kova, hoy t'mare phoure rhan.”" 
John6:59 Kova penas yob an i biboldengri kangri, har yob an ko foro Kapernaum lenge o Debleskro lab penas." 
John6:60 Har kolla, kay leha djan, kova shounan, penan boud lendar: “Kova hi kek shoukar koova, hoy yob koy penella. Koon shounell kova nay?”" 
John6:61 Har o Yezous lendar hayvas, kay yon pen pral leste rhoyrenna, penas lo ap lende: “Rhoyrell t'men kova?" 
John6:62 Hoy krans t'mer, te dikans t'mer, te djal o Mensheskro Čavo pale an o bolepen?" 
John6:63 O Debleskro Dourho hi kova, kay dell o djipen. O mensheskri zoor nay krell kova gar. Mire laba, hoy me t'menge penom, van dran o Debleskro Dourho. Doleske anenn le t'menge ko djipen." 
John6:64 Mashkral t'mende hi menshe, kay patsenn gar.” O Yezous djinas, koon kolla his, kay patsenn gar. Ninna djinas lo, koon ap leste phoukrella." 
John6:65 Oun yob penas doureder: “Doleske penom me t'menge, kay kek nay vell pestar pash mande. O dad kokres nay anell les pash mande.”" 
John6:66 Ap ko tsiro tserdan pen boud kolendar pale, kay leske palla djan, oun djan bouder gar leha." 
John6:67 Koy poučas o Yezous kol deesh-te-douyendar: “Kamenn t'mer man ninna te moukell?” 
John6:68 “Ray, pash koneste djas mer?” penas o Simon Petro. “Tout hi laba, kay denn men o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John6:69 Mer patsah oun djinah, tou veh o Deblestar. O Devel bičras tout.”" 
John6:70 O Yezous penas lenge: “Me rodom t'men deesh-te-douyen vin. Oun an yekeste t'mendar hi o beng.” 
John6:71 Yob rakras o Youdasestar, leskro dad hi o Simon Iskariot. O Youdas his yek kol deesh-te-douyendar, kova kay phoukrella ap leste." 
John7:1 Pal kova djas o Yezous an o them Galilea trouyel. Yob kamas gar an o them Youdea te djal. I pralstoune bibolde kote kaman les te marell. 
John7:2 I tikno tsiro glan kol biboldengre bare divessa, hoy kharenna Soukot, penan leskre phrala ap leste: “Ma ač an o them Galilea! Dja an o them Youdea, te dikenn ninna tire mala, havo baro koova tou kreh!" 
John7:3  
John7:4 Kek mensho khatrell pes, te kamell lo i menshen te sikrell, hoy yob nay krella. Te kreh tou savo baro koova, palle mouk kova i tsele menshen te dikell!”" 
John7:5 Leskre phrala patsan gar ap leste. Doleske rakran yon yaake. 
John7:6 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “O tsiro hi mange kanna gar kay, te djap kote. T'mer nay djan hako tsiro koy." 
John7:7 I menshe hi gar čilačo ap t'mende. Ap mande hi le čilačo. Me penom lenge, kay kova, hoy yon krenna, čilačo hi." 
John7:8 Djan t'mer ap o festo! Me djau gar peha. O tsiro hi mange kanna gar kay.” 
John7:9 Kova penas yob, oun ačas an o them Galilea." 
John7:10 Har leskre phrala ap o festo his, djas yob ninna čorrhanes koy." 
John7:11 Koy rodan les kol pralstoune bibolde mashkral kolende, kay van ap o festo, oun poučan hakenestar: “Kay hi ko morsh?”" 
John7:12 Ninna kol boud menshe, kay van koy, rakran pral leste. His menshe mashkral lende, kay penan: “Yob hi i lačo morsh.” Vavar penan: “Na-a, yob rhorhella i menshen.”" 
John7:13 I daryatar i pralstoune biboldendar rakran le halauter čorrhanes pral leste. 
John7:14 Har ko festo paash trouyel his, djas o Yezous an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
John7:15 Koy kran i pralstoune bibolde bare yaka, oun penan: “Har nay djinell yob yaake boud? Kek anas leske kova pashel.”" 
John7:16 Penas o Yezous lenge: “Hoy me t'menge penau vell gar mandar. Kova vell kolestar, kay bičras man." 
John7:17 Koon kova krella, hoy o Devel kamella, kova hayvella, kay mire laba o Deblestar venna, oun gar mandar." 
John7:18 Koon pral peste mishto rakrella, kova kamella, te vell yob sharedo. Koon kamella, te vell kova sharedo, kay bičras les, kova hi čačo. Oun an leste hi kek čilačepen." 
John7:19 O Mose das t'men i lila, kay činlo hi, har t'mer hounte djivenna. Kek t'mendar djivell yaake. Hoske kamenn t'mer man te marell?”" 
John7:20 “An toute hi i beng ”, penan kol tsele menshe. “Koon kamell tout te marell?”" 
John7:21 Penas o Yezous: “Yek baro koova krom me pash t'mende an o foro Yerusalem. Oun t'mer han rhoyedo pral kova. 
John7:22 Te hi t'mare morsh čave orhta divessa phouro, činenn t'mer len ap o mass, ninna ap o Debleskro Dives. O Mose penas t'menge, te krenn kova. Oun o Mose his gar kokres, kay penas t'menge kova. Ninna t'mare phoure, kay djivan glan leste, penan kova oun rikran pen koy pre." 
John7:23 T'mer činenn t'mare čaven ap o mass ap o Debleskro dives, te vell rikedo, hoy o Mose činas an peskre lila. Hoske han t'mer yaake rhoyedo ap mande, kay krom i tselo menshes sasto ap o Debleskro dives?" 
John7:24 T'mer te penenn, kay i mensho i doosh ap peste anas, palle djan pal o čačepen oun gar pal kova, hoy dikenn t'mare yakentsa!”" 
John7:25 Koy penan kolla, kay hi dran o foro Yerusalem: “Hi kova gar ko morsh, kay kaman le les te marell?" 
John7:26 Kanna rakrell lo glan hakeneste. Oun kek dell les trad. Dikan mare pralstoune kanna dren, kay yob ko baro ray hi, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob?" 
John7:27 Mer djinah, dran havo foro ko morsh vella. Te vell ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, djinell kek dran havo foro yob vella.”" 
John7:28 O Yezous, kay an o Debleskro baro kheer i menshenge o Debleskro lab penas, shounas kova, oun das gole: “Har nay prindjrenn t'mer man, oun djinenna, kay vom? Me vom gar mandar kokres! Čačepah, koles, kay bičras man, prindjrenn t'mer gar!" 
John7:29 Me prindjrau les! Me vom lestar! Oun yob bičras man!” 
John7:30 Koy kaman yon les te taprell. Oun kek nay hadas o vast ap leste. O tsiro his leske kanna gar koy, kay vell yob tapedo." 
John7:31 Boud kol menshendar patsan ap leste oun penan: “Te vell o baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, nay krell kova bareder koova, har kava morsh Yezous?”" 
John7:32 I Farisarya shounan, hoy kol menshe pral o Yezouseste rakran. Oun i Farisarya oun i bare rashaya bičran klisten, te taprenn le o Yezouses." 
John7:33 Koy penas o Yezous: “Me hom bouder gar rah pash t'mende. Me djau pash koleste, kay bičras man." 
John7:34 T'mer rodenn man, oun hatsenn man gar. Kote, kay me palle hom, nay venn t'mer gar.”" 
John7:35 “Kay kamell yob te djal, kay hatsah mer les gar?” poučas yek i vavarestar. “Kamell yob pash kol biboldende te djal, kay djivenn an o grichtikro them, te penell lo kote i menshenge o Debleskro lab?" 
John7:36 Har hayvas mer leskro rakepen: T'mer rodenn man, oun hatsenn man gar oun kote, kay me palle hom, koy nay venn t'mer gar?”" 
John7:37 Ap ko pralstouno oun shoukeder dives, vas o Yezous pale glan kol tsele menshende, oun das gole: “Kones troush hi, kova te vell pash mande oun piyella!" 
John7:38 Koon ap mande patsella, har o Debleskro lab penella, dran koleste vell ko pani, kay dell o djipen.”" 
John7:39 Yob penas kova pral o Debleskro Dourho, hoy kolla lenna, kay ap leste patsenna. O Debleskro Dourho his gomme gar koy. Ap ko tsiro his o Yezous gomme gar pash o Debleste an o bolepen, te bičras lo les ap lende." 
John7:40 Mashkral kolende, kay shounan ko rakepen, his menshe, kay penan: “Kava morsh hi čačepah ko Debleskro rakepaskro, kolestar penlo vas, te vell yob.”" 
John7:41 Vavar penan: “Kova hi ko baro ray, kay vell o Deblestar.” Oun vavar penan: “Vell ko baro ray dran o them Galilea? Na-a!" 
John7:42 O Debleskro lab penella, ko baro ray, kay vell o Deblestar, kova hi o Davideskre menshendar, oun vell an o foro Betlehem boldo har o David.”" 
John7:43 Kanna djinan i menshe gar, hoy čačo hi. Ko yek penas kava, ko vavar penas kova." 
John7:44 Mashkral lende his ninna save, kay kaman les te taprell. Oun kek hadas peskro vast pal leste." 
John7:45 Har i kliste pale pash i bare rashaya oun i Farisarya van, poučan kolla lendar: “Hoske anenn les t'mer gar peha?”" 
John7:46 “Har kava morsh rakras, shounam mer maro tselo djipen gar!” penan i kliste ap lende." 
John7:47 “Rhorhas lo t'men ninna?” poučan kol Farisarya. 
John7:48 “Patsell yek i pralstunendar oun i Farisarendar ap leste? Na-a! 
John7:49 Kol boud menshe djinenn gar, hoy an o Moseskre lila činlo hi. Yon hi praasedo!”" 
John7:50 O Nikodemus, kay his ninna i Farisari, kova kay vas yek rati pash o Yezouseste, penas ap lende:" 
John7:51 “Pal maro čačepen nay dah kekes i phagi, te shounam gar lestar, hoy yob rakrell pral kova vin. Mer dah ninna kekes i phagi, te djinah gar, hoy yob kras.”" 
John7:52 “Hal tou ninna dran o them Galilea?” poučan le lestar. “Tou te dravereh mishto an o Debleskre lila, palle dikeh, kay kek Debleskro rakepaskro vella dran o them Galilea.”" 
John7:53 Oun hakeno djas khere. 
John8:1 O Yezous djas pash o djeteskri berga. 
John8:2 O vavar dives taysarlake vas yob pale an o Debleskro baro kheer. Oun i tsele menshe van pash leste. Oun yob beshas pes tele, oun penas lenge o Debleskro lab." 
John8:3 Koy van i čačepangre oun i Farisarya. Kolla anan i romedini romyat pash leste. Koya vas tapedo koy pashel, har yoy i vavar morsheha khetne his. Yon čivan lat mashkral i menshende, yaake, kay dikell lat nay hakeno." 
John8:4 Oun yon penan ap o Yezouseste: “Sikepaskro, kay romni vas tapedo, har yoy i vavar morsheha khetne his." 
John8:5 An o Moseskre lila, kay činlo hi, har mer djivas, penas o Mose menge, kay save djouvya hounte venn moulo dino i barrentsa. Hoy peneh tou pral kova?”" 
John8:6 Kova poučan le lestar, te nay taprenn le les an leskre laba, yaake te nay anenn le i doosh ap leste pre. O Yezous čivas pes glan tele, oun činas o goushteha an i phoub." 
John8:7 Har yon lestar pale poučan, hadas yob pes pre, oun penas: “Koon kek čilačo koova kras, mou vell ko ersto, kay vitsrell i bar ap late!”" 
John8:8 Oun pale čivas pes yob glan tele, oun činas pale an i phoub." 
John8:9 Har yon kova shounan, djan le penge, yek pal o vavar. I phoureder djan sikeder lendar, har kol vavar. Yob ačas kokres koy romyah, kay kote tardo his." 
John8:10 Kanna hadas pes o Yezous pale pre, oun poučas koy romyatar: “Hi kek koy, kay kamell, te less i phagi?”" 
John8:11 “Na-a, miro ray, kek hi koy,” penas koy romni. Penas o Yezous: “Yaake kamau me vitar gar, te less i phagi. Dja khere, oun ma an bouder kek doosh ap toute!”" 
John8:12 Pale rakras o Yezous i menshentsa oun penas: “Me hom koy momeli i menshenge. Koon mange palla djala, djal gar an o tamlepen. Me hom koy momeli, kay o djipen della.”" 
John8:13 Koy penan kol Farisarya ap leste: “Tou rakreh toutar kokres oun peneh, koon tou hal. Doleske hi kova či moldo, hoy tou rakreh.”" 
John8:14 Penas o Yezous: “Ninna te rakrau mandar kokres, hi kova čačo, hoy penau. Me djinau, konestar me vom, oun kay me djaua. T'mer djinenn gar, konestar me vom, vitar gar, kay me djaua." 
John8:15 T'mer dikenn i menshes t'mare yakentsa, oun penenn: Kova anas doosh ap peste! Me krau kova gar." 
John8:16 Me te penau: Kova anas i doosh ap peste! palle hi kova čačo. Me krau kova gar mandar kokres. Miro dad, kay bičras man, hi pash mande." 
John8:17 Ninna an o Moseskre lila hi činlo: Te penenn douy pral yekeste vin, yaake hi kova čačo." 
John8:18 Me penau o čačepen pral mande, oun miro dad, kay bičras man, penell ninna o čačepen pral mande.”" 
John8:19 Poučan yon lestar: “Kay hi tiro dad?” Penas o Yezous: “T'mer prindjrenn man gar, vitar gar miro dades. Te prindjrans t'mer man, yaake prindjrans ninna miro dades.”" 
John8:20 Har yob kava penas, his yob an o Debleskro baro kheer, kote, kay i pirya tardo his, kay i menshe love o Debleske dren čivan. Kote penas yob i menshenge o Debleskro lab. Oun kek tapras les. I tsiro his leske kanna gar koy." 
John8:21 Pale penas o Yezous ap lende: “Me djau mange. T'mer rodenn man, oun t'mer merenn an t'maro čilačepen. Kote, kay me djaua, nay venn t'mer gar.”" 
John8:22 Penan kol bibolde: “Hoy penell yob kay: Kote, kay me djau, nay venn t'mer gar? Kamell yob pes te marell?”" 
John8:23 Penas yob ap lende: “T'mer han i phoubyatar. Me hom dran o bolepen. T'mer han kay phoubyatar. Me hom gar kay phoubyatar. 
John8:24 Doleske penom t'menge: T'mer merenn an t'maro čilačepen. T'mer te patsenn gar, kay me kova hom, koon me hom, palle merenn t'mer an t'maro čilačepen.”" 
John8:25 “Pen menge, koon tou hal!” penan yon ap leste. Penas o Yezous: “Me penom t'menge kova yaake boud kope." 
John8:26 Me nay penoms t'menge boud koova, kay dikom o čilačepen ap t'mende. Me krau kova gar. Me penau i menshenge, hoy shounom kolestar, kay bičras man. Oun hoy yob penella, hi čačo.”" 
John8:27 Yon hayvan gar, kay o Yezous o Deblestar, peskro dadestar, rakras." 
John8:28 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Te hadan t'mer o Menshengro Čaves pral, palle djinenn t'mer, koon me hom, oun kay me či mandar kokres kraua. Hoy o dad mange penas, kova penau me doureder." 
John8:29 Oun kova, kay bičras man, hi pash mande. Yob moukas man gar kokres. Me krau hako tsiro, hoy yob kamella.”" 
John8:30 Har o Yezous kova penas, patsan boud ap leste." 
John8:31 Ap kol biboldende, kay kanna ap leste patsan, penas lo: “T'mer te krenna, hoy me t'menge penau, palle han t'mer čačepah mire mala, kay mire laba pre lan." 
John8:32 Oun t'mer prindjrenna o čačepen. Oun o čačepen krella, te han bouder gar pandlo.”" 
John8:33 Penan yon: “Mer ham o Abrahameskre čave. Oun an kek tsiro hams pandle boudepangre. Har nay peneh tou menge, te ačenn bouder gar pandlo?”" 
John8:34 Penas o Yezous: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon o čilačepen krella, hi pandlo ap o čilačepen." 
John8:35 I boudepaskro ačell gar hako tsiro an peskro rayeskro kheer. O čavo ačella yaake rah, har yob djivella." 
John8:36 Te krell o Debleskro čavo, kay han bouder gar pandlo, yaake han čačepah bouder gar pandlo." 
John8:37 Me djinau, kay han o Abrahameskre čave. Ninna te hi yaake, kamenn t'mer man te marell. Kova, hoy me t'menge penau, lenn t'mer gar pre. Doleske kamenn t'mer man te marell." 
John8:38 Me penau t'menge kova, hoy pash miro dadeste dikom. T'mer krenna, hoy shounan t'maro dadestar.”" 
John8:39 Koy penan yon ap leste: “Maro dad hi o Abraham.” Penas o Yezous: “Te vans t'mer lestar, krans, hoy yob kras." 
John8:40 Kanna, kay me t'menge ko čačepen penom, kay shounom o Deblestar, kamenn t'mer man te marell. Kova kras o Abraham gar." 
John8:41 T'mer krenn kova, hoy t'maro dad ninna kras.” Penan yon ap leste: “Mari day hi kek loubni. Men hi yek dad. Kova hi o Devel.”" 
John8:42 “Te vals o Devel t'maro dad”, penas o Yezous, “kamans man t'mer. Lestar vom me. Me vom gar mandar. Hi o Devel, kay bičras man." 
John8:43 Hoske hayvenn t'mer miro rakepen gar? T'maro dji hi pandlo. T'mer shounenn nay miro lab gar. 
John8:44 T'maro dad hi o beng. Oun t'mer krenna, hoy t'maro dad ninna kamella. Yob hi yek, kay marell i menshen hako tsiro. Oun yob hi gar an o čačepen tardo. O čačepen hi gar an leste. Te rakrell yob o rhorhepen, vell kova dran leste. Yob hi i rhorheno, oun anas o rhorhepen ap kay phoub." 
John8:45 Me penau o čačepen. Doleske patsenn t'mer man gar. 
John8:46 Koon t'mendar nay penella, kay me yek čilačo koova krom? Me te penau o čačepen, hoske patsenn t'mer man gar?" 
John8:47 Koon o Deblestar vella, shounella ap kova, hoy o Devel penella. T'mer venn gar lestar. Doleske shounenn t'mer gar ap leskre laba.”" 
John8:48 “Hi maro gar čačo?” penan kol bibolde. “Tou hal i Samaritari oun an toute hi o beng, yaake har mer les penam.”" 
John8:49 “Na-a,” penas o Yezous, “an mande hi kek beng. Me sharau miro dades. T'mer kamenn man gar te sharell." 
John8:50 Me kamau gar, te sharenn man i menshe. Kova hi o Devel, kay kamella, te vap me sharedo. Yob rakrell i phagi pral t'mende vin." 
John8:51 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Te hi yek koy, kay krella, hoy me penom, kova merell bouder gar.”" 
John8:52 Koy penan yon: “Kanna djinah mer, kay hi an toute i beng. O Abraham meras, oun o Debleskre rakepangre meran ninna. Oun tou peneh: Te krell yek, hoy me kamau, kova merell bouder gar." 
John8:53 Hal tou boudeder har maro dad Abraham, kay meras? Oun kol Debleskre rakepangre meran ninna. Hal tou feteder har yon?”" 
John8:54 Penas o Yezous: “Te sharoms me man, vals kova či moldo. Miro dad hi kova, kay sharell man. Kolestar penenn t'mer: Yob hi maro Devel." 
John8:55 T'mer prindjrenn les gar. Me prindjrau les. Te penaus me, kay prindjrau les gar, voms i rhorheno har t'mer. Me prindjrau les oun krau, hoy yob penella." 
John8:56 O Abraham, t'maro dad, his barhtelo, har yob dikas, kay me vau. Yob dikas kava dives, oun his barhtelo.”" 
John8:57 Penan kol bibolde ap leste: “Tou hal kek panč-desha bersha phouro oun peneh, kay dikal o Abrahames.”" 
John8:58 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: O Abraham his gomme gar boldo, koy homs me koy.”" 
John8:59 Koy hadan yon barra pre, te vitsrenn le kolla ap leste. Oun yob khatras pes, oun djas dran o Debleskro baro kheer vin." 
John9:1 Ap o drom dikas o Yezous i morshes. Kova vas koreles boldo. 
John9:2 Oun o Yezouseskre mala poučan o Yezousestar: “Sikepaskro, koon anas i doosh ap peste, te vas kava morsh koreles boldo? Anas yob i doosh ap peste? Anan leskro dad oun leskri day i doosh ap pende?”" 
John9:3 “Kek lendar anas i doosh ap peste,” penas o Yezous. “Yob gar, leskro dad oun leskri day vitar gar. Yob hi korelo, te vell o Debleskri bari zoor ap leste diklo." 
John9:4 Yaake rah har dives hi, kras mer, hoy o Devel menge penas, kova, kay bičras man. I rati vella: Koy nay krell kek i boudi." 
John9:5 Yaake rah, har me ap kay phoub hom, yaake rah hom me koy momeli i menshenge.”" 
John9:6 Har yob kova penas, čoungras lo an i čik, las kova, oun makas leske ap i yaka." 
John9:7 Oun yob penas ap leste: “Dja pash ko pani Siloam, oun thob tout koy!” Siloam kharella: O Devel bičras man. Koy djas yob oun thovas pes kote. Har yob pale vas, dikas lo nay." 
John9:8 Kol menshe, kay pash leste djivan, oun vavar, kay djinan, kay yob o mangepaskro his, penan: “Hi kova gar ko morsh, kay kote beshdo his oun mendar love mangas?”" 
John9:9 His menshe koy, kay penan: “Kova hi ko morsh.” Vavar penan: “Na-a! Kova dikell vin har yob.” Ko morsh penas: “Me hom kova.”" 
John9:10 “Har vell kova, kay tou dikeh nay ap yek kopo?” poučan le lestar." 
John9:11 Penas yob: “O morsh, kay kharell Yezous, makas mange čomone ap i yaka, oun penas: Dja pash ko pani Siloam, oun thob tout koy! Me djom kote, oun thovom man, oun dikom nay.”" 
John9:12 “Kay hi yob?” poučan le lestar. “Me djinau gar,” penas yob." 
John9:13 Oun yon anan kol morshes pash i Farisarya. 
John9:14 His i Debleskro dives, har o Yezous makas koy čik ap leskre yaka, oun kras, te dikell yob." 
John9:15 Kanna poučan ninna i Farisarya kolestar, kay sasto vas: “Har vell kova, kay dikeh nay ap yek kopo?” Oun yob penas lenge: “Yob makas mange čomone ap i yaka, me thovom man, oun kanna nay dikau.”" 
John9:16 Kote his Farisarya, kay penan: “Kava morsh vas gar o Deblestar. Yob boudrell ap o Debleskro dives.” Vavar penan: “Har nay krell i čilačo morsh savo baro koova?” Oun mashkral lende djas o čingepen." 
John9:17 Oun pale poučan le kolestar, kay sasto vas: “Hoy peneh tou lestar, kay yob tire yaka pre kras? Hoy peneh tou, koon yob hi?” “Yob hi i Debleskro rakepaskro,” penas lo." 
John9:18 Kol pralstoune bibolde patsan gar, kay yob nay dikas gar, oun kanna dikell yob nay. Doleske kharan le leskro dades oun leskri da," 
John9:19 oun poučan lendar: “Hi kava t'maro čavo, kay penenn lestar: Yob vas koreles boldo? Har vell kova, kay dikell yob nay ap yek kopo?”" 
John9:20 Leskro dad oun leskri day penan: “Mer djinah, kay kava maro čavo hi, kay koreles boldo vas." 
John9:21 Har kova djas, kay yob nay dikell kanna, djinah mer gar. Oun koon kras, kay yob nay dikella, djinah vitar gar. Poučenn lestar! Yob hi phouro doha. Yob nay penell t'menge halauter.”" 
John9:22 Len his daar kol pralstoune biboldendar. Doleske rakran yon yaake. I pralstoune bibolde kaman hakenes pale-čiddo te krell, kay penella o Yezousestar: Yob hi o baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob." 
John9:23 Doleske penan o dad oun i day: “Yob hi phouro doha. Poučenn lestar!” 
John9:24 Kol pralstoune bibolde dan koles, kay korelo his, o douyto kopo gole, oun penan ap leste: “Pen kanna o čačepen glan o Debleste! Mer djinah, kay djal kava Yezous gar ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
John9:25 Koy penas yob ap lende: “Djinau gar, te djal yob ap o Debleskro drom, vitar gar, te djal yob gar ap o Debleskro drom. Yek djinau me: Me dikom nay gar. Kanna dikau me nay.”" 
John9:26 “Hoy kras yob touha?” kaman yon pale te djinell. “Har kras yob tout sasto, kay dikeh nay?”" 
John9:27 “Har kova vas, penom me t'menge,” penas yob, “hayvan t'mer man gar? Hoske kamenn t'mer kova pale te shounell? Kamenn t'mer, te vell yob ninna t'maro sikepaskro?”" 
John9:28 Koy čingran yon ap leste oun penan: “Tiro sikepaskro hi lo. Maro sikepaskro hi o Mose. 
John9:29 Mer djinah, kay o Devel o Moseha rakras. Konestar kava vella, djinah mer gar.”" 
John9:30 Ko morsh penas ap lende: “Kova hayvau me gar. Kava morsh kras, kay dikau nay. Oun t'mer djinenn gar, konestar yob vella." 
John9:31 Mer halauter djinah, kay o Devel ap kekeste shounella, kay djal gar ap leskro drom. O Devel shounell ap koleste, kay darell lestar oun djivell yaake, har yob kamella." 
John9:32 Yaake rah, har i phoub tardo hi, shounas kek, kay i mensho yekes sasto kras, kay korelo boldo vas." 
John9:33 Te vals kava morsh gar o Deblestar, nay krals yob savo koova gar.”" 
John9:34 Koy penan yon ap leste: “Tou, kay boldo hal an o čilačepen, kameh kanna maro sikepaskro te vell?” Oun yon vitsran les vin." 
John9:35 O Yezous shounas, kay yon les vin vitsran. Oun har yob les hatsas, poučas lo lestar: “Patseh tou ap o Menshengro Čaveste?”" 
John9:36 Penas ko morsh: “Miro ray, koon hi kova, te patsap ap leste?”" 
John9:37 “Tou dikal les,” penas o Yezous ap leste, “yob hi kova, kay rakrell touha.”" 
John9:38 “Ray, me patsaua!” das yob gole, oun vitsras pes glan leste tele." 
John9:39 Oun o Yezous penas: “Me vom ap kay phoub, te sikrap i menshen, koon i doosh ap peste anas, oun koon kek doosh ap peste anas, yaake kay kolla, kay dikenn nay gar, dikenn nay. Oun kolla, kay dikenn nay, kolende sikrau me, kay yon či dikenna.”" 
John9:40 Kova shounan i Farisarya, kay his kote pashel tardo. Kolla poučan lestar: “Ham mer ninna korelo?”" 
John9:41 Koy penas o Yezous ap lende: “Te hans korelo, vals t'men kek doosh. T'mer penenn: Mer dikah. Doleske ačell i doosh ap t'mende.”" 
John10:1 “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon gar an o voudar dren djala, te vell lo pash i bakrende, oun vell vavarčandes dren, kova hi i čorepaskro oun i dre-phagepaskro." 
John10:2 O bakrengro djal an o voudar dren, te vell lo pash lende." 
John10:3 Leske krell kova o voudar pre, kay dell garda glan o voudar. Oun leskre bakre shounenn leskro rakepen. Oun yob dell peskre bakren gole lengre labentsa, oun anell len vin." 
John10:4 Te hi leskre tsele bakre vin, djal yob glan lende. Oun i bakre djan leske palla. Yon prindjrenn leskro rakepen." 
John10:5 Yekes, kay prindjrenn yon gar, koleske djan yon gar palla. Yon nashenn penge lestar. Yon prindjrenn gar leskro rakepen.”" 
John10:6 Kal laba penas o Yezous lenge. Yon hayvan gar, hoy yob kamas lenge te penell." 
John10:7 Doleske penas o Yezous pale ap lende: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Me hom o voudar i bakrenge." 
John10:8 Lauter kolla, kay van glan mande, hi čorepangre oun dre-phagepangre. Doleske shounan kol bakre gar ap lende." 
John10:9 Me hom ko voudar. Te djal yek an kava voudar dren, kova djal gar nashedo. Yob djal dren oun vin, oun yob hatsell shoukar zenlepen rhapaske." 
John10:10 Ko čorepaskro vella, te čorell lo kol bakren, te marell lo len, oun te rhal lo len. Me vom, te dap len o djipen, boudeder har doha." 
John10:11 Me hom o lačo bakrengro. O lačo bakrengro moukell peskro djipen i bakrenge. 
John10:12 Yek, kay lell love, te dell lo garda ap i bakrende, hi kek bakrengro. Kol bakre hi gar leskre. Te dikell kova, kay i divyo djouklo vella, nashell lo peske, oun moukell kol bakren kokres. Oun o divyo djouklo perell pral kol bakrende, oun tradell len yaake, kay yon bouder gar khetne hi." 
John10:13 Ko morsheske hi kova yek, hoy dran kol bakrende vella." 
John10:14 Me hom o lačo bakrengro oun prindjrau, koon mire bakre hi. Yon prindjrenn man," 
John10:15 yaake har o dad man prindjrella, oun me o dades prindjrau. Oun me dau miro djipen i bakrenge." 
John10:16 Man hi ninna vavar bakre. Kolla hi kate gar khere. Kolen anap halauter kate. Yon shounenn ap miro rakepen, oun me anau len khetne i vavarentsa. Oun len hi yek bakrengro." 
John10:17 Me dau miro djipen, te lap les neves pale. Doleske kamell man miro dad." 
John10:18 Kek lell miro djipen mandar. Dran mande vell kova, kay dau miro djipen. Kova hi an miro vast, te dap miro djipen. Oun kova hi an miro vast, te lap les pale. Yaake krau, hoy miro dad mange penas.”" 
John10:19 Har o Yezous kova penas, čingran pen kol bibolde pale pral kol laba." 
John10:20 Boud lendar penan: “I beng hi an leste oun yob hi dinelo. Ma shounenn ap leste!” 
John10:21 Vavar penan: “Te vals i beng an leste, nay rakrals yob gar yaake. Nay krell i beng yekeske, kay dikell nay gar, i yaka sasto?”" 
John10:22 His vend. Oun i bibolde an o foro Yerusalem kran i baro rhapen, te bistrenn le gar ko dives, har o Debleskro baro kheer neves kerdo vas." 
John10:23 O Yezous his an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun djas an koy isema trouyel, hoy kharella Salomeskri isema." 
John10:24 Koy van i pralstoune bibolde troul leste oun penan: “Har rah kameh tou menge gar te penell, koon tou hal? Tou te hal ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, yaake pen menge kova an o mouy!”" 
John10:25 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Koon me hom, penom t'menge. T'mer patsenn man gar. Halauter, hoy me krau an miro dadeskro lab, kova hounte sikrell t'mende, koon me hom." 
John10:26 T'mer han gar mire bakre. Doleske patsenn t'mer man gar. 
John10:27 Mire bakre shounenn ap miro rakepen. Oun me prindjrau len. Oun yon djan mange palla. 
John10:28 Oun me dau len ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun yon djan gar nashedo. Oun kek nay tserdell len dran miro vast vin." 
John10:29 Miro dad, kay das len mande, hi bareder har halauter. Oun kek nay tserdell len dran miro dadeskro vast vin." 
John10:30 Me oun o dad ham yek.” 
John10:31 Koy hadan kol bibolde pale barra pre, te denn le les kol barrentsa moulo." 
John10:32 O Yezous penas lenge: “Me krom boud lačo koova. Miro dad penas mange, te krap kova. Hoy hi ko lačo koova, koleske kamenn man moulo te dell?”" 
John10:33 Penan kol bibolde ap leste: “Ko lačo koova, hoy tou kral, koleske kamah mer tout gar moulo te dell. Tou anal ladj ap o Debleste. Tou hal i mensho oun kreh, har te vals o Devel. Doleske kamah tout te marell.”" 
John10:34 Penas o Yezous: “An o Debleskro lab, ap koleste t'men rikrenna, kote hi činlo: Me, o Devel penom: T'mer han debla." 
John10:35 Kolentsa, kay o Devel rakras, ap kolende penas yob debla. Oun kova, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi, nay vell gar krik lino." 
John10:36 Man hi o dadeskro vast. Oun miro dad bičras man ap kay phoub. Me te penau, kay hom o Debleskro čavo, har nay penenna t'mer ap mande: Tou kreh, har te vess o Devel?" 
John10:37 Te krau me gar, hoy o dad mange penas, hounte patsenn t'mer man gar." 
John10:38 Te krau me, hoy o dad mange penas, patsenn ap kova, hoy me krau! Yaake dikenn oun prindjrenn t'mer, kay o dad an mande hi oun me an leste.”" 
John10:39 Koy kaman yon les pale te taprell. Yob khatras pes lendar. 
John10:40 Oun yob djas pale ap i vavar rig o panyestar Yordan oun ačas kote, kay o Yohanni i menshen taufras." 
John10:41 Koy van boud menshe pash leste oun penan: “O Yohanni kras kekes sasto. Halauter, hoy yob pral kava morsheste penas, hi čačo.”" 
John10:42 Oun kote patsan boud ap o Yezouseste. 
John11:1 Koy his yek nasselo čiddo. Leskro lab his Lazaro. Yob his dran ko gab Betani, kay ninna i Maria oun lakri pheen Marta djivan." 
John11:2 I Maria his koy djouvel, kay ko kouč djet ap o Yezouseskre pire čoras. Oun peskre ballentsa khossas yoy leskre pire. Kolakro phraal his o Lazaro. Kova his nasselo." 
John11:3 Kol douy phenya bičran menshen pash o Yezouseste, te penenn le leske: “Ray, koles, kay tou kameh, hi nasselo.”" 
John11:4 Har o Yezous kova shounas, penas lo: “Kava nasslepen vas gar ap leste, te merell lo. Yob vas nasselo, te dikenn t'mer, havi bari zoor o Debles hi, oun te vell o Debleskro čavo sharedo.”" 
John11:5 O Yezous kamas i Martat oun lakri phenyat oun o Lazares o djiyestar. 
John11:6 Har yob shounas, kay kova nasselo his, ačas yob douy divessa koy, kay yob his." 
John11:7 Pal kova penas yob ap peskre malende: “Avenn, mer djah pale an o them Youdea!”" 
John11:8 Penan leskre mala ap leste: “Sikepaskro, his gar rah, koy kaman tout i bibolde moulo te dell i barrentsa. Oun pash kolende kameh tou pale te djal?”" 
John11:9 O Yezous penas: “An o dives hi deesh-te-douy tsirya. Koon ap o dives trouyel nashella, kova perell gar. Ap o dives rhačell o kham." 
John11:10 An i rat rhačell o kham gar. Koon an i rat ap o drom hi, kova perella.”" 
John11:11 Har o Yezous lenge kova penas, penas lo: “Maro maal Lazaro sovas dren. Me djau koy, te djangrap les pre.”" 
John11:12 Kal labentsa penas o Yezous, kay o Lazaro meras. Yon hayvan kova gar. Yon patsan, kay o Yezous penas, kay yob sovella. “Ray,” penan le ap leste, “te sovell lo, vell lo pale sasto.”" 
John11:13  
John11:14 Kanna penas o Yezous lenge an o mouy: “O Lazaro meras. 
John11:15 Doleske hom barhtelo t'menge, kay me gar koy homs, te patsenn nay t'mer ap mande kanna. Avenn, mer djah kanna pash leste!”" 
John11:16 Penas o Thomas, koles dan le ninna Didimo gole, ap leskre malende: “Avenn, mer djah ninna leha, te meras leha!”" 
John11:17 Har o Yezous an o gab Betani vas, shounas lo, kay o Lazaro star divessa paskedo his." 
John11:18 O gab Betani his gar dour o forestar Yerusalem, nay vell triin kilometarya." 
John11:19 Oun boud bibolde his pash i Marta oun pash i Maria, te rakrenn le lentsa, te hi i douk gar yaake baro pral lengro phraleskro merepen." 
John11:20 Har i Marta shounas, kay o Yezous vella, djas yoy pash leste. I Maria ačas khere." 
John11:21 “Ray,” penas i Marta ap o Yezouseste, “te vals tou kay, merals miro phraal gar." 
John11:22 Me djinau ninna, hoy tou o Deblestar mangeh, dell yob tout.”" 
John11:23 Penas o Yezous ap late: “Tiro phraal stella pale i moulendar pre.” 
John11:24 “Me djinau,” penas li, “kay yob i moulendar pre stella ap ko palstouno dives, kay hake moule pre stenna.”" 
John11:25 Penas o Yezous ap late: “Me hom kova, kay djangrau len pre dran o merepen oun dau len o djipen. Koon ap mande patsella, djivella, ninna te merell yob." 
John11:26 Koon djivella oun patsell ap mande, kova merell bouder gar. Patseh tou kova?”" 
John11:27 “Ava, ray,” penas li, “me patsau, kay tou hal o Kristo, o Debleskro čavo, kay vas ap kay phoub.”" 
John11:28 Oun har yoy kova penas, djas yoy pash peskri phenyate oun penas čorrhanes ap late: “O sikepaskro hi koy oun dell tout gole.”" 
John11:29 Har i Maria kova shounas, stas yoy sik pre oun vas pash leste." 
John11:30 O Yezous his gomme glan o gab, kay i Marta les tapras." 
John11:31 Kol bibolde, kay pash i Mariate an o kheer his, te rakrenn le lačes lah, dikan, har yoy sik pre stas oun vin nashas. Koy djan le lake palla. Yon patsan, yoy djal pash o moulengro kheer, te rovell li koy." 
John11:32 Har i Maria koy vas, kay o Yezous hi, čivras pes li glan leste tele oun penas: “Ray, te vals tou koy, merals miro phraal gar.”" 
John11:33 Har o Yezous dikas, kay yoy rovella oun kol bibolde ninna, kay lah van, djas kova leske phares an o dji. Oun leskro dji rovas." 
John11:34 Oun yob penas ap lende: “Kay hi yob čiddo?” Yon penan ap leste: “Ray, am oun dik!”" 
John11:35 Oun o Yezous rovas. 
John11:36 “Dikenn,” penan i bibolde, “yob hounte kamas les o djiyestar!”" 
John11:37 Mashkral lende his menshe, kay penan: “Yob kras ko morshes, kay dikas nay gar, sasto. Yob nay krals ninna, te merals o Lazaro gar.”" 
John11:38 Kova djas o Yezouseske pale phares an o dji. Oun yob vas pash ko moulengro kheer, kay o Lazaro paskedo his. Glan ko moulengro kheer his i bar čiddo." 
John11:39 “Lenn ko bar krik!” penas o Yezous. I Marta, koy pheen kolestar, kay meras, penas: “Ray, yob khandella. Star divessa hi lo moulo.”" 
John11:40 Penas o Yezous ap late: “Penom me touke gar: Te patseh tou, dikeh tou o Debleskri bari zoor?”" 
John11:41 Koy čivan le ko bar ap i rig. Oun o Yezous dikas pre, oun penas: “Tata, me parkrau man, kay shounal man." 
John11:42 Me djinau, kay tou man hako tsiro shouneh. Me penau kava kol boud menshenge, kay hi kay tardo, te dikenn le oun te patsenn le, kay tou man bičral.”" 
John11:43 Har yob kova penas, das lo zoreles gole: “Lazaro, am vin!”" 
John11:44 Oun kova, kay meras, vas vin. Troul leskre herya oun vasta his layntikre kotya pandlo. Ninna troul leskro mouy his i diklo pandlo. Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Lenn kol kotya lestar lauter tele, oun moukenn les te djal!”" 
John11:45 Boud kol biboldendar, kay pash i Mariate van, dikan kova, hoy o Yezous kote kras, oun yon patsan ap leste." 
John11:46 Mashkral lende his menshe, kay djan pash kol Farisarya, oun penan lenge, hoy o Yezous kras." 
John11:47 Doleske van kol bare rashaya oun kol Farisarya i pralstoune biboldentsa khetne, oun penan: “Hoy kras mer? Yob krell boud baro oun zorelo koova, hoy kek vavar nay krell." 
John11:48 Te moukah les mer yaake doureder te krell, patsell hakeno ap leste. Oun kol Remarya venna oun lenn menge o tselo them oun i menshen mendar krik.”" 
John11:49 Yek lendar his o Kayafas. Kova his an ko bersh o baro rashay. Yob penas: “T'mer djinenna či. 
John11:50 T'mer hayvenna gar, kay feteder hi, te merell yek morsh i menshenge, har te djan i tsele menshe nashedo.”" 
John11:51 O Kayafas penas kova gar dran peste. An ko bersh his lo o baro rashay, oun yob penas glan-vi, kay o Yezous hounte merell i biboldenge," 
John11:52 oun gar i biboldenge kokres. Yob hounte merella ninna, te anell lo i tsele Debleskre čaven khetne." 
John11:53 Kova his ko dives, kay van le o ersto kopo khetne, te rodenn le i drom, har nay marenn yon les." 
John11:54 Doleske moukas pes o Yezous bouder gar te dikell pash i biboldende. Yob djas an ko foro, kay kharas Efrayim. Kova his pash o moulo them. Koy ačas yob peskre malentsa." 
John11:55 His i tikno tsiro glan kol bare biboldengre divessa, kay kharenna Passa. Dran ko tselo them van i menshe an o foro Yerusalem, te thovenn pen le an o pani glan o Passa, yaake har i biboldengro koova hi." 
John11:56 Yon halauter kaman o Yezouses te dikell, oun rodan les. Har yon an o Debleskro baro kheer khetne his, poučas yek o vavarestar: “Hoy peneh tou? Vell yob ap o festo Passa?”" 
John11:57 Kol bare rashaya oun kol Farisarya penan, te djinell yek, kay yob hi, hounte penell yob les, te taprenn yon les nay." 
John12:1 Shob divessa glan ko festo Passa vas o Yezous pale an o foro Betani, kay o Lazaro djivella. Koles kras o Yezous i moulendar djido." 
John12:2 Koy kran le leske i rhapen. I Marta anas lenge ko rhapen. O Lazaro his yek lendar, kay rhas leha." 
John12:3 Oun i Maria las i toushni, kay boud lačo oun kouč djet dren hi, oun čoras kova pral o Yezouseskre pire. Peskre ballentsa khossas yoy leskre pire. Oun an o tselo kheer his o lačo soungepen o djetestar." 
John12:4 Yek leskre malendar, o Youdas Iskariot, kova, kay phoukrella ap leste, penas:" 
John12:5 “Hoske vas ko djet gar bikedo oun mer lams triin-sheel roupene beme? Oun kol love nay dams i čorvelende.” 
John12:6 Yob penas kova gar, te krell lo i čorvelenge lačo koova. Yob his i čorepaskro. Kol tsele love, hoy i menshe lende dan, his pash leste. Oun yob las peske kol lovendar čomone krik." 
John12:7 “Mouk lat!” penas o Yezous. “Yoy kras kova, te makell li man dren ko diveske, kay vau paskedo." 
John12:8 I čorvele hi hako tsiro pash t'mende. Me hom bouder gar rah pash t'mende.” 
John12:9 Boud bibolde shounan, kay o Yezous an o gab Betani hi, oun van koy. Yon van gar, te dikenn le o Yezouses kokres. O Lazares kaman le ninna te dikell, koles, kay o Yezous i moulendar djides kras." 
John12:10 Yaake djan boud bibolde pash o Lazareste, oun patsan ap o Yezouseste. Doleske rodan kol bare rashaya i drom, har nay marenn yon ninna o Lazares." 
John12:11  
John12:12 O vavar dives shounan kol boud menshe, kay ap ko Passa van, kay o Yezous an o foro Yerusalem vella." 
John12:13 Koy lan le patria, kay phagan le tele, oun djan dran o foro pash leste, oun dan gole: “Sharas o Debles! Sharedo vell kova, koles o Devel bičras, o baro ray pral Israel!”" 
John12:14 Oun o Yezous hatsas i terni esla, oun beshas pes ap late, yaake har tardo hi an o Debleskro lab:" 
John12:15 “T'mer menshe an o foro Yerusalem, ma darenn! T'maro baro ray vella oun hi beshdo ap i terni esla.”" 
John12:16 Ap ko tsiro djinan o Yezouseskre mala gar, kay kova lestar glan i rah tsiro penlo vas. Har o Yezous an o Debleskro raylepen djas, hayvan le, kay i menshe kran leha yaake, har pral leste činlo his." 
John12:17 Kol boud menshe, kay pashel his, har o Yezous o Lazares dran o moulengro kheer gole das, oun i moulendar djides kras, penan kova doureder." 
John12:18 Doleske nashan ninna yaake boud menshe pash leste. Yon kaman koles te dikell, kay ko baro Debleskro koova kras." 
John12:19 Oun i Farisarya rakran mashkral pende: “T'mer dikenna, kay vah yaake gar doureder. I tsele menshe nashenn leske palla.”" 
John12:20 Mashkral i biboldende, kay van an o foro Yerusalem, te mangenn le o Debles an ap o festo Passa, his ninna menshe dran o grichtikro them." 
John12:21 Kolla van pash o Filipo, kay dran o gab Betsayda an o them Galilea his. Oun penan ap leste: “Ray, mer kamah o Yezouses te dikell.”" 
John12:22 Koy djas o Filipo pash o Andreas oun penas leske kova. Oun o Andreas oun o Filipo djan pash o Yezouseste oun penan les leske. 
John12:23 O Yezous penas ap lende: “Ko tsiro hi kanna kay, kay o Devel sikrell o Menshengro Čaveskro raylepen." 
John12:24 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Te vell o djob gar an i phoub oun merell tele, anell lo nay kek nevo djob. Te merell lo tele, anell yob boud nevo djob." 
John12:25 Koon peskro djipen kamella, kova nashrell les. Koon peskro djipen ap kay phoub gar kamella, kova lell o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John12:26 Koon kamell mange koy te vell, kova hounte djal mantsa. Kote, kay me hom, hi ninna kova, kay mange koy hi. Kova, kay mange koy hi, vell sharedo miro dadestar." 
John12:27 Man hi daar an miro dji. Hoy nay penap me? Tata, le mandar kova krik, hoy ap mande vella? Na-a, me vom ap kay phoub, te lap kova ap mande, hoy kanna vella." 
John12:28 Tata kre, te sharell hakeno tiro lab!” Koy vas i rakepen dran o bolepen oun penas: “Me krom, kay vell yob sharedo. Oun kova krau me pale.”" 
John12:29 Boud menshe, kay koy pashel tardo hi oun shounan kova, penan: “O bolepen das gole.” Vavar penan: “Kova his i Debleskro bolepaskro, kay rakras leha.”" 
John12:30 Penas o Yezous: “Ko rakepen vas t'menge rakedo, gar mange." 
John12:31 Kanna vell i phagi pral i tseli phoub vi-rakedo. Kanna vitsrell o Devel koles vin, kay hi o ray pral kay phoub." 
John12:32 Te hom pral i phoub hadedo, tserdau lauteren pash mande.”" 
John12:33 Kova penas yob, te sikrell lo, har yob merella." 
John12:34 Koy penan i menshe ap leste: “Dran o Debleskro lab shounam, kay ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, ačell hako tsiro. Har nay peneh tou, kay o Mensheskro Čavo hounte vell ap o troushel dino? Koon hi ko Mensheskro Čavo?”" 
John12:35 Penas o Yezous ap lende: “Koy momeli hi gar bouder rah pash t'mende. Djan t'maro drom yaake rah, har koy momeli pash t'mende hi, te vell gar i rati pral t'mende! Koon an i rati djala, djinell gar, kay yob djala." 
John12:36 Patsenn ap koy momeli, yaake rah har t'men koy momeli hi! Palle venn t'mer menshe, kolen hi i momeli ap pengro drom oun djivenn gar an o tamlepen.” Har o Yezous kova ap lende penas, djas lo peske, oun khatras pes lendar." 
John12:37 Ninna te kras yob boud baro oun zorelo koova glan lende, kay kek mensho nay krella, patsan yon gar ap leste." 
John12:38 Yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Yesaya, ko Debleskro rakepaskro, glan i rah tsiro penas: Ray, koon patsell men, hoy mer penah? Koon hayvella o Debleskri bari zoor?" 
John12:39 O Yesaya penas ninna glan-vi, hoske yon nay gar patsenna:" 
John12:40 O Devel kras, kay dikenn yon nay gar. Oun lengro dji kras yob pandlo. Kova kras yob, te dikenn yon nay či pengre yakentsa, oun te djal či dren an lengro dji. Te nay moukenn le gar pengro čilačo drom oun venn pash o Debleste, te krell lo len sasto." 
John12:41 Glan i rah tsiro dikas o Yesaya o Yezouseskro raylepen oun rakras lestar. Doleske penas yob kova glan-vi. 
John12:42 Ninna boud kol pralstoune biboldendar patsan ap leste. Oun yon penan či i vavarenge, kay yon ninna ap o Yezouseste patsenna. Yon daran i Farisarendar, te venn le lendar gar pale-čiddo kerdo." 
John12:43 Lenge his boudeder moldo, te venn yon sharedo i menshendar har o Deblestar." 
John12:44 Oun o Yezous das zoreles gole: “Koon ap mande patsella, kova patsell gar ap mande kokres. Kova patsell ninna ap koleste, kay bičras man." 
John12:45 Oun koon man dikella, kova dikell koles, kay bičras man." 
John12:46 Me hom koy bari momeli, hoy vas ap kay phoub. Hakeno, koon ap mande patsella, ačell gar an i rati." 
John12:47 Te shounell yek mire laba oun krell gar, hoy me penom, hom gar me, kay rakrau i phagi pral koleste vin. Me vom gar ap i phoub, te dap i menshen i phagi. Me vom, te lap len dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin." 
John12:48 Koon lell man gar pre, oun kamell gar mire laba te shounell, kova lell peskri phagi. Kol laba, hoy me rakrom, denn les i phagi ap ko dives, kay o čačepen pral i tsele menshende vi-rakedo vella." 
John12:49 Kova, hoy me penom, vell gar mandar. O dad, kay bičras man, penas mange, hoy me penap oun rakrap." 
John12:50 Me djinau, leskro lab dell t'men o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Doleske rakrau me kova yaake, har miro dad les mange penas.”" 
John13:1 His o dives glan kol bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa. O Yezous djinas, kay leskro tsiro vas, te moukell lo i phoub, te djal lo pale pash peskro dadeste. O tselo tsiro kamas lo kolen o djiyestar, kay leskre his. Oun yob moukas gar tele, te kamell lo len." 
John13:2 Ap koy rati, har yon rhan, das o beng o Youdases an o dji, te phoukrell lo ap leste. O Youdaseskro dad his o Simon Iskariot." 
John13:3 O Yezous djinas, kay o Devel, leskro dad, halauter an leskre vasta čivas, oun kay yob o Deblestar vas, oun kay yob pale pash o Debleste djala." 
John13:4 Doleske stas yob pre, rivas peskre pralstoune ripya vin oun pandas peske i damdira trouyel." 
John13:5 Pal kova čoras yob o pani an i piri, oun thovas peskre malenge i pire. Oun yob las koy damdira, hoy yob troul peste pandas, oun khossas lengre pire." 
John13:6 Har yob pash o Simon Petreste vas, penas kova ap leste: “Ray, thoveh tou mire pire?”" 
John13:7 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Hoy me kraua, hayveh tou kanna gar. Pal i tsiro hayveh tou kova.”" 
John13:8 Penas o Petro ap leste: “An kek tsiro kamau me, te thovess mire pire!” “Te thovau tout gar,” penas o Yezous, “hal tou gar miro.”" 
John13:9 “Ray,” penas o Simon Petro, “thob mange gar i pire kokres! Thob mange ninna i vasta oun o shero!”" 
John13:10 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Koon tseles thodo hi, hounte vell bouder gar thodo. Yob hi djoudjo. Leskre pire kokres hounte thovell lo. T'mer han djoudjo. Yek kokres hi gar djoudjo.”" 
John13:11 O Yezous djinas, koon ap leste phoukrella. Doleske penas yob: “Yek kokres hi gar djoudjo.”" 
John13:12 Har lengre pire thodo his, las o Yezous peskre pralstoune ripya, beshas pes pale tele oun penas ap lende: “Djinenn t'mer, hoy me t'menge krom?" 
John13:13 T'mer penenn ap mande: Sikepaskro oun Ray. Oun kova hi čačo. Me hom kova. 
John13:14 Te thovom me, t'maro ray oun sikepaskro, t'mare pire, yaake hounte thovenn t'mer ninna t'menge i pire, yek o vavareske." 
John13:15 Me krom t'menge kova glan. Krenn kova ninna, yek o vavareske!" 
John13:16 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: I boudepaskro hi gar bareder har leskro ray. Oun yek, kay vas bičedo, hi gar bareder har kova, kay les bičras." 
John13:17 T'mer djinenn kova kanna halauter. Te krenn t'mer kova, han barhtelo." 
John13:18 Kova penau me gar t'mendar halauterendar. Me djinau, kones me vin rodom. Kova hounte vell yaake, har an o Debleskro lab tardo hi: Kova, kay rhal kanna o maro mantsa, dell i ladini ap mande." 
John13:19 Me penau t'menge kova kanna, te patsenn t'mer, te vella kova. Ap ko tsiro djinenn t'mer, kay me hom kova, koon me hom." 
John13:20 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon yekes an peskro kheer lella, koles me bičrom, kova lell man an peskro kheer. Oun koon man an peskro kheer lella, kova lell koles an peskro kheer, kay bičras man.”" 
John13:21 Har o Yezous kova penas, doukas les kova an o dji, oun yob penas: “Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Yek t'mendar phoukrell ap mande.”" 
John13:22 Koy dikan leskre mala darenes yek ap o vavareste. Yon djinan gar, konestar yob rakrella." 
John13:23 Yek lendar, koles, kay kamas o Yezous o djiyestar, his pash leste beshdo." 
John13:24 Lestar mangas o Simon Petro te poučell lo o Yezousestar, koon kova hi, kay phoukrell ap leste." 
John13:25 Koy čivas pes kova pale pash o Yezouseskro beč oun poučas lestar: “Ray, koon mendar hi kova?”" 
John13:26 Penas o Yezous: “Me čivau i kotar maro an ko čaro, oun koneste me ko maro dau, kava hi kova, kay phoukrell ap mande.” Har yob ko maro dran ko čaro vin las, das yob kova o Youdases, koleskro dad his o Simon Iskariot." 
John13:27 Har o Youdas ko kotar maro las, vas o beng an leste. “Hoy kameh te krell, kova kre sik!” penas o Yezous ap leste." 
John13:28 Kek, kay koy pashel beshdo his, djinas, hoske yob kova leske penas." 
John13:29 Mashkral lende his kolla, kay hayvan, har te penals o Yezous ap leste, te ginell yob čomone dren, hoy len hounte vell ap o festo. Kol vavar hayvan, har te penals o Yezous, te dell yob čomone i čorvelende. O Youdas his kova, kay hidjras koy possita lengre loventsa pash peste." 
John13:30 Har o Youdas ko maro rhas, djas lo sik vin. His rati." 
John13:31 Har o Youdas vin djas, penas o Yezous: “Kanna vell o Menshengro Čaveskro raylepen oun leskri zoor diklo. Oun o Debleskro raylepen oun leskri zoor vell diklo ap leste." 
John13:32 Te vas o Debleskro raylepen oun leskri zoor ap leste diklo, dell o Devel leste peskro raylepen. Oun ko tsiro hi kanna kay." 
John13:33 Čovale, me hom gar bouder rah pash t'mende. T'mer rodenn man, oun kova, hoy me kol biboldenge penom, penau me kanna ninna t'menge: Kay me djau, nay djan t'mer gar." 
John13:34 Kova hi nevo, hoy me t'menge kanna penau: Te kamell yek o vavares o djiyestar, yaake har me kamau t'men o djiyestar!" 
John13:35 Ap kova dikell hakeno, kay t'mer mire mala han, te kamell yek o vavares o djiyestar.”" 
John13:36 “Ray, kay djah tou?” poučas o Simon Petro lestar. Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Kote, kay me kanna djaua, nay djah tou gar peha. Pal i tsiro veh tou ninna koy.”" 
John13:37 “Ray, hoske nay vau me kanna gar touha?” poučas o Petro lestar. “Me meroms touke ninna.”" 
John13:38 “Tou kameh mange te merell?” poučas o Yezous lestar. “Čačepah, me penau touke: O bashno dell gar gole yaake rah, har tou man gar triin kope bourhoste dal.”" 
John14:1 “T'maro dji hounte trashell gar. Patsenn ap o Debleste oun patsenn ap mande! 
John14:2 An miro dadeskro kheer hi boud iseme. Te vals kova gar yaake, penoms me kova gar. Me djau koy oun dikau, te venn kol iseme t'menge kerdo." 
John14:3 Oun te krom halauter yaake, te nay tserdenn dren, vau me pale, oun lau t'men pash mande, te venn t'mer kote, kay me hom." 
John14:4 T'mer djinenn ko drom, kay me djaua.”" 
John14:5 “Ray,” penas o Thomas ap leste, “mer djinah gar, kay tou djah. Har nay djinah ko drom?”" 
John14:6 “Me hom o drom, oun o čačepen oun o djipen,” penas o Yezous. “Dell kek vavar drom pash o dadeste, har man." 
John14:7 Te prindjrans man, prindjrans ninna miro dades. Oun kanna prindjrenn les t'mer oun dikan les.”" 
John14:8 “Ray,” penas o Filipo ap leste, “sike mende o dades! Kova hi menge doha.”" 
John14:9 “Yaake rah hom pash t'mende oun tou prindjreh man gar, Filipo?” penas o Yezous. “Koon man dikella, kova dikell o dades. Har nay peneh tou: Sike mende o dades?" 
John14:10 Patseh tou gar, kay me an o dadeste hom oun o dad an mande hi? Hoy me t'menge penau, kova vell gar mandar. Na-a! O dad, kay an mande hi, krell kova halauter." 
John14:11 Patsenn man, kay me an o dadeste hom, oun kay o dad an mande hi. Te patsenn t'mer kova gar, palle patsenn ap kova, hoy me krau!" 
John14:12 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Koon ap mande patsella, krell ninna kova, hoy me krau. Oun yob krell bareder koova har me, kanna, kay djau me pash o dadeste." 
John14:13 Oun hoy t'mer an miro lab mangenna, kova kamau me te krell t'menge. Kova, hoy o čavo krella, sikrell i menshende o Debleskro raylepen oun leskri zoor." 
John14:14 Kova, hoy t'mer mangenn an miro lab, kamau me t'menge te krell.”" 
John14:15 “Te kamenn t'mer man o djiyestar, krenn t'mer, hoy me t'menge penom." 
John14:16 Oun me mangau o dadestar, te bičrell yob t'menge i rakepaskres, kay vell ap t'mari rig. Yob djal bouder gar krik t'mendar." 
John14:17 Kova hi o Debleskro Dourho, kay penell i menshenge o čačepen pral o Debleste. Kolla, kay patsenn gar ap o Debleste, nay lenn les gar. Yon dikenn les gar oun prindjrenn les gar. T'mer prindjrenn les. Yob ačell pash t'mende, oun hi an t'mende." 
John14:18 Me moukau t'men gar kokres, har te vell t'men kek dad. Me vau pash t'mende." 
John14:19 An i tikno tsiro dikenn man i menshe ap kay phoub bouder gar. T'mer dikenn man. Me djivau. Doleske djivenn t'mer ninna. 
John14:20 Ko dives vella, kay t'mer djinenna, kay me an miro dadeste hom, oun t'mer an mande han, oun me an t'mende hom." 
John14:21 Koon mire laba shounella oun krell, hoy me penau, kova kamell man čačepah o djiyestar. Oun koon man kamella, koles kamell miro dad. Oun me kamau les ninna o djiyestar oun me sikrau leste, koon me hom.”" 
John14:22 “Ray, hoske kameh tou mende te sikrell, koon tou hal, oun gar i vavar menshende?” poučas lestar o Youdas, kova, kay his gar o Youdas Iskariot." 
John14:23 Koy penas o Yezous ap leste: “Te kamell man yek o djiyestar, kova krell, hoy me penau. Koles kamell miro dad. Oun mer vah pash leste oun ačah pash leste." 
John14:24 Koon man gar kamella, kova krell vitar gar, hoy me penau. Oun hoy me penau, vell gar mandar. Kova vell miro dadestar, kay bičras man." 
John14:25 Kava koova penom me t'menge, yaake rah har me pash t'mende homs." 
John14:26 Me te hom bouder gar pash t'mende, bičrell o dad t'menge o rakepaskres, kay vell ap t'mari rig. Kova hi o Debleskro Dourho. Oun yob penell t'menge halauter yaake, te nay hayvenn kova mishto. Oun yob moukell t'menge halauter an o shero te vell, hoy me t'menge penom." 
John14:27 Ninna te hom me gar pash t'mende, ačell koy barht, hoy me dom t'men, an t'mare djia. Me dau t'men miri barht. Koy barht nay denn t'men gar i menshe ap kay phoub. Ma trashenn! Ma avenn dareno!" 
John14:28 T'mer shounan, hoy me penom: Me djau mange oun vau pale pash t'mende. Te kamans man o djiyestar, vans t'mer barhtelo, kay me pash o dadeste djau. Miro dad hi bareder har me." 
John14:29 Me penau t'menge kava kanna, te patsenn t'mer ap ko tsiro, kay kova vella, kay kova čačo hi, hoy me t'menge penom." 
John14:30 Man hi bouder gar boud tsiro, te rakrap t'mentsa. O beng, kay hi o ray pral kay phoub, vella. Les hi kek zoor pral mande." 
John14:31 Me krau, hoy miro dad mange penas, te dikenn i menshe ap kay phoub, kay kamau les o djiyestar. Stenn pre, te djas menge!”" 
John15:1 “Me hom ko čačo drakengro rouk. Oun miro dad hi ko harho, kay boudrell an koy baar, kay i drakengre rouka tardo hi." 
John15:2 Hako zenelo kasht ap mande, hoy anell kek drake, činell yob tele. Oun ko kasht, hoy anell drake, krell yob djoudjo, te anell lo boudeder drake." 
John15:3 T'mer han djoudjo. Mire laba, hoy penom t'menge, kran t'men djoudjo." 
John15:4 Ačenn an mande oun me ačau an t'mende! Te ačenn t'mer gar an mande, vell kek lačo koova dran t'mende, yaake har ko kasht nay anell dran peste kek drake. Yob hounte ačell ap o rouk." 
John15:5 Me hom ko drakengro rouk. Oun t'mer han kol kashta. Koon ačell an mande oun me an leste, dran koleste vell boud lačepen. T'mer te han gar mantsa khetne, nay krenn t'mer či." 
John15:6 Koon ačell gar an mande, kova vell vin vitsedo, har kol kashta, kay tele činlo hi. Yon venn khetne rodedo oun an i yag čiddo, te rhačrenn le." 
John15:7 Te ačenn t'mer an mande oun krenn kova, hoy me penom, palle nay mangenna mandar, hoy kamenna. Oun kova lenn t'mer." 
John15:8 Te vell boud lačepen dran t'mende, vell miro dad sharedo. Oun t'mer venn mire mala." 
John15:9 Har miro dad man o djiyestar kamella, yaake kamau me t'men ninna o djiyestar. Ačenn an miro kamlepen!" 
John15:10 Te krenn t'mer kova, hoy me t'menge penom, ačenn t'mer an miro kamlepen yaake, har me kova krau, hoy miro dad mange penas. Oun me ačau an leskro kamlepen." 
John15:11 Kova penom me t'menge, te vell miri barht an t'mende yaake baro, har djal gar bareder." 
John15:12 Kova kamau t'mendar, te kamell yek o vavares o djiyestar yaake har me t'men kamau o djiyestar." 
John15:13 Kekes hi bareder kamlepen har kova, kay merell peskre malenge." 
John15:14 Te krenn t'mer, hoy me t'menge penom, han mire mala." 
John15:15 T'mer han mange bouder gar boudepangre. I boudepaskro djinell gar, hoy leskro ray krella. T'menge penom halauter, hoy shounom miro dadestar. Doleske han t'mer kanna mire mala." 
John15:16 T'mer rodan man gar vin. Me rodom t'men vin, te djivenn yaake, te vell dran t'maro djipen lačo koova, hoy ačella. Oun o dad dell t'men halauter, hoy mangenn lestar an miro lab.”" 
John15:17 “Krenn, hoy me t'menge penau: Kamau, te kamell yek o vavares o djiyestar!" 
John15:18 Te kamenn t'men i menshe ap kay phoub gar, ma bistrenn, kay yon kaman man vitar gar." 
John15:19 Te hans t'mer menshe kay phoubyatar, palle kamans le t'men. Yon kamenn kolen, kay hi yaake har yon. T'mer han gar kolendar. Me rodom t'men dran lende vin. Doleske kamenn le t'men gar." 
John15:20 Rikrenn an t'maro shero, hoy me t'menge penom: I boudepaskro hi gar bareder har leskro ray. Lan man yon palla, lenn yon t'men ninna palla. Te shounan yon ap kova, hoy me lenge penom, shounenn yon ninna, hoy t'mer lenge penenna." 
John15:21 T'mer han miro. Doleske hi yon čilačo ap t'mende. Yon prindjrenn koles gar, kay bičras man." 
John15:22 Te voms me gar pash lende, oun penoms lenge gar halauter, lans le kek doosh ap pende. Kanna nay penenn yon gar: Mer djinam gar, kay kova, hoy kram, čilačo hi." 
John15:23 Koon man gar kamella, kova kamell vitar gar miro dades." 
John15:24 Te kroms me gar glan lengre yaka ko baro koova, hoy nay kek vavar kras, vals len kek doosh. Kanna dikan yon kova. Oun ninna te dikan le les, hi le čilačo ap mande oun ap miro dadeste." 
John15:25 Yaake vas kova čačo, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: Yon hi čilačo ap mande, ninna te krom kek čilačepen ap lende." 
John15:26 Te hom pash o dadeste, palle bičrau t'menge o rakepaskres, kay vella ap t'mari rig. Kova hi o Debleskro Dourho. An leste hi o čačepen. Yob vella o dadestar, oun penell o čačepen pral mande." 
John15:27 Ninna t'mer, kay hans o tselo tsiro pash mande, penenn i menshenge mandar, hoy t'mer dikan oun shounan.”" 
John16:1 “Kova halauter penom me ap t'mende, te denn t'mer gar t'maro patsepen ap mande pre." 
John16:2 Yon krenn t'men pale-čiddo. Oun ko tsiro vella, kay denn yon t'men moulo oun penenn: O Devel kamas kova yaake." 
John16:3 Yon prindjrenn o dades gar oun man vitar gar. Doleske krenn yon kova. 
John16:4 Te vell ko tsiro, hounte djinenn t'mer, kay kova yaake vella, har me les t'menge penom. Me penom t'menge kova gar, har homs pash t'mende. Kanna penau t'menge kova." 
John16:5 Kanna djau me pash koleste, kay bičras man. Oun kek t'mendar poučell mandar: Kay djah tou?" 
John16:6 Kova, hoy t'menge penom, doukell t'men an o dji." 
John16:7 Patsenn man: Hi mishto t'menge, te djap mange. Te djau me gar, nay vell ko rakepaskro gar pash t'mende, kay vella ap t'mari rig. Me te djau mange, bičrau les pash t'mende." 
John16:8 Yob te vella, palle krell yob i menshenge i yaka pre pral lengri doosh, pral o Debleskro čačepen oun pral o Debleskri rholi, hoy vella pral kay phoub." 
John16:9 Lengri doosh hi, kay patsenn le gar ap mande." 
John16:10 O Debleskro čačepen dikenn le ap kova, kay me djau pash o dadeste, oun t'mer dikenn man bouder gar." 
John16:11 Kay o Debleskri rholi pral kay phoub vella, dikenn le ap kova, kay i phagi pral o rayeste pral kay phoub vi-rakedo hi." 
John16:12 Me kamoms t'menge yaake boud te penell. T'mer hayvenn nay kova kanna gar. 
John16:13 Te vell o Debleskro Dourho, kay o čačepen an leste hi, sikrell lo t'mende o tselo čačepen. Yob rakrell gar dran peste. Hoy yob shounella, kova rakrell yob. Oun hoy vella, penell yob t'menge glan-vi." 
John16:14 Yob sharell man. Halauter, hoy yob penell t'menge, vell mandar." 
John16:15 Halauter, hoy o dades hi, hi ninna miro. Doleske nay penau me: Lauter, hoy yob penell t'menge, vell mandar." 
John16:16 Pal i tikno tsiro dikenn man bouder gar. Oun pale pal i tikno tsiro dikenn man t'mer pale.” 
John16:17 “Hoy penell lo,” poučan leskre mala yek o vavarestar, “te penell lo ap mende: Pal i tikno tsiro dikenn man bouder gar; oun pale pal i tikno tsiro dikenn man t'mer pale; oun me djau pash o dadeste?" 
John16:18 Hoy hi kova, te penell lo: I tikno tsiro? Mer djinah gar, hoy yob rakrella.”" 
John16:19 O Yezous hayvas lendar, kay kaman le lestar kova te poučell, oun yob penas ap lende: “Kamenn t'mer te djinell, hoy kova hi, kay penom: Pal i tikno tsiro dikenn man bouder gar; oun pale pal i tikno tsiro dikenn man t'mer?" 
John16:20 Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Vell i tsiro, kay t'mer rovenna, oun denn i vasta pral o shero khetne. Oun i menshe, kay gar ap mande patsenna, hi barhtelo. Ninna te rovell t'maro dji ap ko dives, djinenn: T'maro ropen vell t'mendar krik lino, oun t'mer venna barhtelo." 
John16:21 I djouvel, kay lell i ternepen, kolat hi douka. Te hi ko ternepen koy, bistrell li kol douka. Yaake bari hi lakri barht, kay yoy las i ternepen." 
John16:22 Kanna rovell t'maro dji. Oun me penau t'menge kanna: Me vau pale pash t'mende. Oun t'mer venn barhtelo. Oun koy barht nay lell t'mendar kek krik. 
John16:23 Ap ko dives, poučenn t'mer mandar či. Čačepah, me penau t'menge: Te mangenn t'mer miro dadestar čomone an miro lab, kova dell yob t'men." 
John16:24 Bis kanna mangan t'mer či an miro lab. Mangenn oun yob dell t'men, te vell t'mari barht yaake bari, bareder djal gar!" 
John16:25 Kova penom me t'menge gar an o mouy. O dives vella, kay me rikrau bouder či pale. Palle rakrau t'mentsa miro dadestar yaake, kay hayvenna halauter." 
John16:26 Ap ko dives mangenn t'mer o dades an miro lab. Me penau gar, kay me mangau miro dades t'menge." 
John16:27 Miro dad kamell t'men ninna yaake har me kamau t'men. T'mer kamenn man o djiyestar oun patsenna, kay me o Deblestar vom. Doleske kamell t'men miro dad ninna o djiyestar." 
John16:28 Me vom o dadestar, oun vom ap kay phoub. Oun me moukau pale kay phoub, oun djau pash miro dadeste.”" 
John16:29 Koy penan leskre mala ap leste: “Kanna rakreh tou yaake, kay hayvah kova. Tou rikreh bouder či pale." 
John16:30 Kanna djinah mer, kay tou halauter djineh. Tou djineh glan-vi, hoy i menshe kamenn toutar te poučell. Doleske patsah mer, kay tou o Deblestar veh.”" 
John16:31 “Kanna patsenn t'mer?” penas o Yezous. 
John16:32 “Dikenn, ko tsiro vella oun hi koy, kay nashenn t'mer halauter mandar. Hakeno djal pale khere. Oun man moukenn t'mer kokres. Ninna te moukenn man, hom me gar kokres. O dad hi pash mande." 
John16:33 Kova lauter penom t'menge, te vell t'men i bari barht an o dji pral kova, kay han mire. Kate ap kay phoub hi t'men daar. Ma darenn! Me hom zorleder har halauter ap kay phoub.”" 
John17:1 Pal kol laba dikas o Yezous pre an o bolepen oun penas: “Tata, o tsiro hi kay. Sike, havo raylepen oun havi zoor tou tiro čaveste dal, te sikrell yob ninna tiro raylepen oun tiri zoor!" 
John17:2 Tou dal les i zoor pral i tsele menshende, te dell yob lauteren, kay tou les dal, o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
John17:3 Kova hi ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella: Te prindjrenn yon tout, kay tou hal o čačo Devel, oun te prindjrenn yon o Yezous Kristes, koles tou bičral ap kay phoub." 
John17:4 Me sikrom kol menshen tiro raylepen oun tiri zoor ap i phoub. Oun me krom halauter, hoy tou mange penal." 
John17:5 Oun kanna, tata, de man ko raylepen oun koy zoor, hoy his man pash toute, har o bolepen oun i phoub gar koy his!" 
John17:6 Tou dal menshen dran kay phoub gole oun dal len mande. Kolende sikrom, koon tou hal. Yon his tiro oun tou dal len mande. Oun yon rikran pen ap tiro lab." 
John17:7 Yon djinenna kanna, kay halauter, hoy tou man dal, čačepah toutar vell." 
John17:8 Hoy tou mange penal, penom me lenge doureder. Oun yon lan mire laba pre oun hayvan, kay me čačepah toutar vom. Oun yon patsan, kay tou man bičral." 
John17:9 Kolenge mangau me. Me mangau gar kol vavar menshenge ap kay phoub. Me mangau kolenge, kay tou man dal. Yon hi tire." 
John17:10 Halauter, hoy miro hi, hi ninna tiro. Oun hoy tiro hi, hi ninna miro. Ap lende vell miro raylepen oun miri zoor diklo." 
John17:11 An i tikno tsiro hom bouder gar ap kay phoub. Me vau pash toute. Yon hi ap kay phoub. Miro dad, tou hal o baro Devel, rike len an tire vasta, te ačenn yon pash toute, te venn yon yek, yaake har mer ham!" 
John17:12 Yaake rah har me pash lende homs, dom garda ap lende an tiri zoor, kay tou man dal. Me rikrom len, te djan yon gar krik toutar. Kek lendar djas nashedo. Yek kokres djas nashedo, yaake te vas čačo, hoy lestar činlo vas." 
John17:13 Kanna vau me pash toute. Kova rakrau lauter yaake rah, har hom me ap kay phoub, te vell koy barht an lengre djia yaake bari, bareder djal gar." 
John17:14 Me penom lenge tire laba. Yon hi gar kay phoubyatar, yaake har me hom vitar gar kay phoubyatar. Doleske hi i menshe ap kay phoub rhoyemen ap lende." 
John17:15 Me mangau toutar gar, te less len tou dran kay phoub vin. Me mangau tout, te rikress tou o benges lendar pale." 
John17:16 Yon hi gar kay phoubyatar, yaake har me hom vitar gar kay phoubyatar." 
John17:17 Mouk len tiro čačepen te dikell, te djivenn le pengro tselo djipen touke kokres! Tiro lab hi o čačepen." 
John17:18 Me bičrau len pash i menshende, yaake har tou man pash i menshende bičral." 
John17:19 Me dau tout miro tselo djipen. Kova krau lenge, te venn yon ninna tire an o čačepen." 
John17:20 Me mangau gar lenge kokres. Me mangau ninna kol menshenge, kay shounenna, hoy yon mandar penenna, oun dran kova ap mande patsenna." 
John17:21 Me mangau toutar, te venn le halauter yek, yaake har tou, tata, an mande hal, oun me an toute hom. Yaake te venn yon yek an mende, te patsenn i menshe, kay tou man bičral." 
John17:22 Me dom len ko raylepen oun koy zoor, hoy tou man dal, te venn yon yek, yaake har mer yek ham." 
John17:23 Me djivau an lende. Oun tou djiveh an mande. Yaake te venn yon yek. Oun i menshe dikenna, kay tou man bičral, oun kay tou len yaake kameh, har tou man kameh." 
John17:24 Tata, me kamau, te venn kolla, kay tou man dal, pash mande, kote, kay me hom, te dikenn le miro raylepen oun miri zoor, hoy tou man dal. Tou kamal man o djiyestar, har o bolepen oun i phoub gar koy his." 
John17:25 Tata, tou hal an o čačepen tardo! I menshe ap kay phoub prindjrenn tout gar. Me prindjrau tout. Oun kalla hayvan, kay tou man bičral." 
John17:26 Me sikrom lende, koon tou hal. Kova krau me doureder, te vell tiro kamlepen, hoy hi tout mange, ninna an lende. Yaake djivau me an lende.”" 
John18:1 Har o Yezous kova penas, djas yob peskre malentsa vin. Oun yon djan vergel ko pani, hoy kharella Kidron. Koy his i baar. Koy dren djas o Yezous peskre malentsa." 
John18:2 Kote his lo boud kope peskre malentsa. Doleske prindjras ninna o Youdas, ko phoukepaskro, koy baar." 
John18:3 Oun o Youdas djas kote. Leha van kol lourde oun kliste, kolen i bare rashaya oun i Farisarya bičran. Len his rhare oun kashta oun hidjran momlia oun yag." 
John18:4 O Yezous djinas halauter, hoy ap leste vella oun djas vin pash lende oun poučas lendar: “Kones rodenn t'mer?”" 
John18:5 “O Yezouses dran Nazaret,” penan yon ap leste. “Me hom kova!” penas o Yezous. O Youdas, ko phoukepaskro, his pash lende tardo." 
John18:6 Har o Yezous ap lende penas “Me hom kova,” djan yon i kotar pale oun peran ap i phoub." 
John18:7 Pale poučas o Yezous lendar: “Kones rodenn t'mer?” “O Yezouses dran Nazaret,” penan yon." 
John18:8 “Me penom t'menge, kay me kova hom,” penas o Yezous. “Te hom me kova, koles t'mer rodenna, palle moukenn kol vavaren te djal.”" 
John18:9 Kova penas o Yezous, te vell čačo, hoy yob glan-vi penas: “Tata, me nashrom kekes kolendar, kay tou man dal.”" 
John18:10 O Simon Petro, koles his i rharo pash peste. Yob las peskro rharo, oun das yek klisteske o čačo kand tele. Kova kharas Malko oun his i klisto, kay boudras o baro rashayeske." 
John18:11 Koy penas o Yezous ap o Petreste: “Čip tiro rharo pale! Djap me gar ko drom, kay miro dad kamell, te djap les, ninna te venn kote bare douka ap mande?”" 
John18:12 Oun i lourde pengro pralstuneha oun i biboldengre kliste tapran o Yezouses oun pandan les. 
John18:13 Oun anan les pash o Hannas. Kova his o dad o Kayafeskri romyatar. O Kayafas his an kava bersh baro rashay. 
John18:14 Yob his kova, kay penas i biboldenge: “Vals feteder menge, te merals yek i tsele menshenge.”" 
John18:15 O Petro oun i vavar o Yezouseskre malendar djan o Yezouseske palla, har yob an o kheer o baro rashayestar anlo vas. O baro rashay prindjras ko vavar males. Doleske djas nay yob o Yezouseha an ko kheer." 
John18:16 O Petro ačas vin glan o voudar tardo. Koy vas ko vavar pale, kova, kay his o baro rashayestar prindjedo, oun rakras koy djouvyah, kay das garda glan o voudar, oun las o Petres dren." 
John18:17 Koy djouvel, kay das glan o voudar garda, poučas o Petrestar: “Hal tou gar yek kol malendar ko morshestar koy?” “Na-a, me gar!” penas yob." 
John18:18 Koy his boudepangre oun kliste tardo, kay kran i yag. Lenge his shila oun yon tatsran pen. O Petro his ninna pash lende tardo, te tatsrell lo pes." 
John18:19 Kanna poučas o baro rashay o Yezouses vin pral leskre malende oun pral kova, hoy yob i menshenge penas." 
John18:20 O Yezous penas ap leste: “Me rakrom glan i tsele menshende yaake, kay hakeno kova nay shounas. Hako tsiro rakrom an i biboldengri kangri oun an o Debleskro baro kheer, kay i tsele bibolde khetne van. Me penom či čorrhanes." 
John18:21 Hoske poučeh tou mandar? Pouč kolendar, kay shounan man. Yon djinenna, hoy me penom!”" 
John18:22 Har yob kova penas, das yek kol biboldengro klistendar, kay koy pashel tardo his, o Yezouses an o mouy oun penas: “Har nay rakreh tou yaake o baro rashayeha?”" 
John18:23 Koy penas o Yezous ap leste: “Nay peneh tou, kay me čilačo koova rakrom? Te penom me lauter, hoy čačo hi, hoske dal tou man?”" 
John18:24 O Hannas anas les pandlo pash ko baro rashayeste Kayafas. 
John18:25 O Petro his koy tardo oun tatsras pes. Koy penan le ap leste: “Hal tou gar yek leskre malendar?” Yob das bourhoste oun penas: “Me hom kova gar.” 
John18:26 “Dikom me tout gar an i baar pash leste?” penas yek klisto, kay boudrell ko baro rashayeske. Kava klisto his yek koleskre menshendar, koleske o Petro o kand tele das." 
John18:27 Pale das o Petro bourhoste, oun penas: “Me homs gar pash leste.” Kanna das o bashno gole." 
John18:28 Kanna anan le o Yezouses dran o Kayafeskro kheer vin, oun anan les an o baro kheer o themeskro rayestar, kay i Remari his. His taysarlake. I bibolde djan gar leha an ko baro kheer dren, te venn le gar pale-čiddo. Yon kaman te nay rhan le ko rhapen ap ko baro dives, kay kharella Passa." 
John18:29 O themeskro ray, – leskro lab his Pilato – djas pash lende vin oun poučas lendar: “Havo čilačo koova kras yob?”" 
John18:30 Yon penan ap leste: “Te vals kava morsh gar čilačo, anams les gar pash toute.”" 
John18:31 “Ake, lenn les oun denn les t'mer i phagi pal o biboldengro čačepen!” penas o Pilato ap lende. “Mer nay marah kekes pal o Remaryengro čačepen,” penan kol bibolde." 
John18:32 Yaake vas kova čačo, hoy o Yezous pral peskro merepen glan-vi penas." 
John18:33 O Pilato djas pale an peskro kheer, oun moukas o Yezouses dren te anell, oun poučas lestar: “Hal tou o baro ray pral i biboldende?”" 
John18:34 “Peneh tou kova dran toute vin? Penan kova touke vavar mandar?” poučas o Yezous. 
John18:35 “Hom me i biboldo?” penas o Pilato. “Tire menshe oun i bare rashaya dan tout an mire vasta. Hoy kral tou?” 
John18:36 Koy penas o Yezous: “Miro them oun i menshe, kolengro ray me hom hi gar kay phoubyatar. Te vals miro them kay phoubyatar, oun ninna i menshe, kolengro ray me hom, palle kourans pen mire boudepangre i biboldentsa, te perap me gar an kolengre vasta. Me penau touke: Miro them oun mire menshe, kolengro ray me hom, hi gar kay phoubyatar.”" 
John18:37 Poučas o Pilato lestar: “Hal tou čačepah i baro ray?” Penas o Yezous: “Ava, hi yaake har tou penal. Me hom i baro ray. Me vom boldo ap kay phoub, te penap o čačepen. Koon an o čačepen tardo hi, kova shounell ap mande.”" 
John18:38 “Hoy hi o čačepen?” poučas o Pilato lestar. Oun har yob kova penas, djas lo pale vin pash i biboldende oun penas ap lende: “Me hatsau kek doosh ap leste." 
John18:39 Shounenn, pash t'mende vell hako bersh ap kol bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa, i stildo dran o stilepen mouklo. Kamenn t'mer, te moukap o baro rayes pral i biboldende te djal?”" 
John18:40 Yon dan pale gole: “Gar koles! Mer kamah, te moukess o Barabes dran o stilepen vin!” Kova his i marepaskro." 
John19:1 Koy las o Pilato o Yezouses, oun moukas les i čoupniyah te dell." 
John19:2 I lourde pandan soubyengre kashta khetne oun čivan len leske ap o shero yaake, har i baro ray hidjrell shereskro sonakay ap peskro shero. Oun yon čivan leske i loli rayeskri plaashka trouyel." 
John19:3 Oun van glan leste oun penan: “Sharedo vess tou, baro ray pral i biboldende!” Oun yon dan les an o mouy." 
John19:4 Oun pale djas o Pilato pash i biboldende vin, oun penas ap lende: “Me anau les pash t'mende vin, te dikenn t'mer, kay hatsau kek doosh ap leste.”" 
John19:5 Oun o Yezous vas vin. Oun ap leskro shero his i pandle soubyengre kashta, oun koy loli kouč plaashka his ap leste. Oun o Pilato penas ap lende: “Dikenn, havo mensho hi lo!”" 
John19:6 Har kol bare rashaya oun kol kliste o Yezouses dikan, dan yon gole: “De les ap o troushel! De les ap o troushel!” “Lenn t'mer les,” penas o Pilato, “oun denn les ap o troushel! Me hatsau kek doosh ap leste.”" 
John19:7 “Pal maro biboldengro čačepen hounte vell lo moulo dino,” penan i bibolde ap o Pilato. “Yob penas, kay hi lo o Debleskro čavo.”" 
John19:8 Har o Pilato kova shounas, vas i bari daar ap leste." 
John19:9 Yob djas pale an peskro kheer oun poučas o Yezousestar: “Kay veh tou?” O Yezous penas či koy pre. 
John19:10 Koy poučas o Pilato lestar: “Rakreh tou mantsa gar? Djineh tou gar, kay kova an mire vasta hi, te moukap tout te djal. Oun te dap tout ap o troushel, hi ninna an mire vasta?”" 
John19:11 Penas o Yezous: “Tout vals kek zoor pral mande, te dals tout o Devel koya gar. Doleske hi koles, kay das man an tire vasta, bareder doosh har tout.”" 
John19:12 Koy kamas o Pilato o Yezouses moukell te djal. Kol bibolde dan gole: “Te moukeh tou koles te djal, hal tou kek maal o baro rayestar an o foro Rom! Hakeno, koon krell pes har te vell yob i baro ray, kova hadell pes pral leste.”" 
John19:13 Har o Pilato kol laba shounas, anas yob o Yezouses vin oun beshas pes ap ko čačepaskro beshepaskro, hoy kharella Barrengri Phoub. Ap o biboldengro rakepen kharella kova Gabbata." 
John19:14 His yaake deesh-te-douyenge, yek dives glan kol bare divessa, kay kharenna Passa. Oun o Pilato penas ap kol biboldende: “Dikenn, kova hi t'maro baro ray!”" 
John19:15 Yon dan gole: “Mare les! Mare les, oun de les ap o troushel!” Koy poučas o Pilato lendar: “Kamenn t'mer te dap t'maro baro rayes ap o troushel?” “Men hi kek vavar ray har o baro ray an o foro Rom kokres,” penan kol bare rashaya." 
John19:16 Kanna das yob o Yezouses an lengre vasta, te denn le les ap o troushel. Oun o Yezous vas krik anlo." 
John19:17 Oun yob hidjras peskro troushel, oun djas dran ko foro vin ap ko kotar them, hoy kharella mouleskro shero. Kova kharella ap o biboldengro rakepen Golgata." 
John19:18 Kote dan le les ap o troushel, oun douy vavar morsha ninna. Ko yekeskro troushel his čačes lestar, ko vavareskro troushel his serves lestar. Oun o Yezous his mank lende." 
John19:19 O Pilato činas ap i kotar kasht: O Yezous dran Nazaret, o baro ray pral i biboldende. Ko kotar kasht vas pral ap o troushel dino." 
John19:20 Kova, hoy koy pre činlo hi, draveran boud bibolde. Ko kotar them, kay dan le o Yezouses ap o troushel, his gar dour o forestar čiddo. Oun kol laba his činlo ap hebretikes, latayntikes, oun grichtikes." 
John19:21 Koy penan kol bare rashaya ap o Pilateste: “Ma čin: O baro ray pral i biboldende! Čin, kay yob penas: Me hom o baro ray pral i biboldende!”" 
John19:22 “Kova ačell yaake, har me kova činom!” penas o Pilato." 
John19:23 Kol lourde, kay o Yezouses ap o troushel dan, lan leskre ripya, oun kran dran lende star kotya. Oun hakeno las i kotar. Ko telstouno ripen his gar khetne sido. Kova his an yek kotar." 
John19:24 Koy penan yon yek ap o vavareste: “Mer moukah ko ripen yaake, har kova hi. Mer khelah, koon les lella.” Yaake vas kova čačo, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: Hakeno las i kotar mire ripyendar. Oun koon miro telstouno ripen lella, khelan yon vin. Yaake kran i lourde." 
John19:25 Tel ko troushel, kay o Yezous pre dino his, his leskri day oun kolakri pheen tardo. Ninna i Maria, kolakro rom o Kleopas hi, oun i Maria Magdalena his koy tardo." 
John19:26 Har o Yezous peskri dat dikas oun pash late peskro males, koles, kay yob o djiyestar kamas, penas lo ap peskri date: “Romniya, dik, kova hi kanna tiro čavo!”" 
John19:27 Ap peskro maleste penas lo: “Dik, koya hi kanna tiri day!” Koy las ko maal lat pash peste an peskro kheer." 
John19:28 Pal kova, har o Yezous djinas, kay yob halauter kras, penas lo: “Man hi troush!” Kova penas yob, te vell kova čačo, hoy an o Debleskro lab glan-vi penlo vas." 
John19:29 Koy his i khoro tardo. Kova his pherdo shoutli mool. Oun yon lan čomone har i kotar than, kran les pherdo shoutli mool, čivan kova ap i baro kasht, hoy kharella Hysop, oun rikran leske kova glan o mouy." 
John19:30 Har piyas o Yezous koy shoutli mool, penas lo: “Me krom lauter, hoy hounte krom.” Oun yob čivas peskro shero glan tele, oun meras." 
John19:31 His o dives glan o Debleskro dives. Ko Debleskro dives his i baro dives. Doleske kaman i pralstoune bibolde gar, te ačenn i moule ap ko Debleskro dives ap o troushel. Oun yon mangan o Pilatestar, te venn i herya kolendar phagedo, kay ap o troushel dino van, te merenn le sikeder. I bibolde kaman, te lenn le len sik tele." 
John19:32 Koy van i lourde oun phagan i herya kol douy vavarendar, kay kote ap i troushel dino van." 
John19:33 Har yon pash o Yezouseste van oun dikan, kay yob moulo hi, phagan yon leskre herya gar." 
John19:34 Yek kol lourdendar das les peskro rhareha an i rig čourye. Koy vas pani oun rat vin. 
John19:35 Oun kova, kay dikas kova halauter, penas i vavarenge, hoy yob dikas. Oun kova, hoy yob penas, hi čačo. Oun yob djinella, kay yob o čačepen penella, te patsenn t'mer ninna." 
John19:36 Kova vas halauter yaake, har an o Debleskro lab glan-vi penlo vas: Kek kokalo vas leske phagedo," 
John19:37 oun ninna: Yon dikenn koles, kay dan le an i rig čourye." 
John19:38 Pal kova djas o Yosef, kova, kay dran o foro Arimatia his, pash o Pilateste, oun mangas lestar, te dell yob les o moulo Yezouses. O Yosef patsas ap o Yezouseste čorrhanes i daryatar i pralstoune biboldendar. Oun o Pilato penas, kay yob o Yezouses o troushelestar nay tele lella. Oun yaake djas yob pash o troushel, oun las les tele." 
John19:39 Ninna o Nikodemus, kova, kay vas yek kopo rati pash o Yezouseste, vas kote oun anas yaake triyanda kilo kouč djet, kerdo dran myrrhe oun dran Aloe." 
John19:40 Oun yon lan o moulo Yezouses oun pandan les an layntikre kotya, kay čivan le ko kouč djet dren, hoy soungella mishto, yaake har i bibolde kova krenna." 
John19:41 Kote, kay o Yezous ap o troushel dino vas, his i baar. An koy baar his i nevo moulengro kheer. Koy his kek mensho dren čiddo." 
John19:42 Oun har dikan le, kay ko moulengro kheer gar dour hi, čivan le kote o Yezouses sik dren. Len his kek tsiro. O Debleskro dives vals sik." 
John20:1 Sik taysarlake, pal o Debleskro dives, har gomme rati his, vas i Maria Magdalena pash ko moulengro kheer, oun dikas, kay ko bar bouder gar glan o voudar hi." 
John20:2 Koy nashas yoy pash o Simon Petreste oun pash ko vavareste kol deesh-te-douyendar, koles, kay kamas o Yezous o djiyestar, oun penas ap lende: “Yon lan o rayes dran ko moulengro kheer vin. Oun mer djinah gar, kay yon les čivan.”" 
John20:3 Koy djas o Petro oun ko vavar pash ko moulengro kheer. 
John20:4 Kol douy nashan khetne. Ko vavar nashas sikeder har o Petro. Yaake vas yob glan leste pash o moulengro kheer," 
John20:5 dikas koy dren, oun dikas kol layntikre kotya kote čiddo. Yob djas gar dren." 
John20:6 Pal leste vas o Simon Petro oun djas an ko moulengro kheer dren, oun dikas kol layntikre kotya kote čiddo." 
John20:7 Ko diklo, kay troul o Yezouseskro shero pandlo his, his gar pash kol vavar layntikre kotya čiddo. Kova his khetne pandlo, oun his kokres čiddo." 
John20:8 Kanna djas ninna ko vavar o Yezouseskre malendar dren, kay glan leste pash ko moulengro kheer vas. Oun yob dikas oun patsas." 
John20:9 Yon hayvan gar, hoy an o Debleskro lab tardo hi, kay yob hounte stella i moulendar pre." 
John20:10 Pal kova djan kol douy pale khere. 
John20:11 I Maria his vin glan o moulengro kheer tardo oun rovas. Har yoy yaake rovas, dikas li an o moulengro kheer dren." 
John20:12 Kote, kay o Yezous čiddo his, dikas yoy douy bolepangren an parne ripya beshdo. Ko yek his kote, kay leskro shero čiddo his, oun ko vavar, kay leskre herya his." 
John20:13 “Hoske roveh tou, romniya?” poučan kol bolepangre i Mariatar. “Yon lan miro rayes krik,” penas li, “oun me djinau gar, kay yon les čivan.”" 
John20:14 Oun har yoy kova penas, rissras pes li trouyel, oun dikas o Yezouses. Yob his glan late tardo, oun yoy prindjras les gar."
