John20:15 Koy penas o Yezous ap late: “Romniya, hoske roveh tou? Kones rodeh tou?” I Maria patsas: Yob hi kova, kay boudrell an i baar. Doleske penas li: “Romeha, te anal tou les krik, pen mange, kay tou les čival, te djap koy, oun lap les pale!”" 
John20:16 “Maria!” penas o Yezous. Koy rissras pes li trouyel, oun penas ap hebretikes: “Rabouni!” Kova kharella Sikepaskro." 
John20:17 Penas o Yezous ap late: “Ma tape ap mande! Me djom gomme gar pash o dadeste pale. Dja pash mire phralende oun pen lenge: Me djau pash miro dadeste oun pash t'maro dadeste oun pash miro Debleste oun pash t'maro Debleste.” 
John20:18 Koy djas i Maria Magdalena pash o Yezouseskre malende, oun penas lenge: “Me dikom maro rayes!” Oun yoy penas lenge, hoy yob lake penas." 
John20:19 Har rati his ap kava dives, – kova his i kourko – his o Yezouseskre mala khetne. I daryatar kol biboldendar his lengro voudar klidedo. Ap yek kopo vas o Yezous dren, oun djas mashkral lende, oun penas ap lende: “O Debleskri barht t'mentsa!”" 
John20:20 Har yob kova penas, sikras yob lende peskre vasta, oun peskri rig. Koy van o Yezouseskre mala barhtelo, kay dikan le pengro rayes." 
John20:21 Pale penas o Yezous ap lende: “O Debleskri barht t'mentsa! Har miro dad man bičras, yaake bičrau me t'men.”" 
John20:22 Oun har yob kova penas, phourdas yob ap lende, oun penas: “Lenn o Debleskro Dourho!" 
John20:23 Ap koneste t'mer penenna: Tiri doosh hi krik lino, koleske vell li krik lino. Oun ap koneste t'mer penenna: Tiri doosh ačell ap toute, ap koleste ačell li.”" 
John20:24 O Thomas, yek kol deesh-te-douyendar, koles dan le ninna Didimo gole, his gar koy pashel, har o Yezous pash lende vas." 
John20:25 Ap leste penan i vavar kol deesh-te-douyendar: “Mer dikam maro rayes!” Yob penas ap lende: “Te dikau me gar leskre vasta, kay saster dren dino vas, oun te čivau me gar miro goushto koy dren oun miro vast an leskri rig, patsau me kova gar.”" 
John20:26 Oun pal orhta divessa his o Yezouseskre mala pale khetne an ko kheer. Oun o voudar his klidedo. Kava kopo his o Thomas pash lende. Ap yek kopo his o Yezous mashkral lende tardo, oun penas: “O Debleskri barht t'mentsa!”" 
John20:27 Pal kova penas yob ap o Thomas: “Čip tiro goushto ap mire vasta, oun čip tiro vast an miri rig. Ač gar har yek, kay patsell gar. Pats kanna!”" 
John20:28 Koy penas o Thomas ap leste: “Miro ray oun miro Devel!” 
John20:29 “Kanna, kay dikal man, patseh tou,” penas o Yezous. “Barhtele hi kolla, kay patsenna, ninna te dikenn le man gar.”" 
John20:30 Boud vavar baro koova kras o Yezous an o Debleskri zoor glan peskre malende, kay gar an kava liil činlo hi." 
John20:31 Kava vas činlo, te patsenn t'mer, kay o Yezous ko baro ray hi, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. Yob hi o Debleskro čavo. Oun te patsenn ap leste, lenn t'mer o čačo djipen lestar." 
John21:1 Pal kova moukas pes o Yezous glan peskre malende pale te dikell, har yon pash o baro pani Tiberias his. Oun kova vas yaake:" 
John21:2 O Simon Petro oun o Thomas, kova, kay dan le les Didimo gole, oun o Natanael dran o gab Kana an o them Galilea, oun kol Zebedeskre čave oun vavar douy o Yezouseskre malendar his koy khetne." 
John21:3 Oun o Simon Petro penas ap lende: “Me djau te mačrell.” “Mer kamah touha te djal,” penan kol vavar. Yon djan vin oun djan an o bero dren. Oun koy rati tapran le či." 
John21:4 Sik taysarlake his o Yezous pash o pani tardo, oun leskre mala prindjran les gar." 
John21:5 Oun o Yezous poučas lendar: “Tapran t'mer či?” “Na-a,” penan le." 
John21:6 Penas o Yezous: “Vitsrenn t'mare mačengre gone čačes vin pash o bero! Oun t'mer taprenna i mače.” Koy vitsran yon i mačengre gone vin, oun tapran yaake boud mače, kay tserdan le nay i mačengre gone bouder gar dran o pani vin." 
John21:7 Koy penas ko yek kol deesh-te-douyendar, koles o Yezous o djiyestar kamas, ap o Petreste: “Kova hi maro ray.” Har o Simon Petro kova shounas, rivas lo peskro pralstouno ripen an, hoy rivas lo vin, oun vitsras pes an o pani, te vell lo sikeder ap o them." 
John21:8 Kol vavar mala van an ko bero, oun tserdan ko mačengro gono pal pende. Yon his gar dour o themestar, nay vell sheel metarya." 
John21:9 Har yon dran o bero djan, dikan le i yag. Koy his pekle mače pre. Maro his ninna koy." 
John21:10 Oun o Yezous penas ap lende: “Anenn kol mačendar, kay t'mer kanna tapran!”" 
John21:11 Koy djas o Simon Petro pale an o pani dren, oun tserdas ko mačengro gono ap o them. Koy his sheel-te-panč-deesh-te-triin (153) bare mače dren. Ninna te his yaake boud mače koy dren, djas o mačengro gono gar paash." 
John21:12 “Avenn oun rhan!” penas o Yezous ap lende. Kek lendar poučas lestar: Koon hal tou? Halauter djinan, kay yob lengro ray hi." 
John21:13 O Yezous vas pash lende, las ko maro, oun das les lende. Yaake kras yob ninna kol mačentsa." 
John21:14 Kova his o triinto kopo, kay moukas pes o Yezous glan peskre malende te dikell pal kova, har yob i moulendar djido vas." 
John21:15 Pal o rhapen penas o Yezous ap o Simon Petreste: “Simon, tou o Yohanneskro čavo, kameh tou man boudeder har kal tsele vavar man kamenna?” “Ava, ray!” penas yob ap leste. “Tou djineh, kay me kamau tout o djiyestar.” “De mire tikne bakren te rhal!” penas o Yezous." 
John21:16 I douyto kopo poučas o Yezous lestar: “Simon, tou, o Yohanneskro čavo, kameh tou man o djiyestar?” “Ava, ray!” penas yob. “Tou djineh, kay me kamau tout o djiyestar.” “De garda ap mire bakre!” penas o Yezous ap leste." 
John21:17 O Yezous poučas lestar o triinto kopo: “Simon, tou, o Yohanneskro čavo, kameh tou man o djiyestar?” Koy vas o Petreske ropaske pral kova, kay yob triin kope poučas: Kameh tou man o djiyestar? Oun yob penas: “Ray, tou djineh halauter. Tou djineh, kay me tout kamau o djiyestar.” Penas o Yezous: “De mire bakren te rhal!" 
John21:18 Čačepah, me penau touke: Har tou terno hals, pandal tou tiri dori kokres troul tiro ripen, oun djal kote, kay tou kamal. Te val tou phouro, rikreh tou tire vasta glan toute, oun i vavar pandell tire vasta khetne, oun anell tout kote, kay tou gar kameh te djal.”" 
John21:19 Yaake kamas o Yezous o Petreste te sikrell, har yob merella oun an peskro merepen o Debles bares oun rayles krella. Pal kova penas o Yezous ap leste: “Am mantsa!”" 
John21:20 O Petro rissras pes trouyel, oun dikas koles kol deesh-te-douyendar, kay o Yezous les o djiyestar kamas. Yob his kova, kay čivas pes ap o Yezouseskro beč an koy rati, har yon khetne rhan, oun poučas lestar: “Ray, koon mendar phoukrella ap toute?”" 
John21:21 Har o Petro koles dikas, poučas yob o Yezousestar: “Ray, hoy vell dran koleste?”" 
John21:22 Penas o Yezous ap leste: “Te kamau me, te ačell yob djido, bis te vau pale, palle hi kova gar tiro koova. Am tou mantsa!”" 
John21:23 Yaake vas mashkral kol patslende penlo: Kova merella gar. O Yezous penas gar, kay kova gar merella. Yob penas: “Te kamau me, te ačell yob djido, bis te vau pale, palle hi kova gar tiro koova!”" 
John21:24 Kava maal o Yezousestar hi kova, kay nay penell, kay kova lauter čačo hi. Yob dikas kova oun činas les an kava liil. Oun mer djinah, kay kova, hoy yob penas, čačo hi." 
John21:25 Hi ninna boud vavar koova, hoy o Yezous kras. Te vals kova lauter an i lila činlo, yek pal o vavar, vals i phoub gar baro doha kol tsele pesse lilenge, patsau me." 
Acts1:1 Lačo Theofilo, an miro ersto liil činom touke lauter, hoy o Yezous kras, oun i menshende sikras," 
Acts1:2 yaake rah har yob gomme gar an o bolepen djas. Glan kova, kay djas lo an o bolepen, rakras lo kolentsa, kolen yob vin rodas, te venn le leskre bičepangre, oun penas lenge an i zoor, hoy das les o Debleskro Dourho, hoy yon hounte krenna." 
Acts1:3 Pal peskro merepen, djivas lo star-deesh (40) divessa kate ap kay phoub, oun moukas pes lendar te dikell boud kope. Oun čačepah yon dikan, kay hi yob djido. Oun yob rakras lentsa pral o tsiro, kay hi o Devel o ray pral i tsele menshende." 
Acts1:4 Har yob lentsa khetne his, penas yob lenge zoreles: “Ačenn an o foro Yerusalem, oun djan gar krik, yaake rah har bičras miro dad an o bolepen gomme gar peskro Dourho ap t'mende, yaake har penom les t'menge." 
Acts1:5 Har o Yohanni taufras t'men, čivas lo t'men an o pani. O Devel čivell o Debleskro Dourho ap t'mende. Oun o tsiro vell sik, kay kova vella.”" 
Acts1:6 Kolla, kay khetne van, poučan lestar: “Ray, kreh tou an kava tsiro o them Israel pale baro oun zorelo?”" 
Acts1:7 Koy penas o Yezous: “O tsiro, kay o dad kova krella, hi leskro koova. T'mer hounte djinenn kova gar." 
Acts1:8 Ap t'mende vell o Debleskro Dourho oun dell t'men i bari zoor. Palle rakrenn t'mer mandar an o foro Yerusalem, oun an o tselo them Youdea, oun an o them Samaria, oun ap i tseli phoub.”" 
Acts1:9 Har yob kova penas, vas yob glan lengre yaka an o bolepen hadedo, oun i folka las les pre." 
Acts1:10 Har yon leske palla dikan, har yob an o bolepen djas, his douy morsha an biyale ripya pash lende tardo." 
Acts1:11 Kolla penan: “Morshale dran o them Galilea, hoske han t'mer koy tardo, oun dikenn an o bolepen? Kava Yezous, kay djas t'mendar krik an o bolepen, kova vell yaake dran o bolepen pale, har dikan t'mer les an o bolepen te djal.”" 
Acts1:12 Palle djan yon o djeteskri berga tele oun pale an o foro Yerusalem. Koy berga his gar dour kava forestar krik. 
Acts1:13 An o foro Yerusalem djan le an ko kheer, an koy pralstouni isema, kay yon khetne ačan: O Petro, o Yohanni, o Yakobo, o Andreas, o Filipo, oun o Thomas, o Bartolomeo, oun o Mateo, oun o Yakobo, koleskro dad o Alfeo hi, oun o Simon, kay hi kol menshendar, kay kharenna Zelotarya, oun o Youdas, o Yakobeskro čavo." 
Acts1:14 Kalen lauteren his yek dji oun yek djipen oun mangan o Debles an. Pash lende his ninna djouvya, oun i Maria, o Yezouseskri day, oun o Yezouseskre phrala." 
Acts1:15 An kolla divessa van boud patsle khetne, sheel-te-biish menshe. Mashkral lende stas o Petro pre oun penas:" 
Acts1:16 Mire phrala, kova, hoy an o Debleskro lab pral o Youdas činlo hi, hounte vas yaake. Glan rah tsiro penas o Debleskro Dourho o Davideske kova, hoy vella pral o Youdaseste. O Youdas sikras o drom kolende, kay tapran o Yezouses." 
Acts1:17 Yob his yek mendar. O Yezous rodas men khetne vin, te vas mer leskre bičepangre." 
Acts1:18 O Youdas ginas peske i kotar phoub kol loventsa, hoy yob las, har yob ap o Yezouseste phoukras. Yob peras o shereha glan tele ap koy phoub, hoy yob peske ginas, oun leskre tsele bouke van dran leskro per vin. Oun yob meras." 
Acts1:19 I tsele menshe an o foro Yerusalem shounan kova. Doleske penenn yon ap ko kotar phoub, kay o Youdas meras: Hakeldama. Kova kharella ap lengro rakepen ratli phoub." 
Acts1:20 An o Debleskre gilya hi činlo: Leskro kheer hounte djal paash, oun kek mensho djivella koy dren. Oun leskri boudi hounte krell i vavar." 
Acts1:21 Doleske hounte rodas i vavar morshes vin. Kova hounte vell i morsh, kay ko tselo tsiro mentsa khetne his, har o ray Yezous mank mende his," 
Acts1:22 ko tsirestar, kay moukas yob pes o Yohannestar te taufrell, bis ap ko dives, kay vas lo mendar an o bolepen lino. Kava morsh hounte penell mentsa khetne i menshenge, kay o Yezous i moulendar pre stas." 
Acts1:23 Oun yon rodan douy morshen vin: o Matias oun o Yosef, koles dan le ninna Barsabas oun Yusto gole." 
Acts1:24 Palle mangan yon o Debles oun penan: “Ray, tou prindjreh i tsele menshengre djia. Sike mende, kones tou kol douyendar vin rodal," 
Acts1:25 te penell yob i menshenge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar oun krell koy boudi, hoy o Youdas moukas. Kova moukas men oun djas peske.”" 
Acts1:26 Oun yon vitsran i kashta, oun yek kasht sikras ap o Matias. Oun yob vas o Yezouseskro bičepaskro yaake har i vavar deesh-te-yek Yezouseskre bičepangre." 
Acts2:1 Ap i biboldengro baro dives, hoy kharella Fingsta his yon lauter an yek kheer khetne." 
Acts2:2 Ap yek kopo phourdas i zorelo oun divyo dourho dran o bolepen an ko tselo kheer, kay yon khetne his." 
Acts2:3 Koy dikan le čomone, hoy hi har yagakre čipya. Oun ap hakeneste čivas pes yek čip." 
Acts2:4 Oun yon van lauter pherdo Debleskro Dourho, oun rakran an vavar rakepen. Oun yon rakran ko rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho len das." 
Acts2:5 Ap ko tsiro his an o foro Yerusalem bibolde dran boud themma, kay mangan o Debles an." 
Acts2:6 Har yon ko baro oun zorelo dourho shounan, van yon lauter koy khetne, oun kran bare yaka, har hakeno shounas len an leskro rakepen te rakrell." 
Acts2:7 “Kova dell gar!” dan i bibolde gole. “Kolla, kay rakrenn kote, hi dran o them Galilea." 
Acts2:8 Har vell kova, kay yon an maro rakepen rakrenna, har te vans le an maro them boldo?" 
Acts2:9 Mer vah dran i themma Partia, Media, Elam, Mesopotamia, Youdea, Kappadocia, Pontus, Asia, Frigia, Pamfilia, Egiptia, dran o foro Kirene, kay hi an o them Libia, oun ninna dran o foro Rom." 
Acts2:10  
Acts2:11 Vavar mendar van dran i themma Arabia oun Kreta. Mer shounah len an maro rakepen te rakrell, havo baro koova o Devel kras!”" 
Acts2:12 Oun i bibolde dan i vasta pral o shero khetne, oun djinan gar bouder, hoy kova hi. Oun yek poučas i vavarestar: “Hoy vell kova?”" 
Acts2:13 Vavar san len vin, oun penan: “Kol morsha hi mato!”" 
Acts2:14 Koy stas o Petro oun kol vavar deesh-te-yek Yezouseskre bičepangre pre, oun o Petro das gole, oun penas ap i biboldende: “Morshale dran o them Youdea, oun t'mer tsele vavar, kay djivenn kanna an o foro Yerusalem, me kamau t'menge te penell, hoy kate lauter djala kolentsa, kay rakrenna an vavar rakepen. Shounenn, hoy t'menge penau!" 
Acts2:15 Kol morsha hi gar mato, har t'mer penenna. Hi enyenge taysarlake." 
Acts2:16 Kova, hoy t'mer kate dikenna, penas o Debleskro rakepaskro Yoel glan i rah tsiro:" 
Acts2:17 Ko tsiro vella, penell o Devel, kay me čivau miro Debleskro Dourho ap i tsele menshende. Oun t'mare čave oun ča dikenn nay glan-vi, hoy vella. Oun i terne morsha dikenn kova, hoy o Devel len sikrell, oun i phoure morsha denn souni." 
Acts2:18 Ninna ap mire boudepangre, morsha har djouvya, čivau me miro Debleskro Dourho. Oun yon penenn i menshenge mire laba." 
Acts2:19 Oun me kamau baro oun zorelo koova te krap, an o bolepen oun ap i phoub. T'mer dikenn rat, oun yag, oun tampa." 
Acts2:20 O kham vell kalo, oun o čon vell lolo har o rat. Koy djinenn t'mer, te vell ko baro dives sik, kay vell o ray Yezous pale." 
Acts2:21 Oun koon ap leste gole della, koles lell lo dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin." 
Acts2:22 Morshale dran Israel, shounenn kal laba, hoy penau t'menge! O Devel bičras ko morshes, o Yezouses dran Nazaret, pash t'mende. Kova kras baro oun zorelo koova mank t'mende, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Yaake sikras o Devel, kay o Yezous lestar vas. T'mer djinenn kova, oun dikan kova lauter." 
Acts2:23 T'mer dan o Yezouses an i vasta kolendar, kay gar ap o Debleste patsenna. Oun kolla dan les ap o troushel, oun kote meras yob. Oun hoy t'mer leha kran, kova his yaake glan-diklo o Deblestar." 
Acts2:24 Ko Yezouses kras o Devel djido. Yob las les i moulendar vin, oun kek zoor nay rikras les pash i moulende pale." 
Acts2:25 Ninna o David rakras o Yezousestar, har yob penas: Me dikau hako tsiro ap o Debleste, miro rayeste. Yob dell man zoor, te rikrap man ap leste." 
Acts2:26 Doleske hom me barhtelo an o dji oun me givau. Ninna te merau, djinau:" 
Acts2:27 Tou moukeh man gar pash i moulende, oun kameh gar, te merell miro mass tele." 
Acts2:28 Tou sikral mange ko drom, hoy dell man o djipen. Oun pash toute hom me barhtelo.”" 
Acts2:29 Oun o Petro penas doureder ap lende: “Morshale, mire phrala, moukenn man t'menge te penell, hoy man ap o dji hi. Maro baro ray David meras, oun vas paskedo. Leskro moulengro kheer nay dikenn t'mer kava dives." 
Acts2:30 O David his i Debleskro rakepaskro, kay nay dikas glan-vi, hoy vella. O David djinas, hoy o Devel leske penas, te vell yek pal leste, hoy vell o baro ray. Oun kova vella leskre menshendar. O Devel das pes sovel, te vell kova yaake." 
Acts2:31 Oun o Devel moukas o David glan-vi te dikell, kay o Yezous Kristo i moulendar pre stella. Lestar penas o David, te ačell yob gar pash i moulende, oun te ferdjal gar leskro mass." 
Acts2:32 Kava Yezouses moukas o Devel i moulendar pre te stell. Kova djinah mer. Mer halauter dikam les djido. 
Acts2:33 Oun o Devel kras les ray pral halauter, oun čivas o Debleskro Dourho ap leste, yaake har yob penas. Oun ko Debleskro Dourhes čivas o Yezous ninna ap mende. Kava shounenn oun dikenn t'mer kate." 
Acts2:34 O David djas gar pre an o bolepen. Yaake rakras yob gar pral peste, har yob penas: O Devel penas ap miro rayeste: Besh tout ap miri čači rig," 
Acts2:35 bis te čivau kolen tel tire pire, kay kamenn tout gar." 
Acts2:36 I tsele menshe an Israel hounte djinenna, o Devel kras, te hi kava Yezous, koles t'mer ap o troushel dan, o ray pral halauter. Yob hi ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob.”" 
Acts2:37 Har kol menshe kova shounan, djas lenge kova an lengro dji. Oun yon poučan o Petrestar oun kol vavar Yezouseskre bičepangrendar: “Morshale, mire phrala, hoy kras mer?”" 
Acts2:38 Koy penas o Petro ap lende: “T'mer anan doosh ap t'mende. Mangenn t'men tele glan o Debleste! Oun moukenn t'men ap o Yezous Kristeskro lab te taufrell, te lell o Devel t'mari doosh t'mendar tele, oun te lenn t'mer o Debleskro Dourho!" 
Acts2:39 O Devel penas, te dell lo peskro Dourho t'mende, oun t'mare čavende, ninna kolende lauterende, kay kanna dour lestar hi, oun kay yob pash peste gole della.”" 
Acts2:40 Oun boud vavar labentsa rakras o Petro lentsa, oun mangas len, oun penas ap lende: “Moukenn t'men vin te lell dran o čilačepen, te lenn gar koy phagi, hoy vell pral kal čilače menshende, kay djivenn an kava tsiro.”" 
Acts2:41 Kolla, kay lan leskre laba an pengro dji pre, moukan pen te taufrell. Oun ap ko dives van triin zerya menshe ap o Yezouseste patslo." 
Acts2:42 Oun hako tsiro van le khetne oun shounan, hoy o Yezouseskre bičepangre lenge penan. Oun yon rhan o maro khetne, oun mangan o Debles an." 
Acts2:43 Oun o Yezouseskre bičepangre kran boud baro oun zorelo koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Oun i traash vas pral i menshende." 
Acts2:44 Kolla, kay patslo van, ačan lauter khetne. Oun yon čivan pengro tselo bravlepen khetne, oun kova his lauterenge koy." 
Acts2:45 Yon bikran kova, hoy len his, i kotar phoub oun vavar kouč koova, oun dan les kol patslende, kay len či his." 
Acts2:46 Hako dives van le khetne an o Debleskro baro kheer. Yon rhan o maro khetne an i khera. Oun yon his barhtelo, te dan yon nay i phralen ninna te rhal. Kova kran le o djiyestar." 
Acts2:47 Yon sharan o Debles, oun i tsele menshe dikan lačes ap lende. Oun hako dives van vavar menshe koy pashel, hoy patslo van." 
Acts3:1 His yek dives, his trinenge, koy djan o Petro oun o Yohanni an o Debleskro baro kheer, te mangenn le o Debles an." 
Acts3:2 Kote his i morsh, kova his bango yaake rah har djivell lo. Leskre menshe beshan les hako dives glan o shoukar voudar glan o Debleskro baro kheer, te nay mangell lo love kolendar, kay djan an o Debleskro baro kheer dren." 
Acts3:3 Har yob o Yohannes oun o Petres dikas, har yon an o Debleskro baro kheer kaman te djal, mangas yob lendar love." 
Acts3:4 Yon dikan zoreles ap leste, oun o Petro penas ap leste: “Dik ap mende!”" 
Acts3:5 Oun yob dikas ap lende. Yob patsas, te denn le les čomone." 
Acts3:6 O Petro penas: “Rup oun sonakay hi man gar. Hoy man hi, dau me tout. An o lab o Yezous Kristestar dran Nazaret penau me touke: Ste pre oun dja trouyel!”" 
Acts3:7 Oun o Petro tapras les pash o čačo vast, oun har yob les pre tserdas, van leskre pire zorelo oun sasto." 
Acts3:8 Yob stas sik pre, nay djas, oun djas lentsa an o Debleskro baro kheer, nashas oun stas trouyel oun sharas o Debles." 
Acts3:9 Oun i tsele menshe dikan, kay stas yob trouyel, oun sharas o Debles." 
Acts3:10 Oun yon prindjran les pale, kay yob ko mangepaskro his, kay glan o Debleskro baro kheer beshdo his, glan ko voudar, kay kharell shoukar voudar. Oun yon kran bare yaka pral kova, hoy yon dikan, hoy leha djas." 
Acts3:11 Oun kava morsh djas bouder gar lendar krik. Oun i tsele menshe nashan pash lende khetne an koy isema, hoy kharell Salomeskri bari isema, oun yon kran bare yaka." 
Acts3:12 Har o Petro kolen dikas, penas lo ap lende: “Morshale dran Israel, hoske krenn t'mer save bare yaka, oun dikenn ap mende? Kova kras gar mari zoor, vitar gar maro patsepen, te nay nashell kava morsh." 
Acts3:13 Na-a! O Devel o Abrahamestar, oun o Isaakestar oun o Yakobestar, ko Devel mare dadendar sikras t'mende kate, havi bari zoor oun raylepen yob peskro boudepaskres, o Yezouses, das. Koles dan t'mer an o Pilateskre vasta, oun dan les bourhoste, har o Pilato kamas les te djal moukell." 
Acts3:14 T'mer dan koles bourhoste, kay vas o Deblestar, oun kay his kek čilačepen an leste. Oun t'mer mangan o Pilatestar, te moukell lo koles dran o stilepen te djal, kay maras yekes." 
Acts3:15 Ko rayes, kay o djipen della, maran t'mer. Koles moukas o Devel i moulendar pre te stell. Kova djinah mer, mer dikam les." 
Acts3:16 Mer patsah ap leste. Doleske vas kava morsh sasto. T'mer prindjrenn les lauter oun djinenn, kay yob nashas nay gar. Yob patsas ap o Yezous Kristeste, oun kova kras les sasto." 
Acts3:17 Me djinau, mire phrala, kay t'mer djinan gar, hoy t'mer koy kran o Yezouseha. Oun t'mare pralstoune djinan kova vitar gar." 
Acts3:18 Lauter vas yaake, har o Devel kova penas. Leskre rakepangre penan glan i rah tsiro, kay hounte merell ko baro ray, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob oun lell i menshen dran o čilačepen vin." 
Acts3:19 Moukenn t'maro phouro djipen oun avenn pash o Debleste, te lell yob t'mari doosh t'mendar!" 
Acts3:20 Palle vell ko lačo tsiro, kay dell t'men o Devel nevi zoor. Yob bičrell t'menge koles, kay vas t'menge glan i rah tsiro vin rodedo. Kova hi o Yezous Kristo." 
Acts3:21 Yob ačell an o bolepen yaake rah, bis te vell ko tsiro, kay vella lauter neves kerdo. Kova penan menge o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro. O Devel penas les lenge." 
Acts3:22 O Mose penas: I Debleskro rakepaskro har me hom, saves bičrell o Devel pash t'mende. Kova hi yek t'mare menshendar. Shounenn ap hako lab, hoy yob t'menge penella!" 
Acts3:23 Koon gar ap koleste shounella, koles hounte čivenn t'mer pale, te nay vell lo bouder gar pash t'mende." 
Acts3:24 Ninna o Samuel oun kol vavar rakepangre, kay pal leste van, rakran pral kal divessa, kay mer kanna djivah." 
Acts3:25 Kova, hoy kol Debleskre rakepangre i menshenge penan, hi t'menge. T'mer han i čave kolendar. Oun ko lab, hoy o Devel t'mare phourenge penas, oun peskro vast pre das, hi ninna t'menge. Yob penas ap o Abrahameste: Koy barht, hoy dau tire menshende, djal doureder ap i tsele menshende, kay ap i phoub hi." 
Acts3:26 Doleske bičras o Devel peskro boudepaskres, o Yezouses, glanstounes pash t'mende, te anell yob t'menge o Debleskri barht, te djal hakeno t'mendar peskro čilačo dromestar tele.”" 
Acts4:1 Har o Petro oun o Yohanni kova i menshenge penan, van i rashaya pash lende, ninna ko pralstouno kol klistendar an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun i Sadducarya." 
Acts4:2 Yon his rhoyemen pral o Petreste oun o Yohanneste, te sikran kalla i menshende o Debleskro drom oun penan, kay o Yezous i moulendar pre stas." 
Acts4:3 Doleske tapran le len oun čivran len i rati an o stilepen. 
Acts4:4 Boud kolendar, kay shounan kol laba, hoy o Petro penas, van patslo. Nay his panč zerya menshe." 
Acts4:5 O vavar dives, taysarlake, van i biboldengre pralstoune oun phoureder oun čačepangre an o foro Yerusalem khetne." 
Acts4:6 Ninna o Hannas, ko baro rashay, oun o Kayafas, oun o Yohanno, oun o Alexandro, oun kol tsele vavar, kay his kol bare rashayengre menshendar, his koy pashel." 
Acts4:7 Oun yon moukan o Yezouseskre bičepangren glan pende te anell, oun yon poučan lendar: “An koneskri zoor oun an koneskro lab kran t'mer kova?”" 
Acts4:8 Oun o Petro, pherdo Debleskro Dourho, penas ap lende: “T'mer pralstoune oun t'mer phoureder, shounenn!" 
Acts4:9 Mer kram i lačo koova ap i nasselo mensheste. Oun doleske ham kanna glan t'mende tardo. T'mer poučenn mendar, har yob sasto vas." 
Acts4:10 Yaake hounte djinenn t'mer oun i tsele menshe an o them Israel: O Yezous Kristo dran Nazaret, koles t'mer ap o troushel dan, kras kava morshes sasto. Kava Yezouses moukas o Devel i moulendar pre te stell." 
Acts4:11 Kova hi ko bar, kay t'mer ap i rig vitsran. Kova vas i bar, kay hidjrell o tselo kheer." 
Acts4:12 Kek vavar har o Yezous kokres nay anell men pash o Debleste. Ap i tseli phoub das o Devel kek vavares, kay nay lell men dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin.”" 
Acts4:13 Har yon dikan, har o Petro oun o Yohanni rakran, kay kek traash an lende his, kran le bare yaka. Oun yon hayvan, kay kolla kek bare rakepangre oun goseve morsha hi, oun djinan ninna, kay yon o Yezouseha khetne his." 
Acts4:14 Ninna dikan le ko morshes, kay sasto vas, pash lende tardo, oun nay penan bouder či." 
Acts4:15 Koy bičran le len vin, oun rakran mank pende oun penan:" 
Acts4:16 “Hoy kras mer kal menshentsa? Hakeno an o foro Yerusalem djinell kanna, kay kran kolla i baro koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Mer nay dah kova gar bourhoste." 
Acts4:17 Das len zoreles trad, te penenn yon kekeske bouder či o Yezousestar, te djal ko rakepen gar doureder pash i tsele menshende!”" 
Acts4:18 Oun yon dan len gole, dan len trad, oun penan ap lende: “Ma rakrenn bouder či o Yezousestar! Ma penenn i menshenge či, hoy yob t'menge penas!”" 
Acts4:19 O Petro oun o Yohanni penan ap lende: “Penenn menge, hi kova mishto glan o Debleste, te shounas mer boudeder ap t'mende har ap o Debleste?" 
Acts4:20 Mer nay rikrah gar maro mouy pral kova, hoy dikam oun shounam.”" 
Acts4:21 Koy dan le len zoreles trad, oun moukan len te djal. Yon hatsan či ap lende, kay nay dans yon lenge i phagi. I menshe sharan o Debles pral kova, hoy koy djas." 
Acts4:22 Ko morsh, kay sasto vas, his star-deesh bersha phouro." 
Acts4:23 Oun har kolla moukan len te djal, van yon pash i patslende, oun penan lenge, hoy kol bare rashaya, oun kol biboldengre phoureder ap lende penan." 
Acts4:24 Har i patsle kova shounan, mangan yon khetne o Debles an, oun penan: “Ray, tou kral o bolepen oun i phoub, oun o baro pani, oun lauter, hoy djivella." 
Acts4:25 O Debleskro Dourho rakras dran o Davideskro mouy: Hoske hi i menshe ap kay phoub čilačo? Hoske krenn yon kova, hoy čičeske hi?" 
Acts4:26 I bare raya ap kay phoub oun i bare pralstoune van lauter khetne. Yon hi rhoyemen ap o Debleste oun ap ko baro rayeste, kones o Devel bičras." 
Acts4:27 Čačepah, yon van lauter an kava foro khetne: O Pilato, o Herodes, i Remarya, oun i tsele bibolde dran boud themma. Yon hi rhoyemen ap tiro boudepaskro Yezous, kay toutar vas. Koles rodal tou vin, maro Devel, te vell lo baro ray." 
Acts4:28 Yaake kran yon kova, hoy tou glan i rah tsiro penal, te vell kova lauter yaake." 
Acts4:29 Ray, shouneh tou, kay yon men kanna trad denna? Mer ham tire boudepangre. De men koy zoor, te nay rakras toutar!" 
Acts4:30 Sike lende tiri zoor! Kre i nasselen sasto, oun kre boud baro oun zorelo koova an ko lab o Yezousestar, kay toutar vas oun tiro boudepaskro hi!”" 
Acts4:31 Ap yek kopo, har yon o Debles an-mangan, trissas i phoub kote, kay yon his. Oun o Debleskro Dourho vas ap lauterende. Oun yon penan o Debleskro lab, oun kek traash his an lende." 
Acts4:32 Kol tsele patslen his yek dji oun yek djipen. Kek lendar penas: Ko bravlepen, hoy man hi, hi mange kokres. Na-a, kova his lauterenge koy!" 
Acts4:33 Bari zoryah penan o Yezouseskre bičepangre i menshenge, kay o Yezous i moulendar pre stas, oun i menshe hayvan o Debleskro lačepen." 
Acts4:34 Hakenes his doha djipaske. Kolen, kay hi len i kotar phoub, i kheer, oun vavar koova, bikran kova," 
Acts4:35 oun anan kol love pash i Yezouseskre bičepangre. Oun yon dan hakenes yaake boud, te his hakenes doha djipaske." 
Acts4:36 Yaake kras kova ninna o Yosef. Kova his i Levitari oun vas dran o them Ciprus. O Yezouseskre bičepangre dan les ninna Barnabas gole. Ko kharella ap lengro rakepen: O morsh, kay rakrell i menshentsa lačo, te hi lengro dji pharo." 
Acts4:37 Oun koles his i kotar phoub. Ko kotar phoub bikras yob, oun anas kol love pash o Yezouseskre bičepangre, te denn le kol love i patslende." 
Acts5:1 I morsh, kay kharas Ananias, leskri romni kharas Safira, yon khetne bikran i kotar phoub." 
Acts5:2 Oun yob rikras love peske pale. Leskri romni djinas kova. Oun yon anan gar i tsele love glan o Yezouseskre bičepangre. 
Acts5:3 O Petro penas ap o Ananias: “Hoske kral tou o bengeske tiro dji pre? Hoske rhorhral tou o Debleskro Dourhes, oun rikral love touke?" 
Acts5:4 Tou nay rikrals tiro kotar phoub. Oun har bikral les, nay rikrals kol love ninna. Har nay kral tou savo koova? Tou rhorhral gar i menshen. Tou rhorhral o Debles.”" 
Acts5:5 Har o Ananias kol laba shounas, peras yob khetne oun meras. Oun i bari traash vas ap kolende, kay shounan kova." 
Acts5:6 Koy stan i terne morsha pre, oun čivan pral leste i kotar plarhta, hidjran les vin oun paskran les." 
Acts5:7 Pal i tsiro vas leskri romni dren oun djinas gar, hoy koy djas." 
Acts5:8 O Petro poučas latar: “Lan t'mer yaake boud love, har t'mer koy kotar phoub bikran?” “Ava, yaake boud love lam,” penas li." 
Acts5:9 O Petro penas ap late: “Hoske kran t'mer kova vin, oun rhorhran o Debles? Kol morsha, kay paskran tiro romes, hi glan o voudar tardo, oun hidjrenn ninna tout vin.”" 
Acts5:10 Koy peras li khetne oun meras. Oun har i terne morsha dren van, hatsan le lat moules, hidjran lat vin, oun paskran lat pash lakro romeste." 
Acts5:11 Koy vas i bari traash pral i tsele patslende oun pral kolende, kay shounan kova." 
Acts5:12 Oun o Yezouseskre bičepangre kran boud baro oun zorelo koova an o Debleskri zoor ap i menshende. Oun i tsele patsle his an o Salomeskri bari isema an o Debleskro baro kheer khetne. 
Acts5:13 Kol vavar, kay gar patsle his, trashan, te beshenn le pen pash lende. Ninna te trashan le lendar, rakran le lendar mishto." 
Acts5:14 Boud morsha oun djouvya patsan ap o Yezouseste oun van i patslentsa khetne. 
Acts5:15 Oun i menshe hidjran pengre nasselen ap i dromma, oun čivan len kote ap o čiben. Yon penan penge, te vell o Petro koy pashel oun leskro shatto perell ap lende, venn le sasto." 
Acts5:16 Ninna dran vavar forya, hoy troul o foro Yerusalem čiddo his, anan yon i nasselen oun kolen, kay an lende benga his. Oun lauter van sasto." 
Acts5:17 Ko baro rashay oun kol Sadducarya, kay pash leste his, kolla zilveran ap o Yezouseskre bičepangre," 
Acts5:18 oun tapran len, oun vitsran len an o stilepen." 
Acts5:19 An i rati vas i bolepaskro o Deblestar oun kras kol voudya an o stilepen pre, oun anas len vin, oun penas ap lende:" 
Acts5:20 “Djan an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun penenn i menshenge halauter pral o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella.”" 
Acts5:21 Har yon kova shounan, djan yon taysarlake an o Debleskro baro kheer oun sikran i menshende o Debleskro drom. Ko baro rashay oun kolla, kay pash leste his, dan i pralstoune bibolden khetne gole, ninna i tsele phoureden an o them Israel. Oun yon bičran i klisten an o stilepen, te anenn le len glan lende." 
Acts5:22 Oun har yon an o stilepen djan, his yon bouder gar kote. Oun kol kliste van pale oun penan:" 
Acts5:23 “Ko stilepen his pandlo, oun kol lourde his glan o voudar tardo. Oun har i lourde menge pre pandan, his kek dren.”" 
Acts5:24 Har ko pralstouno klisto pral o Debleskro baro kheer oun kol bare rashaya kova shounan, djinan yon gar, hoy te patsenn le, oun poučan pendar har kova doureder djala." 
Acts5:25 Koy vas yek oun penas lenge: “Kol morsha, kay t'mer stildo čivan, hi an o Debleskro baro kheer tardo, oun penenn i menshenge o Debleskro lab.”" 
Acts5:26 Koy djas ko pralstouno klisto kol vavar klistentsa an o Debleskro baro kheer, oun lan i Yezouseskre bičepangre vin. Kova kran le kek zoryah. I kliste daran i menshendar, te marenn le len i barrentsa." 
Acts5:27 Oun yon anan len glan kol tsele pralstunende, kay khetne van. Oun o baro rashay penas ap lende:" 
Acts5:28 “Mer dam t'men zoreles trad, te rakrenn t'mer či bouder o Yezousestar. Oun kanna vell lestar rakedo an o tselo foro Yerusalem. Oun t'mer penenn, kay mer maram les. Kamenn t'mer, te vell leskro rat pral mende?”" 
Acts5:29 O Petro oun i vavar Yezouseskre bičepangre penan: “Mer hounte shounas ap o Debleste boudeder har ap i menshende. 
Acts5:30 Ko Devel mare phourendar moukas o Yezouses i moulendar pre te stell, koles, kay t'mer ap o troushel dan oun maran." 
Acts5:31 Koles hadas o Devel oun beshas les ap peskri čači rig, te vell lo ray oun lell i menshen dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin. Kova kras o Devel, te moukenn i menshe an o them Israel pengro phouro djipen, yaake te nay lell lo lengri doosh lendar krik." 
Acts5:32 Kova dikam mer oun penah nay t'menge, oun o Debleskro Dourho ninna. Koles dell o Devel kolende, kay shounenn ap leste.”" 
Acts5:33 Har yon kova shounan, van yon rhoyemen ap lende, oun kaman len te marell." 
Acts5:34 Mank kol pralstunende his i Farisari, leskro lab his Gamaliel. Yob his i biboldengro čačepaskro oun an-diklo pash i tsele biboldende. Oun kova stas pre oun penas: “Bičrenn len i tikno tsiro vin!”" 
Acts5:35 Oun pale penas lo: “Morshale an Israel, denn garda oun dikenn, hoy t'mer kal menshentsa kamenn te krell!" 
Acts5:36 Glan i tsiro his i morsh, kova kharas Theudas. Yob patsas pestar, te his lo i baro. Star-sheel morsha his pash leste, kay shounan ap leste. Palle vas lo moulo dino. Oun har yob moulo his, ačan yon gar khetne. Oun kek rakrell bouder lendar." 
Acts5:37 Koy pal vas i morsh dran o them Galilea, kova kharas Youdas. Kova his an ko tsiro har i laba i biboldendar pre činlo van. Kova anas boud menshen ap peskri rig, te krenn le i kourepen i Remaryentsa. Ko Youdas vas ninna moulo dino, oun kolla, kay pash leste his, hi gar bouder koy. Oun kek rakrell bouder lendar." 
Acts5:38 Oun kanna penau me t'menge: Moukenn t'mare vasta kal menshendar! Moukenn len te djal! Te hi ko koova i menshendar, palle ačella ko koova gar." 
Acts5:39 Te hi ko koova o Deblestar, palle nay phagenn les gar. Denn yak, te čingrenn t'mer gar ap o Debleste.” Oun yon shounan ap o Gamaliel." 
Acts5:40 Palle dan yon o Yezouseskre bičepangren gole, dan len dava i čoupniyah, oun dan len trad, te rakrenn le bouder gar o Yezousestar. Oun palle moukan le len te djal." 
Acts5:41 Koy djan yon penge i pralstunendar. Oun yon his barhtelo, te hi le o Debleske yaake boud moldo, te rodas lo len vin, te rhan le dava o Yezouseske." 
Acts5:42 Yon moukan gar tele, te penenn le o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar. Hako dives djan le an o Debleskro baro kheer oun pash i menshende an i khera, oun sikran len o Yezouseskro drom." 
Acts6:1 An kol divessa, kay i patsle boudeder van, djas i čingepen mashkral i patslende, kay rakran hebretikes, oun kol patslende, kay rakran grichtikes. Mashkral kolla, kay rakran grichtikes, his djouvya, kolengre romma moulo his. Oun kolla lan gar yaake boud rhapaske har kolla, kay rakran hebretikes. Doleske his kolla, kay rakran grichtikes, rhoyedo ap kolende, kay rakran hebretikes." 
Acts6:2 Koy dan kol deesh-te-douy Yezouseskre bičepangre kol tsele patslen khetne gole, oun penan: “Hi gar mishto, te das mer o rhapen vin, oun men vals bouder kek tsiro, te penas i menshenge o Debleskro lab." 
Acts6:3 Doleske, mire phrala, rodenn mashkral t'mende efta morshen vin! Kolla hounte venn morsha, kay hi pherdo Debleskro Dourho oun gosvepen. Kolla hounte lenn koy boudi ap pende." 
Acts6:4 Mer kamah o Debles an-mangell, oun i menshenge o Debleskro lab te penell.”" 
Acts6:5 Ko rakepen his i tsele patslenge mishto. Yon rodan o Stefanes vin, koles his i zorelo patsepen oun his i morsh pherdo Debleskro Dourho. Yon rodan ninna vin o Filipo, o Prokoro, o Nikanor, o Timon, o Parmenas oun o Nikolaus. Kova his i gricho dran o foro Antiochia, kay las i biboldengro patsepen an oun patsas kanna ap o Yezouseste." 
Acts6:6 Kol morshen anan le pash o Yezouseskre bičepangre. Kolla čivan i vasta ap lende, oun mangan o Debles, te dell lo len zoor oun gosvepen an lengri boudi." 
Acts6:7 O Debleskro lab vas boud oun boudeder menshenge penlo, oun boud van patslo. An o foro Yerusalem van ninna boud rashaya patslo." 
Acts6:8 O Stefano his i morsh pherdo Debleskro lačepen oun Debleskri zoor. Yob kras boud baro oun zorelo koova an o Debleskri zoor mank i biboldende. 
Acts6:9 Kote van bibolde pash leste. Kolla van dran boud biboldengre kangria. Yon his Libertarya, morsha dran i forya Kirene oun Alexandria, oun dran i themma Cilicia oun Asia. Oun yon rakran o Stefaneha oun čingran pen leha." 
Acts6:10 O Debleskro Dourho das les gosvepen, te nay rakras kek lendar leske pale." 
Acts6:11 Palle anan le morshen ap lengri rig. Oun kolla anan rhorhepen ap o Stefaneste pre. Yon penan: “Mer shounam, kay penas yob djoungele laba pral o Moseste oun pral o Debleste.”" 
Acts6:12 Yon kran kol tsele menshen divyo, ninna kol biboldengre phoureden oun čačepangren. Oun yon van ap leste pre, tapran les, oun anan les glan i pralstoune biboldende." 
Acts6:13 Kolla, kay rhorhepen ap leste pre anan, kolla penan: “Kava morsh moukell gar tele te rakrell lo djoungele laba pral o Debleskro baro kheer oun pral o Moseskre laba." 
Acts6:14 Mer shounam, har yob penas: O Yezous dran Nazaret phagell o Debleskro baro kheer tele oun krella, te hounte rikras mer bouder gar ap kova, hoy o Mose menge penas.”" 
Acts6:15 Oun kol tsele pralstoune dikan ap o Stefaneste, har leskro mouy vas yaake har i Debleskro bolepaskro." 
Acts7:1 Koy poučas ko baro rashay lestar: “Hi kova čačo, hoy kolla penan?”" 
Acts7:2 Koy penas o Stefano: “T'mer phrala oun dada, shounenn! Maro baro oun raylo Devel moukas pes maro dadestar Abraham te dikell an o them Mesopotamia. Ap ko tsiro djivas o Abraham gomme gar an o foro Haran." 
Acts7:3 Oun o Devel penas ap leste: Dja dran tiro them! Mouk tire menshen, oun dja an ko them, hoy me touke sikrau!" 
Acts7:4 Koy djas o Abraham dran ko them Kaldea, oun djivas an o foro Haran. Oun har leskro dad meras, anas o Devel les an ko them, kay t'mer kanna djivenna." 
Acts7:5 O Devel das les kek kotar phoub an kava them, vitar gar i tikno kotar. Oun o Devel das les peskro lab, te dell lo leskre čavende i them. An ko tsiro his o Abrahames kek čavo." 
Acts7:6 O Devel penas ap leste: Tire čave, kay pal toute venna, hi vi-themarya an i them, kay gar lengro hi. Star-sheel bersha hounte boudrenn le i vavarenge tel douka oun bare dava." 
Acts7:7 Oun kolla, kay len dan oun doukran, kolen dau me i phagi. Oun pal kova djan le dran ko them vin, oun mangenn man kate an kava them an." 
Acts7:8 Oun o Devel das o Abrahameste peskro lab, te hi lo leskro Devel oun o Devel lauterenge, kay pal leste venna. Oun yob penas o Abrahameske, te moukell yob pes ap peskro mass te činell. Ninna i tsele morsh čave, kay pal leste venna, hounte van činlo ap pengro mass. Oun o Abraham las i čaves, o Isaak. Oun o Abraham činas les ap o mass, har yob efta divessa phouro his. Oun o Isaak činas o Yakobes, oun o Yakob peskre deesh-te-douy čaven. Kolla hi mare phoure dada, kolendar mer vam." 
Acts7:9 Mare phoure dada zilveran ap o Yosefeste, oun bikran les an o them Egiptia. Oun o Devel his pash leste," 
Acts7:10 oun las les vin dran halauter, hoy o Yosefeske pharo his. Oun o Devel das les boud gosvepen oun kras, te dikas o baro ray pral o them Egiptia lačo ap o Yosefeste. Ko baro ray kras, te vas o Yosef o ray pral o tselo them Egiptia oun pral o tselo rayeskro kheer." 
Acts7:11 Oun palle vas i tsiro, kay bokan le an o tselo them Egiptia oun an o them Kanaan. Oun mare phoure hatsan či te rhal an o them Kanaan." 
Acts7:12 Har o Yakob shounas, kay an o them Egiptia djob della, bičras yob peskre čaven an ko them, te ginenn le penge djob, oun pal i tsiro bičras lo len i douyto kopo." 
Acts7:13 Har yon o douyto kopo an o them Egiptia van, prindjran le o Yosefes. Koy djinas o baro ray pral o them, have menshendar o Yosef his." 
Acts7:14 O Yosef moukas peskro dades, oun peskre tsele menshen an o them Egiptia te vell. Kolla his efta-deesh-te-panč menshe." 
Acts7:15 Yaake vas o Yakob an o them Egiptia, oun kote djivas lo peskre čaventsa. Kolla hi mare phoure. Oun kote meran le ninna." 
Acts7:16 Oun lengre čave anan len an o them Kanaan oun paskran len an o foro Sichem ap ko kotar phoub, hoy ginas o Abraham kol menshendar, kolengro phouro dad o Hamor his." 
Acts7:17 Palle vas ko tsiro, kay kova vas, hoy o Devel o Abrahameske penas. I Israelitarya van hako dives boudeder an o them Egiptia." 
Acts7:18 Koy vas i vavar morsh baro ray pral o them Egiptia. Kova djinas či o Yosefestar," 
Acts7:19 oun rodas i drom, har te rikrell lo mare menshen tele. Oun yon hounte boudran tel dava, oun hounte moukan pengre tikne čaven, te merenn yon." 
Acts7:20 An ko tsiro vas o Mose boldo. Oun yob his shoukar an o Debleskre yaka. Triin čon his yob an peskro dadeskro kheer, oun yon dan garda ap leste." 
Acts7:21 Oun palle nay khatran le o Moses bouder gar an o kheer. Oun kote, kay čivan le les, hatsas les i čay o baro rayestar pral o them Egiptia. Oun yoy las les pash peste oun tserdas les pre, har te vals lo lakro čavo." 
Acts7:22 Oun goseve Egiptarya sikran leste lauter, hoy yon djinan, yaake te vas lo gosevo an lauter, hoy yob rakras oun kras." 
Acts7:23 Har o Mose star-deesh bersha phouro his, kamas lo pal peskre menshende, i Israelitarya, te dikell. Oun yob djas kote, kay boudran le." 
Acts7:24 Oun kote dikas yob, kay yek leskre menshendar dava rhas. Oun yob djas koy, te vell lo ap leskri rig, oun das koy Egiptares pale oun das les moulo." 
Acts7:25 O Mose patsas, kay peskre menshe hayvenna, kay o Devel les bičras, te lell lo len dran lengri bibarht vin. Yon hayvan kova gar." 
Acts7:26 O vavar dives vas yob pash peskre menshende, har douy lendar čingran. Oun yob das len trad, te čingrenn le pen gar, oun penas: Morshale, t'mer han phrala, hoske čingrenn?" 
Acts7:27 Kova, kay kras ko čingepen das les i spildini oun penas: Hal tou i čačepaskro oun i ray pral mende, te hounte shounas ap toute?" 
Acts7:28 Kameh tou man ninna moulo te dell, har tou taysar ko Egiptares moulo dal?" 
Acts7:29 Har o Mose kova shounas, nashas yob peske, oun djas an ko them Midian. Koy van leske douy čave boldo." 
Acts7:30 Star-deesh bersha pal kova his o Mose an o moulo them pash koy berga Sinay. Koy moukas pes i Debleskro bolepaskro glan leste te dikell an i soubyengro bour, hoy rhačas." 
Acts7:31 Hoy yob kote dikas, nay patsas lo gar. Yaake djas lo pash ko bour, te nay dikell lo feteder, hoy kova hi. Kote rakras o Devel ap leste:" 
Acts7:32 Me hom o Devel tire phourendar, o Devel o Abrahamestar, o Isaakestar, oun o Yakobestar. Oun i bari traash vas ap o Moseste, har yob kova shounas, oun daryatar nay dikas lo gar kote pre." 
Acts7:33 Oun o Devel penas ap leste: Rib tire kirrha vin! Kote, kay tardo hal, hi o Debleskro them." 
Acts7:34 Me dikom, har mire menshe rhan dava an o them Egiptia. Oun me shounom lengri gole oun lengro ropen, oun vom dran o bolepen tele, te lap len dran kava them vin. Oun me kamau, te djas tou an o them Egiptia." 
Acts7:35 O Devel bičras kava Moses, kay pash peskre menshende či moldo his. Kova dikah mer koy pre, har yon penan: Koon kras tout pral mende čačepaskro oun ray, te hounte shounas mer ap toute? O Devel bičras les, te vell lo ray pral lende, oun te anell lo len dran ko them vin, kay yon pandle boudepangre his. Kova penas leske ko bolepaskro, kay dran i soubyengro bour ap leste rakras." 
Acts7:36 Kava Mose anas i Israelitaryen vin oun kras baro oun zorelo koova an o Debleskri zoor an o them Egiptia, oun pash o lolo pani, oun star-deesh bersha an o moulo them." 
Acts7:37 Kova his o Mose, kay ap lende penas: O Devel bičrell t'menge i Debleskro rakepaskres har me hom. Kova hi yek t'mare menshendar." 
Acts7:38 Oun har kol Israelitarya an ko moulo them pash koy berga Sinay glan o Debleste khetne van, his o Mose ap i berga Sinay tardo mashkral o bolepaskro oun mare phourende. Oun o bolepaskro das les kol Debleskre laba, hoy denn o djipen, te anell o Mose len pash mende." 
Acts7:39 Mare phoure kaman gar ap leste te shounell oun kran, hoy yon kaman. Yon kaman te djivell, har yon an o them Egiptia djivan." 
Acts7:40 Ap o Aron penan le: Kre menge i devel, kay dell garda ap mende oun sikrell mende o drom! Mer djinah gar, hoy djas o Moseske, kay anas men dran o them Egiptia vin." 
Acts7:41 An ko tsiro kran le i groumni dran sonakay, te vell kaya lengro devel. Oun yon anan firhen, maran len oun rhačran len lake, oun van barhtelo pral kova, hoy yon kran." 
Acts7:42 O Devel djas peske lendar oun moukas len. Koy mangan yon i momlia an o bolepen an. Yaake vas kova, hoy činlo hi an o liil, kay o Debleskre rakepangre činan. Kote penell o Devel: Morshale an Israel, mange rhačran t'mer kek firhen, oun anan kek rhapen glan mande an kol star-deesh bersha, har hans an o moulo them." 
Acts7:43 T'mer hidjran ko kheer trouyel, kay o Molok dren hi. Ninna hidjran koy bolepaskri momeli t'mentsa, kay Refan kharedo vella. Kol douyen kran t'mer t'mare vastentsa, te nay mangenn len an. Doleske tradau me t'men dran t'maro them vin, oun anau t'men pandlo an o them Babilonia, oun doureder." 
Acts7:44 O Stefano penas doureder: Mare phouren his o Debleskro tikno kheer, hoy his kerdo dran firhengre balla, oun hidjran les lentsa, har djan le an o moulo them trouyel. Kava kheer kran le yaake, har o Devel kova o Moseste ap i berga sikras." 
Acts7:45 Mare phoure hidjran kava kheer lentsa, bis te anas len o Yosua an o them Kanaan. Kote djivan vavar menshe, kay o Debles gar prindjrenna. Kolen tradas o Devel vin, oun das ko them mare phourende. O Debleskro tikno kheer dran firhengre balla ačas an o them Kanaan oun his gomme koy, har o David o baro ray vas." 
Acts7:46 Ap koleste dikas o Devel lačes. Oun o David mangas lestar, te nay krell lo leske i kheer dran barra, kay i tsele Israelitarya nay mangenn les an." 
Acts7:47 His gar o David, na-a, kova his leskro čavo, o Salomo, kay kras o Debleske i baro kheer dran barra." 
Acts7:48 O baro Devel djivell gar an khera, kay i menshe kran pengre vastentsa. Kova penas glan rah tsiro o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya:" 
Acts7:49 O Devel penas: O bolepen hi miro beshepaskro, oun i phoub hi tel mire pire čiddo. Havo kheer kamenn t'mer mange te krell t'mare vastentsa, kay djivap dren?" 
Acts7:50 Me krom o bolepen oun i phoub mire vastentsa.” 
Acts7:51 Oun o Stefano penas doureder ap lende: “T'mer kamenn či te hayvell. T'maro dji hi har bar. T'mare kandentsa shounenn či, oun kamenn gar ap o Debleskro Dourho te shounell. Yaake kran t'mare phoure. Yaake krenn ninna t'mer." 
Acts7:52 Penenn mange: Dell yek Debleskro rakepaskro, kay lan t'mare phoure gar palla? Yon maran kolen, kay glan-vi penan, te vell ko yek, kay hako tsiro o čačepen krella. Yob vas, oun t'mer phoukran ap leste oun maran les." 
Acts7:53 I bolepangre anan t'menge kol laba, kay penenna, hoy o Devel t'mendar kamella. Oun t'mer rikran t'men gar ap lende.”" 
Acts7:54 Har yon kova shounan, hoy o Stefano lenge penas, djas lenge kova an o dji, oun i bari rholi tapras len." 
Acts7:55 O Stefano, pherdo Debleskro Dourho, dikas an o bolepen pre, oun dikas o Debleskro raylepen oun o Yezouses ap o Debleskri čači rig tardo." 
Acts7:56 Oun o Stefano penas: “Me dikau o bolepen pre, oun o Menshengro Čaves ap i čači rig o Deblestar tardo.”" 
Acts7:57 Koy dan yon zoreles gole, čivan pengre vasta ap i kanda, te shounenn le gar, oun djan ap leste," 
Acts7:58 tradan les dran o foro vin, oun vitsran barrentsa ap leste. Oun kolla, kay vitsran i barra, rivan pengre koola vin, oun i terno morsh, kay kharas Saulo, das ap lende yak." 
Acts7:59 Har yon ap leste i barrentsa vitsran, das o Stefano gole: “Ray Yezous, le man pash toute!”" 
Acts7:60 Oun yob peras ap i phoub tele, oun das pale gole: “Ray, le koy doosh lendar!” Har yob kova penas, meras lo." 
Acts8:1 His mishto an o Sauleskre yaka, te maran le les. Pal ko dives lan le i patslen zoreles palla an o foro Yerusalem. Oun i patsle nashan an o them Youdea oun an o them Samaria. I Yezouseskre bičepangre ačan an o foro Yerusalem." 
Acts8:2 Oun morsha, hoy ap o Debleskro drom djan, paskran o Stefanes oun rovan boud pral leskro merepen." 
Acts8:3 O Saulo kras lauter, te nay marell lo i tsele patslen. Yob djas an i khera, las len koy vin, morshen har djouvyen, oun vitsras len an o stilepen." 
Acts8:4 Kol patsle, kay ap o naashepen his, djan trouyel oun penan o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar." 
Acts8:5 O Filipo djas an ko foro Samaria oun rakras kote o Yezous Kristestar. 
Acts8:6 Kol menshe dan yak ap kova, hoy o Filipo penas oun kras an o Debleskri zoor." 
Acts8:7 Boud menshendar tradas lo bengen vin. Kolla dan zoreles gole, har yon lendar vin djan. Oun boud menshe, kay his bango oun nay djan gar, van sasto." 
Acts8:8 Oun hakeno an kava foro his barhtelo pral kova, hoy koy djas." 
Acts8:9 An ko foro Samaria his ninna i morsh, kova his i dourkepaskro. Leskro lab his Simon. Yob penas pestar, te hi lo i baro morsh. Oun i menshe an ko foro kran bare yaka pral kova, hoy yob kras." 
Acts8:10 Oun halauter shounan ap leste, oun penan: “Ap ko morsheste hi o Debleskri bari zoor.”" 
Acts8:11 Peskro dourkepah tserdas lo len lauter ap peste. Doleske rikran yon boud lestar. 
Acts8:12 Har kanna o Filipo lenge o Yezous Kristestar penas, koles o Devel bičras, te anell lo len pash o Debleste, patsan djouvya oun morsha ap kova, hoy o Filipo lenge penas. Oun yon moukan pen te taufrell." 
Acts8:13 Koy vas ninna o Simon patslo, oun moukas pes te taufrell. Palle ačas lo pash leste. Oun har o Simon ko baro oun zorelo koova dikas, hoy o Filipo an o Debleskri zoor kras, ačas leske o rakepen krik." 
Acts8:14 Oun kol Yezouseskre bičepangre an o foro Yerusalem shounan, kay kol menshe an o them Samaria patslo van. Oun yon bičran o Petres oun o Yohannes pash lende." 
Acts8:15 Kolla van an o them Samaria, oun mangan o Deblestar, te dell lo i patslende o Debleskro Dourho." 
Acts8:16 Kol patsle his kokres ap o lab maro rayestar Yezous taufedo. O Debleskro Dourho peras gomme gar ap lende. 
Acts8:17 Koy čivan o Petro oun o Yohanni i vasta ap lende, oun o Debleskro Dourho peras ap lende." 
Acts8:18 Har o Simon dikas, kay o Debleskro Dourho ap lende vas, har o Yezouseskre bičepangre i vasta ap lende čivan, kamas yob len love te dell," 
Acts8:19 oun penas ap lende: “Denn man ninna koy zoor, te lell hakeno, koneske me o vast pre čivau, o Debleskro Dourho!”" 
Acts8:20 O Petro penas ap leste: “Dja pash o bengeste, tou oun tire love! Tou patseh čačepah, te nay gineh tou i loventsa o Debleskri zoor!" 
Acts8:21 Kava koova, hoy mer krah, hi o Debleskro koova oun gar tiro koova. Tiro dji hi gar čačo glan o Debleste." 
Acts8:22 Kanna, mouk tiro čilačo drom, oun pen o Debleske, te khaytell tout ko čilačo koova, hoy tou kral. Oun mange lestar, te lell lo koy doosh toutar!" 
Acts8:23 Me dikau, kay hal pherdo čilačo koova, oun ko čilačepen hi o ray pral toute.”" 
Acts8:24 Koy penas o Simon ap lende: “Mangenn o Deblestar, te vell kova gar pral mande, hoy t'mer penan!”" 
Acts8:25 Har o Petro oun o Yohanni i menshenge penan, hoy o Yezous penas oun kras, djan yon pale an o foro Yerusalem. Ap lengro drom pale van le an boud gaba an ko them Samaria oun sikran kote i menshende o Yezouseskro drom." 
Acts8:26 O Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap o Filipo: “Ste pre oun dja ap ko drom, kay djal dran Yerusalem tele an ko foro Gaza. Ap ko drom hi gar boud menshe.”" 
Acts8:27 Koy stas lo pre oun djas kote. Ap ko drom his ninna i morsh dran o them Etiopia. Ap kava tsiro his i bari rani i rayetsa pral o them Etiopia. Oun ko morsh his i pralstouno an lakro them oun das garda ap lakro tselo bravlepen. Kova vas an o foro Yerusalem, te mangell yob o Debles an." 
Acts8:28 Har yob pale ap o drom his, te djal lo khere, his yob an peskro vourdin beshdo, oun draveras ko liil, kay o Debleskro rakepaskro Yesaya činas." 
Acts8:29 Koy penas o Debleskro Dourho ap o Filipeste: “Dja pash ko vourdin oun ač koy pashel!” 
Acts8:30 Oun o Filipo nashas koy, oun shounas, har kova ko liil draveras, hoy o Debleskro rakepaskro Yesaya činas. Oun o Filipo poučas lestar: “Hayveh tou, hoy tou dravereh?”" 
Acts8:31 “Na-a,” penas lo, “har nay hayvap, te penell mange kek, hoy koy činlo hi?” Oun yob mangas o Filipes, te vell yob pash leste an o vourdin, te beshell lo pes pash leste." 
Acts8:32 Kol laba, hoy yob draveras, his kolla: Yob his har i bakro, kay djal kote, kay vell lo maredo. Yob kras peskro mouy gar pre har i terno bakro, koleske činenn le i balla tele." 
Acts8:33 Yon kran leha, har te vals lo či moldo oun rakran gar o čačepen, har anan le les glan i čačepangre. Kek nay rakrell leskre čavendar. Leskro djipen vas kay phoubyatar krik lino." 
Acts8:34 Har ko pralstouno kova draveras, poučas lo o Filipestar: “Konestar rakrell o Debleskro rakepaskro? Rakrell yob pestar? Rakrell yob i vavarestar?”" 
Acts8:35 Koy penas o Filipo leske, hoy kol laba kamenn te penell, oun penas leske o lačo lab o Yezousestar." 
Acts8:36 Koy van le pash o pani, oun ko pralstouno penas: “Koy hi pani. Hi mange čomone an o drom čiddo, te moukap man te taufrell?”" 
Acts8:37 “Te patseh tou o tselo djiyestar ap o Yezous Kristeste, nay krau me kova,” penas o Filipo. Penas ko pralstuno: “Me patsau, kay hi o Yezous Kristo o Debleskro čavo.”" 
Acts8:38 Oun yob penas, te ačell ko vourdin tardo. Oun kol douy, o Filipo oun o pralstouno, djan khetne an o pani, oun o Filipo taufras les." 
Acts8:39 Har yon dran o pani vin djan, las o Debleskro Dourho o Filipes ap yek kopo kote krik. Oun ko pralstouno dikas les bouder gar. Oun yob djas barhteles peskro drom doureder." 
Acts8:40 O Filipes hatsan le an o foro Ashdod. Oun yob djas trouyel, oun penas o lačo lab o Yezousestar an kol tsele forya. Oun yaake vas lo an o foro Cesarea." 
Acts9:1 An ko tsiro his o Saules i bari rholi ap kolende, kay djan o Yezouseskro drom, kamas len te marell, oun djas pash ko baro rashayeste," 
Acts9:2 oun mangas kolestar lila, te nay djal lo an i biboldengre kangria an o foro Damaskus, te nay taprell yob kote kolen, morshen har djouvyen, kay ap o Yezouseskro drom djana, te anell lo len an o foro Yerusalem." 
Acts9:3 Har o Saulo ap ko drom his, kay djas an o foro Damaskus, vas ap yek kopo i zoreli momeli dran o bolepen troul leste." 
Acts9:4 Oun yob peras ap i phoub oun shounas i rakepen. Kova penas ap leste: “Saulo, Saulo, hoske leh tou man palla?”" 
Acts9:5 Penas lo: “Ray, koon hal tou?” Kova penas: “Me hom o Yezous, koles, kay tou palla leh." 
Acts9:6 Ste pre oun dja an ko foro! Koy penenn le touke, hoy te kress.”" 
Acts9:7 Kol morsha, kay pash leste his, kolenge ačas o rakepen krik. Yon shounan i rakepen oun dikan kekes." 
Acts9:8 Har o Saulo pre stas oun i yaka pre kras, his lo korelo. Yon lan les pash o vast oun anan les an o foro Damaskus." 
Acts9:9 Triin divessa nay dikas lo gar, oun rhas oun piyas či." 
Acts9:10 An o foro Damaskus his i patslo morsh. Kova kharas Anania. Kolestar moukas pes o ray Yezous an i souni te dikell. Oun yob penas: “Anania!” Oun o Anania penas: “Ake, hom, mo ray.”" 
Acts9:11 Oun o ray Yezous penas ap leste: “Ste pre oun dja ap ko drom, kay kharell o čačo drom. Pouč an ko kheer o Youdasestar pal i morsheste, kay kharell Saulo dran Tarsus. Yob mangell o Debles an," 
Acts9:12 oun dikas tout, Anania, an i souni, har val tou pash leste oun čival leske i vasta pre, te nay dikell lo pale.”" 
Acts9:13 O Anania penas: “Ray, me shounom boud pral ko morsheste, havo čilačo koova yob kol patslenge an o foro Yerusalem kras." 
Acts9:14 Mer shounam ninna, kay las yob lila kol bare rashayendar, te nay taprell yob men oun čivell men stildo, lauter kolen, kay tout an-mangenna.”" 
Acts9:15 Penas o ray Yezous leske: “Dja pash leste! Me rodom koles vin, te vell yob mange koy, te djal lo pash kolende, kay kek bibolde hi, pash lengre bare rayende, oun pash kol tsele biboldende, te penell lo lenge mandar." 
Acts9:16 Me kamau leste te sikrell, kay hounte lell yob boud douka mange ap peste.”" 
Acts9:17 O Anania djas koy, vas an ko kheer, čivas i vasta ap o Sauleste oun penas: “Miro phraal Saulo, maro ray Yezous bičras man, kova, kay moukas pes ap ko drom toutar te dikell. Yob kamell, te dikess tou nay pale, oun te vess pherdo Debleskro Dourho.”" 
Acts9:18 Ap yek kopo, har te perals ko tamlepen leskre yakendar tele, dikas lo nay pale, stas pre oun moukas pes te taufrell." 
Acts9:19 Palle rhas oun piyas o Saulo oun vas pale zorelo. Oun o Saulo ačas i tsiro pash kol patslende an o foro Damaskus," 
Acts9:20 oun rakras an i biboldengre kangria, oun sikras len, kay o Yezous o Debleskro čavo hi." 
Acts9:21 Lauter kolla, kay shounan kova, ačas o rakepen krik, oun yon penan: “Hi kova gar ko morsh, kay las an o foro Yerusalem i tsele patslen palla, oun kamas len te marell, kolen, kay denn o Yezouseskro lab an-gole? Vas yob gar kate, te anell yob i patslen pandlo glan kol bare rashayende an o foro Yerusalem?”" 
Acts9:22 O Saulo rakras bari zoryah oun sikras len, kay hi o Yezous o Kristo, kay vas o Deblestar bičedo, yaake te nay penan i bibolde, kay an o foro Damaskus djivan, či bouder." 
Acts9:23 Pal boudeder divessa van kol bibolde khetne, rakran pral ko koova, oun penan: “Mer marah les.”" 
Acts9:24 Kova vas o Sauleske penlo. I rati oun ap o dives dan i bibolde yak glan kol foreskre voudya, te taprenn le les, oun te marenn le les." 
Acts9:25 Doleske anan leskre mala les an i rati pash koy massouri, hoy troul o foro hi, oun moukan les an i korba pral i massouri tele, te vas lo dran o foro vin." 
Acts9:26 Oun yob djas an o foro Yerusalem, oun kote kamas lo pash kol patslende te djal. Kolla trashan lestar lauter oun patsan gar, kay yob ap o Yezouseskro drom djala." 
Acts9:27 O Barnabas las les pash peste oun anas les pash kol Yezouseskre bičepangre, oun penas lenge, har o Saulo ap ko drom, kay djal an o foro Damaskus, o ray Yezouses dikas, oun kova leha rakras, oun har yob an o foro Damaskus i menshenge o Yezousestar penas, oun les kek daar his, te rakrell lo lestar." 
Acts9:28 Oun o Saulo ačas an o foro Yerusalem, oun djas pash i patslende dren oun vin, oun sikras i menshende o Yezouseskro drom oun trashas gar, te rakrell lo o Yezousestar." 
Acts9:29 Yob rakras ninna kol biboldentsa, kay rakrenn grichtikes, oun čingras lentsa pral kova, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi. Kal bibolde kaman les te taprell oun te marell." 
Acts9:30 Har kol patsle kova shounan, anan le les an o foro Cesarea, oun bičran les doureder an o foro Tarsus." 
Acts9:31 I patsle an i themma Youdea, Galilea oun Samaria, kolen his kanna i lačo tsiro, kek las len bouder palla. Oun o Debleskro Dourho kras len zoreles an o patsepen. Oun yon shounan ap o Debleste oun boud oun boudeder menshe van patslo." 
Acts9:32 Har o Petro an o tselo them trouyel djas, vas yob ninna pash kol patslende an o foro Lidda." 
Acts9:33 Koy hatsas lo i morshes, leskro lab hi Aneas. Kova his orhta bersha ap o čiben čiddo, oun nay nashas gar." 
Acts9:34 O Petro penas ap leste: “Aneas, o Yezous Kristo krell tout sasto. Ste pre oun kre kokres tiro čiben!” Koy stas yob sik pre." 
Acts9:35 Koy dikan le les lauter, kay an i forya Lidda oun Saron djivenna. Oun yon dan pengro djipen o Yezouseste, maro rayeste." 
Acts9:36 An o foro Yoppe djivas i patsli. Lakro lab his Tabita ap hebretikes oun Dorkas ap grichtikes. Koya kras boud lačo koova, oun das boud love kol čorvelende." 
Acts9:37 An ko tsiro vas yoy nasseli oun meras. Koy thovan yon lat oun čivan lat an koy pralstouni isema. 
Acts9:38 O foro Yoppe his pash o foro Lidda čiddo. Oun har i patsle shounan, kay o Petro an ko foro his, bičran yon douy morshen pash leste, oun mangan les, te vell yob yaake sik har djala pash lende." 
Acts9:39 O Petro stas pre oun djas lentsa. Har yob kote vas, anan yon les an koy pralstouni isema, kay koy mouli djouvel čiddo hi. Boud djouvya, kolengre romma moulo hi, his kote oun rovan. Kolla van pash leste oun sikran leste kol ripya, kay i Tabita kras, har yoy djivas." 
Acts9:40 Oun o Petro tradas len vin, djas ap i čanga glan o Debleste, mangas o Debles, oun djas pash koy mouli djouvyate oun penas: “Tabita, ste pre!” Koy kras yoy peskre yaka pre. Har yoy o Petres dikas, beshas pes li pre." 
Acts9:41 Oun yob das lat o vast oun hadas lat pre. Palle das yob kol patslen gole, ninna kol djouvyen, kolengre romma moulo his. Oun yoy his djido glan lende tardo." 
Acts9:42 Kova shounan i tsele menshe an o foro Yoppe, oun boud van patslo ap o ray Yezouseste." 
Acts9:43 Oun o Petro ačas boud divessa an o foro Yoppe pash ko morsheste, kay kharell Simon. Kova his yek, kay boudrell firhengre mortsi." 
Acts10:1 An o foro Cesarea djivas i morsh, ko kharas Kornelio. Kova his i Remaryengro pralstouno pral sheel lourdende. Kolen kharan le i lourde dran Italia." 
Acts10:2 Kova his i lačo morsh oun patsas ap o Debleste peskre tsele menshentsa. Yob das boud i čorvelende, oun mangas o Debles hako dives an." 
Acts10:3 His i dives. His trinenge. Koy dikas ko morsh i Debleskro bolepaskres, har kova pash leste dren vas. Ko bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Kornelio!”" 
Acts10:4 Koles his daar, har yob dikas les, oun penas ap leste: “Hoy kameh tou mandar, ray?” Oun kova penas ap leste: “O Devel shounas, har tou les an-mangal. Oun yob dikas ko lačepen, hoy tou kral i čorvelenge. Oun yob bistras kova gar." 
Acts10:5 Biče kanna morshen an o foro Yoppe, te anenn le o Simones pash toute. Kova kharella ninna Petro." 
Acts10:6 Yob hi an o kheer, kay ko Simon djivella, kay boudrell i firhengri mortsi. Leskro kheer hi pash o baro pani čiddo.”" 
Acts10:7 Har o bolepaskro peske djas, kharas o Kornelio douy boudepangren oun i patslo lourdes pash peste kolendar, kay his hako tsiro pash leste." 
Acts10:8 Kolenge penas yob lauter, hoy o bolepaskro penas, oun bičras len an o foro Yoppe." 
Acts10:9 O vavar dives, har yon pash o foro Yoppe van, djas o Petro ap o kheer pral pre, te mangell lo o Debles an. His rhapaskro tsiro." 
Acts10:10 Koy las yob bok oun kamas te rhal. Har kran le leske i rhapen, moukas o Devel les čomone te dikell." 
Acts10:11 Yob dikas, har o bolepen pre djas oun čomone pral tele vas ap i phoub. Kova his har i bari plarhta. Koya vas ap hake star rigya rikedo." 
Acts10:12 Koy dren his boud firhe: firhe star heryentsa, sapa, oun čirkle." 
Acts10:13 Oun o Petro shounas, har yek penas: “Petro, ste pre, kre len moulo oun rha!”" 
Acts10:14 O Petro penas: “Na-a, miro ray! An miro tselo djipen rhom me či, hoy pale-čiddo hi.”" 
Acts10:15 Oun yob shounas i douyto kopo, har yek leha rakras oun penas: “Ma kre pale-čiddo, hoy o Devel erligo kras!”" 
Acts10:16 Kova djas triin kope yaake. Palle djas koy plarhta pale an o bolepen. 
Acts10:17 O Petro hayvas gar, hoske yob kova dikas, oun poučas pestar, hoy kamas o Devel leske te penell. Koy his i morsha, kay o Kornelio pal o Simoneskro kheer bičras, glan o voudar tardo." 
Acts10:18 Yon dan gole oun poučan: “Hi o Simon Petro pash t'mende?” 
Acts10:19 Har djas o Petreske kova an o shero trouyel, hoy yob dikas, koy penas o Debleskro Dourho ap leste: “Dik, triin morsha rodenn tout." 
Acts10:20 Ste pre, dja tele, oun dja lentsa! Pats, hoy yon touke penenn! Me bičrom len.”" 
Acts10:21 Koy djas o Petro tele pash lende oun penas: “Me hom kova, kay t'mer rodenna. Hoske han t'mer kay?”" 
Acts10:22 Penan le: “O Kornelio, ko pralstouno i lourdendar, bičras men. Kova hi i lačo morsh, oun patsell ap o Debleste. I tsele bibolde rakrenn lačes pral leste. I Debleskro bolepaskro penas ap leste, te lell yob tout an peskro kheer, oun te shounell yob, hoy tou leske kameh te penell.”" 
Acts10:23 Oun o Petro moukas len an o kheer te vell, oun das len i isema, te ačenn le kote. O vavar dives djas yob lentsa an o foro Cesarea. Oun vavar patsle dran o foro Yoppe djan ninna leha." 
Acts10:24 O dives koy pre vas yob an o foro Cesarea. Kote his o Kornelio peskre menshentsa oun malentsa khetne. Yob das len gole, te shounenn le halauter, hoy o Petro lenge penella." 
Acts10:25 Oun har o Petro dren vas, djas o Kornelio pash leste, vitsras pes glan leskre pire tele, oun mangas les an." 
Acts10:26 O Petro hadas les pre oun penas: “Ste pre! Me hom i mensho har tou.” 
Acts10:27 Oun har yon yaake rakran, djan yon an o kheer, oun hatsan boud menshen kote, kay khetne van." 
Acts10:28 Oun o Petro penas ap lende: “T'mer djinenna, te hi kova i biboldeske pale-čiddo, te djal lo an o kheer dren, hoy gar i biboldeskro hi. Oun kek vi-themari vell pash i biboldeste an o kheer dren. Mande sikras o Devel, te rikrap kekes pale-čiddo." 
Acts10:29 Doleske rikrom man gar pale, te vap pash t'mende, har t'mer man kharan. Me poučau t'mendar kanna, hoy kamenn mandar.”" 
Acts10:30 Koy penas o Kornelio: “Glan star divessa, his trinenge, mangom o Debles an miro kheer an. Koy his ap yek kopo i morsh glan mande tardo. Koleskre koola his biyalo." 
Acts10:31 Oun yob penas ap mande: Kornelio, o Devel shounas tout, oun hoy tou dal kol čorvelende, dikas o Devel ninna." 
Acts10:32 Kanna biče morshen an o foro Yoppe, te anenn le o Petres pash toute. Kova hi an o kheer, kay ko Simon djivella, kay boudrell i firhengri mortsi. Leskro kheer hi pash o baro pani čiddo." 
Acts10:33 Oun me bičrom morshen pash toute. Oun kova his mishto, kay tou val. Kanna ham mer lauter glan o Debleste khetne, te shounas lauter, hoy o Devel, maro ray, touke penas.”" 
Acts10:34 Oun o Petro penas: “Kanna hayvau me čačepah: O Devel dikell gar koy pre, have menshendar yek vella: te vell lo i biboldendar, – te vell lo kolendar, kay kek bibolde hi. Yob dikell lačes ap hakeneste, kay trashell lestar, oun kay krell o čačepen." 
Acts10:35  
Acts10:36 Yob moukas i biboldenge o lačo lab te penell, te hi o Yezous Kristo kova, kay anell len pash o Debleste. Yob hi gar lengro ray kokres, na-a, yob hi o ray pral halauter." 
Acts10:37 T'mer djinenna, hoy djas an o them Galilea, oun palle an o tselo them Youdea pal ko tsiro, har kharas o Yohanni i menshen, te moukenn le pen te taufrell." 
Acts10:38 T'mer djinenn, har das o Devel o Yezouseste dran Nazaret peskro Dourho oun peskri zoor. Oun yob djas trouyel oun kras lačo koova, oun kras lauteren sasto, kay o beng pandas. O Devel his pash leste." 
Acts10:39 Mer dikam lauter, hoy yob an o biboldengro them oun an o foro Yerusalem kras. Koles dan le ap o troushel, oun maran les." 
Acts10:40 Pal triin divessa kras o Devel les i moulendar djides. Oun o Yezous moukas pes i menshendar te dikell. 
Acts10:41 Yob moukas pes gar i tsele menshendar te dikell. Na-a. Men rodas o Devel vin, te dikas les. Oun har yob i moulendar djido vas, rham oun piyam mer leha. Kova penah i menshenge, oun kova hi čačo." 
Acts10:42 Yob penas menge, te penas mer i tsele menshenge, kay o Devel rodas les vin, te hi lo o čačepaskro ray, kay rakrell o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende, pral kolende, kay djivenna, oun ninna pral i moulende." 
Acts10:43 Kolestar rakrenn i tsele Debleskre rakepangre an pengre lila. Yon penenn, kay lell o Devel i doosh hakenestar krik, koon ap o Yezous Kristeste patsella.”" 
Acts10:44 Har o Petro yaake rakras, peras o Debleskro Dourho ap lauterende, kay les shounan." 
Acts10:45 Kol patsle biboldenge, kay o Petreha van, ačas o rakepen krik, har yon dikan, kay peras o Debleskro Dourho ninna ap kolende, kay kek bibolde hi." 
Acts10:46 Yon shounan, har kol menshe an i vavar rakepen rakran, oun o Debles sharan. Koy penas o Petro ap lende:" 
Acts10:47 “Kolla lan o Debleskro Dourho yaake har mer. Nay rikrah mer len pale, te moukenn le pen te taufrell?”" 
Acts10:48 Oun yob penas: “Moukenn t'men te taufrell, te sikrenn t'mer, kay patsenn ap o Yezous Kristeste!” Pal kova mangan le o Petres, te ačell lo triin, star divessa pash lende." 
Acts11:1 Kol Yezouseskre bičepangre oun kol vavar patsle an o them Youdea shounan, kay ninna kolla, kay kek bibolde hi, ap o Debleskro lab patsan." 
Acts11:2 Har o Petro an o foro Yerusalem vas, čingran kol patsle bibolde leha." 
Acts11:3 Oun yon penan ap leste: “Tou djal pash kolende, kay hi gar bibolde, oun rhal lentsa.”" 
Acts11:4 Koy penas o Petro lenge, yek pal o vavar, hoy koy djas:" 
Acts11:5 “Me homs an o foro Yoppe,” penas yob, “oun mangom o Debles an. Koy moukas o Devel man čomone te dikell. Me dikom čomone har i bari plarhta. Koya vas ap star rigya rikedo, oun vas tele dran o bolepen pash mande." 
Acts11:6 Har me dren dikom, dikom me boud firhe: star-heryengre firhe, sapa oun čirkle." 
Acts11:7 Oun yek rakras ap mande: Petro, mare len oun rha len!" 
Acts11:8 Penom me: Na-a, ray! An miro tselo djipen rhom me či, hoy hi pale-čiddo." 
Acts11:9 Ko rakepen dran o bolepen penas pale: Ma kre pale-čiddo, hoy o Devel erligo kras!" 
Acts11:10 Kova djas triin kope. Oun halauter djas pale an o bolepen. 
Acts11:11 Ap yek kopo his triin morsha tardo glan ko kheer, kay djivom. Kolla van dran o foro Cesarea pash mande." 
Acts11:12 Oun o Debleskro Dourho penas ap mande: Pats, hoy yon touke penenna! Dja lentsa! Oun me djom shob phralentsa an o kheer ko morshestar, kay kol triin morshen pash mande bičras." 
Acts11:13 Kova penas menge, har dikas yob i bolepaskres an peskro kheer, oun kay kova ap leste penas: Biče morshen an o foro Yoppe, te lenn le o Simones. Yob kharella ninna Petro." 
Acts11:14 Kova penell touke, har leh tou oun i menshe an tiro kheer o Debleskro djipen." 
Acts11:15 Har me, o Petro, lentsa rakrom, peras o Debleskro Dourho ap lende. Kova his yaake har pash mende an o foro Yerusalem, har o Debleskro Dourho ap mende peras." 
Acts11:16 Koy djan kol laba an miro shero trouyel, hoy menge maro ray Yezous penas: O Yohanni čivas i menshen an o pani. Ap t'mende čivell o Devel peskro Debleskro Dourho." 
Acts11:17 Me dikom, o Devel das lende ninna peskro Dourho, yaake har yob mende das, har mer patsam ap o rayeste, o Yezous Kristeste. Koon hom me, te rikrap me o Debles pre?”" 
Acts11:18 Har yon kova shounan, čingran le bouder gar ap o Petreste. Yon sharan o Debles oun penan: “O Devel sikras ninna kolende peskro drom an o nevo djipen, kay hi kek bibolde. Yon nay moukenn pengro čilačo drom oun venn ap o Debleskro drom.”" 
Acts11:19 An ko tsiro, kay o Stefano maredo vas, van i patsle palla lino. Kolla nashan dran o foro Yerusalem, oun djan an i themma Fenicia oun Ciprus, oun an o foro Antiochia. Oun yon penan kote kokres i biboldenge o Debleskro lab, oun kek vavarenge." 
Acts11:20 Mashkral kol patslende his ninna morsha dran Ciprus oun Kirene. Kolla van an o foro Antiochia, oun penan ninna kolenge, kay kek bibolde hi, o lačo lab o ray Yezousestar." 
Acts11:21 Oun o rayeskri zoor his lentsa. Oun boud kolendar, kay kek bibolde hi, van patslo, oun van ap o Yezouseskro drom." 
Acts11:22 Oun i patsle an o foro Yerusalem shounan kova, oun bičran o Barnabes an o foro Antiochia." 
Acts11:23 Har yob koy his oun dikas, hoy o Devel an peskro baro lačepen kote lauter kras, vas lo barhtelo oun mangas len, te ačenn le pengro tselo djiyeha pash o Yezouseste." 
Acts11:24 O Barnabas his i lačo morsh. Yob his pherdo Debleskro Dourho. Oun les his i baro patsepen. Oun boud van patslo ap o ray Yezouseste. 
Acts11:25 Oun o Barnabas djas an o foro Tarsus, te rodell lo o Saules." 
Acts11:26 Har o Barnabas les hatsas, anas lo les an o foro Antiochia. Oun kol douy ačan i tselo bersh kote pash i patslende, oun penan boud menshenge o Debleskro lab. Kote dan yon i patslen ko lab Kriste." 
Acts11:27 An kol divessa van Debleskre rakepangre dran o Yerusalem an o foro Antiochia. 
Acts11:28 Yek lendar his o Agabo. Yob stas mashkral i patslende pre, oun penas glan-vi, hoy o Debleskro Dourho leske penas, te vell i bari bok pral i tseli phoub. Oun har o Klaudio o baro ray an o foro Rom his, vas kova yaake." 
Acts11:29 Koy penan kol patsle an o foro Antiochia: “Mer dah mare phralen an o them Youdea yaake boud love, har hakeno nay della.”" 
Acts11:30 Oun yon dan o Barnabes oun o Saules kol love, te denn yon kol love kolende, kay hi i phoureder mank i patslende an o them Youdea." 
Acts12:1 An ko tsiro moukas o baro ray Herodes i patslen te stilell, oun moukas len dava te dell." 
Acts12:2 Yob maras o Yohanneskro phrales, o Yakobes, o rhareha." 
Acts12:3 Har o Herodes hayvas, kay kova mishto his an i biboldengre yaka, moukas yob ninna o Petres te taprell. Kova his an ko tsiro, kay rhan i bibolde kek shoutlo maro." 
Acts12:4 Har yon les tapran, vitsran le les an o stilepen. Oun o Herodes penas, te denn star kope star lourde yak ap leste. Star lourde dan i paash dives yak ap leste. Oun pal i paash dives dan vavar star lourde yak ap leste. Oun ninna yaake djas kova ratsyakro. Pal kol divessa, kay Passa kharenna, kamas o Herodes les glan i menshende te anell, te dell lo les glan lende i phagi." 
Acts12:5 Har o Petro an o stilepen his, mangan i tsele patsle pengro tselo djiyeha o Debles leske ap i rati oun ap o dives." 
Acts12:6 An i rat glan ko dives, kay kamas o Herodes les vin anell, te dell lo les i phagi, sovas o Petro mashkral douy lourdende. Yob his pandlo douy sasterne shellentsa, oun douy lourde dan yak glan o voudar." 
Acts12:7 Ap yek kopo his an ko stilepen i zoreli momeli, oun o Debleskro bolepaskro his koy tardo, oun das o Petres an i rig, djangras les pre, oun penas: “Ste sik pre!” Oun kol sasterne shelle peran leskre vastendar tele." 
Acts12:8 Oun ko bolepaskro penas ap leste: “Čip tiri dori troul tiro ripen, oun rib tire kirrha, oun čip tiri plaashka troul toute, oun am mantsa!” Oun yob kras kova." 
Acts12:9 Oun o Petro djas leha dran o stilepen vin. Yob djinas gar, kay kova lauter čačepen hi. Yob patsas, te dell lo souni." 
Acts12:10 Douy kope djan le pash kol lourdende pashel, kay yak dan. Oun kolla dikan len gar. Oun yaake van yon pash i baro sasterno voudar. Kova his ko voudar, hoy djas an o foro. Ko voudar djas kokres pre. Yon djan vin, oun van ap o drom. Har djan le i kotar drom, his ap yek kopo ko bolepaskro gar bouder koy." 
Acts12:11 Kanna djinas o Petro, kay kova kek souni his, oun yob penas: “Kanna djinau čačepah, kay bičras o ray Yezous peskro bolepaskres mange. Oun kova las man dran o Herodeskre vasta vin, ninna dran halauter, hoy kaman i bibolde mantsa te krell.”" 
Acts12:12 Har kova an leskro shero vas, djas yob pash i Mariakro kheer. Lakro čavo his o Yohanni, kay ninna Marko kharedo vella. Kote his boud patsle khetne oun mangan o Debles." 
Acts12:12 Har kova an leskro shero vas, djas yob pash i Mariakro kheer. Lakro čavo his o Yohanni, kay ninna Marko kharedo vella. Kote his boud patsle khetne oun mangan o Debles." 
Acts12:13 O Petro das o vasteha ap o voudar, oun i boudepaskretsa vas. Lakro lab his Roda. Yoy kamas te shounell, koon koy hi." 
Acts12:14 Oun har yoy shounas, kay kova o Petro hi, kras li i barhtyatar o voudar gar pre, nashas pale oun penas: “O Petro hi glan o voudar tardo.”" 
Acts12:15 Koy penan yon ap late: “Hal tou dinelo?” Yoy ačas koy pashel, kay kova yaake hi. Koy penan yon: “Kova hi o bolepaskro, kay dell yak ap leste.”" 
Acts12:16 O Petro moukas gar tele, te dell lo ap o voudar. Har yon kanna pre kran, dikan yon les. Koy ačas lenge o mouy pre." 
Acts12:17 I vastentsa sikras lo len, te denn le kek gole, oun penas lenge, har o ray Yezous les dran o stilepen vin las. Oun ninna penas o Petro lenge: “Penenn kova o Yakobeske, oun kol vavar phralenge!” Palle djas yob vin, oun djas peske an i vavar foro." 
Acts12:18 Taysarlake dikan i lourde, kay his o Petro bouder gar an o stilepen oun poučan pendar, hoy leha djas. Oun i bari daar vas ap lende." 
Acts12:19 Har o Herodes penas, te vell o Petro vin anlo, oun yob bouder gar koy his, moukas lo les te rodell. Oun yon hatsan les gar. Koy poučas lo i lourdendar, kay dan yak glan o voudar, har vas nay o Petro vin. Oun palle moukas yob kolen te marell. Palle djas o Herodes dran o them Youdea, oun vas an o foro Cesarea, oun ačas i tsiro kote." 
Acts12:20 O Herodes vas rhoyemen ap i menshende an i forya Tirus oun Sidon. Kolla lan pengro rhapen dran o Herodeskro them. Doleske bičran le khetne morshen pash leste, te vell lo pale lačo lenge. Kolla rakran koleha, kay das yak ap o Herodeskro kheer, leskro lab his Blasto, oun penan leske, te kamenn le bouder kek čingepen, oun mangan lestar, te penell yob kova o Herodeske." 
Acts12:21 I dives vas vin kerdo, kay kamas o Herodes lentsa te rakrell. Ap ko dives rivas o Herodes peskre rayengre koola an, beshas pes ap peskro raylo beshepaskro, oun rakras i baro rakepen." 
Acts12:22 Kol menshe dan gole: “Yaake rakrell kek mensho. Yaake rakrell i devel!” 
Acts12:23 Yaake moukas pes o Herodes i menshendar te sharell, har te vals yob o Devel. Oun har yob kova kras, das les o Debleskro bolepaskro i nasslepen, te rhan i kirme les pre, oun yob meras." 
Acts12:24 An boud gaba oun forya vas o Debleskro lab penlo. Oun boudeder oun boudeder menshe patsan ap o ray Yezouseste. 
Acts12:25 O Barnabas oun o Saulo anan kol love i patslenge an o foro Yerusalem. Palle van le pale an o foro Antiochia. Lentsa djas o Yohanni Marko. 
Acts12:25 O Barnabas oun o Saulo anan kol love i patslenge an o foro Yerusalem. Palle van le pale an o foro Antiochia. Lentsa djas o Yohanni Marko. 
Acts13:1 Mashkral i patslende an o foro Antiochia his Debleskre rakepangre oun sikepangre. Kolla his o Barnabas oun o Simon, ap koleste penan le Kalo, ninna o Lucio dran o foro Kirene, oun o Manaen. Kova his i maal o baro rayestar Herodes Antipas. Oun o Saulo his ninna mank lende." 
Acts13:2 His i dives, kay sharan le o Debles oun rhan či, te venn le leske feteder koy. Koy penas lenge o Debleskro Dourho: “Bičrenn o Barnabes oun o Saules vin, te krenn le koy boudi, hoy me len dau. Me dom len gole, te krenn le kova.”" 
Acts13:3 Oun yon rhan gomme i tikno tsiro či oun mangan o Debles an. Palle, čivan le i vasta ap lende oun penan: “Ačenn mo Debleha!” oun moukan len te djal." 
Acts13:4 O Debleskro Dourho bičras o Barnabes oun o Saules an o foro Seleucia. Oun palle ouleran le ap o shiffo an o them Ciprus. 
Acts13:5 Oun har yon an ko foro Salamis van, penan le o Debleskro lab kote an i biboldengre kangria. Oun o Yohanni Marko boudras lentsa." 
Acts13:5 Oun har yon an ko foro Salamis van, penan le o Debleskro lab kote an i biboldengre kangria. Oun o Yohanni Marko boudras lentsa." 
Acts13:6 Yon djan an o tselo them Ciprus trouyel, oun van ap i vavar rig ko themestar oun djan an o foro Pafos. Kote tapran le i biboldes. Kova kharas Bar-Yezous oun his i dourkepaskro. Yob penas pestar, te hi lo i Debleskro rakepaskro. Kova his i rhorhepen." 
Acts13:7 Yob his pash ko pralstuneste pral o them Ciprus. Leskro lab his Sergio Paulo. Kova his i gosevo morsh. Yob moukas o Barnabes oun o Saules gole te dell, te penenn yon leske o Debleskro lab." 
Acts13:8 Ko dourkepaskro, o Elimas, – yaake his leskro lab ap grichtikes, – kamas kova gar oun kras lauter, te rikrell lo ko pralstounes pale, te vell yob gar patslo." 
Acts13:9 O Saulo, kay kharell ninna Paulo, pherdo Debleskro Dourho, dikas ap leste," 
Acts13:10 oun penas: “Tou bengeskro čavo! Tou hal pherdo čilačepen. Oun rhorhepen hi an toute. Tou kameh gar o čačepen. Oun moukeh gar tele o Debleskre čače dromma banges te krell. 
Acts13:11 Kanna dikeh tou, har o ray Yezous touke i phagi della. Tou veh korelo, oun dikeh i tsiro o kham bouder gar.” Ap yek kopo vas lauter tamlo glan leskre yaka. Oun yob djas trouyel, te nay rodell lo yekes, kay lell les pash o vast." 
Acts13:12 Har ko pralstouno kova dikas, vas yob patslo, oun kras bare yaka pral kova, hoy yob pral o ray Yezouseste shounas." 
Acts13:13 Pal kova djas o Paulo oun kolla, kay pash leste his, dran o foro Pafos. Ap o shiffo ouleran yon an o foro Perge. Kova hi an ko them Pamfilia čiddo. O Yohanni Marko djas peske lendar, oun djas pale an o foro Yerusalem." 
Acts13:13 Pal kova djas o Paulo oun kolla, kay pash leste his, dran o foro Pafos. Ap o shiffo ouleran yon an o foro Perge. Kova hi an ko them Pamfilia čiddo. O Yohanni Marko djas peske lendar, oun djas pale an o foro Yerusalem." 
Acts13:14 Yon djan dran o foro Perge doureder, oun van an o foro Antiochia. Kova hi an ko them Pisidia čiddo. Ap ko Debleskro dives djan yon an i biboldengri kangri, oun beshan pen kote tele." 
Acts13:15 Koy pal, har i bibolde dran kol lila glan draveran, hoy o Mose oun o Debleskre rakepangre činan, moukan lenge kol pralstoune pral i biboldengri kangri te penell: “Mare phrala, te kamenn t'mer menge i lab te penell, hoy krell men zorelo an o patsepen, penenn les menge!”"
