Romans14:18 Koon yaake djivella, kova sharell o Yezous Kristes. Ap leste dikell o Devel lačes. Oun pash i menshende hi lo an-diklo." 
Romans14:19 Kanna kras lauter, te vell kek čingepen mank mende. Kras kova, hoy krell men lauter zoreles an o patsepen." 
Romans14:20 Ma krenn kova paash, hoy o Devel kras! Ninna te hi kek rhapen pale-čiddo an peste, nay vell yekes i pharo dji, te rhal lo čomone, hoy leske pale-čiddo hi. Oun kova hi gar mishto." 
Romans14:21 Hi feteder, te rhah tou kek mass oun te piyeh tou kek mool oun kreh či, hoy anell tiro phrales o Debleskro dromestar tele." 
Romans14:22 Kova, hoy tou patseh an kava koova, djineh tou oun o Devel kokres. Tou hounte sikress les lende gar. Barhtelo hal tou, te kreh lauter yaake, te hounte peness touke gar: Kova, hoy krom, his gar mishto." 
Romans14:23 Koon rhal čomone, oun leskro dji vell pharo koy pashel, kova kras čomone, hoy vas gar dran o patsepen. Doleske anas lo doosh ap peste. Kova, hoy vell gar dran o patsepen, anell doosh ap mende." 
Romans15:1 Mer, kay ham zorelo an o patsepen, hounte dikas ap kolende, kay hi gar zorelo an o patsepen, te hidjras mer lentsa, hoy lenge pharo hi. Mer hounte dikas gar ap mende kokres, te djal menge mishto." 
Romans15:2 Hakeno mendar hounte djivell yaake, te dikell o vavar lačes ap leste oun vell zorleder an o patsepen." 
Romans15:3 Ninna o Yezous Kristo dikas gar ap peste, te djal leske mishto. An o Debleskro lab hi činlo pral leste: O praasepen kol menshendar, kay o Debles praasan, peras ap leste." 
Romans15:4 Lauter kova, hoy an o phouro tsiro an o Debleskro lab činlo vas, vas činlo, te las mer nevi zoor dran o Debleskro lab, oun das maro patsepen gar pre, oun dikas ap ko lačepen, hoy o Devel men della, an ko tsiro hoy vella." 
Romans15:5 Oun o Devel, koon dell i nevi zoor oun krell t'men zoreles, te denn t'maro patsepen gar pre, lestar mangau me, te vell t'men yek dji oun yek djipen, yaake har o Yezous Kristo kova t'mendar kamella." 
Romans15:6 Palle nay sharenn t'mer o baro Debles halauter khetne. Yob hi o dad maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar." 
Romans15:7 Yaake har hi o Yezous Kristes i dji t'menge, yaake hounte vell t'men i dji yek o vavareske! Palle vell o Devel sharedo." 
Romans15:8 Oun me penau t'menge: O Yezous Kristo vas i biboldenge, te dikenn le, o Devel rikrell ap peskro lab, hoy das yob lengre phourende." 
Romans15:9 Oun yob vas t'menge, kay han kek bibolde, te sikrell lo t'mende o Debleskro baro lačepen, yaake te sharenn t'mer o Debles. An o Debleskro lab hi činlo, har penell o Yezous Kristo ap o Debleste: Doleske sharau tout mank kolende, kay hi kek bibolde, oun givau gilya touke." 
Romans15:10 Kote hi ninna činlo: T'mer, kay han kek bibolde, avenn barhteles khetne i biboldentsa. Yon hi kol menshe, kolen yob peske vin rodas!" 
Romans15:11 Oun ninna hi činlo: T'mer lauter, kay han kek bibolde, sharenn o Debles! T'mer, kay venna dran i tsele themma, givenn leske gilya!" 
Romans15:12 Oun o Debleskro rakepaskro, o Yesaya, penas glan i rah tsiro: Koy vell i morsh i menshendar, kolengro dad hi o Isay, kova vell o ray pral i menshende an i tsele themma. Ap koleste dikenn le, te vell lo lenge lačes." 
Romans15:13 Oun o Devel, kolestar o tselo lačepen vella, ap koleste dikah, lestar mangah, te venn t'mer čalo i barhtyatar an o dji dran t'maro patsepen, yaake te djinenn t'mer: Ko lačepen, hoy dell men o Devel an o tsiro, hoy vella, kova vell čačepah. Oun o Debleskro Dourho dell t'men i zoor, te dikenn boud oun boudeder ap o Debleste." 
Romans15:14 Mire phrala, me djinau čačepah, t'maro dji hi pherdo lačepen. Oun t'mer djinenn lauter, hoy o Devel t'mendar kamella. Yaake nay sikrell ko yek o vavareste o čačo drom." 
Romans15:15 Ninna te djinau kova, činom t'menge pral boud koova an kava liil. Me činom zorele labentsa, te bistrenn kova gar. Koy boudi das man o Devel an peskro lačepen." 
Romans15:16 Yob bičras man, te boudrap o Yezous Kristeske oun te djap pash kolende, kay kek bibolde hi, te sikrap len o Debleskro drom. Yaake hom har i rashay, kay anell kol menshen, kay kek bibolde hi, pash o Debleste. Oun o Devel dell len peskro Dourho, te venn le leskro. Oun yob dikell lačes ap lende." 
Romans15:17 O Yezous Kristo das man kay boudi. Doleske ladjap gar, te rakrap pral kova, hoy krau o Debleske." 
Romans15:18 Me kamau gar te rakrap pral vavar koova har pral kova, hoy kras o Yezous Kristo mank kolende, kay kek bibolde hi. Dran maro rakepen oun mari boudi anas o Yezous Kristo len pash peste, te shounenn le ap leste." 
Romans15:19 Oun yob sikras peskri zoor, har kras o Debleskro Dourho baro koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Yaake penom o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar an o tselo them troul o foro Yerusalem bis an o them Illirikum." 
Romans15:20 Ap o tselo drom penom ko lab kokres kote, kay o Yezous Kristo gar prindjedo his, yaake te penell kek ap mande: “Tou boudreh kote, kay i vavar glan toute boudras.”" 
Romans15:21 Yaake krom kova, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: Kolenge či lestar penlo vas, kolla prindjrenn les kanna. Kolla, kay lestar či shounan, kolla hayvenn kanna." 
Romans15:22 Doleske his man kek tsiro te vap pash t'mende. 
Romans15:23 Kanna hi miri boudi an kol themma kerdo. Oun me nay vau pash t'mende. Yaake kamom me kova glan boud bersha te krap. 
Romans15:24 Ap miro drom an o them Spania, kamoms te dikap t'men, oun te ačap i tikno tsiro pash t'mende. Te hom t'mentsa khetne, lau nevi zoor. Palle djau doureder, oun t'mer nay denn man lauter, hoy man hounte vell ap o drom." 
Romans15:25 Glan kova, kay vau pash t'mende hounte djap an o foro Yerusalem, te anap kote i čorvele patslenge kol love, hoy i patsle an i themma Macedonia oun Akaya kolenge khetne čivan." 
Romans15:26  
Romans15:27 Kol love dan le pengro tselo djiyestar. I patsle an o foro Yerusalem penan o Debleskro lačo lab kolenge, kay kek bibolde hi. Yaake hounte denn i patsle, kay kek bibolde hi, i biboldende lauter kova, hoy hounte vell len djipaske. Koya hi lengri siyaan." 
Romans15:28 Te dom i patslen an o foro Yerusalem kol tsele love, palle kamau ap o drom an o them Spania pash t'mende te vell." 
Romans15:29 Oun me djinau, te vau pash t'mende, anau t'menge i tseli barht, hoy vella o Yezous Kristestar." 
Romans15:30 Mire phrala, mangau t'mendar an o lab maro rayestar o Yezous Kristestar, oun an o kamlepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho men das: Mangenn mantsa khetne o Debles o tselo djiyeha," 
Romans15:31 te vap me gar dino an i vasta kolendar, kay patsenn gar ap o Debleste an o them Youdea. Mangenn les ninna, te lenn kol patsle an o foro Yerusalem kol love lačes pre, hoy anau lenge." 
Romans15:32 Palle nay vau barhteles pash t'mende, yaake har kamell o Devel, te lap nevi zoor pash t'mende." 
Romans15:33 O Devel djal t'mentsa lauterentsa oun dell t'men peskri barht an o dji! Amen. 
Romans16:1 Te vell mari pheen, i Febe, pash t'mende, mangau t'mendar, len lat lačes pash t'mende pre. Yoy hi o Debleskri boudepaskretsa an o foro Kenkrea. Lenn lat yaake lačes pash t'mende pre, har maro ray Yezous kova i patslendar kamella. Denn lat lauter kova, hoy lat hounte vell djipaske! Yoy his boud patslenge koy, ninna mange." 
Romans16:2  
Romans16:3 Penenn lače laba mandar ap i Priska oun ap o Akvila! Yon boudrenn mantsa o Yezous Kristeske. 
Romans16:4 Har kaman man i menshe te marell, van le ap miri rig. Lengro djipen his lenge či moldo. Pash lende parkrau man gar kokres, na-a, ninna i tsele patsle, kay kek bibolde hi, parkrenn pen pash lende." 
Romans16:5 Penenn ninna lače laba mandar ap kol patslende, kay an lengro kheer khetne venna, oun ap miro lačo maal, o Epayneto. Yob vas o ersto patslo an o them Asia." 
Romans16:6 Penenn ninna lače laba mandar ap i Mariat! Kaya boudras yaake boud t'menge. 
Romans16:7 Penenn ninna lače laba mandar ap o Androniko oun i Yunia! Kolla hi ninna bibolde har me oun his mantsa an o stilepen. Yon hi an-diklo mank kolende, kolen o Yezous Kristo vin bičras, te penenn le leskro lab. Kol douy van glan mande ap leste patslo." 
Romans16:8 Penenn ninna lače laba ap o Ampliato, miro lačo maal an o patsepen," 
Romans16:9 oun ap o Urbano, kay mentsa khetne o Yezous Kristeske boudrella, oun ap miro lačo maal, o Stakis." 
Romans16:10 Penenn ninna lače laba ap o Apelles! Kova sikras, te hi lo zoreles tardo an o patsepen. Penenn ninna lače laba ap o Aristobolo oun ap kolende, kay djivenn an leskro kheer." 
Romans16:11 Penenn lače laba ap o Herodion, kay hi i biboldo har me, oun ap o Narcisso oun kol patslende an leskro kheer." 
Romans16:12 Penenn lače laba ap i Trifena oun i Trifosa! Kolla boudrenn o Yezouseske, maro rayeske. Penenn lače laba ap miri lači pheen, i Persis! Koya kras i bari boudi i patslenge." 
Romans16:13 Penenn lače laba ap o Rufo, koles maro ray Yezous vin rodas, oun ap leskri date. Kaya hi mange yaake har miri day." 
Romans16:14 Penenn lače laba ap o Asinkrito, i Flegonta, o Hermes, o Patrobas, o Hermas oun ap i patslende, kay pash lende hi." 
Romans16:15 Penenn lače laba ap o Filologo oun i Yulia, o Nereo oun leskri pheen, oun ap o Olimpas oun kol tsele patsle, kay pash lende hi." 
Romans16:16 Taprenn t'men trouyel, oun denn t'men i čoum! Kova sikrella hakeneste, t'mer han phrala oun phenya an o patsepen. I tsele patsle, kay ap o Yezous Kristeste patsenna, penenn t'menge: Ačenn maro Debleha!" 
Romans16:17 Mire phrala, me mangau t'men, denn yak, te shounenn t'mer gar ap kolende, kay anenn čingepen mank i patslende oun sikrenn o Debleskro drom vavarčandes har kova, hoy t'mende siklo vas, oun krenn t'maro patsepen paash! Rikrenn t'men lendar pale!" 
Romans16:18 Save menshe boudrenn gar maro rayeske, o Yezous Kristeske. Na-a, yon krenn, hoy lenge kokres mishto hi. Shoukar labentsa oun baro rakepen anenn le kolen o Debleskro dromestar tele, kay denn gar yak." 
Romans16:19 Boud menshe shounan, kay t'mer ap o Debleste patsenn oun ap leste shounenn. Doleske hom me barhtelo pral t'mende. Oun me kamau o tselo djiyestar, te hayvenn t'mer boud oun boudeder, hoy lačo hi, oun te krenn kek čilačo koova." 
Romans16:20 O Devel, kay dell t'men peskri barht an o dji, krell o bengeskri zoor paash. Oun ko tsiro vell sik. O lačepen maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, djal t'mentsa!" 
Romans16:21 O Timoteo, kay mantsa boudrella, penell t'menge lače laba. Ninna o Louka, oun o Yason, oun o Sosipater, – kolla hi lauter bibolde har me, – yon penenn t'menge lače laba." 
Romans16:22 Me, o Tertio, činom an kava liil kova, hoy o Paulo mange penas, oun me penau t'menge ninna lače laba." 
Romans16:23 O Gayo, – kova las man an leskro kheer dren, – penell t'menge lače laba. An leskro kheer venn i tsele patsle khetne. Ninna o Erasto, kay dell garda ap o foreskre love, oun o Kvarto, miro lačo phraal an o patsepen, penenn t'menge lače laba." 
Romans16:24 O lačepen maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, djal t'mentsa lauterentsa! Amen." 
Romans16:25 Sharedo vell o baro Devel! Les hi i zoor, te krell lo t'maro patsepen zoreles. Yaake penell les o lačo lab, hoy me penau i menshenge, ko lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar. Kate vell siklo o drom pash o Debleste. Kova djinan le i rah tsiro gar." 
Romans16:26 Kanna vell ko drom diklo. Ko dromestar činan i Debleskre rakepangre an pengre lila, yaake har o baro Devel kamas. Kova djivella hako tsiro, oun kamas i tsele menshendar ap i phoub, te patsenn le oun shounenn le ap leste." 
Romans16:27 Yob kokres hi gosevo, oun bičras menge o Yezous Kristes. Sharedo vell yob hako tsiro! Amen." 
1Corinthians1:1 Kava liil činau me, o Paulo. O Yezous Kristo rodas man vin, te vap leskro bičepaskro. Kova kamas o Devel yaake. Oun me oun maro phraal Sostenes činah kava liil" 
1Corinthians1:2 ap i patslende, kay venn khetne an o Debleskro lab an o foro Korint. Kolen rodas o Devel vin, te venn le leskre čave, oun te djivenn o Yezous Kristeha khetne. Kava liil hi ninna kol tsele vavarenge, kay o Yezous Kristes an hake gaba oun forya an-mangenna. Yob hi lengro oun maro ray." 
1Corinthians1:3 Mou vell t'men lačepen oun barht an o dji! Kova dell t'men o Devel, maro dad, oun maro ray, o Yezous Kristo!" 
1Corinthians1:4 Me parkrau man hako tsiro t'menge pash miro Debleste. Yob hi t'menge yaake lačo oun kras, te prindjrenn t'mer o Yezous Kristes." 
1Corinthians1:5 Yob das t'men boud gosvepen, te nay penenn o Debleskro lab, oun te hayvenn t'mer, hoy yob kamell t'menge te penell." 
1Corinthians1:6 O lab o Yezous Kristestar kras t'men zoreles an o patsepen. 
1Corinthians1:7 T'men hi haki zoor, hoy o Debleskro Dourho della. Oun t'mer dikenn ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, pale." 
1Corinthians1:8 Yob dell t'men i zoor, te ačenn an o patsepen, bis te vell lo pale. Oun kek nay anell i doosh ap t'mende ap ko dives." 
1Corinthians1:9 Kova, hoy o Devel penella, kova rikrell yob ninna. O Devel das t'men gole, te venn hako tsiro peskro Čaveha, o Yezous Kristeha, khetne. Oun kova hi maro ray." 
1Corinthians1:10 Mire phrala, me shounom, kay hi čingepen mashkral t'mende. Kova penan mange kolla dran i familya koy djouvyatar Kloe. Kanna mangau t'men an o lab maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar: Ma čingrenn t'men bouder! Ačenn khetne oun rikrenn khetne an kova, hoy t'mer krenna oun patsenna!" 
1Corinthians1:11  
1Corinthians1:12 Pash t'mende hi menshe, kay penenna: “Mer krah kova, hoy o Paulo menge penella.” Vavar penenna: “Mer rikrah men ap o Apollo.” Oun pale vavar penenna: “O Kefas hi maro sikepaskro.” Oun pale vavar penenna: “Mer rikrah men ap o Yezous Kristeste.”" 
1Corinthians1:13 Nay djal kova? Hi o Yezous Kristo an boudeder kotya? Djas o Paulo t'menge ap o troushel? Van t'mer ap o Pauleskro lab taufedo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Me parkrau o Debles, kay taufrom kek vavares t'mendar har o Krispo oun o Gayo." 
1Corinthians1:15 Yaake nay penell kek, t'mer vans ap o Pauleskro lab taufedo." 
1Corinthians1:16 Kova bistrom: Me taufrom ninna o Stefanes oun leskri familya. Boudeder djinau me gar, kay taufrom me yekes." 
1Corinthians1:17 O Yezous Kristo bičras man gar, te taufrap i menshen. Yob kamell te penap o lačo lab lestar i menshenge. Me penau kova gar goseve labentsa. Te rakroms me goseve labentsa, merals o Yezous Kristo čičeske ap o troushel." 
1Corinthians1:18 Maro rakepen pral o Yezouseskro merepen ap o troushel hi dinlepen kolenge, kay djan nashedo. Mer, kay ham ap maro drom an o bolepen, dikah an ko lab o Debleskri bari zoor." 
1Corinthians1:19 O Devel penella an peskro lab: Pash mande molell o menshengro gosvepen či. Oun kolla, kay penenn, te djinenn le boud, kolende sikrau, kay kova či moldo hi, hoy yon djinenna." 
1Corinthians1:20 Hoy nay penah mer pral kol goseve menshende? Oun hoy nay penah pral kolende, kay hi činepangre oun rakepangre ap kay phoub? Yon prindjrenn o Debles gar. Doleske hi lengro gosvepen an o Debleskre yaka dinlepen." 
1Corinthians1:21 Ninna te dikenn i menshe o Debleskro gosvepen an halauter, hoy yob kras, prindjran yon pengro gosvepah o Debles gar. Doleske hatsas o Devel i vavar drom. Yob lell kol menshen dran o čilačepen vin, kay patsenn ap o rakepen pral o Yezouseskro merepen ap o troushel. Kol vavar menshe, kay gar patsenna, penenna: “Kova hi i dinelo rakepen, hoy t'mer kate rakrenna.”" 
1Corinthians1:22 I bibolde kamenn baro oun zorelo koova te dikell. Kolla, kay kek bibolde hi, rodenn gosvepen ap kay phoub." 
1Corinthians1:23 Mer penah i menshenge, kay o Yezous Kristo ap o troushel hounte meras. Pral kova hi i bibolde rhoyemen. Oun i vavar menshenge hi kova dinlepen." 
1Corinthians1:24 Mank kolende, kolen o Devel peske vin rodas, hi bibolde oun save, kay kek bibolde hi. Yon te shounenn o lab o Yezous Kristestar, palle dikenn le an leste o Debleskri zoor oun leskro gosvepen." 
1Corinthians1:25 Ninna te penenn i vavar menshe: “Kova, hoy o Devel krella, hi dinlepen,” hi yob gosveder har i menshe. Ninna te penenn le: “O Debles hi kek zoor,” hi yob zorleder har yon." 
1Corinthians1:26 Dikenn ap t'mende, mire phrala: Mank t'mende hi gar boud goseve menshe, gar boud pralstoune oun gar boud, hoy mishto an-diklo hi." 
1Corinthians1:27 O Devel rodas kolen vin, kay an i menshengre yaka gar gosevo hi, te dikenn i goseve menshe, kay lengro gosvepen či molella. Yob rodas kolen vin, kay hi len kek zoor an i menshengre yaka, te dikenn i zorele, kay lengri zoor či molella." 
1Corinthians1:28 O Devel rodas kolen vin, kay an i menshengre yaka či molenna, oun kay gar mishto an-diklo hi, te sikrell lo, kova, hoy pash i menshende boud molella, hi pash leste či moldo." 
1Corinthians1:29 Yaake sharell pes nay kek mensho glan o Debleste. 
1Corinthians1:30 O Devel kras, te van t'mer ap o Yezous Kristeskro drom. Kanna djinah, hoy čačepah gosvepen hi. O Yezous Kristo kras men čačo glan o Debleste. Yob rodas men vin, te vas leske koy, oun las mari doosh mendar krik." 
1Corinthians1:31 Kanna vell kova yaake, har o Debleskro lab penella: Te kamell pes yek te sharell, nay sharell lo kova, hoy o Devel leske kras." 
1Corinthians2:1 Mire phrala, har vom pash t'mende, te sikrap t'mende o Debleskro drom, hoy t'mer gar prindjran, krom me kova gar bare oun goseve labentsa." 
1Corinthians2:2 Yaake rah, har homs pash t'mende, kamom me pral kek vavar koova te rakrell, har o Yezous Kristestar oun pral leskro merepen ap o troushel." 
1Corinthians2:3 Oun har me pash t'mende homs, his kek zoor an mande, oun man his traash." 
1Corinthians2:4 Me rakrom t'mentsa gar zorele oun goseve labentsa, te anap t'men ap o Debleskro drom. Na-a, o Debleskro Dourho rakras zoreles ap t'mende," 
1Corinthians2:5 yaake te vas t'maro patsepen dran o Debleskri zoor oun gar dran i menshengro gosvepen. 
1Corinthians2:6 Kova, hoy mer penah i patslenge, hi o Debleskro gosvepen. Kava gosvepen hi gar har ko gosvepen, kay vell kol menshendar, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar, vitar gar har o gosvepen kolendar, kay hi raya ap kay phoub. Kolla hounte merenn." 
1Corinthians2:7 Mer rakrah pral o Debleskro gosvepen, hoy i menshe gomme gar prindjrenna. O bolepen oun i phoub his gomme gar koy, har his o Debles an o dji, te djivas mer leha khetne an leskro raylepen." 
1Corinthians2:8 Kova prindjran i raya ap kay phoub gar. Te nay dikans le an o Debleskro dji, dans le o Yezouses, ko rayes pral i tsele rayende, gar ap o troushel." 
1Corinthians2:9 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: Ko lačo koova, hoy kek yak dikas, oun hoy kek kand shounas, oun hoy an kek mensheskro dji dren vas, kova lauter dell o Devel kolen, kay les o djiyestar kamenna." 
1Corinthians2:10 Men das o Devel peskro Dourho. Oun o Dourho sikrell men kova, hoy hi o Debles an o dji. O Debleskro Dourho dikell an halauter, ninna an o Debleskro dji." 
1Corinthians2:11 Hoy an o mensheste hi, djinell kokres leskro dji. Hoy an o Debleste hi, kova djinell kokres o Debleskro Dourho." 
1Corinthians2:12 An maro shero hi bouder gar ko koova, hoy hi kol menshen an pengro shero, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar. Mer lam o Debleskro Dourho. Doleske djinah, hoy o Devel menge kras." 
1Corinthians2:13 Kava koova penah i menshenge. Kova krah mer gar labentsa, hoy venna dran o menshengro gosvepen. Na-a, mer rakrah kova, hoy o Debleskro Dourho menge penella. Yob krell, te hayvas mer o Debleskro koova, oun sikrah kova kolende, kolen ninna o Debleskro Dourho hi." 
1Corinthians2:14 I mensho, koles o Debleskro Dourho gar hi, hayvell gar, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella. O Debleskro koova hi leske dinlepen. Ko mensho nay dikell gar, har o Devel kova dikella." 
1Corinthians2:15 I mensho, koles o Debleskro Dourho hi, kova dikell ap lauter yaake, har o Devel kova dikella. Kol menshen, kay o Debleskro Dourho gar hi, kolla nay hayvenn kol menshen gar, kolen o Debleskro Dourho hi." 
1Corinthians2:16 Kova hi yaake, har an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: Kek djinella, hoy an o Debleskro dji hi. Kek nay vell leskro sikepaskro. Mer, kay patsle ham, men hi o Yezouseskro Dourho." 
1Corinthians3:1 Mire phrala, me nay rakrom t'mentsa gar har patslentsa, kay djivenn yaake, har o Debleskro Dourho kamella. Me hounte rakrom t'mentsa har kolentsa, kay djivenn pengro phouro djipen. T'mer hans har tikne čave an o patsepen." 
1Corinthians3:2 Me dom t'men thoud te piyell, oun kek mass te rhal. Kova nay dandran t'mer gar. Ninna kanna nay rhan kova gar." 
1Corinthians3:3 T'mer djivenn yaake har te prindjrenn o Yezous Kristes gar. Te hi čingepen mank t'mende, oun te zilverenna, palle djivenna yaake har i menshe, kay prindjrenn o Yezous Kristes gar." 
1Corinthians3:4 Yek t'mendar penella: “Me krau, hoy o Paulo penella.” Oun ko vavar penella: “Me rikrau man ap o Apolleste.” Me penau t'menge: Yaake rakrenn kol menshe, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar." 
1Corinthians3:5 Dikenn, koon hi o Apollo, oun koon hom me, o Paulo! O Debleskre boudepangre ham mer oun kram, kay van t'mer patslo. Hakeno mendar kras koy boudi, har o Devel leste das." 
1Corinthians3:6 Me hom har i harho, kay vitsras o djob an i phoub. O Apollo hi har yek, kay čoras o pani pre. Oun o Devel moukas o djob bares te vell." 
1Corinthians3:7 Kova, kay o djob an i phoub vitsrella, hi gar bareder har kova, kay o pani pre čorella. O Devel hi bareder, kay moukell o djob bares te vell." 
1Corinthians3:8 Kova, kay o djob an i phoub vitsrella hi yaake baro har kova, kay pani pre čorella. Oun o Devel dell hakenes, hoy leskri boudi moldo hi." 
1Corinthians3:9 Mer ham o Debleskre boudepangre. T'mer han o Debleskri harhetikri phoub. Oun t'mer han har i kheer, hoy o Devel peske krella." 
1Corinthians3:10 O Devel his lačes ap mande oun das man i boudi, te boudrap ap ko kheer. Yaake čivom me i telstoune barra. Me krom kova, har i gosevo boudepaskro, koon hayvella khera te krell. Ap kol telstoune barra čivell i vavar boudepaskro vavar koova pre. Hakeno hounte dell garda, hoy yob pre čivella." 
1Corinthians3:11 Kek nay čivella i vavar telstouno bar, har ko bar, hoy čiddo hi. Kova hi o Yezous Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Hi boudepangre, kay čivenn sonakay, roup, kouč barra, pre. Vavar čivenn kasht, phouss, khass pre." 
1Corinthians3:13 Vell ko dives, kay dikenn le, hoy hakeno pre čivas. Ap ko dives vell lauter an i yag. Oun koy yag sikrella, hoy haki boudi moldo hi." 
1Corinthians3:14 Te rhačrell kova gar krik, hoy yek pre čivas, lell yob čomone o Deblestar." 
1Corinthians3:15 Te rhačrell kova an i yag krik, hoy yob pre čivas, nashrell yob lauter. Yob kokres djal gar nashedo. Yob hi har yek, kay nashell dran i kheer vin, hoy rhačella." 
1Corinthians3:16 Djinenn t'mer gar, kay han t'mer o Debleskro kheer, oun kay o Debleskro Dourho an t'mende djivella?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Koon o Debleskro kheer paash krella, koles phagella o Devel. O Debleskro kheer hi o Debleske. Oun kava kheer han t'mer." 
1Corinthians3:18 Ma rhorhenn t'men kokres! Koon patsella, te hi lo gosevo ap kay phoub, kova hounte dikell dren, te molella leskro gosvepen či." 
1Corinthians3:19 Kova, hoy pash i menshende gosvepen hi, hi an o Debleskre yaka dinlepen. An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O Devel taprell kolen an lengro rhorhepen, kay penenn pendar, kay yon gosevo hi." 
1Corinthians3:20 Hi ninna činlo: O Devel djinella, hoy an i menshengro dji glan djala, kay lengro gosvepen či molella." 
1Corinthians3:21 Doleske hounte sharell pes kek mensho, koon peskro sikepaskro hi. Lauter hi t'maro:" 
1Corinthians3:22 o Paulo, o Apollo, o Kefas. Oun t'maro hi ninna: kay phoub, o djipen, o merepen, kova, hoy kanna hi, oun kova, hoy vella. Lauter hi t'maro." 
1Corinthians3:23 T'mer han o Yezous Kristeskre. O Yezous Kristo hi o Debleskro. 
1Corinthians4:1 Hakeno hounte dikell ap mende, te ham mer o Yezous Kristeskre boudepangre. Yob das men koy boudi, te penas i menshenge, hoy o Debles an o dji hi, oun hoy i menshe gomme gar djinenna." 
1Corinthians4:2 Oun i boudepaskro hounte krell peskri boudi mishto. 
1Corinthians4:3 Mange hi yek, hoy t'mer mandar penenna. Ninna kova, hoy i čačepangre mandar penenna, hi mange yek. Me dikau vitar gar ap mande te penap mange, har miri boudi krom." 
1Corinthians4:4 Me djinau gar, te anom doosh ap mande. Ninna te djinom kova gar, krell man kova gar čačo glan o Debleste. Kova, kay o čačepen pral mande vi-rakrella, hi kokres maro ray Yezous." 
1Corinthians4:5 Dran kova penau, ma penenn yekestar: Kova krell peskri boudi gar mishto. Kanna hi gar o čačo tsiro, te rakrenn yaake. Ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray Yezous pale, sikrell lo halauteren, hoy kanna khatedo hi. Oun lauter, hoy an o dji dren hi, vell palle diklo. Oun palle vell hakeno sharedo o Deblestar pal koy boudi, hoy yob kras." 
1Corinthians4:6 Mire phrala, hoy me kanna penom, rakrau me mandar oun o Apollestar. Ap mende dikenn t'mer, har te ačenn ap kova, hoy an i lila činlo hi. Kek t'mendar hounte phourdell pes pre oun penell: “Me rikrau man ap o feteder sikepaskro.”" 
1Corinthians4:7 Koon penas touke, te hal tou feteder har ko vavar? Kova, hoy tout hi, hi tout o Deblestar. Te das yob tout lauter, hoske shareh tout?" 
1Corinthians4:8 T'mer krenn, har te vans čalo oun djinans halauter. T'mer krenn, har te vans bravelo. T'mer krenn, har te vans raya. Mer ham kek raya. Me kamoms, te vans čačepah raya. Palle vams mer t'mentsa khetne raya." 
1Corinthians4:9 Mer, kay ham o Yezous Kristeskre bičepangre, menge hi yaake, har te anals men o Devel kote, kay ham či moldo an i menshengre yaka. Mer ham har i kourepangre, kay hounte kourenn pen, bis te venn le moulo dino. Oun i menshe oun i bolepangre dikenn kova." 
1Corinthians4:10 Mer rakrah o Yezous Kristestar. Oun doleske ham dinele glan i menshengre yaka. T'mer patsenn ap o Yezous Kristeste, oun doleske han goseve. Mer ham gar zorele, oun t'mer han zorele. Men sharenn le gar. T'men sharenn le." 
1Corinthians4:11 An kava tselo tsiro hi men bok oun troush. Oun an-ripaske hi men vitar či. Mer rhah dava. Oun men hi kek isema, kay nay ačah." 
1Corinthians4:12 Mer marah men tele mare vastentsa, te vell men čomone te rhal. Yon praasenn men, oun mer rakrah o Debleskri barht pral lende vin. Yon te lenn men palla, rikrah mer vin." 
1Corinthians4:13 Te rakrenn yon djoungeles mentsa, rakrah mer lačes lentsa. Mer ham har čik hako mensheske, har čik ham lenge bis kanna." 
1Corinthians4:14 Me činau t'menge kova gar, te krap t'menge ladj. Na-a! T'mer han mire kamle čave. Doleske penau t'menge kova, te ačenn ap o čačo drom." 
1Corinthians4:15 Ninna te vals t'men deesh zerya sikepangre, kay sikrenn t'men, har te djan ap o Yezous Kristeskro drom, hi t'men yek dad kokres an o patsepen. Kova hom me. Me penom t'menge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar oun t'mer lan ko lab pre." 
1Corinthians4:16 Me mangau t'men: Djivenn yaake har me djivau! 
1Corinthians4:17 Me bičrom o Timoteste pash t'mende. Kova hi miro kamlo oun lačo čavo an o patsepen. Yob penell t'menge, har me ko drom djau, hoy o Yezous Kristo sikras mande, oun har rakrau lestar an hake gaba oun forya, kay i patsle khetne venna." 
1Corinthians4:18 Pash t'mende hi menshe, kay phourdenn pen pre oun krenn, har te voms gar pale pash t'mende." 
1Corinthians4:19 Djinenn! Te kamell o Devel, vau me yaake sik har djala pash t'mende. Koy kamau me gar te shounell, har bares yon rakrenna. Me kamau lengri zoor an o patsepen te dikell." 
1Corinthians4:20 Kote, kay i menshe o Debleha khetne djivenna, vell gar kokres rakedo, na-a, kote vell o Debleskri zoor diklo." 
1Corinthians4:21 Hounte vap me o kashteha pash t'mende? Hi t'menge gar feteder, te vap i djiyeha pherdo kamlepen oun lačepen pash t'mende?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Me shounom, te hi pash t'mende i morsh, kay peskri dadeskri romyah sovella. Savo čilačo koova shounom me gomme gar pash kolende, kay gar patslo hi." 
1Corinthians5:2 T'mer han pre-phourdo. T'mer hounte rovans pral ko koova, oun hounte čivans koles pale, kay kras ko koova." 
1Corinthians5:3 Ninna te hom me gar pash t'mende, hi miro dji pash t'mende. Oun yaake, har te voms pash t'mende, rakrom me i phagi pral koleste vin, kay savo koova kras:" 
1Corinthians5:4 Te han t'mer lauter khetne an o lab maro rayestar, o Yezousestar, oun me hom miro djiyeha pash t'mende, palle krenn kova yaake: An i zoor maro rayestar, o Yezousestar, denn ko morshes an o bengeskre vasta," 
1Corinthians5:5 te merell leskro phouro djipen an leste, yaake te djal ko mensho gar nashedo ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray Yezous pale." 
1Corinthians5:6 T'mer sharenn t'men. Oun kova hi gar mishto. Djinenn t'mer gar, te krell i tikno kotar shoutlo yarro ko tselo vavar yarro shoutlo?" 
1Corinthians5:7 Čivenn ko shoutlo yarro t'mendar krik, te venn t'mer har i nevo maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren hi! Oun čačepah t'mer han har i nevo maro! O Yezous Kristo vas menge maredo, te lell lo mari doosh mendar krik, yaake har i bibolde maran i bakro ap pengro baro dives, kay Passa kharella." 
1Corinthians5:8 Oun yaake har čivan yon ko shoutlo yarro krik oun rhan sau maro, kay kek shoutlo yarro dren his, yaake hounte djivas mer maro nevo djipen an o djoudjepen oun an o čačepen. Mer hounte moukas maro phouro djipen, oun djivas bouder gar an o čilačepen." 
1Corinthians5:9 Glan i tsiro činom me t'menge i liil. Oun an ko liil penom t'menge, te venn t'mer gar mala kol menshendar, kay krenn vi-ladjedo koova." 
1Corinthians5:10 An ko liil rakrom me i patslendar oun gar lauterendar ap kay phoub, kay krenna vi-ladjedo koova, kay hi boklo pal i love, kay hi čorepangre, oun kay mangenn vavar koova an har o Debles. Kolendar rakrau me kate gar. Te rakroms kolendar, hounte moukans t'mer kay phoub." 
1Corinthians5:11 An ko liil činom t'menge, te venn t'mer kek mala kolendar, kay penenn pendar: “Me hom patslo” oun krenn vi-ladjedo koova, hi boklo pal i love, mangenn vavar koova an har o Debles, praasenn i vavaren, hi pipangre oun čorepangre. Te hi yek mashkral t'mende, kay krell savo koova, koleha rhan gar khetne!" 
1Corinthians5:12 Kova hi gar maro koova, te rakras o čačepen pral kolende vin, kay gar patslo hi. Kova krell o Devel. T'mer hounte rakrenn o čačepen pral kolende vin, kay patsle hi. Vitsrenn koles dran t'mende vin, kay krell ko čilačo koova!" 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Te hi yekes t'mendar i čingepen i vavar patsleha oun kamell peskro čačepen, har nay anell lo kova glan i čačepangre, kay gar patslo hi? Hoske djal lo gar pash i patslende?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Vell yek tsiro, koy rakrenn i patsle o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende ap kay phoub. Djinenn t'mer kova gar? T'mer te krenn o čačepen vin pral kol tsele menshende ap kay phoub, hoske nay rakrenn t'mer kanna gar o čačepen vin pral kol phralende, kay i tikno djoungelo koova kran?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Djinenn t'mer gar, te vell ko tsiro, kay rakrah mer o čačepen vin pral i bolepangre? Te hi kova yaake, palle nay rakrah ninna o čačepen vin pral i phralende, kay čingrenn pen pral i tikno phoubyakro koova." 
1Corinthians6:4 Hoske anenn t'mer ko tikno koova glan kol čačepangre, kay hi či penepaske pral i patslende, oun kamenn kolendar t'maro čačepen?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Kova, hoy t'mer kran, hi i bari ladj. Hi kek gosevo morsh mank t'mende, koon nay penella, kones čačo hi?" 
1Corinthians6:6 T'mer han phrala. Oun t'mer čingrenn t'men glan kol čačepangre, kay gar patslo hi!" 
1Corinthians6:7 T'maro čingepen hi i čilačo koova an peste. Hoske rikrenn t'mer gar vin, hoy kol vavar t'mentsa krenna? Hi feteder te nashrenn t'maro koova, har te djan glan i čačepangre." 
1Corinthians6:8 Oun kova hi gar lauter! T'mer krenn i vavarenge ninna čilačepen oun lenn t'menge lendar kova krik, hoy len hi. Oun kova krenn t'mer ninna i patslentsa." 
1Corinthians6:9 T'mer hounte djinenn, kolla, kay čilačo koova krenna, venn gar pash o Debleste an o bolepen, oun lenn gar ko lačo koova, hoy o Debles peskre čavenge hi. Ma rhorhenn t'men kokres! Kolla, kay vi-ladjedo koova krenna, venn gar pash o Debleste an o bolepen, vitar gar kolla, kay mangenn vavar koova an har o Debles, vitar gar kol morsha, kay rhorhenn pengri romyat i vavar djouvyah, vitar gar kol djouvya, kay rhorhenn pengro romes i vavar morsheha, vitar gar kol morsha, kay krenn vi-ladjedo koova vavar morshentsa oun čaventsa," 
1Corinthians6:10 vitar gar i čorepangre, vitar gar kolla, kay ap i love pandlo hi, i dre-phagepangre, i pipangre oun kolla, kay praasenn i vavaren, – kolla lauter venna gar pash o Debleste an o bolepen." 
1Corinthians6:11 Hi menshe mank t'mende, kay kran savo koova. Kanna vas t'mari doosh tele thodo. Oun t'mer van erligo kerdo glan o Debleste, oun han čačo glan leskre yaka. Kova lauter kras maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, oun o Debleskro Dourho t'menge." 
1Corinthians6:12 T'mer penenn: “Mer nay krah halauter.” Me penau: Gar lauter, hoy t'mer krenna, hi t'menge mishto. Ninna te nay krau lauter, hounte vap me gar pandlo ap kova, hoy krau." 
1Corinthians6:13 O rhapen hi koy, te djal lo an o per. Oun o per hi o rhapaske koy. Vell yek dives, kay krell o Devel, te hi o rhapen oun o per bouder gar koy. O Devel kras men gar, te loubras mer trouyel. Mer ham koy o Yezouseske, maro rayeske. Oun yob hi ninna o ray pral maro mass." 
1Corinthians6:14 Yaake har o Yezous meras, oun o Devel les djido kras, yaake krell leskri bari zoor men ninna djido." 
1Corinthians6:15 Djinenn t'mer gar, kay han yek o Yezous Kristeha? I mensho, kay hi yek o Yezous Kristeha, nay vell gar khetne i loubyah. Kova djal gar!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Djinenn, te djal yek pash i loubni, venn kol douy yek. O Debleskro lab penella: Kol douy venna yek." 
1Corinthians6:17 Ko mensho, kay djal o Yezouseha, maro rayeha, koles hi yek dourho leha." 
1Corinthians6:18 Doleske penau t'menge: Ma loubrenn trouyel! Te kreh tou savo koova, čineh tou touke kokres an o mass. Hako vavar čilačepen kreh tou ap i vavarende. Te loubreh trouyel, kreh tou o čilačepen ap toute." 
1Corinthians6:19 Djinenn t'mer gar, kay han t'mer o kheer, kay o Debleskro Dourho djivella? Kova hi an t'mende oun vell o Deblestar. Oun t'mer han leskre, oun nay krenna bouder gar, hoy kamenna." 
1Corinthians6:20 O Devel playsras t'menge peskro čaveskro rateha. Doleske sharenn les t'maro tselo djipah! 
1Corinthians7:1 T'mer poučan mandar an t'maro liil: “Vals mishto i morsheske, te romedinerals yob gar?” Oun koy pre penau me:" 
1Corinthians7:2 Hi feteder, te hi hako morshes peskri romni oun haki djouvyat peskro rom, har te krenn le vi-ladjedo koova." 
1Corinthians7:3 O rom te vell peskri romyake koy. Oun i romni te vell peskro romeske koy. 
1Corinthians7:4 Koy romyat hi gar pral peste penepaske. Ko čačepen hi o romes. Vitar gar hi ko romes pral peste penepaske. Ko čačepen hi i romyat. 
1Corinthians7:5 Kek t'mendar te rikrell pes kol vavarestar pale! T'mer nay rikrenn t'men i tikno tsiro pale, te kamenn t'mer douy kova, te mangenn o Debles an. Oun pal kova avenn pale khetne har rom oun romni! Te krenn t'mer kova gar, palle nay vell, te han bouder gar o ray pral t'mende oun perenn an o bengeskro vast." 
1Corinthians7:6 Me penau t'menge kova, te nay krenn kova yaake, oun gar, te hounte krenn les." 
1Corinthians7:7 Ninna te kamoms, te vals hakeno gar romedino, yaake har me gar romedino hom, kova djal gar. Mer ham gar yek har o vavar. Yaake har o Devel kamella, hi yek romedino oun ko vavar romedinerell gar." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kolenge, kay gar romedino hi, penau me: T'menge vals mishto, te romedinerenn t'mer gar. Kol djouvyenge, kolengre romma meran, penau me: T'menge hi feteder, te romedinerenn t'mer bouder gar." 
1Corinthians7:9 T'mer te djivenn nay gar kokres, palle romedinerenn. Hi feteder, te romedinerenn t'mer, har te doukell o morsheskro dji pal i djouvyate oun i djouvyakro dji pal i morsheste." 
1Corinthians7:10 Kolenge, kay romedino hi, penell o ray Yezous, gar me, te moukell i romni peskro romes gar. Vitar gar hounte tradell i rom peskri romyat pestar. Te moukas i romni peskro romes, hounte ačell yoy peske kokres. Te kamell li gar kokres te ačell, palle rakrell li pes peskro romeha vin, oun djal pash leste pale." 
1Corinthians7:11  
1Corinthians7:12 Kol vavarenge penau me, gar o ray Yezous: Te hi i patslo phrales i romni, kay gar patslo hi, oun yoy kamell pash leste te ačell, palle tradell yob lat gar krik." 
1Corinthians7:13 Oun te hi i patsli romyat i rom, kay gar patslo hi, oun yob kamell pash late te ačell, hounte moukell yoy les gar." 
1Corinthians7:14 O Devel dikell lačes ap o romeste, kones i patsli romni hi. Oun o Devel dikell lačes ap i romyate, kay lat i patslo rom hi. Te vals kova gar yaake, vans t'mare čave har i čave kolendar, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar. Kova hi gar yaake. Glan o Debleste hi le har čave, kolengro dad oun day, kolla douy, patslo hi." 
1Corinthians7:15 Te kamell kova, kay gar patslo hi, o patsles te moukell, yaake nay djal lo peske. Ko patslo hi gar pandlo ap leste. O Devel kamell gar, te čingrenn t'men." 
1Corinthians7:16 I patsli djouvel nay djinell gar, te anell li nay peskro romes ap o Yezouseskro drom. Oun o patslo morsh nay djinell vitar gar, te anell lo nay peskri romyat ap o Yezouseskro drom." 
1Corinthians7:17 Kova, hoy t'menge kanna penau, penau me i tsele patslenge, kote, kay yon khetne venna. Mer lauter hounte djivas maro djipen ap koy platsa, kay maro ray Yezous men čivas, oun hounte ačas koy pashel, hoy mer hams, har o Devel men gole das:" 
1Corinthians7:18 Te vas yek ap o mass činlo pal i biboldengro čačepen, ačell lo pashel. Te vas yek gar ap o mass činlo, moukell pes yob gar te činell." 
1Corinthians7:19 Kolla hi gar boudeder moldo, kay ap o mass činlo hi, har kolla, kay gar činlo hi ap o mass. Glan o Debleste molella, te rikress tout ap leskro lab." 
1Corinthians7:20 Hakeno hounte ačell koy pashel, hoy yob his, har o Devel les gole das." 
1Corinthians7:21 Te hals tou i pandlo boudepaskro, har o Devel tout gole das, hounte doukrell tout kova gar! Te penell tiro ray, kay tou leske boudreh: “Tou nay dja touke!” palle nay djah touke tou, oun hal bouder kek pandlo boudepaskro!" 
1Corinthians7:22 Koon i pandlo boudepaskro his ap ko tsiro, har o Yezous Kristo les gole das, kova hi glan leste bouder kek pandlo boudepaskro. Oun koon kek pandlo boudepaskro his ap ko tsiro, har o Yezous Kristo les gole das, kova hi kanna o Yezous Kristeskro boudepaskro." 
1Corinthians7:23 O Devel playsras t'menge peskro čaveskro rateha. Ma denn t'men an i menshengre vasta! 
1Corinthians7:24 Mire phrala, hakeno ačell o Debleha oun ačell pashel, hoy yob his, har o Devel les gole das." 
1Corinthians7:25 Pral kol ternende, kay gar romedino hi, hi man kek lab, hoy maro ray Yezous mange penas. Me penau, har me kova dikau. Oun maro ray Yezous his yaake kamlo ap mande oun kras dran mande i morsh, ap koleste i menshe shounenna. Doleske nay patsenn man." 
1Corinthians7:26 Me penau t'menge: An kava pharo tsiro hi feteder, te ačell hakeno yaake, har yob hi." 
1Corinthians7:27 Hal tou romedino, ač pash tiri romyate oun ma dja krik latar! Te hal tou gar romedino, rode touke kek romyat!" 
1Corinthians7:28 Te romedinereh, yaake aneh tou kek doosh ap toute. Oun te romedinerella i čay, anell li kek doosh ap peste. Kolenge vell boud pharo koova an lengro djipen. Oun me kamau, te vell kova gar ap t'mende. Doleske rakrau yaake." 
1Corinthians7:29 Kova penau me t'menge, mire phrala: Hi bouder gar boud tsiro. Kanna hounte djivell i romedino morsh yaake, har te vals les kek romni, yaake te nay boudrell lo o Debleske." 
1Corinthians7:30 Oun kolla, kay lenge ropaske hi, djivenn yaake, har te vans lenge gar ropaske. Oun kolla, kay barhtelo hi, djivenn yaake, har te vans yon gar barhtelo. Oun kolla, kay čomone o djipaske dren ginenna, krenn kova yaake, har te nay rikrans yon kova gar." 
1Corinthians7:31 Kay phoub oun lauter, hoy koy pre hi, ačella gar. Doleske pandenn t'men gar ap ko koova, hoy i menshenge ap kay phoub yaake boud moldo hi!" 
1Corinthians7:32 Me kamoms, te vell t'maro dji gar pharo. Koon gar romedino hi, nay vell o Yezouseske, maro rayeske, o tselo djiyestar koy." 
1Corinthians7:33 Koon romedino hi, koleskro dji hi pherdo phoubyakro koova. Yob dikell ap kova, hoy leskri romni kamella. I paash djiyeha hi lo pash peskri romyate, ko vavar paash hi pash o Yezouseste." 
1Corinthians7:34 Oun koy djouvel, kay gar romedini hi, dikella, hoy nay krell yoy o Yezouseske, maro rayeske. Oun yoy krell kova peskri tseli zoryah, oun kamell peskri tselo djiyeha leske koy te vell. I djouvel, kay romedini hi, kolakro dji hi pherdo phoubyakro koova. Yoy dikell ap kova, hoy lakro rom kamella." 
1Corinthians7:35 Kova penau me t'menge gar, te krap t'maro djipen phares. Na-a, kova penau, te djal t'menge mishto. Kamoms, te djan o čačo drom, te djivenn o Yezouseske, maro rayeske, oun te ačenn zoreles pash leste." 
1Corinthians7:36 Te penell yek: “Kova hi gar mishto, te romedinerap me miri pirni gar, kay lat yaake zoreles kamau,” koleske penau me: Te romedinereh lat, aneh tou kek doosh ap toute." 
1Corinthians7:37 Te hi i morshes ap peskro dji, te romedinerell lo gar, oun leske hi kova gar pharo, te ačell lo kokres, koleske hi mishto, te romedinerell lo gar." 
1Corinthians7:38 Kova hi yaake: Te romedinerell yek, hi kova mishto. Te romedinerell yob gar, hi kova feteder." 
1Corinthians7:39 I romni hi ap peskro romeste pandlo yaake rah har yob djivella. Te merell o rom, hi li bouder gar pandlo ap leste. Oun yoy nay romedinerell, kones yoy kamella. Ap yek koova hounte rikrell li pes: Yoy hounte lell peske i patslo romes." 
1Corinthians7:40 Yoy hi barhtleder, patsau me, te ačell yoy peske kokres oun romedinerell gar. Yaake dikau me kova. Oun man hi ninna o Debleskro Dourho." 
1Corinthians8:1 T'mer poučan mandar: “Nay rhah mer, kay patslo ham, ko mass, hoy vas glan i figura anlo, hoy mangenn le an, har te vals li i devel?” Hi čačo, mer halauter ham gosevo oun djinah čomone pral kava koova. Koon patsell, te hi les boud gosvepen, kova patsell sik, te hi lo bareder har ko vavar. Koon o djiyestar o vavares kamella, koles krell yob zorelo oun gar tikno." 
1Corinthians8:2 Koon patsella, te hi lo gosevo, kova djinell gar, hoy čačo gosvepen hi." 
1Corinthians8:3 Koon čačepah gosevo hi, kova kamell o Debles o djiyestar. Oun o Devel prindjrell les." 
1Corinthians8:4 Nay rhah mer kanna ko mass, hoy anan le glan i figura, hoy mangenn le an, har te vals li i devel? Mer djinah halauter, kay hi i figura kek čačo devel. Dell yek Devel oun kek vavar." 
1Corinthians8:5 Ninna te hi savo koova an o bolepen oun ap i phoub, hoy i menshe an-mangenna, oun ninna te dell boud, ap kolende i menshe penenna “mo devel” oun “mo ray”," 
1Corinthians8:6 hi men yek Devel. Kova hi maro dad an o bolepen, oun dran leste vell halauter. Oun mer ham leske koy. Oun men hi yek ray, kova hi o Yezous Kristo. Lestar vas halauter. Oun lestar lam mer o nevo djipen." 
1Corinthians8:7 Hakeno hayvas kava gar. Hi patsle, te rhan yon ko mass, hoy glan i figura anlo vas, hi kova lenge, har te mangans le koy figura an, yaake har an ko tsiro, kay his le gar patslo. Oun lengre djia, kay gar zoreles an o Debleste hi, penenn lenge, te anan le doosh ap pende." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kolenge penau me: O rhapen krell men gar pale-čiddo glan o Debleste. Te ham dareno, te rhas yek rhapen, ham gar tikneder glan o Debleste. Te ham gar dareno, te rhas kova, ham gar feteder glan leste." 
1Corinthians8:9 Kova hi t'maro koova, hoy t'mer krenna. Ninna te hi kova yaake, denn yak ap kolende, kay gomme gar zoreles an o patsepen hi, te perenn yon gar o Debleskro dromestar tele!" 
1Corinthians8:10 Tou patseh, tou hal gosevo an o patsepen oun hayval, te nay rhah ko mass, hoy glan koy figura anlo vas, oun tou djah an ko kheer, kay mangenn le kolat an, oun rhah ko mass. Djineh tou, hoy nay vella, te dikell tout yek, kay gar zoreles an o patsepen hi? Kova nay vell yaake, te rhal yob ninna ko mass, ninna te penell leskro dji leske: “Ma kre kova!”" 
1Corinthians8:11 Oun ko phraal, koleske o Yezous Kristo meras, oun kay hi gar zorelo an o patsepen, nashrell peskro patsepen doleske, kay tou patseh, te hal gosevo." 
1Corinthians8:12 Me penau t'menge: T'mer te krenn savo čilačo koova ap t'mare phralende oun krenn, te vell len i djoungelo dji, palle krenn t'mer i čilačo koova ap o Yezous Kristeste." 
1Corinthians8:13 Doleske, te dikell miro phraal, kay rhau ko mass, oun doleske vell lo o Debleskro dromestar tele, palle kamoms me miro tselo djipen bouder kek mass te rhal." 
1Corinthians9:1 Dikenn ap mande, har me hom! Me nay kroms, hoy me kamau, oun me krau les gar. Hom me gar o Yezouseskro bičepaskro? Ava, me hom o Yezouseskro bičepaskro. Me dikom o Yezouses, maro rayes. T'mer djinenna, koon t'men ap o Debleskro drom anas. Kova homs me." 
1Corinthians9:2 Vavar penenna, te hom me gar o Yezousestar bičedo. T'mer djinenna, kay man o Yezous Kristo bičras. Oun har me ap t'mende lestar rakrom, van t'mer patslo." 
1Corinthians9:3 Kolla, kay kamenn doosh ap mande te anell, kolendar poučau:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Hi men gar ko čačepen, te rhas oun te piyas pash t'mende?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Hi men gar ko čačepen, te romedinerah nay i patsli djouvyat, oun te las lat mentsa, yaake har krenna kol vavar Yezouseskre bičepangre oun leskre phrala oun o Petro?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Me poučau t'mendar: Hounte boudrap me oun o Barnabas maro rhapaske kokres? 
1Corinthians9:7 Kek tserdella an o kourepen oun playsrell pes kokres. Kek čivell i drakengre rouka an i phoub, oun rhal gar i drake. Kek dell peskre bakren zenlepen te rhal, oun piyell gar lengro thoud." 
1Corinthians9:8 Hoy me penau, vell gar i menshendar. Kova penell menge o Debleskro lab." 
1Corinthians9:9 An o Moseskre lila hi činlo: I groumni, hoy boudrell, te dell li o djob dran o phouss, ma pande lakro mouy! Hi o Debleske i groumni ap o dji čiddo? Na-a!" 
1Corinthians9:10 Ap mende penell o Devel kova. Doleske hi ninna menge činlo: Ko harho, kay boudrell ap peskro kotar phoub, krell kova, te anell lo boud djob dren. Oun kova, kay dell o djob dran o phouss, boudrella, te nay rhal lo kolestar." 
1Corinthians9:11 Te anam mer t'menge o Debleskro lab, nay denn t'mer men ninna te rhal." 
1Corinthians9:12 Te hi i vavaren ko čačepen ap kova lauter, hi men ko čačepen ninna. Ninna te hi kova yaake, lah kova gar menge. Me kamoms gar, te rakrell yek pral mende, te penah i menshenge o Yezous Kristestar, te vas mer playsedo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Djinenn t'mer gar, kay kolla, kay an o Debleskro baro kheer boudrenna, kote lenna, hoy len hounte vell djipaske? Oun kolla, kay anenn marede firhen glan o Debleste, kolla nay rhan ninna i kotar kolestar, hoy o Debleste dino vella." 
1Corinthians9:14 Yaake penas maro ray Yezous ninna, te lenn kolla, kay leskro lab i menshenge penenna, kova, hoy len hounte vell djipaske." 
1Corinthians9:15 Kava čačepen lom mange gar: Me lom či t'mendar. Me činau kova gar, te vap me kanna t'mendar playsedo. Feteder vals, me meroms, har te penenn i menshe mange palla, te playsrenn t'mer man. Me nay sharau man, te penau i menshenge o lačo lab o Yezousestar čičeske." 
1Corinthians9:16 Me sikrau i menshende leskro drom gar, te vap sharedo. Na-a, me hounte rakrap lestar. Har bibarhtelo voms, te kroms kova gar!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Te kroms me kova mandar, palle nay loms me kova playsedo. Me krau kova gar mandar. O Devel das man koy boudi." 
1Corinthians9:18 Hoy lau me koleske? Me lau či. Mange hi shoukeder te penap o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar čičeske, har te vap me playsedo." 
1Corinthians9:19 Kek mensho hi miro ray. Ninna te krau nay, hoy kamau, krom me man boudepaskro lauterenge, te anap nay yaake boud menshen pash o Yezouseste har djala." 
1Corinthians9:20 Te hom pash i biboldende, palle djivau har i biboldo, oun rikrau man ap o Moseskre laba, te anap i bibolden pash o Yezouseste, ninna te hom me gar tel o Moseskre laba tardo." 
1Corinthians9:21 Te hom me pash i menshende, kay rikrenn pen gar ap o Moseskre laba, palle djivau me har yon, te anap len pash o Yezous Kristeste, ninna te rikrau me man ap o Debleskro čačepen. Oun kova hi o Yezous Kristeskro lab." 
1Corinthians9:22 Pash kolende, kay hi gar zoreles an o patsepen, djivau me yaake har yon djivenna. Kova krau me, te vell lengro patsepen ap o Yezouseste zoreles. Me vom lauterenge yaake har yon, te rodap i drom, te anap len pash o Yezous Kristeste." 
1Corinthians9:23 Kova lauter krau me, te patsenn boud ap o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar, te lap ninna kova, hoy mange o Devel an peskro lab penella." 
1Corinthians9:24 Hayvenn! Kol naashepangre nashenn lauter, oun hakeno kamell o glanstouno te vell. Yek kokres vell o glanstouno. T'mer patsle, hounte nashenn yaake ap t'maro patsepaskro drom, har te kamans o glanstouno te vell! Palle lenn t'mer o shoukar koova, hoy o glanstouno lella!" 
1Corinthians9:25 Kol naashepangre rikrenn pen lauterestar pale, hoy len khino krella. Ko shoukar koova, hoy kolla lenna, kova ačell gar hako tsiro. Hoy mer patsle lah, kova ačella hako tsireske." 
1Corinthians9:26 Me nashau yaake har yek, kay djinella, kay yob nashella. Me kourau man gar har yek, kay dell troul peste." 
1Corinthians9:27 Oun me dau yak ap mande, te vap o ray pral miro mass. Me kamau gar te penap i menshenge, hoy yon hounte krenna, oun me kokres krau les gar." 
1Corinthians10:1 Mire phrala, ma bistrenn, har djas mare phourenge, har djan yon an o moulo them. I folka djas glan lende lauterende oun sikras lende, kay o Devel pash lende his. Oun yon halauter djan o Moseste palla mashkral o baro pani ap i vavar rig. Mer nay penams: Har van yon an i folka oun an o baro pani, van le ap o Moseskro lab taufedo." 
1Corinthians10:2  
1Corinthians10:3 Oun yon halauter rhan ko yek rhapen, hoy vas o Deblestar." 
1Corinthians10:4 Oun yon piyan lauter ko yek pipen, kay vas o Deblestar. Yon piyan ko pani, kay vas dran i baro bar vin, kay lentsa djas. Ko bar his o Yezous Kristo." 
1Corinthians10:5 Ninna te his yaake, nay dikas o Devel gar lačes ap boud lendar. Oun yon meran an o moulo them." 
1Corinthians10:6 Kova, hoy kote djas, kamell menge zoreles te penell, te djal maro dji gar pal o čilačo koova, yaake har kolengro dji pal o čilačepen djas." 
1Corinthians10:7 Ma mangenn vavar koova an har o Debles! Mank kolende an o phouro tsiro his save, kay kran kova. An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: Yon beshan tele, te rhan le oun piyan le oun stan pre, te khelenn le glan o sonakaskro firho." 
1Corinthians10:8 Mer te loubras vitar gar trouyel. Mank kolende his save, kay kran kova, oun lendar meran biish-te-triin zerya menshe ap yek dives." 
1Corinthians10:9 Ma rhoyrenn o Yezous Kristes, har kolla an o phouro tsiro o Debles rhoyran, har kran le, har te vals les kek zoor. Oun i sapa dandran len. Oun yon meran." 
1Corinthians10:10 Ma penenn, kay kova gar mishto oun doha hi, hoy o Devel t'men das. Yaake rakran kol vavar pale te pale. Oun yon van moulo dino." 
1Corinthians10:11 Kova lauter, hoy ap lende vas, sikrell men, hoy nay vella. Oun mer, kay djivah kava dives oun djinah, te ačell kava tsiro bouder gar rah, menge vas kova činlo an i lila, te das mer yak ap mende." 
1Corinthians10:12 Doleske, koon penella, kay yob zoreles an o patsepen hi, dell yak, te perell lo gar." 
1Corinthians10:13 Della savo koova, hoy kamell t'men o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell. Dikenn, savo koova vas ninna ap vavar menshende. Te vell pharo koova ap t'mende, dell o Devel t'men koy zoor, te nay hidjrenn kova. Yob hatsell i drom, te venn pale kote vin." 
1Corinthians10:14 Doleske, lače mala, denn yak, oun mangenn gar vavar koova an har o Debles!" 
1Corinthians10:15 Me rakrau t'mentsa har menshentsa, kay goseve hi. Poučenn t'maro dji, te hi kava lauter čačo, hoy me penau!" 
1Corinthians10:16 Te vah khetne, te piyas dran o Yezouseskro khoro, parkrah men koleske pash o Debleste, oun djinah, o Yezous Kristo ratas oun meras menge oun las mari doosh mendar krik. Te phagah ko maro oun rhah les, rikrell men kova o Yezous Kristeha khetne." 
1Corinthians10:17 Mer rhah yek maro. Doleske hi men yek djipen khetne o Yezouseha, ninna te ham boud patsle." 
1Corinthians10:18 Kova hi yaake, har pash i menshende an Israel. Yon van khetne oun rhan kol firhendar, kay anan le o Debleske. Lauter kolla, kay rhan, his khetne. Oun o Devel his mank lende." 
1Corinthians10:19 Me kamau t'mendar te poučell: Hi i figura i čačo devel? Na-a! Hi ko mass, hoy anan le glan late, vavarčandes har vavar mass? Na-a!" 
1Corinthians10:20 Kova, hoy i menshe kol deblen dran kasht oun bar denna, anenn yon i bengenge, gar o Debleske. Oun me kamau gar, te venn t'mer i bengentsa khetne." 
1Corinthians10:21 T'mer nay piyenn gar dran o Yezouseskro khoro oun dran o bengeskro khoro. T'mer nay rhan gar o Yezouseskro rhapen oun o bengeskro rhapen. 
1Corinthians10:22 Ma rhoyrenn o Debles! Mer ham gar zorleder har yob. 
1Corinthians10:23 T'mer penenn: “Lauter nay krah mer.” Me penau: Gar lauter hi lačo. Lauter nay krah mer. Gar lauter, hoy mer krah, hi mishto menge oun i vavarenge." 
1Corinthians10:24 Dikenn gar ap t'mende kokres! Pash halauter, hoy t'mer krenna, dikenn ninna ap o vavareste, hoy leske mishto hi!" 
1Corinthians10:25 T'mer nay rhana hako mass, hoy bikedo vella. Ma poučenn, konestar ko mass vella, te vell t'menge gar phares an o dji!" 
1Corinthians10:26 Djinenn, i phoub oun lauter, hoy koy pre hi, hi o Debleskro." 
1Corinthians10:27 Te penell t'menge yek, kay gar patslo hi: “Avenn pash mande oun rhan mantsa,” palle djan koy! Oun rhan pash leste lauter, hoy yob t'menge anella! Ma poučenn, kay ginas lo ko rhapen, te vell t'menge gar phares an o dji!" 
1Corinthians10:28 Kova hi vavarčandes, te penell t'menge yek: “Kava rhapen vas i debleste dran kasht oun bar dino.” Palle ma rhan ko mass, te vell koleskro dji gar djoungeles, kay kova t'menge penas. Yob nay penals: “Hi mishto, te rhap ko rhapen.”" 
1Corinthians10:29 Me rakrau gar t'mendar, rakrau ko vavarestar, te vals kova gar mishto leske, te rhals yob ko mass. Mange nay penell kek vavar, hoy me nay krap oun hoy gar." 
1Corinthians10:30 Te rhau i rhapen oun parkrau man koleske pash o Debleste, nay praasell man kek, te rhau me ko rhapen." 
1Corinthians10:31 Hoy t'mer ninna krenna oun rhana oun piyenna, kova krenn lauter yaake, te vell o Devel sharedo." 
1Corinthians10:32 Djivenn yaake, te rhoyrell pes kek pral t'mende: kol bibolde gar, oun kolla, kay kek bibolde hi vitar gar, oun vitar gar kol patsle, kay venn t'mentsa khetne." 
1Corinthians10:33 Me krau lauter, te djivap yaake, har hakeneske mishto hi oun rodau gar, hoy mange mishto hi. Me kamau kova te krell, hoy boudenge mishto hi, te djan yon gar nashedo." 
1Corinthians11:1 Krenn kova yaake, har me kova krau! Oun me krau kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo kras." 
1Corinthians11:2 Me hom barhtelo pral t'mende, te bistran t'mer gar, hoy me t'menge penom. Kova, hoy shounom oun t'menge penom, krenn t'mer." 
1Corinthians11:3 Me kamau te djinenn t'mer, kay o Yezous Kristo hi o pralstouno pral hako morsheste. Oun o rom hi o pralstouno pral peskri romyate. Oun o Devel hi o pralstouno pral o Yezous Kristeste." 
1Corinthians11:4 Hako morsh, kay mangell o Debles an, oun hako morsh, kay penella, hoy o Devel leste sikras, oun les hi i stadi ap o shero, kova anell ladj ap peste." 
1Corinthians11:5 Haki romni, kay mangell o Debles an, oun haki romni, kay penella, hoy o Devel late sikras, oun kova krell li, te hi lat či ap o shero, koya anella ladj ap peste. Kova hi yaake, har te vans lake i balla tele činlo." 
1Corinthians11:6 Te kamell i romni či ap peskro shero te čivell, nay moukell yoy ninna peskre balla tele te činell. Te venn lake i balla tele činlo, oun lat hi bouder kek balla ap o shero, hi kova lake i ladj. Doleske hounte čakrell li peskro shero." 
1Corinthians11:7 I morsh hounte čivell kek stadi ap peskro shero. Yob vas kerdo pal o Debleste. Oun o Devel sharell pes leha. Yaake sharell pes o rom peskri romyah. 
1Corinthians11:8 O morsh hi gar i djouvyatar. I djouvel hi o morshestar. 
1Corinthians11:9 O Devel kras o morshes gar i djouvyake. Na-a! Yob kras i djouvyat o morsheske. 
1Corinthians11:10 Doleske hounte čakrell i romni peskro shero, te dikenn i bolepangre, kay lakro rom o pralstouno pral late hi." 
1Corinthians11:11 Pash i patslende hi kova yaake: O rom hi či peske kokres. Oun i romni hi či peske kokres. 
1Corinthians11:12 I djouvel vell o morshestar. Oun o morsh vell i djouvyatar boldo. Oun yon douy venna o Deblestar. 
1Corinthians11:13 Me poučau t'mendar: Hi kova lačo, te mangell i romni o Debles an, oun lat hi či ap peskro shero? Na-a!" 
1Corinthians11:14 Hakeno djinella: Te hi i morshes lengste bal, hi kova i ladj leske." 
1Corinthians11:15 Oun te hi i djouvyat lengste bal, hi yoy shoukar. Lakre balla hi lake har i diklo." 
1Corinthians11:16 Te hi yek pash t'mende, kay kamell pes pral kova čingrell, yaake hounte djinell yob, kay mer čingrah men pral savo koova gar, oun kote, kay i patsle o Debleske khetne venna, vitar gar." 
1Corinthians11:17 Kanna hounte penap t'menge čomone, kay nay sharau t'men gar. Te venn t'mer patsle khetne, krenn t'mer boudeder, hoy t'menge gar mishto hi, har te krans kova, hoy t'menge mishto hi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Me shounom, te venn t'mer khetne, palle čingrenn t'mer khetne, oun ko yek penell: Me krau, hoy kava penella, oun ko vavar penell: Me krau hoy kova penella. Oun me patsau, i paash kolestar, hoy pral t'mende shounom, hi čačo." 
1Corinthians11:19 Kova hounte vell yaake, te dikell hakeno, koon t'mendar an o patsepen mishto tardo hi." 
1Corinthians11:20 Me shounom ninna, te venn t'mer khetne, palle rhan t'mer o Yezouseskro rhapen gar yaake, har maro ray Yezous kova kamella." 
1Corinthians11:21 Hakeno rhal peskro rhapen kokres, hoy yob peha las, oun dell kek vavares čomone. Doleske hi mashkral t'mende phrala oun phenya, kay hi len bok oun troush. Oun vavaren hi yaake boud te piyell, te venn le mato." 
1Corinthians11:22 Nay rhan oun piyenn t'mer gar khere? Hi kol patsle, kay o Debleske khetne venna, či moldo an t'mare yaka? Kamenn t'mer ladj ap kolende te anell, kolen či hi? Hoy penap me t'menge? Sharap me t'men? Na-a! Doleske sharau me t'men gar." 
1Corinthians11:23 Hoy me t'menge penom, kova penas mange o ray Yezous. Koy rati, kay vas ap maro rayeste, o Yezouseste, phoukedo, las yob ko maro," 
1Corinthians11:24 parkras pes pash o Debleste, oun phagas ko maro oun penas: “Kava hi miro mass, hoy t'menge dino vella. Hako kopo, kay phagenn t'mer o maro, ma bistrenn, hoy me t'menge krom!”" 
1Corinthians11:25 Oun pal o rhapen las yob ko khoro oun penas: “Kay mool an kava khoro hi miro rat, hoy t'menge ratau. Yaake krau i nevo drom, kay o Devel oun i menshe mala venna. Hako kopo, kay piyenn t'mer dran ko khoro, ma bistrenn, hoy me t'menge krom!”" 
1Corinthians11:26 Hako kopo, kay rhan t'mer ko maro, oun kay piyenn t'mer dran ko khoro, penenn t'mer doureder, kay maro ray Yezous meras. Kova krenn t'mer yaake rah, bis te yob pale vella." 
1Corinthians11:27 Koon rhal ko maro, oun piyell dran o rayeskro khoro yaake, te vell maro ray gar sharedo, kova anell doosh ap peste. Yob kras har te vals o Yezouseskro mass oun rat či moldo." 
1Corinthians11:28 Doleske hounte dikell hakeno ap peste, har hi lo an o patsepen tardo. Oun palle rhal yob o maro oun piyell dran ko khoro." 
1Corinthians11:29 Koon rhal ko maro, oun piyell dran ko khoro, oun leske hi či moldo, hoy o ray Yezous leske kras, kova anell doosh ap peste oun lell i phagi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Doleske hi boud nassele mashkral t'mende, ninna save, kay hi len kek zoor an lende. Oun boud meran ninna." 
1Corinthians11:31 Te dah yak ap mende, har mer an o patsepen tardo ham, lah kek phagi." 
1Corinthians11:32 Te lah mer i phagi o Deblestar, palle krell yob kova, te djas mer gar khetne i vavar menshentsa nashedo." 
1Corinthians11:33 Doleske, mire phrala, te venn t'mer khetne, te rhan o rayeskro rhapen, denn yak yek ap o vavareste, te lenn ko rhapen khetne." 
1Corinthians11:34 Te hi yekes bok, palle mou te rhal yob khere, yaake te anenn kek doosh ap t'mende. Ko vavar penau t'menge, te vau pash t'mende." 
1Corinthians12:1 Mire phrala, kanna kamau me pral kova te rakrell, hoy o Debleskro Dourho an t'mende čivas." 
1Corinthians12:2 Har t'mer gomme gar patslo hans, tserdas t'men bari zoryah pash kol figure, kay nashte rakrenn gar, kolen i menshe an-mangenna, har te vans le o Devel." 
1Corinthians12:3 Doleske kamau te djinenn t'mer, hoy vella o Deblestar, oun hoy vell gar lestar. Oun me penau t'menge: Te rakrell yek, hoy o Debleskro Dourho leske an o mouy čivell, nay praasell lo gar o Yezouses. Oun kek nay penella: “O Yezous hi miro ray!” te hi o Debleskro Dourho gar an leste." 
1Corinthians12:4 O Debleskro Dourho dell i patslende koy zoor, te nay boudrenn le o Debleske. Ninna te hi koy zoor pash hakeneste vavarčandes, hi yek Debleskro Dourho, kay dell yekes kava oun ko vavares kova." 
1Corinthians12:5 Della boudeder boudi, hoy krenn i patsle o Debleske. Yon lauter boudrenna ko yek rayeske." 
1Corinthians12:6 Oun della boud dromma, har o Debleskro Dourho an i patslende boudrella. Hi yek Devel, kolestar kova lauter vella." 
1Corinthians12:7 An hakeneste boudrell o Debleskro Dourho yaake, kay hi kova i tsele patslenge mishto." 
1Corinthians12:8 Ko yekes dell o Debleskro Dourho i gosevo lab, oun i vavares, te hayvell lo, hoy o Devel kamella. Oun yob penell kova i vavarenge doureder. Hi yek Debleskro Dourho, kay kova lauter krella." 
1Corinthians12:9 I vavares dell yob i baro patsepen. Oun pale i vavares dell yob i zoor, te nay krell lo i nasselen sasto. Hi yek Debleskro Dourho, kay kova lauter della." 
1Corinthians12:10 I vavares dell yob i zoor, te krell yob baro koova, hoy kek kokres pestar nay krella. Oun pale i vavar penell i menshenge, hoy o Devel leste sikras. Oun pale i vavar hayvella, hoy o Deblestar vella, oun hoy gar o Deblestar vella. Vavar rakrenn an vavar rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho len das. Oun pale vavar penenn, hoy koy rakedo vas." 
1Corinthians12:11 Kova krell lauter ko yek Debleskro Dourho, oun yob dell hakenes kova yaake, har yob kamella." 
1Corinthians12:12 O mensho hi dran boudeder kotya, har moussya, herya, oun vavar. Ninna te hi lo dran boud kotya, hi lo yek mensho. Yaake hi ninna o Yezous Kristeha oun kolentsa, kay ap leste patsenna." 
1Corinthians12:13 Kolla, kay ap o Yezous Kristeste patsenna hi bibolde oun kolla, kay kek bibolde hi, hi raya oun boudepangre. Kolla lauter lan o Debleskro Dourho. Ko Dourho anas len lauteren khetne." 
1Corinthians12:14 O mensho hi gar dran yek kotar. Yob hi dran boudeder kotya. 
1Corinthians12:15 Te penals i heri: “Me hom kek vast,” hi li palle kek kotar o menshestar? Na-a, i heri hi i kotar o menshestar." 
1Corinthians12:16 Te penals o kand: “Me hom kek yak,” hi lo palle kek kotar o menshestar? Na-a, o kand hi i kotar o menshestar." 
1Corinthians12:17 Te vals o tselo mensho i yak, kay vals palle o kand, hoy shounella? Te vals o tselo mensho i kand, kay vals palle o nak, hoy soungella?" 
1Corinthians12:18 O Devel čivas hako kotar yaake an o mensheste, har yob kamas." 
1Corinthians12:19 Te vals o tselo mensho i heri, havo mensho vals kova?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Boud kotya krenna yek mensho. 
1Corinthians12:21 I yak nay penell gar ap o vast: “Me hayvau kova kokres. Dja touke!” Oun ninna o shero nay penell gar ap i herya: “Me krau kova kokres. Djan t'menge!” 
1Corinthians12:22 O menshes hi ninna kotya, kay gar zorelo hi. Te vans kolla gar, nay djivals lo gar." 
1Corinthians12:23 Kol kotya, kay menge gar shoukar hi, kolla rivah shoukar an. Oun kol kotya, kay khatrah, ap lende dah mishto garda." 
1Corinthians12:24 Kol kotya, kolen mer gar khatrah, ap kolende das mer gar yaake mishto garda. O Devel kras o menshes yaake, te das mer boudeder garda ap kol kotya, hoy gar yaake shoukar hi har kol vavar." 
1Corinthians12:25 Yob kamas gar, te čingrenn pen i kotya. Yob kamas, te vell ko yek o vavareske koy." 
1Corinthians12:26 Te doukell yek kotar, palle doukenn kol tsele vavar ninna. Oun te vell yek kotar sharedo, hi kol tsele kotya barhtele." 
1Corinthians12:27 T'men hi lauter yek djipen o Yezous Kristeha, oun hakeno t'mendar hi i kotar lestar." 
1Corinthians12:28 Kote, kay i patsle khetne venna, das o Devel hakenes i boudi. Peskre bičepangren das lo koy boudi, te penenn le i menshenge peskro lab. Oun vavar hi o Debleskre rakepangre, kay penenna, hoy o Devel len sikras. Koy hi ninna sikepangre, kay sikrenn i menshende o Debleskro drom, oun kolla, kay krenn baro koova an o Debleskri zoor, kay kek kokres pestar nay krella. Vavaren das yob i zoor, te krenn le i nasselen sasto. Hi patsle, kay hi o vavarenge koy, oun ninna vavar, kay rikrenn i patslen khetne, oun pale vavar, kay rakrenn nay an i vavar rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho len das." 
1Corinthians12:29 Gar halauter hi o Deblestar bičedo, te penenn le i menshenge leskro lab. Gar halauter hi o Debleskre rakepangre. Gar halauter hi sikepangre. Gar hakeno nay krell i baro koova an o Debleskri zoor." 
1Corinthians12:30 Gar halauter lendar lan koy zoor o Deblestar, te krenn le i nasselen sasto. Gar halauter lendar nay rakrenn an i vavar rakepen, oun gar hakeno nay penell, hoy koy rakedo vas." 
1Corinthians12:31 Mangenn o Deblestar, te čivell leskro Dourho kol zorya an t'mende, kay i patslenge i feteder hi. Oun kanna sikrau me t'men i drom, hoy pral hako vavar drom hi." 
1Corinthians13:1 Ninna te rakroms me nay an hako rakepen, hoy i menshe oun i bolepangre rakrenna, oun te vals man gar o Debleskro kamlepen an miro dji, palle voms me har i bashepaskro, kay bashrell gar mishto. Leskro bashepen molella či." 
1Corinthians13:2 Te vals man gar o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, palle molals ninna kova či, te penoms me i menshenge, hoy o Devel mande sikras. Te vals man gar o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, palle molals ninna kova či, te djinoms halauter, hoy i vavar gar djinenna oun te hayvoms ko tselo Debleskro drom. Te vals man gar o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, palle molals ninna kova či, te vals man yek zorelo patsepen, te penoms ap i berge: Hadenn t'men, oun yon hadenna pen." 
1Corinthians13:3 Te vals man gar o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, palle molals ninna kova či, te doms miro tselo bravlepen kol čorvelende, oun te moukoms man me djides pre te rhačrell." 
1Corinthians13:4 Kones hi o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, kova rikrella lauter vin. Yob hi lačo oun zilverella gar. Yob krell pes gar bares oun sharell pes gar." 
1Corinthians13:5 Kones hi o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, kova krell kek vi-ladjedo koova; oun dikell gar ap peste kokres. Yob dikell ninna ap i vavarende, te djal lenge mishto. Kones hi o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, kova moukell pes gar rhoyedo te krell. Yob bistrell o čilačepen, hoy i vavar leske kran." 
1Corinthians13:6 Kones hi o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, kova hi gar barhtelo pral o čilačepen. Yob hi barhtelo pral o čačepen." 
1Corinthians13:7 Te hi les o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji oun i menshe doukrenn les, hi yob gar rhoyedo pral kova. Kones hi o Debleskro kamlepen an o dji, kova patsell halauter. Yob dell o vavares gar pre, oun rikrell lauter vin." 
1Corinthians13:8 Vell i tsiro, kay čivell o Debleskro Dourho i patslenge bouder kek lab an o dji. Vell i tsiro, kay dell lo len bouder kek vavar rakepen. Vell i tsiro, kay hounte vell men bouder kek gosvepen. Yek ačella: o Debleskro kamlepen." 
1Corinthians13:9 Kanna djinah gar lauter o Deblestar, i tikno kotar kokres. Oun kova, hoy sikrell lo mende pestar, hi i tikno kotar kokres." 
1Corinthians13:10 Yek tsiro vella, kay dikah lauter lestar oun bouder gar tikne kotya kokres." 
1Corinthians13:11 Har homs i tikno čavo, rakrom me har i čavo, oun dikom lauter har i čavo. Oun man his čavengro koova an o shero. Har vom i morsh, čivom o čavengro koova krik." 
1Corinthians13:12 Kanna dikah o Debleskro koova gar mishto. Mer dikah kova yaake har an o phouro blendari. Yek dives vella, kay dikah mer o Debles, har yob hi. Lauter, hoy me kanna lestar djinau, hi tikne kotya. Vell ko dives, kay prindjrau les yaake, har yob man prindjrella." 
1Corinthians13:13 Kanna ačenna menge kalla triin: – O patsepen ap o Debleste; – i barht, te djinah mer, te vell lauter mishto; – o Debleskro kamlepen. O bareder kol trinendar hi o Debleskro kamlepen." 
1Corinthians14:1 Krenn lauter, te lenn o Debleskro kamlepen an t'maro dji! Oun rodenn i tselo djiyestar kol zorya, hoy o Debleskro Dourho an t'mende čivella, te nay boudrenna o Debleske! Boudeder har hako vavar koova rodenn koy pal, te penenn nay i menshenge i lab, hoy vella o Deblestar." 
1Corinthians14:2 Kova, kay rakrella an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho les das, oun hoy kek hayvella, kova rakrell gar i menshenge. Yob krell kova o Debleske. O Debleskro Dourho dell les koy zoor, te rakrell lo, hoy kek mensho djinella." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kova, kay penell i menshenge i lab, hoy vella o Deblestar, kova rakrell yaake ap i menshende, te vell lengro patsepen zoreles, oun te venn lengre djia barhteles oun zoreles." 
1Corinthians14:4 Kova, kay rakrella peske an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho les das oun hoy kek hayvella, koleske djal feteder an peskro dji. Kova, kay penell i patslenge i lab, hoy o Deblestar vella, krell kova, te vell kolengro patsepen zoreles." 
1Corinthians14:5 Ninna te kamoms me, te rakrans t'mer lauter an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho das, kamoms me boudeder, te penans nay t'mer lauter i menshenge i lab, hoy vella o Deblestar. Hi boudeder moldo, te penell yek i lab, hoy vella o Deblestar, har te rakrell yek an i vavar rakepen, hoy kek hayvella. Hi vavarčandes, te hi yek koy, kay penell nay, hoy an ko vavar rakepen rakedo vas, yaake te venn i patsle zoreles an o patsepen." 
1Corinthians14:6 Kanna, mire phrala, har vals kova, te voms me pash t'mende, oun rakroms an i rakepen, hoy kek hayvella? Kova molals t'menge či. T'menge hi boudeder moldo, te rakrap an i rakepen, hoy t'mer hayvenna, oun te penap t'menge, hoy o Devel mande sikras, oun hoy lestar djinau. Oun t'menge hi ninna boudeder moldo, te penap t'menge i lab, hoy vella o Deblestar, oun te sikrap t'men, har te djan ap o Debleskro drom." 
1Corinthians14:7 Kova hi yaake har o bashepen. Te bashrell yek gar mishto, hayvell kek, hoy bashedo vella." 
1Corinthians14:8 Te djan i lourde an o kourepen, palle phourdell yek ap i bashepaskri. Oun yob te phourdella yaake djoungeles, te hayvell les kek, palle djal kek an o kourepen." 
1Corinthians14:9 Yaake hi kova ninna t'mentsa. Te rakrenn t'mer an i rakepen labentsa, hoy kek hayvella, har nay hayvell yek, hoy t'mer penenna? T'mer rakrenn čičeske." 
1Corinthians14:10 Dell boud menshe an boud themma. Oun hakenes hi peskro rakepen. 
1Corinthians14:11 Te hayvau me gar ko vavareskro rakepen, hom me koleske i vi-themari. Oun ninna yob hi mange i vi-themari." 
1Corinthians14:12 Yaake hi kova ninna t'mentsa. T'mer kamenn o tselo djiyestar kol zorya te lell, hoy o Debleskro Dourho della. Krenn lauter, te lenn boud kolestar, hoy krell i patslen zoreles an o patsepen!" 
1Corinthians14:13 Hi yaake: Koon an i rakepen rakrella, hoy das les o Debleskro Dourho, kova hounte mangell o Deblestar, te nay penell lo i menshenge kova, hoy koy rakedo vas." 
1Corinthians14:14 Me te rakrau an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho man das, palle krell kova o Debleskro Dourho an mande. Oun me hayvau gar, hoy me penom." 
1Corinthians14:15 Hoy hounte krap me kanna? Me kamau te rakrap o Debleha an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho man das. Ninna kamau me te rakrap leha i labentsa, hoy me hayvau. Oun me kamau leske te givap, har o Debleskro Dourho moukell man te givell. Oun ninna kamau te givap i labentsa, hoy me hayvau." 
1Corinthians14:16 Te shareh tou o Debles an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho tout das, oun koy hi yek, kay hayvell kova gar, har nay penell yob Amen ap kova, hoy tou penal?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Leskro dji vell gar zoreles, ninna te parkral tout tou o djiyestar pash o Debleste." 
1Corinthians14:18 Me parkrau man pash o Debleste, kay rakrau boudeder har t'mer lauter an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho man das." 
1Corinthians14:19 Te hom me mank i patslende, te sikrap len o Debleskro drom, kamau kote feteder panč laba te rakrell, hoy hakeno hayvella, har deesh zerya laba an i rakepen, hoy kek hayvella." 
1Corinthians14:20 Mire phrala, ma avenn har tikne čave, kay gomme gar boud djinenna. Avenn gosevo har i phoure! Pash čilačo koova, avenn har tikne čave, hoy o čilačepen gar hayvenna!" 
1Corinthians14:21 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: Me kamau te rakrap ap kal menshende an o vavar rakepen. Oun vi-themarya penenn lenge mire laba. Oun ninna palle shounenn le gar ap mande, penell o Devel." 
1Corinthians14:22 Yaake dikenn t'mer: O Debleskro Dourho dell o vavar rakepen, te sikrell o Devel peskri zoor kolende, kay gar patsenna, oun gar i patslende. Hi vavarčandes, te penell yek i lab, hoy vella o Deblestar. Ko lab hi i patslenge oun gar kolenge, kay patsenna gar ap o Debleste." 
1Corinthians14:23 Dikenn, te vans i tsele patsle khetne, oun rakrans lauter an i vavar rakepen, oun koy vals yek, kay gar patslo hi oun kay prindjrell kova gar, penals kova: “Kalla hi lauter narvele!”" 
1Corinthians14:24 Hi vavarčandes, te lell hakeno i lab o Deblestar, oun penell les glan i vavarende, oun koy vella yek, kay gar patsella oun o tselo koova gar prindjrella, koleske djal lauter an leskro dji, oun leske djan i yaka pre pral peskri doosh." 
1Corinthians14:25 Hoy an leskro dji khatedo hi, vell diklo. Oun yob moukell pes glan tele perell ap i phoub oun mangell o Debles an, oun penell: “O Devel hi čačepah pash t'mende!”" 
1Corinthians14:26 Mire phrala, hi yaake: Te venn t'mer khetne, sharell ko yek o Debles i gilyah. I vavar sikrell, har te djan ap o Debleskro drom. Ninna i vavar penell, hoy o Devel les sikras. Pale i vavar rakrell an i rakepen, hoy o Debleskro Dourho les das. Oun i vavar nay penell, hoy koy rakedo vas. Lauter kova krenn, te venn i patsle zoreles an o patsepen!" 
1Corinthians14:27 Te hi menshe koy, kay rakrenn an i vavar rakepen, moukenn te rakrenn douy te triin, gar boudeder har triin, yek pal o vavareste! Oun yek hounte penell, hoy rakedo vas." 
1Corinthians14:28 Te hi kek koy, kay penell nay, hoy koy rakedo vas, palle moukenn kekes an i vavar rakepen te rakrell. Yob nay rakrell khere peske kokres oun o Debleske." 
1Corinthians14:29 Kolla, kay penenna i menshenge i lab, hoy o Deblestar vella, kolendar moukenn te rakrenn douy te triin! Oun kol vavar denn garda, te hi kova čačo, hoy rakedo vella!" 
1Corinthians14:30 Te penell yek i lab o Deblestar, oun o Devel sikrell čomone ap i vavareste, kay koy pashel beshdo hi, hounte moukell ko ersto koles te rakrell." 
1Corinthians14:31 T'mer lauter nay penenn yek pal o vavareste i lab, hoy vella o Deblestar. Yaake dikenn lauter, har te djan o Debleskro drom. Oun lauter venna zoreles an o patsepen." 
1Corinthians14:32 Kones i lab vell o Deblestar, kova nay rikrell pes pale, yaake rah har ko vavar rakrella." 
1Corinthians14:33 O Devel kamell kek čingepen. Yob kamell, te djal lauter mishto. Kova hi yaake an hake forya, kay i patsle khetne venna." 
1Corinthians14:34 Te venn t'mer khetne an o Debleskro kheer, ma moukenn i djouvyen te rakrell. Yon hounte shounenn ap kova, hoy penlo vella. Yaake hi ninna činlo an o Moseskre lila." 
1Corinthians14:35 Te kamell i djouvel čomone te djinell, poučell li khere peskro romestar. Kova hi gar mishto, te rakrell i djouvel an o Debleskro kheer." 
1Corinthians14:36 Vas o Debleskro lab t'mendar? Na-a! Vas o Debleskro lab pash t'mende kokres? Na-a! 
1Corinthians14:37 Te patsell yek t'mendar, kay o Devel rakrell leha, oun kay o Debleskro Dourho les o Debleskro koova sikrell, yaake hayvell yob, te hi kava gar mandar, hoy me kate činau. Kava hi o Deblestar." 
1Corinthians14:38 Koon kova gar kamell te dikell, ap koleste dikenn vitar gar!" 
1Corinthians14:39 Mire phrala, mangenn o Debles, te nay penenn i menshenge i lab, hoy lestar vella! Oun moukenn kolen te rakrell, kay kamenna an ko rakepen te rakrell, hoy o Debleskro Dourho len das!" 
1Corinthians14:40 Krenn kava yaake, te djal kova lauter mishto oun shoukar!" 
1Corinthians15:1 Mire phrala, ma bistrenn o lačo lab o Yezousestar, hoy me t'menge penom! T'mer lan ko lab pre, oun t'mer djivenn pal kova." 
1Corinthians15:2 Te rikrenn t'men ap o lačo lab o Yezousestar, yaake har me les t'menge penom, djan t'mer gar nashedo. Te vals kova vavarčandes, vals t'maro patsepen čičeske." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ko bareder lab, hoy mange penlo vas, oun hoy me t'menge penom, hi kava: O Yezous Kristo meras menge, te lell lo mari doosh mendar krik, yaake har an o Debleskro lab činlo hi." 
1Corinthians15:4 Oun yob vas paskedo, oun vas djido pal triin divessa, yaake har kova an o Debleskro lab činlo hi." 
1Corinthians15:5 Oun pal kova sikras lo pes o Petreste. Oun pal koleste sikras lo pes peskre deesh-te-douy malende. 
1Corinthians15:6 Pal lende dikan les boudeder har panč-sheel phrala ap yek kopo. Boud lendar djivenna gomme kay dives. 
1Corinthians15:7 Pal lende dikas les ninna o Yakobo, oun palle ninna i tsele vavar bičepangre." 
1Corinthians15:8 Pal lende moukas yob pes mandar te dikell. Pal mande dikas les bouder kek. Oun me homs gar moldo, te dikap les." 
1Corinthians15:9 Me lom i patslen palla, te marap len. Doleske hom me o tikneder mashkral lende, kolen o Yezous bičras, te penenn le i menshenge o lačo lab lestar. Oun me hom gar moldo, te penenn yon, kay me yek lendar hom." 
1Corinthians15:10 O Devel kamas an peskro baro lačepen, te vap me kova, hoy me kanna hom. Oun leskro baro lačepen, hoy yob man das, his gar čičeske. Me boudrom boudeder har kol tsele vavar. Gar me kokres, o Debleskro lačepen an mande boudras mantsa, te krap nay koy boudi." 
1Corinthians15:11 Kova hi yek, koon mendar penas t'menge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar. Mer halauter rakrah lestar. Oun yaake patsan t'mer ap leste." 
1Corinthians15:12 Mer penam t'menge, kay o Yezous Kristo i moulendar pre stas. Har nay penenn menshe mank t'mende: “Ko della gar, kay i moule pre stenna.”" 
1Corinthians15:13 Te dell kova gar, kay i moule pre stenna, yaake stas o Yezous Kristo vitar gar i moulendar pre." 
1Corinthians15:14 Te stals o Yezous Kristo gar i moulendar pre, vals kova čičeske, hoy mer o Yezous Kristestar rakrah. Oun t'maro patsepen vals ninna čičeske." 
1Corinthians15:15 Palle nay penans le mendar, te ham mer rhorhene. Mer penam, kay kras o Devel o Yezous Kristes i moulendar djido. Te vals kova gar čačo, te krell o Devel i moulen djido, palle nashte kras yob o Yezous Kristes vitar gar djido." 
1Corinthians15:16 Te stenn i moule gar pre, palle stas o Yezous Kristo vitar gar i moulendar pre." 
1Corinthians15:17 Te stas o Yezous Kristo gar i moulendar pre, yaake hi t'maro patsepen čičeske. Oun ko čilačo koova, hoy t'mer kran, hi gomme ap t'mende." 
1Corinthians15:18 Te stas o Yezous Kristo gar i moulendar pre, palle hi kolla nashedo, kay ap o Yezous Kristeste patsan oun meran." 
1Corinthians15:19 Te vals maro patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste bouder či moldo pal o merepen, vams i čorvleder i tsele menshendar." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ko čačepen hi: O Yezous Kristo hi o ersto, koles o Devel i moulendar djido kras." 
1Corinthians15:21 Yaake har vas o merepen yek menshestar, yaake vell ninna yekestar, kay stenn i moule pale pre." 
1Corinthians15:22 Yaake har vas o Adamestar, kay hounte merenn lauter, yaake vell o Yezous Kristestar, te krell o Devel len lauter djido:" 
1Corinthians15:23 Hakeno ap peskro tsiro: O Yezous Kristo hi o glanstouno. Te vell lo pale, stenn kolla pre, kay ap leste patsan." 
1Corinthians15:24 Pal kova herell kava tsiro pre. Hako ray, hako pralstouno oun hakeno, koles hi penepaske, koleske lell o Yezous Kristo i zoor krik oun dell lauter o Debleste, peskro dadeste, te vell o Devel kokres o ray pral halauter." 
1Corinthians15:25 O Yezous Kristo hounte vell o ray yaake rah, bis te čivell o Devel lauteren, kay les gar kamenna, tel leskre pire." 
1Corinthians15:26 Ko palstouno, kolendar o Yezous Kristo i zoor krik lella, hi o merepen." 
1Corinthians15:27 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: Lauter čivas o Devel tel leskre pire. Ninna te hi kate penlo, kay hi o Yezous Kristo o ray pral lauterende, hi lo gar pral o Debleste tardo. O Devel hi kova, kay kras, kay hi o Yezous Kristo o ray pral lauterende." 
1Corinthians15:28 Te vas o Yezous Kristo o ray pral halauter, čivell yob pes ninna tel o Debleskro vast, te vell o Devel ninna o ray pral o čaveste. Oun o Devel kokres hi o ray pral halauter." 
1Corinthians15:29 Kanna rakrau pale pral kolende, kay penenn, te stenn i moule gar pre. T'mer djinenn, hi patsle koy, kay moukenn pen i moulenge te taufrell. Poučau t'mendar: Te stenn i moule bouder gar pre, hoske moukenn le pen palle i moulenge te taufrell?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Oun hoy hi mentsa? Hoske penah mer o Debleskro lab doureder, te djinah mer, te nay vah mer hako tsiro moulo dino?"
