1Corinthians15:31 Hako dives nay nashrau me miro djipen. Mire phrala, kova hi čačo, yaake har čačo hi, kay hom barhtelo pral t'mende, kay me anom t'men pash o Yezous Kristeste, maro rayeste." 
1Corinthians15:32 An o foro Efesus kourom man me menshentsa, kay yaake hi har divye firhe. Te patsoms me gar, kay i moule pre stenna, kroms me kova gar. Te stenna i moule gar pre, hi kol vavaren čačo, te penenn le: “Rhas oun piyas! Taysar nay ham moulo!”" 
1Corinthians15:33 Ma patsenn, kay lengro čačo hi! Ma krenn kova, hoy yon krenna!" 
1Corinthians15:34 Djan o čačo drom! Ma piyenn t'men mato! Djivenn bouder gar an o čilačepen! Mank t'mende hi menshe, kay djinenn gar, koon o Devel hi. Oun kova penau t'menge, te ladjenn t'men." 
1Corinthians15:35 Kanna nay vell yek, kay poučella: “Har nay stenn i moule pre? Oun har dikenn le vin?”" 
1Corinthians15:36 Me, o Paulo, penau touke: Har nay poučeh tou yaake dineles? Dik ap o djob, hoy tou an i phoub čiveh! Kova hounte merell, te vell lo djido oun baro." 
1Corinthians15:37 Oun kova, hoy tou an i phoub čiveh, hi gar ko baro djob. Na-a! Tou čiveh les an i phoub, te hi lo tikno. Oun yaake kreh tou kova ninna o vavar zenlepah." 
1Corinthians15:38 O Devel moukell les bares te vell oun yaake vin te dikell, har yob kamell. Oun hako zenlepen krell lo vavarčandes." 
1Corinthians15:39 Hako djipen ap i phoub dikell vavarčandes vin. I menshe dikenn vavarčandes vin har i čirkle. Oun i čirkle dikenn vavarčandes vin har i mače. 
1Corinthians15:40 Oun kolla, kay an o bolepen hi, dikenn vavarčandes vin, har kolla, kay ap i phoub hi. Oun kolla, kay an o bolepen hi, len hi i vavar raylepen, har kolla, kay ap i phoub hi." 
1Corinthians15:41 O kham, les hi i vavar raylepen har o čon. Oun o čon, les hi i vavar raylepen, har i bolepangre momlia. Oun kek lendar dikell vin har koy vavar." 
1Corinthians15:42 Yaake hi ninna, te stenn i moule pre. Kova, hoy an i phoub čiddo vella, ferdjala. Kova, kay i moulendar pre stella, merell bouder gar." 
1Corinthians15:43 Kova, hoy an i phoub čiddo vella, hi djoungelo. Kova, kay i moulendar pre stella, hi shoukar. Kova, hoy an i phoub čiddo vella, koles hi kek zoor. Te stell lo i moulendar pre, djal kova i bari zoryah." 
1Corinthians15:44 Kova, hoy paskedo vella, his i mensho dran mass oun rat. Kova, kay i moulendar pre stella, hi i nevo mensho, koles o Debleskro Dourho djido kras. Yaake har della o menshes dran mass oun rat, – kova merella – yaake della ninna o nevo menshes, koles o Debleskro Dourho djido kras. Kova merella bouder gar." 
1Corinthians15:45 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: O ersto mensho, o Adam, las o djipen. Oun o Yezous Kristo, koles nay kharams mer o douyto mensho – yob hi i djido dourho, kay dell o djipen." 
1Corinthians15:46 Ko djipen, hoy yob della, vell pal o djipen, hoy hi men kanna ap kay phoub." 
1Corinthians15:47 O ersto mensho vas i phoubyatar oun dran čik kerdo. O douyto mensho, o Yezous Kristo, vas dran o bolepen." 
1Corinthians15:48 Yaake har ko phoubyakro mensho, o Adam, his, yaake hi kolla, kay ap i phoub hi. Yaake har ko bolepaskro mensho, o Yezous Kristo, hi, yaake hi kolla, kay an o bolepen hi." 
1Corinthians15:49 Kanna dikah vin har kova, kay vas kerdo dran čik. Te vah an o bolepen, dikah vin har kova, kay vas dran o bolepen." 
1Corinthians15:50 Mire phrala, kova penau me t'menge: Menshe dran mass oun rat nay venn gar an o bolepen. Vitar gar vell kova, hoy moulo hi, kote, kay i djide hi." 
1Corinthians15:51 Shounenn, me penau t'menge, hoy kek djinella: Mer merah gar lauter. Vell i tsiro, koy lell men o Devel vin dran kova, hoy mer kanna ham, oun krell men vavarčandes." 
1Corinthians15:52 Kova vell ap yek kopo, yaake sik, har kek nay dikella. Ap ko tsiro shounah mer i bashepaskri, kay yek dren phourdell. Te shounah mer koy bashepaskri, stenn i moule pre, oun venn djido. Oun mer, kay gomme djivah, vah vin lino dran kova, hoy mer kanna ham, oun vavarčandes kerdo." 
1Corinthians15:53 Hi yaake: I moule venn djido. Oun i djide hounte merenn bouder gar. 
1Corinthians15:54 Te hi ko tsiro koy, kay i moule djido venna, oun i djide bouder gar merenna, palle vell kova čačo, hoy an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: O merepen nashras peskri zoor. Lestar trashah mer bouder gar." 
1Corinthians15:55 Merepen, tiri zoor hi krik! Merepen, tou doukreh kekes bouder!" 
1Corinthians15:56 O merepen lell peskri zoor dran o čilačepen, hoy o mensho krella. Hoy čilačo hi, djinah mer dran o Moseskre lila, kay činlo hi, har te djivas." 
1Corinthians15:57 Kanna parkrah men pash o Debleste. O merepen nashras peskri zoor pral mende. Maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, his zorleder har o merepen, oun las leskri zoor krik." 
1Corinthians15:58 Doleske, mire kamle phrala, ačenn zoreles an o patsepen! Ma moukenn t'men kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! Avenn hako tsiro o Debleske koy, oun boudrenn leske mishto! T'mer djinenna: Kay boudi, hoy leske krenna, hi gar čičeske." 
1Corinthians16:1 Kanna kamau te rakrell pral i love, hoy t'mer khetne čivenn i patslenge. Krenn kova yaake, har me les ninna penom kol patslenge an o them Galatia." 
1Corinthians16:2 Hako kourko čivell hakeno t'mendar yaake boud love ap i rig, har leske djala. Yaake hounte čivenn kol love gar khetne ap ko dives, kay vau pash t'mende." 
1Corinthians16:3 Te vom pash t'mende, rodenn t'menge morshen vin, kay hi mishto an t'mare yaka. Oun me bičrau len kol loventsa an o foro Yerusalem, oun dau len lila peha, hoy dren činlo hi, koneske kol love hi oun konestar." 
1Corinthians16:4 Te vals mishto, te djap me ninna koy, palle nay djan le mantsa." 
1Corinthians16:5 Miro drom pash t'mende djal pral o them Macedonia. Kote ačau gar, vau yaake sik har djala pash t'mende." 
1Corinthians16:6 Kamau i tsiro pash t'mende te ačell. Te djala, ninna pral o vend. Te djau me doureder, palle vals shoukar, te venn t'mer mantsa i tikno kotar drom." 
1Corinthians16:7 Kava kopo kamau gar te vap pash t'mende i tikno tsireske. Me kamoms te ačap i rah tsiro pash t'mende, te kamell o Devel kova ninna." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kate an o foro Efesus ačau, bis te vell ko baro dives, hoy kharella Fingsta." 
1Corinthians16:9 Kate nay boudrau me mishto o Debleske, ninna te hi kate boud menshe, kay krenn mange miri boudi phares." 
1Corinthians16:10 Te vell o Timoteo pash t'mende, palle len les yaake mishto pre, te vell les kek traash. Oun te dikell kek ap leste tele! Yob boudrell ninna o Debleske har me. Te vell lo pale pash mande, djan i kotar drom leha! Me oun i phrala, kay pash mande hi, ačah kate yaake rah, bis te vas lo pash mende pale." 
1Corinthians16:11  
1Corinthians16:12 Boud kope penom me ap maro phraleste Apollo, te vell yob kol vavar phralentsa pash t'mende. Yob kamell kova kanna gar. Te vell i mishto tsiro, vell lo pash t'mende." 
1Corinthians16:13 Denn garda, te ačenn an o patsepen! Ma trashenn! Ačenn zoreles!" 
1Corinthians16:14 Lauter, hoy t'mer krenna, krenn dran o kamlepen o tselo djiyestar!" 
1Corinthians16:15 Mire phrala, t'mer prindjrenn o Stefano oun kolla, kay an leskro kheer djivenna. Yon hi kol patsle, kay glan i tsele vavarende an o them Akaya ap o Yezouseste patsan. Yon boudrenna pengri tseli zoryah i patslenge. Mangau t'men," 
1Corinthians16:16 shounenn ap kolende oun ap savende har yon, kay boudrenn o Debleske pengri tseli zoryah!" 
1Corinthians16:17 Me hom barhtelo, kay vas o Stefano, oun o Fortunato, oun o Akayko pash mande. T'mer nay van gar. Doleske hom barhtelo, te nay van yon pash mande." 
1Corinthians16:18 Yon kran miro dji zoreles, yaake har yon ninna t'mare djia zoreles kran. Rikrenn t'men ap save menshende!" 
1Corinthians16:19 I tsele patsle an o them Akaya penenn t'menge lače laba. Ninna kol douy, o Akvila oun i Priska, oun kol vavar patsle, kay khetne venna an lengro kheer, penenn boud lače laba ap t'mende, kay han lengre phrala oun phenya an o patsepen." 
1Corinthians16:20 I tsele patsle penenn t'menge lače laba. Penenn t'menge lače laba, oun taprenn t'men trouyel, oun denn t'men i čoum. Koleha sikrenn t'mer, te han phrala oun phenya an o patsepen." 
1Corinthians16:21 Ačenn o Debleha! Kova činau me, o Paulo, miro vasteha." 
1Corinthians16:22 Koon o Yezouses, maro rayes, gar kamella, ap koleste vell i bibarht! Maranatha!" 
1Corinthians16:23 O lačepen maro rayestar, o Yezousestar, djal t'mentsa!" 
1Corinthians16:24 Me kamau t'men lauteren o djiyestar. Mer ham yek an o Yezous Kristeste. 
2Corinthians1:1 Kava liil činau me, o Paulo. Me hom o Yezous Kristeskro bičepaskro, yaake har o Devel kova kamell. Oun me oun maro phraal, o Timoteo, mer činah kava liil ap i patslende, kay venn khetne an o Debleskro lab an o foro Korint. Kava liil hi ninna i tsele Debleskre čavenge an o them Akaya." 
2Corinthians1:2 Mou vell t'men lačepen oun barht an o dji! Kova dell t'men o Devel, maro dad, oun maro ray, o Yezous Kristo!" 
2Corinthians1:3 Sharas o Debles, o dades maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar. Yob hi i lačo dad, oun les hi i baro dji menge, oun moukell men gar kokres." 
2Corinthians1:4 Ninna te vell boud pharo koova ap mende, hi lo pash mende oun krell mare djia zoreles, te penas mer kolenge lače laba, ap kolende ninna pharo koova vella, te venn yon pale zoreles, yaake har kras o Devel mare djia zoreles." 
2Corinthians1:5 Yaake har vell boud pharo koova ap mende o Yezous Kristeske, yaake dell lo men ninna boud zoor an o dji." 
2Corinthians1:6 Te vell pharo koova ap mende, vell kova, te venn t'mare djia zoreles, oun te lenn t'mer o Debleskro djipen. Te kras o Devel mare djia zoreles, venn ninna t'mare djia zoreles. Oun t'mer nay rikrenn kol douka vin, hoy ap mende ninna hi." 
2Corinthians1:7 T'menge penah: Mer djinah oun patsah, te vell pharo koova ap t'mende, palle krell o Devel ninna t'mare djia zoreles." 
2Corinthians1:8 Mire phrala, t'mer hounte djinenn, har hams an o them Asia, his maro djipen yaake pharo, te his men bouder kek zoor oun patsam, mer hounte meras." 
2Corinthians1:9 Maro merepen his glan mare yaka. Kava pharo koova vas ap mende, te dikas bouder gar ap mende, na-a, te dikas ap o Debleste, kay krell i moulen djido." 
2Corinthians1:10 Oun yob moukas men gar te merell, oun krell kova vitar gar an ko tsiro, hoy glan mende hi. Ava, ap leste dikah, te lell lo men pale te pale vin dran o merepen an ko tsiro, hoy gomme glan mende hi." 
2Corinthians1:11 Ninna mangan t'mer o Debles menge. Te mangenn boud menshe les menge, palle parkrenn pen ninna boud pash leste, te dikenn le o lačepen, hoy yob men das." 
2Corinthians1:12 Maro dji penell menge, mer djivam maro djipen čačes oun djoudjes, yaake har o Devel kamella. Doleske nay sharah men. Mer rakram pral o Debleskro lačepen oun penam či, hoy vella dran maro menshengro gosvepen. T'mer djinenna, yaake djivam gar kokres mank i vavar menshende, na-a, ninna pash t'mende." 
2Corinthians1:13 Ninna kova, hoy činah t'menge an mare lila, nay hayvenn t'mer yaake, har kova činlo hi. Me patsau, te hayvenn t'mer men boudeder oun feteder, ninna te hayvenn t'mer kanna gomme gar lauter. Ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray Yezous pale, nay sharenn t'men mentsa, oun mer nay sharah men t'mentsa." 
2Corinthians1:14  
2Corinthians1:15 Kova patsau zoreles. Dran kova his an miro dji, te vap douy kope pash t'mende, te anap t'menge douy kope o Debleskro lačepen." 
2Corinthians1:16 Ap miro drom an o them Macedonia kamom pash t'mende te vell. Oun ninna te djau pale, kamom pash t'mende te vell. Palle nay dans t'mer man kova, hoy man hounte vell djipaske ap o drom an o them Youdea." 
2Corinthians1:17 Kanna nay penans t'mer, me hom i morsh, kay rikrell gar peskro lab, oun hom yek har boud vavar, kay penenna mer krah kova, oun krenn les gar." 
2Corinthians1:18 O Devel djinella: Kova hoy mer penah, kova krah ninna." 
2Corinthians1:19 O Debleskro čavo, o Yezous Kristo, kolestar o Silvano, o Timoteo oun me t'menge penam, yob rikras ninna peskre laba. Lauter hi čačo, hoy yob penas." 
2Corinthians1:20 Lauter, hoy moukas o Devel glan i rah tsiro menge te penell, kova kras o Yezous Kristo menge. Dran kova penah mer Amen, te vell o Devel sharedo." 
2Corinthians1:21 O Devel krell men, ninna t'men lauteren, zoreles an o patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste. Yob rodas men peske vin," 
2Corinthians1:22 oun das men peskro Dourho. Ko Dourho, hoy an mende hi, sikrell men, kay ham leskro. Doleske djinah, yob dell men gomme boud bareder lačo koova an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
2Corinthians1:23 Kanna penau t'menge, hoske djom gar pash t'mende. Me kamom t'men gar pale te doukrell. Glan o Debleste penau t'menge kava pash mo djipen." 
2Corinthians1:24 Mer kamah te kras t'men barhtelo, oun rodah gar koy pal, te vas raya pral t'maro patsepen. Na-a, mer djinah: T'mer han zoreles an o patsepen tardo." 
2Corinthians2:1 Kamom gar, te vell t'menge ropaske. Doleske vom bouder gar pash t'mende." 
2Corinthians2:2 Me te krau, te vell t'menge ropaske, palle hi mange kek koy, kay krell man pale barhtelo." 
2Corinthians2:3 Doleske činom t'menge ko liil. Kamom gar, te rovap pral kolende, kay man barhteles hounte krans. Oun me patsau zoreles, te han t'mer barhtele pral kova, te nay krenna t'mer man barhtelo." 
2Corinthians2:4 Doleske činom t'menge ko liil boud ropah oun traash an miro dji. Kamom gar, te doukrap t'men. Na-a, me kamom, te dikenn t'mer, kay kamau t'men o tselo djiyestar." 
2Corinthians2:5 T'mer djinenn, pash t'mende hi yek, kay doukras t'men an o dji. Yob doukras gar man. Na-a, yob doukras boud t'mendar. Me nay penau gar, te doukras yob t'men halauteren." 
2Corinthians2:6 T'mer dan les i phagi. Oun kova hi doha. 
2Corinthians2:7 Kanna hounte bistrenn ko koova, hoy yob kras. Rakrenn lačes leha, te vell leske gar bouder ropaske." 
2Corinthians2:8 Me mangau t'men: Sikrenn leste, te kamenn les!" 
2Corinthians2:9 Ko liil činom t'menge ninna, te dikap, har shounenn ap mande an hako koova." 
2Corinthians2:10 Te bistrenn t'mer o čilačepen, hoy o vavar ap t'mende kras, palle bistrau me kova ninna. Ava, te dals čomone, hoy hounte bistroms me, palle bistrom me kova t'menge. Kova djinell o Yezous Kristo." 
2Corinthians2:11 Me kamau gar te taprell men o beng. Mer djinah mishto, hoy koles hi an leskro shero." 
2Corinthians2:12 Har vom me an o foro Troas, te penap kote o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar, kras o Devel i menshengre djia pre." 
2Corinthians2:13 Miro phraal, o Tito, kamas ninna an kava foro te vell. Har vas lo gar, vas man i daar, oun me penom lenge: “Ačenn mo Debleha!” oun djom mange an o them Macedonia." 
2Corinthians2:14 Me parkrau man pash o Debleste, te dell lo men i zoor, te djas ap o Yezouseskro drom. Khetne o Yezouseha ham hako tsiro zorleder har o čilačepen. Oun kote, kay penah i menshenge o lačo lab o Yezousestar, hi kova yaake, har te vell i lačo soungepen pash boud menshende." 
2Corinthians2:15 Te rakrah o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar, hi o Devel barhtelo pral kova. Kova hi leske har i shoukar soungepen, hoy djal pash kolende, kay lenn o Debleskro djipen oun ninna pash kolende, kay djan nashedo." 
2Corinthians2:16 Kolenge, kay djan nashedo, hi kova har i djoungeli khand, hoy anell len an o merepen. Kolenge, kay lenn o Debleskro djipen, hi kova i lačo soungepen, hoy anell len an o djipen. Kaya hi i bari boudi. Koon nay krell kova lauter mishto? Kek." 
2Corinthians2:17 Boud rakepangre penenn o Debleskro lab, te lenn le i menshenge love lendar tele. Yaake ham mer gar. Mer penah o Debleskro lab čičeske. Kova krah o Yezous Kristeske. Mare laba venna o Deblestar. Oun yob shounell, hoy rakrah." 
2Corinthians3:1 T'mer penans nay: Kanna sharenn le pen pale glan mende. Kova krah mer gar. Vitar gar hounte anas mer t'menge lila, kay dren tardo hi, har mishto mari boudi hi. Vavar menshe krenn kova, mer hounte kras kova gar. Vitar gar kamah t'mendar, te činenn t'mer menge save lila." 
2Corinthians3:2 T'mer han o feteder liil menge, činlo an mare djia. Ap t'mende nay dikenn i tsele menshe, har kram mer mari boudi." 
2Corinthians3:3 Dran mari boudi van t'mer pash o Yezous Kristeste. Oun kanna han har i liil, hoy vella o Yezous Kristestar. Kava liil činas o Dourho o djido Deblestar, oun kek mensho. Kava liil vas gar činlo ap i barra. Na-a. Kava liil vas činlo an i menshengre djia, an t'mare djia." 
2Corinthians3:4 Mer patsah zoreles, te krell o Devel savo liil dran t'mende. Kava patsepen das men o Yezous Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:5 Dran mari zoor nay krams mer mari boudi gar mishto. Kay boudi krah mer dran o Debleskri zoor. Oun kova, hoy hayvah, vell o Deblestar." 
2Corinthians3:6 Yob kras dran mende peskre boudepangre, te sikras mer i menshende o nevo drom, kay o Devel oun i menshe mala venna. Ap o phouro drom hounte rikrenn le pen ap i činle laba. Kol phoure činle laba anenn i menshen an o merepen. Ap o nevo drom lenn le o Debleskro Dourho, hoy dell len o djipen." 
2Corinthians3:7 Kol phoure činle laba, hoy anenn i menshen an o merepen, his činlo ap i barra. Har anas o Mose i menshenge kol barra, vas leskro mouy yaake rayles, te dikan nay i Israelitarya gar ap leste. Yaake dikah, ninna ap o phouro drom vas o Debleskro raylepen diklo, ninna te djas ko raylepen pal i tikno tsiro krik." 
2Corinthians3:8 Kitse shoukeder hi o nevo drom, kay lenn le o Debleskro Dourho!" 
2Corinthians3:9 Kava nevo drom, kay venn i menshe čačo glan o Debleste, hi boud boud shoukeder har ko phouro drom, kay djan i menshe nashedo, ninna te vas kote i tikno kotar raylepen diklo." 
2Corinthians3:10 Čačepah, o raylepen ap o nevo drom hi boud boud bareder har ko raylepen ap o phouro drom." 
2Corinthians3:11 Kova djas krik pal i tikno tsiro. Har boud rayleder hi kova, hoy ačella!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Mer djinah zoreles, te hi kova yaake. Doleske hi men kek traash, te penas kova yaake i menshenge." 
2Corinthians3:13 Mer krah kova gar har o Mose: Kova čivas i diklo glan peskro mouy, te dikenn kol Israelitarya gar, har leskro raylepen krik djas." 
2Corinthians3:14 Kolengre djia van har bar. Ninna kava dives hayvenn i bibolde gar, hoy an o Moseskre lila činlo hi pral o phouro drom, te shounenn le kol laba an i biboldengre kangria. Kova hi yaake, har te vell i diklo ap lengre yaka čiddo, te dikenn le gar. O Yezous Kristo kokres nay lell ko diklo lengre yakendar tele." 
2Corinthians3:15 Ninna kava dives hi kova yaake. Te shounenn le o Moseskre laba, hi ko diklo ap lengre djia, te hayvenn le len gar." 
2Corinthians3:16 Ap ko dives, kay moukenn i Israelitarya pengro drom oun djan ap o Yezouseskro drom, lell yob ko diklo lendar krik." 
2Corinthians3:17 Maro ray Yezous oun o Debleskro Dourho hi yek. Te djivell o Debleskro Dourho an yekeste, hi ko mensho bouder gar pandlo, oun hounte djal bouder gar ap o phouro drom." 
2Corinthians3:18 Mer lauter, kay patslo ham, dikah o Debleskro raylepen yaake mishto, har te dikah an i dikepaskri. Kek diklo hi ap mare yaka čiddo. Oun har mer dikah ap leste, vah mer boud oun boudeder yaake, har yob hi. Kova krell o Debleskro Dourho an mende." 
2Corinthians4:1 O Debles hi i baro dji menge, oun das men kay boudi, te sikras i menshende leskro drom. Doleske vah gar khino, te kras kova." 
2Corinthians4:2 Djungelo koova, hoy krenn i menshe čorrhanes, kova krah mer gar. Mer rhorhah kek menshen oun penah o Debleskro lab yaake har činlo hi, oun gar vavarčandes. Yaake djivah glan o Debleste oun rakrah o čačepen, te hayvell nay hakeno, kova, hoy penah, hi čačo." 
2Corinthians4:3 Hi menshe koy, kay hayvenn gar, har lačo ko lab o Yezous Kristestar hi, hoy mer penah. Yon hi kolla, kay djan nashedo." 
2Corinthians4:4 Yon patsenn gar ap leste. O beng, kay o ray hi pral kay phoub, kras len korelo, te dikenn le gar, havo lačepen vell dran o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar. Ko lab sikrell men o Yezouseskro raylepen. Oun yob hi yaake har o Devel." 
2Corinthians4:5 Lestar rakrah mer, oun gar mendar. Mer penah i menshenge, o Yezous Kristo hi o ray. Oun mer ham leskre boudepangre oun boudrah t'menge." 
2Corinthians4:6 An o phouro tsiro, kay his halauter kali rat, penas o Devel, te vell dives. Oun koy vas dives. Yaake kras lo ninna mare djia pre, te ačas gar tamlo an mare djia, te hayvas mer o Debleskro raylepen. Kova dikah, te dikah ap o Yezous Kristeste." 
2Corinthians4:7 O lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar hi i baro bravlepen, hoy mer hidjrah an mende. Mer kokres ham har čare, hoy či moldo hi, yaake te dikell hakeno, koy bari zoor vell o Deblestar, oun gar mendar." 
2Corinthians4:8 Ninna te vell haki rigyatar pharo koova ap mende, krell men kova gar paash. Ninna te djinah boud kope gar, hoy te kras, dah mer gar pre." 
2Corinthians4:9 Ninna te lenn le men palla, hi o Devel pash mende. Ninna te vitsrenn le men tele, stah pale pre." 
2Corinthians4:10 Yaake har o Yezous hounte meras, merella ninna hako tsiro i kotar mendar. Kova hi yaake, te vell ninna leskro djipen ap mende diklo." 
2Corinthians4:11 Hako tsiro ham mer glan o merepen tardo. Te merah, merah o Yezouseske, te vell ninna o djipen diklo, hoy o Yezous men della, ninna te meras." 
2Corinthians4:12 Yaake hi o merepen an mende, oun o djipen an t'mende." 
2Corinthians4:13 Mer patsah ap o Yezous Kristeste. Doleske rakrah lestar. Yaake krah mer har ko morsh, kay činas an o Debleskre gilya: Me patsom o Debles. Doleske rakrom lestar." 
2Corinthians4:14 Mer djinah, kova, kay kras o Yezouses, maro rayes, i moulendar djido, kova krell men ninna i moulendar djido. Oun yob anell men khetne t'mentsa glan peste." 
2Corinthians4:15 Kova lauter, hoy lah ap mende, krah t'menge. Mer kamah, te vell o Debleskro kamlepen pash boud menshende prindjedo, te parkrenn pen boud oun boudeder pash leste, oun sharenn les." 
2Corinthians4:16 Doleske vah mer gar khino, ninna te moukell men mari zoor. Ko djipen, hoy o Devel an mende das, vell hako dives pale neves." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ko pharo koova, hoy mer kanna hidjrah, hi tikno oun djal peske. Pal kova vell i baro raylepen. Kova hi shoukeder har halauter, hoy kanna djinah, oun djal peske gar." 
2Corinthians4:18 Kava raylepen hi menge. Mer dikah gar ap kova, hoy i menshe nay dikenna. Na-a, mer dikah ap kova, hoy kanna kek nay dikella. Kova, hoy yon kanna dikenna, hi yek kopo bouder gar koy. Kova, hoy yon gar dikenna, kova ačella hako tsireske." 
2Corinthians5:1 Mer djinah, maro djipen ap kay phoub ačell gar. Pal maro merepen lah i nevo troupo. Ko nevo troupo hi har i kheer, hoy kras o Devel oun kek mensho. Ko kheer ačell hako tsiro an o bolepen." 
2Corinthians5:2 Kate ap kay phoub hi menge ropaske, oun mer kamah o tselo djiyestar, te las ko nevo bolepaskro troupo ap mende." 
2Corinthians5:3 Kova hi yaake, har te vals i ripen ap mende. Te lah ko nevo troupo gar ap mende, palle vams mer nango koy tardo." 
2Corinthians5:4 Yaake rah, har djivah ap kay phoub, hi menge ropaske oun men hi douka. Mer kamah ko phouro troupo gar tele te čivell, kamah boudeder ko nevo troupo an-rivell, hoy bouder gar merella." 
2Corinthians5:5 O Devel das men gole, te las ko nevo djipen an o bolepen, oun yob das men peskro Dourho, te djinas, kova vell yaake." 
2Corinthians5:6 Doleske ačell maro dji zorelo. Mer djinah: Yaake rah, har djivah ap i phoub, ham gar khere pash maro rayeste, o Yezouseste." 
2Corinthians5:7 Mer djivah dran o patsepen, oun djivah gomme gar an ko tsiro, kay dikah les." 
2Corinthians5:8 Čačepah, maro dji hi zorelo, oun mer kamams, te moukas i phoub, te vas khere pash o Debleste." 
2Corinthians5:9 Doleske kamah lauter te krell, te vell yob barhtelo pral mende kate ap kay phoub, oun ninna kote pash leste." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ap ko dives, kay rakrell o Yezous Kristo o čačepen pral mende vin, hounte vas mer halauter glan leste tardo. Oun hakeno lell pal kova, hoy yob kras, har djivas lo ap i phoub: lačo koova har čilačo koova." 
2Corinthians5:11 Mer djinah, har trashas maro rayestar. Doleske rakrah i menshenge an o dji, te patsenn le ap leste. O Devel djinell, te djah mer o čačo drom. Kamoms, te djinenn an t'mare djia kova ninna." 
2Corinthians5:12 Kova penah gar, te sharas mer men pash t'mende. Na-a, kova penah, te nay sharenn t'men mentsa. Yaake djinenn t'mer, hoy te penenn nay kol menshenge, kay dikenn ap kova, hoy pash i menshende boud moldo hi. I djoudjo dji hi lenge či moldo." 
2Corinthians5:13 Te penell yek, mer ham narvelo, – mishto! Te ham narvelo, ham kova o Debleske. Te ham gar narvelo oun rakrah yaake, te hayvenn le men, palle hi kova mishto t'menge." 
2Corinthians5:14 O baro kamlepen, hoy o Yezous Kristo men das, bičrell men pash i menshende. Oun mer djinah, te meras yek menge, hi kova yaake, har te merans le lauter." 
2Corinthians5:15 O Yezous meras halauterenge. Oun kanna hounte djivenn kolla, kay lan leskro djipen, bouder gar penge kokres. Na-a, yon hounte djivenn koleske, kay meras lenge, oun vas o Deblestar djido kerdo." 
2Corinthians5:16 Doleske dikah kanna bouder gar yaake ap i mensheste har an o tsiro, har hams gomme gar patslo. Ninna prindjrah mer o Yezous Kristes kanna vavarčandes har an ko tsiro, har djivas lo ap i phoub." 
2Corinthians5:17 Kanna djinah: Koon o Yezous Kristeha djivella, kova hi i nevo mensho, oun djivell bouder gar peskro phouro djipen. I nevo koova vas an leskro djipen." 
2Corinthians5:18 Kova lauter vell o Deblestar. Yob bičras o Yezous Kristes menge an o merepen, te lell lo kova krik, hoy his tardo mank mende oun o Debleste, te nay vas mer kanna pash leste. Oun mende das lo koy boudi, te penas i menshenge, te nay venn le pash leste." 
2Corinthians5:19 O Devel his an peskro čaveste, o Yezous Kristeste, oun kras, te nay venn i menshe leha khetne. Lengri doosh las lo lendar krik. Yaake vas kova krik lino, hoy his mank lende oun o Debleste tardo. Mende das lo kay boudi, te penas kal lače laba i menshenge." 
2Corinthians5:20 Yaake ham mer o Debleskre bičepangre. Men hi o Yezous Kristeskro čačo vast. Doleske mangah i menshendar, te venn le pash leste. Oun kova hi yaake, har te dell len o Yezous Kristo gole: “Avenn pash o Debleste! Avenn leskre mala!”" 
2Corinthians5:21 O Devel čivas mari tseli doosh ap maro rayeste, o Yezous Kristeste, kay yob kek čilačepen kras, te vas mer čačo oun erligo glan o Debleskre yaka." 
2Corinthians6:1 Mer ham o Debleskre boudepangre. Doleske penah t'menge: Ma vitsrenn gar o Debleskro lačepen an i čik! 
2Corinthians6:2 O Devel penell an peskro lab: “Ap o čačo tsiro shounau tout, ap ko dives lau tout dran o čilačepen vin oun dau tout o nevo djipen.” Shounenn, kanna hi o čačo tsiro kay! Kanna lell lo t'men dran o čilačepen vin!" 
2Corinthians6:3 Kova hi ap miro dji, te djivas yaake, te hatsell kek i doosh ap mende, te rakrell nay kek djoungeles pral mari boudi." 
2Corinthians6:4 Mer kamah, te dikenn le hako tsiro ap mende, kay ham o Debleskre boudepangre. Doleske dah gar pre, ninna te vell boud pharo koova ap mende. Ninna te hi men gar doha djipaske, te vell i daar ap mende, rikrah vin." 
2Corinthians6:5 Ninna te denn le men dava, te vitsrenn le men an o stilepen, te lenn le men palla, dah mer gar pre. Mer marah men tele, oun della divessa, kay sovah gar oun rhah gar." 
2Corinthians6:6 Maro djipen sikrella, te ham o Debleskre boudepangre. Mer djivah i djoudjo djipen oun djinah, hoy o Devel kamella. Mer vah gar khino an mare djia, ham kamlo, oun krah, hoy o Debleskro Dourho menge penella. Oun an maro kamlepen hi kek rhorhepen." 
2Corinthians6:7 Mer penah i menshenge o Debleskro čačepen oun rakrah dran leskri zoor. Kova, hoy krah oun rakrah, hi čačo. Yaake hi maro djipen oun maro rakepen har i rharo, koleha i kourepaskro kourell pes peskro rayeske." 
2Corinthians6:8 Hi menshe koy, kay sharenn men, oun vavar, kay praasenn men. Hi menshe, kay rakrenn djoungeles pral mende, oun vavar, kay rakrenn kamles pral mende. Ko yek penell: “Rhorhene!” ap mende, kol vavar djinenn, mer penah o čačepen." 
2Corinthians6:9 Pash yekeste ham prindjedo, pash i vavarende ham gar prindjedo. Ninna te hi o merepen glan mare yaka, ham gomme djido. Mer lam dava oun meram gar." 
2Corinthians6:10 Menge hi ropaske, oun mer nay sanah. Mer ham čorvelo, oun krah i vavaren bravelo. Men hi či ap kay phoub, oun lauter hi menge." 
2Corinthians6:11 Mire phrala an o foro Korint, mer penam t'menge lauter yaake, har kova hi. Mer kram mare djia dour pre t'menge." 
2Corinthians6:12 Maro kamlepen t'menge hi gar tikno. T'maro kamlepen menge vas tikno. 
2Corinthians6:13 Me rakrau t'mentsa har i dad peskre čaventsa. Krenn t'mer ninna t'mare djia menge pre! 
2Corinthians6:14 Ma čivenn t'men khetne kolentsa, kay patsenn gar ap o Yezous Kristeste. Kolla, kay djivenn an o čačepen oun kolla, kay djivenn gar an o čačepen, nay djivenn gar khetne. O dives oun i rati nay venn gar khetne. Yaake nay vell o lačepen oun o čilačepen vitar gar khetne." 
2Corinthians6:15 Hoy hi o Yezous Kristes i bengeha khetne? Či! Nay venn i patslen yek dji oun yek djipen kolentsa, kay patsenn gar? Na-a!" 
2Corinthians6:16 An o Debleskro baro kheer vell o djido Devel kokres sharedo oun kek vavar koova. Mer halauter ham o djido Debleskro baro kheer. O Devel penas: Me kamau te djivap pash lende oun mashkral lende. Me kamau lengro Devel te vell, oun yon hi mire menshe." 
2Corinthians6:17 Doleske penell o Devel: Djan kolendar krik, kay sharenn vavar koova! Ma avenn lentsa khetne! Lenn či an t'mare vasta, hoy hi pale-čiddo glan mire yaka! Palle lau t'men kamles pash mande pre." 
2Corinthians6:18 Oun me kamau t'maro dad te vell, oun t'mer han mire čave oun mire ča. Kova penell o baro Devel, kay hi o ray pral o bolepen oun i phoub." 
2Corinthians7:1 Mire phrala, kol lače labentsa penas o Devel, hoy kamell lo menge te krell. Doleske moukas mer kol tselo djoungelo koova, oun kras mare djia djoudjo, te djivas lačes oun čačes glan o Debleste, yaake har yob mendar kamella." 
2Corinthians7:2 Krenn t'mare djia menge pre! Mer kram kekes i čilačo koova oun doukram kekes, oun rhorhram kek menshes." 
2Corinthians7:3 Me penau kova gar, te anap i doosh ap t'mende. Na-a, me penom t'menge, men hi i baro dji t'menge. Mer ham t'mentsa khetne an o djipen oun an o merepen." 
2Corinthians7:4 Me patsau ap t'mende. Oun me sharau man t'mentsa. Ninna te vell boud pharo koova ap mende, hi miro dji zorelo oun man hi i bari barht an mande pral t'mende." 
2Corinthians7:5 Har vam an o them Macedonia, vas haki rigyatar pharo koova ap mende. His menshe koy, kay čingran pen mentsa. Oun men his i bari daar. Yaake lam kek nevi zoor." 
2Corinthians7:6 Kolen bouder kek zoor hi, kolen dell o Devel nevi zoor. Oun yob das men nevi zoor an o dji, har vas o Tito pash mende." 
2Corinthians7:7 Gar kokres, kay yob vas, kras men zorelo. Na-a, mer lam boudeder zoor, har shounam, have lače laba t'mer leske penan. Yob penas menge, te kamenn t'mer man o tselo djiyestar pale te dikell. Yob penas ninna, har t'mer rovan oun lauter krenn, te venn mange ap i rig. Har shounom kova lauter, vom gomme barhtleder." 
2Corinthians7:8 T'menge his ropaske pral ko liil, hoy t'menge činom. Kova khaytas man. Kanna khaytell man gar, te činom o liil, ninna te his t'menge i tikno tsiro ropaske pral ko liil." 
2Corinthians7:9 Kanna hom barhtelo, gar pral kova, kay his t'menge ropaske. Na-a, hom barhtelo, te anas t'men koy douk pral o čilačo koova pale ap o čačo drom. Har his t'menge ropaske pral t'mari doosh, dikas o Devel lačes ap t'mende. Doleske his ko liil, hoy činom, t'menge mishto." 
2Corinthians7:10 Te hi yekes ropaske pral peskri doosh, oun o Devel dikell lačes ap leste, anell les kova ap o Debleskro drom, oun o Devel dell les o djipen. Oun kova khaytell kekes. Te hi yekes ropaske pral i phoubyakro koova anell les kova an o merepen." 
2Corinthians7:11 T'menge his ropaske pral ko koova, hoy mank t'mende djas, oun o Devel dikas lačes ap t'mende. Kanna dikenn, havo lačo koova dran kova vas: T'mer kamenn lauter mishto te krell, oun kamenn te sikrell, te hi t'men kek doosh. T'mer van rhoyedo pral koleste, kay ko koova kras. Oun t'men his daar miri rholyatar. O tselo djiyestar kaman t'mer kova te krell, hoy mishto hi an mire yaka. Doleske dan t'mer koles i phagi, kay doosh ap leste his. Yaake sikran, kay his t'men kek doosh pral ko koova." 
2Corinthians7:12 Čačepah, har činom t'menge ko liil, krom kova gar koleske, kay kras ko čilačo koova. Vitar gar činom ko liil koleske, ap koleste ko vavar o čilačo koova kras. Na-a, me činom ko liil, te sikrenn t'mer o Debleste, kay kamenn t'mer lauter te krell, hoy me t'menge penom." 
2Corinthians7:13 Oun kova kran t'mer. Oun doleske vas nevi zoor an mare djia. Ava, mare djia van pale zoreles oun mari barht vas gomme bareder, har dikam, har barhtelo o Tito his, har vas lo t'mendar pale. T'mer lauter kran leskro dji zoreles." 
2Corinthians7:14 O Tito dikas ko lačo koova, hoy leske t'mendar penom, kova his kek rhorhepen. Yaake har lauter čačo hi, hoy t'mentsa rakram, yaake hi ninna ko tselo lačepen čačo, hoy leske penom t'mendar." 
2Corinthians7:15 Kanna hi leskro kamlepen gomme bareder t'menge. Yob dikas t'mari traash har t'mer les pre lan, ninna dikas lo, kay kran t'mer lauter, hoy me t'menge penom." 
2Corinthians7:16 Me hom barhtelo, te krenn t'mer lauter, hoy me t'menge penom." 
2Corinthians8:1 Mire phrala, mer kamah t'menge te penell, havo lačepen o Devel kote kras, kay i patsle an o them Macedonia khetne venna." 
2Corinthians8:2 Ninna te vas boud pharo koova ap lende, his le barhtelo an pengre djia. Lengri barht his yaake baro, te dan le boud love i vavar patslenge, ninna te djivan le an baro čorvlepen." 
2Corinthians8:3 Kova hi čačo, hoy penau: Yon dan yaake boud har djala, ninna boudeder. Kova kran yon pendar o tselo djiyestar." 
2Corinthians8:4 Yon mangan men o tselo djiyeha, te moukas mer len lačo koova te krell i patslenge an o foro Yerusalem." 
2Corinthians8:5 Kova, hoy yon kran, his boudeder har mer patsam. Yon čivan pen an o vast o Yezousestar, maro rayestar, oun pal kova an mare vasta, yaake har o Devel kova kamas." 
2Corinthians8:6 Har kova dikam, mangam mer maro phrales, o Tites, te djal lo pale pash t'mende, te lell lo kol love, hoy t'mer khetne čivan, yaake har yob kova ninna glan i tsiro kras. Yaake vell kay lači boudi kanna lauter kerdo." 
2Corinthians8:7 T'mer han bravelo an hako koova: t'maro patsepen hi baro; t'mer hayvenn har te penenn o Debleskro lab oun djinenn boud pral o Debleste; t'mer krenn i bari boudi o Debleske. Oun o kamlepen, hoy ap mende dikan, vas ninna bares an t'mende. Doleske kamah, te sikrenn t'maro baro dji ninna an kava koova oun čivenn yaake boud love khetne har djala i vavar patslenge." 
2Corinthians8:8 Kova mangau t'men. Me penau gar, te hounte krenn les. Te dikau, havo lačo koova i vavar patsle an o them Macedonia kran, yaake kamau te dikap, te vell t'maro kamlepen dran o dji." 
2Corinthians8:9 T'mer djinenn, har lačo maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, ap t'mende his. Yob his bravelo, oun vas t'menge čorvelo. Kova vas lo, te venn t'mer bravelo." 
2Corinthians8:10 Me patsau, kova hi mishto t'menge, te čivenn t'mer love pale khetne, yaake har kran kova glan yek bersh." 
2Corinthians8:11 Kanna krenn pale, hoy t'menge an o shero his, oun denn yaake boud love har nay denna." 
2Corinthians8:12 Te dell yek o djiyestar yaake boud har nay dell lo, dikell o Devel lačes ap leste. Yob kamell gar, te dell lo boudeder, har les hi." 
2Corinthians8:13 T'mer hounte denn gar yaake boud, te djivenn i vavar i shoukar djipen oun t'mer bokenna. Na-a, lauteren te vell doha djipaske!" 
2Corinthians8:14 Kava dives hi t'men boud, oun t'mer nay denna kol vavaren čomone. I vavar kopo, kay hi kolen boudeder, nay denn yon t'men čomone. Yaake hi lauteren doha." 
2Corinthians8:15 Kova hi yaake har an o Debleskro lab činlo hi: Koon boud ap i rig čivas, koles his gar boudeder, har les hounte vas rhapaske. Oun koon gar boud ap i rig čivas, koles his doha rhapaske." 
2Corinthians8:16 Me parkrau man pash o Debleste, te das yob maro phrales, o Tites, i baro dji t'menge." 
2Corinthians8:17 Har mangam o Titestar te djal lo pash t'mende, kamas lo kova o tselo djiyestar te krell, oun vas pestar pash t'mende." 
2Corinthians8:18 Khetne leha bičram i vavar phrales. Kova hayvell mishto o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar te penell. Dran kova hi lo an-diklo an hake gaba oun forya, kay i patsle khetne venna." 
2Corinthians8:19 Oun kova hi gar lauter! I patsle rodan les vin, te djal lo mentsa khetne ap maro drom pash kol patslende, kolen mer kol love anah. Kova krah, te vell o Devel sharedo, oun te dikenn kol patsle kote maro kamlepen, hoy men lenge hi." 
2Corinthians8:20 Te djal ko phraal mentsa, nay rakrell kek djoungeles pral mende, har nay vals kova, te anams kol boud love kokres." 
2Corinthians8:21 Mer dikas, te vell lauter čačes kerdo, gar kokres glan o Debleste, ninna glan i menshende." 
2Corinthians8:22 Khetne kol douyentsa bičram i vavar phrales pash t'mende. Kova sikras boud kope, har mishto yob o Debleskri boudi kras. Kanna kamas lo o tselo djiyestar pash t'mende te djal. Yaake boud rikrell yob t'mendar." 
2Corinthians8:23 O Tito hi miro maal oun boudrell mantsa t'menge. Kol vavar phrala van kol patslendar bičedo, kay an vavar gaba oun forya khetne venna. Kal douy phrala hi morsha, kay krenn o Debleske kek ladj, na-a, yon boudrenn yaake, te vell o Yezous Kristo sharedo." 
2Corinthians8:24 Lenn len pre an o tselo kamlepen, te dikenn i tsele patsle, kay khetne venna, kay mer sharam t'men gar čičeske glan lende." 
2Corinthians9:1 Pral ko lačepen, hoy mer hounte kras i patslenge, hounte činap t'menge gar." 
2Corinthians9:2 Me djinau, t'mer kamenn o tselo djiyestar kol patslenge an o foro Yerusalem love khetne te čivell. Dran kova sharom t'men pash kolende an o them Macedonia oun penom: “Glan yek bersh lan kol phrala an o them Akaya love khetne.” Har yon kova shounan, kaman boud lendar yaake te krell, har t'mer kran." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kanna bičrau mare phralen pash t'mende, te vell čačo, hoy t'mendar sharom an kava koova, oun te vell lauter yaake kerdo, har t'mendar penom." 
2Corinthians9:4 Palle, ap ko dives, kay venn kolla dran o them Macedonia mantsa khetne pash t'mende, hatsenn le lauter yaake har penom. Te hatsans le kova gar yaake, havi ladj vals kova mange oun t'menge ninna!" 
2Corinthians9:5 Doleske mangom kol phralen, te djan yon glan mende, oun lenn kol love, hoy t'mer khetne čivan. Yaake hounte čivenn t'mer gar kol love sik khetne ap ko dives, kay mer vah. Oun kol love, hoy t'mer denn, vell o djiyestar, oun gar dran o boklepen." 
2Corinthians9:6 Kova hi yaake har pash i harho: Koon čivell gar boud djob an i phoub, kova lell vitar gar boud dran i phoub vin. Oun koon čivell boud an i phoub, kova lell boud dran i phoub vin." 
2Corinthians9:7 Hakeno hounte dell yaake boud love, har leskro dji leske penella. Les hounte khaytell kova gar, hoy yob das! Yob dell kova pestar oun gar, har te kaman le les lestar. O Devel kamell kol menshen, kay denn o djiyestar." 
2Corinthians9:8 O Devel nay dell t'men yaake boud, kay hi t'men hako tsiro doha halauterestar, yaake te nay denn t'mer i vavaren čomone." 
2Corinthians9:9 Palle rakrenn le t'mendar, har an o Debleskro lab tardo hi: Yob das boud i čorvelende. Ko lačepen, hoy yob kras, ačella hako tsiro." 
2Corinthians9:10 O Devel, kay dell o harhes i djob, ninna o maro rhapaske, kova dell t'men ninna, oun krell boudeder dran kova, hoy t'men hi, yaake te vell boud lačepen dran kova, hoy t'mer krenna." 
2Corinthians9:11 Yob dell t'men yaake boud, te nay denn ninna kolen, kay len či hi. Te lenn yon kova, hoy mer anah lenge, palle parkrenn pen boud menshe pash o Debleste." 
2Corinthians9:12 Kova, hoy kran t'mer i čorvele patslenge, hi lenge mishto. Oun kova hi gar lauter. Yon parkrenn pen pash o Debleste. Te parkrenn pen boud menshe pash o Debleste, hi kova ninna boud moldo." 
2Corinthians9:13 Koleske, hoy t'mer lenge lačes kran, sharenn le o Debles. Yon dikenn, kay shounenn t'mer ap o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar, oun kay hi yon, ninna i tsele vavar patsle, t'menge phrala oun phenya." 
2Corinthians9:14 Te dikenn le, har baro o Debleskro lačepen mank t'mende hi, mangenn le o Debles t'menge oun kamenn t'mentsa khetne te vell." 
2Corinthians9:15 Parkras men pash o Debleste! Yob das men peskro baro kamlepen, kay hi yaake baro, te nay rakrah les gar vin." 
2Corinthians10:1 Me, o Paulo, rakrau t'mentsa kamles oun lačes, yaake har o Yezous Kristo kamles oun lačes hi. Hi menshe mank t'mende, kay penenna: “Me te hom pash t'mende, nay rakrau kek triin laba. Te hom dour t'mendar krik, palle rakrau zorele labentsa.”" 
2Corinthians10:2 Me mangau t'men: Ma krenn, te sikrap t'men, har zorelo hom, te vau pash t'mende! Man hi kek daar te rakrap zoreles kolentsa, kay penenn mendar, te krams mer o Debleskri boudi dran mari zoor." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ninna te ham menshe, krah gar o Debleskri boudi dran mari zoor." 
2Corinthians10:4 An maro boudi o Debleske lah mer kek rharo an o vast, har i menshe ap kay phoub krenna. Na-a, o Devel dell men i zoor, te nay rakras yaake kol menshentsa, kay rhorheno koova pral leste patsenna, te dikenn le, kay kova, hoy yon yaake rah patsan, či moldo hi." 
2Corinthians10:5 Te penenn yon, te dals kek Devel, sikrah mer, kay lengre pre-phourde laba gar čačo hi. Halauter, hoy lenge an o shero trouyel djal oun hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste pre, dah mer paash." 
2Corinthians10:6 Te dikah mer, kay t'mer shounenn mishto ap lauter, hoy mer t'menge penam, palle rikrah men gar pale, te das lauter kolen i phagi, kay kamenn gar te shounell." 
2Corinthians10:7 Hayvenn, har kova hi! Yek, kay penell: O Yezous Kristo hi leskro ray, kova hounte dikell ninna, te hi o Yezous Kristo ninna miro ray." 
2Corinthians10:8 Me nay penoms gomme boudeder mandar, te das man maro ray Yezous peskro čačo vast. Te penoms me kova, vals kova čačo. Yob das man peskro čačo vast, te krap t'men zoreles an o patsepen, gar te krap t'men paash." 
2Corinthians10:9 Kova penau t'menge, te dikenn t'mer: Me kamom t'menge kek traash te krell mire lilentsa." 
2Corinthians10:10 Hi menshe mank t'mende, kay penenna: An peskre lila rakrell yob bare laba, oun hi zorelo. Te hi yob pash mende, hi yob tikno, oun an leskro rakepen hi kek zoor." 
2Corinthians10:11 Koon yaake rakrella, koleske penau me: Har mer an mare lila ham, kay ham dour krik t'mendar, yaake ham mer ninna, te vam pash t'mende." 
2Corinthians10:12 Mer krah men gar yaake bares, te penas, mer ham har kolla, kay penenn pendar, har mishto yon hi. Yon krenn pengro čačepen kokres vin oun patsenn, kova, hoy yon krenna, hi mishto. Doleske hayvenn yon či." 
2Corinthians10:13 Mer kamah men gar yaake boud sharell. Kokres pral koy boudi, hoy das men o Devel, sharah mer men. Oun mari boudi anas men pash t'mende." 
2Corinthians10:14 Te vams gar pash t'mende, palle vals maro sharepen gar čačo. Kanna hi vavarčandes: Mer vam čačepah pash t'mende oun penam t'menge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar." 
2Corinthians10:15 Yaake nay sharah men mer pral i boudi, hoy mer kram, oun gar pral kova, hoy i vavar kran. An maro dji djinah, ap ko tsiro, kay vas o patsepen an t'mende baro, sharenn le men ninna pral kova, hoy mer mank t'mende kram." 
2Corinthians10:16 Mer kamah te penas o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar ninna kolenge, kay djivenn an vavar themma, oun gar kote, kay rakran i vavar o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar. Mer kamah men gar te sharell pral kova, hoy i vavar kran." 
2Corinthians10:17 Koon kamell pes te sharell, kova hounte sharell kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo kras." 
2Corinthians10:18 Kova mensho kras peskri boudi mishto, kones maro ray Yezous sharell. Oun gar kova kras peskri boudi mishto, kay pes kokres sharell." 
2Corinthians11:1 Moukenn man yek kopo yaake te rakrap, har te voms dinelo! Shounenn, hoy kamau t'menge te penell!" 
2Corinthians11:2 Yaake har o Devel kamell, kamau me ninna o tselo djiyestar, te djan t'mer gar o Yezous Kristestar krik. T'mer han mange har i čay, kay dom yek morsheste, te vell li leskri pirni. Ko yek morsh hi o Yezous Kristo. Kamau te anap leske i djoudji terni djouvel ap ko dives, kay romedinerell lo lat." 
2Corinthians11:3 Me darau, te vas vavar koova an t'maro shero, oun t'mer djivenn bouder gar djoudjes oun kokres o Yezous Kristeske. Me darau, te djas t'menge har i Evake, har o gosevo sap rhorhras lat, oun yoy moukas o čačo drom." 
2Corinthians11:4 Hi yaake: Te vell yek pash t'mende oun sikrell t'men i vavar drom, har ko drom, hoy mer t'mende sikram, palle nashenn t'mer leske palla. Te rakrell lo pral i vavar Yezous oun i vavar Debleskro Dourho, har kova, hoy an t'mende vas, palle shounenn t'mer mishto ap ko rhorheno morsheste." 
2Corinthians11:5 Me djinau, me molau ninna yaake boud har kol bare rakepangre pash t'mende, kay penenn, te hi le bičedo o Yezous Kristestar." 
2Corinthians11:6 Ninna te nay rakrau gar yaake mishto har kol vavar, djinau ninna yaake boud har yon. Kova nay dikan t'mer hako kopo, kay rakrom, oun an hako koova, hoy krom." 
2Corinthians11:7 Krom me man baro, har lom kek love t'mendar, har penom t'menge o Debleskro lačo lab? Lom me doleske i doosh ap mande? Na-a, me krom t'men baro." 
2Corinthians11:8 Kote, kay vavar patsle khetne venna, lom love lendar oun djivom dran lengri possita, te nay boudrom pash t'mende." 
2Corinthians11:9 Har me pash t'mende homs, oun mange his gar doha djipaske, mangom kekestar t'mendar čomone. I patsle phrala, kay van dran o them Macedonia, anan mange yaake boud, te nay djivom pash t'mende. Yaake perom kekeske t'mendar ap i possita. Oun yaake kamau kova ninna te krell an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
2Corinthians11:10 An kava koova sharenn man i menshe. Oun pash o Yezous Kristeskro čačepen, hoy an mande hi, penau t'menge: Kek mensho an ko tselo them Akaya lell kava sharepen mandar krik!" 
2Corinthians11:11 Hoske penau me kova yaake? Hi man kek kamlepen t'menge? O Devel djinella, kay kamau t'men o djiyestar." 
2Corinthians11:12 Te lau či t'mendar an ko tsiro hoy vella, palle doleske, te vap gar har kolla, kay lenn t'mendar love. Kamau gar, te nay sharenn le pen oun penenn, yon hi yaake har mer." 
2Corinthians11:13 Čačepah, yon van gar o Yezous Kristestar bičedo. Yon hi rhorhene, oun krenn, har te bičrals len o Yezous Kristo." 
2Corinthians11:14 Pral kolende hounte krenn t'mer kek bare yaka. Ninna o beng krell yaake, har te vals lo o Debleskro bolepaskro." 
2Corinthians11:15 Doleske hounte kras mer kek bare yaka, te krenn ninna leskre boudepangre har te vans yon o Debleskre boudepangre. Yon len pengri phagi o Deblestar." 
2Corinthians11:16 Me penau pale: Kamau gar, te penell yek, me hom dinelo. Oun ninna te patsenn t'mer, te hom dinelo, palle mangau t'men: Lenn man pre har i dineles, te sharap man me nay ninna i tikno kotar!" 
2Corinthians11:17 Me te sharau man kanna, palle venn mire laba gar maro rayestar, o Yezousestar. Na-a, me rakrau kanna yaake, har te voms me dinelo." 
2Corinthians11:18 Boud menshe hi koy, kay sharenn pen pral kova, hoy yon krenna. Doleske kamau me kova kanna ninna te krell." 
2Corinthians11:19 T'mer patsenn, te han gosevo, oun nashenn hako dineleske palla!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Te hadell pes yek pral t'mende, krenn t'mer, hoy yob penell. Te kamell yob t'mare love te lell, oun kamell t'men ap peste te pandell, oun ninna yob te doukrell t'men, oun dell t'men an o mouy, moukenn t'mer kova t'mentsa te krell." 
2Corinthians11:21 Me ladjau man te penap: Kova nay anoms me gar pral o dji! Kanna rakrau čačepah har i dinelo: Te patsell yek, te nay krell lo pes baro, palle nay krau man me ninna baro." 
2Corinthians11:22 Yon hi Hebrearya. Me hom ninna yek. Yon hi bibolde. Me hom ninna yek. Yon venna pal o Abraham. Me ninna. 
2Corinthians11:23 Yon penenn, te hi le o Yezous Kristeskre boudepangre. Kanna rakrau har i dinelo: Me hom boudeder har yon leskro boudepaskro. Me boudrom boudeder. Me vom boudeder stildo. Me lom boudeder dava. Man his boudeder o merepen glan i yaka har yon." 
2Corinthians11:24 I biboldendar lom me panč kope triyanda-te-enya (39) dava i čoupniyah. 
2Corinthians11:25 Triin kope lom dava i kashteha. Yek kopo vitsran le barrentsa ap mande, te denn le man moulo. Triin kope djas o shiffo tele, ap hoy me homs, oun yek dives oun yek rati homs ap i kasht čiddo an o baro pani." 
2Corinthians11:26 Ap miro drom an boud vavar forya oun themma his boud kope o merepen glan mire yaka. Me nay tassoms an i divye panya, oun kol čorepangre nay dans man moulo. Oun i bibolde, oun ninna kolla, kay kek bibolde hi, kolla lan man palla. An o moulo them oun an o baro pani, kay homs, his o merepen glan mire yaka, oun ninna, har homs mank kol phralende, kay hi kek čače phrala." 
2Corinthians11:27 Me marom man tele oun man his boud boudi. Boud kope sovom gar. Man his troush oun bok. Boud kope rhom či. Mange his shila oun man his či an-ripaske. 
2Corinthians11:28 Me nay penoms gomme boudeder: Hako dives vell nevo koova ap mande. Oun miro dji doukella, te djinau gar, har kova kote hi, kay i patsle khetne venna." 
2Corinthians11:29 Te hi yek gar zorelo, hom me vitar gar zorelo. Te perell yek o Debleskro dromestar tele, hi man bari douk an o dji." 
2Corinthians11:30 Me te sharap man, palle kamau te sharap man koleha, te hom gar zorelo." 
2Corinthians11:31 O Devel, ko dad o Yezousestar, maro rayestar, djinella, kay penau o čačepen. Les sharas mer hako tsiro." 
2Corinthians11:32 An ko tsiro, har me an o foro Damaskus homs, his kote i moskro, koles čivas o baro ray Aretas an peskri boudi. Ko moskro čivas klisten glan ko foro pash kol bare voudya, te taprenn le man." 
2Corinthians11:33 Troul o foro his i bari massouri. Oun i patsle čivan man an i korba oun moukan man dran i vorhni vin, hoy an koy massouri dren hi, tele ap i phoub. Yaake nay tapran yon man gar." 
2Corinthians12:1 T'mer kamenn, te sharap man, ninna te molell kova či. Yaake kamau te rakrap pral o bolepaskro koova, hoy o Yezous Kristo i menshes moukell te dikell." 
2Corinthians12:2 Me prindjrau i menshes, kay djivell o Yezous Kristeha. Kova vas glan deesh-te-star bersha an o triinto bolepen dren anlo. His lo čačepah koy pral? Me djinau les gar. Dikas lo kova an i souni? Me djinau les gar. Kova djinell o Devel kokres." 
2Corinthians12:3 Me djinau, ko mensho vas hadedo an o Debleskri shoukar baar, oun shounas save shoukar laba, hoy nay penell kek mensho. His lo čačepah koy pral? Me djinau les gar. Dikas lo kova an i souni? Me djinau les gar. O Devel djinell kova." 
2Corinthians12:4  
2Corinthians12:5 Ko menshes sharau me. Me sharau man gar. Te sharau man, sharau kova, hoy sikrella, kay hi man kek zoor." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ninna te sharoms me man, rakroms kek dinelo koova. Kova, hoy penoms, vals o čačepen. Kamau gar, te rikrenn i menshe boudeder mandar har kova, hoy dikenn le oun shounenn le mandar. Doleske sharau me man gar." 
2Corinthians12:7 O Devel kamella, te vap gar pre-phourdo pral ko baro bolepaskro koova, hoy moukas lo man te dikell. Doleske moukas o Devel čomone ap mande te vell, hoy doukrell man har i soubyengro kasht an miro mass. Kova hi har te dals man i bengeskro kourepaskro dava, te vap gar pre-phourdo." 
2Corinthians12:8 Triin kope mangom me o Yezousestar, maro rayestar, te vell kova mandar krik lino." 
2Corinthians12:9 Oun yob penas ap mande: “Mouk touke miro lačepen doha te vell! Miri zoor hi bari an kolende, kay gar zorelo hi.” Oun me, o Paulo, penau t'menge: Doleske kamau man me te sharell, kay hi man kek zoor. Yaake nay dikell hakeno, o Yezous Kristo peskri zoryah hi pash mande." 
2Corinthians12:10 Doleske hom gar bibarhtelo, te hi man kek zoor, te lau dava, te vell pharo koova ap mande, te lenn yon man palla, te vell i traash ap mande. Kova lau o Yezous Kristeske ap mande. Me djinau, te hi man kek zoor, palle dell man o Yezous Kristo zoor." 
2Corinthians12:11 T'mer kran, te rakrom har i dinelo. Me hounte sharoms man gar. Na-a, t'mer hounte sharans man. Ninna te voms me či, voms me yaake boud moldo har kol bare rakepangre pash t'mende, kay penenn, te hi le bičedo o Yezous Kristestar." 
2Corinthians12:12 Har homs pash t'mende, nay dikan t'mer, kay o Yezous Kristo bičras man. Me boudrom mank t'mende, oun dom gar pre. Me krom baro koova an o Debleskri zoor, yaake te kran i menshe bare yaka." 
2Corinthians12:13 Me krom t'menge yaake boud, har krom ninna i vavar patslenge, kay an vavar forya khetne venna. Yek koova hi vavarčandes: T'mendar lom kek love. Te his kova i doosh, mangau t'mendar, bistrenn koy doosh!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Me vau kanna o triinto kopo pash t'mende. Ninna kava kopo kamau či t'mendar te lell. Me kamau t'men oun gar t'mare love. O dad oun i day denn pengre čaven te rhal, oun gar i čave pengro dades oun pengri dat." 
2Corinthians12:15 T'menge doms me lauter, hoy man hi, ninna miro djipen. Miro dji hi baro t'menge. Hi t'men doleske kek kamlepen mange?" 
2Corinthians12:16 T'mer djinenna, me djivom gar dran t'mari possita. Kanna penenn mange: Taprom t'men oun rhorhrom t'men? Na-a!" 
2Corinthians12:17 Kolla, kay pash t'mende bičrom, čoran kolla t'mare love? Na-a!" 
2Corinthians12:18 Me mangom o Tites, te djal lo pash t'mende, oun bičrom i vavar phrales leha. Nay penenn t'mer, kay o Tito t'mendar čomone čoras? Na-a! O Tites hi o emligo baro dji t'menge har man. Mer douy djah ninna ko emligo drom." 
2Corinthians12:19 Patsenn t'mer, te rodah mer maro čačepen glan t'mende? Kova hi gar yaake. Mer djivah o Yezous Kristeha oun djinah, o Devel shounell, hoy mer rakrah. Mire phrala oun phenya, mer rakrah yaake, te vell t'maro patsepen zoreles." 
2Corinthians12:20 Me trashau, te vau pash t'mende, dikau savo koova pash t'mende, hoy kamau gar. Palle hom me vitar gar yaake har t'mer kamenna. Me trashau te dikau čingepen mank t'mende, ninna zilvepen, rholi, praasepen, djoungelo rakepen pral o vavareste, pre-phourdepen, bipandlo djipen, oun yek kamell feteder te vell har ko vavar." 
2Corinthians12:21 Me trashau te ladjap man t'menge glan o Debleste ap ko dives, kay vau pale pash t'mende, oun te vell mange ropaske pral boudende, kay kamenn pengro phouro djipen gar pre te dell, oun djivenn an djoungelo oun vi-ladjedo koova oun loubrenn pen trouyel yaake har kran le an ko tsiro, har yon gomme gar patslo his." 
2Corinthians13:1 Kova hi o triinto kopo, kay vau pash t'mende. Ma bistrenn, hoy činlo hi: Te kamell yek i doosh ap i vavareste pre te čivell, hounte venn douy, triin koy pashel, kay penenn vin, hoy yon djinenna." 
2Corinthians13:2 Te vau kava kopo, rikrau man gar pale, te dap kolen i phagi, kay kran čilačo koova. Kova penom, har homs o douyto kopo pash t'mende, oun kanna, kay hom dour t'mendar krik, penau les pale t'menge." 
2Corinthians13:3 Palle dikenn t'mer mishto, te vas miro rakepen o Yezous Kristestar. Yob hi zorelo pash t'mende, oun sikrell t'men peskri bari zoor." 
2Corinthians13:4 Har yob ap o troushel dino vas, his yob gar zorelo. Kanna djivell yob dran o Debleskri zoor. Yaake har o Yezous Kristo ap o troushel gar zorelo his, ham mer vitar gar zorelo. Oun yaake har yob djido vas, ham mer leha ninna djido oun zorelo dran o Debleskri zoor. Kova nay dikenn, te hom pash t'mende!" 
2Corinthians13:5 Dikenn ap t'mende, har t'mer an o patsepen tardo han! Hi t'maro patsepen čačo? Djivell o Yezous Kristo mank t'mende? Te hayvenn t'mer gar, te hi lo mank t'mende, palle hi t'maro patsepen či moldo." 
2Corinthians13:6 Me kamoms, te dikenn t'mer, kay mari boudi o Debleske mishto hi." 
2Corinthians13:7 Mer mangah o Deblestar, te krenn t'mer kek čilačo koova. Kova mangah lestar gar, te sikras, har mishto mari boudi kram. Na-a, mer kamah, te krenn t'mer o lačepen, ninna te vell mendar penlo, kay mari boudi či moldo hi." 
2Corinthians13:8 Mer nay krah kokres savo koova, hoy krell, te shounenn le o Debleskro čačepen oun dikenn les. Oun mer nay krah či, hoy rikrell o čačepen pale." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ninna te ham mer gar zorelo, ham barhtelo, te han t'mer zorelo. Mer kamah, te venn t'mer an o čačepen glan o Debleste tardo, oun kova mangah lestar." 
2Corinthians13:10 Kava činau me t'menge kanna, kay hom dour krik t'mendar. Te vau pash t'mende, kamau gar te čingrell t'mentsa i zoryah, hoy das man maro ray Yezous. Kay zoor das lo man, te krap t'men zoreles, gar te krap t'men paash." 
2Corinthians13:11 Kanna, mire phrala, avenn barhteles, oun avenn pale pale ap o čačo drom! Shounenn ap kol laba, hoy me t'menge penom. Rikrenn khetne oun čingrenn t'men gar! Oun o Devel, kay dell kamlepen oun barht an o dji, vell t'mentsa!" 
2Corinthians13:12 Taprenn t'men trouyel, oun denn t'men i čoum! Kova sikrella hakeneste, t'mer han phrala oun phenya an o patsepen. I tsele patsle penenn t'menge. “Ačenn maro Debleha!”" 
2Corinthians13:13 O lačepen maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, djal t'mentsa! Oun o Debleskro kamlepen vell an t'mende! Oun o Debleskro Dourho ačell pash t'mende!" 
Galatians1:1 Me, o Paulo, činau kava liil ap i patslende, kay venn khetne an o them Galatia. O Yezous Kristo das an miro vast, te penap i menshenge leskro lab. Me hom gar i menshendar bičedo. Kova, kay bičras man, hi o Yezous Kristo oun o Devel, maro dad. Kova kras les i moulendar djido." 
Galatians1:2 Me oun i tsele phrala, kay pash mande hi, mer penah t'menge:" 
Galatians1:3 Lačepen oun barht t'menge! Ko dell t'men o Devel, kay maro dad hi, oun maro ray, o Yezous Kristo." 
Galatians1:4 Yob meras, te lell lo mari doosh ap peste. Kova kras lo, te lell lo men vin dran ko čilačo tsiro, an hoy mer djivah. Kova kamas o Devel, maro dad yaake." 
Galatians1:5 Koles sharas kanna oun hako tsiro! Amen. 
Galatians1:6 Mange ačas o rakepen krik, har me shounom, kay t'mer moukan yaake sik o Yezouseskro drom. O Devel das t'men gole, te patsenn ap o Yezous Kristeste, kay his yaake lačo ap t'mende. Oun kanna shounenn t'mer ap menshende, kay kamenn t'men ap i vavar drom te anell." 
Galatians1:7 Čačepah, dell kek vavar drom, te venn t'mer pash o Debleste! Kolla menshe kamenn t'men dinelo te krell. Yon rissrenn o čačepen pral o Yezous Kristeste trouyel." 
Galatians1:8 Kova, kay penell, te dell i vavar drom har ko drom, hoy mer t'mende sikram, kova te vell praasedo o Deblestar, ninna te vams mer kova, ninna te vals i bolepaskro dran o bolepen pash t'mende oun penals kova." 
Galatians1:9 Yaake har mer yek kopo penam, penau me kanna pale: Te vell yek pash t'mende oun penell t'menge, te dell i vavar drom pash o Debleste har ko drom, hoy mer t'mende sikram, kova te vell praasedo o Deblestar!" 
Galatians1:10 Penenn mange, rakrau me kanna yaake, har kamenn i menshe kova te shounell? Na-a! Me rakrau yaake, har o Devel kova kamella. Me kamau gar, te sharenn man i menshe. Te vals kova yaake, voms gar o Yezous Kristeskro boudepaskro." 
Galatians1:11 Mire phrala, djinenn, o Yezouseskro drom hoy me t'mende sikrom, hi gar i menshengro koova." 
Galatians1:12 Me shounom kova gar i menshendar. I mensho sikras les mande vitar gar. O Yezous Kristo kokres sikras les mande. 
Galatians1:13 T'mer shounan, har me djivom an o biboldengro patsepen, oun lom kolen palla, kay patsenn ap o Yezous Kristeste, oun kamom, te marap len." 
Galatians1:14 Me rikrom man ap o biboldengro patsepen feteder har boud vavar bibolde, kay yaake phouro his har me. Miri tseli zoryah kamom kova te krell, hoy mare phoure penan." 
Galatians1:15 O Debles his i vavar drom mange. Yob kamas mande peskro čaves te sikrell, te djinap, koon yob hi. Har me gomme gar boldo homs, rodas yob man vin. Oun yob his mange lačo oun das man gole, te djap pash kolende, kay kek bibolde hi, te penap lenge leskro čavestar. Har o Devel man pash lende bičras, poučom gar i menshendar, te penenn le mange, hoy te krap," 
Galatians1:16  
Galatians1:17 djom vitar gar an o foro Yerusalem pash kolende, kay glan mande o Yezousestar bičedo van, te penenn le i menshenge leskre laba. Lendar poučom gar, hoy te krap. Na-a, me djom an o them Arabia oun vom pale pale an o foro Damaskus." 
Galatians1:18 Pal triin bersha vom me an o foro Yerusalem, te dikap o Kefases. Deesh-te-panč divessa ačom pash leste." 
Galatians1:19 Kol vavar bičepangren, kay o Yezous Kristo glan mande pash i menshende bičras, kolendar dikom me kekes kote har o Yakobo kokres, o Yezouseskro phraal." 
Galatians1:20 O Devel djinella, kay kava lauter čačo hi, hoy me t'menge činau. Me rhorhau gar." 
Galatians1:21 Pal kova vom me an i themma Syria oun Cilicia. 
Galatians1:22 An o them Youdea prindjran man kol patsle gar. 
Galatians1:23 Yon shounan, hoy vavar pral mande penan: “Ko morsh, kay men palla las oun kamas o patsepen ap o Yezouseste paash te krell, ko morsh penell kanna i menshenge, te djan le ap o Yezouseskro drom.”" 
Galatians1:24 Oun yon sharan o Debles pral halauter, hoy yob ap mande kras." 
Galatians2:1 Pal deesh-te-star bersha djom pale an o foro Yerusalem. O Devel sikras mande, te djap koy. O Barnabas djas mantsa. Oun o Tito his ninna pash mande. An o foro Yerusalem djom pash i pralstunende mank i patslende, oun penom lenge, har sikrau me o Debleskro drom kol menshende, kay kek bibolde hi. Me kamom te djinell, te hi kova lenge mishto, hoy me penau, te vell koy boudi, hoy me krau oun krom, gar čičeske." 
Galatians2:2  
Galatians2:3 O Tito, kay kek biboldo hi, his pash mande. Oun kol patslengre pralstoune penan gar, kay hounte vell yob ap o mass činlo." 
Galatians2:4 His vavar morsha koy. Yon kran, har te vans le patsle. Yon kaman te dikell, har kol patsle djivenna, kay bouder gar ap o Moseskre laba pandlo hi. Mer, kay ham bouder gar pandlo ap kol laba, djivah kanna pal o Yezouseskre laba. Oun kol morsha, kay djivenn gar pal o Yezouseskre laba, kaman, te vas mer pale pandlo ap o Moseskre laba." 
Galatians2:5 Mer kram kova gar, hoy yon kaman. Mer kamam, te djinenn t'mer zoreles: O Yezouseskro drom, hoy mer t'mende sikram, kova hi o čačo drom." 
Galatians2:6 Kol phrala, kay hi pralstoune mank i patslende, kolla penan gar, kay kova, hoy me i menshenge penau, gar čačo hi. Te rakrau kol pralstunendar, hi mange yek, hoy yon his. O Devel dikell gar ap kova, har i mensho an-diklo hi." 
Galatians2:7 Yon hayvan, kay mange o Yezous penas, te djap pash kolende, kay kek bibolde hi, te sikrap lende leskro drom, yaake har o Petro o Yezouseskro drom i biboldende sikrella." 
Galatians2:8 Kova, kay bičras o Petres pash i biboldende, hi kova, kay man bičras pash kolende, kay kek bibolde hi." 
Galatians2:9 Kol pralstoune mank i patslende his o Yakobo, oun o Kefas, oun o Yohanni. Har yon hayvan, kay o Devel mange lačo hi oun man koy boudi das, dan yon man oun o Barnabas o čačo vast, te dikenn halauter, kay ham mer phrala. Mer kram vin, te djas mer pash kolende, kay kek bibolde hi, oun yon te djan pash i biboldende." 
Galatians2:10 Hi yek koova, hoy yon mendar mangan, te bistras mer gar i čorvelen mank lende. Ap kova rikrom man i tselo djiyeha." 
Galatians2:11 An ko tsiro, har o Kefas an o foro Antiochia his, rhas yob kol patslentsa, kay kek bibolde hi. Koy van patsle bibolde koy pashel dran o Yakobeskri kangri. Kolla rikran pen ap o Moseskre laba oun rhan gar kolentsa, kay kek bibolde hi. Oun o Kefas trashas lendar, oun tserdas pes pale, oun kamas bouder gar kol patslentsa khetne te vell, kay kek bibolde hi. Koy penom me leske an o mouy, kay kova gar mishto hi, hoy yob kras." 
Galatians2:12  
Galatians2:13 Yaake har o Kefas douy čipyentsa rakras, kran ninna kol vavar patsle bibolde. Har o Barnabas len dikas, kras yob ninna yaake har yon, oun tserdas pes kol patslendar pale, kay kek bibolde hi, te vell lo an-diklo pash i biboldende." 
Galatians2:14 Har me dikom, kay yon gar ap o čačo drom djan, yaake har o Yezous les mende sikras, koy penom me ap o Kefaseste glan hakeneste: Ninna te hal i biboldo, djiveh tou gar har i biboldo. Hoske kameh i zoryah, te djivenn kol patsle, kay kek bibolde hi, har i bibolde?" 
Galatians2:15 Mer ham bibolde. Yaake vam mer boldo. Oun ham gar kolendar, kay kek bibolde hi oun gar ap o Debleskro drom djana. Ninna te ham gar kolendar, djinah, kay kek mensho čačo vella glan o Debleste, te djivell lo pal o Moseskre laba. Na-a, o Devel krell koles čačo glan peste, koon patsell ap o Yezous Kristeste. Doleske patsah mer o tselo djiyestar ap o Yezous Kristeste, te vas čačo glan o Debleste." 
Galatians2:16  
Galatians2:17 Mer ninna, kay ham bibolde, kamah, te krell men o Devel čačo glan peste. Kol labentsa penah mer, kay ham pale-čidde oun čilače glan o Debleste, yaake har i tsele vavar menshe ap i phoub. Penau kanna, kay o Yezous Kristo men ap o čilačo drom anas? Na-a!" 
Galatians2:18 Me voms čačepah ap o čilačo drom tardo, te penoms kanna, te rikras men pale ap o Moseskre laba, kay me glan i tsiro penom, te hounte rikras men gar ap kol laba." 
Galatians2:19 Har krom gar, hoy o Moseskre laba penenna, penan kol laba mange: Tou hounte meress. Yaake hom lenge moulo oun nay djivau kanna o Debleske. Me merom o Yezouseha ap o troushel." 
Galatians2:20 Kova hom gar me, kay djivau kanna. Hi o Yezous Kristo, kay djivell an mande. Oun ko djipen, hoy kanna djivau, djivau me an o patsepen ap o Debleskro čaveste. Yob kamas te djivap, oun das peskro djipen mange an o merepen." 
Galatians2:21 Yaake čivrau o Debleskro lačepen gar ap i rig. Te djivoms me pal o Moseskre laba, oun kolla krans mange čačo glan o Debleste, meras o Yezous Kristo čičeske." 
Galatians3:1 Hoske kamenn t'mer patsle an Galatia kova gar te hayvell? Koon kras t'menge dinelo? T'menge vas o Yezouseskro merepen ap o troushel yaake penlo, har te dikans kova t'mare yakentsa!" 
Galatians3:2 Kova kamau me t'mendar te djinell: Har djas kova, kay lan o Debleskro Dourho? Lan t'mer les, har t'mer kran, hoy o Moseskre laba penenna? Na-a, t'mer lan les, har shounan o Yezousestar oun patsan ap leste." 
Galatians3:3 Har vell kova, kay hayvenn t'mer kova gar? Dran o Debleskri zoor van t'mer patslo. Kamenn t'mer kanna dran t'mari zoor čačo glan leste te vell?" 
Galatians3:4 T'mer djan ap o Yezouseskro drom. Oun doleske kran i menshe t'menge o djipen phares. His kova lauter čičeske? 
Galatians3:5 O Devel das t'men peskro Dourho oun kras pash t'mende boud baro oun zorelo koova, hoy kek vavar nay krella. Kras lo kova, har djivan t'mer pal o Moseskre laba? Na-a! Yob kras kova, har t'mer shounan o Yezousestar oun ap leste patsan." 
Galatians3:6 Yaake his kova ninna o Abrahameha. Yob patsas o Debles. Doleske čivas o Devel les an o čačepen. 
Galatians3:7 T'mer dikenn kanna: O Abrahameskre čače čave hi kolla, kay o Debles patsenna." 
Galatians3:8 O Debleskro lab penas glan i rah tsiro, kay o Devel ninna kolen čačo krella, kay kek bibolde hi, te patsenn le ap leste. Doleske penas lo ap o Abrahameste: Kay barht, hoy me dau tout, djal doureder ap i tsele menshende ap i phoub." 
Galatians3:9 Yaake har o Abraham o Debles patsas oun o Devel das les peskri barht oun zoor, yaake lenna kolla lauter o Debleskro djipen, kay les patsenna." 
Galatians3:10 Kol vavar, kay rikrenn pen ap o Moseskre laba, oun kamenn yaake čačo te vell glan o Debleste, kolla hi tel o Debleskro praasepen. O Debleskro lab penella: Hakeno hi praasedo, koon gar lauter krella, hoy o Moseskre laba penenna. Oun kek mensho hi koy, kay krell lauter, hoy o Moseskre laba penenna." 
Galatians3:11 Koon rikrell pes ap o Moseskre laba, vell dran kova gar čačo glan o Debleste. An o Debleskro lab hi ninna činlo: Kova, kay patsella, kova vell čačo glan o Debleste oun djivella." 
Galatians3:12 Te rikrell yek pes ap o Moseskre laba, hi kova gar ko emligo, har te patsals lo ap o Yezous Kristeste. Pral o Moseskre laba hi činlo: Koon krell hako koova, hoy o Moseskre laba penenna, kova djivella." 
Galatians3:13 Mer nashte rikram kova lauter gar. Oun dran kova vam tel o Debleskro praasepen. Oun o Yezous Kristo las ko praasepen mendar krik, har yob ap o troushel dino vas, oun yaake menge praasedo vas. O Debleskro lab penella: Hakeno, koon ap o troushel dino vella, hi praasedo." 
Galatians3:14 Oun kova kras o Yezous Kristo, te vell o Debleskri zoor pash i tsele menshende, yaake har o Devel glan i rah tsiro o Abrahameske penas. Kanna nay lah mer lauter o Debleskro Dourho, te patsah mer ap o Yezouseste." 
Galatians3:15 Mire phrala, kanna rakrau pral čomone, hoy t'mer lauter prindjrenna. Te krenn douy menshe čomone vin oun denn pengro dadeskro vast koy pre, nay penell kek: Kanna hi kova bouder či moldo. Vitar gar nay čivell yek čomone koy pashel." 
Galatians3:16 Yaake hi kova o labeha, hoy o Devel o Abrahameste das. O Devel penas ap o Abrahameste, te dell lo peskri barht oun zoor ap leste oun ap leskro čaveste, kay vella pal leste. Kate rakrell o Devel yek čavestar. Yob rakrell gar kol boud čavendar, kay venna pal o Abraham. Ko yek čavo hi o Yezous Kristo." 
Galatians3:17 Me kamau t'menge kava te penell: O Devel das o Abrahameste peskro lab, oun čivas peskro vast koy pre, te vell kova čačo, hoy yob penas. O Moseskre laba van star-sheel-te-triyanda (430) bersha palla oun nay lenn ko lab gar krik, hoy o Devel o Abrahameste das." 
Galatians3:18 Te lals yek o Debleskro bravlepen oun djipen, te rikrals lo pes ap o Moseskre laba, palle čivals o Devel peskro lab ap i rig, hoy yob o Abrahameste das. Kova hi gar yaake. O Devel rikrell peskro lab, oun doleske das yob o Abrahameste peskro bravlepen čičeske." 
Galatians3:19 Hoske hi o Moseskre laba koy? O Devel das len mende, te dikas mer, har baro maro čilačepen hi. O Moseskre laba ačan tardo yaake rah, bis te vas o Abrahameskro čavo, ko yek, konestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. I bolepangre anan kol laba o Moseske. Kova his tardo mank i menshende oun o Debleste. Oun o Mose das kol laba i menshende." 
Galatians3:20 His vavarčandes, har o Devel o Abrahameste peskro lab das. O Devel kokres das les peskro lab. Oun kek hounte vas tardo mank leste oun o Abrahameste." 
Galatians3:21 Penenn o Moseskre laba, kay hi ko lab bouder či moldo, hoy o Devel o Abrahameske penas? Na-a! Kova hi gar yaake. Te vals o nevo djipen dran o Moseskre laba, palle vals čačepah ko mensho čačo glan o Debleste, kay rikrell pes ap kol laba. Kova hi gar yaake." 
Galatians3:22 O Debleskro lab penella, kay hi hako mensho pandlo ap o čilačepen. Ko yek drom, kay anell men vin dran o čilačepen, hi o patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste. Kova penas o Devel." 
Galatians3:23 Yaake rah, har patsam gar ap o Yezous Kristeste, hams pandlo ap o Moseskre laba. Palle sikras men o Devel i nevo drom pash leste: Kova hi o patsepen." 
Galatians3:24 O Moseskre laba sikran men maro čilačepen. Yaake anan le men pash o Yezous Kristeste, te patsas ap leste, oun te vas čačo glan o Debleste." 
Galatians3:25 Kanna, kay patsah ap leste, hounte daras bouder gar koy phagi, hoy o Moseskre laba pral mende vi-rakrenna." 
Galatians3:26 Dran t'maro patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste han lauter Debleskre čave. 
Galatians3:27 Har van t'mer ap o Yezous Kristeskro lab taufedo, his kova yaake, har te rivans t'mer o Yezous Kristes an, – yaake har i ripen." 
Galatians3:28 Yaake djivah lauter o Yezouseha khetne. Kanna hi yek, koon t'mer han: bibolde oun kolla, kay kek bibolde hi, boudepangre oun raya, morsha oun djouvya. An o Yezous Kristeste hi yek har o vavar." 
Galatians3:29 Te djan t'mer o Yezous Kristeha, han t'mer ninna o Abrahameskre čave. Oun t'mer lenn kova, hoy o Devel o Abrahameskre čavende della, yaake har penas lo." 
Galatians4:1 Me penau t'menge: O čavo, kay lell yek dives lauter peskro dadestar, koles hi či penepaske pral peskro bravlepen, yaake rah har yob tikno hi. Yob hi har i boudepaskro, ninna te hi ko tselo bravlepen leskro." 
Galatians4:2 Yob hi an i vasta kolendar, kay denn garda ap leste, bis te vell ko tsiro, kay leskro dad penas, te lell yob ko bravlepen." 
Galatians4:3 Yaake djas menge kova ninna. An ko tsiro, har gomme gar patslo hams, hams har tikne čave oun hams tel i zoor kolendar tardo, kay hi i raya pral kay phoub, oun hams ap lende pandlo." 
Galatians4:4 Har ko čačo tsiro vas, bičras o Devel peskro čaves. Kova vas i mensho, oun pandlo ap o Moseskre laba." 
Galatians4:5 Yob vas, te lell lo kolen vin, kay hi pandlo ap o Moseskre laba, yaake te vas mer o Debleskre čave." 
Galatians4:6 Kanna ham leskre čave. Doleske das o Devel peskro čaveskro Dourho an mare djia. Kova dell gole: Tata, miro dad!" 
Galatians4:7 Kanna hal tou bouder gar har i boudepaskro, kay les či hi. Tou hal kanna o Debleskro čavo. Oun doleske leh tou ninna kova, hoy o Devel peskre čavende della." 
Galatians4:8 An ko tsiro, kay prindjran t'mer o Debles gar, hans vavarenge koy, har te vans le o Devel." 
Galatians4:9 Kanna prindjrenn t'mer o Debles. Feteder hi, te penau me: O Devel prindjrell t'men. Har nay čivenn t'mer t'men pale tel kol zorya, ap kolende i menshe pandlo hi? T'mer shounenn pale ap laba, hoy či moldo hi, oun an lende kek zoor hi." 
Galatians4:10 T'mer denn yak ap divessa, čonna, bersha oun bare tsirya oun rikrenn len dren." 
Galatians4:11 Me trashau t'menge, kay miri boudi pash t'mende čičeske his." 
Galatians4:12 Mire phrala, me mangau t'men, venn yaake, har me hom! Me vom ninna yaake har t'mer, vom yek, kay hi gar pandlo ap o Moseskre laba. Hans t'mer čilačo ap mande," 
Galatians4:13 har me o ersto kopo pash t'mende homs? Na-a, kova hans gar. T'mer djinenna, har me t'menge o Debleskro lačo lab penom, koy djas mange gar mishto." 
Galatians4:14 Ninna te his miro nasslepen t'menge gar shoukar, dikan t'mer gar tele ap mande, vitar gar bičran man t'mendar krik. Na-a! T'mer lan man pre, har te voms o Debleskro bolepaskro, har te voms o Yezous Kristo kokres." 
Galatians4:15 T'mer hans yaake barhtelo ap ko tsiro! Kay ačas t'mari barht? Ap ko tsiro lans t'mare yaka vin oun dans len mande. 
Galatians4:16 Kanna, kay penau t'menge o čačepen, han t'mer čilačo ap mande?" 
Galatians4:17 Kova hi gar mishto, hoy kol menshe krenna, kay nashenn t'menge palla, te shounenn t'mer ap lende. Yon kamenn t'men mandar krik te lell, te nashenn t'mer lenge palla." 
Galatians4:18 Me penau t'menge: Nashenn kova palla, hoy lačo hi! Krenn kova hako tsiro, ninna te hom me gar pash t'mende!" 
Galatians4:19 Mire phrala! Me kamau t'men o djiyestar, har te vans mire čave. Yaake har i djouvyat douka hi, te lell li i ternepen, yaake hi man pale douka t'menge, bis te vell o Yezous Kristo diklo an t'mende." 
Galatians4:20 Me kamoms, te voms kanna nay pash t'mende oun te rakroms nay yaake, te djal kova an t'maro dji! Me hom kate tardo oun djinau gar, hoy te krap." 
Galatians4:21 T'mer kamenn yaake te djivell har o Moseskre laba penenna. Djinenn t'mer gar, hoy kol laba penenna?" 
Galatians4:22 Kote hi činlo: O Abrahames his douy čave. Ko yekeskri day his i boudepaskretsa, i Hagar. Oun ko vavareskri day his i rayetsa, i Sara." 
Galatians4:23 I boudepaskretsa las o čaves, har menshe kova kaman. I rayetsa las o čaves, har o Devel kova penas." 
Galatians4:24 Kal douy djouvya hi har douy koova, hoy o Devel i menshentsa an Israel vin kras. Yek koova kras o Devel lentsa vin ap i berga Sinay. Kote lan i menshe o Moseskre laba. Kol laba hi o ray pral lende, yaake har his i ray pral i Hagar tardo." 
Galatians4:25 I Hagar hi har i berga Sinay an Arabia. Yaake har kote i menshe ap o Moseskre laba pandlo van, yaake hi kanna o foro Yerusalem peskre menshentsa ap o Moseskre laba pandlo." 
Galatians4:26 Hi ninna i foro Yerusalem an o bolepen. Ko Yerusalem hi har i rayetsa, i Sara. Lakre čave hi gar pandlo ap o Moseskre laba. Yoy hi mari day." 
Galatians4:27 Latar hi činlo: Ab barhtelo, ninna te nay lal tou kek čave! De gole i barhtyatar, ninna te vas toutar kek ternepen boldo! Kanna hi tout boudeder čave har koya, kay his o romeha khetne." 
Galatians4:28 Mire phrala, t'mer han o Debleskre čave. T'mer van boldo, har o Devel kova kamas, yaake har o Isaak boldo vas, har o Devel kova penas." 
Galatians4:29 An ko phouro tsiro his yaake: Ko čavo, kay vas boldo, har i menshe kova kaman, kova las koles palla, kay vas boldo dran o Debleskri zoor. Kova hi kava dives ninna yaake." 
Galatians4:30 O Debleskro lab penell koy pral: Trade koy boudepaskretsa peskro čaveha toutar krik, te lell yob gar peskro dadeskro bravlepen. Ko bravlepen lell ko čavo, koleskri day i rayetsa hi." 
Galatians4:31 Mire phrala, mer ham gar i čave kolatar, kay hi i boudepaskretsa. Mer ham i čave kolatar, kay hi i rayetsa!" 
Galatians5:1 O Yezous Kristo las men vin dran hako koova, ap kova pandlo hams. Ačenn zoreles oun moukenn t'men bouder gar te pandell!" 
Galatians5:2 Shounenn ap mire laba! Me, o Paulo, penau t'menge: Hakeno, koon moukell pes ap o mass te činell, yaake har i bibolde kova kamenna, koleske meras o Yezous Kristo čičeske." 
Galatians5:3 Oun pale penau me hakeneske: Kova, kay moukell pes ap o mass te činell, kova hounte krell ninna lauter, hoy o Moseskre laba penenna." 
Galatians5:4 Koon mank t'mende djivell pal o Moseskre laba, te vell lo čačo glan o Debleste, kova moukas o Yezous Kristes. Leskro kamlepen hi bouder gar leske koy." 
Galatians5:5 Mentsa hi vavarčandes. Mer patsah, te čivell men o Devel an o čačepen, te patsah ap o Yezous Kristeste. Ko patsepen dell men o Debleskro Dourho." 
Galatians5:6 O Yezous Kristeske molell či, te hi i morsh ap o mass činlo, vitar gar, te hi lo gar činlo. Kova, hoy hi boudeder moldo har lauter, hi o patsepen. Ko patsepen dikah mer ap o kamlepen, kay yekes hi i vavareske." 
Galatians5:7 T'mer nashan mishto ap o Debleskro drom. Koon rikras t'men pale, te shounenn bouder gar ap o čačepen?" 
Galatians5:8 Kova, hoy savo mensho t'menge penas, vell gar o Deblestar, kay das t'men gole, te venn leskre čave." 
Galatians5:9 T'mer djinenna, i tikno kotar shoutlo yarro krell o tselo yarro shoutlo." 
Galatians5:10 Me prindjrau t'men mishto oun patsau, kay shounenn ap mande, oun o Yezous Kristo anell t'men pale ap o čačo drom. Kova, kay anas t'men o čačo dromestar tele, kova lell peskri phagi. Hi yek, koon yob ninna hi." 
Galatians5:11 Mire phrala, me te penoms i menshenge, te moukenn pen yon ap o mass te činell, lans i bibolde man gar palla. Palle rhoyrans le pen gar pral kova, kay rakrau pral o Yezouseskro merepen ap o troushel, oun penau lenge, kay yob kokres men pash o Debleste anella." 
Galatians5:12 Kolla, kay krenn t'men dineles, kamaus, te činenn pen le paash!" 
Galatians5:13 Mire phrala, o Devel das t'men gole, te djivenn i djipen, kay han bouder gar pandlo ap čomone. Kal labentsa penau gar, te krenn t'mer nay, hoy kamenna, oun djivenn nay t'maro phouro djipen. Na-a, avenn yek o vavareske koy! Krenn kova dran o kamlepen!" 
Galatians5:14 Te vell yek yaake lačo ap o vavareste har yob lačo ap peste hi, palle krell lo lauter, hoy o Devel lestar kamella." 
Galatians5:15 Te dandrenn t'mer t'men har midjak djoukle, denn yak, te rhal yek kol vavares gar pre!" 
Galatians5:16 Me penau t'menge: Djivenn yaake, har o Debleskro Dourho t'menge penella! Yob te hi t'mentsa, palle krenn gar o čilačepen, hoy an t'mende hi." 
Galatians5:17 Kova, hoy an mende hi, kamell gar kova, hoy o Debleskro Dourho kamella. Oun kova, hoy o Debleskro Dourho kamella, hi gar kova, hoy an mende hi. Kol douy zorya čingrenn pen yaake, kay nay krenn t'mer gar ko lačepen, hoy kamenn t'mer te krell." 
Galatians5:18 Te krenn t'mer kova, hoy o Debleskro Dourho t'menge penella, palle hi o Moseskre laba kek zoor pral t'mende." 
Galatians5:19 T'mer lauter djinenna, har kol menshe djivenna, kay krenn ko čilačepen, hoy an lende hi: I morsha sovenn vavar djouvyentsa. Oun i djouvya sovenn vavar morshentsa. I menshe krenn djoungelo koova oun vi-ladjedo koova." 
Galatians5:20 Yon mangenn vavar koova an har o Debles. Yon dourkrenna. Yon kourenn pen oun čingrenn pen. Yon zilverenna, oun len hi rholi ap i vavarende. Yon dikenn ap pende kokres, te djal lenge mishto, oun dikenn gar ap i vavarende, te djal lenge ninna mishto. Yon moukenn pengre phralen oun djan vavarentsa khetne." 
Galatians5:21 Yon kamenn kova, hoy o vavares hi. Yon hi pipangre oun rhapangre. Oun boud vavar čilačo koova krenn yon. Me penom t'menge oun penau pale: Koon yaake djivella, vell gar pash o Debleste an o bolepen oun lell gar ko lačo koova, hoy o Debles peskre čavenge hi." 
Galatians5:22 Kones hi o Debleskro Dourho an peskro dji, dran koleste vella lačepen: Les vell o Debleskro kamlepen oun barht an o dji. Yob kamell kek čingepen. Yob rikrell lauter vin. Yob hi lačes ap i vavarende. Les hi i baro dji i vavarenge. Kova, hoy yob penell, ap kova rikrell pes yob." 
Galatians5:23 Yob krell pes gar bares oun lell pes khetne. O Moseskre laba, kolen hi kek zoor pral koleste, koon yaake djivella." 
Galatians5:24 Kolla, kay djivenn o Yezous Kristeha, kolla anan ko tsele čilačo koova, hoy yon kran, pash o Yezouseste. Oun kanna penenn le na-a ap o djoungelo koova, hoy kamell an lengro dji te vell." 
Galatians5:25 O Debleskro Dourho das men o nevo djipen. Doleske djivas yaake, har yob kamella."
