Galatians5:26 Mer rodas gar pal kova, te vas bareder oun feteder har kol vavar. Mer čingras gar oun dikas gar čilače yakentsa ap kova, hoy ko vavares hi!" 
Galatians6:1 Mire phrala, nay vell, kay krell yek t'mendar i čilačo koova. Anenn kol menshes pale ap o čačo drom! Rakrenn leha lačes! Yaake sikrenn t'mer, kay djivenn yaake, har o Debleskro Dourho kova kamella. Denn yak ap t'mende, te perenn t'mer gar ninna o Debleskro dromestar tele!" 
Galatians6:2 Yek hounte dikell ap ko vavareste oun hidjrella leha, hoy an leskro dji leske doukrella. Yaake krenn t'mer kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo t'mendar kamella." 
Galatians6:3 Koon patsella, kay yob feteder hi har ko vavar, oun hi kova gar, kova rhorhell pes kokres." 
Galatians6:4 Hakeno hounte dikell ap peste, har yob djivella. Yaake nay sharell lo pes dran kova, hoy yob krella oun dikell gar ap i vavareste." 
Galatians6:5 Hakenes hi doha an peskro djipen, hoy hounte hidjrell lo." 
Galatians6:6 Yek te penell t'menge o Debleskro lab, palle hounte denn t'mer les kova, hoy les hounte vell djipaske." 
Galatians6:7 Ma patsenn, te krenn nay o Debleha, har t'mer kamenna! T'mer te krenn lačo koova, lenn t'mer lačo koova pale pale. T'mer te krenn čilačo koova, lenn t'mer čilačo koova pale pale." 
Galatians6:8 Koon krella, hoy leske kokres mishto hi, koleskro djipen ačell gar. Koon krella, hoy o Debleskro Dourho leske penella, kova lell o Debleskro djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
Galatians6:9 Dikas, te vas gar khino, te kras lačo koova. Vell ko tsiro, kay lah ninna lačo koova." 
Galatians6:10 Doleske kras lačo koova yaake boud, har krah nay, hake menshenge, boudeder kol patslenge." 
Galatians6:11 Kanna činau bare laba. Koy pre dikenn t'mer, kay me kova činom miro vasteha." 
Galatians6:12 Kol morsha, kay kamenn zoryah, te moukenn t'men ap o mass te činell, kolla kamenn kol vavarende te sikrell, har lačo yon hi. Kova krenn le, te venn le gar palla lino. Te penans yon, kay o Yezous Kristeskro merepen ap o troushel kokres kova hi, hoy čivell men an o čačepen glan o Debleste, vans yon palla lino." 
Galatians6:13 Yon ninna, kay moukan pen ap o mass te činell, krenn gar lauter, hoy o Moseskre laba penenna. Doleske kamenn le, te moukenn t'men ap o mass te činell, yaake te sharenn yon pen glan i menshende." 
Galatians6:14 Me djinau yek: An kek tsiro kamau me te sharap man. Me sharau ko troushel kokres, kay maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, meras. Kanna hi mange kova lauter bouder či moldo, hoy i menshenge yaake boud moldo hi. Me nashau ko koova bouder gar palla." 
Galatians6:15 Hi či moldo, te hal tou ap o mass činlo. Hi vitar či moldo, te hal tou gar ap o mass činlo. Yek koova molella: O Devel kras dran mende neve menshe." 
Galatians6:16 Me kamoms, te dell o Devel peskri barht oun peskro kamlepen lauterende, kay rikrenn pen ap kal laba. Mou vell kova ninna ap i tsele Debleskre menshende an Israel!" 
Galatians6:17 Ma krenn mange bouder kek douka! Man hi boud činepen ap mande, hoy sikrenna, kay vom o Yezouseske dino." 
Galatians6:18 Mire phrala, mangau maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, te vell lo t'menge lačo. Amen." 
Ephesians1:1 Kava liil činau me, o Paulo. O Yezous Kristo bičras man, te penap i menshenge leskro lab. Yaake kamell kova o Devel. Me činau kava liil ap kolende, kolen o Devel vin gole das an o foro Efesus, oun kay patsenn ap o Yezous Kristeste." 
Ephesians1:2 Mou vell t'men lačepen oun barht an o dji! Ko dell t'men maro Devel, kay maro dad hi, oun maro ray, o Yezous Kristo." 
Ephesians1:3 Sharas maro Debles! Yob hi o Devel oun o dad maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, oun das peskro tselo bolepaskro bravlepen mende, kay ham patslo ap o Yezous Kristeste." 
Ephesians1:4 Har o bolepen oun i phoub gar koy his, rodas lo men vin, te djas ap o Yezouseskro drom. Yob rodas men vin, te dell lo men i djoudjo dji, te hatsell lo kek doosh ap mende. Yaake boud kamas lo men," 
Ephesians1:5 te penas lo glan i rah tsiro an peskro dji, te vas mer leskre čave. Oun o Yezous Kristo kras, te vam mer o Debleskre čave, yaake har o Devel kova kamas," 
Ephesians1:6 te sharas mer leskro baro lačepen. Yob his yaake lačo ap mende, te das lo peskro kamlo čaves menge!" 
Ephesians1:7 Har o Yezous Kristo ap o troushel meras, oun peskro rat menge ratas, las lo mari doosh oun phagi mendar. Yaake baro his leskro lačepen ap mende!" 
Ephesians1:8 Boud kope his lo menge lačes, oun das men ninna gosvepen, te hayvas leskro drom." 
Ephesians1:9 Kek mensho djinas, hoy o Devel kamas te krell. Mende sikras lo, hoy les an peskro dji hi. Kova, hoy yob kamell te krell, krell lo o Yezous Kristeha." 
Ephesians1:10 Te vell o čačo tsiro, anell lo halauter khetne, hoy hi an o bolepen oun ap i phoub. Oun o Yezous Kristo vell o ray pral halauter." 
Ephesians1:11 Yob kras, te vam mer o Debleskre čave. Oun ko bolepaskro bravlepen, hoy leskro hi, vell ninna maro. Kova kamas o Devel glan i rah tsiro yaake. Oun lauter, hoy yob kamella, krell lo." 
Ephesians1:12 Doleske sharas mer maro baro Debles! I rah tsiro das maro dji pal o Kristeste gole, ko baro rayeste, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. Oun kanna hi lo kay." 
Ephesians1:13 T'mer ninna shounan o čačepen. Oun t'men vas ko drom siklo, hoy anas t'men pash o Debleste. Ko drom hi o Yezous Kristo. Har t'mer ap leste patslo van, das lo t'men o Debleskro Dourho an t'mare djia. Glan i rah tsiro penas o Devel, te dell lo les peskre čavende. Yaake sikrell lo, koon leskre čave hi." 
Ephesians1:14 Kanna hi men o Debleskro Dourho an mende. Oun doleske djinah, te lah boudeder lačo koova ap ko dives, kay vah neves kerdo an o bolepen. Doleske sharas mer maro baro Debles!" 
Ephesians1:15 Me shounom, har baro hi t'maro patsepen ap maro rayeste, o Yezouseste. Ninna kamenn t'mer i tsele patslen o djiyestar." 
Ephesians1:16 Doleske parkrau man hako tsiro pash o Debleste t'menge, oun mangau lestar," 
Ephesians1:17 te dell lo t'men gosvepen, te hayvenn t'mer, har baro yob hi. Yob hi o Devel maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, oun maro dad an o bolepen, o ray pral halauter." 
Ephesians1:18 Me mangau lestar, te krell lo t'mare djia pre, te dikenn t'mare djiyeskre yakentsa, har baro oun shoukar kova hi, hoy yob i patslende della ap ko tsiro, kay venn le pash leste an o bolepen khetne. Yob das t'men gole, te lenn kova lauter." 
Ephesians1:19 Oun me mangau lestar ninna, te hayvenn t'mer, har bari leskri zoor hi, hoy an mende hi, kay patsah. Koy zoor hi i emligi bari zoor," 
Ephesians1:20 hoy kras o Yezous Kristes i moulendar djido, oun beshas les ap i čači rig o Deblestar an o bolepen," 
Ephesians1:21 oun das halauter an leskre vasta, te vell lo o ray pral i tsele rayende oun pralstunende, zorele oun bare. Kekeskro lab hi bareder har leskro lab an kava tsiro, oun ninna an ko tsiro, hoy vella." 
Ephesians1:22 O Devel das halauter an leskre vasta, oun kras, te vas o Yezous Kristo o pralstouno pral i patslende." 
Ephesians1:23 Kolla hi leskre. Yob djivell an lende peskri tseli zoryah. Oun leskri tseli zoor hi an halauter an o bolepen oun ap i phoub. 
Ephesians2:1 Har gar patslo hans, his boud doosh ap t'mende. Oun t'mer hans čilačo. Yaake hans o Debleske moulo." 
Ephesians2:2 T'mer djan ap o čilačo drom, yaake har i vavar menshe, oun shounan ap o bengeste. Kova hi o ray pral i čilače zorya mashkral o bolepen oun i phoub. Oun yob boudrell an i djia kolendar, kay shounenn gar ap o Debleste." 
Ephesians2:3 His i tsiro, kay djivam mer halauter har yon, oun kram o čilačepen, hoy an mende hi. Mer kram, hoy mer kamam, oun hoy menge an o shero vas. Oun o Debleskri rholi his ninna pral mende har pral kol vavar menshende." 
Ephesians2:4 Kanna kras men o Devel djido. Les his i baro dji menge oun kamas men o tselo djiyestar. Mer, kay leske moulo hams, har djivam an maro čilačepen, men kras yob djido, yaake har yob o Yezous Kristes djido kras. Yob his yaake lačo ap mende, te las lo men dran o čilačepen vin." 
Ephesians2:5  
Ephesians2:6 Har djangras yob o Yezous Kristes i moulendar pre, djangras men lo ninna pre, oun beshas men an o bolepen pash leste." 
Ephesians2:7 Yaake baro hi leskro lačepen ap mende, kay patsah ap o Yezous Kristeste. Ninna an ko tsiro, hoy vella, dikenna i menshe, har baro leskro lačepen ap mende hi." 
Ephesians2:8 Dran peskro lačepen las lo t'men dran o čilačepen vin, har patsan ap o Yezous Kristeste. T'mer van nay gar dran t'mari zoor dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin. Na-a! O Devel las t'men vin." 
Ephesians2:9 Kova kras lo gar doleske, kay t'mer lačo koova kran. Yaake sharell nay pes kek mensho glan o Debleste." 
Ephesians2:10 Kova, hoy mer kanna ham, kras o Devel dran mende. Har vam patslo ap o Yezous Kristeste, das lo men o nevo djipen, te kras mer ko lačo koova, hoy yob menge vin rodas oun an mare vasta das." 
Ephesians2:11 Ma bistrenn, koon t'mer hans, har boldo van! T'mer hans kek bibolde. Oun i bibolde penan Bi-činle ap t'mende. I bibolde van ap pengro mass činlo, oun kova han t'mer gar." 
Ephesians2:12 Ap ko tsiro prindjran t'mer o Yezous Kristes gar oun hans gar o Debleskre menshendar. Ko lačo koova, hoy o Devel peskre menshenge penas, te dell lo len, his gar t'menge. T'mer prindjran o Debles gar, oun djivan har an i kali rat oun dikan kek momeli glan t'mende." 
Ephesians2:13 Ap ko tsiro hans t'mer dour o Deblestar. Kanna prindjrenn les. O Yezous Kristo anas t'men ap peskro drom, har yob ap o troushel peskro rat t'menge ratas." 
Ephesians2:14 Yob anas i bibolden khetne kol menshentsa, kay kek bibolde hi, te venn le mala, oun las o čingepen lendar krik, hoy mashkral lende his." 
Ephesians2:15 Har yob ap o troushel meras, čivas lo o Moseskre lila ap i rig, kay činlo hi, har i bibolde hounte djivenna. Yob kras čomone neves, te vell i biboldo khetne koleha, kay kek biboldo hi, oun te venn le lauter mala." 
Ephesians2:16 Har meras lo ap o troushel, anas lo kol douyen khetne o Debleha, te venn le leskre mala. Kote las lo o čingepen lendar krik, hoy mashkral lende his." 
Ephesians2:17 O Yezous Kristo vas, oun sikras lauteren o drom pash o Debleste. T'men, kay t'mer dour o Deblestar hans, oun ninna i bibolden, kay gar dour o Deblestar his, sikras lo ko drom, te djivas mer lauter pash leste khetne." 
Ephesians2:18 Mende halauterende das yob o Debleskro Dourho. Oun kova krell, te nay vah mer lauter glan o Debleste, maro dadeste." 
Ephesians2:19 Kanna han t'mer bouder gar save menshe, kay vin hi oun o Debles gar prindjrenna. Na-a, khetne kol vavar patslentsa han t'mer kanna o Debleskre menshe oun han khere pash leste." 
Ephesians2:20 I tsele Debleskre menshe hi har yek kheer, kerdo dran barra. T'mer han kol barra, hoy hi tardo ap i telstoune barra. I telstoune barra hi o Yezous Kristeskre bičepangre oun o Debleskre rakepangre. O Yezous Kristo hi ko zorelo bar, hoy rikrell o tselo kheer khetne. Oun o kheer vell baro oun bareder, oun vell i shoukar kheer, kay o Devel djivella." 
Ephesians2:21  
Ephesians2:22 Ninna t'mer djivenn o Yezous Kristeha khetne. Doleske han t'mer ninna har barra an o Debleskro kheer, kay o Debleskro Dourho djivella." 
Ephesians3:1 Doleske bičras o Yezous Kristo man, o Paules, pash t'mende, kay kek bibolde han. Dran kova hom me kanna an o stilepen. T'mer shounan, har das man o Devel miri boudi, te penap kolenge, kay kek bibolde hi, har baro leskro lačepen ninna lenge hi." 
Ephesians3:2  
Ephesians3:3 Kova djinan i menshe gar. An kava tikno liil činom t'menge, hoy sikras man o Devel pral kova." 
Ephesians3:4 Te draverenn t'mer miro liil, palle hayvenn, kay prindjrau kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge kras." 
Ephesians3:5 An o phouro tsiro djinan i menshe kova gar. Kanna djinenn les o Debleskre bičepangre oun rakepangre. Lenge čivas les o Debleskro Dourho an o dji. 
Ephesians3:6 Yob sikras len, te nay venn ninna kolla o Debleskre čave, kay kek bibolde hi, te djivenn le leha khetne. O lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar hi ninna lenge, yaake har o Devel glan i rah tsiro penas." 
Ephesians3:7 Kava lačo lab penau i menshenge. O Devel his mange lačo, te das lo man kay boudi. Ninna das lo man i zoor, te krap kova." 
Ephesians3:8 Ninna te hom me o tikneder kol tsele patslendar, das lo man koy shoukar boudi, te djap pash kolende, kay hi kek bibolde, te penap lenge, havo baro bravlepen o Yezous Kristes lenge hi," 
Ephesians3:9 oun te sikrap lauterende, har kras o Devel kova, hoy his les an o dji. Kova djinan i menshe i rah tsiro gar. O Devel kokres, kay kras o bolepen oun i phoub, djinas les." 
Ephesians3:10 Kanna dikenn i raya oun i pralstoune an o bolepen, har baro o Debleskro gosvepen hi. Kova dikenn le ap kova, hoy yob i patslenge kras." 
Ephesians3:11 Kova, hoy les glan i rah tsiro an peskro dji his, kova kras lo, har yob o Yezous Kristes menge ap i phoub bičras. Kova vas maro ray," 
Ephesians3:12 oun kras menge i drom pash o Debleste. Kanna, kay patsah ap leste, hounte trashas bouder gar o Deblestar, oun mer nay vah glan leste." 
Ephesians3:13 Doleske mangau t'men: Ma avenn gar khino an t'maro patsepen, ninna te shounenn t'mer, kay me t'menge stildo hom. Kova, hoy lau ap mande, sikrell t'mende, har boud t'mer mange moldo han." 
Ephesians3:14 Doleske perau ap mire čanga, oun parkrau man pash o Debleste, maro dadeste." 
Ephesians3:15 Yob hi o čačo dad leskre tsele čavendar an o bolepen oun ap i phoub. 
Ephesians3:16 Oun leskri zoor hi bari. Doleske mangau lestar, te krell leskro Dourho t'mare djia zoreles." 
Ephesians3:17 Me mangau lestar ninna, te djivell o Yezous Kristo an t'mende dran t'maro patsepen, oun te kamenn t'mer o Debles oun ninna yek o vavares o djiyestar. Palle han t'mer har i rouk, koleskre draba djan dour an i phoub. Oun t'mer han har i kheer, hoy zoreles tardo hi." 
Ephesians3:18 Yaake nay hayvenn t'mer i tsele patslentsa, har baro o Yezous Kristeskro dji t'menge hi," 
Ephesians3:19 ninna te hi leskro kamlepen bareder har lauter, hoy an mare shere dren djala. Te hayvah leskro kamlepen boud oun boudeder, palle djivell o Devel boud oun boudeder an mende." 
Ephesians3:20 Oun yob nay krell boudeder, har mer lestar mangah, oun boudeder, hoy mer hayvah. Yaake bari hi leskri zoor, hoy an mende kova lauter krella. Mer lauter, kay patsah ap o Yezous Kristeste, sharas maro Debles kanna oun hako tsiro. Amen." 
Ephesians3:21  
Ephesians4:1 Me hom an o stilepen o Yezouseske, maro rayeske, oun mangau t'men o djiyestar, te djivenn t'mer t'maro djipen har save menshe, kolen o Devel peske khetne gole das." 
Ephesians4:2 Ma krenn t'men bares! Avenn lačes yek ap o vavareste! Denn i vavaren gar yaake sik pre! Djivenn khetne an o kamlepen! 
Ephesians4:3 O Debleskro Dourho anas t'men khetne. Yaake denn garda, te vell kek čingepen mashkral t'mende, oun te rikrenn t'mer lauter khetne!" 
Ephesians4:4 T'mer patsle han yek familya. T'men hi o emligo Debleskro Dourho an t'mende. Oun o Devel das t'men gole, te djivenn t'mer lauter leha khetne." 
Ephesians4:5 T'men hi o emligo ray, oun o emligo patsepen. Oun t'mer lan o emligo Debleskro thopen." 
Ephesians4:6 Oun t'men hi o emligo Devel. Kova hi o dad lauterendar. Yob hi pral lauterende oun mashkral lende, oun djivell an lauterende." 
Ephesians4:7 Hakeneske mendar his o Yezous Kristo lačes oun das les i boudi, hoy boudrell lo i patslenge." 
Ephesians4:8 Doleske hi an o Debleskro lab činlo: Har yob pre an o bolepen djas, las lo kolen peha, kay leskro van, oun das len i boudi o Debleske te krell." 
Ephesians4:9 Kote hi činlo, kay yob an o bolepen djas. Oun kova penell menge ninna, kay yob glan kova dran o bolepen ap i phoub vas." 
Ephesians4:10 Kova, kay vas tele ap i phoub, hi ninna kova, kay djas pre an o pralstouno bolepen, te djivell lo an o bolepen oun ninna ap i phoub." 
Ephesians4:11 Yob hi kova, kay das i patslen pengri boudi. Koy hi kolla, kolen yob bičras, te penenn le i menshenge lestar. Vavar rakrenna, hoy yob lenge an o dji čivas, hoy kek vavar djinella. Vavar anenn kol menshen, kay gar patslo hi, pash o Yezous Kristeste. Pale vavar rikrenn i patslen khetne, oun sikrenn lende o Debleskro drom." 
Ephesians4:12 Lauter kolla krenn pengri boudi, te venn i tsele patsle zoreles an o patsepen, oun te hayvenn le o Debleskri boudi mishto te krell." 
Ephesians4:13 Kova te vell yaake, palle ham mer lauter khetne an yek patsepen, oun prindjrah o Debleskro čaves mishto. Boud oun boudeder hayvah, hoy yob mendar kamella, bis te djivah yaake har yob djivas." 
Ephesians4:14 Palle ham bouder gar har tikne čave, kay lauter patsenna, kava dives yaake oun ko vavar dives vavarčandes. Oun mer shounah bouder gar ap kolende, kay rhorhenna, oun kamenn men o čačo dromestar tele te anell." 
Ephesians4:15 Mer hounte djivas an o čačepen oun penas o čačepen i menshenge. Maro kamlepen hounte vell kek rhorheno kamlepen. Yaake vah mer boud oun boudeder har o Yezous Kristo. Kova hi o pralstouno pral lauterende, kay patsenn ap leste." 
Ephesians4:16 Yob rikrell len khetne yaake, te vell yek patslo i vavareha khetne anlo. Oun yek patslo hidjrell o vavares yaake, har les i zoor hi. Mer te ham yaake kamlo, ko yek ap o vavareste, palle vell o Debleskri familya baro oun zorelo." 
Ephesians4:17 Me penau t'menge zoreles, hoy mange o ray Yezous penas: Ma djivenn bouder har kol menshe, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar! Kova, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djala, hi či moldo." 
Ephesians4:18 O Deblestar kamenn le či te djinell. Lengro dji hi har i bar. Yaake djan le ap i čilačo drom, oun prindjrenn ko djipen gar, hoy o Devel della." 
Ephesians4:19 Yon ladjenn bouder gar, te djivenn le i vi-ladjedo djipen, oun rikrenn pen gar pale te krenn le djoungelo koova." 
Ephesians4:20 Savo koova kras o Yezous Kristo gar. Na-a! 
Ephesians4:21 T'mer shounan lestar, oun djinenna, har yob djivas. Ko drom, hoy yob sikras men, hi o čačo drom." 
Ephesians4:22 Ma djivenn bouder gar t'maro phouro djipen! An t'maro phouro djipen vas o čilačo koova baro an t'mare djia, oun t'mer kran, hoy t'menge gar mishto hi. Savo koova krell t'maro djipen paash." 
Ephesians4:23 Moukenn t'men o Deblestar neves te krell! 
Ephesians4:24 Djivenn kanna o nevo djipen, hoy t'men o Devel das! Palle han t'mer an o čačepen tardo, oun han čačepah leske koy." 
Ephesians4:25 Ma rhorhenn bouder! Mer ham lauter phrala oun phenya. Doleske rakrenn o čačepen yek o vavareha! 
Ephesians4:26 Te venn t'mer an i rholi, palle denn garda, te krenn kek čilačo koova! Moukenn o kham gar tele te djal pral t'mari rholi!" 
Ephesians4:27 Denn garda ap t'mende, te krenn t'mer gar, hoy o beng kamella!" 
Ephesians4:28 Koon čoras an peskro phouro djipen, kova čorell bouder gar! Yob hounte boudrell peskre vastentsa, te vell les doha djipaske, oun te nay dell lo ninna i čorvelen čomone." 
Ephesians4:29 Rakrenn kek čilače oun djoungele laba! Kova, hoy t'mer penenna, hounte vell lačes kolenge, kay shounenna, te lenn le nevi zoor an pengro djipen." 
Ephesians4:30 Te krenn t'mer i čilačo koova, palle doukrenn o Debleskro Dourho an t'mare djia. O Devel das les t'mende, te sikrell lo, kay leskro han ap ko dives, kay lell lo t'men dran o tselo čilačepen vin." 
Ephesians4:31 Avenn ap kekeste čilačo oun rhoyedo! Čingrenn ap kekeste, oun praasenn kekes!" 
Ephesians4:32 Avenn kamlo yek ap o vavareste, oun lenn i dji o vavareske! Bistrenn o čilačepen, hoy o vavar ap t'mende kras! Ninna o Devel bistras t'maro čilačepen, har o Yezous Kristo t'menge meras." 
Ephesians5:1 T'mer han o Debleskre čave. Oun yob kamell t'men i tselo djiyeha. Doleske krenn lauter yaake, har o Devel kova krella," 
Ephesians5:2 oun djivenn an o kamlepen, yaake har o Yezous Kristo peskro kamlepen mende sikras, har yob menge meras. Oun yaake das lo peskro djipen o Debleske. Oun o Devel dikas lačes ap leste." 
Ephesians5:3 T'mer han o Debleskre menshe. Doleske krenn kek vi-ladjedo oun djoungelo koova! Nashenn vitar gar pal i love! Hi gar mishto, te vell pral savo koova mank t'mende rakedo!" 
Ephesians5:4 Hi vitar gar čačo o Debleskre čavenge, te rakrenn le djoungele laba, dinelo koova, oun sapaskro koova, hoy či moldo hi! T'mare labentsa sharenn o Debles, oun parkrenn t'men pash leste! Kova krenn oun gar ko vavar!" 
Ephesians5:5 T'mer hounte djinenn: An o bolepen, kay hi o Yezous Kristo oun o Devel i raya, kote venn kek morsha dren, kay sovenn vavar djouvyentsa, vitar kek djouvya, kay sovenn vavar morshentsa, vitar kek, kay krell djoungelo koova, vitar kek, kay nashell pal i love. Kova, kay nashell pal i love, koleske hi o bravlepen peskro devel." 
Ephesians5:6 Ma patsenn kekes, kay penell t'menge, te nay krenn kova lauter! Koon kova penella, hi i rhorheno. O Debleskri rholi vell ap kolende, kay gar ap o Debleste shounenna, oun krenna savo čilačo koova." 
Ephesians5:7 Rikrenn t'men kolendar pale, kay kova lauter krenna!" 
Ephesians5:8 Glan ko tsiro, har t'mer patslo van, djan t'mer ap o čilačo drom. Kova his har te djans an i rati. Kanna hi kova vavarčandes. Maro ray Yezous djivell an t'mare djia, oun anas t'men ap peskro drom. Yob hi i bari momeli t'menge. Djan kanna ap leskro drom, kay hi bouder kek tamlepen!" 
Ephesians5:9 Lauter kolla, kay ap leskro drom djana, krenn kova, hoy lačo oun čačo hi, oun penenn o čačepen." 
Ephesians5:10 Rodenn pal kova, hoy hi mishto glan o Yezouseste, maro rayeste!" 
Ephesians5:11 Ma djan ap o čilačo drom kolentsa, kay krenna, hoy či moldo oun čilačo hi! Sike lende, har čilačo kova hi!" 
Ephesians5:12 Kova, hoy yon čorrhanes krenna, hi yaake djoungelo, te hounte ladjell kova pes, kay kolestar rakrella." 
Ephesians5:13 Te sikrah len lengro čilačo koova, hi kova yaake, har te anams ko koova pash i momeli. Oun yon dikenn les ninna." 
Ephesians5:14 Oun kova, hoy diklo vella, ačell gar an o tamlepen." 
Ephesians5:15 Denn yak koy pre, har t'mer t'maro djipen djivenna! Ma djivenn har dinele menshe! Djivenn har kolla, kay djinenna, hoy mishto hi!" 
Ephesians5:16 Hako kopo, kay krenn nay lačo koova, krenn kova! Kava tsiro, kay djivah, hi čilačo." 
Ephesians5:17 Doleske krenn t'maro dji pre, te hayvenn, hoy o ray Yezous t'mendar kamella!" 
Ephesians5:18 Ma piyenn yaake boud mool, te venn mato! Te han mato, palle krenn t'mer hako dinelo koova. Moukenn o Debleskro Dourho o ray an t'mende te vell, oun venn pherdo lestar!" 
Ephesians5:19 Givenn lauter khetne o Debleskre gilya oun save gilya, hoy sharenn o Debles, ninna save gilya, hoy o Debleskro Dourho an t'mende čivella! Givenn oun bashrenn o tselo djiyestar o Yezouseske, maro rayeske!" 
Ephesians5:20 Parkrenn t'men hako tsiro pash o Debleste, maro dadeste, lautereske, hoy das lo t'men! Krenn kova an o lab maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar!" 
Ephesians5:21 O Yezous Kristo hi t'maro ray. Oun t'mer penenn Ray ap leste. Doleske hounte hadell pes kek t'mendar pral o vavareste. 
Ephesians5:22 T'mer djouvya, ma hadenn t'men pral t'mare romende! Yaake sikrenn t'mer, kay hi o Yezous Kristo t'maro ray." 
Ephesians5:23 O rom hi o ray pral i djouvyate yaake, har hi o Yezous Kristo o ray pral i tsele patslende. Kolen las yob dran o čilačepen vin. Yon hi leskre menshe." 
Ephesians5:24 Yaake har kol tsele patsle ap o Yezous Kristeste shounenna, yaake hounte shounenn ninna i romya ap pengre romende an hako koova." 
Ephesians5:25 T'mer morsha, avenn yaake kamlo ap t'mare romyende, har o Yezous Kristo kamlo hi ap i patslende! Yob das peskro djipen lenge an o merepen," 
Ephesians5:26 te venn le erligo oun djoudjo glan leste. Yob thovas lengri doosh lendar tele, har patsan le leskro lab, oun van leske an o pani thodo." 
Ephesians5:27 Yaake kras lo len rayles oun shoukar. Kek djoungelo oun čilačo koova hi ap lende. Djoudjo oun erligo hi le glan leste tardo. 
Ephesians5:28 Yaake hounte vell i morsh yaake kamlo ap peskri romyate har hi lo kamlo ap peste! Te hi lo kamlo ap peskri romyate, hi kova yaake har te vals lo kamlo ap peste." 
Ephesians5:29 Kek hi čilačo ap peste. Na-a, yob krell peske lauter lačo koova. Yaake krell kova o Yezous Kristo i patslenge ninna." 
Ephesians5:30 Mer ham leskri familya. 
Ephesians5:31 An o Debleskro lab hi činlo: Doleske moukell i morsh peskro dades oun peskri da, te djivell lo peskri romyah khetne. Oun kol douy venna yek familya." 
Ephesians5:32 Kava lab sikrell men i baro čačepen. Me rakrau o Yezous Kristestar oun kolendar, kay ap leste patsenna." 
Ephesians5:33 Ninna te hayvau me kava lab yaake, penell kava lab t'menge: Hakeno hounte vell yaake kamlo ap peskri romyate, har yob kamlo ap peste hi! Oun i romni hounte vell lačo ap peskro romeste!" 
Ephesians6:1 T'mer čave, shounenn ap t'maro dadeste oun ap t'mari date! Kova hi mishto glan o Debleste." 
Ephesians6:2 O Devel penell menge: Dik ap tiro dadeste oun ap tiri date, te djal lenge mishto! Koon kova krella, koleske djal mishto, oun yob djivell i rah djipen ap i phoub." 
Ephesians6:3  
Ephesians6:4 T'mer dada, ma rhoyrenn t'mare čaven! Penenn lenge, hoy o Devel lendar kamella, oun sikrenn lende, har te djan le ap o Debleskro drom!" 
Ephesians6:5 T'mer boudepangre, kay hounte boudrenn t'mare rayenge, ap t'mende penau: Shounenn ap t'mare rayende! Darenn lendar oun boudrenn lenge, har te boudrans o Yezous Kristeske!" 
Ephesians6:6 Ma krenn koy boudi yaake, te sharenn t'men i menshe! Na-a, krenn koy boudi o Yezous Kristeske, te sharell yob t'men! Yaake han leskre boudepangre, kay o djiyestar krenna, hoy o Devel kamella." 
Ephesians6:7 Krenn t'mari boudi an o lačepen! T'mer boudrenna o Debleske, oun gar i menshenge." 
Ephesians6:8 Shounenn: Koon lačo koova krella, koleste dell o Devel lačo koova pale. O Devel dikell gar koy pre, hoy ko mensho hi: te hi lo i boudepaskro, te hi lo i ray." 
Ephesians6:9 T'mer, kay han raya, ap t'mende penau: Avenn lačes ap kolende, kay t'menge boudrenna! Ma denn len trad! T'mer djinenna: Len hi i ray an o bolepen. Kova hi ninna t'maro ray. Glan leskre yaka hi yek mensho har o vavar." 
Ephesians6:10 Ninna kamau t'menge te penell: Avenn zoreles an o patsepen ap o rayeste, o Yezouseste! Les hi i bari zoor t'menge." 
Ephesians6:11 O beng kamell t'men an peskro vast te lell. Doleske rivenn kol koola ap t'mende, hoy dell o Devel t'mende, te ačenn nay zoreles tardo an o kourepen o bengeha!" 
Ephesians6:12 Mer kourah men gar i menshentsa. Na-a, čilače zorya hi mashkral o bolepen oun i phoub, kay venna o bengestar. Kolen hi penepaske an kava čilačo tsiro. Kolentsa kourah men." 
Ephesians6:13 Doleske rivenn kol koola ap t'mende, hoy dell t'men o Devel, te kourenn t'men mishto ap ko dives, kay vell o beng ap t'mende. Palle han zorleder har yob, oun ačenn zoreles tardo." 
Ephesians6:14 Avenn yaake rido har i kourepaskro, kay djal an o kourepen! Troul leskro per hi i pessi zoreli dori, oun ap leskro beč i sasterno gad. Ap peskre pire rivell lo zorele kirrha. Glan leste rikrell lo i bourhli sasterni patri. Ap leskro shero hidjrell lo i sasterni stadi oun an leskro čačo vast i rharo. Djivenn an o čačepen! Kova hi yaake har te pandan i pessi zoreli dori troul t'maro per. Krenn kova, hoy hi mishto oun lačo! Kova hi har i sasterno gad ap t'maro beč." 
Ephesians6:15 Djan pash i menshende, oun penenn lenge o lačo lab, te kras o Yezous Kristo i drom, kay o Devel oun i menshe mala venna! Kova hi yaake, har te rivenn t'mer zorele kirrha." 
Ephesians6:16 Patsenn zoreles ap o Yezous Kristeste! Kova hi yaake, har te rikrenn i bourhli sasterni patri glan t'mende. Koya krell koy yag vin, kolah o beng ap t'mende karye della." 
Ephesians6:17 Ma bistrenn, te las t'men o Yezous Kristo dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin! Kova hi t'menge har i sasterni stadi ap t'maro shero. Lenn ninna o Debleskro lab an t'maro vast. Kova hi har i rharo, hoy dell t'men o Debleskro Dourho." 
Ephesians6:18 Rakrenn hako tsiro o Debleha! Mangenn lestar kova, hoy o Debleskro Dourho an t'mare djia čivella! Ma moukenn tele te mangell les i tsele patslenge!" 
Ephesians6:19 Mangenn mange ninna, te dell o Devel man i čače laba, oun te darap gar i menshendar, te sikrap lende o Debleskro drom oun penap lenge kova, hoy djinenn le gar." 
Ephesians6:20 Koy boudi das man o Yezous Kristo. Doleske hom me kanna stildo. Ava, mangenn o Debles mange, te darap gar oun rakrap yaake, har miri boudi hi." 
Ephesians6:21 Me bičrom maro lačo phrales, o Tichiko, pash t'mende, te penell lo t'menge, har mange djala, oun hoy me krau. Yob boudrell o Yezouseske, maro rayeske, oun krell peskri boudi mishto. Me bičrom les pash t'mende, te djinenn t'mer kova lauter, oun te krell lo t'mare djia zoreles." 
Ephesians6:22  
Ephesians6:23 Mire phrala, o Debleskri barht vell t'mentsa, ninna kamlepen oun patsepen! Kova dell t'men o Devel, maro dad, oun o Yezous Kristo, maro ray." 
Ephesians6:24 O Debleskro lačepen vell pral lauterende, kay kamenn maro rayes, o Yezous Kristes, o tselo djiyeha! Yob dell len o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella!" 
Philippians1:1 Mer, o Paulo oun o Timoteo, činah kava liil. Mer boudrah o Yezous Kristeske, oun činah kava liil ap lauterende, kolen o Devel vin gole das an o foro Filipi, te patsenn le ap o Yezous Kristeste. Kava liil hi ninna i pralstunenge, kay denn garda ap i patslende, ninna kolenge, kay krenn o Debleskri boudi mashkral i patslende." 
Philippians1:2 Mou vell t'men lačepen oun barht an o dji! Kova dell t'men o Devel, maro dad an o bolepen, oun maro ray, o Yezous Kristo." 
Philippians1:3 Hako tsiro, kay venn t'mer mange an o shero, parkrau man t'menge pash miro Debleste." 
Philippians1:4 Oun hako tsiro, kay mangau o Debles t'menge lauterenge, hom barhtelo pral t'mende." 
Philippians1:5 T'mer boudran mantsa khetne, har mer sikram i menshende o Yezouseskro drom. Kova kran t'mer, har patslo van, oun moukan gar tele bis kava dives." 
Philippians1:6 Doleske djinau: O Devel kras i lači boudi an t'mende. Oun yob krell ninna, te ačenn pash leste, te venn lačes glan leste tardo ap ko dives, kay vell o Yezous Kristo pale." 
Philippians1:7 Me nay sharau t'men yaake. T'mer han an miro dji oun rikrenn mantsa khetne, ninna kanna, kay hom an o stilepen, oun penau o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar glan i čačepangre oun sikrau lende leskro drom yaake, te djinenn le o čačepen." 
Philippians1:8 O Devel djinella: Miro dji hi pash t'mende. O Yezous Kristo das man i baro kamlepen t'menge. 
Philippians1:9 Oun me mangau o Deblestar, te vell t'maro kamlepen bareder oun bareder, te hayvenn, hoy o Devel kamella, oun te djinenn, hoy te krenna." 
Philippians1:10 Yaake nay dikenn, hoy mishto oun čačo hi. Oun ap ko dives, kay vell o Yezous Kristo pale, han t'mer an o čačepen glan leste tardo, oun kek doosh hi ap t'mende." 
Philippians1:11 Oun ko boud lačo oun čačo koova, hoy t'mer kran, krell o Debles bares. Kova kran t'mer an i zoor, hoy o Yezous Kristo das t'men." 
Philippians1:12 Shounenn, mire phrala, me kamau te djinenn t'mer kova: Dran lauter, hoy ap mande vas, shounan boud menshe o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar." 
Philippians1:13 I tsele lourde, kay denn garda ap o themeskro rayeskro kheer, ninna kol vavar, kay kate hi, kolla lauter djinenn kanna, kay hom me o Yezous Kristeske an o stilepen." 
Philippians1:14 Ninna boud patsle van zorleder an o patsepen ap o rayeste, o Yezouseste, kanna, kay me stildo hom. Kolen hi bouder kek traash, te sikrenn le i menshende o Yezouseskro drom." 
Philippians1:15 Mashkral lende hi ninna save, kay zilverenn ap mande. Kolla rakrenn o Yezous Kristestar, te sikrenn le mande, kay yon kova feteder hayvenna har me. Yon krenn kova dran i čilačo dji oun kamenn, te vell mange boudeder ropaske. Vavar sikrenn i menshende o Yezouseskro drom dran i lačo dji. Yon kamenn man o djiyestar oun djinenna, me hom kate stildo, te sikrap o Yezouseskro drom i čačepangren yaake, te djinenn le o čačepen." 
Philippians1:16  
Philippians1:17  
Philippians1:18 Hoy te penap? Mange hi boud moldo, te vell o Yezouseskro drom i menshende siklo, yaake te yaake. Yek rakrell lestar dran i čilačo dji, oun i vavar dran i lačo dji." 
Philippians1:19 Ava, me hom barhtelo. T'mer mangenn o Debles mange. Oun ap miri rig hi o Debleskro Dourho, kay o Yezous Kristo man das. Doleske djinau, te djal lauter mishto mange." 
Philippians1:20 Me patsau te rikrell man o Devel an o vast, oun kamau o tselo djiyestar te krap či, kay hounte ladjap man glan leste. Kamau gar, te trashap i menshendar. Yaake har rakrom hako tsiro o Yezous Kristestar, oun trashom lendar gar, yaake kamau les ninna kanna an o stilepen te krell, ninna te hounte merap, te dikenn i menshe ap miro djipen oun ap miro merepen, har baro oun raylo o Yezous Kristo hi." 
Philippians1:21 Miro djipen hi o Yezous Kristeske. Oun te merau me, hi kova mange feteder." 
Philippians1:22 Me te ačau djido, nay sikrau boudeder menshende o Yezouseskro drom. Doleske djinau gar, hoy boudeder moldo hi." 
Philippians1:23 Ava, me djinau gar, hoy feteder hi. Ap yek rig kamaus te merap oun te vap pash o Yezous Kristeste. Kova vals mange feteder." 
Philippians1:24 Ap i vavar rig vals t'menge feteder, te ačap djido." 
Philippians1:25 Doleske hi miro dji zorelo, oun me djinau, te ačap djido, oun vau pale pash t'mende. Te hom pale pash t'mende, venn t'mer zoreles oun barhteles an o patsepen, oun parkrenn t'men pash o Yezous Kristeste, oun sharenn les boud oun boudeder." 
Philippians1:26  
Philippians1:27 Kanna, krenn lauter, te djan yaake ap o Yezouseskro drom, har kova t'mende siklo vas! Krenn kova ninna, te hom gar pash t'mende! Te dikau t'men gar, kamaus te shounap, te rikrenn t'mer lauter khetne an o patsepen, oun te krenn i tseli zoryah lauter, te vell o patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste zorelo pash t'mende." 
Philippians1:28 Ma darenn kolendar, kay kamenn gar o Yezous Kristes, oun kay rhan pen ap t'mende! Te han zorelo an o patsepen tardo, sikrell kova lende, te djan yon nashedo, oun te lenn t'mer o djipen an o bolepen, hoy vella o Deblestar." 
Philippians1:29 O Devel hi t'menge lačo, oun das t'men o patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste, oun gar o patsepen kokres. Na-a, dran o patsepen ap leste, hounte lenn t'mer ninna douka ap t'mende." 
Philippians1:30 Kol douka, hoy ap t'mende venna, his man ninna, har homs pash t'mende. Oun ninna kanna ap kava tsiro shounenn t'mer mandar, kay hounte lap douka ap mande." 
Philippians2:1 Me djinau, t'mer rakrenn i menshenge o Yezouseskre laba an o dji. T'mare laba venna dran o kamlepen, oun krenn lengre djia zoreles. O Debleskro Dourho rikrell t'men khetne, oun t'men hi i baro dji i vavarenge." 
Philippians2:2 Kova lauter krell man barhtelo. Krenn man gomme barhtleder, te vell t'men yek dji oun yek djipen, oun te kamell hakeno o vavares o djiyestar! Rikrenn khetne oun čingrenn t'men gar!" 
Philippians2:3 Kek te krell čomone, hoy leske kokres mishto hi, vitar či, te vell lo sharedo pash i menshende! Kek te krell, har te vals lo feteder har ko vavar! Na-a, ap hakeneste penau: Dik yaake ap o vavareste, har te vals lo bareder har tou!" 
Philippians2:4 Kek te dikell ap peste kokres, te djal leske mishto! Yob te dikell ninna ap ko vavareste, te djal koleske ninna mishto!" 
Philippians2:5 Djivenn yaake, har o Yezous Kristo djivas!" 
Philippians2:6 Ninna te his lo o Devel, moukas lo peskro raylepen oun peskri zoor, hoy les an o bolepen his." 
Philippians2:7 Yob das kova lauter pre, oun vas i mensho, oun djivas har i menshe. Yob vas i boudepaskro o Debleske," 
Philippians2:8 oun shounas ap leste, oun moukas, te van i menshe ray pral leste, oun maran les, oun dan les ap o troushel." 
Philippians2:9 Doleske kras o Devel, te vell yob bareder har hako vavar ray." 
Philippians2:10 Oun hakeno an o bolepen oun ap i phoub oun tel i phoub hounte perell glan leste tele ap i čanga. 
Philippians2:11 Oun lauter hounte penenna: “O Yezous Kristo hi o ray pral lauter!” Oun yaake sharenn le o Debles, maro dades an o bolepen." 
Philippians2:12 Mire kamle phrala oun phenya, t'mer shounan hako tsiro ap kova, hoy me t'menge penom, har pash t'mende homs, ninna kanna, kay gar pash t'mende hom. Me penau t'menge: Krenn lauter, te ačenn ap o Debleskro drom, bis te han pash leste! Shounenn ap o Debleste, oun trashenn lestar!" 
Philippians2:13 Yob sikrell t'men, hoy yob kamella. Ninna krell lo an t'mende, te kamenn t'mer kova, hoy yob kamella, oun te nay krenn kova ninna." 
Philippians2:14 Lauter kova, hoy t'mer krenna, krenn les i barhtelo djiyestar, oun čingrenn gar!" 
Philippians2:15 Yaake djivenn t'mer, har mishto hi. Oun kek hatsell i doosh ap t'mende. T'mer han o Debleskre čave, oun djivenn mashkral kol menshende, kay hi čilačo oun nashran pen an boud dinelo koova. Mashkral kolende han t'mer har i momlia an i rati," 
Philippians2:16 te rikrenn t'mer ap o Debleskro lačo lab, hoy o djipen della. Te krenn t'mer kova lauter, palle hom me barhtelo ap ko dives, kay o Yezous Kristo pale vella. Yaake his miri boudi pash t'mende gar čičeske." 
Philippians2:17 Me anom t'men ap o Debleskro drom. Doleske hom me glan leste tardo har i rashay, kay anell leske t'maro patsepen. Ninna te meroms pash miri boudi o Yezous Kristeske, hom me kanna barhtelo t'mentsa khetne pral t'maro patsepen." 
Philippians2:18 Avenn t'mer ninna barhtelo koy pral! Ava, avenn barhtelo mantsa!" 
Philippians2:19 Kamau te bičrap o Timotes sik pash t'mende, oun patsau, te krell maro ray Yezous i drom, te bičrap les. O Timoteo, te vell lo pale pash mande, nay penell lo mange, har t'menge djala, te vap barhtelo pral t'mende." 
Philippians2:20 Man hi kek vavar har yob, koles savo baro dji hi t'menge, oun yob kamell, te djal t'menge mishto." 
Philippians2:21 Kol vavar krenn lauter, hoy lenge mishto hi. Yon krenn gar, hoy o Yezous Kristo kamella." 
Philippians2:22 T'mer prindjrenn o Timotes oun djinenn, har mishto leskri boudi hi. Har me i menshende o Yezouseskro drom sikrom, his lo mange koy, har hi i čavo peskro dadeske koy." 
Philippians2:23 Koles kamau me pash t'mende bičrell, yaake sik har djinau, hoy kate mantsa djala." 
Philippians2:24 Me patsau te moukell man o ray Yezous sik pash t'mende te vell. 
Philippians2:25 Kanna bičrau maro phrales, o Epafrodito, pash t'mende pale. Koles bičran t'mer pash mande, te anas lo man kova, hoy man hounte vell djipaske. Peskri tseli zoryah kras lo mantsa o Debleskri boudi." 
Philippians2:26 T'mer shounan, kay yob nasselo vas. Har yob shounas, kay t'mer djinenn kova, rovas leskro dji, oun yob kamas pash t'mende te vell." 
Philippians2:27 Yob his čačepah ap o merepen čiddo. O Devel his leske lačes, oun rikras peskro vast pral leste. Gar kokres leske his lo lačes, ninna mange his lo lačes, te vell mange gar boudeder ropaske." 
Philippians2:28 Doleske bičrau les sik pash t'mende, te dikenn les t'mer, te venn barhtelo, oun te vell ninna mange bouder gar ropaske." 
Philippians2:29 Lenn les o djiyestar pash t'mende pre! Yob hi maro phraal an o patsepen ap o rayeste, o Yezouseste. Save phrala har yob hi t'menge boud moldo." 
Philippians2:30 Har t'mer van nay gar pash mande, his yob mange koy, oun leskro djipen his leske gar boud moldo. Leskri boudi o Yezous Kristeske anas les pash o merepen." 
Philippians3:1 Mire phrala, avenn barhtelo, kay t'mer ap o rayeste, o Yezouseste, patsenn! Me vau gar khino, te činap t'menge pale te pale ko emligo koova, te venn t'mer zoreles an o dji." 
Philippians3:2 Denn garda, te shounenn gar ap kolende, kay hi čilače boudepangre oun djoukle. Yon kamenna, te moukenn t'men ap t'maro mass te činell, oun penenn: “Kova hounte krenn, te nay venn t'mer o Debleskre menshe!”" 
Philippians3:3 Mer, kay ap o Yezous Kristeste patsah, ham čačepah o Debleskre menshe. Ap mende hi o Debleskro Dourho. Yaake nay krah o Debleskri boudi. Mer ham barhtelo pral kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge kras oun hounte rikras kek koova, hoy vella i menshendar. Mer djinah, savo koova nay anell men gar pash o Debleste." 
Philippians3:4 Me nay sharoms man ninna, te rikrom menshengro koova. Yek te sharell pes, te hi lo činlo ap peskro mass, palle nay sharoms man boudeder." 
Philippians3:5 Me vom ap miro mass činlo, har homs orhta divessa phouro. Me hom i Israelitari. Mire menshe hi Benyaminarya. Me hom i Hebreari. Oun miro dad oun miri day hi ninna Hebrearya. Oun me homs i Farisari, oun djivom pal o Moseskre lila." 
Philippians3:6 Miri tseli zoryah lom kolen palla, kay ap o Yezous Kristeste patsenna. Me krom kova lauter, hoy an o Moseskre lila činlo hi, oun kek nay anas i doosh ap mande." 
Philippians3:7 Har o Yezous Kristo miro ray vas, vas mange lauter kova či moldo, hoy mange an ko tsiro boud moldo his." 
Philippians3:8 Ava, kova lauter, hoy me ap ko tsiro patsom oun krom, hi mange kanna bouder či moldo. Me prindjrau kanna o Yezous Kristes. Yob hi miro ray. Doleske hi ko tselo vavar koova mange har čik, oun či moldo. O Yezous Kristes kokres kamau te prindjrell boudeder." 
Philippians3:9 Leske kamau te djivell. Har djivom pal o Moseskre lila kras man kova gar čačo glan o Debleste. Na-a, miro patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste kras man čačo glan o Debleste. Koon patsell ap o Yezous Kristeste, koles čivell o Devel an o čačepen." 
Philippians3:10 Kamoms te prindjrap či vavar har o Yezous Kristes oun o Debleskri zoor, kay kras les i moulendar djido. Oun me lau douka ap mande, yaake har yob douka ap peste las, te vap yaake har yob bis ap o merepen," 
Philippians3:11 te krell o Devel man ninna i moulendar djido. 
Philippians3:12 Ninna te hom gomme gar yaake har kamoms te vap, oun hom gomme gar kote, kay kamau te vap, nashau o Yezouseskro drom, te lap o djipen pash o Debleste. Koleske das man o Yezous Kristo gole." 
Philippians3:13 Mire phrala, me nay penau gomme gar mandar, te hom me yaake har me kamoms te vap. Yek nay penau: Me bistrau, hoy pal mande hi, oun rodau kova, hoy glan mande hi." 
Philippians3:14 Me nashau ap o Yezouseskro drom doureder, te lap ko shoukar koova, hoy dell o Devel kolen, kay gar pre dan. Kova hi o djipen pash leste an o bolepen. Doleske das lo men gole, te djivas o Yezous Kristeha khetne." 
Philippians3:15 Koon prindjrell kova lauter, hounte djivell yaake. Te hayvell yek t'mendar čomone vavarčandes, pale sikrell les o Devel, har kova čačo hi." 
Philippians3:16 Yek hounte kras: Kova, hoy mer djinah, yaake hounte djivas ninna." 
Philippians3:17 Mire phrala, dikenn ap mande oun ap kolende, kay djivenn yaake har me! Djivenn t'mer ninna yaake!" 
Philippians3:18 Me penom t'menge, oun penau les kanna pale i ropah: Boud menshe djivenn yaake, har te vals lenge o Yezouseskro merepen ap o troushel či moldo." 
Philippians3:19 Yon djan ap i drom, kay djan le nashedo. Lengro per hi lengro Devel. Yon sharenn ko djoungelo koova, hoy kran le, oun hounte ladjans pen pral kova. Kova, hoy an lengro shero trouyel djala, hi phoubyakro koova." 
Philippians3:20 Maro them, kay khere ham, hi o bolepen, kay o ray, o Yezous Kristo, hi. Mer dikah ap ko dives, kay vell lo pale, oun te dell lo men o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
Philippians3:21 Kanna ham menshe, kay hounte merenna. Yob krell dran mende neve menshe, kay venn yaake har yob, oun merah bouder gar. Yaake zorelo hi lo. Les hi koy zoor, te krell lo lauter, hoy yob kamella." 
Philippians4:1 Mire kamle phrala, me kamau o tselo djiyestar pash t'mende te vell. T'mer han miri barht oun miro raylepen. Doleske ačenn zoreles pash maro rayeste, o Yezouseste!" 
Philippians4:2 Me mangau t'men, t'mer phenya Evodia oun Sinticha, čingrenn bouder gar khetne! T'mer han phenya an o patsepen ap maro rayeste, o Yezouseste." 
Philippians4:3 Me mangau ninna tout, miro lačo males, ab lenge ap i rig! Har sikrom i menshenge o Yezouseskro drom, boudran le khetne mantsa oun o phraleha, o Klemens, oun kol vavarentsa, kolengre laba hi činlo an o Debleskro liil, kay halauter dren činlo hi, kay lenn o Debleskro djipen." 
Philippians4:4 Avenn barhtelo hako tsiro! T'mari barht vell o Yezousestar, maro rayestar. Ava, avenn barhtelo!" 
Philippians4:5 Sikrenn hakeneste t'maro lačepen! O ray Yezous vella an i tikno tsiro pale. 
Philippians4:6 Ma darenn či! Hako tsiro mangenn o Deblestar, hoy t'men hounte vell, oun penenn leske lauter, hoy ap t'maro dji hi! Oun parkrenn t'men pash leste!" 
Philippians4:7 Palle dell o Devel t'men peskri barht an o dji. Leskri barht hi yaake baro, kay nay hayvah kova gar. Oun o Yezous Kristo rikrell t'maro dji, oun lell t'mari daar krik." 
Philippians4:8 Pale penau t'menge, mire phrala, rakrenn pral kova, hoy lačo oun čačo hi, hoy djoudjo hi, hoy kamlo hi, hoy mishto hi pash i menshende! Ava, rakrenn pral lauter kova, hoy shoukar hi oun vell sharedo!" 
Philippians4:9 Oun djivenn yaake, har me t'menge penom oun sikrom, yaake har t'mer kova mandar shounan oun ap mande dikan! Oun o Devel, kay kras i drom, te nay djivah an o lačepen khetne, hi t'mentsa!" 
Philippians4:10 Me homs o djiyestar barhtelo, oun parkrom man pash maro rayeste, o Yezouseste, har dikom, kay t'mer bistran man gar, oun bičran man kova, hoy man hounte vell djipaske. Ninna te kaman t'mer kova i rah tsiro mange te krell, djas kova gar." 
Philippians4:11 Kova penau gar, te sikrap t'men, kay man gar doha his. Na-a. An miro djipen hayvom, te hi mange kova doha, hoy man hi." 
Philippians4:12 Me nay hom čorvelo, oun me nay hom bravelo. Kova lauter prindjrau. Me nay bokau. Oun me nay hom čalo. Me djinau har kova hi, te hi man boudeder har doha djipaske. Oun me djinau, har kova hi, te hi man gar doha djipaske." 
Philippians4:13 O Yezous Kristo dell man i zoor, te djivap yaake te yaake." 
Philippians4:14 Ninna te rakrau yaake, his kova shoukar t'mendar, kay van mange ap i rig, har djas mange gar mishto." 
Philippians4:15 T'mer patsle, kay an o foro Filipi djivenna, t'mer djinenna, har krom man ap o drom, te penap i menshenge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar, oun djom dran o them Macedonia vin. An ko tsiro dan t'mer man lauter, hoy man hounte vas djipaske. Kek vavar patsle, pash kolende homs, kran kova, har t'mer kokres." 
Philippians4:16 Ninna har homs an o foro Tessalonika, bičran t'mer mange douy kope čomone." 
Philippians4:17 Me penau kova gar, te denn mange čomone. Na-a, kamau, te denn t'mer o Debleske čomone, te sharell yob t'men." 
Philippians4:18 Kanna hi man lauter, hoy man hounte vell djipaske, oun boudeder har doha. O Epafrodito anas mange kova lauter, hoy t'mer mange bičran. Kova hi yaake, har te anans t'mer o Debleske lačo koova, hoy soungell mishto, oun kay dikell lo lačes pre oun hi barhtelo pral kova." 
Philippians4:19 Miro Devel dell ninna t'men lauter, hoy t'men hounte vell djipaske. Les hi i baro bravlepen an o bolepen. Kova dell lo kolen, kay djan ap o Yezous Kristeskro drom." 
Philippians4:20 Sharas o Debles, maro dades an o bolepen, kanna oun hako tsiro! Amen." 
Philippians4:21 Penenn ap kol tsele patslende, kay djan ap o Yezous Kristeskro drom: “Ačenn maro Debleha!” Kova penenn t'menge ninna kol phrala, kay pash mande hi, ninna i tsele patsle, kay kate an o foro Rom hi. Kolla, kay boudrenn an o kheer o baro rayestar an o foro Rom, kamenn t'men o tselo djiyestar." 
Philippians4:22  
Philippians4:23 O lačepen maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, vell pral t'mende!" 
Colossians1:1 Me, o Paulo, činau kava liil khetne maro phraleha, o Timoteo. O Yezous Kristo bičras man, te penap i menshenge leskro lab. Yaake kamell kova o Devel. Mer činah kava liil ap o Debleskre čavende an o foro Kolossa. T'mer han mare phrala oun phenya an o patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste. Lačepen oun barht t'menge! Kova dell t'men o Devel, maro dad, an o dji!" 
Colossians1:2  
Colossians1:3 Mer shounam, har t'mer patsenn ap o Yezous Kristeste, oun har t'mer i tsele patslen o djiyestar kamenna. Doleske parkrah men t'menge pash o Debleste hako tsiro, kay mangah les t'menge. Yob hi o dad maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar." 
Colossians1:4  
Colossians1:5 T'maro patsepen oun kamlepen vell dran kova, kay dikenn t'mer ap ko dives, kay djivenn t'mer o Debleha khetne an o bolepen. Kova shounan t'mer ap ko tsiro, har t'menge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar penlo vas. Oun ko lab hi čačo." 
Colossians1:6 Kava lačo lab vas gar t'menge kokres penlo. Na-a, kava lab vell ap i tseli phoub penlo. Oun boud oun boudeder menshe venna patsle. Yaake hi ninna pash t'mende: T'mer shounan ko lačo lab, oun hayvan čačepah, kay hi o Devel lačes ap t'mende." 
Colossians1:7 Kava lab penas t'menge maro kamlo phraal, o Epafras. Kova boudrella o Yezous Kristeske har mer. Yob krell peskri boudi mishto pash t'mende." 
Colossians1:8 Yob penas menge, har baro t'maro kamlepen hi, hoy das t'men o Debleskro Dourho." 
Colossians1:9 Oun har mer kova shounam, mangam o Debles t'menge, oun moukam gar tele, te mangas lestar, te dell lo an t'mende o gosvepen, hoy dell o Debleskro Dourho, te hayvenn t'mer, hoy o Devel kamella." 
Colossians1:10 Palle djivenn t'mer yaake, te vell o Devel sharedo, oun krenn lauter, hoy hi lačo oun mishto glan leskre yaka. Oun dran t'maro djipen vell boud lačo koova. Oun t'mer prindjrenn o Debles hako tsiro feteder." 
Colossians1:11 Lestar mangah, te dell lo t'men peskri bari zoor, te venn t'mare djia zoreles, te djan barhteles doureder ap leskro drom, ninna an ko tsiro, kay hi t'maro djipen pharo." 
Colossians1:12 Parkrenn t'men o tselo djiyestar pash o Debleste, kay hi t'maro dad an o bolepen! Yob kras t'men moldo, te djivenn t'mer khetne i vavar patslentsa pash leste an o bolepen, kay hi kek tamlepen." 
Colossians1:13 Yob las men vin dran i vasta kolestar, kay hi o ray pral o tamlepen oun o čilačepen, te djivas mer khetne peskro Čaveha, koles yob o djiyestar kamella. Kova hi maro ray," 
Colossians1:14 kay playsras menge peskro rateha, oun las mari doosh mendar krik." 
Colossians1:15 Kek nay dikell o Debles. Har leskro čavo ap i phoub vas, sikras yob har o Devel hi. O Yezous Kristo hi yaake har peskro dad. Oun yob hi bareder har lauter, hoy kerdo vas." 
Colossians1:16 Dran leste vas lauter kerdo, hoy hi an o bolepen oun ap i phoub, kova, hoy dikah, oun hoy gar dikah. Mank lende hi bare raya oun i zorele pralstoune oun lauter, kay hi len penepaske mashkral o bolepen oun i phoub. Lauter van dran leste, oun van leske kerdo." 
Colossians1:17 O Yezous Kristo his glan hako vavareste koy. Oun lauter, hoy koy hi, rikrell lo djides." 
Colossians1:18 Yob hi o pralstouno pral i tsele patslende. Har o Devel les i moulendar djido kras, das lo les o nevo djipen glan hako vavareste, koles o Devel neves krella. Yaake kras o Devel, kay hi o Yezous Kristo o pralstouno pral halauter, hoy koy hi." 
Colossians1:19 O Debles his an peskro dji, te djivell lo an peskro čaveste, te vell o čavo yaake har o dad." 
Colossians1:20 Oun o Yezous Kristo hi ko drom, kay o Devel oun i menshe pale mala venna. Har yob ap o troushel meras, oun peskro rat ratas, anas o Devel lauteren pash peste khetne, hoy hi an o bolepen oun ap i phoub." 
Colossians1:21 Ninna t'men anas o Devel pash peste. Glan i rah tsiro djivan t'mer dour lestar, kran čilačo koova, oun kaman o Debles gar." 
Colossians1:22 Kanna van t'mer o Debleskre mala. Har peskro čavo t'menge meras, las lo t'mari doosh t'mendar oun kras t'men djoudjo oun erligo glan leste." 
Colossians1:23 Yek koova hounte krenn t'mer: Ačenn ap o Yezouseskro drom! Patsenn zoreles ap leste! Moukenn gar tele, te dikenn ap kova, hoy t'men hi pash o Debleste! Rikrenn zoreles ap leskro lačo lab, hoy t'menge penlo vas! Ko lab vas penlo ap i tseli phoub. Ninna me, o Paulo, hounte penap ko lab i menshenge. Kova hi miri boudi." 
Colossians1:24 Oun kanna hom barhtelo an kol douka, hoy anom t'menge ap mande. Yaake har o Yezous Kristo anas douka ap peste i patslenge, yaake hounte anap me ninna douka ap mande i patslenge." 
Colossians1:25 Lengro boudepaskro vom me. O Devel das man koy boudi, te penap t'menge o tselo Debleskro lab." 
Colossians1:26 I rah tsiro djinan i menshe ap i tseli phoub gar, hoy o Devel kamas te krell. Kanna djinenn les o Debleskre menshe." 
Colossians1:27 Kolen sikras o Devel, har baro oun shoukar ko drom hi, hoy anell ninna kol menshen pash leste, kay kek bibolde hi. Oun ko drom hi o Yezous Kristo, kay djivell an t'mende. Doleske djinenn nay, te djivenn t'mer leha khetne an o bolepen." 
Colossians1:28 Oun kava Yezouseskro drom sikrah mer i menshende, oun penah hakeneske an o dji, te djal lo ap kava drom. Mer penah lenge o Debleskro lab yaake, te hayvenn le les mishto. O Devel kamella, te vell hakeno baro oun zorelo an o patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste." 
Colossians1:29 Dran kova boudrau i tseli zoryah, hoy o Yezous Kristo an mande das." 
Colossians2:1 Me kamau, te djinenn t'mer, har me marau man tele t'menge oun kol patslenge an o foro Laodicea, ninna kolenge, kay prindjrenn man gar." 
Colossians2:2 Kova krau, te venn t'mer zoreles an t'maro dji, oun rikrenn khetne an o kamlepen. Ninna kamau, te hayvenn t'mer mishto o Debleskro drom, hoy i menshe i rah tsiro gar djinan. Ko drom hi o Yezous Kristo." 
Colossians2:3 Yob kokres nay dell t'men o tselo gosvepen, te hayvenn o Debleskro lab mishto." 
Colossians2:4 Kova penau t'menge, te anell t'men kek rhorhene labentsa kava dromestar tele." 
Colossians2:5 Ninna te hom gar pash t'mende, han t'mer an miro dji. Oun me hom barhtelo, te shounau, kay han zorelo tardo an o patsepen ap o Yezous Kristeste." 
Colossians2:6 T'mer lan o rayes, o Yezous Kristes, an t'mare djia. Djivenn kanna yaake leha khetne," 
Colossians2:7 te vell t'maro patsepen yaake zorelo har i rouk, hoy zoreles an i phoub tardo hi! Ma moukenn ko čačo drom, hoy t'mende siklo vas! Bistrenn vitar gar, te parkrenn t'men boud pash o Debleste!" 
Colossians2:8 Denn yak, te shounenn ap kekeste, kay kamell te taprell t'men shoukar labentsa, hoy venna dran i menshengro gosvepen. Kova hi rhorhepen oun či moldo! Kol laba hi menshengro rakepen, hoy i phoure ap i čavende doureder penan oun vella i phoubyatar, oun gar o Yezous Kristestar." 
Colossians2:9 O Yezous Kristo hi o ray pral i tsele rayende oun lauterende, kay hi len penepaske mashkral o bolepen oun i phoub. Les hi o tselo Debleskro djipen an peste. Oun ko djipen dell lo kolende, kay leskro hi." 
Colossians2:10  
Colossians2:11 Har moukan t'maro phouro djipen pal t'mende, van t'mer o Debleskre menshe. I bibolde van činlo i vastentsa ap pengro mass. T'mer van gar činlo i vastentsa. Na-a! T'mer lan i nevo dji, hoy das t'men o Yezous Kristo." 
Colossians2:12 Har van t'mer taufedo, vas t'maro phouro djipen paskedo. Oun yaake van t'mer o Yezous Kristeha paskedo. Har t'mer ap leste patsan, kras o Devel t'men djido, yaake har yob o Yezous Kristes i moulendar djido kras." 
Colossians2:13 An o phouro tsiro, har t'mer an o čilačepen djivan, hans moulo o Debleske, oun hans gar leskre menshe. Kanna kras o Devel t'men o Yezous Kristeha djido, oun las t'mari tseli doosh t'mendar." 
Colossians2:14 Har kram čilačo koova, his kova yaake, har te vals mari doosh an i liil činlo. Ko liil las lo, oun čivas les ap o troushel." 
Colossians2:15 Oun i raya oun lauter, kolen hi penepaske mashkral o bolepen oun i phoub, kolla nashran pengri zoor, har o Yezous Kristo ap o troushel meras. Kote sikras o Devel glan lauterende, kay hi o Yezous Kristo zorleder har yon." 
Colossians2:16 Ma shounenn ap kolende, kay penenn t'menge: “Hi gar mishto, te rhan oun piyenn t'mer kava te kova!” Ma shounenn ap lende, te penenn le t'menge, te denn yak ap bare divessa an o čon oun an o bersh, ninna ap o dives, kay i bibolde gar boudrenna." 
Colossians2:17 Me penau t'menge: Kol tsele laba, kay penenn, hoy hounte krenn, oun hoy hounte krenn gar, kol laba das o Devel i bibolden glan i rah tsiro, te sikrell lo len, te vell yek dives, kay kova vella, kay hi bareder har kava tselo koova. Kova vas kanna. Yob hi o Yezous Kristo." 
Colossians2:18 Hi menshe, kay krenn pen bares, oun kamenna, te shounenn t'mer ap kava te kova, oun te sharenn t'mer o Debleskre bolepangre, har yon krenna. Ma shounenn ap lende! Ninna te penenn le t'menge, te dikan le i baro koova, hoy kek vavar dikas, ma patsenn lenge! Kova, hoy yon penenna, hi či moldo. Yon hi sharede, ninna te dell či, pral hoy yon nay sharans pen: Lauter hoy yon rakrenna vell dran lengro shero." 
Colossians2:19 Yon rikrenn pen gar ap o Yezous Kristeste, ko ray pral i tsele patslende. Yaake har i kokale i menshes khetne rikrenna, yaake rikrell yob i patslen khetne pash leste, oun dell len lauter, hoy len hounte vell djipaske. Oun yon venna baro oun zorelo an o patsepen yaake, har o Devel kova kamella." 
Colossians2:20 T'mer meran o Yezous Kristeha. Doleske hi i phoubyakro koova bouder gar o ray pral t'mende. Hoske rikrenn t'men gomme ap kol menshengre laba, kay penenn t'menge:" 
Colossians2:21 Ma taprenn kava! Ma rhan kova! Ma lenn kova an t'maro vast! 
Colossians2:22 Me penau: Ko koova hi rhapaske oun ačell gar. Kol laba hi menshengre laba. 
Colossians2:23 Ninna te vals yaake, har te vans kol laba goseve laba, hi le či moldo. Kol menshe marenn pen tele o Debleske, yaake har yon kamenna, oun gar har o Devel kova kamella. Yon shounenn ap kava te kova, oun marenn pen tele. Oun yaake krenn le kova, hoy dran lende vella oun gar o Deblestar." 
Colossians3:1 O Devel kras t'men o Yezous Kristeha i moulendar djido. Doleske čivenn t'maro dji ap kova, hoy hi an o bolepen! Kote hi o Yezous Kristo ap i čači rig o Deblestar beshdo!" 
Colossians3:2 Dikenn ap kova, hoy an o bolepen hi! Ma dikenn ap kova, hoy ap i phoub hi!" 
Colossians3:3 T'mer meran. Oun t'maro nevo djipen hi kanna o Yezous Kristeha pash o Debleste an o bolepen, ninna te dikenn kova kanna gomme gar." 
Colossians3:4 Ap ko tsiro, kay nay dikell hakeno o Yezous Kristes, dikenn le ninna t'men pash leste an leskro raylepen." 
Colossians3:5 Ma krenn bouder kova, hoy kran an t'maro phouro djipen: Ma loubrenn trouyel! Ma krenn djoungelo oun vi-ladjedo koova! Ma moukenn čilačo koova an t'maro shero trouyel te djal! Ma nashenn pal i love! Koon pal i love nashella, koleske hi peskre love har leskro devel." 
Colossians3:6 Kol menshe, kay shounenn gar ap o Debleste, kolla krenna savo koova. Doleske vell o Debleskri rholi pral lende." 
Colossians3:7 Ap ko phouro tsiro, har t'mer gar ap o Yezous Kristeste patsan, kran t'mer ninna kova lauter." 
Colossians3:8 Kanna djivenn t'mer bouder gar t'maro phouro djipen. Doleske čivenn i rholi t'mendar krik, ninna o čilačepen, o djoungelo rakepen pral o vavareste, vi-ladjede laba! Ma rhorhenn t'men!" 
Colossians3:9  
Colossians3:10 Djivenn kanna o nevo djipen! Moukenn t'men o Deblestar boud oun boudeder neves te krell, yaake te prindjrenn o Debles feteder oun djinenn, hoy yob kamella! Palle venn t'mer yaake har yob, kay t'men o nevo djipen das." 
Colossians3:11 Kote, kay o Devel i menshen neves kras, kote hi yek yaake boud moldo har o vavar: I bibolde oun kolla, kay kek bibolde hi; kolla, kay ap o mass činlo hi oun kolla, kay gar ap o mass činlo hi; vi-themarya oun divye; raya oun boudepangre. O Yezous Kristo djivell an hakeneste mendar." 
Colossians3:12 T'mer han kanna o Debleskre menshe, kolen yob peske vin rodas. Yob kamell t'men o djiyestar. Doleske hounte vell t'men i baro dji o vavareske, te vell hakeno lačo ap o vavareste, te krell pes kek bareder har o vavar, te rakrell hakeno lačes o vavareha, te dell kek o vavares sik pre," 
Colossians3:13 te rhoyrell pes kek sik pral o vavareste. Oun bistrenn ko čilačo koova, hoy i vavar ap t'mende kran! Yaake har o ray, o Yezous Kristo, t'mari doosh bistras, hounte krenn t'mer kova ninna." 
Colossians3:14 Bareder har lauter hi o kamlepen, hoy vella o Deblestar. Te kamenn t'mer i vavaren o djiyestar, palle krenn t'mer lauter, hoy o Devel t'mendar kamella, oun hoy t'men khetne rikrella." 
Colossians3:15 O Yezous Kristo das t'men pash peste gole, te djivenn lauter leha khetne. Djivenn kanna yaake, te han t'mer yek dji oun yek djipen! Oun parkrenn t'men pash o Debleste!" 
Colossians3:16 Ma moukenn tele, te rakrenn oun shounenn o lab o Yezous Kristestar! Rakrenn les t'menge an o dji! Avenn gosevo koy pashel, te sikrell yek o vavareste, har te djal lo ap o Debleskro drom! Givenn Debleskre gilya oun save gilya, hoy sharenn o Debles, ninna save gilya, hoy o Debleskro Dourho an t'mende čivella! Ava, givenn o Debleske, oun sharenn les an t'mare djia!" 
Colossians3:17 Oun lauter, hoy t'mer krenna oun penenna, kova krenn oun penenn yaake, te vell maro ray Yezous sharedo! Oun parkrenn t'men pash o Debleste, maro dadeste, lautereske, hoy o Yezous Kristo t'menge kras!" 
Colossians3:18 T'mer djouvya, ma hadenn t'men pral t'mare romende! Yaake kamell kova t'maro ray Yezous t'mendar." 
Colossians3:19 T'mer morsha, avenn kamlo ap t'mare romyende, oun gar rhoyedo!" 
Colossians3:20 T'mer čave, shounenn hako tsiro ap t'maro dadeste oun ap t'mari date! Kova kamell o ray Yezous t'mendar." 
Colossians3:21 T'mer dada, ma avenn gar yaake rhoyedo ap t'mare čaven, te darenn le t'mendar an o dji!" 
Colossians3:22 T'mer boudepangre, shounenn hako tsiro ap t'mare rayende, kolenge t'mer hounte boudrenna! Ma krenn t'mari boudi yaake, te sharenn t'men i menshe! Na-a! Boudrenn lenge o čačo djiyestar, oun yaake, har kamell o ray Yezous kova t'mendar." 
Colossians3:23 Lauter, hoy t'mer krenna, krenn kova o djiyestar o Yezouseske, maro rayeske, oun gar i menshenge!" 
Colossians3:24 Djinenn, maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, dell t'men peskro bravlepen an o bolepen. Leskre boudepangre han t'mer." 
Colossians3:25 Koon o čilačepen krella, kova lell i phagi. Pash o Debleste hi hakeno yaake boud moldo har o vavar." 
Colossians4:1 T'mer kay han raya, ap t'mende penau: Avenn čačes ap t'mare boudepangre oun djan lentsa mishto trouyel! Ma bistrenn, kay hi t'men ninna i ray an o bolepen!" 
Colossians4:2 Ma moukenn tele, te mangenn o Debles! Parkrenn t'men hako tsiro pash leste!" 
Colossians4:3 Mangenn o Debles ninna menge, te krell lo menge i drom pre, te penas nay leskro lab i menshenge, te sikras lende, te hi o Yezous Kristo ko drom, kay anell men pash o Debleste. Kova djinan i menshe i rah tsiro gar. Har me kova i menshenge penom, vom doleske an o stilepen." 
Colossians4:4 Mangenn o Deblestar, te rakrap kova yaake, har o Devel kamella!" 
Colossians4:5 Djivenn t'maro djipen yaake, te dikenn i vavar, kay t'mer patsle han! Rodenn i drom, te rakrenn lentsa pral o Debleste!" 
Colossians4:6 Rakrenn lentsa kamles, oun trashenn gar, te penenn o čačepen! Yek te poučell t'mendar čomone pral t'maro patsepen, palle rakrenn leha yaake, har kova koleske mishto hi." 
Colossians4:7 Me bičrau miro lačo phrales, o Tichiko, pash t'mende, te penell lo t'menge lauter, hoy mantsa djal. Yob boudrell mantsa o Yezouseske, maro rayeske, oun krell peskri boudi mishto. Koles bičrau pash t'mende, te djinenn t'mer, har menge djala, te venn t'mer zoreles an o dji." 
Colossians4:8  
Colossians4:9 Leha khetne bičrau miro lačo phrales, o Onesimo, kay rikrell zoreles ap o patsepen. Kova hi yek t'mendar. Kol douy penenn t'menge lauter, hoy kate djala." 
Colossians4:10 O Aristarko, kay mantsa an o stilepen hi, penell t'menge “Ačenn o Debleha!” Ninna o Marko oun ko Yosua, kay ninna Yusto kharella, penenn t'menge “Ačenn o Debleha!” O Marko hi o kakeskro čavo o Barnabestar. Te vell lo pash t'mende, lenn les kamles pre, har penom t'menge glan i tsiro! Kolla triin morsha hi bibolde, kay ap o Yezous Kristeste patsenna. I tsele biboldendar, kay kate hi, krenna kol triin kokres mantsa khetne o Debleskri boudi. Yon dan man zoor an miro dji." 
Colossians4:10 O Aristarko, kay mantsa an o stilepen hi, penell t'menge “Ačenn o Debleha!” Ninna o Marko oun ko Yosua, kay ninna Yusto kharella, penenn t'menge “Ačenn o Debleha!” O Marko hi o kakeskro čavo o Barnabestar. Te vell lo pash t'mende, lenn les kamles pre, har penom t'menge glan i tsiro! Kolla triin morsha hi bibolde, kay ap o Yezous Kristeste patsenna. I tsele biboldendar, kay kate hi, krenna kol triin kokres mantsa khetne o Debleskri boudi. Yon dan man zoor an miro dji." 
Colossians4:11  
Colossians4:12 Ninna o Epafras penell t'menge: “Ačenn o Debleha!” Kova hi yek t'mendar, oun boudrell o Yezous Kristeske. Yob mangell o Debles hako tsiro t'menge, te venn t'mer zoreles an o patsepen, te djinenn lauter, hoy o Devel t'mendar kamella oun te krenn kova ninna." 
Colossians4:13 Me nay penau, har boud yob o Deblestar mangas t'menge oun kol patslenge an i forya Laodicea oun Hierapolis." 
Colossians4:14 Ninna o Louka oun o Demas penenn t'menge: “Ačenn o Debleha!” O Louka hi ko dramaskro, koles mer lauter o djiyestar kamah." 
Colossians4:15 Penenn i patslenge an o foro Laodicea mendar: “Ačenn o Debleha!” Penenn kova ninna i Nimfa, oun kol tsele patslenge, kay venn khetne an lakro kheer!" 
Colossians4:16 T'mer te draveran kava liil, palle denn les ninna i patslende, kay venn khetne an o foro Laodicea. Oun draverenn ninna ko liil, hoy činom kolenge!" 
Colossians4:17 Penenn ap o Arkippo: Kre koy boudi, hoy o ray Yezous tout das! Mouk gar tele!" 
Colossians4:18 Me, o Paulo, činau t'menge miro vasteha kal laba: “Ačenn o Debleha!” Ma bistrenn man, kay hom an o stilepen! O Debleskro lačepen djal t'mentsa!" 
1Thessalonians1:1 Mer, o Paulo, o Silvano oun o Timoteo, činah kava liil ap t'mende, kol patslende, kay venna khetne an o foro Tessalonika. T'mer patsenn ap o Debleste, maro dadeste, oun ap maro rayeste, o Yezous Kristeste. Lačepen oun barht t'menge!" 
1Thessalonians1:2 Hako tsiro, kay mangah o Debles, parkrah men t'menge pash leste, maro dadeste." 
1Thessalonians1:3 Hako tsiro, kay parkrah men pash leste, vell menge kova an o shero, hoy t'mer leske krenna an o patsepen oun an o kamlepen ap i menshende, oun har t'mer moukenn gar tele, te dikenn ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, pale." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Mire phrala, o Devel kamell t'men o djiyestar. Mer djinah, yob rodas t'men vin, te djivenn leha khetne." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Har vam pash t'mende, oun penam t'menge o Debleskro lačo lab, koy penam gar leskro lab kokres, na-a, koy dikan t'mer ninna o Debleskri zoor an halauter, hoy yob mashkral t'mende kras. Oun o Debleskro Dourho rakras ap t'mende, oun t'mer hayvan, leskro lab hi čačo. Ninna djinenn t'mer, har djivam maro djipen pash t'mende, oun sikram t'men o Debleskro drom." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Oun kova, hoy dikan t'mer ap mende, kova krenn t'mer kanna ninna, oun djivenn yaake, har o ray Yezous djivas. Har shounan t'mer o Debleskro lab, patsan les oun hans barhtelo pral kova, ninna te kran i menshe t'menge o djipen phares. Koy barht das o Debleskro Dourho an t'mende." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Kanna dikenn kol tsele patsle an i themma Macedonia oun Akaya ap t'mende, oun kamenn kova yaake te krell, har t'mer kova krenna." 
1Thessalonians1:8 T'mendar djas o lačo lab o Yezousestar, maro rayestar, doureder, gar kokres an i themma Macedonia oun Akaya. Na-a, ninna an boud vavar themma shounan i menshe, har t'mer patsenn ap o Debleste. Yaake hounte penas mer lenge bouder či pral kova." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Yon hi kolla, kay penenn i vavarenge, har lan t'mer men pash t'mende pre, har moukan t'maro phouro drom, te djan ap o Debleskro drom, oun mangenn bouder gar vavar koova an har o djido oun čačo Debles kokres." 
1Thessalonians1:10 T'mer dikenn ap ko dives, kay vell o Debleskro čavo dran o bolepen pale. Kova hi o Yezous, koles kras o Devel i moulendar djido. Yob lell men dran o Debleskri rholi vin, hoy pral i menshende vella." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Mire phrala, t'mer djinenna, har vam pash t'mende, oun penam t'menge o Debleskro lab. Kova his gar čičeske." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Glan ko tsiro, kay vam pash t'mende, hams an o foro Filipi. Ninna te vam kote palla lino oun dino, har t'mer djinenn, djam pal kova pash t'mende an o foro Tessalonika. O Devel das men i zoor, te penas t'menge o Debleskro lačo lab, ninna te his pash t'mende boud menshe, kay kran menge o djipen phares." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Yaake nay dikenn t'mer, kova, hoy t'menge penam, vas gar dran i čilačo dji, oun hi kek rhorhepen. Vitar gar kamam t'men goseve labentsa te taprell." 
1Thessalonians2:4 Na-a, o Debleske ham moldo, te das lo men koy boudi, te sikras mer i menshende o Yezouseskro drom. Doleske rakrah mer lestar. Kova krah gar, te dikenn i menshe lačes ap mende, na-a, mer kamah, te dikell o Devel lačes ap mende. Yob djinella, hoy an maro dji hi." 
1Thessalonians2:5 T'mer djinenna, mer rakram t'menge gar pal o mouy. Vitar gar penam o Debleskro lab, te las love i menshendar. O Devel djinella, me penau o čačepen." 
1Thessalonians2:6 Mer rodam gar o sharepen i menshendar, gar t'mendar, vitar gar i vavarendar." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Mer ham o Yezous Kristeskre bičepangre oun nay penams t'menge zoreles, hoy te krenn. Kova kram gar. Na-a, mer hams kamlo ap t'mende, har i day ap peskre čavende." 
1Thessalonians2:8 T'mer hans an mare djia, oun doleske sikram t'mende gar kokres o Debleskro drom, na-a, mer djivam ninna t'mentsa khetne; yaake baro his maro kamlepen t'menge." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Mire phrala, t'mer djinenna, har phari mari boudi his, har hams pash t'mende, oun sikram t'mende o Debleskro drom. Ap o dives oun an i rat boudram, te djivas gar dran t'mari possita." 
1Thessalonians2:10 O Devel dikas, har djivam mashkral t'mende. Oun t'mer, kay ap leste patsenna, dikan ninna, te djivam yaake pash t'mende har o Devel kamella, oun djam pal o čačepen, te hatsas kek i doosh ap mende." 
1Thessalonians2:11 T'mer djinenna, mer rakram t'mentsa har i dad peskre čaventsa. Hakenes t'mendar rakram an o dji lače oun zorele labentsa, te djivenn t'mer yaake, te vell o Devel sharedo. Yob das t'men gole, te djivenn pash leste an o bolepen oun lenn leskro raylepen." 
1Thessalonians2:12  
1Thessalonians2:13 Doleske moukah gar tele, te parkras men pash o Debleste, te patsan t'mer o Debleskro lab, hoy t'menge penam. Oun t'mer hayvan, ko lab vell čačepah o Deblestar oun gar i menshendar. Oun t'maro djipen sikrella, te patsenn t'mer ap ko lab." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Mire phrala, t'mare menshe lan t'men palla. Yaake djas t'menge har kol patsle biboldenge an o them Youdea. Lengre menshe, i bibolde, lan len ninna palla." 
1Thessalonians2:15 I bibolde maran o Yezous Kristes. Glan leste maran le o Debleskre rakepangren. Men lan le ninna palla. Yon rhoyrenn o Debles. Oun ap i tsele menshende hi yon čilačo. 
1Thessalonians2:16 Yon moukenn men gar, te penas mer o lačo lab i vavarenge, kay kek bibolde hi, te nay venn kolla ninna ap o Debleskro drom. Yaake vas i biboldengri doosh yaake baro, bareder djal gar. Oun o Debleskri rholi vas zoreles pral lende." 
1Thessalonians2:17 Mire phrala, ninna te dikam men nay i tsiro gar, hams hako tsiro pash t'mende maro djiyeha. Maro dji nashell pal t'mende, oun mer kram lauter, te dikas t'men." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Me, o Paulo, kamom boudeder kope pash t'mende te vell. Oun o beng vas hako kopo koy mashkral." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Mer ham barhtelo pral t'mende. Oun mer dikah ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray Yezous pale. Palle nay sharah men t'mentsa." 
1Thessalonians2:20 T'mer han maro raylepen oun mari barht. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Mer rikram bouder gar vin, te shounam bouder či t'mendar. Doleske penam menge, hi mishto, te ačap me, o Paulo, kate an o foro Athen, khetne maro phraleha, o Silvano," 
1Thessalonians3:2 oun te djal maro phraal, o Timoteo, pash t'mende. Kova hi o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay penell i menshenge o lačo lab o Yezous Kristestar. Mer bičram les pash t'mende, te krell lo t'men zoreles an o dji oun an t'maro patsepen," 
1Thessalonians3:3 te moukell kek t'mendar peskro patsepen, ninna te vell lo palla lino. Djinenn, kava pharo drom hi o Debleskro drom menge, oun mer vah palla lino." 
1Thessalonians3:4 Kova penam t'menge, har pash t'mende hams. Oun t'mer dikan, kova vas yaake." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Doleske rikrom kova bouder gar vin, oun bičrom o Timotes pash t'mende, te nay penell lo mange, har han tardo an t'maro patsepen. Man his traash, te anals t'men o beng o Debleskro dromestar tele. Palle vals mari boudi pash t'mende čičeske." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kanna vas o Timoteo pale, oun penas lačo koova pral t'maro patsepen oun kamlepen. Lestar djinah, mer ham hako tsiro an t'maro dji. Oun t'mer kamenn men pale te dikell, yaake har kamah mer t'men pale te dikell." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Mire phrala, kal lače laba kran mare djia barhtelo. T'maro patsepen das men nevi zoor an maro pharo djipen. An i daar lam pale i nevi zoor, har dikam, te rikrenn t'men ap o rayeste, o Yezouseste." 
1Thessalonians3:8  
1Thessalonians3:9 Mer nay parkrah men gar doha pash o Debleste, yaake barhtelo kran t'mer men." 
1Thessalonians3:10 Ap o dives oun an i rati mangah o Debles o tselo djiyestar, te dikas t'men pale, te nay kras t'maro patsepen gomme zorleder. Me kamoms o tselo djiyestar, te anell man o Devel, maro dad, oun o Yezous, maro ray, pash t'mende." 
1Thessalonians3:11  
1Thessalonians3:12 T'menge mangau me maro rayestar, o Yezousestar, te vell t'maro kamlepen baro oun bareder mashkral t'mende oun i vavar menshenge ninna. Yaake baro hi ninna maro kamlepen t'menge." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Palle venn t'mare djia zorelo oun djoudjo. Oun o Devel, maro dad, hatsell kek doosh ap t'mende ap ko dives, kay vell o Yezous, maro ray, pale lauterentsa, kay leskre hi." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Mire phrala, mer sikram t'mende, har te djivenn t'maro djipen yaake, te vell o Devel barhtelo pral t'mende. Oun kova krenn t'mer. Kanna mangah t'men yaake har maro ray, o Yezous, mangals t'mendar: Krenn kova gomme boudeder oun feteder!" 
1Thessalonians4:2 T'mer djinenna, hoy yob t'mendar kamella. Mer penam les t'menge." 
1Thessalonians4:3 O Devel kamell, te djivenn t'mer i djoudjo djipen, te sovell kek rom i djouvyah khetne, kay hi gar peskri romni, oun kek djouvel i morsheha, kay hi gar peskro rom." 
1Thessalonians4:4 Hako morsh hounte djivell peskri romyah yaake khetne, har glan o Debleste mishto hi. Yob hounte dikell gar ap late, har te vals li či moldo." 
1Thessalonians4:5 I rhanč hounte rhal les gar pre, har kova hi pash i menshende, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar." 
1Thessalonians4:6 Kek hounte rhorhell peskro phrales. Koon kova krella, koles dell o Devel i phagi. Yaake penam t'menge, oun dam t'men trad." 
1Thessalonians4:7 O Devel das men gole, te djivas i djoudjo djipen. Yob das men gar gole, te kras djoungelo koova." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Koon kamell kol laba gar te shounell, kova čivell o Debles ap i rig, oun gar i menshes. Oun o Devel hi kova, kay das peskro Dourho an t'mende." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Me hounte činap t'menge gar, te vell t'men i baro dji i patslenge. O Devel penas t'menge kova an o dji." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Oun t'mer krenn o lačepen ap i patslende an o tselo them Macedonia. Mire phrala, moukenn gar tele, te krenn kova boudeder oun feteder!" 
1Thessalonians4:11 Djivenn t'maro djipen yaake, te nay rakrenn i menshe gar djoungeles pral t'mende! Krenn t'mari boudi! Boudrenn yaake, te vell t'men doha djipaske, yaake har t'menge penam!" 
1Thessalonians4:12 Palle hounte lenn t'mer či kolendar, kay hi gar patslo. Oun yon rakrenn nay gar čilačes pral t'mende." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Mire phrala, mer kamah, te djinenn t'mer, hoy hi kol patslentsa, kay meran, te vell t'menge gar ropaske har kolenge, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar oun djinenn gar, hoy pal o merepen vella." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Mer patsah, te meras o Yezous oun stas i moulendar pale pre. Doleske djinah ninna, ap ko dives, kay vell o Yezous pale, anell o Devel ninna kolen khetne leha, kay an o patsepen meran." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Mer penah t'menge, hoy o ray Yezous menge penas. Mer, kay ham gomme djido ap ko dives, kay vell o Yezous pale, vah gar sikeder pash leste har kolla, kay meran." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray Yezous tele dran o bolepen, shounah, har yek gole della. O Debleskro pralstouno bolepaskro dell bari gole, oun yek phourdell an o Debleskri bashepaskri. Palle stenn kol moule pre, kay patsan ap o Yezous Kristeste." 
1Thessalonians4:17 Palle vah mer, kay ham gomme djido, lentsa khetne pre hadedo oun ap i volke pash o rayeste, o Yezouseste, an o bolepen anlo. Oun pash leste ačah hako tsiro." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Te dell yek o vavareste zoor kal labentsa! 
1Thessalonians5:1 Mire phrala, mer hounte činas t'menge či pral ko tsiro, kay kova lauter vella." 
1Thessalonians5:2 T'mer djinenna, o ray Yezous vella har i čorepaskro an i rati." 
1Thessalonians5:3 Te penenn i menshe: “Lauter hi mishto, kek kourepen hi kay, oun men hounte vell kek daar”, palle vell i bibarht pral lende, oun yon nay nashenn gar krik. Koy bibarht vell pral lende yaake sik, har i douka venn pral i djouvyate, kay lell i ternepen." 
1Thessalonians5:4 T'mer, kamle phrala, ma djivenn yaake har an i kali rat har kolla, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar! Palle vell ko dives gar pral t'mende har i čorepaskro an i rat." 
1Thessalonians5:5 T'mer lauter djan ap o čačo drom, oun djivenn gar an o čilačepen. Kova hi har te djivenn ap o dives, oun gar an i rat." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Doleske, te sovas mer gar har i vavar, te rikras mare yaka pre, oun te das yak har djivah!" 
1Thessalonians5:7 Koon sovella, sovell an i rat. Oun koon kamell pes mato te piyell, krell kova ninna an i rati." 
1Thessalonians5:8 Mer djivah ap o dives. Doleske das yak, har te djivas! Yaake har i kourepaskro rivell i sasterno gad ap peste, te nay doukrell les kek, yaake rivas mer o patsepen oun o kamlepen ap mende har i ripen. I kourepaskro čivell ninna i sasterni stadi ap peskro shero, te doukrell les kek ap leskro shero. Yaake nay doukrell men kek, te dikah mer ap o Yezous Kristeste, oun djinah zoreles, te lell men o Yezous Kristo dran o čilačepen oun o merepen vin." 
1Thessalonians5:9 O Devel kamell gar, te vell leskri rholi pral mende. Na-a, yob kamell, te dell men maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, o Debleskro djipen." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Kova meras menge, te djivas leha khetne, mer, kay gomme djido ham, oun ninna kolla, kay meran." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Dran kova, rakrenn kal laba yek ap o vavareste, te dell yek o vavares zoor, yaake har t'mer kova ninna krenna!" 
1Thessalonians5:12 Mire phrala, mer mangah t'men: Shounenn ap t'mare pralstunende, kay boudrenn mashkral t'mende! O Devel čivas len an pengri boudi, te sikrenn le t'men, hoy yob kamella!" 
1Thessalonians5:13 Yon krenn o Debleskri boudi. Avenn lačes oun kamles ap lende! Oun moukenn kek čingepen mashkral t'mende te vell! 
1Thessalonians5:14 Mire phrala, kanna penah t'menge, hoy te krenn: Denn kolen trad, kay kamenn gar te boudrell! Rakrenn kolentsa mishto, kay hi dareno! Krenn kolen zoreles, kay hi gar zorelo an o patsepen! Denn kekes sik pre!" 
1Thessalonians5:15 Ma avenn čilačo ap kolende, kay čilačo ap t'mende van! Moukenn gar tele, te venn lačes ap hakeneste mashkral t'mende, ninna ap i tsele vavar menshende!" 
1Thessalonians5:16 Avenn barhtelo hako tsiro! 
1Thessalonians5:17 Mangenn o Debles hako tsiro! 
1Thessalonians5:18 Parkrenn t'men pash leste pral halauter! Kova kamell o Devel lauterendar, kay djan ap o Yezouseskro drom." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Moukenn o Debleskro Dourho mashkral t'mende te boudrell! 
1Thessalonians5:20 Shounenn ap kol laba, hoy o Devel i patsleske an o dji čivas!" 
1Thessalonians5:21 Denn yak, te vell ko lab, hoy yob penas, čačepah o Deblestar! Oun rikrenn kova, hoy mishto hi!" 
1Thessalonians5:22 Rikrenn t'men pale dran hako čilačo koova! 
1Thessalonians5:23 O Devel kras i drom, te vas pash leste. Lestar mangau, te krell lo t'maro tselo djipen djoudjo glan leste, te rikrell lo t'men an peskre vasta, yaake te hatsell lo kek doosh ap t'mende ap ko dives, kay vell maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, pale." 
1Thessalonians5:24 O Devel das t'men pash peste gole, yob moukell t'men gar, oun krell kova, hoy yob penas." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Mire phrala, mangenn lestar ninna menge!" 
1Thessalonians5:26 Penenn i tsele patslenge mendar: “Ačenn o Debleha!” Oun denn len i čoum! 
1Thessalonians5:27 Me penau t'menge zoreles an o lab maro rayestar, o Yezousestar: Draverenn kava liil glan i tsele patslende!" 
1Thessalonians5:28 O lačepen maro rayestar, o Yezous Kristestar, djal t'mentsa!" 
2Thessalonians1:1 Mer, o Paulo, o Silvano oun o Timoteo, činah kava liil ap t'mende, kol patslende, kay venna khetne an o foro Tessalonika. T'mer patsenn ap o Debleste, maro dadeste, oun ap maro rayeste, o Yezous Kristeste." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Lačepen oun barht t'menge! Kova dell t'men o Devel, maro dad, oun maro ray, o Yezous Kristo." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Mire phrala, mer hounte parkras men t'menge pash o Debleste hako tsiro, yaake boud lačepen shounam t'mendar. T'maro patsepen vell baro oun bareder. Oun pash t'mende lauterende vell o kamlepen bareder, kay yek o vavareske hi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Mer sharah men t'mentsa pash i patslende, kay venn khetne an o Debleskro lab an i vavar forya, oun penah lenge, hoy t'mer lauter ap t'mende lenna, oun te moukenn gar t'maro patsepen, ninna te lenn le t'men palla oun krenn t'maro djipen phares."
