Kol sikepangre denn o Yezouses, maro rayes, bourhoste, kay playsras peskro rateha lenge, te lell lo len dran o čilačepen vin. Yon nashenn an pengri bibarht." 
2Peter2:2 Boud vavar dikenn lengro vi-ladjedo djipen, oun krenn yaake har yon, oun djivenn ninna i vi-ladjedo djipen. Doleske rakrenn kolla, kay gar patslo hi, djoungeles pral o Debleskro drom." 
2Peter2:3 Kol rhorhene sikepangre kamenn t'men rhorhene labentsa ap pengri rig te anell, te lenn le love t'mendar. O Debleskri rholi vell čačepah pral lende, oun lengri bibarht vella sik." 
2Peter2:4 O Debleskri rholi vas ninna pral kol bolepangre, kay kran o čilačepen. O Devel vitsras len an o telstunepen. Kote hi le pandlo an i kali rat, bis te vell ko dives, kay dell lo len lengri phagi." 
2Peter2:5 Oun o Debleskri rholi vas pral kol menshende, kay djivan an ko tsiro, kay o Noah djivas. Yon kaman o Deblestar či te djinell, oun shounan gar ap o Noah, har yob lenge penas, te hounte djan le ap o Debleskro drom. Oun o Devel bičras o baro pani pral lende. O Noah kokres oun efta vavar tassan gar." 
2Peter2:6 Oun o Debleskri rholi vas pral kol forya Sodom oun Gomorra. Oun yob rhačras kol forya yaake te ačas či har barra oun yagakri čik. Yaake sikras yob kolende, kay pal lende venna, hoy djal kolentsa, kay gar ap leste shounenna." 
2Peter2:7 O Lot kokres vas vin lino dran o foro Sodom, har i yag tele peras. Yob djivas yaake, har o Devel kamas. Oun leske doukas ko djoungelo djipen, hoy kol čilače menshe djivan." 
2Peter2:8 Hako dives dikas oun shounas lo, hoy yon čilačes kran. Oun lengro čilačo koova doukras les an leskro dji." 
2Peter2:9 O Devel, maro ray, hayvell garda te dell ap kolende, kay les kamenna, te perenn le gar o čačo dromestar tele. Yob hayvell ninna kol čilačen pandlo te rikrell, te lenn le pengri phagi ap ko dives, kay vell o čačepen vi-rakedo pral i tsele menshende." 
2Peter2:10 Palle vell i phagi zoreles pral kolende, kay djivan i foullo djipen, oun kaman kek rayes pral pende. Kolla rhorhene sikepangre hi pre-phourdo, oun krenn pen bares. Yon darenn gar, te rakrenn le djoungeles pral kolende, kay hi an o bolepen." 
2Peter2:11 I bolepangre hi zorleder har kol rhorhene sikepangre. Oun yon praasenn i rhorhene sikepangren gar glan o Debleste. 
2Peter2:12 Kol rhorhene sikepangre rakrenn djoungeles pral kova, hoy yon gar prindjrenna. Yon hi har divye firhe, kay venn boldo, te venn le tapedo oun maredo. Yaake merenn yon ninna." 
2Peter2:13 Yon kran čilačepen, oun čilačepen vell pral lende. Yon rhan pen nasselo, oun piyenn pen mato ninna ap o dives. Lenge hounte ladjenn t'men, te rhan le pen pash t'mende čalo, oun rakrenn lengro rhorhepen." 
2Peter2:14 An lengre yaka dikeh, kay dikenn le pal haki djouvyate. Hako tsiro hi len bok pal čilačo koova. Oun yon anenn kolen o čačo dromestar tele, kay hi gar zorelo an o patsepen. Lengro dji hi pherdi bok pal i love. Praasedo hi le!" 
2Peter2:15 O čačo drom moukan le, oun nashran pen. Yon djan ap ko čilačo drom, kay djas ninna o Bileam, – leskro dad hi o Beor. O Bileam kamas i čilačo koova te krell, te lell lo love." 
2Peter2:16 Koy rakras leha leskri esla har i mensho. Yaake vas leske siklo, har čilačo kova his, hoy kamas lo te krell. Oun koy esla rikras les pale, te krell yob kek dinelo koova." 
2Peter2:17 Kol menshe hi har i brounna, kay hi kek pani dren. Yon hi har o bolepen, kay dell kek brishin. Ap ko dives, kay lenn yon pengri phagi, venn le an i kali rat vitsedo." 
2Peter2:18 Yon rakrenn bare laba, kay či moldo hi. Lengro vi-ladjedo djipen tserdell kolen ap o čilačo drom, kay dan glan i tikno tsiro pengro phouro djipen pre." 
2Peter2:19 Kolenge penenn le, te nay krenn yon, hoy yon kamenna. Kol rhorhene sikepangre hi pandlo ap o čilačepen, hoy krell lengro djipen paash. I mensho hi pandlo ap kova, hoy zorleder hi har yob." 
2Peter2:20 Yon hayvan, kay maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, lenge meras, oun dan pengro phouro djipen pre. Oun palle van le ap ko djoungelo drom pale. Kanna hi lengro djipen djoungleder har glan ko tsiro." 
2Peter2:21 Yon prindjran o čačo drom, oun moukan les. Yon kamenn bouder či te shounell o Debleskro lab, hoy lenge penlo vas. Lenge vals feteder, te djinans yon o Debleskro drom gar." 
2Peter2:22 Kol menshenge djal yaake, har penlo vell: “Ko djouklo rhal pale kova, hoy yob vin čadas. Oun ko balo vitsrell pes pal o thopen pale an i čik.”" 
2Peter3:1 Lače phrala oun phenya, kava hi o douyto liil, hoy me t'menge činau. Kalla lila činau, te venn t'mer gar khino an t'maro patsepen. Ma bistrenn," 
2Peter3:2 hoy penan o Debleskre rakepangre glan i rah tsiro! Bistrenn vitar gar kol laba, hoy t'menge kolla penan, kolen maro ray Yezous pash t'mende bičras, – yob, kay las men dran o čilačepen vin." 
2Peter3:3 Me kamau, te djinenn t'mer, glan ko tsiro, kay o Yezous Kristo pale vella, venna menshe pash t'mende, kay san pral t'maro patsepen. Kolla djivenn yaake har yon kamenna," 
2Peter3:4 oun penenn ap t'mende: “Kay hi t'maro Yezous? Yob penas, kay yob pale vella. Mare phoure meran, oun lauter ačas yaake har his, har i phoub kerdo vas.”" 
2Peter3:5 Kol menshe kamenn gar te hayvell, kay kras o Devel o bolepen oun i phoub glan i rah tsiro. Yaake har yob penas, djas i phoub vin dran o pani oun ačas ap yek rig čiddo, oun o pani ap i vavar rig." 
2Peter3:6 Koy phouri phoub djas tele an o baro pani. 
2Peter3:7 Pral o bolepen oun i phoub, hoy kanna kay hi, penas o Devel, te ačenn le yaake rah, bis te venn le rhačedo an i yag. Yon ačenn yaake rah tardo, bis te vell ko dives, kay vell o Debleskri rholi pral i menshende ap kay phoub, oun yob kolen i phagi della, kay gar ap leste shounan." 
2Peter3:8 Lače phrala oun phenya, yek koova hounte djinenn t'mer: Pash o Debleste hi yek dives har i zero bersha, oun i zero bersha hi har yek dives." 
2Peter3:9 Hi menshe, kay penenna: “O ray Yezous lell pes boud tsiro, te vell lo pale.” Kova hi gar čačo. Les hi i baro dji t'menge, oun kamell, te djal kek t'mendar nashedo. Yob kamella, te moukell hakeno peskro čilačo drom oun vell ap o Debleskro drom." 
2Peter3:10 Kek djinell o dives, kay maro ray Yezous pale vella. Ko dives vella yaake har i dre-phagepaskro vella. Palle djal o bolepen krik bari golyah. I bolepangre momlia rhačrenna krik. Ninna i phoub oun ko tselo koova, hoy ap i phoub hi, rhačrella pre." 
2Peter3:11 Mer djinah, kay lauter yaake paash djala. Doleske hounte kras mer lauter, te ačas o Debleha, oun djivas yaake, har yob kamella." 
2Peter3:12 Djivenn yaake, te vell o Debleskro baro dives sikeder! Ap ko dives rhačrell o bolepen pre, oun djal paash an i yag. Oun i bolepangre momlia rhačrenna ninna pre." 
2Peter3:13 Mende das o Devel peskro lab, te krell lo i nevo bolepen oun i nevi phoub. Kote della bouder kek čilačepen. Ap kova dikah mer." 
2Peter3:14 Lače phrala oun phenya, t'mer kamenna, te vell ko dives sik. Doleske krenn lauter, te vell či mank t'mende oun o Debleste tardo! Djivenn yaake, te hi t'men i djoudjo dji, oun te hatsell o Devel kek doosh ap t'mende ap ko dives, kay venna glan leste tardo!" 
2Peter3:15 Dikenn, te vell maro ray Yezous gar yaake sik pale, krell lo kova, te dell lo i menshen gomme i tsiro, te venn le pash leste. Kova činas t'menge ninna maro kamlo phraal Paulo, koles o Devel boud gosvepen das." 
2Peter3:16 Pral ko koova činell lo an peskre tsele lila. Koy hi ninna laba dren činlo, hoy hi pharo te hayvell. Oun kol menshe, kay hayvenn kova gar, kolengro patsepen gar zorelo hi, kolla rissrenn kol laba trouyel, yaake har yon ninna krenna kol vavar Debleskre labentsa, hoy činlo hi. Oun yaake djan le nashedo." 
2Peter3:17 Lače phrala oun phenya, kanna djinenn t'mer, kay čilače menshe venna, kay shounenn gar ap o Debleste. Doleske denn garda, te patsenn gar o rhorhepen, hoy yon rakrenna! Ma djan lentsa, te perenn t'mer gar o čačo dromestar tele! Ačenn zoreles an o patsepen tardo!" 
2Peter3:18 Djivenn boud oun boudeder dran o lačepen, hoy maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, t'men della! Yob las men vin dran o čilačepen. Prindjrenn les boud oun boudeder! Sharedo vell yob kanna oun hako tsiro. Amen." 
1John1:1 Mer činah t'menge pral koleste, kay his hako tsiro koy. Mer shounam les, oun dikam les. Ava, mer dikam les mare yakentsa, oun tapram les mare vastentsa. Yob hi ko lab, hoy o djipen della." 
1John1:1 Mer činah t'menge pral koleste, kay his hako tsiro koy. Mer shounam les, oun dikam les. Ava, mer dikam les mare yakentsa, oun tapram les mare vastentsa. Yob hi ko lab, hoy o djipen della." 
1John1:2 Ava, ko djipen vas pash mende, oun sikras pes mende. Mer dikam les. Doleske rakrah mer kolestar, kay dikam oun shounam. Oun mer penah t'menge, koon ko djipen della, hoy gar pre-herella. Kova his pash peskro dadeste an o bolepen, oun vas pash mende." 
1John1:2 Ava, ko djipen vas pash mende, oun sikras pes mende. Mer dikam les. Doleske rakrah mer kolestar, kay dikam oun shounam. Oun mer penah t'menge, koon ko djipen della, hoy gar pre-herella. Kova his pash peskro dadeste an o bolepen, oun vas pash mende." 
1John1:3 Kova, hoy mer dikam oun shounam, penah mer t'menge, te nay vas mer t'mentsa khetne an o čačepen. Oun čačepah, mer ham khetne o Debleha, kay hi maro dad an o bolepen, oun leskro čaveha, o Yezous Kristeha." 
1John1:3 Kova, hoy mer dikam oun shounam, penah mer t'menge, te nay vas mer t'mentsa khetne an o čačepen. Oun čačepah, mer ham khetne o Debleha, kay hi maro dad an o bolepen, oun leskro čaveha, o Yezous Kristeha." 
1John1:4 Kova lauter činah t'menge, te venn mare djia oun t'mare djia pherdo barht." 
1John1:4 Kova lauter činah t'menge, te venn mare djia oun t'mare djia pherdo barht." 
1John1:5 Kova, hoy t'menge penah, shounam o Yezous Kristestar. Lestar shounam, kay hi lauter lačepen an o Debleste. Oun kek čilačepen hi an leste. O Devel hi har o dives oun kek tamlepen hi an leste." 
1John1:5 Kova, hoy t'menge penah, shounam o Yezous Kristestar. Lestar shounam, kay hi lauter lačepen an o Debleste. Oun kek čilačepen hi an leste. O Devel hi har o dives oun kek tamlepen hi an leste." 
1John1:6 Mer te penah, te ham khetne o Debleha, oun djivah an o čilačepen, palle ham rhorhene, oun djivah gar pal o čačepen." 
1John1:6 Mer te penah, te ham khetne o Debleha, oun djivah an o čilačepen, palle ham rhorhene, oun djivah gar pal o čačepen." 
1John1:7 Mer te djivah khetne o Debleha an o čačepen, yaake har o Devel an o čačepen tardo hi, palle nay ham mer ninna lauter khetne an o čačepen. Oun o rat leskro čavestar thovell mari tseli doosh mendar tele." 
1John1:7 Mer te djivah khetne o Debleha an o čačepen, yaake har o Devel an o čačepen tardo hi, palle nay ham mer ninna lauter khetne an o čačepen. Oun o rat leskro čavestar thovell mari tseli doosh mendar tele." 
1John1:8 Mer te penah: “Men hi kek doosh an maro djipen”, yaake rhorhah men kokres, oun mer ham gar an o čačepen tardo." 
1John1:8 Mer te penah: “Men hi kek doosh an maro djipen”, yaake rhorhah men kokres, oun mer ham gar an o čačepen tardo." 
1John1:9 Mer te mangah men tele glan o Debleste, oun penah leske, havi doosh mer ap mende lam, palle krell lo, hoy yob penas oun lell i doosh mendar krik. Yob hi lačo oun čačo oun thovell o tselo čilačepen mendar tele." 
1John1:9 Mer te mangah men tele glan o Debleste, oun penah leske, havi doosh mer ap mende lam, palle krell lo, hoy yob penas oun lell i doosh mendar krik. Yob hi lačo oun čačo oun thovell o tselo čilačepen mendar tele." 
1John1:10 Mer te penah, kay lam kek doosh ap mende, palle krah, har te vals o Devel i rhorheno. Oun mer djivah gar pal leskro lab." 
1John1:10 Mer te penah, kay lam kek doosh ap mende, palle krah, har te vals o Devel i rhorheno. Oun mer djivah gar pal leskro lab." 
1John2:1 Mire čave, me činau t'menge kova, te krenn t'mer kek čilačepen! Oun yek te kras i čilačo koova, yaake hi men i rakepaskro, kay vell ap mari rig oun rakrell mishto menge pash maro dadeste an o bolepen. Kova hi o Yezous Kristo, kay an o čačepen glan o Debleste tardo hi." 
1John2:1 Mire čave, me činau t'menge kova, te krenn t'mer kek čilačepen! Oun yek te kras i čilačo koova, yaake hi men i rakepaskro, kay vell ap mari rig oun rakrell mishto menge pash maro dadeste an o bolepen. Kova hi o Yezous Kristo, kay an o čačepen glan o Debleste tardo hi." 
1John2:2 Yob kokres las mari doosh mendar, oun las lat ap peste, har yob menge ap o troushel meras. Gar mari doosh kokres las lo ap peste. Na-a, yob las ninna i doosh i tsele menshendar ap kay phoub ap peste." 
1John2:2 Yob kokres las mari doosh mendar, oun las lat ap peste, har yob menge ap o troushel meras. Gar mari doosh kokres las lo ap peste. Na-a, yob las ninna i doosh i tsele menshendar ap kay phoub ap peste." 
1John2:3 Mer te krah kova, hoy o Devel menge penas, te kras, djinah mer, te prindjrah les." 
1John2:3 Mer te krah kova, hoy o Devel menge penas, te kras, djinah mer, te prindjrah les." 
1John2:4 Koon penella: “Me prindjrau o Debles”, oun krell gar, hoy yob penas, kova hi i rhorheno, oun djivell gar pal o čačepen." 
1John2:4 Koon penella: “Me prindjrau o Debles”, oun krell gar, hoy yob penas, kova hi i rhorheno, oun djivell gar pal o čačepen." 
1John2:5 Koon krella, hoy o Devel penella, an koleste hi čačepah o Debleskro tselo kamlepen. Oun ap kova dikah mer, te ačah o Debleha."

1John2:6 Koon penella, te ačell lo o Debleha khetne, kova hounte djivella yaake, har o Yezous Kristo djivas." 
1John2:7 Kamle phrala, ko lab, hoy me t'menge kate činau, te krenn kova, hi t'menge či nevo. Na-a, kova hi i phouro lab. T'mer shounan ko lab, har t'mer patslo van, oun djinenn les." 
1John2:7 Kamle phrala, ko lab, hoy me t'menge kate činau, te krenn kova, hi t'menge či nevo. Na-a, kova hi i phouro lab. T'mer shounan ko lab, har t'mer patslo van, oun djinenn les." 
1John2:8 Ko phouro lab hi ninna nevo. O Yezous djivas pal ko lab oun t'mer djivenna ninna yaake. Ap kova dikenn le, kay i rat pale djala, oun o dives vella." 
1John2:8 Ko phouro lab hi ninna nevo. O Yezous djivas pal ko lab oun t'mer djivenna ninna yaake. Ap kova dikenn le, kay i rat pale djala, oun o dives vella." 
1John2:9 Koon penella: “Me djivau o Debleha,” oun krell peskro phraleske čilačepen, kova djivell gomme an o čilačepen. Kova hi yaake, har te djivell lo an i kali rat." 
1John2:9 Koon penella: “Me djivau o Debleha,” oun krell peskro phraleske čilačepen, kova djivell gomme an o čilačepen. Kova hi yaake, har te djivell lo an i kali rat." 
1John2:10 Koon peskro phrales o tselo djiyestar kamella, kova ačella o Debleha. An leste hi kek čilačepen, hoy les o Debleskro dromestar tele nay anell." 
1John2:10 Koon peskro phrales o tselo djiyestar kamella, kova ačella o Debleha. An leste hi kek čilačepen, hoy les o Debleskro dromestar tele nay anell." 
1John2:11 Koon peskro phraleske čilačepen krella, kova djivell har an i kali rat, oun djal i drom, kay dikell lo nay gar. Yob djinell gar, kay yob djala. An i rat hi lo, har te vals lo korelo." 
1John2:11 Koon peskro phraleske čilačepen krella, kova djivell har an i kali rat, oun djal i drom, kay dikell lo nay gar. Yob djinell gar, kay yob djala. An i rat hi lo, har te vals lo korelo." 
1John2:12 Čovale, me činau t'menge kava lab, te bistrenn t'mer gar, kay o Yezous Kristo meras t'menge. O Devel las t'mari doosh t'mendar." 
1John2:12 Čovale, me činau t'menge kava lab, te bistrenn t'mer gar, kay o Yezous Kristo meras t'menge. O Devel las t'mari doosh t'mendar." 
1John2:13 Phoure morshale, t'menge činau kava lab, te bistrenn gar o Yezouses, kay hako tsiro koy hi. Terne morshale, t'menge činau kava lab: T'mer hans zorleder har o beng oun kran gar, hoy yob t'mendar kamas." 
1John2:13 Phoure morshale, t'menge činau kava lab, te bistrenn gar o Yezouses, kay hako tsiro koy hi. Terne morshale, t'menge činau kava lab: T'mer hans zorleder har o beng oun kran gar, hoy yob t'mendar kamas." 
1John2:14 Čovale, t'menge činom kava lab, te bistrenn gar, kay hi o Devel t'maro dad. Phoure morshale, t'menge činom kava lab, te bistrenn gar o Yezouses, kay hako tsiro koy hi. Terne morshale, t'menge činom kava lab, te han t'mer zoreles. Oun o Debleskro lab ačell an t'mende. Oun t'mer kran gar, hoy o beng t'mendar kamas." 
1John2:14 Čovale, t'menge činom kava lab, te bistrenn gar, kay hi o Devel t'maro dad. Phoure morshale, t'menge činom kava lab, te bistrenn gar o Yezouses, kay hako tsiro koy hi. Terne morshale, t'menge činom kava lab, te han t'mer zoreles. Oun o Debleskro lab ačell an t'mende. Oun t'mer kran gar, hoy o beng t'mendar kamas." 
1John2:15 Ma kamenn ko koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub kamenna! Ma kamenn ko koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub krenna! Te kamell yek ko koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub kamenna, kova kamell gar o Debles, maro dades an o bolepen." 
1John2:15 Ma kamenn ko koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub kamenna! Ma kamenn ko koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub krenna! Te kamell yek ko koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub kamenna, kova kamell gar o Debles, maro dades an o bolepen." 
1John2:16 Pash i menshende ap kay phoub djal lauter pal yek koova: rhapen oun pipen, romedinepen oun khelepen, bravlepen oun sharepen. Kova lauter vell gar o Deblestar, maro dadestar. Kova lauter hi phoubyakro koova." 
1John2:16 Pash i menshende ap kay phoub djal lauter pal yek koova: rhapen oun pipen, romedinepen oun khelepen, bravlepen oun sharepen. Kova lauter vell gar o Deblestar, maro dadestar. Kova lauter hi phoubyakro koova." 
1John2:17 Kay phoub ačella gar, vitar gar kova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub kamenna. Koon krella, hoy o Devel kamella, kova ačella hako tsiro."

1John2:18 Čovale, mer djivah an ko tsiro, kay i phoub bouder gar rah ačella. Oun t'mer shounan, kay ko rhorheno vella, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste. Shounenn, boud rhorhene hi kanna kay, kay hadenn pen pral o Yezous Kristeste. Ap kova dikah mer, kay i phoub bouder gar rah ačella." 
1John2:18 Čovale, mer djivah an ko tsiro, kay i phoub bouder gar rah ačella. Oun t'mer shounan, kay ko rhorheno vella, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste. Shounenn, boud rhorhene hi kanna kay, kay hadenn pen pral o Yezous Kristeste. Ap kova dikah mer, kay i phoub bouder gar rah ačella." 
1John2:19 Kolla van mendar. Yon his gar čačepah mendar. Te vans yon mendar, ačans le pash mende. Oun har yon penge djan, nay dikas hakeno, te his le gar mendar."

1John2:20 T'mer lan o Debleskro Dourho, oun lestar djinenn t'mer kova lauter."

1John2:21 Me činom t'menge gar, har te prindjrans t'mer o čačepen gar. T'mer prindjrenn les, oun djinenn, kay kek rhorhepen dran o čačepen vella." 
1John2:22 Kova hi i rhorheno, kay dell bourhoste, kay o Yezous o baro ray hi, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. Hakeno, kay dell bourhoste, te hi o Yezous o Debleskro čavo, oun te hi o Devel leskro dad, hi har ko rhorheno, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste." 
1John2:22 Kova hi i rhorheno, kay dell bourhoste, kay o Yezous o baro ray hi, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob. Hakeno, kay dell bourhoste, te hi o Yezous o Debleskro čavo, oun te hi o Devel leskro dad, hi har ko rhorheno, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste." 
1John2:23 Hakeno, kay o Debleskro čaves bourhoste della, prindjrell vitar gar o Debles, kay leskro dad hi. Koon ap o Yezouseste patsella, oun i menshenge penella, te hi o Yezous o Debleskro čavo, kova prindjrella ninna o Debles, leskro dades." 
1John2:23 Hakeno, kay o Debleskro čaves bourhoste della, prindjrell vitar gar o Debles, kay leskro dad hi. Koon ap o Yezouseste patsella, oun i menshenge penella, te hi o Yezous o Debleskro čavo, kova prindjrella ninna o Debles, leskro dades." 
1John2:24 T'menge penau: Rikrenn kol laba an t'mare djia, hoy shounan, har t'mer patslo van! Te ačenn kol laba an t'mende, hoy t'mer shounan, har patslo van, yaake ačenn t'mer khetne o Debleskro čaveha oun o Debleha, maro dadeha." 
1John2:24 T'menge penau: Rikrenn kol laba an t'mare djia, hoy shounan, har t'mer patslo van! Te ačenn kol laba an t'mende, hoy t'mer shounan, har patslo van, yaake ačenn t'mer khetne o Debleskro čaveha oun o Debleha, maro dadeha." 
1John2:25 Oun t'mer lenn ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Kova penas o Yezous Kristo menge."

1John2:26 Kava činom t'menge, te moukenn t'men gar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell." 
1John2:26 Kava činom t'menge, te moukenn t'men gar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell." 
1John2:27 O Yezous Kristo das t'men o Debleskro Dourho. Kova ačell an t'mende. Doleske hounte vell t'men kek vavar sikepaskro. O Debleskro Dourho sikrell t'mende o tselo Debleskro drom. Oun lauter, hoy yob t'mende sikrell, kova hi čačo oun kek rhorhepen. Krenn kova, hoy o Debleskro Dourho t'mende sikrella! Yaake ačenn t'mer o Yezous Kristeha khetne." 
1John2:27 O Yezous Kristo das t'men o Debleskro Dourho. Kova ačell an t'mende. Doleske hounte vell t'men kek vavar sikepaskro. O Debleskro Dourho sikrell t'mende o tselo Debleskro drom. Oun lauter, hoy yob t'mende sikrell, kova hi čačo oun kek rhorhepen. Krenn kova, hoy o Debleskro Dourho t'mende sikrella! Yaake ačenn t'mer o Yezous Kristeha khetne." 
1John2:28 Oun kanna, mire čave, ačenn pash leste, te vell men kek traash, te vell yob pale. Yaake hounte ladjas men gar glan leste." 
1John2:28 Oun kanna, mire čave, ačenn pash leste, te vell men kek traash, te vell yob pale. Yaake hounte ladjas men gar glan leste." 
1John2:29 T'mer djinenna: O Yezous Kristo kras, hoy čačo hi glan o Debleste. Yaake djinenn t'mer ninna: Kolla, kay krenn, hoy čačo hi glan o Debleste, kolla hi o Debleskre čave." 
1John2:29 T'mer djinenna: O Yezous Kristo kras, hoy čačo hi glan o Debleste. Yaake djinenn t'mer ninna: Kolla, kay krenn, hoy čačo hi glan o Debleste, kolla hi o Debleskre čave." 
1John3:1 Dikenn, har baro o Debleskro kamlepen menge hi. O Devel, maro dad, penell ap mende: “Mire čave.” Oun čačepah, kolla ham mer. Dran kova hayvenn men kol menshe gar, kay o Debles gar prindjrenna. Yon hayvenn gar, koon yob hi." 
1John3:1 Dikenn, har baro o Debleskro kamlepen menge hi. O Devel, maro dad, penell ap mende: “Mire čave.” Oun čačepah, kolla ham mer. Dran kova hayvenn men kol menshe gar, kay o Debles gar prindjrenna. Yon hayvenn gar, koon yob hi." 
1John3:2 Lače phrala oun phenya, kanna ham Debleskre čave. Oun hoy mer vah an ko tsiro, hoy vella, djinah gomme gar. Yek djinah: Ap ko tsiro, kay vell o Yezous Kristo pale, dikah les har yob hi, oun mer vah yaake, har yob hi." 
1John3:2 Lače phrala oun phenya, kanna ham Debleskre čave. Oun hoy mer vah an ko tsiro, hoy vella, djinah gomme gar. Yek djinah: Ap ko tsiro, kay vell o Yezous Kristo pale, dikah les har yob hi, oun mer vah yaake, har yob hi." 
1John3:3 Oun hakeno, kay kova patsella, rikrell peskro dji djoudjo, te vell kek doosh ap leste, yaake har ap o Yezous Kristeste kek doosh hi." 
1John3:3 Oun hakeno, kay kova patsella, rikrell peskro dji djoudjo, te vell kek doosh ap leste, yaake har ap o Yezous Kristeste kek doosh hi." 
1John3:4 Hakeno, kay o čilačepen krella, djivell gar pal o Debleskro čačepen. Oun kova, kay djivell gar pal o Debleskro čačepen, anell doosh ap peste." 
1John3:4 Hakeno, kay o čilačepen krella, djivell gar pal o Debleskro čačepen. Oun kova, kay djivell gar pal o Debleskro čačepen, anell doosh ap peste." 
1John3:5 T'mer djinenna, kay o Yezous Kristo vas, te lell lo ko čilačo koova krik, hoy kram. T'mer djinenn ninna, kay an leste kek čilačepen hi." 
1John3:5 T'mer djinenna, kay o Yezous Kristo vas, te lell lo ko čilačo koova krik, hoy kram. T'mer djinenn ninna, kay an leste kek čilačepen hi." 
1John3:6 Hakeno, kay ačell o Yezous Kristeha khetne, djivell gar an o čilačepen. Koon an o čilačepen djivella, kova djinell či o Yezous Kristestar, oun hayvas les gar." 
1John3:6 Hakeno, kay ačell o Yezous Kristeha khetne, djivell gar an o čilačepen. Koon an o čilačepen djivella, kova djinell či o Yezous Kristestar, oun hayvas les gar." 
1John3:7 Čovale, moukenn t'men kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! T'mer hounte djinenna, kolla, kay krenna, hoy čačo hi glan o Debleskre yaka, kolla hi an o čačepen tardo glan o Debleste yaake har o Yezous an o čačepen tardo hi glan o Debleste." 
1John3:7 Čovale, moukenn t'men kekestar o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! T'mer hounte djinenna, kolla, kay krenna, hoy čačo hi glan o Debleskre yaka, kolla hi an o čačepen tardo glan o Debleste yaake har o Yezous an o čačepen tardo hi glan o Debleste." 
1John3:8 Kolla, kay djivenn an o čilačepen, kolla hi o bengestar. O beng krella o čilačepen yaake rah, har yob koy hi. Doleske vas o Debleskro čavo ap kay phoub, te phagell lo o bengeskri zoor." 
1John3:8 Kolla, kay djivenn an o čilačepen, kolla hi o bengestar. O beng krella o čilačepen yaake rah, har yob koy hi. Doleske vas o Debleskro čavo ap kay phoub, te phagell lo o bengeskri zoor." 
1John3:9 Kolla, kay o Debleskre čave hi, djivenn gar an o čilačepen. O Debleskre čaven hi o Debleskro djipen an lende. Oun yon nay djivenn gar an o čilačepen." 
1John3:9 Kolla, kay o Debleskre čave hi, djivenn gar an o čilačepen. O Debleskre čaven hi o Debleskro djipen an lende. Oun yon nay djivenn gar an o čilačepen." 
1John3:10 Hakeno, kay gar kova krella, hoy hi čačo glan o Debleskre yaka, kova hi gar o Deblestar. Vitar gar hi kova o Deblestar, kay peskro phrales gar o djiyestar kamella. Ap kova dikell hakeno, koon o Debleskre čave hi, oun koon o bengeskre čave hi." 
1John3:10 Hakeno, kay gar kova krella, hoy hi čačo glan o Debleskre yaka, kova hi gar o Deblestar. Vitar gar hi kova o Deblestar, kay peskro phrales gar o djiyestar kamella. Ap kova dikell hakeno, koon o Debleskre čave hi, oun koon o bengeskre čave hi." 
1John3:11 Ko lab, hoy t'mer shounan, har patslo van, hi kova: Mer patsle hounte kamas men yek o vavares o djiyestar." 
1John3:11 Ko lab, hoy t'mer shounan, har patslo van, hi kova: Mer patsle hounte kamas men yek o vavares o djiyestar." 
1John3:12 Mer hounte vas gar har o Kayn. Kova his o bengestar oun maras peskro phrales. Hoske maras lo les? Leskro phraal kras, hoy lačo his. Oun o Kayn kras, hoy čilačo his. Doleske maras o Kayn peskro phrales." 
1John3:12 Mer hounte vas gar har o Kayn. Kova his o bengestar oun maras peskro phrales. Hoske maras lo les? Leskro phraal kras, hoy lačo his. Oun o Kayn kras, hoy čilačo his. Doleske maras o Kayn peskro phrales." 
1John3:13 Mire phrala, krenn kek bare yaka, te hi i menshe ap kay phoub rhoyedo ap t'mende!" 
1John3:13 Mire phrala, krenn kek bare yaka, te hi i menshe ap kay phoub rhoyedo ap t'mende!" 
1John3:14 Mer hams moulo, kanna djivah. Hoske djinah kova? Mer kamah i patslen o djiyestar. Kova sikrell mende, kay vam dran o merepen an o djipen. Koon o vavar patsles gar kamella, kova hi moulo oun ačell moulo." 
1John3:14 Mer hams moulo, kanna djivah. Hoske djinah kova? Mer kamah i patslen o djiyestar. Kova sikrell mende, kay vam dran o merepen an o djipen. Koon o vavar patsles gar kamella, kova hi moulo oun ačell moulo." 
1John3:15 Djinenn, hakeno, kay krell peskro phraleske čilačepen, kova hi har yek, kay marell peskro phrales. Oun kova, kay marell peskro phrales, koles hi gar ko djipen an leste, hoy gar pre-herella." 
1John3:15 Djinenn, hakeno, kay krell peskro phraleske čilačepen, kova hi har yek, kay marell peskro phrales. Oun kova, kay marell peskro phrales, koles hi gar ko djipen an leste, hoy gar pre-herella." 
1John3:16 O Yezous sikras mende, har o Debleskro kamlepen hi. Yob moukas peskro djipen menge. Yaake moukas mer ninna maro djipen i patslenge." 
1John3:16 O Yezous sikras mende, har o Debleskro kamlepen hi. Yob moukas peskro djipen menge. Yaake moukas mer ninna maro djipen i patslenge." 
1John3:17 Te hi yek bravelo, oun dikell, kay peskro phrales gar doha djipaske hi, oun yob dell les či, yaake nay ačell gar o Debleskro kamlepen an leste." 
1John3:17 Te hi yek bravelo, oun dikell, kay peskro phrales gar doha djipaske hi, oun yob dell les či, yaake nay ačell gar o Debleskro kamlepen an leste." 
1John3:18 Mire čave, mer te kras gar bare laba te penah, kay kamah i menshen i djiyestar. Na-a, o čačo kamlepen dikenn le ap kova, hoy yek o vavareske krella." 
1John3:18 Mire čave, mer te kras gar bare laba te penah, kay kamah i menshen i djiyestar. Na-a, o čačo kamlepen dikenn le ap kova, hoy yek o vavareske krella." 
1John3:19 Te kamah i menshen yaake, djinah, kay ham an o čačepen. Yaake hounte trashas gar o Deblestar." 
1John3:19 Te kamah i menshen yaake, djinah, kay ham an o čačepen. Yaake hounte trashas gar o Deblestar." 
1John3:20 Ninna te penell menge maro dji: “Tou djival gar yaake, har hounte vess,” palle hi o Devel bareder har maro dji, oun djinell lauter." 
1John3:20 Ninna te penell menge maro dji: “Tou djival gar yaake, har hounte vess,” palle hi o Devel bareder har maro dji, oun djinell lauter." 
1John3:21 Lače phrala oun phenya, te penell menge maro dji gar, te lam doosh ap mende, hi men kek traash, te vas glan o Debleste." 
1John3:21 Lače phrala oun phenya, te penell menge maro dji gar, te lam doosh ap mende, hi men kek traash, te vas glan o Debleste." 
1John3:22 Oun lauter, hoy mer lestar mangah, kova lah mer, te rikrah men ap kova, hoy yob menge penas, oun djivah yaake, har yob kamella." 
1John3:22 Oun lauter, hoy mer lestar mangah, kova lah mer, te rikrah men ap kova, hoy yob menge penas, oun djivah yaake, har yob kamella." 
1John3:23 Oun kava kamell o Devel mendar: te patsas mer ap leskro čaveste, o Yezous Kristeste, oun te kamas men, yek o vavares o djiyestar, yaake har o Yezous Kristo les menge penas." 
1John3:23 Oun kava kamell o Devel mendar: te patsas mer ap leskro čaveste, o Yezous Kristeste, oun te kamas men, yek o vavares o djiyestar, yaake har o Yezous Kristo les menge penas." 
1John3:24 Koon kova krella, hoy yob menge penas, kova ačell o Debleha khetne. Oun o Devel ačell leha khetne. O Devel das men peskro Dourho. Oun kova sikrell mende, te hi o Devel mentsa." 
1John3:24 Koon kova krella, hoy yob menge penas, kova ačell o Debleha khetne. Oun o Devel ačell leha khetne. O Devel das men peskro Dourho. Oun kova sikrell mende, te hi o Devel mentsa." 
1John4:1 Lače phrala oun phenya, ma patsenn hakenes, koon penella, te hi les o Debleskro Dourho! Dikenn ap leskro rakepen, te djinenn t'mer, te vell kova čačepah o Deblestar! Boud rhorhene rakepangre nashenn ap i phoub trouyel. Kolla penenna i menshenge, te vell lengro rakepen o Deblestar. Kova hi gar čačo." 
1John4:1 Lače phrala oun phenya, ma patsenn hakenes, koon penella, te hi les o Debleskro Dourho! Dikenn ap leskro rakepen, te djinenn t'mer, te vell kova čačepah o Deblestar! Boud rhorhene rakepangre nashenn ap i phoub trouyel. Kolla penenna i menshenge, te vell lengro rakepen o Deblestar. Kova hi gar čačo." 
1John4:2 Har nay djinah, te hi o Debleskro Dourho an yekeste? Hakeno, kay penell glan i menshende, kay o Yezous Kristo vas i mensho dran mass oun rat, koles hi o Debleskro Dourho." 
1John4:2 Har nay djinah, te hi o Debleskro Dourho an yekeste? Hakeno, kay penell glan i menshende, kay o Yezous Kristo vas i mensho dran mass oun rat, koles hi o Debleskro Dourho." 
1John4:3 Koon kova bourhoste della, an koleste hi gar o Debleskro Dourho. Yaake rakrell o rhorheno, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste. T'mer shounan, kay kova vella. Yob hi kanna ap kay phoub." 
1John4:3 Koon kova bourhoste della, an koleste hi gar o Debleskro Dourho. Yaake rakrell o rhorheno, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste. T'mer shounan, kay kova vella. Yob hi kanna ap kay phoub." 
1John4:4 Mire čave, t'mer han o Deblestar, oun han zorleder har kol rhorhene rakepangre. O Debleskro Dourho, kay an t'mende hi, hi zorleder har o beng, kay an i menshende hi, kay o Debles gar prindjrenna." 
1John4:4 Mire čave, t'mer han o Deblestar, oun han zorleder har kol rhorhene rakepangre. O Debleskro Dourho, kay an t'mende hi, hi zorleder har o beng, kay an i menshende hi, kay o Debles gar prindjrenna." 
1John4:5 I rhorhene rakepangre hi menshe kay phoubyatar. Doleske rakrenn le har i menshe, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar. Oun i menshe shounenn ap lende." 
1John4:5 I rhorhene rakepangre hi menshe kay phoubyatar. Doleske rakrenn le har i menshe, kay prindjrenn o Debles gar. Oun i menshe shounenn ap lende." 
1John4:6 Mer ham o Deblestar, oun hakeno, koon o Debles prindjrella, shounell ap mende. Koon hi gar o Deblestar, kova shounell gar ap mende. Doleske djinah mer, kones o Debleskro Dourho hi, kay rakrell o čačepen, oun kones o rhorheno dourho hi." 
1John4:6 Mer ham o Deblestar, oun hakeno, koon o Debles prindjrella, shounell ap mende. Koon hi gar o Deblestar, kova shounell gar ap mende. Doleske djinah mer, kones o Debleskro Dourho hi, kay rakrell o čačepen, oun kones o rhorheno dourho hi." 
1John4:7 Lače phrala oun phenya, o djiyeskro kamlepen vella o Deblestar. Doleske hounte vell men i dji mare phralenge oun phenyenge an o patsepen. Kolen, kay hi i dji i vavarenge, kolla hi o Debleskre čave, oun prindjrenn o Debles." 
1John4:7 Lače phrala oun phenya, o djiyeskro kamlepen vella o Deblestar. Doleske hounte vell men i dji mare phralenge oun phenyenge an o patsepen. Kolen, kay hi i dji i vavarenge, kolla hi o Debleskre čave, oun prindjrenn o Debles." 
1John4:8 O Devel hi pherdo djiyeskro kamlepen. Kones kek dji o vavareske hi, kova prindjrell o Debles gar." 
1John4:8 O Devel hi pherdo djiyeskro kamlepen. Kones kek dji o vavareske hi, kova prindjrell o Debles gar." 
1John4:9 O Devel sikras men peskro kamlepen, har bičras lo peskro čaves ap kay phoub, te las mer lestar o čačo djipen." 
1John4:9 O Devel sikras men peskro kamlepen, har bičras lo peskro čaves ap kay phoub, te las mer lestar o čačo djipen." 
1John4:10 Kava hi o Debleskro kamlepen: Hi gar yaake, kay mer kamam o Debles. Na-a, yob kamas men, oun bičras peskro čaves, te lell yob mari doosh ap peste." 
1John4:10 Kava hi o Debleskro kamlepen: Hi gar yaake, kay mer kamam o Debles. Na-a, yob kamas men, oun bičras peskro čaves, te lell yob mari doosh ap peste." 
1John4:11 Lače phrala oun phenya, o Debles hi savo baro dji menge. Doleske hounte vell men ninna i baro dji mare phralenge oun phenyenge an o patsepen." 
1John4:11 Lače phrala oun phenya, o Debles hi savo baro dji menge. Doleske hounte vell men ninna i baro dji mare phralenge oun phenyenge an o patsepen." 
1John4:12 Kek mensho dikas o Debles. Te hi men i dji i vavar patslenge, ačell o Devel mentsa. Oun leskro tselo kamlepen hi an mende." 
1John4:12 Kek mensho dikas o Debles. Te hi men i dji i vavar patslenge, ačell o Devel mentsa. Oun leskro tselo kamlepen hi an mende." 
1John4:13 O Devel das men peskro Dourho. Ap kova hayvah mer, kay o Devel mentsa hi, oun mer leha ham." 
1John4:13 O Devel das men peskro Dourho. Ap kova hayvah mer, kay o Devel mentsa hi, oun mer leha ham." 
1John4:14 Mer dikam, kay o Devel, maro dad, peskro čaves bičras. Doleske penah mer i menshenge, kay yob kova hi, kay lell len vin dran o čilačepen oun o merepen." 
1John4:14 Mer dikam, kay o Devel, maro dad, peskro čaves bičras. Doleske penah mer i menshenge, kay yob kova hi, kay lell len vin dran o čilačepen oun o merepen." 
1John4:15 Koon glan i menshende penella, kay o Yezous o Debleskro čavo hi, koleha ačell o Devel, oun yob ačell o Debleha." 
1John4:15 Koon glan i menshende penella, kay o Yezous o Debleskro čavo hi, koleha ačell o Devel, oun yob ačell o Debleha." 
1John4:16 Mer hayvam ko čačo kamlepen, hoy o Debles menge hi. Oun mer patsah, te kamell men o Devel čačepah! O Devel hi pherdo kamlepen. Koon an o Debleskro kamlepen ačella, kova ačella o Debleha, oun o Devel ačell leha." 
1John4:16 Mer hayvam ko čačo kamlepen, hoy o Debles menge hi. Oun mer patsah, te kamell men o Devel čačepah! O Devel hi pherdo kamlepen. Koon an o Debleskro kamlepen ačella, kova ačella o Debleha, oun o Devel ačell leha." 
1John4:17 Mer te ham pherdo Debleskro kamlepen, palle hi men bouder kek daar glan o Debleste ap ko dives, kay o Devel o čačepen vi-rakrella pral i tsele menshende. Ninna te ham mer kanna ap kay phoub, ham mer o Debleha khetne, yaake har o Yezous Kristo o Debleha khetne hi." 
1John4:17 Mer te ham pherdo Debleskro kamlepen, palle hi men bouder kek daar glan o Debleste ap ko dives, kay o Devel o čačepen vi-rakrella pral i tsele menshende. Ninna te ham mer kanna ap kay phoub, ham mer o Debleha khetne, yaake har o Yezous Kristo o Debleha khetne hi." 
1John4:18 Kones o Debleskro kamlepen an peste hi, koles hi kek traash. O Debleskro kamlepen tradell i traash vin. Koon trashella, te nay lell lo i phagi, koles hi gar o tselo Debleskro kamlepen an peste." 
1John4:18 Kones o Debleskro kamlepen an peste hi, koles hi kek traash. O Debleskro kamlepen tradell i traash vin. Koon trashella, te nay lell lo i phagi, koles hi gar o tselo Debleskro kamlepen an peste." 
1John4:19 O Devel kamas men o djiyestar. Doleske kamah mer o Debles oun i menshen ninna. 
1John4:19 O Devel kamas men o djiyestar. Doleske kamah mer o Debles oun i menshen ninna. 
1John4:20 Te penell yek: “Me kamau o Debles,” oun krell peskro phraleske čilačepen, kova hi i rhorheno. Yob kamell gar peskro phrales, koles yob nay dikella. Har nay kamell lo o Debles, koles yob nay gar dikella?" 
1John4:20 Te penell yek: “Me kamau o Debles,” oun krell peskro phraleske čilačepen, kova hi i rhorheno. Yob kamell gar peskro phrales, koles yob nay dikella. Har nay kamell lo o Debles, koles yob nay gar dikella?" 
1John4:21 Kava hi, hoy o Yezous menge penas: Koon o Debles kamella, kova hounte kamell ninna peskro phrales o tselo djiyestar." 
1John4:21 Kava hi, hoy o Yezous menge penas: Koon o Debles kamella, kova hounte kamell ninna peskro phrales o tselo djiyestar." 
1John5:1 Kolla, kay patsenna, kay o Yezous o baro ray hi, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, kolla hi o Debleskre čave. Oun hakeno, kay kamell o dades, kova kamell ninna leskre čaven." 
1John5:1 Kolla, kay patsenna, kay o Yezous o baro ray hi, kolestar o Devel penas, te vell yob, kolla hi o Debleskre čave. Oun hakeno, kay kamell o dades, kova kamell ninna leskre čaven." 
1John5:2 Kava hayvam: Mer te kamah o Debles čačepah, oun krah, hoy yob penella, palle kamah leskre čaven ninna." 
1John5:2 Kava hayvam: Mer te kamah o Debles čačepah, oun krah, hoy yob penella, palle kamah leskre čaven ninna." 
1John5:3 Maro kamlepen o Debleske sikrell pes, te krah mer kova, hoy yob menge penella. Oun kova, hoy yob menge penella te kras, kova hi gar pharo." 
1John5:3 Maro kamlepen o Debleske sikrell pes, te krah mer kova, hoy yob menge penella. Oun kova, hoy yob menge penella te kras, kova hi gar pharo." 
1John5:4 Hoske? Kolla, kay o Debleskre čave hi, hounte krenn bouder gar ko čilačo koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub krenna. Maro patsepen hi mari zoor pral o čilačo koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub krenna." 
1John5:4 Hoske? Kolla, kay o Debleskre čave hi, hounte krenn bouder gar ko čilačo koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub krenna. Maro patsepen hi mari zoor pral o čilačo koova, hoy i menshe ap kay phoub krenna." 
1John5:5 Ava, kova, kay patsella, kay o Yezous o Debleskro čavo hi, koles hi i zoor pral o čilačo koova, hoy i menshe krenna." 
1John5:5 Ava, kova, kay patsella, kay o Yezous o Debleskro čavo hi, koles hi i zoor pral o čilačo koova, hoy i menshe krenna." 
1John5:6 O Yezous Kristo vas pash mende. Yob vas taufedo an o pani oun meras ap o troushel. Har meras lo, ratas lo peskro rat. Hi gar kokres leskro thopen an o pani, na-a, ninna leskro rat sikrell mende, kay yob o Debleskro čavo hi. Oun o Debleskro Dourho penell menge kova ninna. Oun o Debleskro Dourho penell o čačepen." 
1John5:6 O Yezous Kristo vas pash mende. Yob vas taufedo an o pani oun meras ap o troushel. Har meras lo, ratas lo peskro rat. Hi gar kokres leskro thopen an o pani, na-a, ninna leskro rat sikrell mende, kay yob o Debleskro čavo hi. Oun o Debleskro Dourho penell menge kova ninna. Oun o Debleskro Dourho penell o čačepen." 
1John5:7 Kolla hi triin, kay sikrenn mende, kay o Yezous o Debleskro čavo hi:" 
1John5:7 Kolla hi triin, kay sikrenn mende, kay o Yezous o Debleskro čavo hi:" 
1John5:8 O Debleskro Dourho, ko pani oun ko rat. Hake triin penenn ko yek koova." 
1John5:8 O Debleskro Dourho, ko pani oun ko rat. Hake triin penenn ko yek koova." 
1John5:9 Te shounah mer ap i menshende oun patsah, hoy yon penenna, hoske patsah gar, hoy o Devel penella? Kova, hoy o Devel penella, hi bareder har kova, hoy i menshe penenna. Oun o Devel penas, kay o Yezous Kristo peskro čavo hi." 
1John5:9 Te shounah mer ap i menshende oun patsah, hoy yon penenna, hoske patsah gar, hoy o Devel penella? Kova, hoy o Devel penella, hi bareder har kova, hoy i menshe penenna. Oun o Devel penas, kay o Yezous Kristo peskro čavo hi." 
1John5:10 Koon ap o Debleskro čaveste patsella, kova djinella an peskro dji, kay hi kova čačo, hoy o Devel pral o Yezous Kristeste penas. Koon o Debles gar patsella oun leskre laba gar patsella, hoy o Devel pral peskro čaveste penas, kova penella, te rhorhras o Devel." 
1John5:10 Koon ap o Debleskro čaveste patsella, kova djinella an peskro dji, kay hi kova čačo, hoy o Devel pral o Yezous Kristeste penas. Koon o Debles gar patsella oun leskre laba gar patsella, hoy o Devel pral peskro čaveste penas, kova penella, te rhorhras o Devel." 
1John5:11 O Devel penas čačepah, te dell lo men ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun ko djipen hi an peskro čaveste." 
1John5:11 O Devel penas čačepah, te dell lo men ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Oun ko djipen hi an peskro čaveste." 
1John5:12 Kones o čavo an peskro dji hi, koles hi ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Kones o Debleskro čavo gar an peskro dji hi, koles hi ko djipen gar." 
1John5:12 Kones o čavo an peskro dji hi, koles hi ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella. Kones o Debleskro čavo gar an peskro dji hi, koles hi ko djipen gar." 
1John5:13 Me činom t'menge, te djinenn t'mer, kay t'men ko djipen hi, hoy gar pre-herella. Ko djipen hi kolenge, kay ap o Debleskro čaveste patsenna." 
1John5:13 Me činom t'menge, te djinenn t'mer, kay t'men ko djipen hi, hoy gar pre-herella. Ko djipen hi kolenge, kay ap o Debleskro čaveste patsenna." 
1John5:14 Ko yek djinah: Te mangah o Deblestar čomone, yaake har yob kova kamella, yaake shounell lo men." 
1John5:14 Ko yek djinah: Te mangah o Deblestar čomone, yaake har yob kova kamella, yaake shounell lo men." 
1John5:15 Oun te djinah mer, kay yob men shounella, djinah mer ninna, kay yob men kova das, hoy mer lestar mangam." 
1John5:15 Oun te djinah mer, kay yob men shounella, djinah mer ninna, kay yob men kova das, hoy mer lestar mangam." 
1John5:16 Te dikeh tou, te kras i vavar patslo i čilačo koova, palle hounte mangess tou o Debles leske! Oun o Devel dell les o djipen. Della ninna i doosh, hoy anell an o merepen. Oun me penau gar, te mangess tou o Debles kolenge, kay koy doosh ap pende lan." 
1John5:16 Te dikeh tou, te kras i vavar patslo i čilačo koova, palle hounte mangess tou o Debles leske! Oun o Devel dell les o djipen. Della ninna i doosh, hoy anell an o merepen. Oun me penau gar, te mangess tou o Debles kolenge, kay koy doosh ap pende lan." 
1John5:17 Hako kopo, kay mer i čilačo koova krah, anah mer doosh ap mende. Gar haki doosh anell i menshen an o merepen." 
1John5:17 Hako kopo, kay mer i čilačo koova krah, anah mer doosh ap mende. Gar haki doosh anell i menshen an o merepen." 
1John5:18 Mer djinah, o Debleskre čave ačenn gar ap i čilačo drom. O Debleskro čavo dell garda ap lende. Oun o beng nay krell len či." 
1John5:18 Mer djinah, o Debleskre čave ačenn gar ap i čilačo drom. O Debleskro čavo dell garda ap lende. Oun o beng nay krell len či." 
1John5:19 Mer djinah, kay ham o Deblestar. I tsele vavar menshe ap i phoub hi an o bengeskro vast." 
1John5:19 Mer djinah, kay ham o Deblestar. I tsele vavar menshe ap i phoub hi an o bengeskro vast." 
1John5:20 Mer djinah, kay o Debleskro čavo ap kay phoub vas, te krell lo mare yaka pre, te prindjras o čačo Debles. Oun yaake har mer ham khetne o Debleskro Čaveha, o Yezous Kristeha, yaake ham khetne o čačo Debleha. O Yezous Kristo hi o čačo Devel. Oun yob dell ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
1John5:20 Mer djinah, kay o Debleskro čavo ap kay phoub vas, te krell lo mare yaka pre, te prindjras o čačo Debles. Oun yaake har mer ham khetne o Debleskro Čaveha, o Yezous Kristeha, yaake ham khetne o čačo Debleha. O Yezous Kristo hi o čačo Devel. Oun yob dell ko djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
1John5:21 Doleske, mire čave, denn yak, te mangenn o čačo Debles kokres an oun kek vavares!" 
1John5:21 Doleske, mire čave, denn yak, te mangenn o čačo Debles kokres an oun kek vavares!" 
2John1:1 Me, i phoureder, činau ap koy rayetsa, kolat o Devel peske vin rodas, oun ap lakre čavende. Me kamau t'men o tselo djiyestar, oun gar me kokres, ninna kol vavar, kay prindjrenn o čačepen, kamenn t'men o djiyestar." 
2John1:1 Me, i phoureder, činau ap koy rayetsa, kolat o Devel peske vin rodas, oun ap lakre čavende. Me kamau t'men o tselo djiyestar, oun gar me kokres, ninna kol vavar, kay prindjrenn o čačepen, kamenn t'men o djiyestar." 
2John1:2 O čačepen ačell an mende, oun hi pash mende hako tsiro. Doleske kamah t'men o djiyestar." 
2John1:2 O čačepen ačell an mende, oun hi pash mende hako tsiro. Doleske kamah t'men o djiyestar." 
2John1:3 Lačepen, kamlepen oun barht t'menge! Kova dell men o Devel, maro dad, oun leskro čavo, o Yezous Kristo, an o dji. Oun yaake ačah mer khetne an o Debleskro čačepen oun kamlepen." 
2John1:3 Lačepen, kamlepen oun barht t'menge! Kova dell men o Devel, maro dad, oun leskro čavo, o Yezous Kristo, an o dji. Oun yaake ačah mer khetne an o Debleskro čačepen oun kamlepen." 
2John1:4 Me homs barhtelo, kay hatsom menshe t'mendar, kay an o čačepen djivenna, yaake har o Devel, maro dad, kova kamella." 
2John1:4 Me homs barhtelo, kay hatsom menshe t'mendar, kay an o čačepen djivenna, yaake har o Devel, maro dad, kova kamella." 
2John1:5 Romniya, kanna činau touke oun tire čavenge i lab, hoy hi t'menge kek nevo lab. T'mer shounan les, har van patslo. Mangau t'mendar, te kamell yek o vavares o djiyestar!" 
2John1:5 Romniya, kanna činau touke oun tire čavenge i lab, hoy hi t'menge kek nevo lab. T'mer shounan les, har van patslo. Mangau t'mendar, te kamell yek o vavares o djiyestar!" 
2John1:6 Te krah mer kova, hoy o Devel penas, sikrah mer, kay kamah les. Oun kova, hoy yob penas, te kras, shounan t'mer, har van patsle." 
2John1:6 Te krah mer kova, hoy o Devel penas, sikrah mer, kay kamah les. Oun kova, hoy yob penas, te kras, shounan t'mer, har van patsle." 
2John1:7 Boud rhorhene sikepangre nashenn ap i phoub trouyel, kay kamenn i patslen o čačo dromestar tele te anell. Yon penenna, kay vas o Yezous Kristo gar i mensho dran mass oun rat. Kol sikepangre venna gar o Deblestar. Yaake har yon rakrenna, yaake rakrell ninna ko rhorheno, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste." 
2John1:7 Boud rhorhene sikepangre nashenn ap i phoub trouyel, kay kamenn i patslen o čačo dromestar tele te anell. Yon penenna, kay vas o Yezous Kristo gar i mensho dran mass oun rat. Kol sikepangre venna gar o Deblestar. Yaake har yon rakrenna, yaake rakrell ninna ko rhorheno, kay hadell pes pral o Yezous Kristeste." 
2John1:8 Denn yak, te nashrenn gar kova, hoy mer t'men sikram, te vell t'men ninna ko tselo bravlepen, hoy o Devel kamell t'men te dell." 
2John1:8 Denn yak, te nashrenn gar kova, hoy mer t'men sikram, te vell t'men ninna ko tselo bravlepen, hoy o Devel kamell t'men te dell." 
2John1:9 Hakeno, koon ačell gar pash kol laba, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge penas, oun penell vavar koova, kova ačell gar o Debleha. Kova, kay ačell pash kol laba, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge penas, kova ačell o Debleha, maro dadeha, oun peskro Čaveha." 
2John1:9 Hakeno, koon ačell gar pash kol laba, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge penas, oun penell vavar koova, kova ačell gar o Debleha. Kova, kay ačell pash kol laba, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge penas, kova ačell o Debleha, maro dadeha, oun peskro Čaveha." 
2John1:10 Te vell yek pash t'mende, oun penell t'menge vavar koova har kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge penas, koles lenn gar an t'maro kheer! Parkrenn les vitar gar!" 
2John1:10 Te vell yek pash t'mende, oun penell t'menge vavar koova har kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo menge penas, koles lenn gar an t'maro kheer! Parkrenn les vitar gar!" 
2John1:11 Koon les parkrella, koles hi ninna doosh ap leskro čilačo koova, hoy yob krella." 
2John1:11 Koon les parkrella, koles hi ninna doosh ap leskro čilačo koova, hoy yob krella." 
2John1:12 Me nay penoms t'menge gomme boud. Kova kamau gar lauter an i liil te činell. Shoukeder vals, te nay voms pash t'mende, oun rakroms t'mentsa, te venn mare djia pherdo barht." 
2John1:12 Me nay penoms t'menge gomme boud. Kova kamau gar lauter an i liil te činell. Shoukeder vals, te nay voms pash t'mende, oun rakroms t'mentsa, te venn mare djia pherdo barht." 
2John1:13 I čave tiri vi-rodedi phenyatar penenn touke lače laba. 
2John1:13 I čave tiri vi-rodedi phenyatar penenn touke lače laba. 
3John1:1 Me, i phoureder mank i patslende, činau touke, lačo Gayo, kava liil. Me kamau tout o tselo djiyestar." 
3John1:1 Me, i phoureder mank i patslende, činau touke, lačo Gayo, kava liil. Me kamau tout o tselo djiyestar." 
3John1:2 Lačo phraal, me mangau o Debles, te djal touke mishto, oun te vess sasto yaake, har sasto hal an tiro patsepen." 
3John1:2 Lačo phraal, me mangau o Debles, te djal touke mishto, oun te vess sasto yaake, har sasto hal an tiro patsepen." 
3John1:3 Barhtelo homs, har mare phrala van oun mange penan, har tou ap o čačo drom djah, oun pal o čačepen djiveh." 
3John1:3 Barhtelo homs, har mare phrala van oun mange penan, har tou ap o čačo drom djah, oun pal o čačepen djiveh." 
3John1:4 Pral kek vavar koova hom yaake barhtelo, har te shounap, kay mire čave ap o čačo drom djana." 
3John1:4 Pral kek vavar koova hom yaake barhtelo, har te shounap, kay mire čave ap o čačo drom djana." 
3John1:5 Lačo phraal, tou kreh i lači boudi tire phralenge, ninna te prindjreh len gar." 
3John1:5 Lačo phraal, tou kreh i lači boudi tire phralenge, ninna te prindjreh len gar." 
3John1:6 Yon penan toutar glan i patslende, kay kate khetne venna, havo baro kamlepen tout hi. Yon te djan ap pengro drom doureder, de len rhapen oun pipen peha, yaake har kova glan o Debleskre yaka mishto hi." 
3John1:6 Yon penan toutar glan i patslende, kay kate khetne venna, havo baro kamlepen tout hi. Yon te djan ap pengro drom doureder, de len rhapen oun pipen peha, yaake har kova glan o Debleskre yaka mishto hi." 
3John1:7 Yon kran pen ap o drom, te penenn le i menshenge o Yezous Kristestar. Oun yon lenn či kolendar, kay les gar prindjrenna." 
3John1:7 Yon kran pen ap o drom, te penenn le i menshenge o Yezous Kristestar. Oun yon lenn či kolendar, kay les gar prindjrenna." 
3John1:8 Doleske hounte das mer save phralen kova, hoy len hounte vell djipaske. Yaake boudrah mer lentsa, te vell o Debleskro čačepen i menshenge penlo." 
3John1:8 Doleske hounte das mer save phralen kova, hoy len hounte vell djipaske. Yaake boudrah mer lentsa, te vell o Debleskro čačepen i menshenge penlo." 
3John1:9 Me činom i tikno liil ap i patslende, kay kote khetne venna, kay hal. Yek lendar hi o Diotrefes. Kova kamell o pralstouno mashkral lende te vell, oun shounell gar ap mande." 
3John1:9 Me činom i tikno liil ap i patslende, kay kote khetne venna, kay hal. Yek lendar hi o Diotrefes. Kova kamell o pralstouno mashkral lende te vell, oun shounell gar ap mande." 
3John1:10 Te vau me pash t'mende, penau me leske, hoy yob lauter kras. Yob anell o rhorhepen pral mende pre. Oun kova hi leske gar doha. Yob lell gar i patsle phralen pre, kay venna pash leste. Oun kolla, kay kamenn len pash pende pre te lell, kolenge penell lo, te krenn le kova gar, oun vitsrell len dran i kangri vin." 
3John1:10 Te vau me pash t'mende, penau me leske, hoy yob lauter kras. Yob anell o rhorhepen pral mende pre. Oun kova hi leske gar doha. Yob lell gar i patsle phralen pre, kay venna pash leste. Oun kolla, kay kamenn len pash pende pre te lell, kolenge penell lo, te krenn le kova gar, oun vitsrell len dran i kangri vin." 
3John1:11 Lačo phraal, ma kre o čilačepen palla! Kre o lačepen! Kova, kay krell lačo koova, vell o Deblestar. Kova, kay o čilačepen krella, kova prindjrell o Debles gar." 
3John1:11 Lačo phraal, ma kre o čilačepen palla! Kre o lačepen! Kova, kay krell lačo koova, vell o Deblestar. Kova, kay o čilačepen krella, kova prindjrell o Debles gar." 
3John1:12 O Demetrio krell o lačepen. Lauter rakrenn mishto pral leste. Oun leskro djipen sikrella, te hi lo an o čačepen tardo. Mer ninna penah, kay kova, hoy yob krella, mishto hi. Oun tou djineh, kay kova, hoy mer penah, čačo hi." 
3John1:12 O Demetrio krell o lačepen. Lauter rakrenn mishto pral leste. Oun leskro djipen sikrella, te hi lo an o čačepen tardo. Mer ninna penah, kay kova, hoy yob krella, mishto hi. Oun tou djineh, kay kova, hoy mer penah, čačo hi." 
3John1:13 Me hounte penoms touke yaake boud. Kova kamau gar lauter an i liil te činell. 
3John1:13 Me hounte penoms touke yaake boud. Kova kamau gar lauter an i liil te činell. 
3John1:14 Vals mishto, te dikams men yaake sik, har djala. Koy rakrams nay pral lauter." 
3John1:14 Vals mishto, te dikams men yaake sik, har djala. Koy rakrams nay pral lauter." 
3John1:15 O Debleskri barht touke! Kol mala pash mande penenn touke “Ač maro Debleha!” Pen lače laba mandar mire malenge, kay pash toute hi, pen kova hakeneske peskro labeha!" 
3John1:15 O Debleskri barht touke! Kol mala pash mande penenn touke “Ač maro Debleha!” Pen lače laba mandar mire malenge, kay pash toute hi, pen kova hakeneske peskro labeha!" 
Jude1:1 Me, o Youdas, činau kava liil ap t'mende, kolen o Devel peske vin rodas. Yob hi t'maro dad oun kamell t'men o djiyestar. Oun o Yezous Kristo dell garda ap t'mende. Me hom o Yezous Kristeskro boudepaskro oun o Yakobeskro phraal." 
Jude1:2 O Debleskro kamlepen, barht oun lačepen vell boud oun boudeder pral t'mende!" 
Jude1:3 Mire phrala oun phenya, his i tsiro, kay kamoms t'menge an i liil te činell, har lačo o Devel ap mende hi, te las lo men dran o čilačepen vin. Pral kova kamau me kanna bouder gar te činell. Kanna dikau, hi feteder, te činap t'menge, te ačenn zoreles an o patsepen. Ma moukenn t'men o Debleskro dromestar tele te anell! Leskro lab, hoy t'menge penlo vas, ačell čačo hako tsiro." 
Jude1:4 Me shounom, hi menshe koy, hoy čorrhanes mank t'mende van. Kolla kamenn o Deblestar či djinell. Yon penenn, te hi o Devel lačo, oun te nay krenn le lauter, hoy yon kamenna. Yaake djivenn le i vi-ladjedo djipen, oun denn maro rayes, o Yezous Kristes, bourhoste. Kova kokres hi maro ray. Glan i rah tsiro hi činlo, te lenn yon pengri phagi." 
Jude1:5 Ninna te djinenn t'mer kova lauter, kamau, te bistrenn gar, har o Devel, maro ray, peskre menshen dran o them Egiptia vin las. Oun ap i vavar tsiro maras lo kolen, hoy gar patsan." 
Jude1:6 Ma bistrenn vitar gar kol bolepangren, kay dan gar garda ap koy boudi, hoy o Devel len das, oun moukan pengro kheer an o bolepen. Kolen pandas lo i shellentsa, hoy kek tsireske bouder pre kerdo venn. Oun yob rikrell len stildo an i kali rat, bis te vell ko baro dives, kay i phagi pral lende vi-rakedo vella." 
Jude1:7 Yaake lan ninna kol menshe i phagi, kay djivan an i forya Sodom oun Gomorra oun an kol forya troul lende. Yon kran vi-ladjedo koova har kol bolepangre oun djan vavar mass palla. I phagi, hoy pral kol menshende vas, sikrell mende, hoy kolenge djal, kay savo koova krenna. Yon djan an i yag, hoy hako tsiro rhačella." 
Jude1:8 Oun yaake hi ninna kolla, kay dikenn sounya, oun krenn vi-ladjedo koova, oun kamenn kek rayes pral pende, oun rakrenn djoungeles pral kolende an o bolepen." 
Jude1:9 O Debleskro baro bolepaskro, leskro lab hi Mikael, las peske gar vin, te praasell lo o benges, har yob čingras pes o bengeha, koon lendar lals o moulo Moses. Yob penas leske kokres: “O Devel, maro ray, dell tout i phagi!”" 
Jude1:10 Kolla menshe praasenn lauter, hoy le gar prindjrenna. Kova, hoy lengro mass kamella, kova krenn le yaake har i firhe, kay či djinenna. Oun yaake djan le nashedo." 
Jude1:11 Bibarht vell ap lende! Yon djan ap o čilačo drom, kay ninna o Kayn djas. Oun i lovenge anenn le doosh ap pende, yaake har o Bileam kras. Oun yaake har o Korah merenn le. O Korah hadas pes peskre menshentsa pral o Debleskre morshende." 
Jude1:12 Kol menshenge hounte ladjenn t'men. Te venn t'mer khetne, te piyenn oun te rhan, palle rhan yon pen thoulles pash t'mende oun ladjenn pen gar. Yon dikenn ap pende kokres, te djal lenge kokres mishto. Yon krenn bare laba, hoy či moldo hi. Yon hi har rouka, ap kolende či baro vella, vitar kek patria, oun kay hi tseles moulo oun venn tele dino." 
Jude1:13 Yon hi har divye panya, hoy vitsrenn pengro čik, hoy an lende hi, vin ap i phoub glan lende. Yon hi har bolepangre momlia, hoy dran pengro drom vin djan, oun hounte djan kanna hako tsireske an i kali rat." 
Jude1:14 Glan i rah tsiro penas pral lende o Henok, kova his o eftato dad pal o Adam: Dikenn, o Devel, maro ray, vell dran o bolepen. Oun boud zerya bolepangre hi pash leste." 
Jude1:15 Yob vell, te rakrell lo o čačepen vin pral i tsele menshende, oun te dell lo kolen i phagi, kay djan gar ap o Debleskro drom oun kran gar, hoy yob kamas, oun čingran ap leste čilače labentsa." 
Jude1:16 Kolla hi save menshe, kolenge kova gar mishto doha hi, hoy o Devel len das. Oun yon rhoyrenn pen, kay lenge gar feteder djal. Yon djivenn pal pengro shero. Yon hi sharede, kay rakrenn shoukar labentsa i menshentsa, te lenn le lendar lačo koova." 
Jude1:17 T'mer, mire phrala oun phenya, ma bistrenn kol laba, hoy t'menge kolla penan, kolen maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, bičras, te penenn le i menshenge leskre laba." 
Jude1:18 Yon penan: Glan ko tsiro, kay maro ray Yezous pale vella, venna save menshe, hoy san pral o Debleskro koova, oun djivenn yaake, har yon kamenna oun krenn, hoy o Devel gar kamella." 
Jude1:19 An lengro shero hi phoubyakro koova. Oun an lengro dji hi gar o Debleskro Dourho. Kolla anenn čingepen oun krenn, te rikrenn i patsle bouder gar khetne." 
Jude1:20 T'mer, mire phrala oun phenya, ačenn zoreles an t'maro patsepen, hoy das t'men o Devel. Oun mangenn les yaake, har leskro Dourho an t'mende kamell." 
Jude1:21 Oun rikrenn t'men an o Debleskro kamlepen! Oun dikenn ap maro rayeste, o Yezous Kristeste! Kova hi yaake lačo ap mende, te dell lo men o djipen, hoy gar pre-herella." 
Jude1:22 Avenn lačes ap kol menshende, kay djinenn gar, hoy te patsenn, oun yek kopo kava patsenn oun ko vavar kopo kova. Krenn lengre djia zoreles!" 
Jude1:23 Vavar nashran pen. Kolen anenn ap o čačo drom! Kova hi yaake har te tserdans len dran i yag vin. Vavar djivenn i djoungelo djipen. Rakrenn ninna kolenge lačes an o dji! Oun denn garda, te krenn gar kova, hoy yon krenna. Lengro djipen hi har i čiklo ripen ap lende." 
Jude1:24 Maro Debles hi i zoor, te rikrell lo t'men ap leskro drom, te hatsell lo kek doosh ap t'mende ap ko dives, kay han glan leste tardo, oun dikenn leskro raylepen, oun han barhteles." 
Jude1:25 Sharas koles, kay kokres o Devel hi! Yob las men dran o čilačepen vin, har maro ray, o Yezous Kristo, menge meras. Maro Devel hi o baro ray. Les hi i tseli zoor kanna oun glan kava tsiro oun an ko tsiro, hoy vella. Amen." 
Revelation1:1 An kava liil hi kova činlo, hoy o Devel moukas o Yezous Kristes te dikell, te sikrell yob peskre boudepangren, hoy an i tikno tsiro hounte vella. Oun o Yezous Kristo bičras peskro bolepaskres pash mande, te sikrell lo mande kava lauter. Me, o Yohanni, hom leskro boudepaskro" 
Revelation1:2 oun činom kova, hoy o Yezous Kristo mande sikras, an kava liil. Kol laba venna o Deblestar. Lauter, hoy dikom, činom pre." 
Revelation1:3 Barhtelo hi kova, kay draverell kal laba. Oun barhtele hi kolla, kay shounenn kal laba, oun rikrenn len an pengre djia. O tsiro hi gar dour, kay kava lauter vella." 
Revelation1:4 Me, o Yohanni, činau kava liil ap i tsele patslende, kay an i efta forya an o them Asia khetne venna. Lačepen oun barht t'menge! Kova dell t'men o Devel! Yob djivella hako tsiro: kanna oun an ko tsiro, hoy his oun hoy vella! Lačepen oun barht t'menge! Kova dell t'men o Debleskro Dourho! Kova hi har efta yaga glan o Debleskro beshepaskro tardo." 
Revelation1:5 Lačepen oun barht t'menge! Kova dell t'men o Yezous Kristo! Yob sikrell i menshende o čačo drom pash o Debleste. Oun yob hi o glanstouno lauterendar, kay stenn i moulendar pre oun venn djido. Oun yob hi ninna o ray pral i tsele raya ap kay phoub! Yob kamell men o tselo djiyestar, oun las men dran mari doosh vin, oun playsras menge peskro rateha." 
Revelation1:6 Yob kras men raya oun rashaya o Debleske, peskro dadeske. Leske hi o raylepen oun i zoor kanna oun hako tsireske! Amen." 
Revelation1:7 Dikenn, yob vella dran o bolepen, oun hakeno dikell les, ninna kolla, kay les ap o troushel dan. Oun an hake themma rovenn le pral leste, oun penenn le: “Patsams mer ap leste!” Ava, yaake hounte vell kova. Amen." 
Revelation1:8 O baro Devel penella: “Mandar vas lauter. Oun lauter vella pale glan mande. Man hi i tseli zoor, oun djivau hako tsireske: kanna oun an ko tsiro, hoy his oun hoy vella.”" 
Revelation1:9 Me, o Yohanni, hom t'maro phraal an o patsepen ap o Yezouseste. Yob hi miro baro ray, har yob t'maro baro ray hi. Yaake har t'mer venn leske palla lino, vom me ninna leske palla lino, oun dom miro patsepen gar pre. Me penom i menshenge o Debleskro lab, oun sikrom lende o Yezouseskro drom. Doleske vom stildo oun anlo ap ko them Patmos, kay an o baro pani čiddo hi." 
Revelation1:10 Ap o Debleskro dives vas o Debleskro Dourho zoreles pral mande. Oun me shounom pal mande i zorelo rakepen. Kova his har i gole, hoy dell i phourdepaskri." 
Revelation1:11 Oun ko rakepen penas: “Čin an i liil, hoy tou dikeh! Oun biče ko liil ap kol patslende, kay an kol efta forya khetne venna: Efesus, Smirna, Pergamon, Tiatira, Sardes, Filadelfia oun Laodicea!”" 
Revelation1:12 Oun me rissrom man trouyel, te dikap koles, kay ap mande rakras. Oun har rissrom man trouyel, dikom efta sonakangre momlia." 
Revelation1:13 Oun mashkral lende his yek tardo, hoy vi-dikas har i mensho. Les his i lengsto ripen ap leste, oun i sonakaskri dori troul leskro beč." 
Revelation1:14 Leskre balla ap o shero his parno har i bakrengre balla, har gib. Oun leskre yaka rhačan har i yag." 
Revelation1:15 Oun leskre herya his har dran sonakay, hoy an o bob rhačedo oun thodo vella. Oun leskro rakepen his har i gole i baro panyestar, hoy dour tele perella." 
Revelation1:16 Oun an leskro čačo vast his les efta bolepangre momlia. Oun dran leskro mouy vas i rharo, hoy ap douy rigya nay činella. Oun leskro mouy his har o kham." 
Revelation1:17 Oun har dikom les, perom glan leskre herya khetne, har voms moulo. Oun yob čivas peskro čačo vast ap mande, oun penas: “Ma dare! Mandar vas halauter. Oun lauter vella pale glan mande." 
Revelation1:18 Me hom o djido. Oun me homs moulo, oun kanna hom djido oun djivau hako tsireske. Man hi i zoor pral o merepen. Oun man hi o klidepaskro an o moulengro them." 
Revelation1:19 Čin lauter, hoy dikal, an i liil: kova, hoy kanna hi, oun kova, hoy pal kova lauter vella." 
Revelation1:20 Me kamau te hayvess, hoy kol efta bolepangre momlia hi, hoy tou an miro čačo vast dikal. Te hayvess ninna, hoy kol sonakangre momlia hi! Kol efta bolepangre momlia hi o Debleskre boudepangre, kay denn yak ap i patslende, kay an i efta forya khetne venna. Oun i efta sonakangre momlia hi i patsle, kay venna khetne an i efta forya.”" 
Revelation2:1 “Čin kava liil ap o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay dell yak ap i patslende an o foro Efesus: Kava penell kova, kay rikrell kol efta bolepangre momlia an peskro čačo vast, oun kay djal mashkral kol efta sonakangre momlia trouyel." 
Revelation2:2 Me prindjrau lauter, hoy t'mer mange kran, t'mari tseli phari boudi. T'mer dan t'maro patsepen gar pre. Oun t'mer moukenn gar čilače menshe mashkral t'mende te vell. Oun t'mer lan kolen an o yak, kay penan, te hi le o Yezouseskre bičepangre, oun yon hi kova gar. Oun t'mer hayvan, te rhorhran le." 
Revelation2:3 T'mer dan t'maro patsepen gar pre, oun lan i pharo djipen mange ap t'mende, oun t'mer van gar khino an t'mari boudi mange." 
Revelation2:4 Yek koova hi pash t'mende, hoy hi gar mishto: T'mer kamenn man bouder gar o tselo djiyestar, yaake har kova his ap ko tsiro, har t'mer patslo van. T'maro dji moukas man." 
Revelation2:5 Moukenn t'menge kova an o shero te djal, har dour t'mer mandar tele peran. Avenn pale o tselo djiyeha pash mande! Djivenn ko djipen, hoy djivan, har t'maro patsepen ap mande terno his. Te krenn kova gar, palle vau, oun lau t'mari momeli krik, oun čivrau lat ap i rig." 
Revelation2:6 Kate hi čomone, hoy t'mer krenn lačes. T'mer kamenn gar, hoy kol Nikolarya krenna, yaake har me kova vitar gar kamau." 
Revelation2:7 Shounenn halauter mishto, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella ap i patslende! Kova, kay zoreles an o patsepen ačas, oun gar pre das, koles dau te rhal ko roukestar, hoy o djipen della, kova, hoy tardo hi an o Debleskri shoukar baar.”" 
Revelation2:8 “Čin kava liil ap o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay dell yak ap i patslende an o foro Smirna: Kava penell kova, hoy hi o glanstouno oun o palstouno, hoy moulo his, oun djido vas." 
Revelation2:9 Me djinau, te lenn le t'men palla. Ninna djinau, har čorvelo han. Čačepah han t'mer bravelo! Me djinau ninna, te rakrenn kolla djoungeles pral t'mende, kay penenn pendar, te hi le Debleskre menshe. Yon hi kek Debleskre menshe. Na-a, yon hi bengeskre menshe." 
Revelation2:10 Ma darenn kol douka, hoy ap t'mende venna! O beng moukell menshen t'mendar an o stilepen te vitsrell, te vell diklo, har zorelo t'maro patsepen ap mande hi. Oun t'mer venn deesh divessa palla lino. Ačenn zoreles an t'maro patsepen ap mande, ninna te marenn le t'men! Palle dau t'men o djipen, hoy ačella. Yaake baro hi t'maro playsepen!" 
Revelation2:11 Shounenn halauter mishto, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella ap i patslende! Kova, kay zoreles an o patsepen ačas, oun gar pre das, kova merell gar o douyto kopo.”" 
Revelation2:12 “Čin kava liil ap o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay dell yak ap i patslende an o foro Pergamon: Kava penell kova, koles o rharo hi, hoy ap douy rigya činella." 
Revelation2:13 Me djinau, t'mer djivenn kote, kay o beng o ray pral i menshende hi. T'mer rikrenn zoreles ap mande, oun moukan o patsepen gar, ninna an kol divessa, har vas o Antipas maredo, har yob i menshenge mandar penas an t'maro foro, kay o beng djivella." 
Revelation2:14 I tikno koova pash t'mende hi gar mishto. Mashkral t'mende hi save menshe, kay djan ap ko drom, koles o Bileam glan i rah tsiro i menshende sikras. Yob sikras o baro rayeste pral o them Moab, – leskro lab his Balak, – har te anell lo nay i Israelitarya ap i čilačo drom. Yaake rhan i Israelitarya ko mass kol firhendar, hoy kol vavar menshe glan pengro debleste anan. Ninna djan le pash vavar djouvyende." 
Revelation2:15 Yaake hi ninna mashkral t'mende save menshe, kay ap kova patsenna, hoy kol Nikolarya penenn." 
Revelation2:16 Krenn kanna ko čilačo koova bouder gar! Te moukenn t'mer kova gar, palle vau an i tikno tsiro, oun čingrau ap kolende, kay shounan gar ap mande. Oun miro rakepen činella har i rharo." 
Revelation2:17 Shounenn halauter mishto, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella ap i patslende! Kova, kay zoreles an o patsepen ačas, oun gar pre das, koles dau ko maro dran o bolepen te rhal, hoy kharella Manna. Ninna dau les i parno bar. Ap koleste hi o nevo lab činlo, koles kek prindjrell, har kova, kay les lella.”" 
Revelation2:18 “Čin kava liil ap o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay dell yak ap i patslende an o foro Tiatira: Kava penell o Debleskro čavo, koles hi yaka har i yag, oun herya har sonakay." 
Revelation2:19 Me prindjrau lauter, hoy t'mer mange krenn. T'mer kamenn man o djiyestar, oun rikrenn zoreles ap mande. Me prindjrau lauter, hoy t'mer t'mare phralenge krenna. Oun t'mer van gar khino an t'maro patsepen. Kova, hoy t'mer kanna krenna, hi ninna boudeder har kova, hoy kran, har patslo van." 
Revelation2:20 Yek koova hi gar mishto pash t'mende. T'mer moukenn koy djouvel Isebel te rakrell, hoy yoy kamella, koya, hoy penell, te hi li o Debleskri rakepaskretsa. Yoy tserdell mire boudepangren o Debleskro dromestar tele oun penell lenge, te nay djan i morsha pash vavar djouvyende, oun i djouvya pash vavar morshende. Ninna penell li lenge, te nay rhan le ko mass, hoy vavar menshe glan pengro debleste anan." 
Revelation2:21 Me dom lat tsiro, te nay moukell li peskro čilačo drom. Oun yoy kamell gar peskro djoungelo koova te moukell." 
Revelation2:22 Doleske vitsrau lat ap o nasslengro čiben. Oun kolla, kay lah sovan, yon te moukenn kova gar, palle anau bare douka ap lende." 
Revelation2:23 Oun kolakre čaven dau moulo. Palle hayvenn i tsele patsle, te hom me kova, kay halauter prindjrella, hoy i menshen an o shero oun an o dji hi. Oun hakeno, kay čilačo koova kras, kova lell mandar koy phagi pal kova, hoy yob kras." 
Revelation2:24 T'mer vavar patsle an o foro Tiatira, kay gar pal kol rhorhene laba djivan, oun ko bengeskro drom gar prindjrenna, ap t'mende penau me: Me penau t'menge či vavar koova, hoy t'mer hounte krenna," 
Revelation2:25 har kova, te rikrenn mire laba zoreles an t'mare djia, yaake rah bis te vau pale." 
Revelation2:26 Kova, kay zoreles an o patsepen ačas, oun gar pre das, oun krell lauter, hoy me kamau, yaake rah har djivell lo, koleste dau i zoor, te vell lo ray pral i menshende an i vavar themma." 
Revelation2:27 Yob anell len i sasterno vasteha oun dell lauteren paash, kay gar ap leste shounenna, yaake har čare paash dino venna." 
Revelation2:28 Yaake har das man miro dad peskri zoor, yaake dau koles miri zoor. Ninna dau les ko bolepaskri momeli, hoy djal pre taysarlake ap o bolepen." 
Revelation2:29 Shounenn halauter mishto, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation3:1 “Čin kava liil ap o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay dell yak ap i patslende an o foro Sardes: Kava penell kova, koles o Debleskro Dourho hi, oun koles i efta bolepangre momlia an o vast hi. Me djinau lauter, hoy t'mer kran. T'mer han moulo, ninna te penenn le pral t'mende, te han djido." 
Revelation3:2 Stenn pre o sopastar! Mashkral t'mende hi gomme menshe, kay patsenn ap mande. Kolla hi gar boud. Oun lengro patsepen hi tikno. Krenn lengro patsepen pale zoreles! Glan miro Debleste hi kova gar mishto doha, hoy t'mer mange krenn." 
Revelation3:3 Ma bistrenn, hoy t'menge penlo vas oun hoy shounan! Oun rikrenn ap kal laba! Oun avenn pale ap o čačo drom! Te krenn kova gar, oun stenn gar pre o sopastar, palle vau pral t'mende har i čorepaskro. Oun t'mer djinenn gar, havo tsireske pale vau." 
Revelation3:4 Ninna te hi gar boud patsle an o foro Sardes, kay djan ap miro drom, hi save patsle mank t'mende, kay kran pengre koola gar čiklo. Kolla hi moldo, te venn le rido an parne koola, oun djivenn mantsa an o bolepen." 
Revelation3:5 Kova, kay zoreles an o patsepen ačas, oun gar pre das, kova lella parne ripya. Oun leskro lab lau me gar vin dran o liil, kay i djide dren činlo hi. Ninna penau glan miro dadeste oun glan leskre bolepangre, kay yob hi miro." 
Revelation3:6 Shounenn halauter mishto, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation3:7 “Čin kava liil ap o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay dell yak ap i patslende an o foro Filadelfia: Kava penell o Debleskro čačepaskro. Koles hi o Davideskro klidepaskro an o vast. Yob te krell o voudar pre, palle nay krell les kek pale pandlo. Yob te krell o voudar pandlo, palle nay krell les kek pre." 
Revelation3:8 Me prindjrau lauter, hoy t'mer mange kran. Dikenn, me krom i voudar glan t'mende pre, hoy kek nay pandell. T'men hi i tikni zoor, oun rikran miro lab an t'mare djia, oun dan man gar bourhoste." 
Revelation3:9 Shounenn, hoy me kol bengeskre menshentsa krau, kay rhorhenn oun penenn pendar, te hi le o Debleskre menshe, oun yon hi kek Debleskre menshe. Me krau, te venn le pash t'mende, te vitsrenn le pen glan t'mende ap i phoub, oun te hayvenn le, te kamau t'men o tselo djiyestar." 
Revelation3:10 T'mer rikran ko lab, hoy t'menge penom, oun van gar khino an o patsepen ap mande. Doleske rikrau mire vasta pral t'mende an ko pharo tsiro, kay i bibarht vella pral i tsele menshende ap kay phoub, te vell diklo, hoy an lengre djia hi." 
Revelation3:11 Me vau an i tikno tsiro pale. Rikrenn t'maro patsepen zoreles, te lell kek vavar ko shoukar koova t'mendar, hoy t'menge an o bolepen hi, oun hoy kolla lenna, kay dan pengro patsepen gar pre." 
Revelation3:12 Kova, kay zoreles an o patsepen ačas, oun gar pre das, dran koleste krau me yekes, kay hi har i baro bar, hoy rikrell miro Debleskro kheer. Oun kova ačell koy tardo hako tsireske. Oun me činau o lab miro Deblestar ap leste, oun o lab o Debleskro forestar. Kova hi o nevo Yerusalem, hoy dran o bolepen tele vella. Oun miro nevo lab činau ninna ap leste." 
Revelation3:13 Shounenn halauter mishto, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation3:14 “Čin kava liil ap o Debleskro boudepaskro, kay dell yak ap i patslende an o foro Laodicea: Kava penell kova, kay kharell Amen, oun penell hako tsiro o čačepen, oun sikrell i menshende o čačo drom pash o Debleste. Yob his koy pashel, har o Devel lauter kras." 
Revelation3:15 Me djinau halauter, hoy t'mer kran. T'mer han har i pipen, hoy hi gar shila, vitar gar tato. Kamaus, te venn t'mer yek kolendar." 
Revelation3:16 T'mer han paash tato. Doleske čoungrau t'men vin dran miro mouy. 
Revelation3:17 T'mer penenna: Mer ham bravelo, oun men hi halauter; či hounte vell men bouder. Me penau t'menge: T'mer djinenn gar, te han an i bibarht, yaake te khaytenn t'mer man. T'mer han čorvelo oun nango oun korelo." 
Revelation3:18 Doleske penau t'menge: Ginenn mandar sonakay, savo sonakay, hoy an i yag thodo vas, yaake te venn t'mer čačepah bravelo. Ginenn mandar ninna parne ripya, oun rivenn kolla ap t'mende, te han bouder gar nango, oun hounte ladjenn t'men bouder gar. Oun ginenn kouč djet, oun makenn t'mare yaka, te nay dikenn pale!" 
Revelation3:19 Lauteren, kay kamau o djiyestar, kolende sikrau lengri doosh, oun penau lenge daventsa, te shounenn le ap mande. Moukenn kanna t'maro čilačo drom, oun avenn pale ap miro drom!" 
Revelation3:20 Dikenn, me hom glan o voudar tardo, oun dau ap ko voudar. Koon shounell, hoy me penau, oun krell mange o voudar pre, pash koleste djau me dren, oun rhau leha, oun yob rhal mantsa." 
Revelation3:21 Kova, kay zoreles an o patsepen ačas, oun gar pre das, kova nay beshell pes mantsa ap miro rayeskro beshepaskro, yaake har me ninna zoreles tardo homs, oun me beshom man miro dadeha ap leskro rayeskro beshepaskro." 
Revelation3:22 Shounenn halauter mishto, hoy o Debleskro Dourho penella ap i patslende!”" 
Revelation4:1 Pal kova dikom i voudar an o bolepen, hoy pre hi. Oun kova, kay ap mande rakras, oun leskri gole zorelo har i phourdepaskri his, kova penas ap mande: “Ab kate pre! Me sikrau tout, hoy pal kava vella.”" 
Revelation4:2 Oun ap yek kopo vas o Debleskro Dourho zoreles ap mande, oun me dikom i rayeskro beshepaskro an o bolepen tardo. Oun ap koleste his yek beshdo." 
Revelation4:3 Leskro mouy dikas yaake shoukar vin har kol kouč shoukar barra Yaspis oun Karneol. Oun troul o rayeskro beshepaskro his i brishineskro bogo, kay dikas yaake vin har ko shoukar bar Smaragdo." 
Revelation4:4 Oun troul o rayeskro beshepaskro his biish-te-star vavar rayengre beshepangre tardo. Oun ap kolende his biish-te-star čačepangre phoure beshdo. Kolen his parne ripya ap lende, oun i shereskro sonakay ap lengre shere." 
Revelation4:5 Oun kotar, kay ko rayeskro beshepaskro hi, das yag karye pral oun tele, oun vas i bari gole vin, har koy gole, hoy o bolepen krella, te dell baro brishin oun te djal yag tele ap i phoub. Oun glan o rayeskro beshepaskro rhačan efta yaga. Kol efta yaga hi o Debleskro Dourho." 
Revelation4:6 Glan o rayeskro beshepaskro his čomone har i baro pani dran vali. Kova his yaake djoudjo, te dikenn le nay dren, har dikenn le an i vali. Troul o rayeskro beshepaskro his star zorele bolepangre, yek ap haki rig. Kolla his pherde yaka glan oun palla." 
Revelation4:7 Oun ko glanstouno zorelo bolepaskro his har i bari margodja. Oun ko douyto zorelo bolepaskro his har i terni morshkani groumni. Oun ko triinto zorelo bolepaskres his i mouy har i menshes hi. Oun ko starto zorelo bolepaskro his har i baro čirklo an o bolepen. 
Revelation4:8 Oun hakenes lendar his shob čirklengre moussya. Kolla his dren oun vin pherde yaka. Oun yon givenn o tselo dives oun i tseli rat: Lačo - oun čačo - har kek vavar - hi o Devel, ko ray pral halauter. Hako tsiro djivell lo, kanna, oun an ko tsiro, hoy his, oun hoy vella." 
Revelation4:9 Oun yaake sharenn kol star zorele bolepangre koles, kay ap o rayeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi, oun yon hadenn les oun krenn les baro, oun parkrenn pen pash leste, kay djivell hako tsireske." 
Revelation4:10 Hako kopo, kay krenn le kova, vitsrenn pen kol biish-te-star čačepangre phoure glan koleste tele, kay ap o rayeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi, oun sharenn koles, koleskro djipen gar pre-herella. Oun yon čivenn pengro sherengro sonakay glan o rayeskro beshepaskro tele, oun penenna:" 
Revelation4:11 “Tou, o Devel, maro ray, tou hal moldo, te less o raylepen, oun o sharepen, oun i zoor. Tou kral o bolepen oun i phoub. Yaake, har tou kamal, yaake kral tou kova, oun vas kova.”" 
Revelation5:1 Oun me dikom i liil an o čačo vast kolestar, kay ap o rayeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi. Ap ko liil his dren oun vin čomone činlo. Oun ko liil his khetne pandlo efta doryentsa." 
Revelation5:2 Oun me dikom i zorelo bolepaskres, kova das zoreles gole: “Koon hi moldo, te nay krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren?”" 
Revelation5:3 Oun an o bolepen, oun ap i phoub, oun tel i phoub his kek koy, kay hi moldo, te krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren." 
Revelation5:4 Oun har dikom, te his kek moldo, te krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren, koy rovom zoreles." 
Revelation5:5 Oun yek kol čačepangre phourendar penas ap mande: “Ma rob! Dik, yek las i zoor o Deblestar pral o čilačepen oun o merepen, oun hi moldo, te krell lo ko liil pre, te dikell lo dren. Yob hi kova, kay kharenn le levo, kay vell dran o them Youda. Yob hi o Davideskro čavo.”" 
Revelation5:6 Oun me dikom i terno bakres pash o rayeskro beshepaskro, hoy vi-dikas, har vals lo maredo. Kova hi tardo mashkral kol star zorele bolepangre oun kol čačepangre phourende. Les hi efta shinga oun efta yaka. Kol efta yaka hi o Debleskro Dourho, hoy pral i tseli phoub vin bičedo vas." 
Revelation5:7 Oun o terno bakro vas pash koleste, hoy ap o rayeskro beshepaskro beshdo his, oun las ko liil dran leskro čačo vast." 
Revelation5:8 Oun har las yob o liil, peran kol star zorele bolepangre oun kol biish-te-star čačepangre phoure glan o terno bakro tele. Oun hakenes lendar his i bashepaskri. Oun yon bashran i shoukar bashepen. Len his ninna sonakangre čare pherdo goudlo kasht, hoy o Debleske rhačedo vella, oun mishto soungella. Ko goudlo kasht hi o mangepen, hoy o Debleskre menshe pengro Deblestar mangan." 
Revelation5:9 Oun yon givenn i nevi gili, oun penenn: Tou hal moldo, te less ko liil, oun te kress ko liil pre. Tou val maredo, oun playsral tiro rateha, te giness menshen tiro Debleske. Kolla venna dran hako them, haki natsyona, haki harmenatsyona oun hako rakepen." 
Revelation5:10 Oun tou kreh lendar raya oun rashaya maro Debleske. Oun yon venn raya pral i tseli phoub. 
Revelation5:11 Oun me dikom oun shounom boud bolepangren tardo troul o rayeskro beshepaskro, oun troul kol star zorele bolepangre, oun troul kol čačepangre phourende. Yon his yaake boud har deesh zerya (10.000) kope deesh zerya oun yek zero kope yek zero." 
Revelation5:12 Oun yon givenn zoreles: O terno bakro, hoy vas maredo, kova hi moldo, te vell les i bari zoor, ninna o bravlepen, oun o gosvepen, oun o sharepen, oun o raylepen, oun i gilya, hoy les hadenna, oun bares krenna." 
Revelation5:13 Oun me shounom i gili, hoy lauter givan, kay an o bolepen hi, oun ap i phoub, oun tel i phoub, oun an o baro pani. Oun yon givenn: “Koleske, kay ap o rayeskro beshepaskro beshdo hi oun ko terno bakreske, kolenge hi i gilya, oun o sharepen, oun o raylepen, oun i zoor pral lauter, kanna oun hako tsireske.”" 
Revelation5:14 Oun kol star zorele bolepangre penan: Amen! Oun kol čačepangre phoure vitsran pen glan o Debleste oun glan o bakro tele, oun sharan len." 
Revelation6:1 Oun me dikom, har ko terno bakro yek kol efta doryendar pre pandas, hoy ko liil khetne rikrenna. Oun me shounom, har yek kol star zorele bolepangrendar zoreles penas: “Ab!”"
